Genesis1:1 Aretak xchapletaj u banic ronojel ri c'olic
Genesis1:2 Man c'o ta u beya'l ri uwächulew
Genesis1:3 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “¡Chc'ol ri sakilal!” Xc'oji' c'u ri sakil.
Genesis1:4 Xril c'u ri Dios chi utz ri sakilal
Genesis1:5 xucoj “pa k'ij” che u bi' ri sakilal
Genesis1:6 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chubana' quieb ri ja'
Genesis1:7 Ri Dios xuban quieb che ri ja': niq'uiaj xcanaj cho ri ulew
Genesis1:8 xucoj “caj” che u bi' ri qui xo'l. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri ucab k'ij.
Genesis1:9 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chumulij rib ri ja' ri c'o chuxe' ri caj xa pa jun c'olbal
Genesis1:10 Ri Dios xucoj “ulew” che u bi' ri chaki'j ri xc'utunic
Genesis1:11 xubij: “Ri ulew chebuq'uiyisaj ronojel qui wäch k'ayes xukuje' ichaj ri quequiya' ija'
Genesis1:12 Xeq'uiy c'ut ronojel qui wäch k'ayes cho ri ulew ri quequiya' qui wäch
Genesis1:13 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri urox k'ij.
Genesis1:14 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Chec'ol chäj chupam ri räxalaj caj
Genesis1:15 
Genesis1:16 Ri Dios xebuban ri quieb sakilal: ri nim rech cätunun pa k'ij xukuje' ri ch'utin rech cätunun chak'ab. Xukuje' xebuban ri ch'imil.
Genesis1:17 Ri Dios xebucoj tak ri sakilal chupam ri räxalaj caj rech cutunuj ri ulew.
Genesis1:18 Che ri pa k'ij xukuje' che ri chak'ab
Genesis1:19 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri ucaj k'ij.
Genesis1:20 Xubij chi ri Dios: “Chebupok'isaj ri ja' ronojel qui wäch awaj
Genesis1:21 Ri Dios xebuban nimak jilijak tak awaj pa ri plo
Genesis1:22 xebutewichi'j ri awaj ri xebubano
Genesis1:23 Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri uro' k'ij.
Genesis1:24 Xubij chi ri Dios: “Chebupok'isaj ri ulew ronojel qui wäch awaj: aj uwo ja xukuje' juyubal tak awaj
Genesis1:25 Ri Dios xebuban conojel we awaj ri'
Genesis1:26 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Kabana' ri winak jacha' ri uj
Genesis1:27 Xuwinakirisaj c'ut ri Dios ri winak jas ri u ca'yebal
Genesis1:28 xebutewichi'j: “Chec'ol q'ui iwalc'ual; chinojisaj ri uwächulew
Genesis1:29 Xukuje' xubij chi na chque: “Chiwilampe'
Genesis1:30 Quinya' ri räx k'ayes che tzukbal quib conojel ri awaj ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub
Genesis1:31 xril c'u ri Dios chi ronojel ri u banom sibalaj utz xelic. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri uwak k'ij.
Genesis2:1 Xtz'akat c'u u banic ri caj ulew
Genesis2:2 Aretak xurik ri uwuk k'ij ri Dios u q'uisom chic u banic ri xuchaplej u banic
Genesis2:3 Xutewichi'j c'ut ri uwuk k'ij
Genesis2:4 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri u banic ri caj xukuje' ri ulew. Aretak ri Ajawaxel Dios xuban ri caj ulew
Genesis2:5 maja' c'u c'o jun k'ayes cho ri uwächulew mawi c'o jun ichaj q'uiyinak rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel Dios maja' cukasaj jäb puwi' ri ulew
Genesis2:6 Cäq'uiy c'u ulok ja' pa ri ulew
Genesis2:7 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel are xucoj ri puc'uc' ulew che u nuq'uic ri achi
Genesis2:8 Ri Ajawaxel xusuc'umaj jun ticonijibal chupam ri ulew Eden ri c'o pa elebal k'ij
Genesis2:9 Ri Dios xebuq'uiyisaj chila' ronojel qui wäch je'licalaj tak che' ri quequiya' utzalaj tak wächinic utz qui tijic. Pa u niq'uiajil c'ut ri ticonijibal xucoj wi ri juwi' che' re ri c'aslemal
Genesis2:10 Pa Eden cäq'uiy wi jun nima' ri cuja'j ri ticonijibal chila' c'ut cujach wi rib we nima' ri' pa quiejeb.
Genesis2:11 Ri nabe nima'
Genesis2:12 Ri k'an puak ri c'o pa ri ulew ri' sibalaj pakal rajil
Genesis2:13 Ri ucab nima'
Genesis2:14 Are c'u ri urox are' ri nima' Tigris
Genesis2:15 Aretak ri Ajawaxel Dios xucoj ri achi chupam ri ticonijibal Eden rech cutajij xukuje' cuchajij
Genesis2:16 xuya' we takanic ri' che: “Cuya' catij awe ri qui wäch conojel ri che' ri e c'o pa ri ticonijibal
Genesis2:17 Matij awe ri u wäch ri che' ri'
Genesis2:18 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel Dios: “Man utz taj chi ri achi xak u tuquiel cäc'ojic. Quinban jun to'l rech ri takal che.”
Genesis2:19 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel Dios ulew xucoj che qui banic conojel ri awaj xukuje' conojel tak ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'
Genesis2:20 
Genesis2:21 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xuwartasaj ri Adan aretak c'u kajinak che waram ri Dios xresaj jun chque ri u c'alc'a'x
Genesis2:22 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xucoj we c'alc'a'x ri' che u banic jun ixok
Genesis2:23 Aretak ri Adan xril ri ixok
Genesis2:24 Rumal c'u ri' ri achi quebuya' can ri u tat u nan rech cätuni' ruc' ri rixokil
Genesis2:25 Ri achi jacha' ri ixok e ch'anach'oj
Genesis3:1 Ri cumätz are c'o na u no'j chquiwäch conojel ri juyubal tak awaj ri e u banom ri Ajawaxel Dios
Genesis3:2 Ri ixok xubij che: “Cuya' cäkatij kech ri u wäch apachique che'
Genesis3:3 are c'u ri u wäch ri che' ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil ri ticonijibal. Xubij ri Dios chke chi man cäkatij taj
Genesis3:4 Are c'u ri cumätz xubij che ri ixok: “Man kastzij taj. Man quixcäm taj.
Genesis3:5 Ri Dios kas reta'm chi aretak quitij iwe ri u wäch we che' ri'
Genesis3:6 Xril c'u ri ixok chi sibalaj je'lic ri u wäch ri che'
Genesis3:7 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xejaktaj ri qui bak'wäch
Genesis3:8 Pa ri u benabal k'ij
Genesis3:9 Are' c'u ri Dios ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ri achi
Genesis3:10 Ri achi xubij: “Xinto chi cäwacat la pa ri ticonijibal xinxe'j c'u wib
Genesis3:11 Ri Dios xuc'ot u chi' ri achi
Genesis3:12 Ri achi xubij che ri Dios: “Ri ixok ri xya' la chwe che wachil are xyo'w ri u wäch ri che' chwe
Genesis3:13 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xuc'ot chi u chi' ri ixok
Genesis3:14 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xubij che ri cumätz: “Rumal wa' ri a banom at c'okotajinak chquixo'l conojel ri niq'uiaj awaj. Camic cachaplej bic u jururexic awib cho ri ulew
Genesis3:15 Quinban na chi ri at xukuje' ri ixok
Genesis3:16 Xubij c'u ri Dios che ri ixok: “Quinbano chi cänimataj ri a k'oxomal aretak cäc'oji' ri awal
Genesis3:17 Xubij c'u che ri achi: “Rumal rech xanimaj u tzij ri awixokil
Genesis3:18 Ri ulew quebuya' na q'uix chawe xukuje' quiäkwok' quebatij na juyubal tak k'ayes.
Genesis3:19 Cach'äc na ri a wa ruc' ri u c'atanal ri a palaj
Genesis3:20 Ri achi xucoj Eva che u bi' ri rixokil
Genesis3:21 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xebuban atz'iak re qui tz'umal tak awaj
Genesis3:22 Xubij c'u ri Dios: “Camic ri achi uxinak jacha' jun chke
Genesis3:23 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xresaj bic ri achi pa ri ticonijibal ri c'o pa Eden
Genesis3:24 Aretak resam chi bic ri achi
Genesis4:1 Ri Adan
Genesis4:2 Xalax chi c'u ri Abel u chak' ri Cain. Ri Abel xebutic chij
Genesis4:3 Xoc'ow ri k'ijol c'o c'u jun k'ij aretak ri Cain xuc'am bic jubik' qui wächinic ri u tico'n
Genesis4:4 Xukuje' ri Abel xebuc'am bic jujun chque ri nabe tak cal ri e u chij ri e chomak xebuya' che tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Ri Ajawaxel nim xril wi ri Abel
Genesis4:5 man je ta c'u xuban ri Dios che rilic ri Cain
Genesis4:6 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel che ri Cain: “¿Jasche sibalaj xpe awoyowal
Genesis4:7 We ta utz ri cäbano
Genesis4:8 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak ri Cain xusiq'uij bic ri Abel
Genesis4:9 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ot u chi' ri Cain
Genesis4:10 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Cain: “¿Jas ri xaban che ri a chak'? Ri u quiq'uel ri a chak' ri xatix cho ri ulew
Genesis4:11 Rumal ri' xat canaj pa ri c'okotajic
Genesis4:12 Pune' cajosk'ij
Genesis4:13 Ri Cain xubij che ri Ajawaxel: “Ri in man quincuin taj quinch'ij jun c'äjisabal wächaj ri sibalaj nim.
Genesis4:14 Camic quinesaj la bic cho we ulew ri'
Genesis4:15 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Cain: “Apachin ri catcämisanic wukub mul cäc'äjisax na u wäch.” Ri Ajawaxel xucoj retal ri Cain
Genesis4:16 Xel c'u bic ri Cain chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Genesis4:17 Ri Cain xruc'aj rib ruc' ri rixokil. Xcanaj c'u yawab winak. Xralaj c'ut ri Enoc. Ri Cain xuyac jun tinimit ri xucoj Enoc che u bi' jas ri u bi' ri u c'ojol.
Genesis4:18 Ri Irad are' ri u tat ri Enoc
Genesis4:19 Ri Lamec xec'oji' quieb rixokil: Ri jun are' Ada u bi'
Genesis4:20 Ri Ada xralaj ri Jabal
Genesis4:21 Ri Jabal c'o jun rachalal Jubal u bi'
Genesis4:22 Are c'u ri Zil xc'oji' jun ral Tubal-cain u bi'
Genesis4:23 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij ri Lamec xubij chque ri e quieb rixokil: “Ada
Genesis4:24 we wukub (7) mul cäc'äjisax u wäch ri cäcämisan ri Cain
Genesis4:25 Ri Adan xruc'aj chi rib ruc' ri rixokil
Genesis4:26 Xukuje' ri Set xc'oji' jun u c'ojol ri xucoj Enos che u bi'. Kas c'u chi' xchapletaj u nataxic ulok ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel.
Genesis5:1 E are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Adan. Aretak ri Dios xebuban ri winak
Genesis5:2 chi achi
Genesis5:3 Ri Adan jun sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (130) u junab aretak xalax ri u c'ojol ri sibalaj junam cäca'y ruc'
Genesis5:4 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient (800) junab ri Adan. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:5 belejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (930) junab xc'asi' ri Adan. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:6 Ri Set jun sient ruc' job (105) u junab aretak xalax ri Enos ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:7 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' wukub (807) junab ri Set. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:8 belejeb sient ruc' cablajuj (912) junab xc'asi' ri Set. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:9 Jumuch' lajuj (90) u junab ri Enos aretak xalax ri Cainan ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:10 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' olajuj (815) junab ri Enos. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:11 belejeb sient ruc' job (905) junab xc'asi' ri Enos. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:12 Oxc'al lajuj (70) u junab ri Cainan aretak xalax ri Mahalaleel ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:13 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' cawinak (840) junab ri Cainan. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:14 belejeb sient ruc' lajuj (910) junab xc'asi' ri Cainan. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:15 Oxc'al job (65) u junab ri Mahalaleel aretak xalax ri Jared ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:16 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (830) junab ri Mahalaleel. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:17 wajxakib sient ruc' jumuch' olajuj (895) junab xc'asi' ri Mahalaleel. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:18 Jun sient ruc' oxc'al quieb (162) u junab ri Jared aretak xalax ri Enoc ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:19 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wajxakib sient (800) junab ri Jared. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:20 belejeb sient ruc' oxc'al quieb (962) junab xc'asi' ri Jared. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:21 Oxc'al job (65) u junab ri Enoc aretak xalax ri Matusalen ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:22 Ri Enoc xniman che ri Dios pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal. Xc'asi' chi c'u na oxib sient (300) junab. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:23 oxib sient ruc' oxc'al job (365) junab xc'asi' ri Enoc.
Genesis5:24 Ri Enoc xak xsachic
Genesis5:25 Jun sient ruc' jumuch' wukub (187) u junab ri Matusalen aretak xalax ri Lamec ri u c'ojol.
Genesis5:26 Xc'asi' chi c'u na wukub sient ruc' jumuch' quieb (782) junab ri Matusalen. Xebalax chi na niq'uiaj u c'ojol
Genesis5:27 belejeb sient ruc' oxc'al belejeb (969) junab xc'asi' ri Matusalen. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:28 Jun sient jumuch' quieb (182) u junab ri Lamec aretak xalax jun u c'ojol
Genesis5:29 ri xucoj Noe che u bi'
Genesis5:30 Chwi' ri ralc'ualaxic ri Noe
Genesis5:31 wukub sient ruc' oxc'al wuklajuj (777) junab xc'asi' ri Lamec. Je u junab wa' xcämic.
Genesis5:32 Job sient (500) chic u junab ri Noe aretak xebalax ri Sem
Genesis6:1 Aretak ri achijab xquichaplej u nojisaxic ri uwächulew
Genesis6:2 ri e ralc'ual ri Dios xquilo chi ri alitomab ri' sibalaj e je'lic. Xequicha' quixokil chquixo'l
Genesis6:3 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel: “Man quinya' ta be chque ri winak chi sibalaj naj cäc'asi'c
Genesis6:4 Ri nimak tak achijab xec'utun cho ri uwächulew aretak ri e ralc'ual ri Dios xcuc'aj quib cuc' tak ri e qui mia'l ri achijab rech quec'oji' calc'ual cuc'
Genesis6:5 Ri Ajawaxel xrilo chi sibalaj nim ri quetzelal ri winak cho ri uwächulew
Genesis6:6 c'ax c'u xuna' pa ri ranima' chi xuban ri winak. Ruc' sibalaj c'axc'ol
Genesis6:7 “Quinq'uis tzij paquiwi' ri winak cho ri uwächulew ri e nu winakirisam
Genesis6:8 Ri Ajawaxel utz c'u xril wi ri Noe.
Genesis6:9 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri Noe. Ri Noe are' ri jun achi ri utz
Genesis6:10 Ri Noe xec'oji' oxib u c'ojol
Genesis6:11 Nojinak c'u ri uwächulew che etzelal chuwäch ri Dios xukuje' che tokinic.
Genesis6:12 Conojel ri winak e uxinak nimak tak ajmaquib. Aretak xril ri Dios chi sibalaj nojinak ronojel ri uwächulew che ri etzelal
Genesis6:13 xubij che ri Noe: “Xchomataj wumal chi quinsach qui wäch conojel ri winak. E are' c'ut ajchak'maquib chi e c'o q'ui ri tokinic cho ri uwächulew
Genesis6:14 Chabana' ba' jun jucub re q'uisis
Genesis6:15 Je u nimal jucub wa' cäbano: jun sient ruc' oxc'al job (165) bara' u rabic
Genesis6:16 Oxwik cäban che
Genesis6:17 Quinkasaj na jun k'ekal jäb puwi' ri uwächulew
Genesis6:18 Awuc' c'u at quinjekeba' wi ri nu c'ulwächinic
Genesis6:19 Xukuje' quebacoj pa ri jucub jun ama' jun ati't chque ronojel qui wäch awaj ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew
Genesis6:20 Queboc na awuc' pa ri jucub pa tak c'ulaj ronojel qui wäch awaj: chicop ri c'o qui xic'
Genesis6:21 Chamulij ronojel qui wäch ri cätijic
Genesis6:22 Ri Noe xuban ronojel ri xtak chubanic rumal ri Dios.
Genesis7:1 Chwi' chi c'ut ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Noe: “Chquixo'l conojel ri winak re we k'ijol ri'
Genesis7:2 Chebamajij wukub ama'ib xukuje' wukub ati'tab che ronojel awaj ch'ajch'oj
Genesis7:3 Xukuje' quebacojo pa ri jucub wukutak c'ulaj chque ronojel qui wäch chicop ri c'o qui xic'
Genesis7:4 Xa c'u pa wukub k'ij quinkasaj jun k'ekal jäb re cawinak (40) k'ij
Genesis7:5 Xuban c'u ri Noe ronojel ri xtak che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel.
Genesis7:6 Wakib sient (600) u junab ri Noe aretak xnojisax ri uwächulew rumal ri ja' re ri k'ekal jäb.
Genesis7:7 Ri Noe rachil ri rixokil
Genesis7:8 Xukuje' ri awaj ri e ch'ajch'oj xukuje' ri e tz'il
Genesis7:9 pa tak c'ulaj xeboc pa ri jucub ruc' ri Noe
Genesis7:10 Chuwuk k'ij ri k'ekal jäb xuchaplej u ch'ukic ri ulew.
Genesis7:11 Pa ri uwuklajuj (17) rajilabal ri ucab ic'. Ri Noe c'o chic wakib sient (600) u junab. Kas pa ri k'ij ri'
Genesis7:12 Cawinak (40) k'ij
Genesis7:13 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' xoc ri Noe pa ri jucub e rachil ri Sem
Genesis7:14 Ronojel qui wäch juyubal tak awaj xeboc cuc' pa ri jucub
Genesis7:15 Ronojel qui wäch awaj xeboc ruc' ri Noe pa ri jucub
Genesis7:16 Jun ama' jun ati't chque ronojel qui wäch awaj
Genesis7:17 Cawinak (40) k'ij xuban ri k'ekal jäb. Aretak xq'uiy ri ja'
Genesis7:18 Sibalaj c'u xq'uiy na ri ja' xutakej pakalem
Genesis7:19 Sibalaj c'u naj xpaki' na ri ja' chi xebuch'uk na ri juyub ri sibalaj naj e elinak puwi' ri uwächulew;
Genesis7:20 xpaki' chi c'u na wajxakib (8) bara' ri ja' paquiwi' tak ri juyub.
Genesis7:21 Je u sachic qui wäch wa' conojel ri winak cho ri uwächulew
Genesis7:22 Xecäm conojel ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew
Genesis7:23 Xuwi ri Noe xukuje' ri xeboc ruc' pa ri jucub
Genesis7:24 jun sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (150) k'ij xchemi ri ja' cho ri uwächulew.
Genesis8:1 Xnataj ri Noe che ri Dios xukuje' xenataj conojel ri awaj che ri e c'o ruc' ri Noe pa ri jucub. Xutak ulok jun quiakik' puwi' ri uwächulew
Genesis8:2 xetz'apitaj ri jul pa ri ulew ri quel wi ulok ri nimalaj plo
Genesis8:3 nojim xbutzajic ri ja'. Chuq'uisbal ri jun sient ruc' cawinak lajuj (150) k'ij
Genesis8:4 pa ri uwuklajuj (17) rajilabal ri uwuk ic'
Genesis8:5 Xutakej c'u u tzajic ri ja'
Genesis8:6 Aretak oc'owinak chic cawinak (40) k'ij
Genesis8:7 xutzokopij c'u bic jun joj; are c'u ri joj cärapapic cäbe jeri' cäbe jela'
Genesis8:8 Aretak u tzokopim chic ri joj
Genesis8:9 ri palomax man xurik taj jawije' xtaq'ui' wi xtzelej chi c'u jumul pa ri jucub
Genesis8:10 Xreyej chi na wukub k'ij ri Noe
Genesis8:11 Xa jubik' man coc ri ak'ab aretak xtzelej ri palomax pa ri jucub
Genesis8:12 Xreyej chi na wukub k'ij c'ä te' ri' xutak
Genesis8:13 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri nabe ic'
Genesis8:14 Pa ri juwinak wukub (27) rajilabal ri ucab ic'
Genesis8:15 Xubij ri Dios che ri Noe:
Genesis8:16 “Chixel ulok pa ri jucub ri at
Genesis8:17 Xukuje' chebawesaj bic ri awaj ri e c'o awuc': ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'
Genesis8:18 Xel c'u ulok ri Noe pa ri jucub rachil ri rixokil
Genesis8:19 Xukuje' xebel ulok conojel ri awaj ri e aj uwo ja
Genesis8:20 Xuban c'ut ri Noe jun porobal ri che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Xebuc'am awaj xukuje' chicop ri c'o qui xic' ri e ch'ajch'oj jujun che jujun qui wäch
Genesis8:21 Aretak xopan ri c'oc'alaj ruxlab ri tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Genesis8:22 “Joropa' k'ij ri cäjeki' ri uwächulew
Genesis9:1 Ri Dios xutewichi'j ri Noe xukuje' ri e u c'ojol cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Chec'ol q'ui iwalc'ual
Genesis9:2 Conojel ri awaj re ri uwächulew quebirbob na che xe'n ib chiwäch. Conojel awaj ri e c'o pa ri quiakik'
Genesis9:3 Cuya' quitij iwe apachique awaj
Genesis9:4 C'o c'u jun jasach ri man cuya' taj quitijo: ri ti'j rachil ri u quiq'uel
Genesis9:5 In quinch'ojij na chque ri winak chquijujunal
Genesis9:6 “We c'o jun cucämisaj jun winak
Genesis9:7 Are c'u ri ix
Genesis9:8 Xubij chi c'u ri Dios che ri Noe
Genesis9:9 “Chiwilampe'
Genesis9:10 Xukuje' cuc' conojel ri awaj ri e c'o iwuc' ri xebel ulok pa ri jucub: ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'
Genesis9:11 Ri nu c'ulwächinic iwuc' ix man cäq'uextaj ta na: man quinsach ta chquiwäch ri winak
Genesis9:12 Are wa' ri retal ri nu c'ulwächinic ri xa jumul quinban iwuc'
Genesis9:13 Nu cojom ri nu räxquiak'ab pa ri sutz'
Genesis9:14 Aretak quintak ulok sutz'
Genesis9:15 Cänataj c'u ri c'ulwächinic ri nu banom iwuc' xukuje' cuc' conojel ri awaj
Genesis9:16 Aretak ri räxquiak'ab c'o pa tak ri sutz'
Genesis9:17 Are wa' ri retal ri c'ulwächinic ri nu jekebam
Genesis9:18 Ri Sem
Genesis9:19 E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Noe
Genesis9:20 Ri Noe xux ajticonijel
Genesis9:21 C'o jun k'ij ri Noe xutij ri u wa'l uva
Genesis9:22 Aretak ri Cam
Genesis9:23 Are c'u ri Sem xukuje' ri Japet xquic'am jun atz'iak xquiq'uiak chquij ri kas qui teleb che u ch'ukic ri qui tat. Rech man cäquil taj chi ch'analic
Genesis9:24 Aretak xoc'ow ri u k'abaric

Genesis19:8 E c'o quieb nu mia'l ri e k'apojib; quebenwesaj ulok chiwäch rech quiban chque jachique ri quiwaj

Genesis19:10 Are c'u ri e u solinelab ri Lot xquiyuk ulok ri qui k'ab xquijic' ri Lot xquicoj bic pa ri ja; xquitz'apij ri uchi'ja
Genesis19:11 xquiban c'ut chi xemoyir ri achijab ri e c'o chrij ri uchi'ja. Chi alabom chi ri'jab conojel xecanaj moyab
Genesis19:12 Ri tako'nib aj caj xquibij che ri Lot: “¿La c'o chi niq'uiaj awachalaxic waral? Chebac'ama' ri a c'ojol
Genesis19:13 Cäkasach c'u u wäch we c'olbal ri'. Sibalaj q'ui chi c'u ri tzujunic banom chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chquij ri winak re we tinimit ri'

Genesis19:15 Xa c'u jubik' man cäsakaric
Genesis19:16 Xbeytaj c'u ri Lot
Genesis19:17 Aretak e c'o chrij ri tinimit
Genesis19:18 Xubij c'u ri Lot chque: “¡Jayi' wajawib bana' alak tok'ob!
Genesis19:19 Ri alak sibalaj q'ui tok'ob banom alak chwe
Genesis19:20 Nakaj che ri in c'o wi c'o jun tinimit ch'utin
Genesis19:21 Jun c'ut chque ri tako'nib aj caj xubij: “Xinta' ri xabij
Genesis19:22 ¡Jät chanim chila'! Man c'o ta c'u jas quinban na we man catopan na pa we c'olbal ri'.” Rumal ri' xcoj Zoar che u bi' we tinimit ri'.
Genesis19:23 Sakarinak chic xopan ri Lot pa ri tinimit Zoar
Genesis19:24 ri Ajawaxel xujabij k'ak' xukuje' asupre jacha' ri jäb puwi' ri Sodom
Genesis19:25 xusach qui wäch ri tinimit junam cuc' conojel ri winak ri e c'o chila'
Genesis19:26 Are c'u ri rixokil ri Lot ri teren ulok

Genesis19:28 xca'y apan che ri Sodom

Genesis33:1 Aretak xril ri Jacob chi petinak ri Esau achilatal cumal quiejeb sient (400) achijab
Genesis33:2 Are xebunabejisaj ri quieb rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab cachil ri cal
Genesis33:3 Xunabejisaj c'u rib chquiwäch
Genesis33:4 Xxiq'uin c'u ri Esau che u c'ulaxic ri Jacob; xulak'apuj chrij u wi'
Genesis33:5 Ri Esau xebuca'yej ri ixokib xukuje' ri ac'alab
Genesis33:6 E are' c'u ri rixokib lok'om tak pataninelab e cachil c'u ri cal xenakajinic xquimej quib c'ä xquiya' na ri qui palaj cho ri ulew.
Genesis33:7 Chanim xkebextax ri Lea e rachil ri ral
Genesis33:8 Ri Esau xubij: “¿Jas ri cachomaj u banic cuc' tak ri awaj ri e nu c'ulam?” “Che u kasexic a wäch
Genesis33:9 “Man quebec'am taj
Genesis33:10 Ri Jacob xucoj u chuk'ab che u bochi'xic ri Esau xubij che: “Jayi'. Chabana' tok'ob. We oc'owinak ri awoyowal chwij
Genesis33:11 Catinbochi'j chi cäc'am ri sipanic ri quinya' chawe
Genesis33:12 xubij c'u che ri Jacob: “Jo' ba'
Genesis33:13 Ri Jacob xubij che ri Esau: “Lok'alaj wachalal
Genesis33:14 Utz na chi at ri catnabej chuwäch we pataninel awech ri'; in nojimal quinbec jas ri qui binibal ri awaj ri e nabe chnuwäch
Genesis33:15 “Ja'e
Genesis33:16 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Esau xutakej ri u be xtzelej pa Seir.
Genesis33:17 Are c'u ri Jacob are xutakej ri be ri cäbe pa Sucot
Genesis33:18 Utz c'u u wäch ri Jacob
Genesis33:19 Xulok' jun ulew pa qui k'ab ri u c'ojol ri Hamor
Genesis33:20 Xuyac c'u jun porobal ri u bi' xucojo “El-Elohe-Israel.”
Genesis34:1 Ri Din
Genesis34:2 xilitaj c'u rumal ri Siquem u c'ojol ri Hamor ri aj hebey ri c'amal be pa ri c'olbal ri'
Genesis34:3 Sibalaj c'u xbe ranima' ruc'
Genesis34:4 Xtzijom c'ut ri Siquem ruc' ri Hamor
Genesis34:5 Xretamaj c'u ri Jacob chi ri Siquem xresaj u q'uixbal ri Din ri u mia'l
Genesis34:6 Are' c'ut ri Hamor
Genesis34:7 Aretak xetzelej ulok ri e u c'ojol ri Jacob pa ri juyub
Genesis34:8 Xtzijon c'u ri Hamor cuc' ri u c'ojol ri Jacob xubij chque: “Ri nu c'ojol Siquem
Genesis34:9 chixoc che kachalaxic; jeri' ri uj cujc'uli' na cuc' ri i mia'l xukuje' ri ix quixc'uli' na cuc' ri ka mia'l uj.
Genesis34:10 Chixcanaj kuc'. C'o we ulew ri' chiwäch
Genesis34:11 Ri Siquem xubij che ri u tat ri Din xukuje' chque ri e u xibal: “Quixinbochi'j chi chinimaj ri cäkabij chiwe. Xa ta ne joropa' ri quita' chwe quinya' chiwe.
Genesis34:12 Pune' ta ne jun tojbal ri coc'ow na chuwäch ri nak'atisabal xukuje' q'ui tak sipanic
Genesis34:13 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Siquem resam u q'uixbal ri Din
Genesis34:14 xquibij chque: “Man cuya' taj cäkaya' ri kanab che jun achi ri man kopim taj ri u wi' ri tz'umal ri achi wi che retal
Genesis34:15 Cäkaya' c'u ri kanab chiwe we quibano jas ri cäkabij chiwe: we quikopij ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi
Genesis34:16 We je quiban wa' cuya' quixc'uli' cuc' ri e ka mia'l
Genesis34:17 We c'u man quiya' i tzij che u banic ri cäkabij chiwe chi quebikopij ri u wi' ri i tz'umal ri ix achijab wi
Genesis34:18 Ri Hamor xukuje' ri Siquem ri u c'ojol
Genesis34:19 Man xubey ta rib ri ala
Genesis34:20 Xbe ri Siquem rachil ri u tat chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit
Genesis34:21 “We achijab ri' e utz kuc'
Genesis34:22 Ri e are' cäcaj quec'oji' kuc'
Genesis34:23 Ronojel ri jastak quech xukuje' conojel ri cawaj
Genesis34:24 Conojel ri achijab ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit ri e c'o chi qui junab che u banic ch'o'j xquiya' qui tzij che ri xubij ri Hamor rachilam ri Siquem
Genesis34:25 Are c'u ri Simeon
Genesis34:26 Xquicoj ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j che u cämisaxic ri Hamor xukuje' ri Siquem ri u c'ojol
Genesis34:27 Xepe ri niq'uiaj u c'ojol chic ri Jacob
Genesis34:28 Xequic'am bic chij
Genesis34:29 xeboc che reläk'axic bic ronojel ri c'o pa tak ja
Genesis34:30 Xubij c'u ri Jacob che ri Simeon xukuje' ri Levi: “Ri ix in i yo'm pa jun latz'. Ri winak aj waral
Genesis34:31 Xquitzelej c'u u bixic: “¿La are ta c'u takalic chi ri Siquem je cuban che ri kanab jas ri cäban che jun nim ch'utin?”
Genesis35:1 Ri Dios xubij che ri Jacob: “Chatwalijok
Genesis35:2 Ri Jacob xubij chque ri e c'o pa rachoch xukuje' conojel ri e teren chrij: “Chebiwesaj bic ri jule' tak diosib ri e iwuc'am
Genesis35:3 Chixwalijok
Genesis35:4 Conojel ri e c'o pa rachoch ri Jacob xequijach ri jule' tak diosib che ri Jacob ri e cuc'am
Genesis35:5 Aretak xebel bic chila'
Genesis35:6 Ri Jacob xukuje' conojel ri winak ri e benak ruc' xebopan pa Luz
Genesis35:7 Xuban jun porobal chila'
Genesis35:8 Xukuje' chila' xcäm wi ri Debora ri ixok ri xq'uiyisan ri Rebec
Genesis35:9 Aretak ri Jacob tzelejem ulok re pa Padan-aram
Genesis35:10 je u tewichi'xic wa' xubano: “Ri at Jacob ri a bi'
Genesis35:11 ri Dios xubij che: “In ri' ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem; chec'ol q'ui awalc'ual xukuje' ri e awija'lil Chawe quel wi na jun nim tinimit xukuje' q'ui tak tinimit
Genesis35:12 Ri ulew ri xinjach pa u k'ab ri Abraham
Genesis35:13 Aretak xel bic ri Dios chila' jawije' ri xutzijobej wi ri Jacob
Genesis35:14 ri Jacob xuc'am jun abaj xutac'aba' jacha' jun akan pa ri c'olbal jawije' xtzijobex wi rumal ri Dios
Genesis35:15 xucoj “Betel” che u bi' we c'olbal ri'.
Genesis35:16 Xebel chi c'u bic pa Betel
Genesis35:17 Pa ri jok'otaj ri sibalaj c'ax na ri iyom xubij che: “Maxe'j awib
Genesis35:18 Cämem c'u cubano
Genesis35:19 Je cämical wa' xurik ri Raquel
Genesis35:20 Ri Jacob xutac'aba' jun abaj puwi' ri c'olbal ri xmuk wi
Genesis35:21 Ri Israel xutakej ri u be
Genesis35:22 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak c'o ri Israel pa we c'olbal ri'
Genesis35:23 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Lea are' ri Ruben
Genesis35:24 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Raquel are' ri Jose xukuje' ri Benjamin.
Genesis35:25 Ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Bil ri u lok'om pataninelab ri Raquel are' ri Dan
Genesis35:26 ri xebuc'ojolaj ruc' ri Zilp
Genesis35:27 Ri Jacob xbe che u ch'abexic ri u tat pa Mamre
Genesis35:28 Jun sient ruc' jumuch' (180) u junab ri Isaac aretak xcämic.
Genesis35:29 Sibalaj nim winak chic aretak xcämic
Genesis36:1 E are wa' ri e rija'lil ri Esau ri cäbix Edom che.

Genesis36:3 xukuje' xc'uli' ruc' ri Basemat u mia'l ri Ismael
Genesis36:4 Ri alc'ualaxel ri xuya' ri Ada che ri Esau are' ri Elipaz; ri Basemat xralaj ri Reuel;

Genesis36:7 ri Jacob
Genesis36:8 Ri Esau ri cäbix Edom che

Genesis36:15 Ri e c'amal tak be chque ri e rija'lil ri Esau
Genesis36:16 ri Core

Genesis37:1 Xc'oji' c'u ri Jacob pa ri ulew re Canaan
Genesis37:2 Are wa' ri u tzijobelil ri rija'lil ri Jacob. Ri Jose aretak wuklajuj (17) chic u junab
Genesis37:3 Ri Israel are' sibalaj u lok' na ri Jose chquiwäch ri e niq'uiaj u c'ojol chic
Genesis37:4 Aretak xquil ri rachalal chi are sibalaj lok' ri Jose rumal ri Jacob chquiwäch ri e are'
Genesis37:5 Xurika' c'u jun k'ij ri Jose xuban jun richic'
Genesis37:6 Xubij c'u chque: “Chitatabej
Genesis37:7 Xinwichic'aj chi konojel uj c'o pa jun juyub cätajin quekaxim trico pa tak yataj; xwalij c'u ri nu yataj in
Genesis37:8 Xquibij c'u ri rachalal che: “¿Ri cawaj cabij chi catoc na che kajawinel
Genesis37:9 Xuban chi c'u jun ichic' ri Jose ri xukuje' xutzijoj chque ri rachalal. Xubij chque: “¿La iweta'm
Genesis37:10 Aretak ri Jose xutzijoj ri ichic' che ri Jacob xukuje' chque ri rachalal
Genesis37:11 Ri rachalal sibalaj cätitat cäquina' chrij
Genesis37:12 C'o jun k'ij ri e rachalal ri Jose xebe pa Siquem
Genesis37:13 Are c'u ri Israel cubij che ri Jose: “Ampe'
Genesis37:14 Ri Israel xubij che: “Jät ba'
Genesis37:15 xsach c'u ri Jose pa tak ri juyub. Xurik c'u jun achi
Genesis37:16 “Are cätajin quebentzucuj ri wachalal
Genesis37:17 “Xebel bic waral
Genesis37:18 Ri e are' xquilo chi petinak chi naj. C'ä majok chnakajinic
Genesis37:19 Xquibila' chquibil tak quib: “¡Chiwilampe'
Genesis37:20 Tisaj
Genesis37:21 Aretak xretamaj ri Ruben
Genesis37:22 Mitix ri u quiq'uel. Chiya' chupam we c'ua' ri' ri c'o pa we chaki'j uwo sak
Genesis37:23 Xak c'u xopan ri Jose cuc' ri rachalal xquesaj ri je'lalaj ratz'iak ri u cojom
Genesis37:24 xquichapo
Genesis37:25 Xquichaplej c'u u tijic qui wa. Xequil c'u apan juk'at aj ismaelib ri e elinak ulok pa Galaad
Genesis37:26 Are c'u ri Juda
Genesis37:27 Are utz na xa cäkac'ayij bic chque ri aj ismaelib che u q'uexwäch ri xa cäkacämisaj

Genesis38:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Genesis38:2 Chila' c'o wi aretak xretamaj u wäch ri u mia'l jun aj cananey
Genesis38:3 Aretak xcuc'aj quib
Genesis38:4 Xux chi c'u yawab winak xc'oji' chi c'u jun ral ala
Genesis38:5 Xc'oji' chi c'u na jun ral ala ri xucoj Sel che u bi'

Genesis38:8 Xpe ri Juda

Genesis38:14 ri Tamar xresaj ri atz'iak re malcanil
Genesis38:15 Aretak xril ri Juda
Genesis38:16 Xkeb ruc' che u ch'abexic chuchi' ri be

Genesis38:18 “¿Jas ri cawaj quinya' can chawe?” xcha' ri Juda. Ri Tamar xubij: “Chaya' can ri a mulk'ab rachil ri u c'amal
Genesis38:19 Xbe c'u ri Tamar cho rachoch xeresaj ri atz'iak ri u cojom
Genesis38:20 Ri Juda xutz'onoj tok'ob che ri achi aj Adulam chi cuc'am bic ri alaj q'uisic' che ri ixok che u toric ri retal u tzij; are c'u ri aj Adulam
Genesis38:21 Xutatabela' c'u chque ri achijab ri e aj chila': “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri ixok ri quech nim ch'utin re Enaim ri cät'uyi chuchi' ri be?” “Mawi jumul c'olinak jun ixok quech nim ch'utin waral
Genesis38:22 Xtzelej jawije' c'o wi ri Juda
Genesis38:23 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Juda: “Chubana' ba' rech chque ri jastak
Genesis38:24 Oc'owinak chi oxib ic' aretak xya' u bixic che ri Juda
Genesis38:25 Aretak cätajin quesax bic
Genesis38:26 Aretak ri Juda xuch'ob qui wäch ri jastak

Genesis39:1 Aretak xc'am bic ri Jose pa Ejipt
Genesis39:2 C'o c'ut ri Ajawaxel ruc' ri Jose
Genesis39:3 Ri Potipar xuch'obo chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ruc' ri Jose are cäbanowic chi ronojel ri cubano
Genesis39:4 Are c'u xbanow wa' chi ri Potipar sibalaj utz xril wi ri Jose
Genesis39:5 Kas pa ri k'ij aretak ri Potipar xujach ri takanic pa u k'ab ri Jose puwi' ri rachoch xukuje' ronojel ri jastak rech
Genesis39:6 Aretak ronojel chic c'o pa u k'ab ri Jose
Genesis39:7 xurika' c'u jun k'ij aretak ri rixokil ri Potipar xbe ranima' ruc' ri Jose
Genesis39:8 Man xraj taj ri Jose
Genesis39:9 Chupam we ja ri' man c'o ta jun ri c'o ta na u takanic chnuwäch; ri wajaw man c'o ta ri ma ta u jachom pa nu k'ab xane' xak xuwi ri lal
Genesis39:10 Pune' ri ixok sibalaj xucoj u chuk'ab che ri Jose ronojel k'ij rech cak'oyi' ta ruc' cac'oji' ta c'u pa u xcut
Genesis39:11 Xurika' jun k'ij aretak xoc ri Jose pa ja che u banic ri u patan
Genesis39:12 xpe ri ixok xuchap ri Jose che ri ratz'iak
Genesis39:13 Aretak xril ri ixok chi xanimaj ri Jose
Genesis39:14 xurak u chi'
Genesis39:15 aretak c'u xinuto chi xinrak nu chi' ruc' ronojel ri nu chuk'ab caxiq'uinic xel bic xuya' c'u ne can ri ratz'iak waral.”
Genesis39:16 Xuc'olo c'ut ri ratz'iak ri Jose c'ä xopan na ri rajaw cho ja.
Genesis39:17 Junam c'u u bixic xubij che: “Ri lok'om pataninel aj hebrey ri xacoj ulok pa kachoch
Genesis39:18 Aretak xuto chi xinrakakej nu chi'
Genesis39:19 Jewa' xuban ri a lok'om pataninel awech chwe.” Ri rajaw ri Jose sibalaj xoyowaric aretak xuta' ri cätajin cäbix che rumal ri rixokil.
Genesis39:20 Xuchap c'u ri Jose
Genesis39:21 ri Ajawaxel xutakej c'olem ruc' ri Jose xuc'ut c'u ri rutzil chuwäch
Genesis39:22 Ri xebuya' c'u can conojel ri ajpache' pa u k'ab
Genesis39:23 Ri takanel paquiwi' ri e c'o pa che' man c'o ta jas cusolij che ri jachom pa u k'ab ri Jose
Genesis40:1 Quieb oxib k'ij chic c'o ri Jose pa che'
Genesis40:2 Ri paraon
Genesis40:3 xtakan che qui cojic pa che' ri c'o cho rachoch ri c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab
Genesis40:4 Ri c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab
Genesis40:5 Jun chak'ab ri quieb ajpache' ri k'axal u wa'l uva xukuje' ri banal caxlanwa
Genesis40:6 Ak'ab aretak xopan ri Jose che quilic
Genesis40:7 xuc'ot qui chi'
Genesis40:8 Ri achijab ri' xquibij che ri Jose: “Ka banom jujun kichic'
Genesis40:9 Ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xutzijoj ri richic' che ri Jose cuc' tak we tzij ri': “Pa ri nu waram xinwil juwi' uva.
Genesis40:10 Ri e c'o oxib u k'ab
Genesis40:11 Ri in wuc'am ri u lak ri ajawinel pa nu k'ab. Quebenc'am c'ut ri uva quebenpitz' chupam ri lak. Xinya' c'u ri lak pa u k'ab ri ajawinel.”
Genesis40:12 Xubij ri Jose che: “Ri xawichic'aj je cubij wa': ri oxib u k'ab ri uva quel cubij oxib k'ij
Genesis40:13 quel cubij wa' chi pa oxib k'ij
Genesis40:14 Aretak c'u chc'ulmataj wa'
Genesis40:15 Ri in xa in eläk'am ulok pa ri culew ri aj hebreyib
Genesis40:16 Aretak ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa xuto chi utz u k'alajisaxic ri richic' ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak u wa'l uva xuban ri Jose
Genesis40:17 Ri chicäch ri c'o paquiwi' ri quieb e c'o ronojel qui wäch caxlanwa chquipam
Genesis40:18 Ri Jose xubij che: “Are wa' ri cubij ri awichic': ri oxib chicäch quel cubij oxib k'ij
Genesis40:19 quel cubij wa' chi pa oxib k'ij catresaj bic ri ajawinel pa che'
Genesis40:20 Churox k'ij c'ut xtz'akat u junab ri ajawinel
Genesis40:21 Ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xucoj chi jumul pa ri u chac
Genesis40:22 are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal tak caxlanwa xtakan che u jitz'axic
Genesis40:23 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva man xnataj ta chic ri Jose che.
Genesis41:1 Quieb junab chic oc'owinak. C'o jun k'ij xrichic'aj ri paraon ri ajawinel chi tac'al chuchi' ri nima' Nil.
Genesis41:2 Chupam c'ut ri nima' quebel ulok wukub chomak je'lalaj tak ati'tab tak wacax
Genesis41:3 Chquij c'u wa'
Genesis41:4 We ati'tab tak wacax ri' ri c'ax quepetic xukuje' e c'alc'a'x xequitij bic ri wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri sibalaj e je'lic xukuje' quek'onk'otic. Xc'astaj c'ut ri paraon.
Genesis41:5 Xwar chi c'u jumul
Genesis41:6 Xeq'uiy chi c'u ulok wukub u jolom trico chic chquixe' ri e chomak
Genesis41:7 ri wukub u jolom trico ri' ri sibalaj e matz' xequitij bic ri wukub u jolom trico ri sibalaj e chomak xukuje' e je'lic. Xc'astaj ri ajawinel
Genesis41:8 Chucab c'u k'ij aretak sakarinak chic sibalaj oquinak il
Genesis41:9 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri e suc'umal u wa'l uva xubij che ri ajawinel: “Camic cänataj chwe chi xinmacun can nabe
Genesis41:10 aretak xyactaj oyowal la chwij xukuje' chrij ri qui nimal ri suc'umal tak caxlanwa
Genesis41:11 Pa jun chak'ab
Genesis41:12 Chupam ri c'olbal ri' c'o jun ala aj hebrey kuc'
Genesis41:13 ¡Kas c'u je xelic jas ri xubij chke! Ri in xintzelej chi jumul pa ri nu chac
Genesis41:14 Are c'u ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Jose
Genesis41:15 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Nu banom jun ichic'
Genesis41:16 Ri Jose xubij che ri ajawinel: “Man quincuin ta in che u ch'obic
Genesis41:17 Ri ajawinel xubij che ri Jose: “Xinwichic'aj chi in tac'al chuchi' ri nima' Nil
Genesis41:18 pa ri nu wichic' xinwilo chi xebel ulok pa ri nima'
Genesis41:19 Xebel chi c'u ulok wukub ati'tab tak wacax pa ri nima' ri sibalaj c'ax quepetic ri sibalaj e c'alc'a'x. ¡Mawi c'u jumul e wilom qui wäch ati'tab tak wacax pa ronojel Ejipt ri sibalaj ta c'ax quepetic!
Genesis41:20 We ati'tab tak wacax ri' ri e c'alc'a'x xukuje' c'ax quepetic xequitij bic ri nabe wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri e chomak na.
Genesis41:21 Aretak e qui tijom chic
Genesis41:22 Xinban chi c'u na jun ichic'
Genesis41:23 Xeq'uiy chi c'u ulok wukub u jolom trico chquixe' ri e chomak

Genesis41:26 Ri wukub ati'tab tak wacax ri e je'lic e wukub junab
Genesis41:27 Ri wukub c'alc'a'x ati'tab tak wacax ri c'ax quepetic ri xebel ulok chquij ri niq'uiaj
Genesis41:28 Je jacha' ri nu bim che la: Ri Dios u yo'm u bixic che la ri cubana' na.
Genesis41:29 Quepe na wukub junab ri sibalaj quewächin na ri tico'n pa ronojel ri Ejipt
Genesis41:30 c'äte c'u quepe chi na wukub junab nimalaj wi'jal. Man c'o ta chi c'u jun cänataj ta chi ri nimalaj wächinic ri xc'oji' can pa Ejipt
Genesis41:31 Sibalaj nim na ri q'uetetem chi man c'o ta etal xcanaj ta can che ri telechinic ri xc'oji' can nabe.
Genesis41:32 We camul xban la ri ichic'
Genesis41:33 Rumal ri' rajawaxic chi cätzucuj la jun achi ri c'o utzalaj u chomanic
Genesis41:34 Bana' ba la ri quinbij che la: chebetzucuj la k'atal tak tzij rech quebe pa ronojel ri ulew che u molic ronojel ri u ro'il ri u wächinic ri ulew re Ejipt pa ri wukub junab ri sibalaj cäwächin ri ulew pa Ejipt.
Genesis41:35 Chquimulij ronojel ri trico ri caquiya' pa ri utzalaj tak junab ri quepetic; chebelquiya' pa tak c'olbal ri quec'oji' chuxe' ri takanic la

Genesis41:38 Xubij c'u ri ajawinel chque: “¿Jawije' ta cäkarik wi jun achi ri junam ta ruc' wa'

Genesis41:45 Ri ajawinel xucoj Zapnat-paney che u bi' ri Jose

Genesis41:47 Sibalaj c'u xwächin ri ulew pa ri wukub junab telechinic.
Genesis41:48 Are c'u ri Jose xuyac ronojel ri trico ri xwalij chupam ri ulew pa ri wukub junab ri' xuc'ol chquipam tak ri tinimit
Genesis41:49 Ri trico ri xumulij ri Jose je ta ne u banic jacha' ri sanyeb rech ri plo. Man xpajtaj ta chic
Genesis41:50 Xebalax c'u quieb u c'ojol ri Jose rumal ri rixokil ri Asenat u bi'
Genesis41:51 Ri nabe u c'ojol xucoj Manases che u bi'
Genesis41:52 Ri ucab u c'ojol xucoj Eprain che u bi'

Genesis42:1 Aretak xretamaj ri Jacob chi c'o trico pa Ejipt

Exodus6:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson pa ri u cholajil ri nimak qui k'ij

Exodus6:20 Ri Amram xc'uli' ruc' ri Jocabed rana'b ri u tat
Exodus6:21 Ri e u c'ojol ri Izar are ri Core
Exodus6:22 Ri e u c'ojol ri Uziel are ri Misael

Exodus7:3 Ri in quinban na che ri ajawinel chi co cutac'aba' rib
Exodus7:4 Ri ajawinel man cunimaj taj ri quibij na che c'ä quinban na c'ax che ri Ejipt

Exodus9:1 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: “Jät che u ch'abexic ri ajawinel ri paraon

Exodus9:5 Ri Ajawaxel xuch'ic jun k'ijol
Exodus9:6 Chucab k'ij xuban ri Ajawaxel ri xubij. Xecäm c'u conojel ri cawaj ri aj ejiptib

Exodus9:16 c'ä at nu c'asbam c'ut rech cäwil ri nu cuinem xukuje' rech quinc'ut wib cho ronojel ri uwächulew.

Exodus9:25 Ri sakbach xuc'äjij ronojel ri c'o cho ri ulew pa Ejipt: xebucämisaj winak xukuje' awaj

Exodus11:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Quinya' chi na jun c'äjisabal wächaj puwi' ri ajawinel ri paraon xukuje' paquiwi' ri aj ejiptib. Aretak chbantaj wa'

Exodus12:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises pa Ejipt
Exodus12:2 “We ic' ri' are jun ic' ri nim u banic chiwäch
Exodus12:3 Chibij chque conojel ri aj israelib ri quinbij chiwe: ‘Pa ri lajuj rajilabal we ic' ri' chijujunal chic'ama' jun alaj ama' chij o jun alaj ama' q'uisic'
Exodus12:4 We c'u ne c'o jun ja winak ri xa e quieb oxib pa ri cachoch ri man quecuin ta che u q'uisic ronojel ri awaj
Exodus12:5 Ri awaj rajawaxic chi c'o chic jun u junab
Exodus12:6 Quichajij c'u na c'ä pa ri ucajlajuj (14) rajilabal we ic' ri'

Exodus12:8 Pa ri ak'ab ri' cäquitij na ti'j ri cäsa' cho k'ak' rachilam c'ayilaj tak ichaj xukuje' caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'.
Exodus12:9 C'o jun ch'akap ti'j mitij pa räxal mawi rokowisam. Ronojel ri awaj
Exodus12:10 c'o mäquito' can che re ri ucab k'ij. We c'o cäto'taj canok
Exodus12:11 Qui cojom chic ri catz'iak
Exodus12:12 Pa ri ak'ab ri' quinoc'ow na pa ronojel ri Ejipt
Exodus12:13 Ri quic' are cäc'utuw tak ri ja ri ix c'o wi. Jeri'
Exodus12:14 Are jun k'ij wa' ri takal u nataxic iwumal
Exodus12:15 Wukub k'ij quitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'; rumal ri' kas pa ri nabe k'ij man cuya' taj cac'oji' ch'am pa tak ri iwachoch. Apachin ta ne ri cutij caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc' pa ronojel ri wukub k'ij
Exodus12:16 Ri nabe k'ij jacha' xukuje' ri uwuk rajawaxic quebicoj che jun tastalic mulin ib. Pa tak ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta chac cabanic
Exodus12:17 Ri nimak'ij que ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am cuc' are jun k'ij ri qui nimak'ijaj na rumal rech chi kas pa ri k'ij ri' xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt chnimalaj iwonojel. Quinimak'ijaj na jacha' jun pixab ri cäjeki' canok ri quecoc'owisaj ri e tat nan xukuje' ri alc'ualaxelab.
Exodus12:18 Quebitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc' kas pa ri u benabal k'ij rech ri u ucajlajuj (14) rajilabal ri nabe ic'
Exodus12:19 Wukub k'ij mäc'oji' ch'am pa tak ri iwachoch
Exodus12:20 Mitij jun jasach ri yo'm ch'am ruc'. Apawije' ta ne ri ix c'o wi
Exodus12:21 Ri Moises xutak qui siq'uixic conojel ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib
Exodus12:22 Chiya' ri quic' pa jun tzima; chic'ama' c'u joyataj u k'ab k'ayes mesbal quirub pa ri quic'
Exodus12:23 Aretak ri Ajawaxel coc'ow che qui cämisaxic ri aj ejiptib
Exodus12:24 Ri ix quinimaj na we takanic ri' xukuje' ri e u wi' tak i mam ri quepe na
Exodus12:25 Aretak ix oquinak chic pa ri ulew ri cuya' na ri Ajawaxel chiwe
Exodus12:26 Aretak c'u cäc'ot i chi' cumal ri iwalc'ual: ‘¿Jas quel cubij wa' we nimak'ij ri'?
Exodus12:27 Are wa' ri quitzelej na u bixic: ‘Cäpil we awaj ri' pa ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Aretak xebucämisaj ri aj ejiptib
Exodus12:28 xebe c'u che u banic ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron.
Exodus12:29 Niq'uiaj ak'ab ri Ajawaxel xebucämisaj ri e nabeal tak c'ojolaxelab ri e aj ejiptib
Exodus12:30 Ri ajawinel e rachil
Exodus12:31 Kas pa ri ak'ab ri' ri ajawinel xutak u siq'uixic ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron
Exodus12:32 Chebic'ama' bic ri e i chij
Exodus12:33 Ri aj ejiptib xequicowij ri aj israelib rech quebel bic chanim pa ri culew
Exodus12:34 Ri aj israelib xquic'am bic ri qui k'or ri c'ä maja cäch'amaric
Exodus12:35 Xquinimaj c'u ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises chque
Exodus12:36 Ri Ajawaxel xubano chi ri aj ejiptib xquiya' ruc' qui rayibal ronojel ri xquitz'onoj bic ri aj israelib chque
Exodus12:37 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses xebopan pa Sucot
Exodus12:38 Q'ui qui wäch winak xeteri bic chquij
Exodus12:39 Man xbantaj ta c'u u banic bic ri qui wa cumal
Exodus12:40 Quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab xec'oji' ri aj israelib pa Ejipt
Exodus12:41 kas c'u pa ri k'ij aretak xtz'akat ri quiejeb sient ruc' juwinak lajuj (430) junab
Exodus12:42 Pa ri chak'ab ri' ri Ajawaxel xerilij che quesaxic ulok pa Ejipt. Are' chak'ab wa' aj Ajawaxel
Exodus12:43 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron: “Are wa' ri pixab che ri Oc'owem: Mawi jun winak ri man i winakil taj ya'talic cutij ta re ri awaj ri cäpilic
Exodus12:44 are c'u ri pataninel ri puak lok'obem rech cuya' cutij re ri awaj
Exodus12:45 Ri man i winakil taj ri xa rokxanim rib
Exodus12:46 xa c'u pa jun ja cätij wi. Man c'o ta jun ch'akap ti'j quesax ta bic pa ri ja ri'
Exodus12:47 Are ja wa' cäquiban conojel ri aj israelib.
Exodus12:48 We c'u ne c'o jun winak ri man i winakil taj ri c'o chixo'l ri craj cäroc'owisaj ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel
Exodus12:49 Are pixab wa' ri cäcoj chque ri aj israelib xukuje' chque ri winak ri man i winakil taj ri e c'o chixo'l.”
Exodus12:50 Ri aj israelib xquiban ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises rachilam ri Aaron.
Exodus12:51 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel xeresaj ulok pa Ejipt ri aj israelib pa tak amak'.
Exodus13:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises
Exodus13:2 “Chebijacha' conojel ri nabeal tak alabom chwe
Exodus13:3 Ri Moises xubij chque ri aj israelib: “Mäsach we k'ij ri' pa i jolom
Exodus13:4 Ri ix quixel bic pa we k'ij ri' pa ri ic' re Abib
Exodus13:5 chupam c'u we ic' ri' rajawaxic coc'owisax ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem
Exodus13:6 Wukub k'ij quitij caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'
Exodus13:7 Pa ronojel ri wukub k'ij quetij na caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'
Exodus13:8 Pa we k'ij ri' quibij chque ri e iwalc'ual: ‘Quekaban we jastak ri' che u nataxic ri xuban ri Ajawaxel che kesaxic ulok pa Ejipt.
Exodus13:9 Je ta ne ri c'o ta jun iwetal che ri i k'ab
Exodus13:10 Rumal ri' rajawaxic coc'owisax we nimak'ij ri' chujunab pa ri k'ijol ri ch'icom.’
Exodus13:11 Aretak c'u ix u cojom chic ri Ajawaxel pa ri culew ri aj cananeyib
Exodus13:12 rajawaxic quebijach che ri Ajawaxel conojel ri e i c'ojol ri e nabeal xukuje' conojel ri nabe tak ama'ib ri quecalaj ri e i wawaj e rech c'u ri Ajawaxel.

Exodus21:32 We c'u ri wacax cutok' jun lok'om pataninel
Exodus21:33 We c'o jachin cutek'eba' can u wi' jun c'ua'
Exodus21:34 ri ajchak'e ri c'ua' cutoj ri awaj pa u k'ab ri ajchak'e ri awaj
Exodus21:35 We ri u wacax jachin jun
Exodus21:36 We c'u etamtalic chi tok'onel wi ulok ri wacax
Exodus22:1 “We c'o jachin cäreläk'aj jun wacax o jun chij
Exodus22:2 We cäriktaj jun eläk'om cätajin cuban ri eläk' chak'ab
Exodus22:3 We c'u ne sak chic aretak xcämisaxic
Exodus22:4 We c'u c'ä c'asal ri awaj cäriktaj ruc' ri eläk'om
Exodus22:5 We c'o jun winak quebuyuk'uj ri rawaj pa jun juyub o pa jun ulew ri ticom wi uva
Exodus22:6 We c'o jun winak cunuc' u k'ak'
Exodus22:7 We c'o jun winak cärokxanej u rajil ruc' jun winak chic o jun jasach ri pakal rajil
Exodus22:8 we c'u man cäriktaj ri eläk'om
Exodus22:9 We c'o jun winak cuban rech che jun wacax
Exodus22:10 We c'o jachin cärokxanej jun bur
Exodus22:11 ri winak ri' cuban na jun chi'nic ri kas caban na pa u bi' ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri ajchak'e ri awaj chi man xutzak ta u k'ab che ri okxanim ruc'. Ri ajchak'e ri awaj cuc'am na u k'abal ri xbix che
Exodus22:12 We c'u xrilo aretak xeläk'ax bic ri awaj
Exodus22:13 We c'u xch'äkatix ri awaj rumal jun juyubal awaj
Exodus22:14 We c'o jun winak cukaj ri rawaj jun räch winak
Exodus22:15 we c'u c'o apan ri ajchak'e
Exodus22:16 “We c'o jachin cusub jun ali k'apoj
Exodus22:17 We c'u man craj ri u tat ri ali cuya' ri u mia'l che ri ala
Exodus22:18 Mic'asba' ri ixok ajitz.
Exodus22:19 Apachin ri cupal ruc' jun awaj
Exodus22:20 Ri quebuya' tabal tak tok'ob chquiwäch jule' diosib chic ri xuwi ya'tal qui ya'ic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Exodus22:21 Maban c'ax che ri rokxanim rib awuc'
Exodus22:22 Maban c'ax chque ri malca'nib
Exodus22:23 we c'u caban c'ax chque
Exodus22:24 ruc' c'u nimalaj woyowal quixincämisaj na ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j. Ri e iwixokil quecanaj na che malcanil xukuje' ri i walc'ual quecanaj na can pa minoril.
Exodus22:25 We caya' puak pa jalomal che ri meba' ri awinakil
Exodus22:26 We ri winak ri' cuya' ri u k'u' chawe che kajebal rech ri u jalomal ri xuban awuc'
Exodus22:27 rumal rech chi xuwi u k'u' wa' c'olic ri cuch'ukbej rib cho ri tew. We man catzelej che
Exodus22:28 Mayac royowal ri Dios
Exodus22:29 Mabey awib che qui c'amic ulok ri a sipanic re ronojel ri a tico'n xukuje' re ronojel ri a uva. Ri a c'ojol ri nabeal caya' na chwe
Exodus22:30 junam caban chque ri nabe tak cal ri a wacax
Exodus22:31 Ri ix rajawaxic chi ix tasom tak wik chwe. Mitij ri qui ti'jal ri awaj ri quech'äkatix can cumal ri juyubal tak awaj pa ri c'ache'laj
Exodus23:1 “Mebaya' tak k'alajisanic ri xa e banoj tak tzij
Exodus23:2 Maban awech ri etzelal ri cäquiban ri tinimit winak. Macoj awib cuc' ri tinimit winak cho ri k'atal tzij
Exodus23:3 mawi matok'obisaj u wäch ri meba' we c'o u mac.
Exodus23:4 We cärik ri u wacax o ri u bur ri a c'ulel ri u sachom canok
Exodus23:5 Chato' ri cäretzelaj a wäch; we cawilo chi ri u bur ri u banom u c'ulel chawe kajinak chuxe' ri reka'n
Exodus23:6 Majech'obisaj ri suq'uilal ri ya'tal che ri meba' aretak cak'at tzij puwi'
Exodus23:7 chanajtajisaj awib chquique ri tzujunic ri xa e banoj tak tzij
Exodus23:8 Mac'am u pa k'abaj
Exodus23:9 Maban c'ax che ri rokxanim rib awuc'
Exodus23:10 “Wakib junab catic u wäch ri awulew
Exodus23:11 pa ri uwuk junab matic u wäch: chawuxlanisaj
Exodus23:12 Ronojel ri rajawaxic u banic awumal
Exodus23:13 Chibana' ronojel ri nu bim chiwe
Exodus23:14 “Oxib nimak'ij chabana' pa ri jun junab che u ya'ic nu k'ij.
Exodus23:15 Chawoc'owisaj ri nimak'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'
Exodus23:16 Chabana' xukuje' ri nimak'ij rech ri qui molic ri nabe tak u wächinic ri xatic pa ri ulew
Exodus23:17 Conojel ri winak rajawaxic quebopan chuwäch ri Ajawaxel oxmul pa ri jun junab.
Exodus23:18 Aretak quebaya' ri awaj re tabal tak tok'ob chnuwäch mebachi'j junam cuc' ri qui quiq'uel xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri yo'm ch'am ruc'

Exodus23:20 “Chawilampe'
Exodus23:21 Matnajtin che; chanimaj maban awib chi ma ta mawaj ch'abexic che
Exodus23:22 We c'u kastzij catniman che
Exodus23:23 Ri nu tako'n aj caj canabej na chawäch
Exodus23:24 Matakej u banic awech ri caquiban we tinimit ri'. Matxuqui chquiwäch tak ri e qui diosib
Exodus23:25 Chak'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios
Exodus23:26 quinbano chi man catcäm ta chanim xane' c'ä cätz'akat na ri k'ijol. Man c'o ta jun ixok ri' pa ri awulew ri cuc'ulmaj ta tzakanic o ma ta alc'ualanel.
Exodus23:27 Quinbano chi ri nimalaj xe'n ib ri quic'am ulok cänabej chawäch pa nimak tak ri tinimit ri catoc'ow wi
Exodus23:28 Quinbano chi quebanimaj bic ri aj hebeyib
Exodus23:29 Man quebenwesaj ta bic chawäch pa jun junab rech man cäjuyubar ta ri ulew
Exodus23:30 Pa jutak bik'al quebenwesaj bic chawäch

Exodus23:32 Muc'ulaj rib a tzij cuc' mawi cuc' ri e qui diosib

Exodus24:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chatpakal ulok pa ri c'olbal ri in c'o wi
Exodus24:2 Xuwi ri at ya'tal chawe chi catnakajin chwe; ri niq'uiaj chic menakajin chwe
Exodus24:3 Xbe c'u ri Moises xubij che ri tinimit conojel ri tzij ri xubij ri Ajawaxel
Exodus24:4 Ri Moises xutz'ibaj ronojel ri tzij ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che
Exodus24:5 Xebusiq'uij jujun alabom chquixo'l ri aj israelib
Exodus24:6 Ri Moises xuc'am pa niq'uiaj che ri quic'
Exodus24:7 Xuc'am ri u wujil ri pixab
Exodus24:8 Xuc'am ri Moises ri quic' xuchicoj paquiwi' ri winak
Exodus24:9 Xpaki' c'u ri Moises puwi' ri juyub rachilam ri Aaron

Exodus24:18 Ri Moises xoc pa ri sutz' xpaki' puwi' ri juyub
Exodus25:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises

Exodus25:3 chabij chque chi chquic'ama' ulok: k'an puak
Exodus25:4 quem azul
Exodus25:5 qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri k'oom ruc' quiäk
Exodus25:6 aseit queya' chquipam tak ri yabal k'ak'
Exodus25:7 abaj re tak cornalin xukuje' niq'uiaj abaj chic ri sibalaj e je'l na ri quenac' che ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij xukuje' ri cäya' choc'uxaj ri cucoj ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob.
Exodus25:8 Chibana' c'u jun k'ijilabal chwe rech quinc'oji' chquixo'l.
Exodus25:9 Are' c'u we c'olbal ri' ri quinc'oji' wi na
Exodus25:10 “Chabana' jun caxa re q'uisis
Exodus25:11 Chacojo' utzalaj k'an puak chupam xukuje' chrij
Exodus25:12 chabana' quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak
Exodus25:13 Chabana' xukuje' quieb balul re q'uisis
Exodus25:14 chebajutu' pa tak ri u xiquin ri c'o pa tak u xcut ri caxa
Exodus25:15 mebawesaj chic
Exodus25:16 chaya' c'u chupam ri caxa ri pixab ri quenya' chawe.
Exodus25:17 Chabana' jun tz'apibal re utzalaj k'an puak
Exodus25:18 cärachilaj quieb wächbal re k'an puak ri aj cajalaj tobanelab ri c'o qui xic'
Exodus25:19 Ri tz'apibal xukuje' ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic'
Exodus25:20 cuc'ulaj rib qui wäch
Exodus25:21 Chaya' ri tz'apibal puwi' ri caxa
Exodus25:22 Chila' quinrik wi wib awuc'
Exodus25:23 “Chabana' jun mexa re q'uisis
Exodus25:24 Chach'uku' rij ruc' utzalaj k'an puak
Exodus25:25 Oxib u wi' k'abaj u wäch ri u chi' cabano
Exodus25:26 chabana' quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak
Exodus25:27 rech quecanaj kas chuchi' ri mexa
Exodus25:28 E re q'uisis ri telebal rech ri mexa cabano
Exodus25:29 xukuje' chebabana' ri e u platoyil
Exodus25:30 Amak'el quebacoj ri caxlanwa puwi' ri mexa chnuwäch ri caxlanwa ri cätas chwe.”
Exodus25:31 “Xukuje' caban jun tzuc'ulibal re utzalaj k'an puak
Exodus25:32 pa ri quieb u xcut quebel wakib u k'ab
Exodus25:33 Chquijujunal ri wakib u k'ab ri quebel che ri rakan ri tzuc'ulibal quebacoj ox ox u lakil ri junam ruc' ri u cotz'ijal ri almendr

Exodus26:1 “Lajuj tasbal re tumim lino cacoj che ri u banic ri k'ijilabal
Exodus26:2 Chquijujunal ri tasbal rajawaxic xa junam quetabalil; cajlajuj (14) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj qui rabic
Exodus26:3 Chebat'isa' ri job tasbal cäquekala quib ri qui chi'
Exodus26:4 chebacojo' jujun c'amal re bätz' azul chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' chuchi' ri job tasbal chic.
Exodus26:5 Che ri nabe job tasbal
Exodus26:6 Chebabana' xukuje' cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re k'an puak
Exodus26:7 Xukuje' chabana' julajuj (11) tasbal re quismal q'uisic'
Exodus26:8 Chquijujunal ri tasbal rajawaxic xa junam quetabalil; waklajuj (16) bara' qui rabic
Exodus26:9 Chebat'isa' ri job tasbal xa jun caban chque
Exodus26:10 Chabana' cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal che t'ikbal rech xukuje' cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri wakib tasbal chic.
Exodus26:11 Xukuje' quebaban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'apabal re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus26:12 Rumal rech chi c'o na u rabic ri tasbal re ri lic'om
Exodus26:13 Jeri' ri k'ijilabal kas cäch'ukutaj can cumal ri quieb ch'akatak ri quetzayi can pa ri quieb u xcut
Exodus26:14 Chabana' chic jun ch'ukubal re qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri tz'ajom ruc' quiäk
Exodus26:15 Chebabana' jujun tak tz'alam re q'uisis che ri k'ijilabal
Exodus26:16 Chquijujunal ri tz'alam rajawaxic job (5) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj qui rabic
Exodus26:17 caban cacab qui tu' ri jujun tz'alam rech cäquich'apala' tak quib. Jewa' caban chque conojel ri u tz'alamil ri k'ijilabal.
Exodus26:18 Aretak quebabano
Exodus26:19 Chebacojo' cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal re sak puak. Chquijujunal ri tz'alam rajawaxic cacoj cacab qui tac'alibal ri quech'api wi ri qui tu'.
Exodus26:20 Xukuje' je caban chi che ri jun u xcut chic re ri riquiak'ab
Exodus26:21 cachil ri cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal re sak puak
Exodus26:22 Che ri rij ri k'ijilabal ri c'o pa ri kajebal k'ij
Exodus26:23 xukuje' quieb chi tz'alam ri quebacoj chque ri xquina re chrij.
Exodus26:24 We tz'alam ri' quech'ap chquixe' xukuje' paquiwi'. Je caban chi chque ri quieb tz'alam chic ri quebajwataj pa ri quieb u xquina.
Exodus26:25 E wajxakib c'u wa' chi tz'alam cachil waklajuj qui tac'alibal ri cäquic'ulajij
Exodus26:26 Chebabana' job balul re q'uisis ri catok'obex que ri tz'alam che ri jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal
Exodus26:27 job balul chic ri cätok'obex que ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut chic
Exodus26:28 Ri balul ri cäcanaj pa qui niq'uiajil quebutok'ej conojel ri tz'alam pa qui niq'uiajil
Exodus26:29 Cach'uk quij ri tz'alam ruc' k'an puak
Exodus26:30 Cawoc ri k'ijilabal

Exodus26:32 Cuc' jujun ch'epebal re k'an puak
Exodus26:33 Caxequeba' ri ch'ukubal cuc' ch'epebal re k'an puak
Exodus26:34 Cacoj c'u ri tz'apibal puwi' ri caxa rech ri c'ulwächinic chupam ri c'olbal ri sibalaj tastalic.
Exodus26:35 Chaya' ri mexa chuwäch ri ch'ukubal pa ri k'ijilabal
Exodus26:36 Chabana' jun oquibal ri cacoj chuchi' ri lic'om
Exodus26:37 Chebabana' akan re q'uisis che ri tasbal
Exodus27:1 “Chabana' jun porobal cajtzalaj
Exodus27:2 Chabana' quiejeb ruc'a' pa ri quiejeb u xquina
Exodus27:3 Conojel ri jastak ri quebajwataj che ri porobal rajawaxic e re k'an ch'ich': ri c'olbal tak chaj
Exodus27:4 Chabana' jun quemom k'an ch'ich'
Exodus27:5 C'äte' c'u ri' cacojo ri quemom k'an ch'ich' chuxe' ri u chi' ri porobal chcanaj c'u pa u niq'uiajil ri rak'anibal ri porobal.
Exodus27:6 Chebabana' balul re q'uisis che telebal ri porobal
Exodus27:7 Ri telebal rajawaxic quejut pa tak ri u xiquin
Exodus27:8 Ri porobal ri cabano re che'
Exodus27:9 “Chasuc'umaj jun uwo ja che ri k'ijilabal. Che ri jun u xcut pa ri u mox k'ab ri uwo ja rajawaxic quecoj tasbal re tumim lino che
Exodus27:10 Ri juwinak (20) rakanil xukuje' ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal e re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus27:11 Junam caban che ri jun u xcut chic pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Exodus27:12 Che ri u xcut ri uwo ja ri cäca'y pa u kajebal k'ij

Exodus27:14 Pa ri jun u xcut ri oquibal cacoj wukub (7) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj tasbal
Exodus27:15 Pa ri jun u xcut chic ri oquibal xukuje' cacoj wukub (7) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj tasbal
Exodus27:16 Che ri kas oquibal pa ri uwo ja
Exodus27:17 Conojel ri akan ri e sutininak rij ri uwo ja
Exodus27:18 Ri uwo ja cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj quetan ri u rabic

Exodus28:1 “Chasiq'uij ri Aaron ri awachalal e rachilam ri e u c'ojol ri Nadab

Exodus28:3 Chebatzijobej ri c'o qui no'j
Exodus28:4 Ri atz'iak ri quequibano e are tak wa': ri cäya' cho c'uxaj
Exodus28:5 Ri quebanow ri atz'iak
Exodus28:6 Ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij rajawaxic re k'an puak
Exodus28:7 cäcoj quieb ximibal puwi' tak ri u teleb ri cäquirik wi quib ri qui tza'm.
Exodus28:8 Ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij rachil rib
Exodus28:9 Chebac'ama' quieb abaj cornalin
Exodus28:10 wakib bi'aj chuwäch ri jun abaj
Exodus28:11 Ri qui tzoq'uic ri bi'aj chquiwäch ri abaj
Exodus28:12 chebacojo' puwi' ri ximibal re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri cäbe puwi' ri u teleb

Exodus28:18 ri ucab cholaj cäbe jun granat
Exodus28:19 ri urox cholaj jun jasint
Exodus28:20 ri ucaj cholaj jun topas
Exodus28:21 e cablajuj (12) we abaj ri' chi conojel

Exodus28:23 Xukuje' chebabana' quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak
Exodus28:24 chebacojo' ri quieb alaj tak pach'um re k'an puak che ri quieb xiquinaj ri e c'o puwi' ri quieb u tza'm ri cäya' cho c'uxaj.
Exodus28:25 Ri quieb u tza'm chic ri alaj pach'um k'an puak chebawoc'owisaj puwi' ri u teleb
Exodus28:26 Chebabana' chi quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak
Exodus28:27 Chebabana' chic quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak
Exodus28:28 Xa jeri' cäquirik quib ri xiquinaj re ri cäya' cho c'uxaj ruc' ri xiquinaj re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ruc' jun ximibal azul
Exodus28:29 Xa jeri' ri Aaron aretak coc pa ri k'ijilabal
Exodus28:30 Chacojo' ri Urim xukuje' ri Tumim
Exodus28:31 Azul atz'iak cacoj che u banic ri k'ubal ri cäcoj chuxe' ri jalan atz'iak.
Exodus28:32 Catek' ri u kul pa u niq'uiajil ri coc wi ri jolomaj. Cabol ri u chi' ri xatek'o jacha' ri cäban che jun atz'iak re tz'um rech man cäjixjob taj.
Exodus28:33 Chacojo' retz'balil ri u chi' ri kas atz'iak cuc' crabaj re quem azul
Exodus28:34 cäbe jun tzilintzilin re k'an puak cäbextax c'u jun crabaj
Exodus28:35 Cucoj c'u bic ri Aaron ri kas atz'iak aretak cuban ri u chac re cojol tabal tok'ob
Exodus28:36 Chabana' jun liq'uilic utzalaj k'an puak
Exodus28:37 Chacojo' ri liq'uilic k'an puak chuwäch ri pisbal jolomaj
Exodus28:38 Cäc'oji' c'u chujolom ri Aaron amak'el
Exodus28:39 Re lino ri u pam atz'iak cabano tz'otom u wäch
Exodus28:40 Chabana' qui pam atz'iak chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron
Exodus28:41 Chebacojo' we atz'iak ri' chrij ri Aaron xukuje' chquij ri e u c'ojol
Exodus28:42 Xukuje' chebabana' qui säcaw re lino che u ch'ukic quib
Exodus28:43 Cucoj c'u ri Aaron xukuje' ri e u c'ojol aretak queboc pa ri k'ijilabal
Exodus29:1 “Che qui tasic e jacha' che nu cojol tabal tak tok'ob
Exodus29:2 chebabana' caxlanwa xukuje' caxlanwa re coc'alaj c'äj ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc' yok'om aseit ruc'
Exodus29:3 chebaya' pa jun alaj chicäch

Exodus29:6 chacojo' ri pisbal jolomaj
Exodus29:7 Chatasa' c'ut ri Aaron jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob
Exodus29:8 Chabij chque ri e u c'ojol chi quekeb awuc'
Exodus29:9 Utz u cojic ri u pas ri Aaron cabano xukuje' ri qui pas ri e u c'ojol

Exodus29:14 are c'u ri u ti'jal

Exodus29:16 Chatok'o ri u kul

Exodus29:19 Chac'ama' chi c'u ri jun ama' chij chic
Exodus29:20 Chatok'o ri u kul ri ama' chij
Exodus29:21 Chac'ama' jubik' che ri quic' xukuje' che ri aseit ri cäk'ij pa u jolom ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri c'o puwi' ri porobal
Exodus29:22 Chac'ama' chi c'ut ri xepo ri c'o che ri u je' ri ama' chij xukuje' ri c'o che ri ixco'l xukuje' ri c'o che ri seseb
Exodus29:23 Che ri caxlanwa ri man yo'm ta ch'am ruc' ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Exodus29:24 ronojel wa' quebaya' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol
Exodus29:25 Chebac'ama' c'ut pa qui k'ab
Exodus29:26 Che ri u tasic ri Aaron
Exodus29:27 Chatasa' ri uwo c'uxaj ri oc'owisam ri yo'm che sipanic ri nim u banic jas ri nak'atisabal xukuje' ri ra' ri ama' chij
Exodus29:28 Rech c'ut ri Aaron wa' xukuje' ri e u c'ojol. Jun pixab wa' re chbe k'ij sak chque ri aj israelib: we sipanic ri' are jun cuchuj ri cäquiya' ri aj israelib jacha' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib ruc' ri Ajawaxel.
Exodus29:29 Ri tastalicalaj tak ratz'iak ri Aaron cäquechbej can ri e u wi' tak u mam aretak quetas che cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' aretak cäya' takanic pa qui k'ab che cojol tabal tok'ob.
Exodus29:30 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri rija'lil ri Aaron ri cacanaj chupam ri u c'olbal ri coc c'u chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib rech capatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal
Exodus29:31 Cuc'am c'u na ri chij re ri tasow ib cutzac c'ut ri u ti'jal pa jun tastalic c'olbal.
Exodus29:32 Ri Aaron e rachilam ri e rachalaxic cäquitij ri u ti'jal ri ama' chij xukuje' ri caxlanwa ri c'o pa ri alaj chicäch
Exodus29:33 Cäquitij c'u quech we jastak ri' ri xbanbex ri cuyubal qui mac
Exodus29:34 We c'o cäto'taj can che ri ti'j
Exodus29:35 Chabana' ronojel wa' ruc' ri Aaron xukuje' cuc' ri e u c'ojol
Exodus29:36 chachi'j ronojel k'ij jun alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob che qui rikic ri sachbal tak macaj; cajosk'ij ri porobal aretak cachi'j jun tabal tok'ob re sachbal macaj
Exodus29:37 Wukub k'ij chabeytajisaj qui ya'ic tabal tak tok'ob re sachbal mac puwi' ri porobal
Exodus29:38 “K'ij chi k'ij mel a k'ij rajawaxic quebachi'j quieb alaj ama'ib tak chij re jujun qui junab puwi' ri porobal.
Exodus29:39 Jun chque caya' ak'abil
Exodus29:40 Ruc' ri nabe alaj ama' chij
Exodus29:41 Je caban che ri jun alaj ama' chij chic benak k'ij xukuje' ri sipanic re c'äj
Exodus29:42 We sipanic tak ri' ri queporox che u ya'ic nu k'ij e are' tak wa' ri cätakex qui poroxic cumal ri tataxelab xukuje' cumal ri alc'ualaxelab amak'el chnuwäch
Exodus29:43 Chila' quinrik wi na wib cuc' ri aj israelib
Exodus29:44 Quintas na ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus29:45 Quinjeki' chquixo'l ri aj israelib
Exodus29:46 Jeri' cäquich'ob na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios
Exodus30:1 “Chabana' xukuje' jun porobal re q'uisis ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol.

Exodus36:1 “Jeri'
Exodus36:2 Ri Moises xusiq'uij ri Bezaleel
Exodus36:3 Ri Moises xebujach ri sipanic pa qui k'ab ri e qui c'amom ulok ri aj israelib
Exodus36:4 Ri ajchaquib ri cäquiban ronojel u wäch chac ri cätajin quequiban ri jastak ri quebajwataj che u banic ri k'ijilabal
Exodus36:5 xequibij che ri Moises: “Ri winak cätajin cäquic'am ulok u wi' ri jastak ri quebajwataj che u banic ri chac ri takaninak ri Ajawaxel che u banic.”
Exodus36:6 Xtakan c'u ri Moises che u bixic chque conojel ri winak pa ri kajebal
Exodus36:7 man xuwi ta c'u c'o ronojel ri cajwataj che u banic ri chac
Exodus36:8 Jachin tak c'ut ri quena'w na che apachique chac chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj ajchaquib chic
Exodus36:9 Chquijujunal ri tasbal xa junam quetabalil
Exodus36:10 Xequit'is ri job tasbal xa jun xquiban che
Exodus36:11 Xequiban jujun c'amal re bätz' azul chuchi' ri nabe tasbal re ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' chuchi' ri q'uisbal tasbal re ri ucab job tasbal chic.
Exodus36:12 Cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal xquiban chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal xukuje' je xquiban chic che ri ucab job tasbal chic
Exodus36:13 Xukuje' xequiban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re k'an puak che u ch'epic ri job tasbal ruc' ri job tasbal chic
Exodus36:14 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xebuban julajuj (11) tasbal que quismal q'uisic'
Exodus36:15 Conojel ri tasbal xa junam quetabalil waklajuj (16) bara' qui rabic chquijujunal
Exodus36:16 Xebut'is job tasbal
Exodus36:17 Xebuban cawinak lajuj (50) c'amal chuchi' ri nabe job tasbal che t'ikbal rech
Exodus36:18 Xukuje' xebuban cawinak lajuj (50) ch'epebal re kan ch'ich' che u nuq'uic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.
Exodus36:19 Ri Bezaleel xuban jun ch'ukubal u wi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij ri tz'ajom ruc' quiäk
Exodus36:20 Xebuban chi c'u ri tz'alam re q'uisis ri quebajwataj che ri k'ijilabal
Exodus36:21 Chquijujunal ri tz'alam quebetan jotak (5) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj qui rabic
Exodus36:22 xebuban cacab qui tu' ri jun tz'alam rech cäch'epetaj che ri jun tz'alam chic. Conojel ri tz'alam re ri k'ijilabal je qui banic wa' xebubano.
Exodus36:23 Xebuban juwinak (20) tz'alam che ri u mox
Exodus36:24 xebucoj c'u cawinak (40) tac'alibal re sak puak chquixe'. Cacab tac'alibal chquixe' jujun ri quech'epi wi ri cacab qui tu'.
Exodus36:25 Xukuje' che ri jun u xcut chic ri k'ijilabal o ri re riquiak'ab
Exodus36:26 cachilam ri cawinak (40) qui tac'alibal
Exodus36:27 Xebuban chi wakib tz'alam ri quecoj chrij ri k'ijilabal ri c'o che ri u kajebal k'ij
Exodus36:28 xukuje' quieb tz'alam chic ri quecanaj chrij pa tak u xquina ri k'ijilabal.
Exodus36:29 We tz'alam ri' cäquic'ulajij quib
Exodus36:30 xetz'akat wajxakib tz'alam chi conojel cachilam ri waklajuj (16) qui tac'alibal re sak puak
Exodus36:31 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xebuban job balul re q'uisis ri quetok'en ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut ri k'ijilabal
Exodus36:32 xebuban chi job balul ri quetok'en ri tz'alam pa ri jun u xcut chic ri k'ijilabal
Exodus36:33 Ri balul re ri u niq'uiajil
Exodus36:34 Xucoj k'an puak chquij ri tz'alam
Exodus36:35 Xuban xukuje' ri tasbal
Exodus36:36 Xebucoj jujun ch'epebal re k'an puak che
Exodus36:37 Che ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xuban jun tasbal re quem azul
Exodus36:38 Xukuje' xebuban job akan e rachil tak ri xequebal xukuje' job qui tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus37:1 Ri Bezaleel xoc chi che u banic ri caxa
Exodus37:2 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak chrij xukuje' chupam
Exodus37:3 Xukuje' xebuban quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak ri xebucoj che ri quiejeb rakan
Exodus37:4 Xukuje' xebuban quieb balul re q'uisis
Exodus37:5 xebujut chupam tak ri e u xiquinaj ri c'o pa tak u xcut ri caxa
Exodus37:6 Xukuje' xuban jun tz'apibal re utzalaj k'an puak ri quetan job k'abaj u rabic
Exodus37:7 xebuban quieb wächbal re k'an puak ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic' ruc' bajibal
Exodus37:8 Ri tz'apibal xukuje' ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak tobanelab ri e c'o qui xic'
Exodus37:9 xuc'ulaj rib qui wäch
Exodus37:10 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xuban jun mexa re q'uisis ri quetan jun bara' u rabic
Exodus37:11 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak chrij xukuje' xucoj jun retz'balil re k'an puak chuchi';
Exodus37:12 xuban jun retz'balil ri u chi' ri oxib u wi' k'abaj u wäch
Exodus37:13 Xebuban quiejeb u xiquin re k'an puak ri xebucoj che ri quiejeb u xquina jawije' c'o wi ri quiejeb rakan
Exodus37:14 ri xiquinaj xecanaj chuchi'
Exodus37:15 Re q'uisis ri balul rech ri mexa xebubano
Exodus37:16 Xukuje' e re utzalaj k'an puak ri e u chaconisan ri rajawaxic ri quec'oji' puwi' ri mexa xebuban ri queya' puwi' ri e u platoyil
Exodus37:17 Ri Bezaleel xoc chi che u banic ri tzuc'ulibal
Exodus37:18 e c'o wakib u k'ab ri xebel pa tak u xcut
Exodus37:19 Chquijujunal ri wakib u k'ab ri quebel pa tak u xcut
Exodus37:20 ri rakan xukuje' e c'o quiejeb u lakil junam ruc' ri almendr
Exodus37:21 Chquijujunal ri ox ox u k'ab ri tzuc'ulibal ri quebel pa tak u xcut
Exodus37:22 Ri e u cotz'ijal xukuje' tak ri e u k'ab ri tzuc'ulibal
Exodus37:23 Xukuje' ri wukub yabal k'ak' e re utzalaj k'an puak xebubano
Exodus37:24 Oxib arob utzalaj k'an puak xajwataj che u banic ri tzuc'ulibal xukuje' ri e u chaconisan.
Exodus37:25 Ri Bezaleel xuban ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol
Exodus37:26 Xucoj utzalaj k'an puak puwi' xukuje' pa tak u xcut xukuje' che tak ri ruc'a'
Exodus37:27 Xebucoj jujun xiquinaj re k'an puak chuxe' ri retz'balil
Exodus37:28 Re q'uisis ri e u balul ri porobal xebubano
Exodus37:29 Ri Bezaleel xukuje' xusuc'umaj ri tastalicalaj aseit ri cäcoj che tasic
Exodus38:1 Q'uisis xucoj ri Bezaleel che u banic ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic. Quiejeb u xcut xubano
Exodus38:2 Che ri quiejeb u xquina xebuban quiejeb ruc'a'
Exodus38:3 Conojel ri e u chaconisan ri porobal e re k'an ch'ich' xebubano ri c'olbal tak chaj
Exodus38:4 Xukuje' xuban jun quemom k'an ch'ich' ri xucoj chuxe' ri u chi' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Exodus38:5 Xukuje' xebuban quiejeb xiquinaj chque ri quiejeb u xquina ri quemom k'an ch'ich' ri quejut wi ri e u balulil.
Exodus38:6 Xebuban c'u u ri e u balulil ri porobal re che' re q'uisis xebubano
Exodus38:7 xebujut c'ut chquipam tak ri xiquinaj ri e c'o pa ri quieb u xcut ri porobal
Exodus38:8 Ri Bezaleel are xebucoj ri qui ilbal quib ri ixokib ri cajwataj chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u banic ri tzima re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus38:9 Ri Bezaleel xuban ri uwo ja. Ri jun u xcut ri uwo ja pa ri u mox
Exodus38:10 Xerachilaj ri juwinak (20) rakan xukuje' ri juwinak (20) u tac'alibal ri e re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus38:11 Ri jun u xcut chic ri uwo ja pa ri riquiak'ab xruc'aj jun tasbal re cawinak oxlajuj (53) bara' u rabic
Exodus38:12 Pa ri u xcut pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Exodus38:13 Ri jun u xcut chic ri uwo ja pa ri elebal k'ij xukuje' xruc'aj jun tasbal juwinak wakib (26) bara' ruc' niq'uiaj.
Exodus38:14 Che ri jun u xcut ri oquibal
Exodus38:15 che c'u ri jun xcutaj chic
Exodus38:16 Conojel ri tasbal ri xsutibex rij ri uwo ja
Exodus38:17 Ri qui tac'alibal ri akan e re k'an ch'ich'
Exodus38:18 Ri tasbal ri xcoj chuchi' ri oquibal cho ri uwo ja
Exodus38:19 E c'o quiejeb rakan xukuje' quiejeb qui tac'alibal re k'an ch'ich'; ri e u ch'apabal xukuje' tak ri e u xiquin
Exodus38:20 Conojel ri e u ch'ic ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri re ri uwo ja
Exodus38:21 Rumal ri takanic ri xuya' ri Moises che ri Itamar
Exodus38:22 Ri u tat ri Bezaleel are' ri Uri
Exodus38:23 Xto' rumal ri Aholiab (ri u tat ri Aholiab are' ri Ahisamac ri aj Dan)
Exodus38:24 Ronojel ri k'an puak ri xcoj che u banic ri xajwataj che ri k'ijilabal
Exodus38:25 Ri sak puak ri xmulixic aretak xebajilax ri aj israelib
Exodus38:26 Conojel ri winak ri tz'ibam qui bi' ri tz'akatinak chic jutak winak (20) qui junab
Exodus38:27 Oxc'al cablajuj (72) quintal ruc' quieb arob sak puak xecoj che qui banic ri tac'alibal che ri k'ijilabal
Exodus38:28 Ri sak puak ri xquiya' conojel ri aj israelib
Exodus38:29 Ri k'an ch'ich' ri xya' che sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel

Exodus39:1 Quem azul
Exodus39:2 K'an puak
Exodus39:3 Xequiban liq'uilak tak k'an puak ruc' bajibal
Exodus39:4 Xecoj quieb ximibal puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ri cäquirik wi quib ri quieb qui tza'm.
Exodus39:5 Ri pas ri cächapow ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij
Exodus39:6 Ri abaj re tak cornalin xecoj
Exodus39:7 Ri Bezaleel xebucoj paquiwi' ri ximibal ri c'o puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij
Exodus39:8 Ri cäya' cho c'uxaj xukuje' coc'alaj u t'isic xbanic jacha' ri atz'iak i nim u k'ij: re k'an puak
Exodus39:9 Pim
Exodus39:10 Xenac' cajcholaj je'lalaj tak abaj chuwäch: pa ri nabe cholaj xbe jun rubi
Exodus39:11 pa ri ucab xbe jun granat
Exodus39:12 pa ri urox cholaj xbe jun jasint
Exodus39:13 are c'u pa ri ucaj cholaj xbe jun topas
Exodus39:14 e cablajuj c'ut ri abaj
Exodus39:15 Puwi' ri caya' cho c'uxaj xecoj jujun alaj tak pach'um k'an puak re utzalaj k'an puak.
Exodus39:16 Xeban quieb retz'balil re k'an puak xukuje' quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak ri xecoj chque ri quieb u chi' ajsic ri caya' cho c'uxaj
Exodus39:17 e are c'u ri alaj tak pach'um k'an puak xecanaj paquiwi' ri quieb xiquinaj ri e c'o che ri caya' cho c'uxaj.
Exodus39:18 Xech'ap ri qui tza'm ri quieb alaj tak pach'um k'an puak chupam ri quieb ch'epebal
Exodus39:19 Xukuje' xeban chi quieb xiquinaj re k'an puak ri xecoj che ri quieb u tza'm ri caya' cho c'uxaj iquim
Exodus39:20 Xeban quieb xiquinaj chic re k'an puak ri xenac' chuwäch ri ximibal ri c'o puwi' ri u teleb ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij
Exodus39:21 Xexim tak ri xiquinaj re ri caya' cho c'uxaj ruc' ri xiquinaj re ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij ruc' jun ximibal azul
Exodus39:22 Ronojel ri atz'iak ri cacanaj chupam ri atz'iak ri nim u k'ij
Exodus39:23 Xbus ri u chi' ri u kul ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil
Exodus39:24 Xecoj crabaj re quem azul
Exodus39:25 Xukuje' xeban tak tzlintzlin re utzalaj k'an puak
Exodus39:26 Jun tzlintzlin rachilam jun crabaj
Exodus39:27 Ri u pam atz'iak ri re lino ri cucoj ri Aaron xukuje' ri caquicoj ri e u c'ojol
Exodus39:28 Xukuje' ri pisbal jolomaj
Exodus39:29 ri pas re tumim lino
Exodus39:30 Xukuje' xeban liq'uilak re utzalaj k'an puak ri cätasowic jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob
Exodus39:31 Xcoj jun ximibal re azul che u ximic ri liq'uilic k'an puak chuwäch ri pisbal jolomaj
Exodus39:32 Xtz'akat c'u u banic ri k'ijilabal
Exodus39:33 xquijach c'u ri k'ijilabal pa u k'ab ri Moises
Exodus39:34 ri ch'ukubal re quiäk tak qui tz'umal ama'ib tak chij
Exodus39:35 ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic ri e u balul
Exodus39:36 Ri mexa e rachilam ri e u chaconisan
Exodus39:37 ri tzuc'ulibal re utzalaj k'an puak rachilam tak ri e u yabal k'ak'
Exodus39:38 ri porobal re k'an puak
Exodus39:39 ri porobal re k'an ch'ich' rachilam ri quemom k'an ch'ich'
Exodus39:40 ri tasbal ri cärababax chuwäch ri uwo ja
Exodus39:41 ri quemom tak atz'iak ri quebajwataj che ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal
Exodus39:42 Ri aj israelib je u banic ronojel ri chac xquibano

Exodus40:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Moises
Exodus40:2 “Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri nabe ic'

Exodus40:4 Xukuje' caya' ri mexa chupam xukuje' ri tzuc'ulibal
Exodus40:5 Chacojo' ri porobal re k'an puak ri cäporox wi ri c'oc' k'ol chuwäch ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic
Exodus40:6 Chacojo' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic chuchi' ri k'ijilabal
Exodus40:7 Chacojo' ri tzima chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus40:8 Chatanij ri tasbal chrij ri uwo ja
Exodus40:9 Chac'ama' ri aseit ri cäcoj che qui tasic ri jastak
Exodus40:10 Xukuje' chak'ija' ri aseit re ri tastajic puwi' ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Exodus40:11 Chak'ija' aseit puwi' ri tzima xukuje' puwi' ri u tiq'uilibal
Exodus40:12 Chebac'ama' bic ri Aaron e rachilam ri e u c'ojol chunakaj ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus40:13 quebucojo c'u ri Aaron ri atz'iak ri nim u banic
Exodus40:14 Quebasiq'uij chi c'u ri e u c'ojol
Exodus40:15 chak'ija' c'u aseit paquiwi' jacha' ri xaban che ri Aaron
Exodus40:16 Je c'u u banic ronojel xuban ri Moises
Exodus40:17 Je c'u ri'
Exodus40:18 Ri Moises xuwoc ri k'ijilabal
Exodus40:19 xulic' ri lic'om puwi' ri k'ijilabal
Exodus40:20 Xebuc'am ri Moises ri tz'alam tak abaj ri e tz'ibatal wi ri pixab
Exodus40:21 xuc'am c'u bic
Exodus40:22 Xucojoxtaj ri mexa chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus40:23 Xebusuc'umaj c'u ri caxlanwa puwi' ri mexa chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Exodus40:24 Xukuje' xuya' ri tzuc'ulibal chupam ri k'ijilabal chuwäch ri mexa pa u mox k'ab ri k'ijilabal
Exodus40:25 xebutzij tak ri u yabal k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Exodus40:26 Xuya' c'u ri porobal re k'an puak chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus40:27 xuporoj c'u c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi'

Exodus40:29 xucojoxtaj ri porobal ri cäporox wi ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic chuchi' ri k'ijilabal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Exodus40:30 Xuya' ri tzima chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib

Exodus40:32 Cäquich'aj ri qui k'ab
Exodus40:33 Chuq'uisbalil
