Leviticus1:1 Ri Ajawaxel xusiq'uij ulok ri Moises kas pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus1:2 “Chattzijon cuc' ri aj israelib chabij c'u chque chi aretak jun chiwe quebuc'am ulok awaj chwe che sipanic
Leviticus1:3 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic cäresaj ulok chquixo'l ri u wacax
Leviticus1:4 quebuya' c'u ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj. Cac'amar c'u na ri awaj ri cuyao
Leviticus1:5 Cutok' c'u u kul ri ama' wacax chuwäch ri Ajawaxel; are c'u ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron
Leviticus1:6 Ri cäjachow ri awaj che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic cuch'ol ri u tz'umal
Leviticus1:7 e are' tak c'ut ri e cojol tabal tok'ob quecojow ri k'ak' puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus1:8 ri queya' wi ri ch'akatak u ti'jal ri awaj ri xeperejex che ri awaj xukuje' ri jolomaj xukuje' ri qui xepoyil ri ixco'l.
Leviticus1:9 Ri cäjachow ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Leviticus1:10 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Leviticus1:11 Rajawaxic cutok' u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel pa u xcut ri porobal ri cäca'y pa u mox elebal k'ij; are c'u ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron cäquichicoj ri u quiq'uel puwi' xukuje' pa tak uxcut ri porobal.
Leviticus1:12 Caperejextax c'ut ri awaj
Leviticus1:13 Are' c'ut ri cäjachow ri tabal tok'ob pa cachajirisaxic quebuch'aj ri ixco'l xukuje' ri e ra' ri awaj ruc' ja'
Leviticus1:14 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel are jun chicop ri e c'o u xic'
Leviticus1:15 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic' puwi' ri porobal: cut'okopij na ri u jolom cuporoj c'u na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic' puwi' ri porobal aretak yitz'tajinak chi ri u quiq'uel pa jun u xcut ri porobal.
Leviticus1:16 Cäresaj ri riximibal xukuje' ri c'o chupam
Leviticus1:17 Cujak'ij c'u na ri chicop ri e c'o u xic'
Leviticus2:1 “Aretak c'o jachin cuc'am ulok jun sipanic re c'äj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus2:2 cuc'am na bic chquiwäch ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron
Leviticus2:3 Are c'u ri jubik' ri cäto'taj can che ri sipanic
Leviticus2:4 Aretak caya' jun sipanic re c'äj ri chak'ajisam pa jorno
Leviticus2:5 We re c'äj ri a sipanic ri chak'ajisam pa xot
Leviticus2:6 cäban ch'akatak che
Leviticus2:7 We ri a sipanic re c'äj
Leviticus2:8 Aretak c'u a suc'umam chic we sipanic ri' e rachilam tak we jastak ri'
Leviticus2:9 Chila' ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na jubik' che ri sipanic cunicowisaj puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic ri canicowisaxic re natanic
Leviticus2:10 Are c'u ri cacanaj can che ri sipanic
Leviticus2:11 Miya' ch'am ruc' jun chque ri sipanic re c'äj ri quiya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Man c'o ta c'u jun u wäch ch'am mawi juyubal räx cab ri canicowisax taj jacha' che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus2:12 Cuya' quic'am ulok ri ch'am ri juyubal räx cab che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che sipanic che ri nabe tak wächinic
Leviticus2:13 Chque c'u conojel tak ri e a sipanic quech c'äj rajawaxic quebatzayij
Leviticus2:14 We caya' jun sipanic che ri Ajawaxel quech c'äj quech ri nabe tak u wächinic ri awulew
Leviticus2:15 Rajawaxic caya' aseit xukuje' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol puwi' ri a sipanic
Leviticus2:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunicowisaj na jubik' k'ichom trico xukuje' jubik' aseit
Leviticus3:1 “We c'o jachin jun cuc'am chquixo'l ri rawaj jun ati't wacax o jun ama' wacax che u chi'xic jun tabal tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel re utzirisan ib
Leviticus3:2 Ri cäjachow ri sipanic quebuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj
Leviticus3:3 Ri cäjachow ri awaj che u chi'xic jun tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus3:4 ri quieb u quinak'
Leviticus3:5 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquiban na chi canicow ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus3:6 We c'o jachin jun cuchi'j che ri Ajawaxel jun awaj ri cäresaj chuxo'l ri u tzobaj jacha' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus3:7 We cuchi'j jun alaj ama' chij
Leviticus3:8 Cuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom
Leviticus3:9 Ri cächi'n ri awaj che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus3:10 ri quieb u quinak' ri xepo ri e c'o chquij ri e c'o cho ri uwo rachak xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chrij ri seseb ri junam cäresaj cuc' ri quieb u quinak'.
Leviticus3:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunicowisaj ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus3:12 We ri awaj ri cuchi'j are' jun q'uisic'
Leviticus3:13 cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom
Leviticus3:14 Ri cachi'n ri awaj cuya' cuc'amo xukuje' cuyao
Leviticus3:15 ri quieb u quinak'
Leviticus3:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuporoj ronojel wa' puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus3:17 Pixab wa' ri kas xa jumul cäjeki'c canok quebel cuc' ri tataxelab cäk'ax cuc' ri alc'ualaxelab
Leviticus4:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus4:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi
Leviticus4:3 We ri camacunic are' ri quinimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus4:4 Cuc'am na bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus4:5 Chwi chi c'u wa' kas are c'ut cuc'am na jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj ama' wacax cuc'am c'u u bic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib;
Leviticus4:6 chila' curub wi ri u wi' u k'ab chupam ri quic' wukub mul c'ut cuchicoj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chusuq'uil ri ch'ukubal u pam ri k'ijilabal.
Leviticus4:7 Cubil xukuje' jubik' quic' chque tak ri e ruc'a' ri porobal ri caporox wi ri c'oc'alaj k'ol ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus4:8 Cäresaj ronojel ri u xepoyil ri alaj ama' wacax ri yo'm che sachbal mac
Leviticus4:9 ri quieb u quinak'
Leviticus4:10 je cäban che jas ri resaxic ri quesax che ri wacax re ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus4:11 Are c'u ri u tz'umal ri alaj ama' wacax
Leviticus4:12 ronojel ri alaj ama' wacax
Leviticus4:13 We c'u conojel ri aj israelib caquiban jun etzelal ri man xquirayij ta u banic
Leviticus4:14 aretak c'u quetamax ri mac ri qui banom
Leviticus4:15 Ri cäquiya' wi ri qui k'ab ri nimak tak tatayib ri e re ri tinimit puwi' ri u jolom ri alaj ama' wacax
Leviticus4:16 Ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na bic jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj ama' wacax pa ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus4:17 curub na ri u wi' u k'ab pa ri quic' cuchicoj wukub mul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus4:18 Cubil na jubik' ri quic' chquij tak ri ruc'a' ri porobal ri c'o chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus4:19 Xukuje' quesax na che ri alaj ama' wacax ronojel ri u xepoyil
Leviticus4:20 ri u bixic chi je cäban che we alaj ama' wacax ri' junam jas ri cuban che ri alaj ama' wacax ri capil u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus4:21 Cäresaj bic ri alaj ama' wacax chrij ri kajebal
Leviticus4:22 We cämacun jun c'amal be cuban c'u jun jasach ri quebuc'ulelaj ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus4:23 Aretak c'u cuch'obo chi macuninak cuc'am na bic jacha' che sipanic jun ama' q'uisic' ri man c'o ta jun u yab.
Leviticus4:24 Cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ama' q'uisic'
Leviticus4:25 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na ruc' ri u wi u k'ab jubik' u quiq'uel ri awaj ri pilom u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus4:26 cuporoj c'u ronojel ri xepo puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus4:27 We jun winak ri man nim ta u k'ij cämacunic man ruc' ta ri u rayibal
Leviticus4:28 aretak c'u cuch'obo chi macuninak cuc'am na bic jun ati't q'uisic' ri man c'o ta jun u yab
Leviticus4:29 Cuya' na ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri awaj ri xuchi'j u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus4:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab jubik' quic' cubil c'u chquij ri e ruc'a' ri porobal tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Leviticus4:31 Xukuje' rajawaxic quesax ronojel ri u xepoyil
Leviticus4:32 We ri winak ri' cuc'am ulok jun ati't chij che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus4:33 Cuya' ri u k'ab puwi' ri u jolom ri ati't chij
Leviticus4:34 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab
Leviticus4:35 Cäresaj c'u ronojel ri u xepoyil
Leviticus5:1 “We c'o jun winak cäsiq'uix che u k'alajisaxic ri xrilo o xuto
Leviticus5:2 We c'o jun winak cuchap jun jasach tz'il
Leviticus5:3 We c'o jun cuchap u tz'ilol jun winak
Leviticus5:4 We c'o jachin jun quel ulok pa u chi' ruc' aninakil jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Leviticus5:5 Jachin ri quetamatajic chi macuninak pa jun chque we jastak ri'
Leviticus5:6 cujach na jun ati't awaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri cresaj ulok chquixo'l ri u chij che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj ri bantajinak; cuya' cuc'am ulok jun ati't chij jun ati't q'uisic' rumal c'ut we tabal tok'ob ri'
Leviticus5:7 We c'u man cäcuin che u lok'ic jun alaj ama' chij
Leviticus5:8 Quebuc'am ulok chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus5:9 Cuchicoj c'u na jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri tabal tok'ob re sachbal mac pa jun u xcut ri porobal
Leviticus5:10 Are c'u ri ucab cuya' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic je jas ri nak'atisabal; xa jeri' ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik ri sachbal mac che ri mac ri u banom we winak ri'
Leviticus5:11 We c'u ne man cäcuinic che qui lok'ic quieb palomax
Leviticus5:12 Rajawaxic cuc'am ulok chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus5:13 Rech curik ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cuyubal mac
Leviticus5:14 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus5:15 “Ri winak ri camacunic ri man ruc' taj ri u rayibal cux c'u ajchak'mac re ri quit'orixic ri tastalic tak jastak rech ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus5:16 Ri winak ri' cutoj na ri u t'orim chque ri tastalic tak jastak cuya' chi na jun u ro'il
Leviticus5:17 We c'o jun winak cämacunic
Leviticus5:18 Rumal ri' rajawaxic cäresaj na ulok jun ama' chij chquixo'l ri u chij ri man c'o ta u yab
Leviticus5:19 Jun tabal tok'ob wa' u mac rech ri macunic
Leviticus6:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus6:2 “Aretak c'o jachin camacunic cux c'u ajchak'mac re t'orinic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel rumal ri u subic ri rach aj k'uch pa jun ch'äcoj o puak ri jachom pa u k'ab o rumal eläk'anic o u cojic chuk'ab che ri rach winak
Leviticus6:3 o man cuk'alajisaj taj chi u rikom jun jasach ri tzakom canok; o rumal u bixic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na re subunic (apachique we jastak ri' ri cämacun wi jun.)
Leviticus6:4 Cux ajchak'mac che we mac ri'. Cutzelej na ri reläk'am o ri xak u tokim
Leviticus6:5 o apachique jasach ri xak u bim wi chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Tz'akat cutzelej na ronojel che ri ajchak'e
Leviticus6:6 Ri u tabal tok'ob ri cuya' che ri Ajawaxel are jun ama' chij ri man c'o ta jun u yab
Leviticus6:7 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob curik na ri cuyubal u mac we winak ri' pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel chque jun chque we jastak ri' ri macuninak wi
Leviticus6:8 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus6:9 “Chebaya' we pixab ri' che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol
Leviticus6:10 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuch'uk ri u cuerp quebucoj atz'iak
Leviticus6:11 Cuq'uex c'u na ri ratz'iak
Leviticus6:12 Ri k'ak' ri cänicow puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus6:13 Ri k'ak' re ri porobal rajawaxic chi amak'el cänicowic. Mawi ta ne jubik' cächupic.”
Leviticus6:14 “Are wa' ri pixab che qui ya'ic ri sipanic quech c'äj: ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquichi'j chuwäch ri porobal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus6:15 Jun chque cuc'am jumuk' che ri c'äj re ri sipanic xukuje' ri re ri raseitil
Leviticus6:16 Are c'u ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic cutij na ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol; man ruc' ta ch'am pa ri c'olbal ri tastalic chuwäch ri uwo ja rech ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.
Leviticus6:17 Maquitzac ruc' ch'am
Leviticus6:18 Conojel ri e ralc'ual ri Aaron ri alabom cuya' cäquitij que ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic ri queporoxic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Je chban wa' pa tak ri k'ij junab ri quepe na apachique jasach ri cächapowic cätastaj canok.”
Leviticus6:19 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus6:20 “Are wa' ri sipanic ri rajawaxic cuya' ri Aaron xukuje' ri e rija'lil
Leviticus6:21 Cäyok' aseit ruc' cätzac pa xarten
Leviticus6:22 Je u suc'umaxic wa' ri sipanic cuban ri qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob ri ralaxic ri Aaron ri cätas che u q'uexwäch. Rech ri Ajawaxel wa' amak'el
Leviticus6:23 Ronojel sipanic ri quequiya' ri e cojol tabal tok'ob kas cäq'uis u poroxic
Leviticus6:24 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus6:25 “Chebaya' che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol ri pixab tak che qui banic ri tabal tak tok'ob qui mac quech ri macaj: Ri awaj ri cachi'x u mac ri macaj rajawaxic cätok' u kul chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus6:26 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cachi'n ri tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj cuya' cutij re che
Leviticus6:27 Apachique jasach ri cänakow ri u ti'jal ri awaj cätastajic
Leviticus6:28 Ri t'uy ri cätzac wi ri ti'j ri u tz'akatil ri sipanic rajawaxic cäpaxixic
Leviticus6:29 We tabal tok'ob ri' are jun jasach wa' ri tastalic. Xuwi ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ya'talic cäquitij que che.
Leviticus6:30 Man ya'tal ta c'u u tijic jun awaj ri chi'm u mac ri macaj ri c'amom bic ri u quiq'uel chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus7:1 “Ri tabal tak tok'ob ri queya'ic u mac rech ri chak'maquil
Leviticus7:2 Ri awaj ri chi'm u mac ri macunic rajawaxic cätok' u kul pa ri c'olbal jawije' ri quepil wi ri awaj ri quechi'xic rech queporoxic are c'u ri u quiq'uel rajawaxic cachicox puwi' xukuje' chrij ri porobal.
Leviticus7:3 Cächi'x ronojel ri u xepoyil ri awaj: ri c'o che ri u je' xukuje' ri xepo ri c'o chquij tak ri ti'j chupam
Leviticus7:4 ri quieb u quinak'
Leviticus7:5 Ronojel wa' cuporoj ri cojol tabal tok'ob puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus7:6 Conojel ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuya' cäquitij que
Leviticus7:7 Ri tabal tok'ob ri u mac rech ri chak'maquil xak junam ruc' ri tabal tok'ob ri u mac rech ri macunic
Leviticus7:8 Junam xukuje'
Leviticus7:9 Xukuje' ronojel sipanic ri cächak'ajisax chupam ri jorno
Leviticus7:10 Je c'ut ronojel sipanic rech c'äj ri yok'om aseit ruc' o chaki'j
Leviticus7:11 “Are tak wa' ri pixab che qui ya'ic ri tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel:
Leviticus7:12 We ri tabal tok'ob rech u ya'ic maltioxinic
Leviticus7:13 junam c'ut ruc' ri tabal tok'ob re maltioxinic xukuje' re utzirisan ib
Leviticus7:14 Cätas c'u na jun u tz'akatil che jujun u wäch sipanic ri tasom che ri Ajawaxel cäyataj c'u che ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cajamin ri u quiq'uel ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib.
Leviticus7:15 Ri u ti'jal ri awaj ri cächi'x che u ya'ic maltioxinic xukuje' re utzirisan ib
Leviticus7:16 We c'u ne cächi'x ri awaj che u tz'akatisaxic jun chi'nic
Leviticus7:17 we c'u cäcanaj can niq'uiaj che
Leviticus7:18 We c'o jun cätijow ri u ti'jal ri awaj re utzirisan ib che ri urox k'ij
Leviticus7:19 Ri ti'j ri cuchap apachique jasach ri tz'il
Leviticus7:20 Ri winak ri tz'ilobinak ri cutij ri ti'j re ri tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus7:21 Ri winak ri cuchap apachique jasach ri tz'il we u tz'ilol winak
Leviticus7:22 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus7:23 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: c'o xepo re ama' wacax mitijo
Leviticus7:24 Ri u xepoyil ri cäminak awaj o ri cach'akatix cumal juyubal tak awaj
Leviticus7:25 Apachin c'ut ri cätijow ri u xepoyil ri awaj ri cäporox che sipanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus7:26 Apawije' ta ne ri ix jekel wi
Leviticus7:27 Ri winak ri cutij u quiq'uel apachique awaj
Leviticus7:28 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus7:29 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib: chi jachin ri cuya' tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus7:30 Cuc' ri kas e u k'ab cuc'am ulok chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri sipanic ri cäporoxic: ri xepo ri c'o che ri uwo c'uxaj; ri kas uwo c'uxaj che u banic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jas ri nak'atal u banic che u jachic.
Leviticus7:31 Ri xepo cäporox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus7:32 Ri ca' ri awaj ri re ri quiquiak'ab ri queya' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib queya' che ri cojol tabal tok'ob jacha' che cuchuj.
Leviticus7:33 Ri ra' ri awaj re ri riquiak'ab
Leviticus7:34 chque c'ut ri qui tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib ri aj israelib
Leviticus7:35 Are wa' ri cärechbej ri Aaron xukuje' ri cäquechbej ri e rija'lil
Leviticus7:36 ri Ajawaxel xtakanic chi ri aj israelib caquiya' chque
Leviticus7:37 Are pixab wa' che qui ya'ic ri tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic

Leviticus8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus8:2 “Chac'ama' ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol
Leviticus8:3 chebamulij ri aj israelib chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.”
Leviticus8:4 Je c'u xuban ri Moises jacha' ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus8:5 Xubij c'u ri Moises chque: “Are takanic wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel chi cäbanic.”
Leviticus8:6 Xuban c'u ri Moises chi ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol xekebic
Leviticus8:7 Ri Moises xucoj ri u pam atz'iak chrij ri Aaron
Leviticus8:8 Xucoj c'ut ri cacoj cho c'uxaj chrij
Leviticus8:9 Xucoj c'ut ri pisbal jolomaj che ri u jolom
Leviticus8:10 Xuc'am c'ut ri Moises ri aseit re ri tastajic
Leviticus8:11 Wukub mul xuchicoj we aseit ri' puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus8:12 Ri Moises xuk'ij c'ut puwi' ri Aaron ri aseit re tastajic che u tasic jacha' che cojol tabal tok'ob.
Leviticus8:13 Xubij chi c'u chque ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron chi quekebic
Leviticus8:14 Xtakan c'u ri Moises che u c'amic ulok ri alaj ama' wacax ri cäpil che josk'ibal macaj
Leviticus8:15 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri alaj ama' wacax
Leviticus8:16 Ri Moises xuc'am ronojel ri xepo ri c'o chquij ri ti'j chupam
Leviticus8:17 Are c'u ri u tz'akatil ri alaj ama' wacax
Leviticus8:18 Ri Moises xubano chi chnakajix ri ama' chij ri cächi'x che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic are' c'u ri Aaron e rachil ri e u c'ojol
Leviticus8:19 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri ama' chij
Leviticus8:20 xutasij ri ama' chij pa ch'akatak
Leviticus8:21 xebuch'aj ri ti'j chupam xukuje' tak ri e ra'
Leviticus8:22 Ri Moises xubano chi cac'am chi ulok ri jun chi ama' chij ri rech ri nak'atisabal che ri tasanic
Leviticus8:23 Ri Moises xutok' u kul ri ama' chij
Leviticus8:24 Ri Moises xebusiq'uij ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron
Leviticus8:25 Ri Moises xuc'am c'u ri xepo
Leviticus8:26 Chupam ri chicäch ri c'olbal ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am cuc' ri caya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus8:27 conojel we jastak ri' xebuya' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol
Leviticus8:28 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises we jastak ri' pa qui k'ab
Leviticus8:29 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises ri uwo c'uxaj
Leviticus8:30 Xuc'am c'u ri Moises jubik' aseit re ri tastajic xukuje' che ri quic' ri c'o puwi' ri porobal
Leviticus8:31 Xubij chi c'u na ri Moises che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol: “Chitzaca' ri ti'j chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus8:32 Ri wa
Leviticus8:33 Minajtajisaj c'u iwib wukub k'ij che ri u chi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus8:34 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm takanic chi ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri u cuyutajic ri macaj ri bantajinak iwumal je chbanok jacha' ri bantajinak camic.

Leviticus11:11 Mebitij ri qui ti'jal

Leviticus11:23 Ronojel c'u qui wäch chicop ri querapinic xukuje' cäwac'lajic
Leviticus11:24 Cumal we jastak ri' quixcanaj tz'il: apachin ri cächapowic ri cäminak qui ti'jal we awaj ri' cäcanaj tz'il c'ä coc na ri ak'ab.
Leviticus11:25 Apachin ri cäwalijisan jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri'
Leviticus11:26 Ronojel awaj ri c'o rixq'uiak
Leviticus11:27 Apachique awaj ri c'o quiejeb rakan ri cäbin paquiwi' ri quiejeb rakan
Leviticus11:28 Apachin ri cäwalijisan jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri'
Leviticus11:29 Chquixo'l ri awaj ri caquijururej quib cho ri ulew e are tak wa' ri e tz'il chiwe: ri sakbin
Leviticus11:30 jacha' ri oo'n
Leviticus11:31 E are wa' ri e tz'il chiwe chquixo'l conojel ri chicop xukuje' apachin ri quenakowic aretak e cäminak chic
Leviticus11:32 Xukuje' cäcanaj tz'il apachique jasach ri cukajbej jun chque we awaj ri' aretak cäminak chic. We jun jasach re che'
Leviticus11:33 We jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri' cätzak pa jun bo'j
Leviticus11:34 Ronojel ri tijic rij
Leviticus11:35 Apachique jasach ri cukajbej jun chque we awaj ri' aretak cäminak chic
Leviticus11:36 Are c'u
Leviticus11:37 We cäcäm jun chque we awaj ri'
Leviticus11:38 We c'u mubam chic ri ija' cäkaj c'u jun chque we cäminak tak awaj ri puwi'
Leviticus11:39 We c'u ne cäcäm jun chque ri iwawaj ri tijic rij iwumal
Leviticus11:40 ri cutij re ri u ti'jal ri cäminak awaj
Leviticus11:41 Mitij jun chicop ri cujururej rib cho ri ulew; awaj wa' ri etzelam u wäch.
Leviticus11:42 Conojel chicop ri cäquijururej quib cho ri ulew
Leviticus11:43 Mitz'iloj iwib ruc' jun chque we chicop ri' ri cäquijururej quib.”
Leviticus11:44 “In c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios
Leviticus11:45 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri xixinwesaj ulok pa Ejipt rech quinux i Dios: rumal ri' rajawaxic quixux tastalic
Leviticus11:46 E are pixab wa' chquij ri awaj
Leviticus11:47 rech cäc'utun ri u jalbem rib ri tz'il ruc' ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' chquixo'l ri awaj ri takal qui tijic cuc' ri awaj ri man takal ta qui tijic.
Leviticus12:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus12:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak jun ixok cäcanaj yawab winak
Leviticus12:3 Ri ac'al ala cakopix na ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri achi wi aretak cätz'akat wajxakib (8) u k'ij.
Leviticus12:4 Ri u nan ri ac'al cäbeytaj na juwinak oxlajuj (33) k'ij ri u josk'itajic che ri u quiq'uel; man c'o ta jun jasach ri tastalic cuya' cuchapo mawi coc ta chupam ri k'ijilabal
Leviticus12:5 We ali ri cäralaj
Leviticus12:6 Aretak quebetz'akat ri k'ij re ri u josk'itajic che ri ralanic jun ala o jun ali
Leviticus12:7 Are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob quebuchi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel che u tz'onoxic ri sachbal u mac ri ixok
Leviticus12:8 We c'u ri u nan ri ac'al man cuban ta ri u rajil che u lok'ic ulok jun alaj ama' chij
Leviticus13:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus13:2 “Aretak jun winak c'o sipoj chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:3 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj ri ch'a'c ri c'o chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:4 We c'o sakrek' chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:5 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij cunic'oj na ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we xak je wi u banom ri ch'a'c
Leviticus13:6 Aretak cätz'akat ri wukub k'ij cänic'ox chi jumul rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u cätajin cäsach ri ch'a'c
Leviticus13:7 We c'u cujabuj rib ri pok' chrij ri u tz'umal aretak nic'om chic ri yawab
Leviticus13:8 We c'u aretak cänic'otaj ri yawab rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:9 Aretak jun winak c'o u ch'aquil chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij
Leviticus13:10 Cänic'ox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:11 chuwilaj ch'a'c wa' ri u ruxubem ri u tz'umal. Ri cojol tabal tok'ob rajawaxic cuk'alajisaj chi tz'il we winak ri'
Leviticus13:12 We c'u cänimataj ri chuwilaj ch'a'c ruc' aninakil
Leviticus13:13 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj na; we c'u ch'ukutajinak ronojel ri u cuerp rumal ri ch'a'c ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuk'alajisaj chi man c'o ta u yab
Leviticus13:14 Apachique c'u k'ij
Leviticus13:15 Cunic'oj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri quiäk ti'j
Leviticus13:16 We c'u ne cuq'uex rib ri quiäk ti'j
Leviticus13:17 rech cunic'oj
Leviticus13:18 Aretak c'o jachin jun c'o jun chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij ri u tz'umal cäcunataj c'ut
Leviticus13:19 cäcanaj c'u can jun sak sipoj pa ri u c'olbal
Leviticus13:20 We ri cojol tabal tok'ob; carilo chi ri u rikom wi ri c'axc'obic mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:21 We carilo chi ri xc'oji' wi ri chuwilaj ch'a'c man c'o ta rismal ri sakarinak chupam
Leviticus13:22 We c'u cätajin cujabuj rib ri yabil chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:23 We c'u ri xc'oji' wi ri chuwilaj ch'a'c man u jabum ta rib
Leviticus13:24 Aretak c'o jun c'atic chrij ri u tz'umal jun winak
Leviticus13:25 cunic'oj na ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u sakarinak ri rismal pa ri c'atic
Leviticus13:26 We c'u aretak cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri c'atic
Leviticus13:27 aretak catz'akat ri wukub k'ij cänic'ox rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u u jabum rib ri yabil chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:28 We c'u ri c'atic man cujabuj ta rib chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:29 We jun achi o jun ixok c'o jun ch'a'c che ri u jolom o che ri u cacate'
Leviticus13:30 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj ri ch'a'c
Leviticus13:31 We c'u aretak cänic'ox ri ch'a'c ri quiäkchi'n rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:32 Aretak catz'akat wukub k'ij cänic'ox ri ch'a'c rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob; we c'u man u jabum rib ri quiäkchi'n mawi mecmobinak pa ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:33 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cubij che ri winak ri yawab chi cäsocax ri u wi'
Leviticus13:34 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij
Leviticus13:35 We c'u ri quiäkchi'n cujabuj rib chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:36 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj chi jumul ri winak ri yawab
Leviticus13:37 We c'u caril ri cojol tabal tok'ob chi ri quiäkchi'n man u jabum ta rib
Leviticus13:38 We jun achi we jun ixok e c'o sakrek' chrij ri u tz'umal
Leviticus13:39 ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:40 We jun winak cätzak ri u wi'
Leviticus13:41 We ri u wi' ri c'o chuwäch cäk'ulk'ubic cach'anar c'u chuwäch
Leviticus13:42 We c'u cäc'utun jun ch'a'c ri sak quiäk cäca'yic pa tak ri c'olbal ri e ch'anach'oj
Leviticus13:43 Cunic'oj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:44 We winak ri' yawab che chuwilaj chac'
Leviticus13:45 Ri winak ri ch'aquirinak che chuwilaj ch'a'c
Leviticus13:46 Joropa' k'ij cäc'oji' ri chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij
Leviticus13:47 Aretak cac'utun jun tz'aj che jun atz'iak
Leviticus13:48 o che jun quem
Leviticus13:49 we ri tz'aj ri c'o chque we jastak ri' räxroj o quiäkcoj
Leviticus13:50 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cunic'oj na ri tz'aj
Leviticus13:51 Aretak catz'akat wukub k'ij cunic'oj ri tz'aj; we u jabum rib chrij ri atz'iak
Leviticus13:52 Je c'u ri' apachique jasach ri c'o we tz'aj ri' che chuwilaj ch'a'c wa'
Leviticus13:53 We c'u cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:54 cuya' takanic chi cäch'aj ri tz'aj cätz'apix chi na wukub k'ij ri jasach ri' pa jun ja.
Leviticus13:55 Aretak ch'ajtajinak chic ri tz'aj cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob. We c'u cärilo chi ri tz'aj man sachinak taj
Leviticus13:56 We c'u aretak cunic'oj ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus13:57 We c'u cuc'ut chi rib jumul chrij ri atz'iak
Leviticus13:58 Are c'u ri atz'iak
Leviticus13:59 Aretak wa' ri pixab chquij ri tz'aj re chuwilaj ch'a'c chque tak ri atz'iak re rismal chij o re lino
Leviticus14:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus14:2 “E are tak pixab wa' che u josk'ixic jun winak ri c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chrij: ri yawab cäc'am bic chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:3 quel c'u bic che u nic'oxic chrij ri tinimit. We c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cärilo chi utzirinak ri chuwilaj ch'a'c ri c'o chrij ri yawab
Leviticus14:4 cutak na qui c'amic che ri cujosk'ij rib quieb alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri e c'asc'oj ri xukuje' e ch'ajch'oj
Leviticus14:5 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cätakan che u k'atic u kul jun chque ri alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' puwi' jun bo'j
Leviticus14:6 cuc'am c'ut ri alaj chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri c'aslic
Leviticus14:7 Wukub mul cuchicoj chrij ri winak ri quejosk'ix che ri ch'a'c
Leviticus14:8 Ri cäjosk'ixic rajawaxic quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak catinic
Leviticus14:9 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij
Leviticus14:10 Aretak catz'akat wajxakib k'ij quebuc'am ulok quieb ama'ib tak chij ri man c'o ta qui yab
Leviticus14:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäbanow ri josk'inic
Leviticus14:12 Cuc'am jun chque ri ama'ib tak chij cärachilaj jun u roxil jun litro aseit
Leviticus14:13 Rajawaxic cupil ri ama' chij pa ri c'olbal ri tastalic ri cätok' wi ri qui kul ri awaj ri queya' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj xukuje' ri e tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic. Ri tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil cux rech ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:14 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri u quiq'uel ri awaj ri yo'm che tabal tok'ob ri cäjosk'in ri chak'maquil
Leviticus14:15 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri aseit
Leviticus14:16 Cut'in ri u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab pa ri aseit ri c'o chupam ri u k'ab re ri u mox
Leviticus14:17 Ri u tz'akatil ri aseit ri to'tajinak pa u k'ab
Leviticus14:18 Ri aseit ri to'tajinak pa u k'ab
Leviticus14:19 Are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:20 Cuchi'j puwi' ri porobal cärachilaj ri sipanic que c'äj. Jewa' cuban ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal u mac we winak ri' cäcanaj c'u can ch'ajch'oj.
Leviticus14:21 We ri winak ri yawab meba' man c'o ta cuma' wi ri cätok'ix che
Leviticus14:22 Xukuje' quieb tucumux we quieb palomax
Leviticus14:23 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij quebuc'am bic ronojel wa' che ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:24 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am ri ama' chij ri cäya' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri chak'maquil
Leviticus14:25 C'äte ri' cutok' u kul ri alaj ama' chij che tabal tok'ob che cuyubal mac cuc'am jubik' ri u quiq'uel ri ama' chij cubil xe' ri u xiquin re ri u riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic
Leviticus14:26 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am jubik' che ri aseit cuya' chupam ri u k'ab re ri u mox
Leviticus14:27 ruc' c'u ri u wi' u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab
Leviticus14:28 Xukuje' cubil jubik' we aseit ri' xe' ri u xiquin re ri riquiak'ab ri cäjosk'ixic
Leviticus14:29 Are c'u ri aseit ri to'tajinak can pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuya' jun chque ri tucumux o jun chque ri palomax
Leviticus14:31 Jun chque ri tucumux we ri palomax cäya' che tabal tok'ob re sachbal macaj
Leviticus14:32 E are tak pixab wa' chque ri cäc'oji' chuwilaj ch'a'c chquij
Leviticus14:33 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron
Leviticus14:34 “Aretak ix c'o chic pa ri ulew Canaan ri quinjach na pa i k'ab
Leviticus14:35 ri ajchak'e ja
Leviticus14:36 C'ä majok coc ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri ja
Leviticus14:37 We aretak cunic'oj ri yabil
Leviticus14:38 ri cojol tabal tok'ob quel ulok pa ri ja
Leviticus14:39 Aretak cätz'akat wukub k'ij ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Leviticus14:40 cutak qui c'oquic ri abaj ri c'o wi ri yabil
Leviticus14:41 xukuje' cätakan che u josic ronojel ri u pam ri ja
Leviticus14:42 Quec'am chi niq'uiaj abaj
Leviticus14:43 We c'u cäpok' chi jumul ri yabil pa ri ja
Leviticus14:44 ri cojol tabal tok'ob coc chi che u nic'oxic. We c'u u jabum chi rib ri yabil pa ri ja
Leviticus14:45 Ri ja cäwilix na
Leviticus14:46 Apachin ta ne ri coc pa ri ja pa ronojel ri k'ijol ri xubij ri cojol tabal tok'ob chi catz'apixic
Leviticus14:47 Apachin ta ne ri cäwa'ic o cäwar pa ri ja
Leviticus14:48 We c'u aretak coc ri cojol tabal tok'ob che u nic'oxic u pam ri ja
Leviticus14:49 Che u josk'ixic ri ja
Leviticus14:50 Cuk'at u kul jun chque ri alaj tak chicop ri e c'o qui xic' puwi' jun bo'j ri c'o sakalaj ja' chupam.
Leviticus14:51 Cuc'am ri ch'akap chacalte'
Leviticus14:52 Jewa' cuban che u josk'ixic ri ja ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri alaj chicop ri c'o u xic' rachilam ri sakalaj ja' carachilaj ri alaj chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri c'aslic
Leviticus14:53 Cutzokopij c'u bic ri alaj chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri c'aslic chrij ri tinimit pa ri juyub. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri u josk'ixic ri ja.”
Leviticus14:54 E are tak pixab wa' che ronojel u wäch yabil re ch'a'c xukuje' re quiäkchi'n
Leviticus14:55 che ri chuwilaj ch'a'c che atz'iak
Leviticus14:56 che ri sipoj
Leviticus14:57 rech cäch'obtajic jachique ri ch'ajch'oj xukuje' jachique ri tz'il. C'ä waral cäq'uis wi u bixic ri cäban che u josk'ixic ri ch'a'c.
Leviticus15:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron
Leviticus15:2 “Chibij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chiwe: Aretak jun achi cabelel ri u pam ri achi wi
Leviticus15:3 Ri tz'ilol u mac rech ri u belelem ri u pam achi wi we ri achi wi tz'apitajinak rumal ri u pam. Kas tz'il wi amak'el.
Leviticus15:4 Apachique c'olbal ri cäk'oyi' wi ri achi ri'
Leviticus15:5 Apachin ta ne ri cäc'oji' pa ri c'olbal ri xk'oyi' wi ri achi ri'
Leviticus15:6 Apachin ta ne ri cät'uyi puwi' ri jasach ri xut'uyulej ri achi ri'
Leviticus15:7 Apachin ta ne ri canakow ri achi ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:8 We ri c'o we yabil ri' che cächuban chrij jun winak ri man tz'il taj
Leviticus15:9 Apachique quiejebal ri cuquijebej ri achi ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:10 Apachin ta ne ri cänakow ri xt'uyi wi ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:11 Apachin ta ne ri cunak ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:12 Ri bo'j ri cunak ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:13 We cäcunataj we achi ri' ri c'o we yabil ri' che
Leviticus15:14 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij
Leviticus15:15 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j jun chque jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus15:16 Aretak jun achi cabelel ri u pam ri achi wi
Leviticus15:17 Apachique atz'iak
Leviticus15:18 We jun achi cäwar ruc' jun ixok
Leviticus15:19 “Aretak cäyawaj jun ixok chi ic'
Leviticus15:20 Apachique jasach ri cuk'oylej aretak cäyawaj chi ic' cäcanaj tz'il
Leviticus15:21 Apachin ta ne ri cächapow ri c'olbal ri k'oyolinak wi ri ixok
Leviticus15:22 Apachin ta ne ri cunak jun chque ri jastak ri t'uyulinak wi ri ixok
Leviticus15:23 We cuchap ri c'olbal ri t'uyulinak wi we k'oyolinak wi ri ixok
Leviticus15:24 We c'o jun achi cäwar ruc' ri ixok
Leviticus15:25 We c'u ne c'o jun ixok ri cätorotaj ri u yab chi ic'
Leviticus15:26 Apachique c'olbal ri cäwar wi ri ixok
Leviticus15:27 Apachin ta ne ri cänakow we jastak ri'
Leviticus15:28 Aretak cätani' ri u yab
Leviticus15:29 Aretak cätz'akat wajxakib k'ij
Leviticus15:30 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j jun chque che tabal tok'ob che u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus15:31 Jewa' caquiban ri aj israelib che u josk'ixic quib che ri qui tz'ilol
Leviticus15:32 Are tak pixab wa' chque ri achijab ri c'o ri yabil chque re ri u belelem ri u pam ri achijab wi
Leviticus15:33 xukuje' chque ri ixokib ri queyabin chi ic'
Leviticus16:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises aretak e cäminak chic ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Aaron ri xecämic aretak xekeb chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus16:2 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: “Chabij che ri Aaron ri awachalal chi man xak ta apachique k'ijol coc chupam ri k'ijilabal ri c'o chrij ri ch'ukubal
Leviticus16:3 Jewa' rajawaxic cuban ri Aaron aretak coc chupam ri k'ijilabal: cuc'am bic jun alaj ama' wacax jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj xukuje' jun ama' chij che u chi'xic che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic.
Leviticus16:4 Rajawaxic cucoj bic ri u pam ratz'iak re lino ri tastalic
Leviticus16:5 Che ri tinimit aj israelib ri Aaron quebuc'am quieb ama'ib tak q'uisic' tabal tok'ob re josk'ibal mac
Leviticus16:6 Cuchi'j c'u na ri alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob rumal ri mac ri u banom
Leviticus16:7 C'äte ri' quebuc'am ri quieb ama'ib tak q'uisic'
Leviticus16:8 caq'uikaxtaj c'u na taklebenic paquiwi' ri quieb q'uisic': jun cux na che ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus16:9 Ri ama' q'uisic' ri cutaklebej ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus16:10 Are c'u ri q'uisic' ri cäkaj wi ri taklebenic che u c'amic bic ri macaj
Leviticus16:11 Ri Aaron cuchi'j na ri c'ojol ama' wacax jacha' che ri u tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj
Leviticus16:12 Cuc'am c'u jun bukibal nojinak che rachak k'ak' ri e c'amom puwi' ri porobal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus16:13 Cujopij ri k'ol puwi' ri k'ak' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus16:14 Cuc'am jubik' che ri u quiq'uel ri c'ojol ama' wacax
Leviticus16:15 C'äte ri' cutok' u kul ri ama' q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che ri josk'ibal u mac ri tinimit
Leviticus16:16 Je u josk'ixic wa' ri k'ijilabal chque conojel ri tz'ilol ri walijisam tak ib xukuje' macaj ri xequiban ri aj israelib
Leviticus16:17 Man c'o ta jun winak cäc'oji' ta pa ri k'ijilabal
Leviticus16:18 quel c'u ulok
Leviticus16:19 Wukub mul cuchicoj ri quic' puwi' ri porobal ruc' ri u wi' u k'ab
Leviticus16:20 Aretak ri Aaron u q'uisom chic u josk'ixic ri k'ijilabal
Leviticus16:21 Quebuya' ri u k'ab pa u jolom ri awaj
Leviticus16:22 Aretak ri ama' q'uisic' cäq'uis u sachic bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak
Leviticus16:23 Coc c'ut ri Aaron chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus16:24 Cuch'aj c'u na ri u cuerp ruc' ja' pa tastalic c'olbal aretak c'u u cojom chic ri ratz'iak
Leviticus16:25 Ri u xepoyil ri tabal tok'ob re josk'ibal macaj
Leviticus16:26 are c'u ri xc'amow u bic ri q'uisic' ri c'amowinak bic ri macaj
Leviticus16:27 Ri ama' wacax xukuje' ri ama' q'uisic' ri xepil che qui josk'ixic ri mac
Leviticus16:28 Ri winak ri queporon ri awaj
Leviticus16:29 Jun pixab wa' chiwe ri quitakej u banic: pa ri lajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic'
Leviticus16:30 Are c'u k'ij wa' ri quirik ri cuyubal i mac
Leviticus16:31 K'ij wa' re uxlanem chiwe
Leviticus16:32 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri chätajinak
Leviticus16:33 Cuban c'u na ri josk'inic re ri sibalaj tastalicalaj c'olbal
Leviticus16:34 Jun pixab wa' ri cäcanaj chiwe jumul pa ri jun junab quiban we nak'atisabal ri' che u rikic ri cuyubal quech ri mac ri qui banom ri aj israelib.” Je c'u xuban ri Moises jacha' ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus17:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus17:2 “Chabij che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol
Leviticus17:3 Apachique aj israel ri cupil jun ama' wacax
Leviticus17:4 we man cuc'am ta c'u ulok chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che u chi'xic jacha' che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri cäk'ijilax wi
Leviticus17:5 Xya' we takanic ri' rech ri aj israelib quequichi'j na che ri Ajawaxel ri awaj ri quequipil pa apachique c'olbal
Leviticus17:6 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchicoj ri quic' puwi' ri porobal re ri Ajawaxel ri c'o chuchi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus17:7 Mawi c'u jumul chquiya' ta chic tabal tak tok'ob chquiwäch tak ri itzelab
Leviticus17:8 Xukuje' chabij chque: apachique ta ne aj israel o jun ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l
Leviticus17:9 we man cuc'am ta ulok chuchi' ri oquibal re ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Leviticus17:10 “In quinc'ulelaj na ronojel aj israel o ri man i winakil taj ri jekel chixo'l ri cutij
Leviticus17:11 Rumal rech chi ronojel c'aslic
Leviticus17:12 Rumal ri' nu yo'm u bixic chque ri aj israelib: Mawi jun chiwe
Leviticus17:13 Apachique ta ne aj israel o apawije' ta ne cäpe wi
Leviticus17:14 Rumal rech chi ri quic' are' cayo'w c'aslemal che ronojel c'aslic. Rumal ri' nu bim chiwe chi man qui tij ta quic'
Leviticus17:15 Apachique ta ne aj israel o apawije' ta ne cäpe wi
Leviticus17:16 We c'u man quebuch'aj ri ratz'iak mawi catinic
Leviticus18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus18:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.
Leviticus18:3 Miban iwe jacha' ri qui nak'atisabal ri aj ejiptib
Leviticus18:4 Chinimaj qui banic ri nu takomal
Leviticus18:5 Rumal ri' chi nimaj ri caquibij tak ri e nu takomal
Leviticus18:6 C'o jun achi makeb ruc' jun ixok ri kas rachalaxic che ruc'axic rib ruc'. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus18:7 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri a tat
Leviticus18:8 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri a tat
Leviticus18:9 Mawuc'aj ri awana'b. We re a tat o re a nan; we alam cho ja o naj alam wi
Leviticus18:10 Mawesaj a q'uixbal chbil awib mawuc'aj ri u wi' a mam
Leviticus18:11 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri ali ri ral ri rixokil ri a tat. Alc'ualam c'u rumal ri a tat
Leviticus18:12 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rana'b ri a tat; xak c'u junam u quiq'uel ruc' ri a tat.
Leviticus18:13 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rachalal ri a nan; xak c'u junam u quiq'uel ruc' ri a nan.
Leviticus18:14 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri rachalal ri a tat; mawuc'aj ri rixokil; rixokil c'ut ri rachalal ri a tat.
Leviticus18:15 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri awalib; rixokil c'ut ri a c'ojol; mawuc'aj awib ruc'.
Leviticus18:16 Mawesaj u q'uixbal ri awachalal; mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri rixokil.
Leviticus18:17 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' jun ixok xukuje' ri ral ali
Leviticus18:18 Matc'uli' cuc' quieb ixokib ri cachalal quib
Leviticus18:19 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' jun ixok aretak cätajin cäyabin chi ic'.
Leviticus18:20 Matk'oyi ruc' ri rixokil ri awajil a tz'akat
Leviticus18:21 Majach jun chque ri a c'ojol che sipanic che ri dios Moloc; matz'iloj ri u bi' ri a Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus18:22 Matk'oyi ruc' jun a wäch achi
Leviticus18:23 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' apachique awaj
Leviticus18:24 Mitz'iloj ba iwib cuc' jun chque we jastak ri'. Cuc' c'u we jastak ri' quitz'ilom wi quib ri tinimit ri quebenwesaj bic chiwäch ix.
Leviticus18:25 Ri winak xquitz'iloj c'u ri culew; xinc'am c'u ulok ri c'äjisabal wächaj paquiwi'; u mac ri quetzelal
Leviticus18:26 Are c'u ri ix ri ix aj israelib
Leviticus18:27 Conojel c'ut we etzelal ri' xequiban ri xec'oji' can chupam we ulew ri' c'ä majok chixopanok ix
Leviticus18:28 ¡Mixuq'uiak c'u bic ri ulew pa re wi
Leviticus18:29 Apachin ta c'u ne ri cuban jun chque we jastak ri' ri e ya'l yok'obal
Leviticus18:30 Chebinimaj ba' tak ri nu takanic
Leviticus19:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus19:2 “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Chixux tastalic
Leviticus19:3 Chijujunal nim chebiwila' wi ri i tat xukuje' ri i nan. Nim chebiwila' wi tak ri e nu k'ij re uxlanem. In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios.
Leviticus19:4 Mat cojon chque tak ri diosib
Leviticus19:5 Aretak quebiya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Leviticus19:6 Ri awaj ri qui c'am ulok che tabal tok'ob rajawaxic chi kas pa ri k'ij catijic
Leviticus19:7 We cätij ri sipanic churox k'ij
Leviticus19:8 ri cätijowic cäkaj ri etzelal puwi' quesax c'u na pa ri u tinimit u mac rech chi xrawasij ri tastal che ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus19:9 Aretak cayac u wäch ri awulew
Leviticus19:10 Mamololej qui wäch ri juwi' tak uva
Leviticus19:11 Mixeläk'ic
Leviticus19:12 Mebaban tak chi'nic ri xak e cawäch pa ri nu bi'
Leviticus19:13 Macoj ri tokinic che ri awajil a tz'akat
Leviticus19:14 Mac'okoj ri man catantaj. Maya' jun tzakibal pa u be ri moy
Leviticus19:15 Maban ri man suq'uilal taj aretak caban ri a k'atan tzij: mawi mato' u wi' ri tukar
Leviticus19:16 Mawalijisaj tzijtal chquixo'l ri awinakil. Matuxic jun che u cämisaxic ri awajil a tz'akat. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus19:17 Mac'u ri retzelaxic u wäch ri awachalal chupam ri awanima'. Chak'ila' ri awajil a tz'akat aretak rajawaxic u k'ilic. Mach'uk u wi' ri mac ri cubano.
Leviticus19:18 Maya' rajil u q'uexel ri c'ax ri cuban ri awajil a tz'akat chawe
Leviticus19:19 Chatoc il che qui banic ri cubij ri nu pixab. Mabano chi quebetz'en ri awawaj cuc' tak awaj ri e jule' chic quija'lil. Matic jalan tak ija' chupam ri awulew ri cuyuj ta rib. Macoj jun awatz'iak ri jalan tak bätz' e cojom che u quemic.
Leviticus19:20 We c'o jun achi cäwar ruc' jun pataninel ali ri c'o chi jun achi ajchak'e ri maja' cälok'ic
Leviticus19:21 Ri achi cuchacaba' na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel jun ama' chij jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil
Leviticus19:22 Ruc' we ama' chij ri' ri jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri chak'maquil
Leviticus19:23 aretak quixoc pa ri ulew
Leviticus19:24 Chucaj junab conojel ri e qui wächinic tak ri e i tico'n quetas che ri Ajawaxel pa jun nimak'ijanic.
Leviticus19:25 Aretak cätz'akat job junab cuya' chic quitij ri qui wäch. Xa jeri' ri che' sibalaj quewächin na. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus19:26 Mitij jun ti'j ri c'o quic' che. Mitijoj iwib che ch'obonic. Miban subunic che u k'alajisaxic ri c'ä maja' cäc'ulmatajic.
Leviticus19:27 Michetij ri i wi'
Leviticus19:28 Misoc ri i cuerp rumal u bisoxic jun cäminak
Leviticus19:29 Mawuc'aj awib ruc' ri a mia'l rumal c'u awech cutakej ri u chac jun nim ch'utin
Leviticus19:30 Nim chebiwila' wi tak ri nu k'ij re uxlanem xukuje' nim chiwila' wi ri quink'ijilax wi. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.
Leviticus19:31 Mixbe cuc' ri ajk'ijab
Leviticus19:32 Chatwalij che u to'ic ri sak u jolom

Leviticus19:36 Tz'akat tak pajbal

Leviticus21:12 Mel chupam ri cak'ijilax wi ri u Dios

Leviticus25:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib

Leviticus25:4 Pa ri uwuk junab c'ut cuxlan na ri ulew
Leviticus25:5 Ri u tuquiel cäq'uiy ulok cho ri awulew ri a yacom chi u wäch
Leviticus25:6 Are c'u ri ruxlanem ri ulew cuya' na ri tzukbal awe
Leviticus25:7 ri e awawaj
Leviticus25:8 Rajawaxic quiwajilaj wukub wukutak k'ij junab
Leviticus25:9 Caban c'u na chi cok' ri trompet pa ri lajuj rajilabal ri uwuk ic'
Leviticus25:10 Ri junab cawinak lajuj (50) quik'alajisaj na ix chi junab tastalic: are jun junab re toronem
Leviticus25:11 Ri junab cawinak lajuj (50) cux na chiwe junab re tzokopitajem
Leviticus25:12 Rumal rech chi are jun tastalic junab re tzokopitajem chiwe ix. Quitij na xuwi ri cuq'uiyisaj ri ulew pa rech wi.
Leviticus25:13 Pa we junab ri'
Leviticus25:14 Aretak c'o jas quic'ayij che ri iwajil i tz'akat
Leviticus25:15 Joropa' junab craj na ri tzokopitajem
Leviticus25:16 Joropa' ri u q'uial ri junab
Leviticus25:17 C'o c'u jun musub ri rajil u tz'akat
Leviticus25:18 Chixoc ba che qui banic ri e nu pixab xukuje' chebinimaj ri nu takomal
Leviticus25:19 ri ulew cuya' na ri u wächinic
Leviticus25:20 We c'u ne quibij: ¿Jas cäkatij pa ri uwuk junab
Leviticus25:21 Ri in quintak na ulok ri nu tewichibal piwi' pa ri uwak junab
Leviticus25:22 quixticonij na c'ä pa ri uwajxak junab
Leviticus25:23 Ri ulew man cuya' taj chi kas ta cac'ayixic
Leviticus25:24 Rumal ri' apachique ulew ri i banom iwech che
Leviticus25:25 We cämebayir ri awachalal
Leviticus25:26 We c'u ne c'o jachin jun ri man c'o ta jun rija'lil ri cacuin ta che u toric ri rechbal
Leviticus25:27 crajilaj joropa' junab u c'ayim chi ri rulew
Leviticus25:28 We c'u man cäcuin che u molic ri puak rech catzelex che
Leviticus25:29 Apachin ri cuc'ayij rachoch ri c'o pa jun tinimit ri c'o tapia chrij
Leviticus25:30 We man cätor pa ri jun junab
Leviticus25:31 E are c'u ri ja ri e c'o pa tak ri alaj tak tinimit ri man c'o ta tapia chquij
Leviticus25:32 Ri aj levitib yo'm pa qui k'ab amak'el chi cuya' quequilok' chi jumul tak ri ja ri e c'o chupam tak ri qui tinimit.
Leviticus25:33 We ri calok'ow chi jumul are' jun aj levi
Leviticus25:34 Are c'u ri rulewal ri qui tinimit tak ri aj levitib
Leviticus25:35 We ri awachalal cämebayiric
Leviticus25:36 Matok'ij ral puak che mawi maban ch'äcoj chrij
Leviticus25:37 Matok'ij ral ri a rajil ri caya' che pa kajomal
Leviticus25:38 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios
Leviticus25:39 We cämebayir ri awachalal ri c'o awuc'
Leviticus25:40 Chabana' che jacha' jun ajchac
Leviticus25:41 Cätzokopitaj c'u bic
Leviticus25:42 E pataninel c'u tak wech xebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt; man cuya' taj quec'ayixic e jacha' ta ne lok'om pataninelab.
Leviticus25:43 Mattakan puwi' ruc' c'anal
Leviticus25:44 We cawaj quec'oji' a lok'om pataninelab
Leviticus25:45 Xukuje' cuya' quebalok' ri e calc'ual ri man e a winakil taj ri xak e c'o chixo'l
Leviticus25:46 Cuya' quebiya' can che quechbal ri e i c'ojol aretak quixcämic; jacha' jun echbal re chbe k'ij sak; are c'u tak ri e iwachalal aj israelib
Leviticus25:47 We ri man awinakil taj ri jekel chupam ri awulew cux k'inom
Leviticus25:48 ya'tal che chi cälok' ri u tzokopitajic pune' u c'ayim chi rib. Cuya' cälok' rumal jun chque ri rachalal.
Leviticus25:49 Xukuje' cuya' cätor rumal jun rican o ri u c'ojol ri rican
Leviticus25:50 Crajilaj ruc' ri xlok'owic joropa' junab u c'ayim chi rib pa u k'ab
Leviticus25:51 We c'u q'ui junab craj na
Leviticus25:52 We c'u xa quieb oxib junab chic cäraj ri junab re tzokopitajem
Leviticus25:53 Je cäban che jacha' ri cäban che jun ajchac ri cätoj chi junab; xak mawilo chi cäban c'ax che chawäch.
Leviticus25:54 We man cutor rib pa apachique junab
Leviticus25:55 E pataninel tak wech c'ut ri aj israelib
Leviticus26:1 “Mebiban tak i diosib mawi tak wächbal; mebiwalajisaj tastalicalaj tak abaj ri quetzoq'uic; mebimej tak iwib chquiwäch
Leviticus26:2 Chebichajij tak ri nu k'ij re uxlanem
Leviticus26:3 We quebitakej ri e nu pixab
Leviticus26:4 ri in quinkasaj na ri jäb pa ri u k'ijol
Leviticus26:5 c'ä c'o na qui trico aretak cäyac ri qui wäch ri uva xukuje' qui uva c'ä cäpe na ri ticonijic; caquitij na qui wa c'ä quenoj na
Leviticus26:6 Quinya' na utzil cho ri uwächulew
Leviticus26:7 Quebiwokotaj ri e i c'ulel
Leviticus26:8 e job chiwe quecokataj na jun sient
Leviticus26:9 Quinya' c'u na nu wäch chiwe
Leviticus26:10 Quitij na ri junabir tak wächinic
Leviticus26:11 Quinjekeba' na ri nu c'olbal chixo'l
Leviticus26:12 amak'el quinbin na chixo'l
Leviticus26:13 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios
Leviticus26:14 “We c'u man quinitatabej
Leviticus26:15 we c'u quebijech'obisaj ri nu takanic
Leviticus26:16 ri in xukuje' quinc'am na ulok we jastak ri piwi': Quinc'am ulok xe'n ib piwi'
Leviticus26:17 In quinoc na che i c'ulel
Leviticus26:18 We c'u man quixoc che nu nimaxic cumal we jastak ri'
Leviticus26:19 Quinban na ch'akatak che ri nimal ri quixc'amowic; quinbano chi ri caj ri c'o piwi'
Leviticus26:20 Xak c'u lok' quiq'uis ri i chuk'ab
Leviticus26:21 We c'u quitakej nu c'ulelaxic
Leviticus26:22 Xukuje' quebentak na ulok juyubal tak awaj chiwij ri quequic'am na bic ri iwalc'ual
Leviticus26:23 We c'u man quiji'c' iwib che qui banic we jastak ri'
Leviticus26:24 xukuje' ri in quinoc na che i c'ulelaxic
Leviticus26:25 Quinc'am na ulok cämical piwi'
Leviticus26:26 Aretak quink'ip ri u c'u'x ri i caxlanwa
Leviticus26:27 We c'u man quixoc che nu nimaxic cumal we jastak ri'
Leviticus26:28 ri in quintakej i c'ulelaxic ruc' oyowal
Leviticus26:29 Quitij na ri qui ti'jal ri e i c'ojol
Leviticus26:30 In quebenc'äjij tak ri e i k'ijilabal ri e quech winak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib
Leviticus26:31 Quinban na chi quetz'inow can ri i tinimit tak
Leviticus26:32 Quintolorisaj na u wäch ri ulew
Leviticus26:33 Are c'u ri ix quinxinjabuj na chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit
Leviticus26:34 Ri ulew cäquicot na
Leviticus26:35 Ronojel ri k'ij ri camali canok
Leviticus26:36 E Are' c'ut ri quecanaj can chiwe
Leviticus26:37 Cäquipuq'uila' tak na quib
Leviticus26:38 Cäsach na i wäch chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit
Leviticus26:39 E are' c'ut ri quec'asi'c canok pa ri culew ri e i c'ulel quecäm na u mac rech ri quetzelal; ¡quecäm na junam cuc' ri qui tat u mac rech ri quetzelal!
Leviticus26:40 Pune' ri ix quicoj na iwib chupam ri iwetzelal
Leviticus26:41 xukuje' c'u ri in quixinc'ulelaj na quixinc'am c'u bic pa ri culew ri e i c'ulel; c'ä chi' c'ut cäquimach' na ri canima' ri quebuk'ijilaj tak diosib
Leviticus26:42 Cänataj c'u na ri nu c'ulwächinic chwe ri nu banom ruc' ri Jacob
Leviticus26:43 ri qui tzokopim canok cuxlan c'u na aretak ri ix man ix c'o ta chi chuwäch; quebitoj c'u na ix ri e i mac
Leviticus26:44 Pune' c'u je i c'ulmam wa'
Leviticus26:45 Quenataj c'u na chwe ri c'ulwächinic ri xinban cuc' aretak xebenwesaj ulok pa Ejipt chquiwäch ri nimak tak tinimit rech quinux qui Dios. In ri' ri Ajawaxel.”
Leviticus26:46 Are tak wa' ri u takanic
Leviticus27:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises
Leviticus27:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib
Leviticus27:3 che jun achi ri juwinak (20) u junab c'ä oxc'al (60)
Leviticus27:4 We c'u ixok
Leviticus27:5 Ri job u junab c'ä juwinak
Leviticus27:6 Ri jun riq'uil c'ä job u junab
Leviticus27:7 Chque ri winak ri oc'owinak chic oxc'al (60) qui junab
Leviticus27:8 We c'u sibalaj meba' ri winak che u tojic ri cuchuj ri k'atom
Leviticus27:9 We c'u e awaj ri quechi'x che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus27:10 man cuya' taj cäq'uex chi ruc' jun awaj
Leviticus27:11 We c'u awaj ri man ya'tal taj queya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus27:12 rech cuk'at ri cuchuj ri takalic
Leviticus27:13 We c'u cajwaxic chi cätzelej chi jumul ri awaj cäya' na jun ro'il puwi' ri cuchuj ri k'atom.
Leviticus27:14 We c'o jun cutas ri rachoch che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus27:15 We c'u ri xutas ri rachoch craj cätzelej chi jumul pa u k'ab cuya' na jun u ro'il puwi' ri rajil ri k'atom
Leviticus27:16 We c'o jachin jun cutas jubik' ri rulew che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel
Leviticus27:17 We cutas ri rulew pa ri u chaplebal ri junab re tzokopitajem
Leviticus27:18 We c'u cutas ri rulew aretak oc'owinak chic ri junab re tzokopitajem
Leviticus27:19 We c'u ri xutas ri rulew craj chi cätzelej chi jumul pa u k'ab cuya' na jun ro'il puwi' ri rajil ri k'atom
Leviticus27:20 We c'u man cutzelej ri rajil
Leviticus27:21 Aretak ri ulew cätorotaj pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem
Leviticus27:22 We c'o jun winak cutas jun ulew che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel ri xa u lok'om
Leviticus27:23 ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchomaj na ruc' ri winak ri' ri rajil ri ulew c'ä curika' na ri junab re ri tzokopitajem
Leviticus27:24 Pa ri junab re ri tzokopitajem ri ulew cätzelej chi na pa u k'ab ri xc'ayinic
Leviticus27:25 Conojel ri alal rajawaxic e junam ruc' ri siclo re juwinak jera
Leviticus27:26 Are c'u ri nabe tak cal ri awaj e rech ri Ajawaxel rumal rech chi e are wa' ri e nabeal
Leviticus27:27 We are jun awaj ri tz'il
Leviticus27:28 We c'o jachin jun cutas che ri Ajawaxel jubik' chque ri jastak rech che jun sipanic we e winak
Leviticus27:29 Xukuje' mawi c'o jun winak ri c'okom cuya' quesax chuxe' ri c'okonic man c'o ta u to'tajic kas cäcämisax na.
Leviticus27:30 Ri u lajujil ri u wächinic ri ulew
Leviticus27:31 We c'o jun craj culok' ri u tz'akatil ruc' che ri lajujil
Leviticus27:32 Jun chque ri qui lajujil awaj chque ri wacax o chque ri tzobaj cätas che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel jacha' che lajujil.
Leviticus27:33 Man quecha' taj ri e utz na mawi ri man e utz taj
Leviticus27:34 E Are tak takomal wa' ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises chque ri aj israelib
Numbers1:1 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ucab ic' rech ri ucab junab
Numbers1:2 “Chebiwajilaj conojel ri aj israelib
Numbers1:3 ruc' tz'akatil ri juwinak chic qui junab cäpakic
Numbers1:4 xukuje' ri re jun c'amal be re jun ja winak che jujun amak'.
Numbers1:5 E are' tak qui bi' wa' ri c'amal tak be ri rajawaxic quixto' cumal: Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Ruben: ri Elisur (ri u tat ri Elisur are' ri Sedeur).
Numbers1:6 Che ri rech ri Simeon: ri Selumiel (ri u tat ri Selumiel are' ri Zurisaday).
Numbers1:7 Che ri rech ri Juda: ri Naason (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab).
Numbers1:8 Che ri rech ri Isacar: ri Natanael (ri u tat ri Natanael are' ri Zuar).
Numbers1:9 Che ri rech ri Zabulon: ri Eliab (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon).
Numbers1:10 Che ri quech ri camak' ri e u c'ojol ri Jose: ri Elisam (ri u tat ri Elisam are' ri Amihud) che ri rech ri Eprain; xukuje' ri Gamaliel (ri u tat ri Gamaliel are' ri Pedasur) che ri rech ri Manases.
Numbers1:11 Che ri rech ri Benjamin: ri Abidan (ri u tat ri Abidan are' ri Jedeoniy).
Numbers1:12 Che ri rech ri Dan: ri Ahiezer (ri u tat ri Ahiezer are' ri Amisaday).
Numbers1:13 Che ri rech ri Aser: ri Pajiel (ri u tat ri Pajiel are' ri Ocran).
Numbers1:14 Che ri rech ri Gad: ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Reuel).
Numbers1:15 Che ri rech ri Neptali: ri Ahir (ri u tat ri Ahir are' ri Enan).”
Numbers1:16 E are' c'amal tak be wa' quech amak' ri xecha' chquixo'l conojel ri aj israelib ri quequiq'uexwächij ri kas quija'lil.
Numbers1:17 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ucab ic' re ri junab

Numbers1:20 Aretak c'u xq'uis u banic ri ajilanic pa tak amak' pa tak ija'lil pa jujun ja winak

Numbers1:23

Numbers1:25

Numbers1:27 
Numbers1:28 Che ri ramak' ri Isacar xebajilax cawinak cajlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (54
Numbers1:29 
Numbers1:30 Che ri ramak' ri Zabulon xebajilax cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (57
Numbers1:31

Numbers1:33 
Numbers1:34 
Numbers1:35

Numbers1:39

Numbers1:41

Numbers1:43 
Numbers1:44 Are wa' ri xel wi ri ajilabal ri xuban ri Moises
Numbers1:45 Ri aj israelib ri juwinak chic qui junab capakic
Numbers1:46 e wakib sient oxib mil ruc' job sient cawinak lajuj (603
Numbers1:47 Ri aj levitib man xebajilax ta chquixo'l ri camak' ri e qui mam
Numbers1:48 u bim chi c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises:
Numbers1:49 “Aretak chebawajilaj ri aj israelib
Numbers1:50 Ri aj levitib rajawaxic e are' quebacojo rech quepatanij chupam ri k'ijilabal rech ri c'ulwächinic
Numbers1:51 Aretak c'u cajwataj u k'axexic
Numbers1:52 Ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic quebekaj na caquicholajij na quib jas ri caquiban ri ajch'ojab
Numbers1:53 E are' c'u tak ri aj levitib

Numbers2:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron
Numbers2:2 “Ri aj israelib rajawaxic naj jubik' quebekaj wi chrij ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers2:3 Pa ri u elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Juda. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' Juda ri are' c'o ri Naason che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Naason are' ri Aminadab)
Numbers2:4 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e oxc'al cajlajuj mil ruc' wakib sient (74
Numbers2:5 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quekaj wi ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Isacar
Numbers2:6 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak cajlajuj mil quiejeb sient (54
Numbers2:7 Xukuje' quekaj ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Zabulon cuc' ri c'o ri Eliab che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon)
Numbers2:8 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (57
Numbers2:9 Jeri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Juda e ox k'at ajch'ojab
Numbers2:10 Pa ri u mox elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Ruben. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Ruben ri c'o ri Elisur che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Elisur are' ri Sedeur)
Numbers2:11 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak wakib mil ruc' job sient (46
Numbers2:12 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quekaj wi na ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Simeon
Numbers2:13 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak belejlajuj mil ruc' oxib sient (59
Numbers2:14 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Gad
Numbers2:15 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak job mil ruc' wakib sient cawinak lajuj (45
Numbers2:16 Je c'u ri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Ruben e ox k'at ajch'ojab
Numbers2:17 Ri aj levitib e are' ri quetaken na quecanaj c'u chquixo'l ri caj k'at kajebal
Numbers2:18 Pa ri u kajebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Eprain. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Eprain are' c'amal qui be ri Elisam (ri u tat ri Elisam are' ri Amihud)
Numbers2:19 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak mil ruc' job sient (40
Numbers2:20 Chquinakaj c'ut ri e are' quec'oji' wi na ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Manases
Numbers2:21 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e juwinak cablajuj mil ruc' quieb sient (32
Numbers2:22 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' ri e are' ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Benjamin
Numbers2:23 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e juwinak olajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (35
Numbers2:24 Je c'u ri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Eprain e ox k'at ajch'ojab
Numbers2:25 Pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij quekaj wi na ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Dan. Ri e rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Dan c'o ri Ahiezer che c'amal qui be (ri u tat ri Ahiezer are' ri Amisaday)
Numbers2:26 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e oxc'al quieb mil ruc' wukub sient (62
Numbers2:27 Chquinakaj ri e are' quekaj wi ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Aser
Numbers2:28 ri ajilabal c'ut ri xelic e cawinak jun mil ruc' job sient (41
Numbers2:29 Xukuje' quekaj na cuc' e are' ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Neptali
Numbers2:30 ri ajilabal ri xelic e cawinak oxlajuj mil ruc' quiejeb sient (53
Numbers2:31 Jeri' ri achijab ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic ri Dan e ox k'at ajch'ojab ri e jun sient cawinak wuklajuj mil ruc' wakib sient (157
Numbers2:32 Ri cajilabal ri jujun tak ja aj israelib ri xelic e wakib sient oxib mil ruc' job sient cawinak lajuj (603
Numbers2:33 Je c'ut jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises
Numbers2:34 Ri aj israelib xquiban ronojel jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises: chquijujunal xekaj chuxe' ri kas quetal xutakej c'ut chrij ri kas rachalaxic xukuje' cuc' ri kas e rachalaxic.
Numbers3:1 Pa ri k'ijol aretak ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises puwi' ri juyub Sinai
Numbers3:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Aaron: ri Nadab (ri nabeal)
Numbers3:3 Ri quiejeb xetasic xjach c'u ri chac re u cojic ri tabal tok'ob pa qui k'ab
Numbers3:4 are c'u ri Nadab rachil ri Abiu
Numbers3:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers3:6 “Chebasiq'uij ri e aj ramak' ri Levi
Numbers3:7 Quec'oji' c'u che u patanixic ri Aaron xukuje' ronojel ri tinimit
Numbers3:8 Xukuje' quequichajij ri e u chaconisan ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers3:9 Chebatasa' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic
Numbers3:10 chajacha' can ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e rija'lil. We c'o jachin jun cäpatanijic jacha' jun cojol tabal tok'ob ri man are ta u chac
Numbers3:11 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers3:12 “Chquixo'l ri aj israelib xeben cha' wi ri aj levitib
Numbers3:13 rumal rech chi chwe in ya'tal wi ronojel ala nabeal. Aretak xinban chque ri nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj ejiptib
Numbers3:14 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises pa ri chaki'j uwo sak aj Sinai
Numbers3:15 “Chabana' jun ajilanic chque ri aj levitib pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak xukuje' tak achalaxic
Numbers3:16 Ri Moises xuban ri ajilanic
Numbers3:17 Ri e u c'ojol ri Levi e are' ri Jerson
Numbers3:18 Ri e rija'lil ri Jerson
Numbers3:19 Ri e rija'lil ri Coat pa ri u cholajil ri u k'ab rachalaxic
Numbers3:20 Ri e rija'lil ri Merar
Numbers3:21 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Jerson e are' ri e re ri Libni xukuje' ri Simeiy.
Numbers3:22 Ri cajilabal ri achijab chnimalaj conojel ri xebajilatajic re jujun qui q'uil cäpakic e wukub mil ruc' job sient (7
Numbers3:23 Are wa' ri u k'ab tak achalaxic ri' quecanaj pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Numbers3:24 Ri e c'amal qui be ri jujun tak ja winak chque ri e rija'lil re ri Jerson are' ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Lael).
Numbers3:25 Chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib e are' e ekleninak ri e rilixic ri k'ijilabal
Numbers3:26 chque tak ri k'atibal re ri uwo ja
Numbers3:27 Ri e u k'ab achalaxic tak rech ri Coat e are' ri aj Amram ri aj Izar ri aj Hebron xukuje' ri Uziel
Numbers3:28 are c'u ri cajilabal ri achijab chnimalaj conojel re jujun qui q'uil cäpakic
Numbers3:29 quekaj c'u pa ri u mox ri k'ijilabal.
Numbers3:30 Ri c'amal qui be tak we u k'ab achalaxic ri' are ri Elizapan
Numbers3:31 We u k'ab achalaxic tak ri' e are' ri queilin ri caxa re ri c'ulwächinic
Numbers3:32 Ri c'amal qui be ri aj levitib ri nim na u k'ij are' ri Eleazar
Numbers3:33 Ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Merar e are' ri e aj Mali xukuje' ri e aj Musi.
Numbers3:34 Ri cajilabal ri rachijab chnimalaj conojel ri xebajalitajic re jujun tak qui q'uil cäpakic
Numbers3:35 Ri c'amal u be are' ri Zuriel
Numbers3:36 Pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol ri Merar xecanaj wi ri quilixic tak ri tz'alam re ri k'ijilabal
Numbers3:37 xukuje' tak ri akan ri quesutin ri uwo ja
Numbers3:38 Pa ri elebal k'ij
Numbers3:39 Aretak ri Moises rachil ri Aaron xecajilaj ri aj levitib pa ri u cholajil achalaxic
Numbers3:40 “Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Moises: Chebawajilaj ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal
Numbers3:41 Che c'u qui q'uexwäch ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal
Numbers3:42 Ri Moises xerajilaj ri e qui c'ojol tak ri aj israelib ri e nabeal
Numbers3:43 conojel c'ut ri achijab ri xebajilaxic re jujun tak qui q'uil capakic e cawinak quieb mil ruc' quieb sient oxc'al oxlajuj (22
Numbers3:44 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers3:45 “Chebac'ama' ri aj levitib che qui q'uexwäch ri e qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri e nabeal
Numbers3:46 Are' tak c'ut ri e qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri e nabeal are e q'ui na chquiwäch ri aj levitib; jeri'
Numbers3:47 Chatz'onoj jun cuchuj re job rakan sak puak che qui q'uexwäch jujun winak
Numbers3:48 chajacha' c'ut we puak ri pa u k'ab ri Aaron. Xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol jacha' che qui q'uexwäch ri man c'o ta xeq'uex wächinic.”
Numbers3:49 Ri Moises xuc'am ri puak ri xya' che qui q'uexwäch ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib ri xeto'taj canok.
Numbers3:50 Ri puak ri xuc'amo jun mil ruc' oxib sient oxc'al job (1
Numbers3:51 Xujach c'ut we puak ri' pa u k'ab ri Aaron xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri e u c'ojol
Numbers4:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron
Numbers4:2 “Chabana' jun ajilanic
Numbers4:3 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab
Numbers4:4 Ri qui chac ri e rija'lil ri Coat sibalaj tastalic
Numbers4:5 Aretak ri tinimit cäwalij che u takexic ri u be
Numbers4:6 Queya' c'u na ri je'licalaj tak tz'um puwi' che u ch'ukic
Numbers4:7 Xukuje' cälic' jun quem morato puwi' ri mexa re ri wächbal
Numbers4:8 Puwi' ronojel wa' cälic' na jun quiäk quem
Numbers4:9 Quic'am c'u jun quem morato quich'uk c'u na ri tzuc'ulibal ruc' wa'
Numbers4:10 Ronojel wa' quebipis chupam jun ch'ukubal que je'lic tak tz'um quiya' c'u puwi' jun ch'atum che' che u telexic bic.
Numbers4:11 Xukuje' quilic' na jun quem morato puwi' ri porobal re k'an puak
Numbers4:12 Quebimulij c'ut ri chaconisan ri quecoj che ri patanijic chupam ri k'ijilabal quebiya' c'u chupam jun quem morato
Numbers4:13 Rajawaxic quijosk'ij ri xepo xukuje' ri chaj ri c'o che ri porobal
Numbers4:14 Puwi' quebiya' wi ronojel ri cacoj pa ri patanijic re ri k'ijilanic puwi' ri porobal: ri queya' wi rachak tak k'ak'
Numbers4:15 Aretak ri Aaron e rachil tak ri e u c'ojol qui q'uisom chic qui pisic conojel ri tastalicalaj tak jastak
Numbers4:16 Ri Eleazar (ri u c'ojol ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Numbers4:17 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises rachil ri Aaron
Numbers4:18 “Miya' c'olbal chi ri e u k'ab rachalaxic ri Coat cäsach ta qui wäch chquixo'l ri aj levitib.
Numbers4:19 Rech man cäc'äjisax ta qui wäch ruc' ri cämical rumal ri qui chapic ri tastalicalaj tak jastak
Numbers4:20 Jeri' ri e are' man c'o ta jok'otaj queboc ta che qui ca'yexic ri tastalicalaj tak jastak mawi c'u ne quecäm ta na.”
Numbers4:21 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers4:22 “Chabana' jun ajilanic pa ri qui cholajil tak ri e u k'ab achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak
Numbers4:23 ri e c'o chic juwinak lajuj c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab
Numbers4:24 Ri qui chac ri rija'lil ri Jerson are ri cätakex u bixic:
Numbers4:25 Rajawaxic quequitelej tak bic ri k'atibal re ri k'ijilabal
Numbers4:26 ri e k'atibal re ri uwo ja
Numbers4:27 Ri Aaron e rachil tak ri e u c'ojol e are' quec'amow na qui be ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson pa tak ri chac ri quequiban na xukuje' ri jastak ri quequitelej tak bic. Ix quixjachow pa qui k'ab ri quequibana' na.
Numbers4:28 Are patanijic wa' ri caquiban na ri e rija'lil ri Jerson ri caquiban na chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:29 Xukuje' chabana' jun ajilanic chque ri e rija'lil ri Merar
Numbers4:30 Chebatz'ibaj ri qui bi' conojel ri e c'o chic juwinak lajuj xukuje' c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab
Numbers4:31 Ri qui chac che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib are' ri qui telexic bic tak ri e u tz'alamil ri k'ijilabal
Numbers4:32 ri e akan tak re ri uwo ja ri quesutin rij ri k'ijilabal
Numbers4:33 Are' chac wa'
Numbers4:34 Ri Moises
Numbers4:35 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj c'ä catakwinak lajuj qui junab
Numbers4:36 e are tak c'ut ri achijab ri ajilatajinak e quieb mil ruc' wukub sient cawinak lajuj (2
Numbers4:37 Are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Coat ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:38 Ri e rija'lil ri Jerson pa ri u cholajil ri u k'ab tak achalaxic xukuje' pa ri qui cholajil ri jujun tak ja winak
Numbers4:39 ri e c'o chic chupam juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:40 e quieb mil ruc' wakib sient juwinak lajuj (2
Numbers4:41 E are wa' ri xebajilaxic ri e elinak chque ri e u c'ojol ri Jerson ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:42 Ri e rija'lil ri Merar
Numbers4:43 ri e c'o chic chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:44 e oxib mil ruc' quieb sient (3
Numbers4:45 Are wa' ri cajilabal ri e rija'lil ri Merar ri cuya' quepatanij chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:46 Ri cajilabal ri aj levitib chnimalaj conojel ri xebajilax rumal ri Moises
Numbers4:47 ri e c'o chupam ri juwinak lajuj (30) c'ä catakwinak lajuj (50) qui junab ri e utz c'u che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers4:48 e wajxakib mil ruc' job sient jumuch' (8
Numbers4:49 We ajilanic ri' xbanic jacha' ri takanic ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises
Numbers5:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers5:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib chi chequesaj bic chquixo'l apachique winak ri c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chque
Numbers5:3 Chebesax bic chupam ri kajebal
Numbers5:4 Ri aj israelib xquinimaj ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises xeresaj c'u bic we winak ri' chupam ri tinimit.
Numbers5:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers5:6 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: Aretak jun achi o jun ixok man jic ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel cuban c'ut jun banoj c'ax che jun winak chic
Numbers5:7 rajawaxic c'ut cucoj rib chupam. Cuya' c'u na che ri winak ri rajil u q'uexel ri banoj c'ax
Numbers5:8 We c'u ri winak ri cäban wi ri banoj c'ax cäminak chic man c'o ta c'u jun rachalaxic ri' nakaj ta che ri caya' ta wi ri rajil u q'uexel
Numbers5:9 Ronojel c'u cuchuj xukuje' sipanic ri caquitas ri aj israelib che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers5:10 Ronojel c'u ri cätas che ri Ajawaxel cac'am u bic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Numbers5:11 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers5:12 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: We c'u ne cac'ulmatajic chi c'o jun ixok ri man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil
Numbers5:13 cunim ta c'u rib ruc' chic jun achi ri ma ta c'u c'o cunabej ri rachajil
Numbers5:14 We c'u ne cuna' achixomanic ri achi
Numbers5:15 Pa qui cabichal we quieb c'ulmatajic ri' ri achajilaxel cuc'am c'u bic ri rixokil chuwäch ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Numbers5:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuban che ri ixok chi cakebic
Numbers5:17 Cuc'am c'u jubik' ri tastalic ja' pa jun lak re t'ac cuyuj c'u ruc' jubik' puc'uc' ulew ri c'o chupam ri k'ijilabal.
Numbers5:18 Cuban c'u na chi ri ixok cutac'aba' rib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Numbers5:19 Cubij c'u na che ri ixok chabana' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chatchokok
Numbers5:20 We c'u man at uxinak ta ma ta jic ruc' ri awachajil
Numbers5:21 chubana' ri Ajawaxel chawe chi catux jun c'utbal re c'okotajic chuwäch ri tinimit
Numbers5:22 We c'äjisabal wächaj ri' cäpe na pawi' aretak cawuq'uiaj we ja' ri' ri cuc'am ulok c'okonic.’ Are c'u ri ixok cutzelej na u bixic: ‘Je chc'ulmatajok.’
Numbers5:23 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cutz'ibaj c'u we c'okonic ri' cuchupisaj c'ut ruc' ri c'ayilaj ja'.
Numbers5:24 Cuban c'u na chi ri ixok cukumuj re we ja' ri'
Numbers5:25 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na pa u k'ab ri ixok ri sipanic qui mac quech ri achixomanic rech cuya' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Numbers5:26 cuc'am c'u jumuk' che ri sipanic quech c'äj cuporoj c'u puwi' ri porobal jacha' sipanic che natanic. Aretak c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob bantajinak chi rumal chi ri ixok uq'uiatajinak chi ri c'ayilaj ja' rumal
Numbers5:27 we ri ixok uxinak man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil
Numbers5:28 We c'u ri ixok man c'o ta u mac man c'o ta cuc'ulmaj na
Numbers5:29 Are pixab wa' che jun ixok aretak man jic ta ruc' ri rachajil
Numbers5:30 o we ne xak cachixoman jun achi che ri rixokil. Ri achajilaxel rajawaxic cutac'aba' ri rixokil chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Numbers5:31 Ri achajilaxel man c'o ta cutaklebej
Numbers6:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers6:2 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: We jun achi o jun ixok cuban ri chi'nic che u tasic rib che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel jacha' jun nazarey
Numbers6:3 man cuya' ta caruq'uiaj u wa'l uva mawi jun uq'uia' ri k'obisam
Numbers6:4 Joropa' k'ij cäbeytaj ri u chi'nic man cuya' taj c'o ta jas cutij ta che ri cuya' ri u che'al uva
Numbers6:5 Mawi cuya' cukopij ta ri u wi'
Numbers6:6 Pa ri u beytajic we k'ijol ri' mawi cuya' cakeb ruc' jun cäminak
Numbers6:7 mawi ne aretak cäcäm ri u tat
Numbers6:8 Ronojel ri k'ijol ri cäbeytaj ri u chi'nic cäcanaj tastalic che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel Dios.
Numbers6:9 We c'o jachin jun xak c'ätetal cäcäm pa u xcut cux c'u tz'il ri u wi'
Numbers6:10 Aretak quebel wajxakib k'ij cuc'am bic che ri cojol tabal tok'ob quieb palomax o quieb tucumux
Numbers6:11 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na jun chque jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u josk'ixic ri macaj ri jun chic jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Numbers6:12 cuchaplej chi c'u na jun c'ac' k'ijol re tastajem che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers6:13 Aretak caq'uis ri k'ijol che ri u tasic rib
Numbers6:14 cuchi'j c'u che ri Ajawaxel jun alaj chij re jun u junab ri man c'o ta jun u yab jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
Numbers6:15 Xukuje' rajawaxic cuchi'j jun alaj chicäch caxlanwa ri re utzalaj c'äj ri cojom che qui banic
Numbers6:16 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuchi'j na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Numbers6:17 xukuje' cuchi'j na ri ama' chij jacha' che tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib
Numbers6:18 Ri aj nazarey cuban na to'l che ri u jolom chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers6:19 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na ri uwo rachak ri ama' chij
Numbers6:20 Are c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuban na ri nak'atisabal re yanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Ri uwo u c'u'x ri awaj ri cäbanbex ri nak'atisabal che ri yanic xukuje' ri u ch'o a'aj ri cäya' jacha' che cuchuj che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers6:21 Are' pixab wa' che ri cuban chi'nic che u tasic rib che u ternexic ri Ajawaxel jacha' che aj nazarey
Numbers6:22 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers6:23 “Chabij che ri Aaron xukuje' chque ri e u c'ojol chi aretak que qui tewichi'j ri aj israelib je u banic wa' chquibana':
Numbers6:24 ‘Are' ri Ajawaxel chatutewichi'j xukuje' chatuc'uxlaj
Numbers6:25 chatkaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Numbers6:26 chatuca'yej c'ut ri Ajawaxel ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj chuya' c'ut ri jamaril chawe.’
Numbers6:27 Jeri' ri e are' caquinataj na ri nu bi' paquiwi' ri aj israelib
Numbers7:1 Pa ri k'ij aretak ri Moises xuq'uis u woquic ri k'ijilabal
Numbers7:2 Chanim ri e c'amal tak qui be ri amak'

Numbers7:4 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises:
Numbers7:5 “Chebac'ama' tak ri caret chque xukuje' tak ri wacax
Numbers7:6 Ri Moises xebuc'am ri caret xukuje' tak ri wacax

Numbers7:8 Chque ri e rija'lil ri Merar xebuya' quiejeb caret xukuje' wajxakib wacax e are wa' ri quebajwataj che u banic ri qui chac chuxe' ri u takanic ri Itamar (ri u tat ri Itamar are' ri Aaron cojol tabal tok'ob).
Numbers7:9 Are c'u ri chque ri e rija'lil ri Coat man xebuya' ta caret chque mawi tak wacax
