Numbers7:89 Aretak xoc ri Moises chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib che tzijonem ruc' ri Ajawaxel
Numbers8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises. Xubij c'u che:
Numbers8:2 “Chabij che ri Aaron chi
Numbers8:3 Ri Aaron xutz'akatisaj u banic jachique ri xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises
Numbers8:4 Jewa' ri u banic ri tzuc'ulibal xbanic; re k'an puak bajibal xk'osibex rech
Numbers8:5 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises. Xubij c'u che:
Numbers8:6 “Chebatasa' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj chic aj israelib
Numbers8:7 Ri nak'atisabal che ri tastajem are' ri quintakej u bixic: At quebachicoj ruc' ri ja' re ch'ajch'obenic chuwi' chi c'u wa' ri e are' caquisocaj na ronojel ri qui ti'jal
Numbers8:8 Caquic'am c'ut jun c'ojol wacax
Numbers8:9 At caban na chi ri aj levitib quenakajin che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib conojel c'ut ri aj israelib chquimulij quib.
Numbers8:10 C'äte ri' caban c'ut chi ri aj levitib chebopan chnuwäch e are tak c'ut ri aj israelib che quiya' la' tak ri qui k'ab puwi' ri qui jolom.
Numbers8:11 Ri Aaron cuban na ri nimak'ij chnuwäch in ri nak'atisabal che ri qui jachic ri aj levitib cumal ri aj israelib
Numbers8:12 Chwi' chi c'ut ri aj levitib quebe quiya' na ri qui k'ab puwi' ri qui jolom ri c'ojolab tak wacax
Numbers8:13 Quebacholajij c'u na chuwäch ri Aaron xukuje' chquiwäch ri e u c'ojol
Numbers8:14 jewa' ri qui tasic ri aj levitib caban na chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic rech quebux wech.
Numbers8:15 Cäbantaj c'u na wa'
Numbers8:16 rumal rech chi chquixo'l conojel ri aj israelib
Numbers8:17 rumal rech chi e wech conojel ri e qui nabeal ri aj israelib
Numbers8:18 Che c'u ri qui q'uexwäch ri e are' xebenc'am ri aj levitib.
Numbers8:19 In xebencha' ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic
Numbers8:20 Ri Moises
Numbers8:21 Ri aj levitib xquich'ajch'ojirisaj quib xquich'aj c'u ri catz'iak
Numbers8:22 Chwi c'u ronojel wa'
Numbers8:23 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers8:24 “Ri aj levitib rajawaxic caquichaplej ri qui patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib aretak c'o chic juwinak job qui junab
Numbers8:25 caquik'il c'u quib che ri patanijic aretak c'o chic catakwinak lajuj qui junab.
Numbers8:26 Aretak e oc'owinak tak chic we qui junab ri' cuya' quetoban cuc' tak ri cachil pa tak ri qui patan chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers9:1 K'axenak chi jun junab e elinak ulok ri aj israelib pa Ejipt
Numbers9:2 “Ri aj israelib rajawaxic cäquiban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem pa ri ajilabal ri k'atom
Numbers9:3 ri u bixic
Numbers9:4 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Moises chque ri aj israelib chi chquibana' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem
Numbers9:5 je c'u xquiban ri e are' pa ri cajlajuj rajilabal ri ic' ri'
Numbers9:6 E c'o c'u jujun achijab ri e tz'ilobitajinak rumal rech chi xquichap jun cäminak
Numbers9:7 xquibij c'u che ri Moises: “Uj ka chapom jun cäminak
Numbers9:8 Ri Moises xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chiweyej na quinta' na jas ri cubij na ri Ajawaxel chiwij ix.”
Numbers9:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che: “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib:
Numbers9:10 Iwonojel ix xukuje' ri e iwachalaxic rajawaxic quiban na ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic nu k'ij. Ri e uxinak tz'il rumal rech chi qui chapom jun cäminak
Numbers9:11 caquiban na ri nimak'ij pa ri ucajlajuj rajilabal ri ucab ic'
Numbers9:12 c'o c'u mito'tajisaj can che ri rech ri ucab k'ij mawi mak'ajisax jun u bakil. Chibana' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem quitakej c'u qui banic conojel ri e u cholajil ri e nu yo'm.
Numbers9:13 Jachin c'ut ri cutanaba' u banic ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem ri ch'ajch'oj c'u ne man naj ta c'u benak wi
Numbers9:14 Ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l rajawaxic cäquiban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic nu k'ij je jas ronojel ri cholajil ri nu yo'm. Ri kas e junam nak'atisabal quebajwataj che ri man i winakil ta jacha' xukuje' che ri aj tinimit.”
Numbers9:15 Pa ri k'ij ri xwocotaj ri k'ijilabal
Numbers9:16 Je c'u cac'ulmataj wa' amak'el: pa k'ij
Numbers9:17 Aretak cawalij ri sutz' puwi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios
Numbers9:18 Aretak cätakan ri Ajawaxel
Numbers9:19 We ri sutz' naj cäcanaj puwi' ri k'ijilabal ri aj israelib caquibeytajisaj ri qui binem che u latz'obexic qui wäch pa ri patanijic che ri Ajawaxel.
Numbers9:20 We ri sutz' xa quieb oxib k'ij cacanaj puwi' ri k'ijilabal
Numbers9:21 C'o jun tak mul ri sutz' xuwi ri chak'ab cacanajic
Numbers9:22 We c'u ri sutz' cäbeytaj quieb k'ij quieb ic' o jun junab
Numbers9:23 Rumal c'ut jun u takanic ri Ajawaxel quekajic
Numbers10:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers10:2 “Chabana' quieb trompet e sak puak ri e colomam ruc' bajibal
Numbers10:3 Aretak quebok'isax ri quieb trompet
Numbers10:4 Aretak c'u xa jun cok'isaxic
Numbers10:5 Aretak ri rok'ibal ri trompet quecachilaj cowilaj tak rakoj chi'aj
Numbers10:6 pa ri ucab ok'ibal caquitakej na qui be ri e kajinak pa ri u mox elebal k'ij. Ri cok'ibal tak ri trompet ri e achilatal cumal rakoj tak chi'aj are etal che ri benam.
Numbers10:7 Ri xak ok'ebal re trompet are etal rech caquimulij quib ri winak.
Numbers10:8 Ri quebok'isan tak ri trompet e are' ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Numbers10:9 Aretak cawalij ulok jun c'ulel che u banic ch'o'j iwuc' chupam ri kas iwulew quixel c'u na bic che u banic ch'o'j
Numbers10:10 Chebiwok'isaj ri trompet pa tak ri k'ij re quicotemal
Numbers10:11 Pa ri juwinak rajilabal ri ucab ic' rech ri ucab junab
Numbers10:12 Ri aj israelib xquitakej qui be xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai. Ri sutz' xetok'ol chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Paran.
Numbers10:13 Jacha' ri takanic ri xuya' ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Moises
Numbers10:14 ri xec'amow be e are' ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o chuxe' ri retal ri Juda
Numbers10:15 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Isacar are' ri Natanael (ri u tat ri Natanael are' ri Zuar).
Numbers10:16 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Zabulon are' ri Eliab (ri u tat ri Eliab are' ri Helon).
Numbers10:17 Xquitur c'ut ri k'ijilabal
Numbers10:18 E benak chi c'ut ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Ruben
Numbers10:19 Ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Simeon are' ri Selumiel (ri u tat ri Selumiel are' ri Zurisaday).
Numbers10:20 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Gad are' ri Eliasap (ri u tat ri Eliasap are' ri Reuel).
Numbers10:21 E benak chi c'ut ri e rija'lil ri Coat
Numbers10:22 E are' chi c'u e benak ri ajch'ojab ri quebin chuxe' ri retal ri Eprain
Numbers10:23 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Manases are' ri Gamaliel (ri u tat ri Gamaliel are' ri Pedasur).
Numbers10:24 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Benjamin are ri Abidan (Ri u tat ri Abidan are' ri Jedeoniy).
Numbers10:25 Che ri q'uisbabalil
Numbers10:26 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Aser are' c'o ri Pajiel (ri u tat ri Pajiel are' ri Ocran).
Numbers10:27 Ri c'amowinak qui be ri rajch'ojab ri ramak' ri Neptali are' ri Ahir (ri u tat ri Ahir are' ri Enan).
Numbers10:28 Are cholajil wa' ri caquitakej u banic ri ajch'ojab aj israelib aretak caquimajij ri qui be.
Numbers10:29 Ri u tat ri Hobab are' ri Reuel aj Madian. C'o jun k'ij ri Moises xubij che ri baluc Hobab: “Ri uj cujbe pa ri ulew ri u chi'm ri Ajawaxel chi cuya' chke. Tasaj kuc' cakaban c'u na utzil chawe

Numbers10:31 “Man catbe taj
Numbers10:32 We catpe kuc'

Numbers11:1 C'o jun k'ij ri aj israelib xech'ach'at chrij ri Ajawaxel qui mac quech tak ri c'axc'olil ri quequiriko. Aretak xetataj rumal
Numbers11:2 Ri tinimit xurak u chi' xutz'onoj to'banic che ri Moises
Numbers11:3 Rumal ri' xcoj Taber che u bi' we c'olbal ri'

Numbers11:5 ¡Quenataj c'u ne ri car chke ri xak quekacochi'j ri quekatij pa Ejipt! Xukuje' quekatij c'ut pepin
Numbers11:6 Are c'u ri camic cätajin cujcäm che wija'l
Numbers11:7 (Ri jaswa' cäjunamataj ruc' ri u wäch culanto; k'ank'oj rilic jacha' ri cäpe k'ol

Numbers11:9 Chak'ab
Numbers11:10 Ri Moises xuta' u tzijol chi ri aj israelib xukuje' ri cachalaxic quebok' chuchi' tak ri qui cäbal ri lic'om. Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj oyowarinak. Xukuje' c'ut ri Moises xyojtajic
Numbers11:11 xubij c'u che ri Ajawaxel: “¿Jasche cäban la c'ax chwe in
Numbers11:12 ¿La xa ta pune' in ta u tat o u nan rech cätz'onoj la chwe chi queben k'alula' bic e jacha' ta ne ac'alab ri c'ä quetu'n cho u c'u'x ri qui nan
Numbers11:13 ¿Jawije' ta lo quebenc'ama' wi ti'j che u ya'ic qui ti' we winak ri'? Quebok'ic quepe che u bixic chwe: ‘Chaya' ti'j chke che u tijic.’
Numbers11:14 Ri in nu tuquiel man quincuin ta chic quintakej ta u c'amic bic ronojel we tinimit ri'; are jun eka'n ri sibalaj al na chwe in.
Numbers11:15 We je cätakej la u banic wa' chwe
Numbers11:16 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic chwe: “Chebamulij oxc'al lajuj nimak tak tatayib aj israelib
Numbers11:17 In quinkaj na bic quinch'aw c'u na awuc' chila'
Numbers11:18 Chataka' c'u ri tinimit chi chuch'ajch'ojisaj rib re chwek
Numbers11:19 man xa ta c'u jun k'ij o quieb
Numbers11:20 Jun ic' cäbeytaj na u tijic ri ti'j cumal

Numbers11:22 ¿Jawije' ta lo e c'o wi chij ri man e ajilatal ta xukuje' wacax ri cuya' taj quepilic ri chubana' ta chque conojel? Pune' ta c'u ne quekaya' ta conojel ri car chque ri e c'o chupam ri plo
Numbers11:23 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “¿La are' pa a c'u'x chi sibalaj ch'utin ri nu cuinem? Camic cawila' na we quetz'akatok o jayi' ri nu bim.”
Numbers11:24 Ri Moises xel bic xbe che u bixic che ri tinimit ri u bim ri Ajawaxel che
Numbers11:25 Xkaj c'u ulok ri Ajawaxel pa ri sutz' xch'aw c'u ruc' ri Moises; xuc'am c'u niq'uiaj ri uxlabal ri c'o ruc' ri Moises xuya' c'u chque ri oxc'al lajuj nimak tak tatayib. Xak xuwi c'u xjeki' ri uxlabal paquiwi' xquichaplej u k'axexic u tzij ri Dios; man xban ta chi c'u jumul wa'.
Numbers11:26 Quieb achijab

Numbers15:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers15:2 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak chixoc ri ix chupam ri ulew ri quenya' chiwe rech quixjeki' chupam
Numbers15:3 qui chi'j c'u jun ama' wacax o jun chij che u poroxic che u ya'ic nu k'ij jacha' che tabal tok'ob o tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri sibalaj cäc'oc'atic
Numbers15:4 ri cäc'amow ulok ri sipanic rajawaxic cutik quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj coc'alaj c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit ruc'.
Numbers15:5 Xukuje' chque c'u ri tabal a tok'ob ri e yo'm qui bixic rajawaxic cätik jun litro u wa'l uva che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij.
Numbers15:6 We ri tabal tok'ob are jun ama' chij quetik chi na belejeb libra c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit ruc' jubik'.
Numbers15:7 Xukuje' jun litro u wa'l uva ruc' jubik'
Numbers15:8 We ri tabal tok'ob are jun c'ojol ama' wacax
Numbers15:9 quetik na oxlajuj (13) libra c'äj ri cäyok' quieb litro aseit ruc'
Numbers15:10 xukuje' c'u quieb litro u wa'l uva
Numbers15:11 Are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic chque jujun ama'ib tak wacax
Numbers15:12 Chquijujunal tak ri awaj ri quechi'xic queya' tak ri sipanic ri rajawaxic
Numbers15:13 Ronojel aj Israel rajawaxic quebutz'akatisaj conojel tak we cholajil ri' aretak caquiban jun sipanic ri porom ri cac'oc'at ruxlab.
Numbers15:14 We c'o jun man i winakil taj
Numbers15:15 Xak junam cholajil cajwataj chiwe ix xukuje' chque ri man e i winakil taj; are jun pixab ri cajeki'c
Numbers15:16 Junam pixab xukuje' junam cholajil c'o chiwe ix xukuje' chque ri man i winakil taj.”
Numbers15:17 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers15:18 “Chabij chque ri aj israelib ri quinbij chawe: Aretak ix oquinak chic chupam ri ulew jawije' ri quixinc'am wi bic
Numbers15:19 qui chaplej c'u u tijic ri trico ri cäwalij chuwäch
Numbers15:20 Je c'ut jacha' ri u chi'xic ri nabe jubik' re ri trico ri yak'tajinak
Numbers15:21 We sipanic ri' rajawaxic qui ban amak'el.
Numbers15:22 Aretak rumal man nabenic ta ri ix i yo'm can u banic apachique chque ri jastak ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Moises.
Numbers15:23 Kas pa ri nabe k'ij ri cächaptaj bic
Numbers15:24 We ri sachinakil man xnabex ta are' c'u banowinak ronojel ri tinimit
Numbers15:25 Ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob cuban ri nimak'ij ri nak'atisabal che u rikic ri sachbal macaj che utzil che ronojel ri tinimit Israel
Numbers15:26 In quinsach na u mac ronojel ri tinimit Israel xukuje' ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l
Numbers15:27 We ri macaj ri man canabex ta u banic xa jun winak cabanowic cuchi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob che resaxic we macaj ri' jun alaj ati't q'uisic' re jun u junab.
Numbers15:28 Ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob cuban ri nimak'ij ri nak'atisabal chnuwäch che u rikic ri sachbal mac che u josk'ixic ri macaj ri bantajinak ri man xunabej ta we winak ri'
Numbers15:29 Xak junam cholajil cajwataj chque ri e i winakil xukuje' chque ri man e i winakil ta ri e jekel chixo'l
Numbers15:30 We c'u ne c'o jun winak cunabej aretak camacunic
Numbers15:31 Xretzelaj c'u u wäch ri nu tzij man xebutz'akatisaj ta c'ut ri e nu takanic; kas xa jumul quesaxic cukajbej c'u na ri retzelal.”
Numbers15:32 Aretak ri aj israelib e c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Numbers15:33 Ri xerikowic xquic'am bic chuwäch ri Moises xukuje' chuwäch ri Aaron
Numbers15:34 ri e are' xquichajij c'ut

Numbers15:36 Xepe c'ut ri aj israelib xquesaj bic chrij ri kajebal xquibuc' c'u che abaj c'ä xcäm na
Numbers15:37 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers15:38 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: Ri ix xukuje' ri e iwija'lil rajawaxic quequic'am bic t'orot'ak cuc' tak qui chiyichic che ri u chi' ri catz'iak. Ri t'orot'ak rajawaxic e re bätz' morato.
Numbers15:39 Jeri' aretak ri ix quebiwil ri t'orot'ak
Numbers15:40 Jeri' quenataj na conojel tak ri e nu takomal chiwe quebitz'akatisaj c'ut
Numbers15:41 In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios ix
Numbers16:1 Jun aj levi rija'lil ri Coat
Numbers16:2 xquiwalijisaj quib chrij Moises. Chque wa' xequitik chi quib quieb sient cawinak lajuj (250) aj israelib
Numbers16:3 Conojel c'ut e are' xquimulij quib
Numbers16:4 Ri Moises
Numbers16:5 xubij c'u che ri Core xukuje' chque ri e teren chrij: “Chwek ak'abil ri Ajawaxel cuk'alajisaj na jachin ri rech xukuje' jachin ri u tasom rib che
Numbers16:6 Chibana' ri quinbij chiwe: chebic'ama' ulok ri u bukibal ri Core xukuje' tak ri quech ri e rachil
Numbers16:7 chebiya' rachak k'ak' chquipam xukuje' c'oc' k'ol chebicholoba' c'u chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chwek. Ri achi ri cacha' rumal ri Ajawaxel
Numbers16:8 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Core: “Chinitatabej aj levitib:
Numbers16:9 ¿La xa man nim ta qui wilo chi ri u Dios ri Israel ix u cha'om ix chuxo'l ri tinimit Israel
Numbers16:10 Ri Ajawaxel rajwam chi ri at xukuje' ri e niq'uiaj chic e u tz'akatil ri awamak'
Numbers16:11 Kastzij ri Aaron man c'o ta u banic rech cäban yok'onic chrij; chrij ri Ajawaxel wa' ri at xukuje' ri e awachil qui walijisam wi quib.”
Numbers16:12 Ri Moises xutak qui siq'uixic ri Datan xukuje' ri Abiram (e u c'ojol ri Eliab)
Numbers16:13 ¿La xa man nim ta cawilo chi xujawesaj ulok chupam jun ulew ri cabelel wi ri leche xukuje' ri juyubal räx cab jacha' ta ne ri ja'
Numbers16:14 At man uj a c'amom ta bic chupam jun ulew jawije' cabelel ta wi ri leche xukuje' juyubal räx cab jacha' ri ja'
Numbers16:15 Sibalaj c'u xoyowar ri Moises xubij c'u che ri Ajawaxel: “¡Mec'amowaj la ri qui sipanic! Ri in man nu tokim ta chque mawi ta ne xa jun bur
Numbers16:16 Xubij c'u ri Moises che ri Core: “Chixpe ta chwek at xukuje' tak ri e awachil
Numbers16:17 Chi chquijujunal c'ut chicuc'aj ri qui bukibal chuya' c'u ulok c'oc' k'ol chupam. Ri at xukuje' ri Aaron chiwuc'aj ri i bukibal quebiya' c'u na cuc' ri quieb sient cawinak lajuj
Numbers16:18 Chquijujunal c'ut xquic'am ri qui bukibal
Numbers16:19 Ri Core u mulin chi ronojel ri tinimit chquij chuwäch ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib. Ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut c'u rib chuwäch ronojel ri tinimit

Numbers16:21 “¡Chixel chuxo'l we tinimit ri'
Numbers16:22 Are c'u ri e are'
Numbers16:23 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che ri Moises:
Numbers16:24 “Chabij chque conojel ri aj israelib chi chquitasa' quib che ri cäbal ri lic'om jawije' e c'o wi ri Core
Numbers16:25 Ri Moises xwalijic

Numbers16:27 Ri tinimit xelic xuya' can ri c'olbal ri c'o wi ri Core
Numbers16:28 Ri Moises xutakej u bixic: “Ruc' wa' quinc'ut chiwäch chi are' ri Ajawaxel Dios ri in takowinak che qui banic we jastak tak ri'
Numbers16:29 We
Numbers16:30 we c'u ri Ajawaxel cuban jun jasach ri mawi jumul ilom
Numbers16:31 Xuwi c'u xutanaba' tzijonem ri Moises
Numbers16:32 xebubik' c'u bic conojel ri achijab ri qui junam quib ruc' ri Core
Numbers16:33 E c'aslic xetzak bic chupam ri ulew
Numbers16:34 Aretak xetatajic chi caquirak qui chi'
Numbers16:35 Xutak c'u ne bic xukuje' ri Ajawaxel jun k'ak' ri xebucämisaj ri quieb sient cawinak lajuj achijab ri qui chi'm c'oc' k'ol.
Numbers16:36 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers16:37 “Chataka' ri Eleazar (u c'ojol ri Aaron) chi cheresaj ri bukibal chquixo'l ri jastak ri xec'atic
Numbers16:38 Ri e qui bukibal tak we achijab ri e cäminak rumal rech ri mac ri qui banom
Numbers16:39 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob Elea xebumulij tak ri bukibal re k'an ch'ich' ri xequic'am ulok ri achijab ri xecäm chupam ri c'atic
Numbers16:40 Jun c'utbal wa' chque ri aj israelib chi man c'o ta jun

Numbers17:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers17:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi chquijujunal ri c'amal tak be re amak' chequic'ama' ulok jun ch'amiy
Numbers17:3 che ri ch'amiy ri rech ri ramak' ri Levi catz'ibaj wi ri u bi' ri Aaron
Numbers17:4 Quebaya' chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers17:5 Quinbana' chi cätux ri u ch'amiy ri nu cha'om
Numbers17:6 Ri Moises xubij wa' ri xbix che chque ri aj israelib

Numbers17:8 chucab c'u k'ij

Numbers18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “At xukuje' ri e a c'ojol
Numbers18:2 Rajawaxic cabano chi ri niq'uiaj e u tz'akatil chic ri ramak' ri Levi
Numbers18:3 Ri e are' e c'o che ri a patanixic xukuje' che u patanixic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios
Numbers18:4 Rajawaxic catcachilaj che ri patanijic chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib xukuje' conojel ri patanijic ri cachil tak quib. Man c'o ta c'u jun apachique winak cäkeb ta iwuc';
Numbers18:5 ix ri' ri ix ajekomal che ri u patanixic ri k'ijilabal xukuje' ri porobal. Jeri' man cäpe ta chi na woyowal cuc' ri aj israelib.
Numbers18:6 In xebentas ri e awachalal ri aj levitib chquixo'l ri niq'uiaj chi aj israelib che qui ya'ic chiwe
Numbers18:7 xak xuwi c'u ri at xukuje' tak ri e a c'ojol cuya' cäquiban ri chac re ri u cojic ri tabal tok'ob jas ri rajawaxic u banic puwi' ri porobal o ri queban chrij ri ch'ukubal. We patanijic ri' rajawaxic are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic iwumal
Numbers18:8 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “Ri sipanic ri queban tak chwe in e nu jachom pa a k'ab. Conojel ri tastalic tak sipanic ri quequiban ri aj israelib chwe
Numbers18:9 Chque ri tabal tok'ob ri queporoxic
Numbers18:10 Ronojel achi ri c'o chixo'l cuya' cutij rech chque tak we sipanic ri' pa jun tastalicalaj c'olbal
Numbers18:11 Quebenya' c'u chawe xukuje' chque tak ri a c'ojol ri a mia'l ri c'ä e c'o pa ri awachoch
Numbers18:12 Xukuje' quebenya' ri nabe tak wächinic ri quequic'am ulok ri aj israelib chwe chujunab: ri aseit ri utz na ri u wa'l uva
Numbers18:13 Junam xukuje' ri nabe tak wächinic ri cuya' ri ulew ri quequichi'j chwe
Numbers18:14 Ronojel sipanic ri quequitas ri aj israelib chwe
Numbers18:15 Conojel ri nabeal tak qui c'ojol ri aj israelib o ri nabe tak cal ri awaj
Numbers18:16 Ri torobal rajawaxic cätojic jun ic' bantajinak chic ri alanic
Numbers18:17 Man caya' ta c'u c'olbal chi quetor ri nabe tak cal ri ati'tab tak wacax
Numbers18:18 At cuya' catcanaj ruc' ri ti'j
Numbers18:19 Ronojel ri cuchuj ri quequitas ri aj israelib chwe
Numbers18:20 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Aaron: “At man cac'oji' ta awulew mawi tak e wechbal pa Israel
Numbers18:21 Chque ri aj levitib quinya' wi jacha' che quechbal ri lajujil ri rajawaxic caquic'am ulok ri aj israelib ri caquesaj che ri qui ch'äcoj
Numbers18:22 Ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic man ya'tal ta chque chi quenakajin ta che ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers18:23 Ri aj levitib xak xuwi ri e are' ri quepatanij na chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib
Numbers18:24 Chque e are' e nu yo'm che quechbal ri jun lajujil ri rajawaxic quequichi'j ri aj israelib chwe ri caquesaj che ri u wächinic ri culew. Rumal ri' nu bim chque chi kas man c'o ta culew cac'oji' pa Israel.”
Numbers18:25 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers18:26 “Chabij chque ri aj levitib chi aretak chequic'am chque ri aj israelib ri u lajujil ri quesan che ri u wächinic ri culew ri e nu yo'm chque che quechbal
Numbers18:27 Are wa' ri qui cuchuj
Numbers18:28 Jeri'
Numbers18:29 Che ronojel ri chya' chiwe

Numbers18:31 cuya' c'ut quitijo ix xukuje' ri e iwachalal pa apachique c'olbal. Are ri tojbal iwech wa' che ri patanijic ri quiban chupam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re rikoj ib.
Numbers18:32 Aretak c'ut tastajinak chic iwumal ri utz na ri quiya' na chwe

Numbers20:21 xquicoj c'u qui chuk'ab che qui k'atixic rech man queboc'ow ta chupam ri culew. E are' c'ut ri aj israelib xquitzucuj chic jun qui be.

Numbers22:1 Ri aj israelib xquitakej ri qui be xebekaj pa tak ri lianic re Moab

Numbers22:3 Xukuje' ri winak aj Moab xenoj che xe'n ib aretak xquilo chi ri aj israelib sibalaj man quebajilataj taj.
Numbers22:4 Xquibij c'ut ri aj Moab chque ri nimak tak tatayib aj madianib: “Conojel we winak ri' culquiq'uisa' tzij puwi' ri kulew
Numbers22:5 xutak c'u u siq'uixic ri Balaam (u c'ojol ri Beor) ri c'o apan pa Petor
Numbers22:6 Tasaj ba' chanim chel a c'okoj we tinimit ri' che nu to'ic
Numbers22:7 Ri e qui nimak tak tatayib ri aj moabib xukuje' ri quech ri aj madianib xebec xquic'am bic puak pa qui k'ab che qui tojic tak ri c'okonic
Numbers22:8 Ri Balaam xubij chque: “Chixcanaj can waral pa we ak'ab ri'
Numbers22:9 Xuc'ut c'u rib ri Dios chuwäch ri Balaam
Numbers22:10 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic: “Ri Balac (rajawinel ri Moab
Numbers22:11 chi jun tinimit elinak ulok pa Ejipt u liq'uiq'uem c'u rib pa ronojel ri ulew. Ri Balac are craj chi quinbextax che qui c'okoxic
Numbers22:12 Ri Dios xubij che ri Balaam: “Man catbe ta cuc' mawi mac'okoj we tinimit ri'
Numbers22:13 Chucab k'ij xwalij ri Balaam xubij chque ri c'amal tak be ri xebutak ulok ri Balac: “Chixtzelej pa ri iwulew. Ri Ajawaxel man cuya' ta chwe chi quinbe ta iwuc'.”
Numbers22:14 Ri e c'amal tak u be ri Moab xetzelejic jawije' c'o wi ri Balac xquibij c'u che: “Ri Balaam man xraj ta xpe kuc'.”
Numbers22:15 Ri Balac xutij u k'ij xebutak chi bic jumul niq'uiaj chi c'amal tak be ri e q'ui na ri xukuje' nimak tak na qui k'ij chquiwäch tak ri e nabe.
Numbers22:16 Xebe c'u wa' che rilic ri Balaam xquibij c'u che: “Ri Balac (ri u c'ojol ri Zipor) cutak u bixic chawe: ‘Chabana' jun tok'ob mak'il awib che a petic.
Numbers22:17 In quinya' na ri sibalaj nimarisabal a k'ij

Numbers22:19 Chixcanaj c'u ne na ix xukuje' che we junak'ab ri' waral
Numbers22:20 Chak'ab

Numbers22:27 Aretak ri ati't bur xril ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel

Numbers22:31 Xuban c'ut ri Ajawaxel chi ri Balaam xcuinic xril ri u tako'n

Numbers22:33 Ri ati't bur xinrilo
Numbers22:34 Ri Balaam xutzelej u bixic che ri u tako'n ri Ajawaxel: “In macuninak

Numbers28:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi maquitanaba' qui chi'xic chwe ri wa' xukuje' tak ri e sipanic ri queporoxic pa ri qui k'ijol pa ri nimak tak ri nimak'ij ri nimak qui banic
Numbers28:3 Chabij chque xukuje' chi e are' tak sipanic wa' ri takal qui poroxic cumal che u ya'ic nu k'ij: k'ij chk'ij mel i k'ij che u banic quieb alaj ama'ib tak chij re jun qui junab ri ma ta c'o jun qui yab.
Numbers28:4 Jun capil ak'abibal ri jun chic cäbe k'ij.
Numbers28:5 Ri sipanic que c'äj quiejeb libra ruc' niq'uiaj utzalaj c'äj ri cäyok' jun litro aseit re aseitun ruc'.”
Numbers28:6 (Are tabal tok'ob wa' ri man xtanabax ta can u poroxic pa ri juyub Sinai
Numbers28:7 “Ri sipanic re ri u wa'l uva jun litro che jujun alaj tak ama'ib tak chij. We u wa'l uva ri' rajawaxic u jamic chupam ri k'ijilabal che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.
Numbers28:8 Ri ucab alaj ama' chij cäpil na aretak que k'ij

Numbers28:10 We tabal tok'ob ri' ri cächajirisaxic cächi'x chupam tak ri k'ij re uxlanem
Numbers28:11 “Chupam ri nabe k'ij re jujun tak ic' qui chi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che ri Ajawaxel quieb c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers28:12 Che jujun c'ojol wacax quechi'x na oxlajuj (13) libra utzalaj c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc'; che jujun nimak tak chij
Numbers28:13 che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij
Numbers28:14 Ri sipanic re u wa'l uva ri cärachilaj are cacab litro che jujun c'ojol wacax
Numbers28:15 C'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij
Numbers28:16 “Chupam ri cajlajuj k'ij re ri nabe ic' re ri junab caban ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel
Numbers28:17 pa ri k'ij olajuj are k'ij re nimak'ij. Wukub k'ij cätij ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'.
Numbers28:18 Chupam ri nabe k'ij re ri wukub k'ij cäban jun nimak'ij tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' ri ix man c'o ta jun u wäch jun chac qui bano.
Numbers28:19 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic
Numbers28:20 Junam cuc' tak we tabal tak tok'ob ri' querachilaj tak ri sipanic que c'äj ri cäyok' aseit cuc'
Numbers28:21 belejeb (9) libra c'äj che jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut che jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij.
Numbers28:22 Caquichi'j c'u na xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri sachbal macaj.
Numbers28:23 Ronojel wa' cäquichi'j na c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cächi'x ronojel k'ij ak'abibal.
Numbers28:24 Je caquiban wa' pa ri wukub k'ij nimak'ij chquijujunal
Numbers28:25 Chupam ri uwuk k'ij xukuje' quiban tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch jun chac quibano.”
Numbers28:26 “Chupam ri nimak'ij quech ri nabe tak wächinic
Numbers28:27 Quichi'j na che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers28:28 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri carachilaj ri yok'om aseit ruc' oxlajuj (13) libra c'äj quecachilaj jujun c'ojol tak wacax;
Numbers28:29 belejeb (9) libra quecachilaj jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut quecachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij.
Numbers28:30 Xukuje' caquichi'j na jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal qui mac.
Numbers28:31 We tabal tok'ob ri' ri cächajirisaxic xukuje' tak ri sipanic quech c'äj ri querachilaj xukuje' ri u wa'l uva caquiya' na c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic k'ij chk'ij. Ri awaj ma ta c'o qui yab.”
Numbers29:1 “Chupam ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk ic' ri ix quiban jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam we k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano
Numbers29:2 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers29:3 Ri rach sipanic re c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc' re oxlajuj (13) libra cärachilaj jun c'ojol wacax;
Numbers29:4 belejeb (9) libra che jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj cäcachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij.
Numbers29:5 Caquichi'j c'u na xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob che u rikic ri cuyubal qui mac
Numbers29:6 c'o chi c'u wi na ri' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic re chi ic' xukuje' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisax k'ij chk'ij
Numbers29:7 “Chupam ri ulajuj k'ij re ri kas uwuk ic'
Numbers29:8 Jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers29:9 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri cäyok' aseit ruc' ri cärachilaj jun c'ojol wacax
Numbers29:10 belejeb (9) libra che jun ama' chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj che jujun alaj ama' chij.
Numbers29:11 Xukuje' qui chi'j jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:12 “Chupam ri olajuj k'ij rech ri uwuk' ic' ri ix quiban na jun tastalicalaj mulin ib. Chupam ri k'ij ri' man c'o ta jun u wäch chac qui bano. Wukub k'ij cäbeytaj ri nimak'ij che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.
Numbers29:13 Chupam ri nabe k'ij quichi'j na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel
Numbers29:14 Ri sipanic re c'äj ri cayok' aseit ruc' oxlajuj (13) libra cäcachilaj jujun c'ojol wacax;
Numbers29:15 belejeb (9) libra cäcachilaj jujun ama'ib tak chij; quiejeb (4) libra ruc' niq'uiaj c'ut cacachilaj jujun alaj ama'ib tak chij.
Numbers29:16 Caquichi'j xukuje' jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:17 Che ri ucab k'ij quechi'x na cablajuj c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:18 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri e quech u wa'l uva cäjunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:19 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:20 Chupam ri urox k'ij quechi'x na julajuj c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:21 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri e quech ri u wa'l uva cajunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:22 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:23 Chupam ri ucaj k'ij quechi'x na lajuj c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:24 Queban c'u na xukuje' ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva cäjunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:25 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj
Numbers29:26 Chupam ri uro' k'ij quechi'x na belejeb c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:27 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva ri cäjunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:28 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:29 Chupam ri uwak k'ij quechi'x na wajxakib c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:30 Queban c'u wi na ri sipanic tak quech c'äj xukuje' ri quech u wa'l uva ri cajunamataj ruc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:31 Xukuje' cachi'x jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:32 Chupam ri uwak k'ij quechi'x na wajxakib c'ojol tak wacax
Numbers29:33 Queban chi c'u wi na tak ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva cajunamataj cuc' ri cajilabal ri c'ojol tak wacax ri ama'ib tak chij xukuje' alaj ama'ib tak chij
Numbers29:34 Xukuje' cächi'x c'u jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:35 Chupam ri uwajxak k'ij quiban na nimak'ij ruc' jun mulin ib nim u banic
Numbers29:36 Quichi'j c'u na jacha' che tabal tok'ob ri cäc'oc'at ruxlab che ri Ajawaxel Dios jun c'ojol wacax
Numbers29:37 Queban c'u wi na tak ri sipanic quech c'äj xukuje' quech u wa'l uva ri cärachilaj ri jun c'ojol wacax ri ama' chij xukuje' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij
Numbers29:38 Cachi'x c'u jun q'uisic' jacha' che tabal tok'ob u mac ri macaj
Numbers29:39 E are tak tabal tok'ob wa' ri rajawaxic quebiban che ri Ajawaxel pa tak ri k'ij ri e ch'icom
Numbers29:40 Ri Moises xuya' u bixic chque ri aj israelib ronojel ri takaninak wi ri Ajawaxel.

Numbers32:7 ¿Jasche qui ban chque ri aj israelib chi caqueblaj qui c'u'x rech man quek'ax ta chupam ri ulew ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chque?

Numbers32:14 Are c'u ri ix camic ri ix qui c'ojolaxelab ri tataxelab aj maquib
Numbers32:15 We ri ix man quiwaj ta quitakej ri Ajawaxel

Numbers32:18 Man cujtzelej ta na cho tak kachoch we ta ma ta conojel ri aj israelib e qui majim chi tak ri kas culew.

Numbers32:30 We c'u man quek'axic quiwikom quib

Numbers33:1 E are tak c'olbal wa' ri xejeki' wi tak ri aj israelib aretak xebel ulok pa Ejipt ri qui cholajim wi quib e jacha' e banal tak ch'o'j
Numbers33:2 Ri Moises xebutz'ibaj tak ri qui bi' ri c'olbal ri quebel wi tak u bic
Numbers33:3 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses chupam ri olajuj rajilabal ri nabe ic' re ri junab
Numbers33:4 ri aj ejiptib cätajin quequimukla' tak conojel ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol
Numbers33:5 Ri aj israelib xebel bic pa Ramses xebekaj pa Sucot.
Numbers33:6 Xebel bic pa Sucot xebekaj pa Etam
Numbers33:7 Xebel bic pa Etam
Numbers33:8 Xebel c'u bic Pa-hahirot
Numbers33:9 Xebel bic pa Mar xebopan pa Elim
Numbers33:10 Xebel bic pa Elim xebekaj c'u chunakaj ri Quiäk Plo.
Numbers33:11 Xebel bic chunakaj ri Quiäk Plo xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin.
Numbers33:12 Xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sin xebekaj c'u pa Dopca.
Numbers33:13 Xebel bic pa Dopca xebakaj c'u pa Alus.
Numbers33:14 Xebel chi bic pa Alus xebekaj c'u pa Repidim
Numbers33:15 Xebel bic pa Repidim xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai.
Numbers33:16 Xebel bic chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Sinai xebekaj c'u pa Kibrot-hataab.
Numbers33:17 Xebel bic pa Kibrot-hataab xebekaj c'u pa Hazerot.
Numbers33:18 Xebel bic pa Hazerot xebekaj c'u pa Ritma.
Numbers33:19 Xebel bic pa Ritma xebekaj pa Rimon-peres.
Numbers33:20 Xebel bic pa Rimon-peres xebekaj c'u pa Libna.
Numbers33:21 Xebel bic pa Libna xebekaj c'u pa Ris.
Numbers33:22 Xebel bic pa Ris xebekaj c'u pa Seelat.
Numbers33:23 Xebel bic pa Seelat xebekaj chupam ri juyub Seper.
Numbers33:24 Xebel bic chupam ri juyub Seper xebekaj c'u pa Harad.
Numbers33:25 Xebel bic pa Harad xebekaj c'u pa Maselot.
Numbers33:26 Xebel bic pa Maselot xebekaj c'u pa Tahat.
Numbers33:27 Xebel bic pa Tahat xebekaj pa Tar.
Numbers33:28 Xebel bic pa Tar xebekaj c'u pa Mitca.
Numbers33:29 Xebel bic pa Mitca xebekaj c'u pa Hasmon.
Numbers33:30 Xebel bic pa Hasmon xebekaj c'u pa Moserot.
Numbers33:31 Xebel bic pa Moserot xebekaj c'u pa Bene-jaacan.
Numbers33:32 Xebel bic pa Bene-jaacan xebekaj c'u pa Hor re Jidgad.
Numbers33:33 Xebel bic pa Hor re Jidgad xebekaj pa Jotbat.
Numbers33:34 Xebel bic pa Jotbat xebekaj c'u pa Abron.
Numbers33:35 Xebel bic pa Abron xebekaj c'u pa Ezion-jeber.
Numbers33:36 Xebel bic pa Ezion-jeber xebekaj c'u chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin
Numbers33:37 Xebel bic pa Cades xebekaj c'u chunakaj ri juyub Hor
Numbers33:38 Rumal ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel
Numbers33:39 Aretak xecäm ri Aaron puwi' ri juyub Hor
Numbers33:40 Ri ajawinel aj cananeyib re Arad ri jekel pa ri Negueb re Canaan
Numbers33:41 Xebel bic chupam ri juyub Hor xebekaj c'u pa Zalmon.
Numbers33:42 Xebel bic pa Zalmon xebekaj c'u pa Punon.
Numbers33:43 Xebel bic pa Punon xebekaj c'u pa Obot.
Numbers33:44 Xebe bic pa Obot xekaj c'u pa Ije-abarim
Numbers33:45 Xebel bic pa Ije-abarim xebekaj c'u pa Dibon-gad.
Numbers33:46 Xebel bic pa Dibon-gad xebekaj c'u pa Almon-diblataim.
Numbers33:47 Xebel bic pa Almon-diblataim xebekaj c'ut chquipam tak ri juyub re Abarim
Numbers33:48 Xebel bic chquipam tak ri juyub re Abarim xebekaj c'ut chquipam tak ri lianic re Moab
Numbers33:49 Ri tinimit xkaj chunakaj ri Jordan e latz'ebeninak bic kas pa Bet-jesimot c'ä pa Abel-sitim pa tak ri lianic re Moab.
Numbers33:50 Pa tak ri lianic re Moab chunakaj ri nima' Jordan
Numbers33:51 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: aretak ri ix quixoc'ow chupam ri Jordan quixoc c'u pa ri ulew Canaan
Numbers33:52 chebiwesaj bic conojel ri winak ri e c'o chupam ri ulew
Numbers33:53 Chich'äca' ri ulew chixjekel c'u chupam
Numbers33:54 Rajawaxic c'ut quijach pa taklebenic chquixo'l tak ri ija'lil que conojel ri amak'; chque ri ija'lil ri sibalaj e q'ui caya' na jun ulew chque ri nim na
Numbers33:55 We c'u ri ix man quebiq'uiak ta bic ri winak ri e c'o pa ri ulew
Numbers33:56 quinban c'u na chiwe jachique ri nu chomam u banic chque.”
Numbers34:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers34:2 “Chaya' quibixic we jastak ri' chque ri aj israelib: Chanim quixoc na pa ri ulew re Canaan. Are c'u ulew wa' ri cux na iwech
Numbers34:3 Ri c'ulbatil pa ri mox k'ab cäc'ulbatin na ruc' ri chaki'j uwo sak re Zin xukuje' ruc' ri rulew ri Edom. Cätakenic cäbe pa ri elebal k'ij
Numbers34:4 catakenic cäbe pa ri mox k'ab quetakal c'ä pa ri pakapic re Acrabim
Numbers34:5 quel pa Asmon cätaken c'ä ruc' ri alaj nima' ri cac'ulbatin ruc' ri Ejipt
Numbers34:6 Ri c'ulbat pa ri kajebal k'ij cac'ulbatin ruc' ri u tak'aj ri plo ri Mediteran.
Numbers34:7 Che ri c'ulbat pa ri iquiak'ab
Numbers34:8 cachaptaj chubic ruc' ri juyub Hor quetakal c'ä chuchi' ri oquibal re Hamat
Numbers34:9 Kas pa Zedad
Numbers34:10 Che ri c'ulbat pa elebal k'ij
Numbers34:11 quel pa Sepam copan pa Ribla
Numbers34:12 cätaken c'u pa ri nima' Jordan quetakal c'ä chupam ri Cäminak Cho. We c'ulbat tak ri' e are' ri u q'uisbalil ri iwulew.”
Numbers34:13 Ri Moises xebuya' tak we takanic ri chque ri aj israelib: “Are ulew wa' ri qui jacha' chiwäch cumal taklebenic; are ri ulew ri u yo'm wi takanic ri Ajawaxel chi cäya' chque ri belejeb amak' ruc' pa niq'uiaj ri c'ä maja' caya' culew
Numbers34:14 e quieb amak' c'ut ruc' pa niq'uiaj
Numbers34:15 
Numbers34:16 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers34:17 “Ri quebejachow ri ulew chiwäch are' ri Eleazar ri cojol tabal tok'ob cärachilaj ri Josue (ri u tat ri Josue are' ri Nun).
Numbers34:18 Chisiq'uij xukuje' jun c'amal be re jujun amak'
Numbers34:19 Ri achijab ri rajawaxic quebisiq'uij e are' tak wa': Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Juda: ri Caleb (ri u tat ri Caleb are' ri Jepon).
Numbers34:20 Che ri rech ri Simeon: ri Semuel (ri u tat ri Semuel are' ri Amihud).
Numbers34:21 Che ri rech ri Benjamin: ri Elidad (ri u tat ri Elidad are' ri Quixlon).
Numbers34:22 Che ri rech ri Dan: ri c'amal be Buqui (ri u tat ri Buqui are' ri Jogli).
Numbers34:23 Chque ri camak' ri e u c'ojol ri Jose: ri c'amal be Haniel (ri u tat ri Haniel are' ri Epod) che ri rech ri Manases;
Numbers34:24 are' c'u ri c'amal be Kemuel (ri u tat ri Kemuel are' ri Siptan) che ri rech ri Eprain.
Numbers34:25 Che ri rech ri ramak' ri Zabulon: ri c'amal be Elizapan (ri u tat ri Elizapan are' ri Parnac).
Numbers34:26 Che ri rech ri Isacar: ri c'amal be Paltiel (ri u tat ri Paltiel are' ri Azan).
Numbers34:27 Che ri rech ri Aser: ri c'amal be Ahiud (ri u tat ri Ahiud are' ri Selom).
Numbers34:28 Che ri rech ri Neptali: ri c'amal be Pedael (ri u tat ri Pedael are' ri Amihud).”
Numbers34:29 E are' tak wa' ri xebutak ri Ajawaxel che u jachic ri ulew Canaan chquiwäch ri aj israelib.
Numbers35:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises chupam tak ri lianic re Moab
Numbers35:2 “Chaya' takanic chque ri aj israelib chi
Numbers35:3 Ri aj levitib quejeki' na pa tak ri tinimit ri'
Numbers35:4 Ri juyub tak re yuk'bal ri rajawaxic queya' chque caquilic' na quib chrij ri tinimit
Numbers35:5 Ronojel ri ulew cux na cajtzalaj re cawinak quiejeb (44) c'am pa jujun u xcut
Numbers35:6 Chque ri tak tinimit ri quebiya' chque ri aj levitib
Numbers35:7 chnimalaj ronojel
Numbers35:8 Ri tak tinimit ri quebiya' chque ri aj levitib ri quebiwesaj chque ri niq'uiaj chi aj israelib
Numbers35:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Moises xubij c'u che:
Numbers35:10 “Chabij wa' chque ri aj israelib: aretak ri ix qui ramij ri nima' Jordan che ri oquem pa Canaan
Numbers35:11 rajawaxic quebicha' jujun tak tinimit che to'tajisabal ib
Numbers35:12 Chila' cäto'taj wi pa u k'ab ri rachalal ri cäminak ri cäraj cuya' rajil c'axelal che
Numbers35:13 Chque tak ri tinimit
Numbers35:14 Oxib quecanaj pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan oxib c'ut quecanaj pa Canaan.
Numbers35:15 We wakib tinimit tak ri' e tinimit re to'tajisabal ib
Numbers35:16 We c'o jachin jun cusoc jun winak ruc' jun ch'ich'
Numbers35:17 We c'o jachin jun cuch'ay jun winak ruc' jun abaj ri cuc'am ulok cämical
Numbers35:18 We c'o jachin cuch'ay jun winak ruc' jun che' ri cuc'am ulok ri u cämical
Numbers35:19 Ri rachalal ri cäminak ri nakaj na che are' cäcämisan na ri cämisanel aretak curiko.
Numbers35:20 We c'o jachin jun cuch'iquimij jun winak rumal oyowal
Numbers35:21 o rumal c'ulelam ib cuch'ay cuc' tak ri e u k'ab
Numbers35:22 We c'u ne c'o jachin jun xak c'ätetal cuch'iquimij jun winak
Numbers35:23 o man xril ta xuq'uiak jun abaj ri cäcämisanic
Numbers35:24 Are c'u ri tinimit cux na k'atal tzij chquixo'l
Numbers35:25 Ri tinimit rajawaxic cuto' na u wi' ri xbanow ri cämic rech man catoj ta rajil c'axelal che rumal ri rachalal ri xcäm rumal
Numbers35:26 We c'u quel bic chrij ri rulewal ri tinimit re to'tajisabal ib
Numbers35:27 ri rachalal ri xcämisaxic man c'o ta jun il cäkaj ta puwi' we curik chrij cucämisaj ta c'ut.
Numbers35:28 Ri xcämisanic rajawaxic cäcanaj chupam ri tinimit re to'tajisabal ib c'ä cäcäm na ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob. C'äte ri' cuya' cätzelej pa ri rulew.
Numbers35:29 We e chomanic tak ri' e jun pixab wa' chiwe ri quek'ax cuc' ri tataxelab quebopan c'u cuc' ri c'ojolaxelab
Numbers35:30 “Xuwi rumal ri qui k'alajisanic quieb oxib cuya' cac'okox jun cämisanel che cämical. Xa jun k'alajisanel man cubana' ta che u c'okoxic ta jun winak che cämical.
Numbers35:31 Man cuya' ta cac'am puak che u q'uexwäch ri u c'aslemal jun cämisanel ri c'okotajinak che cämical; we winak ri' rajawaxic cäcämic.
Numbers35:32 Man cuya' taj cac'am puak rech cäya' ta che ri cämisanel ri xutzucuj u to'tajisaxic rib chupam jun chque tak ri tinimit ri e c'utum rech cätzelej ta chupam ri rulew c'ä mojok chcäm ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob.
Numbers35:33 Miwawasij ri ulew ri quixxejekel wi na cuc' tak cämisanic
Numbers35:34 Miwawasij ri ulew ri quixxejekel wi na ri xukuje' quinejekel wi na
Numbers36:1 Ri e c'amal tak be que jujun ja tak winak chque ri e rachalaxic ri Galaad
Numbers36:2 “Ri Ajawaxel xuya' takanic chi at
Numbers36:3 We c'u ri e are' quec'ule cuc' alabom ri e rech jun amak' chic aj israel
Numbers36:4 Aretak c'u queltakal ri junab re torobal pa Israel
Numbers36:5 Are c'u ri Moises
Numbers36:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' na c'olbal chi ri e u mia'l ri Zelopehad quec'ule ruc' jachin ri cäcaj wi
Numbers36:7 Ri ulew ri xquitaklebej chquijujunal pa Israel man cuya' taj quesax pa jun amak' cak'ax ta chi c'u pa jun; ronojel aj Israel rajawaxic cucanajisaj ri rechbal chupam ri kas ramak'.
Numbers36:8 We jun ixok re apachique amak' querechbej tak ulew rajawaxic cac'uli' ruc' jun achi ri xukuje' rija'lil ri kas ramak'. Jeri' chquijujunal ri aj israelib rajawaxic cucanajisaj ri echbal ri e u c'amom chque tak ri e u mam.
Numbers36:9 Man c'o ta jun echbal ri quel ta pa jun amak' cak'ax ta chi c'u chupam jun amak'. Chquijujunal tak ri amak' re Israel rajawaxic chucanajisaj ri ulew ri xutaklebej.”

Numbers36:11 
Numbers36:12 ri e rija'lil ri Manases (ri u tat ri Manases are' ri Jose). Jeri' ri quechbal xcanaj chupam ri amak' ri quel wi ri qui tat.
Numbers36:13 E are tak takanic wa' xukuje' tak pixab ri xebuya' ri Ajawaxel chque ri aj israelib rumal ri Moises chupam tak ri lianic re Moab chunakaj ri Jordan
Deuteronomy1:1 E are tak tzij wa' ri xubij ri Moises chque conojel ri aj israelib
Deuteronomy1:2 Cächapletaj ulok pa ri juyub Horeb queq'uis c'ä pa Cades-barney c'o julajuj k'ij be
Deuteronomy1:3 Pa ri nabe k'ij rech ri ujulajuj ic' pa ri junab cawinak; aretak ri Moises u ch'äcom chic ri Sehon ri cajawinel ri aj amoreyib ri jekel pa Hesbon

Deuteronomy16:1 “Aretak curik ri ic' Abib

Deuteronomy16:3 Ri awaj ri capilic quitijo
Deuteronomy16:4 Pa we wukub k'ij ri' man c'o ta jubik' ch'am cäc'oji' pa ronojel ri iwulew
Deuteronomy16:5 Man cuya' ta qui chi'j ri tabal tok'ob re ri oc'owem pa apachique tinimit ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios chiwe
Deuteronomy16:6 xane' xuwi pa ri c'olbal ri u cha'om ri are' che u jekelibal ri u bi'. Rajawaxic qui chi'j pa ri xk'ekal
Deuteronomy16:7 Ri ti'j ri chi'm quitzaco xukuje' quitij pa ri c'olbal ri cucha' na ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios. Chucab k'ij c'ut quixtzelej cho iwachoch.
Deuteronomy16:8 Wakib k'ij c'ut quitij ri caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'

Deuteronomy16:11 Quiban c'u nimak'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios

Deuteronomy16:14 Quixquicot c'u pa we nimak'ij ri' junam cuc' ri e iwalc'ual
Deuteronomy16:15 We nimak'ij ri' wukub k'ij quiwoc'owisaj che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios
Deuteronomy16:16 Conojel ri achijab
Deuteronomy16:17 xane' chquijujunal quequic'am bic ri qui sipanic jas ri qui tewichi'xic ri jastak quech banom rumal ri Ajawaxel.”

Deuteronomy17:1 “Michi'j jacha' che tabal tok'ob jun ama' wacax mawi jun chij ri c'o u yab che tabal tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios

Deuteronomy17:3 quebuk'ijilaj jule' tak diosib chic
Deuteronomy17:4 We c'u quita' u tzijol

Deuteronomy19:1 “Aretak ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios u sachom chi qui wäch ri nimak tak tinimit cujach c'u ri culew pa i k'ab ri e quech camic quixoc c'u pa tak ri qui tinimit xukuje' pa tak ri cachoch;
Deuteronomy19:2 quebitas na oxib tinimit pa ri ulew ri quebuya' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios chiwe.
Deuteronomy19:3 Quisuc'umaj tak ri be ri quebe pa tak ri tinimit ri'. Quiban oxib che ri nimalaj ulew ri cuya' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios chiwe che iwechbal

Deuteronomy28:1 “We kas catniman che ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios
Deuteronomy28:2 Quepe c'u na conojel we tewichibal ri' pawi' catquirik c'u na
Deuteronomy28:3 At tewichital pa ri tinimit xukuje' pa ri juyub.
Deuteronomy28:4 Quetewichitaj na ri awalc'ual xukuje' ri u wächinic tak ri a tico'n
Deuteronomy28:5 Quetewichitaj na ri a chicäch xukuje' ri a jucub ri cayok' wi ri c'äj
Deuteronomy28:6 at c'u tewichital pa ronojel ri cabano.
Deuteronomy28:7 Ri Ajawaxel quebujach na ri a c'ulel pa a k'ab
Deuteronomy28:8 Ri Ajawaxel cutak na ulok ri u tewichibal paquiwi' tak ri e a c'olbal xukuje' puwi' ronojel ri cabano

Deuteronomy28:12 Cujak na ri k'inomalaj u k'inomal chawe
Deuteronomy28:13 Ri Ajawaxel catuya' na pa ri nabe c'olbal

Joshua14:1 E are' tak ulew wa' pa Canaan ri xequic'am ri aj israelib che quechbal

Joshua17:1 Are' ulew wa' ri xutaklebej ri ramak' ri Manases

Joshua17:5 Rumal c'u rech wa' ri ramak' ri Manases xuc'am lajuj ch'akatak ulew
Joshua17:6 rumal rech chi ri e u mia'l ri Manases xeya' tak culew jas ri xeya' chque tak ri achijab. Ri ulew re Galaad are' xcanaj cuc' ri niq'uiaj rija'lil chic ri Manases.

Joshua17:8 Pune' ri ulew re Tapu rech can ri ramak' ri Manases

Joshua18:1 Conojel ri tinimit aj israelib xquimulij quib pa Sil

Joshua18:4 Chebicha' ox ox achijab chquixo'l jujun amak'

Joshua18:6 Aretak c'u qui jachom chic ri ulew pa wukub ch'akatak

Joshua20:1 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Josue xubij c'u che:

Joshua20:5 We ri rachalal ri cäminak rokatam

Joshua21:42 ri qui sutim quij ri tinimit tak chquijujunal. E je conojel we tinimit ri'.

Joshua22:1 Xebusiq'uij c'ut ri Josue ri aj ramak' ri Ruben ri Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj ramak' ri Manases
Joshua22:2 xubij c'u chque: “Ix i tz'akatisam ronojel ri takanic ri xuya' can ri Moises chiwe
Joshua22:3 C'ä pa ri k'ij camic
Joshua22:4 Camic chi ri are' u tz'akatisam ri u chi'nic e c'o chi c'ut ri e iwachalal pa jamaril
Joshua22:5 Xuwi wa' quintz'onoj chiwe kas chi tz'akatisaj ruc' jicomal ri takomal xukuje' ri pixab ri xuya' ri Moises chiwe
Joshua22:6 Xuwi xbitaj wa'
Joshua22:7 Che ri jun pa niq'uiaj ri ramak' ri Manases
Joshua22:8 Xubij c'u chque: “Ri ix chixtzelej ba' pa tak ri iwulew iwuc'am c'u bic nimak tak k'inomal xukuje' q'uialaj iwawaj
Joshua22:9 Jewa' ri qui tzelejic tak ri ramak' ri Ruben ri Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases xequitas quib chquij ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic pa Sil
Joshua22:10 Aretak c'u xebopan ri aj Ruben xukuje' ri aj Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj che ri ramak' ri Manases chuchi' ri nima' Jordan
Joshua22:11 Xopan u tzijol cuc' ri niq'uiaj aj israelib chic chi ri aj Ruben ri aj Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj ramak' ri Manases quiwocom jun porobal pa ri u c'ulbatil ri Canaan
Joshua22:12 xuwi c'u xoc pa qui jolom ri aj israelib
Joshua22:13 Nabe c'ut xquitak bic ri Pinees
Joshua22:14 Xachilax bic cumal lajuj c'amal tak qui be ri aj israelib ri nimak qui k'ij chquijujunal are' caquiq'uexwächij ri u k'ab cachalaxic xukuje' ri camak'.
Joshua22:15 Conojel xebe pa Galaad
Joshua22:16 “Ri uj cujch'aw pa u bi' ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel. ¿Jas wa' chi jachanic ri i banom chrij ri u Dios ri Israel? ¿Jasche i xutum canok i wocom c'ut jun porobal che u c'ulelaxic ri Ajawaxel?
Joshua22:17 ¿La ma ta pa sibalaj nim ri macaj re ri Peor
Joshua22:18 ¿La ma ta u banom wa' chiwe
Joshua22:19 We quiwilo chi we ulew ri' ri xitaklebej tz'il
Joshua22:20 Chnataj chiwe chi ri Acan
Joshua22:21 Are' c'ut ri aj Ruben ri aj Gad xukuje' ri pa niq'uiaj ramak' ri Manases xquitzelej u bixic chque ri c'amal tak qui be ri aj israelib:
Joshua22:22 “Ri Ajawaxel xukuje' Dios paquiwi' conojel ri cäbix diosib chque reta'm chi man xkaban ta we porobal ri' che ta walijisam ib mawi che ta u tasic kib chrij. Ri are' reta'm xukuje' cuya' retamaxic chiwe iwonojel; we cumal tak we jastak ri'. ¡Cujicämisaj!
Joshua22:23 We xkawoc we porobal ri che u tasic kib chrij ri Ajawaxel
Joshua22:24 Ri kastzij wi chi xkabano man c'u cakaj ta chi c'o jun k'ij ri e i c'ojol caquibij ta chque ri e ka c'ojol: ‘¿Jas ta ri iwe ix che ri Ajawaxel ri xukuje' u Dios ri Israel?
Joshua22:25 Ri Ajawaxel u cojom ri Jordan che ka tasic chiwe
Joshua22:26 Rumal ri' xkachomaj u woquic jun porobal
Joshua22:27 xane' chi cacanaj che jun k'alajisanel chakaxo'l ka cabichal
Joshua22:28 Xkachomaj chi we ne c'o jachin jun je cubij wa' chke uj o chque ri e kija'lil
Joshua22:29 Muya' c'olbal ri Dios chke chi cakawalijisaj ta kib chrij
Joshua22:30 Aretak ri Pinees
Joshua22:31 Are' c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Pinees
Joshua22:32 Aretak xq'uis u tzam wa'
Joshua22:33 utz xquita' ri xbix ulok

Joshua23:1 Najtininak chi c'ut
Joshua23:2 ri Josue xutak qui siq'uixic conojel ri aj israelib
Joshua23:3 Ix iwilom ronojel ri xuban ri Ajawaxel chque conojel tak we tinimit ri' ri co xquitac'aba' quib chuwäch
Joshua23:4 Ri in rumal taklebenic xinjach tak we ulew ri' chquiwäch tak ri amak'. Man xuwi ta xinjach tak ri ulew ri e ch'äctajinak
Joshua23:5 Ri Ajawaxel queresaj na bic ri winak ri e jekel pa tak we ulew ri'
Joshua23:6 Chicojo' ba' i chuk'ab che u tz'akatisaxic ronojel ri cubij ri wuj re ri u pixab ri Moises; je u tz'akatisaxic chibana' jas ri tz'ibatalic.
Joshua23:7 Man quiyuj ta iwib cuc' ri jule' tak winak chic ri c'ä e jekel waral chixo'l. Man quebik'ijilaj ta ri e qui diosib
Joshua23:8 Amak'el chixteren chrij ri Dios ri Iwajaw
Joshua23:9 Ri Ajawaxel e u q'uiakom bic chiwäch
Joshua23:10 Xa jun chiwe cacuinic cubano chi quebanimaj jun mil winak chuwäch
Joshua23:11 Kas ba'
Joshua23:12 Rumal rech chi quinwaj quiwetamaj wa': chi we quixutuj can ri Dios quiyuj c'u iwib cuc' tak we winak ri' ri e canajinak chixo'l
Joshua23:13 
Joshua23:14 In chanim quinecämok
Joshua23:15 Je c'ut

Joshua24:1 Ri Josue xebumulij conojel tak ri amak' re Israel pa Siquem. Xebusiq'uij ri achijab ri e nimak tak winak chic
Joshua24:2 xubij che ronojel ri tinimit: “are' wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel: ‘Ojer canok
Joshua24:3 Chuchi' tak ri Euprats xinmajij wi ri Abraham
Joshua24:4 Xinya' c'u quieb u c'ojol ri Isaac
Joshua24:5 Xintak c'u bic ri Moises xukuje' ri Aaron
Joshua24:6 Aretak c'u xebel ulok ri e i mam pa Ejipt
Joshua24:7 Ri e are' xquitz'onoj tok'ob chwe
Joshua24:8 c'ä xixinc'am na ulok pa ri culew ri aj amoreyib
Joshua24:9 Are' chi c'u ri Balac
Joshua24:10 Man xinya' ta c'u c'olbal chi xixuc'okoj ta ri Balaam

Joshua24:13 Ri in xebenya' tak ulew chiwe ri man xebitajij ta na xukuje' tak tinimit ri man xebiyac ta na. Ix c'u jekel chquipam camic
Joshua24:14 “Rumal rech wa'
Joshua24:15 We c'u man quiwaj quipatanij ri Ajawaxel
Joshua24:16 Xquibij c'u ri tinimit: “¡Muya' ri Ajawaxel chi cakatzak canok che qui patanixic tak diosib!
Joshua24:17 Ri Ajawaxel are' ri xujesan ulok uj xukuje' ri e ka mam pa Ejipt

Joshua24:19 Xubij c'ut ri Josue chque: “Ri ix man quixecuin ta che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel
Joshua24:20 We ri ix quixutuj quebipatanij c'u jule' tak diosib chic
Joshua24:21 Ri tinimit xutzelej u bixic che: “Man je ta quec'ulmataj wa'. Ri uj cakapatanij na ri Ajawaxel.”
Joshua24:22 Xubij c'ut ri Josue chque: “Ix ri kas quixyo'w k'alajisanic chiwij chi i cha'om u patanix ri Ajawaxel.” “Uj” xecha' we winak ri'.

Judges2:1 Ri aj cajalaj tako'n ri Ajawaxel xpaki' ulok pa Jilgal xopan pa Boquim

Judges2:9 xquimuk c'u pa ri rulew ri c'o pa Timnat-ser

Judges2:11 E are tak c'ut ri e qui banoj ri aj israelib e itzel xeril ri Ajawaxel

Judges2:14 rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xoyowar chquij ri aj israelib
Judges2:15 Aretak quebe che u banic ch'o'j
Judges2:16 xebuwalijisaj c'u c'amal tak qui be ri xeto'w pa qui k'ab ri xetokin ri jastak quech.

Judges2:21 Rumal ri' man quebenwesaj ta chi bic mawi jun chque ri tinimit ri man xeresaj ta bic ri Josue aretak c'ä c'aslic.”
Judges2:22 Ruc' wa' ri Ajawaxel craj cärilo we ri aj israelib cäquiterenej ri u be ri Ajawaxel jacha' ri xquiban ri e qui mam

Judges8:3 Ri Dios xujach ri Oreb xukuje' ri Zeeb pa i k'ab
Judges8:4 Ri Jedeon e rachil ri oxib sient achijab xebopan chuchi' ri nima' Jordan
Judges8:5 Pa Sucot e c'o wi aretak ri Jedeon xuta' chque ri e c'o chila': “Chibana' tok'ob
Judges8:6 E are' c'u ri c'amal qui be ri aj Sucot xquibij: “¿A xchaptaj pu ri Zeb
Judges8:7 Ri Jedeon xubij chque: “¡Aretak e u jachom chi ri Ajawaxel ri Zeb xukuje' ri Zalmun pa nu k'ab
Judges8:8 Xel chi bic chila' xbe pa Penuel
Judges8:9 ri Jedeon xubij chque: “¡Aretak quintzelej ulok in ch'äcaninak chic
Judges8:10 Ri Zeb xukuje' ri Zalmun e c'o pa Carcor e cachil olajuj mil (15
Judges8:11 Ri Jedeon xutakej ri u be pa ri be ri cusutij rij ri chaki'j uwo sak
Judges8:12 Ri Zeb xukuje' ri Zalmun xebanimajic
Judges8:13 Aretak ri Jedeon xtzelej ulok che u banic ri ch'o'j xoc'ow pa ri k'axebal ri c'o pa Hers
Judges8:14 xuchap jun c'ojol ala aj Sucot
Judges8:15 Xbe c'u ri Jedeon pa Sucot
Judges8:16 Ri Jedeon xebuc'am q'uix pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Judges8:17 Xukuje' xuwulij ri tz'ak re Penuel
Judges8:18 Xuc'ot c'u qui chi' ri Zeb xukuje' ri Zalmun xubij chque: “¿Jachin je quepe ri achijab ri xebicämisaj pa Tabor?” Ri e are' xquibij che: “Je quepetic jas ri at. Chquijujunal je ta ne quepe jujun qui c'ojol ajawinelab.”
Judges8:19 Ri Jedeon xurak u chi'
Judges8:20 C'äte c'u ri' xutak ri Jeter ri nabeal u c'ojol
Judges8:21 Ri Zeb xukuje' ri Zalmun xquibij che ri Jedeon: “¡Chujacämisaj at! ¡Ri achi quetamax u wäch rumal ri u chuk'ab!” Xwalij ri Jedeon
Judges8:22 Xquibij c'u ri aj israelib che ri Jedeon: “At ya' ri xujato' pa qui k'ab ri aj madianib
Judges8:23 Ri Jedeon xubij chque: “Mawi ri in mawi ri e nu c'ojol cujtakan ta na piwi'
Judges8:24 Are c'u ri quinwaj quintz'onoj chiwe
Judges8:25 Ri aj israelib xquilic' jun atz'iak cho ri ulew
Judges8:26 Ronojel ri k'an puak que ri mulk'ab craj xpajan cawinak quieb (42) libra
Judges8:27 Ruc' we k'an puak ri'
Judges8:28 Je xc'ulmataj wa' aretak ri aj madianib xecanaj chuxe' ri qui takanic ri aj israelib
Judges8:29 Ri Jerobaal
Judges8:30 
Judges8:31 Jun ixok ri man kas ta rixokil ri xc'oji' ruc' pa Siquem xc'oji' jun u c'ojol ruc' ri xucoj Abimelec che u bi'.
Judges8:32 Ri Jedeon xcämic aretak sibalaj nim winak chic
Judges8:33 Aretak cäminak chi ri Jedeon ri aj israelib xquixutuj chi can jumul ri Dios
Judges8:34 Xsach ri Ajawaxel pa qui jolom
Judges8:35 man xquiya' ta c'u utzalaj rajil q'uexelal chque ri e ralc'ual ri Jerobaal o ri Jedeon
Judges9:1 Ri Abimelec (u c'ojol ri Jerobaal)
Judges9:2 “Pa ri qui bi' ri e kachalaxic
Judges9:3 Rumal c'u rech chi c'o quebux che ri Abimelec rumal ri' xquinimaj ri xubij chque
Judges9:4 Xquic'am c'u oxc'al lajuj sak puak pa ri rachoch ri Baal-berit
Judges9:5 jawije' xc'oji' wi ri u tat ri Jerobaal
Judges9:6 Aretak xbantaj wa'
Judges9:7 Aretak xretamaj ri Jotam
Judges9:8 Xopan jun k'ij aretak conojel ri che' xcaj xquicoj jun cajawinel
Judges9:9 ‘Jayi'
Judges9:10 E are c'u ri che' xquitz'onoj che ri u che'al higo chi chux cajawinel.
Judges9:11 ‘Jayi'
Judges9:12 E are' c'u ri che' xquitz'onoj chi che ri juwi' uva chi chux cajawinel.
Judges9:13 ‘Jayi'
Judges9:14 Chuq'uisbal
Judges9:15 Are c'u ri juwi' q'uix xubij chque: we kastzij quiwaj che ri in quinux iwajawinel
Judges9:16 Are c'u ri camic quinc'ot i chi': ¿La suc' i banom? ¿La kas ruc' suc'alaj chomanic i cojom ri Abimelec che iwajawinel? Xukuje' ¿la i banom ri suc' che ri Jerobaal xukuje' chque ri e ralc'ual je jacha' ri utzil ri xuban ri are' chiwe ix?
Judges9:17 Ri nu tat xuya' rib pa cämical aretak xch'ojin cuc' ri aj madianib che i to'ic pa qui k'ab;
Judges9:18 are c'u ri ix xixwalij chquij ri e u c'ojol ri nu tat
Judges9:19 Quinbij c'u chiwe camic: We ri ix kas suc' ri i banom camic ruc' ri Jerobaal xukuje' cuc' ri e ralc'ual
Judges9:20 we c'u man je i banom
Judges9:21 Aretak xbitaj wa'
Judges9:22 Ri Abimelec oxib junab xtakan paquiwi' ri aj israelib
Judges9:23 ri Dios xucoj jun itzel uxlabal chquixo'l ri aj Siquem ruc' ri Abimelec
Judges9:24 che u ya'ic rajil u q'uexel ri qui quiq'uel ri oxc'al lajuj (70) u c'ojol ri Jerobaal ri xutixo
Judges9:25 Ri aj Siquem xequicoj eläk'omab ri cäquic'u' quib pa tak ri juyub
Judges9:26 C'o jun k'ij aretak ri Gaal (u c'ojol ri Ebed)
Judges9:27 xebel c'u bic pa tak ri juyub che qui c'amic uva
Judges9:28 Xubij c'u ri Gaal: “We Abimelec ri'
Judges9:29 ¡Ah! ¡We ta in ri c'amal i be
Judges9:30 Aretak ri Zebul ri k'atal tzij re ri tinimit xretamaj jas ri cätajin cutzijoj ri Gaal
Judges9:31 xutak bic qui bixic we tzij ri' che ri Abimelec ri c'o pa Arum: “Ri Gaal (u c'ojol ri Ebed)
Judges9:32 Rumal ri'
Judges9:33 Ak'ab aretak quel ulok ri k'ij
Judges9:34 Xel c'u ulok ri Abimelec chak'ab e rachil conojel ri u winak
Judges9:35 Aretak xel ulok ri Gaal chuchi' ri oquibal rech ri tinimit
Judges9:36 Aretak xerilo
Judges9:37 Ri Gaal xutakej u bixic: “¡Xukuje' cätajin quekaj ulok winak tza'm ri juyub ri cäbix ‘u muxux ulew’ che!
Judges9:38 “¡Chatch'aw c'u camic
Judges9:39 Ri Gaal xnabej chquiwäch ri aj Siquem che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Abimelec.
Judges9:40 Xokatax c'u rumal ri Abimelec
Judges9:41 Ri Abimelec xcanaj can pa Arum
Judges9:42 Chucab k'ij
Judges9:43 xuban ox k'at chque ri e rajch'ojab
Judges9:44 Ri Abimelec xukuje' ri rajch'ojab xecuin che u ch'äquic ri u chi' ri tinimit
Judges9:45 ri Abimelec xuq'uis ri jun k'ij che u ch'äquic ri Siquem c'ä xuch'äc na. Xusach c'u u wäch ri tinimit
Judges9:46 Aretak ri aj Migdal-siquem xquetamaj jas ri u banom ri Abimelec
Judges9:47 Aretak c'u xretamaj ri Abimelec chi conojel qui mulin quib chila'.
Judges9:48 Xbe pa ri juyub Salmon e rachil conojel ri e rajch'ojab
Judges9:49 Conojel xquit'oy jujun u k'ab tak che' xquiterenej c'u bic ri Abimelec c'ä xebopan na pa ri to'bal ib ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri dios El-berit
Judges9:50 Xbe c'u ri Abimelec chrij ri Tebes
Judges9:51 Pa u niq'uiajil ri tinimit ri' c'o jun tac'atic ja
Judges9:52 are c'u ri Abimelec xopan c'ä chuchi' ri u chi' ri tac'atic ja
Judges9:53 Aretak jun ixok xuq'uiak ulok jun ca' ri xkaj puwi' ri u jolom ri Abimelec

Judges9:55 Aretak ri aj israelib xquilo chi xcäm ri Abimelec
Judges9:56 Jewa' xuban ri Dios che u tojic u q'uexel che ri Abimelec

Judges10:1 Oc'owinak chic ri etzelal ri xuban ri Abimelec

Judges10:3 Xwalij chi c'u ri Jair ri aj Galaad
Judges10:4 Ri Jair xec'oji' juwinak lajuj (30) u c'ojol
Judges10:5 Aretak xcäm ri Jair
Judges10:6 Are c'u ri aj israelib xquiban chi jumul ri etzelal chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Judges10:7 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xoyowar chquij
Judges10:8 Wajxaklajuj (18) junab ri aj pilisteyib xukuje' ri aj amonib
Judges10:9 Ri aj amonib xek'ax pa ri nima' Jordan che u banic ch'o'j chrij ri Juda xukuje' ri Benjamin xukuje' ri Eprain; xpe c'u nimalaj c'ax paquiwi' ri aj israelib.
Judges10:10 Xquitz'onoj c'u ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel

Judges10:12 ri aj sidonib
Judges10:13 Pune' c'u je nu banom wa' chiwe

Judges10:16 Ri aj israelib xequesaj bic tak ri diosib ri quequik'ijilaj
Judges10:17 Ri aj amonib xquimulij quib xebekaj pa Galaad che u banic ch'o'j. Xukuje' ri aj israelib xquimulij quib xekaj pa Mizpa che u banic ch'o'j.
Judges10:18 Ri aj israelib ri e jekel pa Galaad xukuje' ri c'amal tak qui be
Judges11:1 Ri Jepte are jun cowilaj ajch'o'j pa ri ulew re Galaad. Ral c'u jun ixok re nim ch'utin

Judges11:3 Ri Jepte xanimaj chquiwäch ri rachalal
Judges11:4 Oc'owinak chi quieb oxib junab
Judges11:5 ri c'amal tak qui be ri aj galaadib xequitak bic tako'n che u c'amic ulok ri Jepte ri c'o pa ri ulew Tob
Judges11:6 xquibij c'u che: “Tasaj
Judges11:7 Ri Jepte xubij chque ri tako'n: “¿La ma ta pu i wetzelam nu wäch ix
Judges11:8 Kas c'u u mac rech chi uj c'o pa jun latz' ri' uj petinak che a tzucuxic
Judges11:9 “We kastzij quiwaj quintzelejic rech quinech'ojin cuc' ri aj amonib
Judges11:10 Ri tako'n xquijiquiba' u bixic che: “Ri Ajawaxel are' ka k'alajisanel chi cäkaban na ronojel ri a bim.”
Judges11:11 Xpe c'u ri Jepte cuc'
Judges11:12 Xebutak c'u bic jujun tako'n ri Jepte ruc' ri cajawinel ri aj amonib che u c'otic u chi': “¿Jas ri cana' chwij chi at petinak che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri nu tinimit?”
Judges11:13 Ri cajawinel ri aj amonib xubij chque ri e u tako'n ri Jepte: “Aretak ri ix ri ix aj israelib xixel ulok pa Ejipt
Judges11:14 Ri Jepte xebutak chi bic niq'uiaj tako'n chic ruc' ri cajawinel ri aj amonib
Judges11:15 je xequibij wa' che: “Are wa' cubij ri Jepte: Uj ri uj aj israelib man c'o ta ulew ka majom
Judges11:16 Aretak xujel ulok pa Ejipt xujoc'ow pa ri chaki'j uwo sak ri c'o chuchi' ri Quiäk Plo xujopan c'u pa Cades.
Judges11:17 Xekatak c'u bic jujun tako'n ruc' ri cajawinel ri aj edomib che u bixic che chi chuya' be chke cujoc'ow pa ri rulew
Judges11:18 Xkatakej c'u binem pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Judges11:19 Xekatak chi c'u bic tako'n ruc' ri Sehon
Judges11:20 Are c'u ri Sehon xquieblaj u c'u'x
Judges11:21 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel
Judges11:22 Xkatokij ronojel ri culew ri aj amoreyib cächapletaj bic chuchi' ri nima' Arnon quetakal c'ä chuchi' ri Jaboc
Judges11:23 ¿La are c'u cawaj camaj chke ri resam ri Ajawaxel chque ri aj amoreyib che u ya'ic chke?
Judges11:24 We ri Quemos ri a dios
Judges11:25 ¿La cächomaj chi c'o na jubik' a banic chuwäch ri Balac? Ri u tat ri Balac are' ri Zipor ri ajawinel re Moab. Ri are' man petinak ta c'u che u banic ch'o'j kuc'.

Judges14:1 C'o jun k'ij xkaj bic ri Sanson pa ri tinimit Timnat

Judges16:1 C'o jun k'ij xbe ri Sanson pa ri tinimit Gaz. Chila' xril wi jun ixok quech nim ch'utin

Judges16:11 Xubij ri Sanson: “We quinyut cuc' c'ac' tak colob ri mawi jumul e cojom
Judges16:12 Ri Dalil xuyut ri Sanson ruc' jujun colob c'ac'
Judges16:13 Ri Dalil xubij che ri Sanson: “¡C'ä a takem nu subic! ¡C'ä cätajin caban banoj tzij chwe!: ¡Chabij chwe jas rajawaxic cäban chawe rech catximitajic!” Ri Sanson xutzelej u bixic che: “Ri rajawaxic u banic awumal chi caquem wukub nu puch'bal ri nu wi' chuxo'l ri bätz' ri caquemic utz c'u u ch'iquic ri ch'ic cabano. Jeri' quintzak na ri nu chuk'ab quinux na jacha' jun apachique achi ri man c'o ta u chuk'ab.” Ri Dalil xuwartasaj ri Sanson
Judges16:14 aretak xbantaj wa' rumal
Judges16:15 Xubij c'u ri Dalil che: “¡Banal tzij! ¿Jasche cachajij anima' cabij chi quinawaj? Ox mul chic awetz'bem nu wäch
Judges16:16 Rumal c'u rech chi sibalaj cucoj u chuk'ab ri Dalil
Judges16:17 je c'u ri' chuq'uisbalil xuk'alajisaj chuwäch ri Dalil ri rawam: “Man c'o ta jun kopininak ta ri nu wi'
Judges16:18 Aretak ri Dalil xretamaj chi kas xuk'alajisaj chuwäch jawije' cäpe wi ri u chuk'ab
Judges16:19 Ri Dalil xuya' ri u jolom ri Sanson paquiwi' ri quieb u ch'ec xuwartasaj c'ut
Judges16:20 Xurak u chi' che: “¡Sanson
Judges16:21 Ri aj pilisteyib xepetic xquichapo
Judges16:22 Nojimal c'ut xeq'uiy chi jumul ri u wi'.
Judges16:23 Ri c'amal tak qui be ri aj pilisteyib xquimulij quib
Judges16:24 Aretak c'u xquil ri winak
Judges16:25 Sibalaj c'u xequicotic
Judges16:26 Xubij c'u ri Sanson che ri ala ri yukeninak che ri u k'ab: “Chinaya' chila' jawije' cuya' quebenchap wi ri rakan tak ja ri e tok'eninak ri rachoch ri Dagon. Quinwaj quintok'ej wib chque.”
Judges16:27 Conojel ri e c'amal tak qui be ri aj pilisteyib e c'o pa ri rachoch ri Dagon

Judges18:1 Pa tak ri junab ri' maja' c'o ajawinel pa Israel. Ri e aj ramak' ri Dan xukuje' maja' c'o culew ri kas ta quech

Judges18:3 Aretak e c'o chic chuxcut ri rachoch ri Micaiy

Judges18:5 Xquibij c'u ri achijab che: “Chatz'onoj che ri Dios chi chubij chawe we utz quel we ka binem ri'.”

Judges19:4 Xukuje' xc'ulax rumal ri u tat ri ixok ruc' quicotemal
Judges19:5 chucaj k'ij

Judges19:22 Aretak sibalaj cätajin quequicotic

Judges19:24 C'o ri nu mia'l ri c'ä k'apoj. Xukuje' c'o ri man kas ta rixokil we achi ri'. Quebenwesaj ulok rech quiban chque jas ri quiwaj. Miban c'u c'ax che we achi ri'.”
Judges19:25 E are c'ut we achijab ri' man xquinimaj taj jas ri xubij ri nim winak chque

Judges20:1 Conojel ri aj israelib

Judges20:4 Ri aj Levi

Judges21:1 Pa Mizpa ri aj israelib xquiban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chi man cäquiya' ta ri qui mia'l che c'ulanem chque ri aj benjaminib.

Ruth1:1 Pa tak ri k'ij aretak e are' quebajawin ri k'atal tak tzij puwi' ri Israel
Ruth1:2 Xrachilaj ri Noemi ri rixokil xukuje' ri e quieb u c'ojol
Ruth1:3 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi xcäm ri Elimelec
Ruth1:4 Xec'uli' c'u na cuc' quieb ixokib aj moabib; jun chque Orp u bi' ri jun chic Rut. Oc'owinak chi c'u lajuj junab
Ruth1:5 xecäm we quieb achijab ri' ri Malon xukuje' ri Quelion
Ruth1:6 C'o jun k'ij xopan u bixic ruc' ri Noemi pa Moab chi ri Ajawaxel xel u c'u'x che ri u tinimit
Ruth1:7 Xuchomaj c'ut u tzelejic pa Juda
Ruth1:8 xubij c'u chque pa ri be: “Jix chixtzelej cho iwachoch
Ruth1:9 chuya' c'u chiwe chi chixc'uli' ta chi jumul quirik ta c'u utzil pa ri iwachoch.” Ri Noemi xebutz'umaj c'ut che qui jachic canok
Ruth1:10 xquibij c'u che: “¡Jayi'! ¡Uj cujbe na uc' la cuc' ri winak la!”
Ruth1:11 Ri Noemi xutij u k'ij: “Chixtzelej canok
Ruth1:12 Jix chixtzelej cho iwachoch. In in ri'j ixok chic rech quinec'ulan ta chi jumul. Pune' ta c'u ne c'o na we eyebal c'uxaj ri' wuc'
Ruth1:13 ¿la quebiweyej ta c'u na chi cätz'akat qui junab
Ruth1:14 Xeboc chi jumul che ok'ej. Chuq'uisbalil c'ut
Ruth1:15 Xubij c'ut ri Noemi che: “Chawilampe'
Ruth1:16 Ri Rut xutzelej c'u u bixic: “¡Mätz'onoj la chwe chi cäya' ta la canok wumal quintas ta c'u wib che la! Quinbe na jawije' ri cäbe wi na la
Ruth1:17 Quinecäm na jawije' ri quecäm wi na la
Ruth1:18 Aretak c'u xril ri Noemi chi ruc' ronojel ranima' craj cärachilaj bic
Ruth1:19 je c'u ri' qui cabichal xquitakej ri qui be c'ä xebopan na pa Belen. Aretak xeboc pa Belen
Ruth1:20 Ri are' xutzelej u bixic chque: “Man quibij ta chic Noemi chwe; C'ayil chixchok chwe
Ruth1:21 Xinel bic waral e nojinak tak ri nu k'ab

Ruth2:1 C'o jun rachalaxic ri Elimelec ri rachajil ri Noemi
Ruth2:2 C'o jun k'ij ri Rut xubij che ri Noemi: “Ya' la chwe chi quinbe pa ri ulew
Ruth2:3 Ri Rut xbe pa ri ulew xoc c'u che qui molic qui jolom sebad ri quetzak canok. Xutaklebej c'ut chi ri ulew ri xopan wi rech ri Booz
Ruth2:4 xopan c'u ri Booz
Ruth2:5 Ri Booz xuc'ot u chi' ri catakan paquiwi' ri ajk'atolob: “¿Jachin we ali ri'?”
Ruth2:6 Ri catakan paquiwi' ri ajchaquib xutzelej u bixic che: “Are' jun aj Moab
Ruth2:7 Xutz'onoj chwe chi chinya' che chi cäteri chquij ri ajk'atolob rech quebusic' tak ri u jolom sebad
Ruth2:8 Xubij c'ut ri Booz che ri Rut: “Chattatabenok
Ruth2:9 chatteren c'u chquij jawije' ri cawil wi chi quechacun wi ri ajk'atolob. Nu yo'm takanic chque ri ajk'atolob ri cätajin quechacunic chi c'o jun muya' latz' chawe. Aretak cächiki'j a chi'
Ruth2:10 Ri Rut xumej rib c'ä cho ri ulew che u c'utic chi c'o u q'uixbal
Ruth2:11 Ri Booz xutzelej u bixic che: “Sibalaj wetamam ronojel ri a banom che u to'ic ri awalib kas aretak cäminak chic ri awachajil
Ruth2:12 ¡Are' ri Dios cäyo'w na rajil u c'axelal chawe! ¡Are' ba' ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios ri Israel ri a tzucum wi to'bal awib
Ruth2:13 Ri are' xutzelej u bixic che: “Ri lal sibalaj cäban la utzil chwe
Ruth2:14 Aretak xurik ri wa'im
Ruth2:15 Aretak c'u xbe chic che qui molic qui jolom tak sebad
Ruth2:16 Chebitzaka' c'u ne can jujun tak qui jolom sebad chque tak ri kas e i ya'taj
Ruth2:17 Ri Rut xebumol qui jolom tak sebad pa ri rulew ri Booz c'a xoc na ri ak'ab. Are c'u ri xmulitaj rumal
Ruth2:18 Xtzelej c'u chupam ri tinimit rekam ri sebad
Ruth2:19 “¿Jawije' ri xatepich'olin wi camic?” xcha' ri Noemi che. “¿Jawije' ri xebamol wi ri q'uialaj tak qui jolom sebad? ¡Tewichital ri je a to'ic wa' u banom!” Ri Rut xutzijoj che ri ralib jachin ruc' ri xepich'olin wi. “Ri achi ri xinepich'olin na wi
Ruth2:20 Ri Noemi xutzelej u bixic che: “¡Chtewichi'x ba' rumal ri Ajawaxel! Ri are' u banom utzil chke camic
Ruth2:21 Xubij chi c'ut ri Rut: “Xukuje' xubij chwe chi chintakej u banic pich'ol cuc' ri u pataninelab ixokib c'ä chq'uis na ri k'atoj.”
Ruth2:22 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Noemi che ri ralib: “Wal
Ruth2:23 Ri Rut xutakej qui molic tak qui jolom sebad cuc' ri u pataninelab ixokib ri Booz c'ä xq'uis na ri k'atoj re ri sebad xukuje' ri re ri trico. U takem c'u ne jekelem ruc' ri ralib.
Ruth3:1 C'o jun k'ij ri Noemi xubij che ri Rut: “Wal
Ruth3:2 Chawilampe'
Ruth3:3 Chabana' ba' ri quinbij chawe: chatatinok
Ruth3:4 Kas utz rilic chabana' jawije' ri cak'oyi' wi che waram. Jät c'ut chapaca' ri u k'u' ri rakan
Ruth3:5 Ri Rut xutzelej u bixic: “Quenbana' na ronojel ri bim la chwe.”
Ruth3:6 Ri Rut xbe pa ri ulew xuban c'u ronojel ri xtak wi rumal ri ralib chuchu'.
Ruth3:7 Ri Booz xwa'ic
Ruth3:8 Niq'uiaj ak'ab chi c'ut
Ruth3:9 “¿At
Ruth3:10 “¡Ri Ajawaxel chattewichinok!” xcha' ri Booz. “Kas c'u camic a c'utum chi at jic che ri k'etz awachajil. Ya'tal chawe chi xatzucuj jun ri c'ojol ta na chnuwäch in
Ruth3:11 Maxe'j awib
Ruth3:12 Pune' c'u ne c'o quinux chawe
Ruth3:13 Chatcanaj c'u can chi' che we chak'ab ri'. We chuwek ri are' craj quebutz'akatisaj ri ya'tal u banic rumal chi c'o cux chawe
Ruth3:14 Ri Rut xwar pa ri ak'ab ri' pa rakan ri Booz. Chucab k'ij c'ä majok chi casakaric xwalijic
Ruth3:15 Xubij c'ut ri Booz che: “Chawesaj ri a k'u' utz c'u u chapic chabana'.” Aretak ri Rut utz chic u chapic ri u k'u' u banom

Ruth3:17 xubij chi c'ut: “Xuya' ulok ronojel we sebad ri' chwe

Ruth4:1 Xbe c'u na ri k'ij ri Booz xet'uyul chuchi' ri oquibal re ri tinimit

Ruth4:3 ri Booz xubij che ri rachalaxic: “Ri Noemi
Ruth4:4 Quinwaj chi cawetamaj
Ruth4:5 Ri Booz xuban we k'alajisanic ri' chuwäch: “Chawetamaj chi we calok' ri ulew pa u k'ab ri Noemi
Ruth4:6 Aretak ri achalaxic xuta' wa'
Ruth4:7 Ojer ulok pa Israel c'o ulok we nak'atisabal ri' che ri colobenic xukuje' che ri c'ulwächinic
Ruth4:8 Ri rachalaxic ri Booz xuresaj jun che ri u peraj xajäb
Ruth4:9 Xubij c'u ri Booz chque ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri e c'o apan chila': “Onojel alak camic cux alak k'alajisanelab chi quebenlok pa u k'ab ri Noemi ronojel ri rech ri Elimelec
Ruth4:10 Xukuje' cux alak k'alajisanelab chi quinc'amowaj ri Rut che wixokil
Ruth4:11 Ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' conojel ri e c'o apanok xquitzelej u bixic: “Je'
Ruth4:12 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel chebuya' q'ui a c'ojol rumal we ixok ri'. Chec'ol q'ui awalc'ual ri man cajilataj taj
Ruth4:13 Jewa' xuban ri Booz xc'uli' ruc' ri Rut. Xurik c'u rib ruc'
Ruth4:14 Xquibij c'ut ri ixokib che ri Noemi: “¡Chk'ijilax ba' ri Ajawaxel chi u yo'm jun u wi' a mam ri coc na il chawe! ¡C'o ta banom wi chi ri u wi' a mam chux ta na nim u banic pa Israel!
Ruth4:15 Ri are' cuya' na cu'lbal c'u'x chawe
Ruth4:16 Ri Noemi xuc'am ri alaj ala che u canajic pa u k'ab rech cuq'uiyisaj.
Ruth4:17 Aretak xil cumal ri c'ulja xquibij: “¡Ri Noemi xralaj jun ral ala!” Ri u bi' ri xquicojo Obed. Are' c'u wa' ri xux u tat ri Isayi u mam ri David.

1Samuel1:1 Pa jun c'olbal pa tak ri juyub re Eprain ri cäbix Rama che

1Samuel2:1 Ri Na' je u banic ch'awem wa' xuban ruc' ri Dios: “Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel wanima' quinquicot umal la e yo'm c'u la c'ac' tak nu chuk'ab. Quincuinic quink'atij qui wäch ri quinquic'ulelaj in c'u to'm la. ¡Quinjajat c'ut!

1Samuel3:1 Ri ala Samuel u takem u patanixic ri Ajawaxel chuxe' ri u takanic ri Eli. Pa tak ri k'ijol ri' c'ä chuc'lawi' cätzijon ri Ajawaxel ruc' jachin jun che u ya'ic jun takquil che; man xak ta amak'el chi c'o jachin caril jun c'utwächinic.

1Samuel10:1 Xpe c'u ri Samuel xuc'am ri aseit

1Samuel10:9 Xak xuwi xel bic ri Saul chuwäch ri Samuel che ri u bic
1Samuel10:10 Aretak xopan ri Saul pa Gabaa rachil ri pataninel rech
1Samuel10:11 Conojel c'ut ri queta'm ulok u wäch nabe
1Samuel10:12 Jun aj chila' xutik u bixic: “¿Jachin ri qui tat wa'?” Chila' c'u xpe wi ri tzij ri cäbixic: “¿La xukuje' ri Saul are' chi jun chque ri e k'axal tak tzij?”
1Samuel10:13 Aretak c'u xquitanaba' ri u k'axexic ri tzij
1Samuel10:14 Xc'ot qui chi' rumal ri rican

1Samuel10:17 Xebusiq'uij c'u na ri Samuel ri aj israelib
1Samuel10:18 chila' c'u xubij wi chque: “Ri Ajawaxel
1Samuel10:19 Are' c'u ri ix camic quiwetzelaj u wäch ri i Dios; ri ix resam pa conojel tak ri u q'ueyowal xukuje' pa tak ri rikoj tak c'ax
1Samuel10:20 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Samuel chi chenakajin conojel ri amak' re Israel
1Samuel10:21 Xuya' chi c'u takanic chi chenakajin ri e aj ramak' ri Benjamin
1Samuel10:22 xquitz'onoj chi c'u jumul che ri Ajawaxel
1Samuel10:23 Xexiq'uin che resaxic ulok pa ri c'olbal ri u c'u'm wi rib. Aretak ri Saul xutac'aba' rib chuwäch ri tinimit
1Samuel10:24 Ri Samuel xuc'ot qui chi' conojel: “¿La iwilom ri xcha'taj rumal ri Ajawaxel che ajawinel? Man c'o ta jun aj israel ri cäjunamataj ta ruc'.” “¡Chyok u k'ij ri ajawinel!” xecha' ri aj israelib.

1Samuel10:26 Xukuje' ri Saul xbe cho rachoch

2Samuel2:6 Ri Ajawaxel cubana' utzil chiwe xukuje' jiquil. In pa we wi

2Samuel2:15 Je c'u ri' che u tijic qui chuk'ab ri e aj Benjamin
2Samuel2:16 Chquijujunal c'ut xequimajila' ri qui c'ulel che ri qui jolom xquijut c'ut tak ri qui ch'ich' re ch'o'j pa ri qui c'alc'a'x
2Samuel2:17 Ri ch'o'j ri xban pa ri k'ij ri' sibalaj c'ax xelic
2Samuel2:18 E c'o c'ut ri oxib ral ri Sarb chi': Ri Joab
2Samuel2:19 Xbe c'u che rokataxic ri Abner man c'u xusach taj ri u ternexic.
2Samuel2:20 Aretak c'u xca'y ri Abner chrij

2Samuel2:22 ri Abner xubij chi che jumul: “¡Chatanaba' ba' wokataxic
2Samuel2:23 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Asael man xutas ta rib

2Samuel2:25 Ri aj benjaminib xquimulij quib chila' ruc' ri Abner
2Samuel2:26 Ri Abner xurak u chi' che ri Joab: “¿La man c'o u q'uisic we cämisanic ri'? ¿La ma ta cach'obo chi xa c'ayil cuc'am ulok wa' chke? ¿Jampa' caya' takanic chque ri a winak chi chiquitanaba' cokataxic ri cachalal?”
2Samuel2:27 Ri Joab xutzelej u bixic: “Kas quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Dios chi we ta mat xabij wa'
2Samuel2:28 Xuyaxtaj c'u takanic ri Joab chi chebeok'isax tak ri trompet conojel c'ut ri winak xquik'il quib xquitanaba' cokataxic ri aj israelib xukuje' u tijic qui chuk'ab cuc'.
2Samuel2:29 Ri Abner xukuje' ri rachijab xquitakej qui be xebe pa ri lianic ri c'o pa Araba ronojel ri jun ak'ab ri'
2Samuel2:30 Ri Joab xutanaba' rokataxic ri Abner xebumulij c'u conojel ri e rajch'ojab
2Samuel2:31 E are c'ut ri rajch'ojab ri David xequicämisaj oxib sient ruc' oxc'al (360) achijab aj Benjamin xukuje' ri e aj Abner.
