2Samuel12:1 Ri Ajawaxel Dios xutak ri Natan che u solixic ri David. Aretak xtaq'ui' ri Natan chuwäch
2Samuel12:2 Ri k'inom man quebajilataj taj ri u chij ri e c'olic xukuje' ri e u wacax
2Samuel12:3 are c'u ri meba' xa jun alaj u chij c'olic ri u lok'om. Are' c'u xq'uiyisanic
2Samuel12:4 Xpe c'u jun k'ij
2Samuel12:5 Ri David sibalaj xpe royowal chrij we achi ri'
2Samuel12:6 ¡Rajawaxic c'ut cucajmulij u tojic ri alaj chij
2Samuel12:7 Xubij c'ut ri Natan che ri David: “¡Lal ri' we achi ri'! Are c'u wa' ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel
2Samuel12:8 xinya' ri rachoch chawe xukuje' ri e rixokil ri awajaw xebenjach pa ak'ab
2Samuel12:9 ¿Jasche man nim ta xawil wi ri nu tzij
2Samuel12:10 Xawetzelaj c'u nu wäch aretak xatokij ri rixokil ri Uriy ri aj hitit rech xaban awixokil che
2Samuel12:11 In
2Samuel12:12 We ri at xac'u' awib che u banic ri xabano
2Samuel12:13 Ri David xucoj rib chupam ri u mac chuwäch ri Natan. “In macuninak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.” Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri Natan che: “Ri Ajawaxel man cuc'äjisaj ta wäch la che ri mac la ri bano la
2Samuel12:14 Rumal c'u rech chi sibalaj nim ri macaj ri banom la chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
2Samuel12:15 Aretak c'u xtzelej ri Natan cho rachoch
2Samuel12:16 Ri David xubochi'j ri Dios puwi' ri ac'al
2Samuel12:17 Ri nimak tak tatayib ri e jekel ruc' pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel quebe che u bochi'xic chi chwalij cho ri ulew
2Samuel12:18 Oc'owinak chi wukub k'ij xcäm ri ac'al
2Samuel12:19 Aretak c'u xril ri David chi cätajin quejasjat ri e pataninel tak rech chquixo'l
2Samuel12:20 Xwalij c'u ri David cho ri ulew
2Samuel12:21 Xc'ot c'u u chi' cumal ri e pataninel tak rech
2Samuel12:22 Xutzelej u bixic: “Aretak c'asal ri ac'al man xinwa' taj xukuje' xinok'ic are pa nu c'u'x chi craj ne quel u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel chwe cuc'asba' c'u canok ri ac'al.
2Samuel12:23 Are c'u ri camic chi cäminak chic ri ac'al
2Samuel12:24 Ri David xucu'bisaj u c'u'x ri Betsabe
2Samuel12:25 Je c'u retamaxic wa' xuya' che ri David rumal ri Natan ri k'axal tzij. Are c'u ri David
2Samuel12:26 Xbe c'u ri Joab che u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj amonib ri e aj Raba
2Samuel12:27 xutak u bixic we takquil ri' che ri David: “In cätajin quincoj nu chuk'ab che u ch'äquic ri Raba
2Samuel12:28 Rumal ri' chemulij la ri ajch'ojab ri e canajinak canok che ch'ojin ruc' ri tinimit quich'äca' c'ut
2Samuel12:29 Xebumulij c'u ri David conojel ri e ajch'ojab xbe chrij ri Raba xech'ojin na ruc' xuch'äc c'ut.
2Samuel12:30 Xresaj c'ut ri u corona ri ajawinel ri re k'an puak ri c'oche ri u jolom ri e c'o abaj che ri sibalaj pakal cajil ri capajan oxc'al oxlajuj (73) libra
2Samuel12:31 e are' c'u ri winak ri c'ä e c'o na canok pa ri tinimit xebucoj chquij k'atbal che'
2Samuel13:1 Ri Absalon
2Samuel13:2 xujal c'u jun yabil che rumal ri u bisoxic
2Samuel13:3 C'o c'u jun ala ri sibalaj utz ruc' ri Amnon ri sibalaj subunel
2Samuel13:4 C'o jun k'ij xuc'ot u chi' ri Amnon
2Samuel13:5 Xcoj c'u u c'u'x rumal ri Jonadab: “Chanima' awib pa ri ch'at chajaluj a yab. Aretak c'u chopan ri a tat che awilic
2Samuel13:6 Xunim c'u rib ri Amnon pa ri ch'at xuban c'u rib chi yawab. Aretak c'u xopan ri ajawinel che rilic ri Amnon xubij che: “¡Bana' la jun tok'ob! Chpet ri wana'b Tamar chpet che u banic quieb nu caxlanwa are' c'u checojow chnuwäch.”
2Samuel13:7 Ri David xutak ri Tamar cho rachoch
2Samuel13:8 Ri Tamar xbe cho rachoch ri u xibal ri Amnon
2Samuel13:9 xeresaj c'ut pa ri xarten xebucoj chuwäch ri Amnon
2Samuel13:10 Aretak c'u e elinak chi bic conojel
2Samuel13:11 Aretak c'u xebukebisaj chuwäch rech cäwa'ic
2Samuel13:12 Ri ali xutzelej u bixic che: “Jayi' nu xibal
2Samuel13:13 ¿Jawije' ta lo ri quinbe ta wi na ruc' ri nu q'uixbal? Are c'u ri yok'bal awe at ri cäbix na pa Israel chi xa at jun ri man c'o ta u no'j. Catinbochi'j chi chinatz'onoj che ri ajawinel
2Samuel13:14 Ri Amnon man xunimaj taj ri xbix che rumal ri ali
2Samuel13:15 Sibalaj c'u nim ri retzelaxic u wäch ri xq'uiy pa ri ranima' ri Amnon
2Samuel13:16 Ri Tamar xutzelej u bixic che: “¡Jayi'
2Samuel13:17 xane' xusiq'uij ri u pataninel xubij che: “¡Chawesaj bic we ixok ri' chrij ri uchi'be utz c'u u tz'apixic ri uchi'be chabana' chuwäch!”
2Samuel13:18 Ri pataninel xresaj bic ri ali chrij ri uchi'be xutz'apij c'ut ri uchi'be chuwäch. Are c'u ri Tamar
2Samuel13:19 xuya' chaj pa u jolom
2Samuel13:20 Xc'ot c'u u chi' rumal ri Absalon ri u xibal: “¿La are' ba' ri a xibal Amnon xbanow wa' chawe? C'o ba jas mabij
2Samuel13:21 Aretak xretamaj ri ajawinel David ronojel ri xc'ulmatajic
2Samuel13:22 Ri Absalon
2Samuel13:23 Quieb junab oc'owinak chi wa'
2Samuel13:24 Xbe c'u ne che rilic ri ajawinel
2Samuel13:25 Ri ajawinel xutzelej u bixic che: “Jayi'
2Samuel13:26 Xubij c'ut ri Absalon: “We ba' man cuya' wa'
2Samuel13:27 Sibalaj c'u xucoj u chuk'ab ri Absalon
2Samuel13:28 Ri Absalon xusuc'umaj jun wa'im jas ri cacoj chuwäch jun ajawinel
2Samuel13:29 Che c'ut
2Samuel13:30 C'a majok c'u quebopanok xeyok u tzijol che ri David chi ri Absalon e u cämisam conojel ri u c'ojol
2Samuel13:31 Xwalij c'u ri ajawinel xujis ri ratz'iak che u c'utic ri k'oxomal xuq'uiak rib cho ri ulew. Conojel ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri e c'o apan ruc' xukuje' xequijisila' ri catz'iak;
2Samuel13:32 are c'u ri Jonadab
2Samuel13:33 Rumal ri'
2Samuel13:34 Xanimaj c'u ne ri Absalon
2Samuel13:35 Xubij c'ut ri Jonadab che ri ajawinel: “Xepe ri c'ojol la
2Samuel13:36 Xak c'u alicha' u q'uisom tzijonem aretak xebopan tak ri e u c'ojol ri ajawinel xquichaplej c'u ok'ej co xquirak qui chi'. Are jun ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri e rach k'atal tak tzij xquiq'uis quib che ok'ej.
2Samuel13:37 Ri Absalon pa re wi
2Samuel13:38 
2Samuel13:39 aretak c'u xoc'ow ri u bisoxic ri cäminak
2Samuel14:1 Ri Joab ral ri Sarb
2Samuel14:2 xutak u c'amic jun ixok pa Teco ri kas cäna'w che ri subunic ri jekel chila'. Xubij che: “Chabana' awib chi bis at c'olic chacojo' awatz'iak bisobal; man cacoj ta c'oc'al chawij
2Samuel14:3 Chatoc c'u chuwäch ri ajawinel jas c'ut ri quinbij bic chawe je u bixic chabana'.”
2Samuel14:4 Xuwi c'u xbitaj bic che ri ixok rumal ri Joab ri cubij na che ri ajawinel
2Samuel14:5 “¿Jas ri a c'ulmam?” xcha' ri ajawinel che. Ri ixok xutzelej u bixic che: “Ri in in malca'n
2Samuel14:6 ri quieb ral we pataninel ech la ri' xech'ojin pa ri juyub; rumal c'u rech chi man c'o ta jachin xjachow qui wäch
2Samuel14:7 Are c'u ri camic conojel ri wachalaxic e walijinak chwij
2Samuel14:8 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri ajawinel che ri ixok: “Jät cho awachoch quinya' c'u na takanic rech catto'ic.”
2Samuel14:9 Ri ixok xutzelej u bixixic che: “Wajawinel xukuje' wajaw
2Samuel14:10 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri ajawinel: “Apachin ta ne ri cacojow a xib
2Samuel14:11 Ri ixok xutakej u bixic: “¡Quinbochi'n che la chi tz'onoj la che ri Ajawaxel ri Dios la
2Samuel14:12 Ri ixok xutakej c'u u bixic: “Chya' ta ba' la chi we pataninel ech la ri' chi chubij ta chi na xa jun tzij chic.” “Chatch'awok” xcha' ri ajawinel.
2Samuel14:13 Ri ixok xc'otoj chi'aj
2Samuel14:14 Kastzij wi chi konojel cujcämic; uj junam ruc' ri ja' ri cajamin cho ri ulew
2Samuel14:15 Je c'u ri'
2Samuel14:16 We c'u ri lal quel c'u'x la chwe
2Samuel14:17 We pataninel ech la ri' cäreyej chi cätzelej la u bixic cuya na quicotemal chwe
2Samuel14:18 Ri ajawinel xutzelej u bix che ri ixok: “Quintz'onoj jun tok'ob chawe chi man c'o ta jas cac'u' che ri quinc'ot wi a chi'.” “Chch'aw la” xcha' ri ixok.
2Samuel14:19 Xc'ot c'u u chi' rumal ri ajawinel: “¿La ma ta kastzij chi are' ri Joab xatunim pa ronojel wa'?” Ri ixok xutzelej u bixic: “Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri bi' la
2Samuel14:20 Xuban c'ut ruc' ri u rayinic chi queq'uextaj ri jastak. Are c'u ri lal sibalaj c'o no'j la chi c'o retamanic jacha' jun aj cajalaj tako'n rech ri Dios ronojel ri cac'ulmataj pa ronojel ri ulew.”
2Samuel14:21 Rumal c'u rech ri xebix che
2Samuel14:22 Xumej c'u rib ri Joab c'a xuya' na ri u palaj cho ri ulew che u c'utic chi nim caril wi
2Samuel14:23 Xwalij c'ut ri Joab xbe pa Jesur che u c'amic ulok ri Absalon rech cätzelej pa Jerusalen.
2Samuel14:24 Ri takanic ri xuya' ri ajawinel chi cäbe pa ri rachoch mopan chuwäch; rumal c'u ri' xbe ri Absalon cho ri rachoch man xuc'utu' ta c'u rib chuwäch ri ajawinel.
2Samuel14:25 Pa ronojel ri Israel man c'o ta jun achi ri sibalaj ta je'l u ca'yebal jacha' ri Absalon
2Samuel14:26 Aretak cusocaj ri u wi' ri cuban chuq'uisbal junab
2Samuel14:27 Ri Absalon e c'o oxib u c'ojol xukuje' jun u mia'l ri Tamar u bi'
2Samuel14:28 Quieb junab xc'oji' ri Absalon pa Jerusalen man xc'ulax ta c'u rumal ri ajawinel.
2Samuel14:29 Ri Absalon xutak u bixic che ri Joab chi chopan ruc' rech cutak bic ruc' ri ajawinel; man xraj ta c'ut ri Joab xpetic. Ri Absalon xutak chi u bixic che chucamul chi capetic
2Samuel14:30 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Absalon chque ri u pataninelab
2Samuel14:31 Ri u pataninelab ri Absalon xebec xequit'ika' k'ak' che ri rulew ri Joab
2Samuel14:32 Ri Absalon xutzelej u bixic che: “Xintak u bixic chawe chi catpet wuc' waral
2Samuel14:33 Xbe c'ut ri Joab che rilic ri ajawinel xuk'axaj c'u che jas ri xubij bic ri Absalon
2Samuel15:1 Oc'owinak chic jun k'ijol
2Samuel15:2 Ak'ab cäwalijic cuya' rib chuchi' ri be
2Samuel15:3 Ri Absalon cubij che: “Ri k'atan tzij ri cato sibalaj suc' utz quinta' ri cabij
2Samuel15:4 Cutik chi c'ut: “¡C'o ta banom wi in ta k'atal tzij puwi' we ulew ri'
2Samuel15:5 Xak c'u u wi' chic
2Samuel15:6 Je c'u cuban wa' ruc' ronojel aj israel ri benam re che rilic ri ajawinel rech cuban ri suq'uilal che
2Samuel15:7 Oc'owinak chi c'u quiejeb junab
2Samuel15:8 Aretak c'o we pataninel ech la pa Jesur
2Samuel15:9 “Cuya' catbe pa jun nimalaj utzil.” Xcha' ri ajawinel che. Xbe c'ut ri Absalon pa Hebron.
2Samuel15:10 Xebutak c'u bic jujun tako'n cuc' conojel tak ri amak' re Israel che u bixic chque chi
2Samuel15:11 Xebusiq'uij c'u bic quieb sient achijab aj Jerusalen rech quebe ruc'
2Samuel15:12 Ri Absalon xukuje' xutak u siq'uixic jun chque ri ya'l tak u no'j ri David
2Samuel15:13 Xopan c'u jun ya'l tzijol ruc' ri David xuya' u bixic che chi ri aj israelib benak canima' che u ternexic ri Absalon.
2Samuel15:14 Xuya' c'u takanic ri David chque conojel ri e c'o ruc' chuxe' ri u takanic pa Jerusalen
2Samuel15:15 Xquibij c'ut we winak ri' che ri ajawinel: “Ri uj ka yo'm ka tzij che u banic ri takanic ri cäya' la.”
2Samuel15:16 Xel c'u bic ri ajawinel xachilax bic cumal conojel ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch
2Samuel15:17 Aretak c'u elinak chi ulok ri ajawinel xukuje' conojel ri e achilaninak
2Samuel15:18 Conojel c'u ri e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic xquicholajij quib pa tak uxcut
2Samuel15:19 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' xubij ri ajawinel che ri Itay
2Samuel15:20 C'ä iwir c'u ne xatopanic
2Samuel15:21 Ri Itay xutzelej u bixic che ri ajawinel: “Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel Dios xukuje' chwäch la
2Samuel15:22 “Chatteren ba chkij
2Samuel15:23 Conojel ri tinimit winak sibalaj cäquiq'uis quib che ri ok'ej xeboc'ow pa ri alaj nima' Sedron; xoc'ow c'ut ri ajawinel conojel c'ut ri winak xenabej chuwäch ri ajawinel are' xquitakej ri be ri cäbe pa ri chaki'j uwo sak.
2Samuel15:24 Xukuje' benak ri Sadoc chquixo'l conojel ri aj levitib ri e u c'aninak bic ri caxa ri c'o wi ri u c'ulwächinic ri Dios
2Samuel15:25 Xubij c'ut ri ajawinel che ri Sadoc: “Chac'ama' bic ri u caxa ri Dios chatzelej pa ri tinimit
2Samuel15:26 We c'u cubij chwe chi man cutok'obisaj ta chnuwäch
2Samuel15:27 Xukuje' xubij ri ajawinel che ri Sadoc ri cojol tabal tok'ob: “Chawilampe'
2Samuel15:28 Are c'u ri in
2Samuel15:29 Ri Sadoc xukuje' ri Abiatar xquic'am bic ri u caxa ri Dios xquitzelej pa Jerusalen
2Samuel15:30 Ri David xpaki' cho ri u Juyubal u Che'al Aseitun; cät'annaj ri quieb rakan cätajin cok'ic
2Samuel15:31 Aretak c'u xtzijox che ri David chi ri Ahitopel are jun chquixo'l ri e aj Absalon ri xquiwalijisaj quib
2Samuel15:32 Aretak xopan ri David puwi' ri juyub jawije' caya' wi k'ijilanic che ri Dios
2Samuel15:33 Ri David xubij che: “We catteri chwij
2Samuel15:34 we c'u cattzelej pa Jerusalen cabij c'u che ri Absalon: we pataninel ech la ri' cäc'oji' na che patanixic la je jas ri xinc'oji' nabe che u patanixic ri tat la'; quinato' na che qui yojixic tak ri e u chomanic ri Ahitopel
2Samuel15:35 ix oxib c'ut quitola' tak iwib
2Samuel15:36 E c'o c'ut ri e quieb qui c'ojol cuc': ri Ahimaas u c'ojol ri Sadoc xukuje' ri Jonatan u c'ojol ri Abiatar
2Samuel15:37 Ri Husay
2Samuel16:1 C'ä maja' c'u naj coc'ow ri David che ri u wi' ri juyub
2Samuel16:2 Ri ajawinel xuc'ot u chi'
2Samuel16:3 “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri ri' u mam ri awajaw?” xcha' ri ajawinel che. “Canajinak can pa Jerusalen” xcha' ri Sib
2Samuel16:4 “Utz ri'” xcha' ri ajawinel che
2Samuel16:5 Aretak ri ajawinel David xopan pa Bahurim
2Samuel16:6 xukuje' cätajin cuq'uiak abaj che ri David xukuje' chque ri e chajil tak rech ri David ri e teren chrij; lak'aputal c'u ri ajawinel cumal ri winak xukuje' ri chajil tak rech ri e tereninak
2Samuel16:7 ri Simeiy cätajin cuc'okoj je cubij wa: “¡Chatelubic waral
2Samuel16:8 ¡Ri Ajawaxel Dios u c'äjisam a wäch cumal conojel ri nimak tak il ri e a banom chque ri e rachalaxic ri Saul rech at catajawin che u q'uexwäch! ¡Are c'u ri camic ri Ajawaxel u jachom ri ajawibal pa u k'ab ri a c'ojol Absalon
2Samuel16:9 Are c'u ri Abisay
2Samuel16:10 Xutzelej c'ut u bixic ri ajawinel che: “We c'ulmatajic ri' man c'o ta iwech ix che
2Samuel16:11 Xbextax c'u u wäch ruc' ri Abisay xukuje' cuc' ri e rach k'atal tak tzij
2Samuel16:12 Craj c'u ne aretak ri Ajawaxel caril ri c'axc'obic ri in c'o wi
2Samuel16:13 Ri David xukuje' ri rachijab xquitakej ri qui be
2Samuel16:14 Aretak ri ajawinel xukuje' ri winak ri e achilaninak xebopan chuchi' ri nima' Jordan
2Samuel16:15 Xoc c'u ne ri Absalon pa Jerusalen achilatal cumal conojel ri aj israelib xukuje' rumal ri Ahitopel.
2Samuel16:16 Are c'u ri Husay ri arquit
2Samuel16:17 Ri Absalon xuban we c'otoj chi'aj ri' che
2Samuel16:18 “Man cuya' taj je quinban wa'” xcha' ri Husay
2Samuel16:19 Ri u cab jasach
2Samuel16:20 Chumatam chi c'u jubik' ri Absalon xuc'ot u chi' ri Ahitopel
2Samuel16:21 Ri Ahitopel xutzelej u bixic che ri Absalon: “Chatk'oyol cuc' ri man kas ta e rixokil ri a tat
2Samuel16:22 Xtanix c'u jun cäbal ri lic'om che ri Absalon puwi' ri ja
2Samuel16:23 pa ri k'ijol ri'
2Samuel17:1 Xubij chi c'ut ri Ahitopel che ri Absalon: “Chaya' chwe chi quebencha' cablajuj mil achijab
2Samuel17:2 Aretak c'u cosinak chic xukuje' tukarinak chic
2Samuel17:3 quinban c'u na chi conojel ri winak quebutzir awuc' jacha' ri cuban ri ali ri c'äte xc'uli'c ri cutzir ruc' ri rachajil. Ri catzucuj are ri u cämical jun achi; conojel c'ut ri winak quecanaj pa jamaril.”
2Samuel17:4 Ri chomanic xkaj pa u jolom ri Absalon xukuje' pa qui jolom conojel ri aj Israel ri e ya'l tak u no'j.
2Samuel17:5 Ri Absalon xutak u siq'uixic ri Husay ri aj arquit
2Samuel17:6 Aretak xopan ri Husay chuwäch ri Absalon
2Samuel17:7 Ri Husay xutzelej u bixic che
2Samuel17:8 Ri lal eta'm la chi ri tat la xukuje' ri e rachil sibalaj e cowilaj tak achijab
2Samuel17:9 Kas camic u c'u'm rib ri' pa jun pec o pa apachique c'ubal ib chic. Jun jasach chic
2Samuel17:10 xukuje' c'u ne ri cowilaj achi na
2Samuel17:11 Are c'u ri camic
2Samuel17:12 Cäkaj c'u na ri tat la pa ka k'ab pa apachique c'olbal ri c'o wi. Cujkaj c'u na puwi' jacha' ri räxk'ab ri cakaj puwi' ri uwächulew
2Samuel17:13 We c'u ne cuto' rib pa jun tinimit
2Samuel17:14 Ri Absalon xukuje' conojel ri aj israelib xquibij chi are utz na ri no'j ri xuya' ri Husay chuwäch ri xuya' ri Ahitopel. (Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xchoman u yojixic ri jicalaj no'j ri xuya' ri Ahitopel rech cuc'am ulok ri etzelal puwi' ri Absalon.)
2Samuel17:15 Xubij c'u ri Husay chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri Sadoc xukuje' ri Abiatar ri yo'w no'j ri u yo'm ri Ahitopel che ri Absalon xukuje' chque ri nimak tak tatayib re Israel
2Samuel17:16 Rech quebixtax aninak che ri David
2Samuel17:17 C'o c'ut ri Jonatan xukuje' ri Ahimaas pa En-rojel
2Samuel17:18 Xebilitaj c'u rumal jun ala
2Samuel17:19 Chanim c'ut ri rixokil we achi ri' xuyaxtaj jun tz'alam puwi' ri c'ua' xulic c'u trico puwi'. Man c'o ta c'u jachin jun xetaman wa'.
2Samuel17:20 Aretak c'u xebopan ri terenel tak rech ri Absalon
2Samuel17:21 Aretak c'u e tzelejinak chi bic ri tzucunelab
2Samuel17:22 Ri David xukuje' conojel ri winak ri e achilaninak aninak xewalijic xek'ax ch'käp che ri Jordan. Aretak c'u xsakar ri ucab k'ij
2Samuel17:23 Aretak c'u xril ri Ahitopel chi man xbantaj ri xubij xuquiejej ri u bur xbe cho rachoch
2Samuel17:24 Xopan ri David pa Mahanaim pa ri jok'otaj aretak xk'ax ri Absalon pa ri nima' Jordan e rachil conojel ri aj israelib.
2Samuel17:25 Ri Absalon are xucoj ri Amas che c'amal qui be ri ajch'ojab
2Samuel17:26 Ri Absalon e rachil ri aj israelib xekaj pa ri ulew Galaad
2Samuel17:27 aretak c'u xopan ri David pa Mahanaim
2Samuel17:28 Xequic'am bic ch'at chque
2Samuel17:29 juyubal räx cab
2Samuel18:1 Ri David xebusolij ri e rajch'ojab
2Samuel18:2 Xutak c'u bic jun qui roxil ri banal ch'o'j chuxe' ri u takanic ri Joab
2Samuel18:3 Xquitzelej c'u u bixic che: “Jayi'
2Samuel18:4 “Are ba' quinban na ri qui wilo chi takal u banic.” Xutzelej u bixic ri ajawinel chque
2Samuel18:5 Xuya' c'u bic takanic ri ajawinel che ri Joab
2Samuel18:6 Xebe c'ut ri ajch'ojab che u c'ulaxic quib cuc' ri ajch'ojab re Israel. Ri ch'o'j xbantaj pa ri c'ache'laj ri c'o pa Eprain
2Samuel18:7 xech'äcataj c'ut ri aj Israel cumal ri e terenel tak rech ri David. Xecäm c'u q'uialaj ajch'ojab pa ri k'ij ri'
2Samuel18:8 Ri ch'o'j xulic' rib pa ronojel ri ulew
2Samuel18:9 Ri Absalon
2Samuel18:10 Are c'u ri xilow wa'
2Samuel18:11 Ri Joab xutzelej u bixic che' “We c'u xawilo
2Samuel18:12 Ri achi ri' xutzelej u bixic che ri Joab: “Pune' ta ne caya' jun mil puak chwe
2Samuel18:13 Jun jasach chic
2Samuel18:14 “Man quintakej ta u tzakic nu k'ij awuc'” xcha' ri Joab; xebuc'am c'u bic oxib ch'ab
2Samuel18:15 Xepe c'u lajuj chajil rech ri Joab xiquisutij rij ri Absalon
2Samuel18:16 Ri Joab c'ut xuya' takanic chi chok'isax ri trompet
2Samuel18:17 Xquic'am c'ut ri u cuerp ri Absalon

2Samuel19:1 Aretak ri winak xquetamaj chi ri ajawinel cok'ic xukuje' cubisoj ri u cämic ri u c'ojol Absalon
2Samuel19:2

2Samuel19:4 Are c'u ri ajawinel u takem u ch'ukic ri u palaj
2Samuel19:5 Xbe c'ut ri Joab chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel
2Samuel19:6 Ri lal c'utum la camic chi man nim ta quebil wi la ri e qui nimal tak ri ajch'ojab xukuje' ri ajch'ojab
2Samuel19:7 chel ba' la bic chanim
2Samuel19:8 Xwalij c'u bic ri ajawinel xet'uyul chuchi' ri tinimit. Aretak c'u xquetamaj conojel ri winak ri e c'o ruc' chi t'uyul ri ajawinel chuchi' ri tinimit
2Samuel19:9 Pa conojel tak ri amak' Israel ri winak quech'a'ch'a'tic caquibij c'ut: “Ri ajawinel David xcuinic xujuto'tajisaj pa qui k'ab ri ka c'ulel
2Samuel19:10 Are c'u ri Absalon

2Samuel19:12 Chibij chque chi man c'o ta jasche e are' ri quebux ta q'uisbal che nu tzelexic e wachalal c'ut uj junam amak'.”
2Samuel19:13 Xukuje' xuya' chic we takanic ri'

2Samuel19:27 Xubana' c'u tzij chwij chwäch la. Are c'u ri lal xak lal junam ruc' jun aj chicajalaj u tako'n ri Dios cuban c'u na jachique ri utz carilo.
2Samuel19:28 Pune' c'u conojel ri e rachalaxic ri nu tat ya'tal ri qui cämisaxic chwäch la

2Samuel19:30 Are' c'u ri Mepi-boset xutzelej u bixic che: “Chcanaj ronojel ruc'. Ri nim u banic chi ri lal lal tzelejinak ulok pa ri achoch la utz wäch la man c'o ta xc'ulmaj la.”
2Samuel19:31 Are c'u ri Barzilay
2Samuel19:32 Sibalaj c'u nim winak chic

2Samuel19:34 Ri Barzilay xutzelej u bixic che: “Xa e quieb oxib junab chic in c'aslic che ri quinbe ta c'u uc' la pa Jerusalen.
2Samuel19:35 C'o chi c'ut jumuch' (80) nu junab; man quinna' ta chi c'ut ri u qui'al ri quinwe'j mawi ri quinwuq'uiaj
2Samuel19:36 Xak xuwi c'u xinpe che achilaxic la che k'axexic la chupam ri Jordan
2Samuel19:37 Are c'u ne quintz'onoj jun tok'ob che la chi chya' la chwe chi quintzelej pa ri nu tinimit rech quinecäm chila' quinmuk c'u na pa ri qui mukbal ri e nu nan nu tat. C'o chi c'u jun pataninel che la: ri nu c'ojol Quimam. Oj ri are' uc' la
2Samuel19:38 Ri ajawinel xutzelej u bixic che: “Chpet ba' ri Quimam wuc'

2Samuel20:3 Aretak xtzelej ri David pa ri rachoch ri c'o pa Jerusalen
2Samuel20:4 Xuya' c'u takanic ri ajawinel che ri Amas
2Samuel20:5 Xbeytaj c'ut ri Amas man je ta xel ri k'ij ri xch'ic che.
2Samuel20:6 Xubij c'ut ri David che ri Abisay: “Ri Seba nim na ri c'ax ri cubana' na chke chuwäch ri xuban ri Absalon. Chatnabej ba' chquiwäch ri wajch'ojab; chaterenej pa rakan
2Samuel20:7 Ri rachijab ri Joab

2Samuel20:10 Ri Amas man xuchajij ta rib che ri ch'ich' ri xuchap ri Joab. Ruc' aninakil xujulupij ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j chupam
2Samuel20:11 Jun c'ut chque ri rajch'ojab ri Joab xuya' rib chuxcut ri u cuerp ri Amas

2Samuel20:13 Aretak c'u xesetaj pa ri be

2Samuel20:15 Aretak ri rachijab ri Joab xebopan pa Abel-bet-maac

2Samuel21:1 Pa tak ri u k'ijol ri David xc'oji' jun wi'jal ri xbeytaj oxib junab xutakej rib. Xuta' c'ut ri David che ri Ajawaxel; ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che: “Ri wi'jal petinak cumal ri cämisanic ri xuban ri Saul e rachil ri rachalaxic
2Samuel21:2 Ri David xebusiq'uij ri aj gabaonib xtzijon c'u cuc'. (Ri aj gabaonib man aj israelib taj
2Samuel21:3 Ri David xuc'ot qui chi' xuta' chque
2Samuel21:4 Ri aj gabaonib xquitzelej u bixic che: “Man puak taj ri cäyo'w latz' chkaxo'l ruc' ri Saul xukuje' ri rachalaxic
2Samuel21:5 Ri e are' xquitzelej u bixic: “Che ri achi ri are ta xraj xusachisaj ka wäch xebuban c'u chomanic jas ta ri xuban che u q'uisic tzij pakawi' rech ma ta quilitaj chi ka wäch pa ronojel ri ulew pa Israel
2Samuel21:6 cakaj chi quejach wukub rija'lil pa ka k'ab

2Samuel21:11 Aretak c'u xbix che ri David ri u banom ri Rizpa

2Samuel21:14 xemuk c'ut ri u bakil ri Saul xukuje' ri e rech ri Jonatan jawije' ri mukutal wi ri Sis

2Samuel22:1 Ri David xubixoj we bix ri' che ri Ajawaxel aretak xto'tajisax rumal ri Ajawaxel man xkaj ta pa u k'ab ri Saul xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri xquiban qui c'ulel che.
2Samuel22:2 Je xubij wa': “Lal
2Samuel22:3 nu Dios
2Samuel22:4 Lal
2Samuel22:5 Ri cämical xinuputzcuyij pa tak ri u rekbala'; xina' xe'n ib chuwäch ri u tza'm ja' ri cämisanel.
2Samuel22:6 Ri cämical xinuralij pa tak ri u colobal; ¡xinkaj chquipam tak c'amibal cämisanelalab!
2Samuel22:7 Pa tak ri welebal ch'u'j xinsiq'uij ri Ajawaxel
2Samuel22:8 Xpe c'u jun nimalaj cabrakan xyicopitaj ri ulew: xeyicopitaj tak ri e u tac'alibal ri caj; xetotax rumal ri royowal ri Ajawaxel.
2Samuel22:9 Xel ulok sib pa u tza'm
2Samuel22:10 Xupac ri ch'ukuwinak ri caj
2Samuel22:11 Xquiejen chrij jun aj cajalaj to'banel ri e c'o u xic'
2Samuel22:12 Xuban u cäbal ri lic'om re be che ri tzatzalaj k'ekumalil ri sutininak rij xukuje' tak ri sutz' ri e nojinak che ja'.
2Samuel22:13 Jun jolk'inic cäcaypanic xel bic chuwäch; xejabin rachak k'ak' quenicowic.
2Samuel22:14 Ri Ajawaxel
2Samuel22:15 Xebuq'uiak ri u ch'ab
2Samuel22:16 Xc'utun ri u xe' ri plo; xk'alajin ri u tz'akatil ri uwächulew
2Samuel22:17 Ri Dios kas chicaj xulic' wi ulok ri u k'ab chwe
2Samuel22:18 Xinresaj pa qui k'ab ri nu c'ulel ri c'o na qui cuinem ri caquetzelaj nu wäch ri c'o na qui chuk'ab chnuwäch.
2Samuel22:19 Xquitij u banic' c'ax chwe aretak in kajinak pa c'ax
2Samuel22:20 Xinresaj pa qui k'ab; ¡xinuto'tajisaj rumal rech chi in lok' chuwäch!
2Samuel22:21 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm chwe ri rajilal u q'uexelal ri takal che ri ch'ajch'ojalaj nu c'aslemal
2Samuel22:22 Ri in are nu takem ri u be ri Ajawaxel; ¡mawi jumul nu xutum ta can ri nu Dios!
2Samuel22:23 Man e sachinak ta c'ut conojel tak ri u takanic pa nu jolom; ¡mawi c'u jumul nu jech'obisam ta wib chquij tak ri u pixab!
2Samuel22:24 In bininak colom chuwäch; nu najtajisam wib che ri etzelal.
2Samuel22:25 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm rajilq'uexelal chwe rumal ri ch'ajch'ojalaj nu c'aslemal chuwäch.
2Samuel22:26 Ri lal Ajawaxel
2Samuel22:27 lal ch'ajch'oj ruc' ri ch'ajch'oj
2Samuel22:28 Lal quebeto'tajisaj la ri e mach'amoj
2Samuel22:29 Lal
2Samuel22:30 Ruc' ri to'banic la quinq'uis na tzij puwi' ri c'ulel quebenxalk'atij c'u tak na ri nimak tak qui tapia ri qui tinimit tak.
2Samuel22:31 Ri u be ri Dios tz'akat; ri u chi'nic ri Ajawaxel takal u jiquibaxic c'uxaj chrij. ¡Ri Dios cuto' qui wi' conojel ri caquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij!
2Samuel22:32 ¿Jachin ta chic ri Dios
2Samuel22:33 Ri Dios are' nu panibal c'o u cuinem
2Samuel22:34 ri quebuya' wakan ri quexiq'uinic
2Samuel22:35 ri qui nu tijoj che u banic ch'o'j ri quebuya' nu chuk'ab che qui tanixic tak ri q'uiakbal ch'ab re k'an ch'ich'.
2Samuel22:36 Lal cäto'w la nu wi' xukuje' quito'tajisaj la; ri utzil la u banom chwe chi utz in elinak.
2Samuel22:37 Banom la chi man c'ax taj ri nu be
2Samuel22:38 Ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe xebenterenej pa cakan
2Samuel22:39 ¡Xinsachisaj qui wäch! ¡Xinban ch'akatak chque! Man xewalij ta chic: ¡xetzakic xebentac'alej!
2Samuel22:40 Lal xyo'w la nu chuk'ab pa ri ch'o'j; xban la chi ri co xquitac'aba' quib xquimej quib chnuwäch
2Samuel22:41 chi ri quinquic'ulelaj xebanimaj chnuwäch. Aretak c'u je xbantaj wa' xincuinic xinsachisaj qui wäch ri caquetzelaj nu wäch.
2Samuel22:42 Xquitz'onoj chi que to'ic
2Samuel22:43 ¡Xebenque'j xebux c'u puc'uc' ulew! ¡Xeben xak'alej jacha' ri t'ac xo'l tak ri ja!
2Samuel22:44 Xinto'tajisaj la pa ri tijoj chuk'ab cuc' ri nu tinimit ri xech'ach'at chwij
2Samuel22:45 Aretak quebentako queniman chwe; winak ri man e nu winak taj quinkaj chquiwäch
2Samuel22:46 winak ri man e nu winak ta cäquixe'j quib
2Samuel22:47 ¡Yokok u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Tewichitalic ri to'l wech! ¡Nimarisax u k'ij ri Ajawaxel
2Samuel22:48 Are' Dios wa' ri yowinak rajil c'axelal chwe e u jachom c'u tak ri tinimit pa nu k'ab.
2Samuel22:49 Ri are' quinuto'tajisaj quinresaj pa qui k'ab ri e nu c'ulel
2Samuel22:50 Rumal ri' quink'ijilan che la chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit quebenbixoj c'u na bix che ri bi' la.
2Samuel22:51 Queya' la nimak tak ch'äcanic che ri ajawinel ri cha'om la; amak'el quel c'u'x la che ri David xukuje' chque ri e rija'lil.”

2Samuel24:6 Xebe chi c'u pa Galaad xukuje' pa Cades

2Samuel24:16 Aretak c'u ri tako'n aj caj c'o chic che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Jerusalen c'ax xuna' ri Ajawaxel ri xc'ulmatajic

2Samuel24:18 Kas pa ri k'ij ri' ri Gad xbe che rilic ri David

1Kings6:4 Ri Salomon xebuban tak wenta'n che ri rachoch Dios cuc' k'atibal
1Kings6:5 xukuje' xuban jun ja ri u tikem rib ruc' ri nim tapia ri sutininak rij ri ja
1Kings6:6 Ri ja ri u tikem rib ruc' ri nim tapia quetan quieb bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj u wäch; ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil
1Kings6:7 Pa ri u yaquic ri rachoch Dios xecoj abaj ri tz'akat qui tzoq'uic

1Kings6:12 “Chupam c'ut we rachoch Dios ri' ri cätajin cayaco
1Kings6:13 
1Kings6:14 Ri Salomon xuq'uis u yaquic ri rachoch Dios.
1Kings6:15 Xuchaplej c'u qui ch'ukic tak ri tapia chupam ri ja cuc' tak tz'alam re chacalte'. Xebuch'uk che tz'alam ajsic c'ä iquim
1Kings6:16 Xuban chi c'ut jun ja re julajuj (11) bara' chuq'uisbalil ri rachoch Dios
1Kings6:17 Ri alaj tak ja ri c'o chuwäch ri rachoch Dios
1Kings6:18 Ronojel ri u pam ri rachoch Dios xch'uk che tz'alam re chacalte' ri banom tak cotz'i'j xukuje' qui wäch tak che chquiwäch tak ri tz'alam. Ronojel re chacalte'. Mawi ta ne jun abaj quilitajic.
1Kings6:19 Ri Salomon xusuc'umaj ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal chupam ri rachoch Dios
1Kings6:20 Ri u pam ri Tastalicalaj C'olbal quetan julajuj bara' ri u rabic
1Kings6:21 Xuch'uk c'ut ri u pam ri rachoch Dios ruc' utzalaj k'an puak xukuje' ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal
1Kings6:22 Jewa' xubano xuch'uk ronojel ri Rachoch Dios ruc' k'an puak
1Kings6:23 Xebuban c'u quieb qui wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' re u che'al aseitun che ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal. Chquijujunal quebetan job bara' ruc' niq'uiaj qui taq'ui'c
1Kings6:24 chquijujunal tak ri qui xic' quebetan quieb bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj. Jeri' chi che ri jun u tza'm
1Kings6:25 Ri quieb wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xak junam quetabalil; job bara' ruc' niq'uiaj quebetanic
1Kings6:26 Ri qui taq'ui'c xukuje' job bara' ruc' niq'uiaj quebetanic.
1Kings6:27 Ri Salomon xebuya' chupam ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal. We e wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri' ri e c'o qui xic' qui lic'om ri qui xic'
1Kings6:28 Ri Salomon xuch'uk quij ri wächbal ri quieb aj cajalaj to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' ruc' k'an puak.
1Kings6:29 Chquiwäch c'u conojel ri tapia ri e c'o chupam ri Rachoch Dios xukuje' ri e c'o chrij xebuban qui wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri c'o qui xic'
1Kings6:30 Xukuje' ri cäbinibex chupam ri rachoch Dios xuch'uk ruc' k'an puak ri u pam xukuje' ri rij.
1Kings6:31 Che ri oquibal chupam ri Tastalicalaj C'olbal xebuban tak oquibal re u che'al aseitun
1Kings6:32 Ri quieb oquibal u che'al aseitun
1Kings6:33 Che ri oquibal chupam ri nimalaj ja ri rech ri rachoch Dios
1Kings6:34 Ri quieb u xak ri oquibal e re tz'inchäj
1Kings6:35 Xebuban qui wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' chquiwäch
1Kings6:36 Xusuc'umaj ri u catas uwo ja xucoj oxcholaj tzoc'om tak abaj xukuje' jocholaj tem re chacalte'.
1Kings6:37 Pa ri ucaj junab ri rajawinic ri Salomon
1Kings6:38 chupam c'ut ri julajuj junab ri rajawinic Salomon
1Kings7:1 Ri Salomon xuyac ri kas rachoch
1Kings7:2 Xukuje' xuyac ri rachoch ajawinel ri cäbix “C'ache'laj re Libano che”
1Kings7:3 We tem tak ri' e cawinak job (45)
1Kings7:4 E c'o ox cholaj wenta'n ri e banom pa tak ox ox cholaj
1Kings7:5 Conojel tak ri oquibal xukuje' tak ri wenta'n e cajtakxcut e qui calawichim c'u tak quib
1Kings7:6 Xukuje' xuban ri Nimalaj Ja ri e c'o tak Tok'ebal chupam
1Kings7:7 Xuban c'u xukuje' ri Nimalaj Ja re K'atbal Tzij
1Kings7:8 Ri nimalaj ja ri c'o wi ri Salomon
1Kings7:9 Conojel tak we ja ri'
1Kings7:10 Ri e qui tiq'uilibal xukuje' e re tak abaj ri pakal tak cajil
1Kings7:11 Ri e abaj ri xecoj paquiwi' xukuje' abaj ri pakal tak cajil
1Kings7:12 Chuchi' c'ut ri u quetic ri nim uwo ja e c'o ox cholaj abaj
1Kings7:13 Ri ajawinel Salomon xutak u c'amic ri Hiram pa Tir
1Kings7:14 ral c'ut jun malca'n aj ramak' ri Neptali ruc' jun aj Tir ri cacuin che u chacuxic k'an ch'ich'. Ri Hiram sibalaj cacuinic xukuje' reta'm c'ut ri kas u chacuxic apachique chac re k'an ch'ich'
1Kings7:15 Xebuban quieb rakan ja re k'an ch'ich'
1Kings7:16 Xebuban quieb retz'balil re k'an ch'ich' rech queya' paquiwi' ri rakan tak ja. Ri qui taq'ui'c tak ri retz'balil e cacab bara' ruc' oxib k'abaj.
1Kings7:17 Xukuje' xebuban quieb c'at ri e pach'um ri banom wikbal chque
1Kings7:18 Xebuban xukuje' quieb c'am crabaj ri quecoj chquij ri c'at
1Kings7:19 Ri quieb etz'balil ri e c'o paquiwi' ri rakan ja ri e c'o pa ri oquibal xacol man quebetan cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj
1Kings7:20 Chrij xukuje' pa ri qui chicajil ri quetz'balil chquijujunal
1Kings7:21 Ri Hiram xebucoj we rakan tak ja ri' pa ri oquibal chupam ri rachoch Dios. Aretak xecojtaj rumal pa ri qui c'olbal
1Kings7:22 Ri kas e qui wi' tak ri rakan ja quejunamataj ruc' ri xuxa'n. Jewa' ri u tz'akatisaxic ri chac ri xban chque ri rakan ja.
1Kings7:23 Ri Hiram are chi xuban jun nimalaj c'olbal ja' re k'an ch'ich'. Quetequic c'ut
1Kings7:24 Chuxe' ri u chi' ri c'olbal ja'
1Kings7:25 We c'olbal ja' ri' tiq'uil paquiwi' cablajuj (12) ama'ib tak wacax re k'an ch'ich'
1Kings7:26 Ri u pimal ri c'olbal ja' quiejeb u wi' k'abaj; ri u chi' je ta ne ri u banic jun lak re xuxa'n
1Kings7:27 Xukuje' xebuban lajuj tac'alibal e re k'an ch'ich'
1Kings7:28 Ri e tac'alibal je qui banic wa' xebanic e c'o k'atibal tak chquipam ri e chaptalic
1Kings7:29 paquiwi' ri k'atibal tak qui pam ri e chaptalic e c'o qui wächbal tak coj
1Kings7:30 Chquijujunal ri jujun tak tac'alibal e c'o cajcaj qui quetet re k'an ch'ich' ri e jutum tak balul chquipam ri xukuje' re k'an ch'ich'. Pa ri quiejeb u ch'u'c ri tac'alibal
1Kings7:31 Ri u chi' ri c'olbal ja' c'o chupam jun k'atibal ri quebel quieb k'abaj chicaj. Ri u chi' quetequic
1Kings7:32 Ri quiejeb quetet e c'o chquixe' ri k'atibal qui pam
1Kings7:33 xak c'u junam qui banic cuc' tak ri u quetet ri carwaj. Ri e balul
1Kings7:34 Ri e quiejeb tok'ebal ri e c'o pa tak ri u ch'u'c ri jujun tac'alibal
1Kings7:35 Ri u wi' ajsic
1Kings7:36 Ri Hiram xebuban ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'
1Kings7:37 Jewa' xuban che qui banic tak ri lajuj tac'alibal conojel xebuban pa k'ak' xak junam qui banic xukuje' quetabalil.
1Kings7:38 Xukuje' xebuban lajuj c'olbal ja' re k'an ch'ich'. Chquijujunal quebetan cacab bara' ruc' jun k'abaj
1Kings7:39 job tac'alibal xeya' pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri rachoch Dios ri job chic pa ri u mox k'ab. Ri nimalaj c'olbal ja' xya' pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri ja
1Kings7:40 Ri Hiram xebuban tak t'uy
1Kings7:41 Ri xebuban tak quieb rakan tak ja
1Kings7:42 ri quiejeb sient (400) crabaj ri c'o chque ri quieb c'at
1Kings7:43 ri lajuj tac'alibal
1Kings7:44 ri nimalaj c'olbal ja' yabal ja'
1Kings7:45 e c'o chi c'u wi ri' ri t'uy tak
1Kings7:46 Ri ajawinel xebuban wa' pa k'ak' pa tak molte re sanyeb
1Kings7:47 Sibalaj c'u q'ui tak ri chaconisan re k'an ch'ich' chi man xoc ta chi il ri Salomon chi xubantaj chi xepajtaj.
1Kings7:48 Ri Salomon xukuje' xutak qui banic tak ri chaconisan ri e c'o can nabe chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel: ri porobal re k'an puak

1Kings9:1 Aretak ri Salomon xuq'uis u yaquic ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel
1Kings9:2 xuc'ut rib ri Ajawaxel chuwäch chucamul
1Kings9:3 xubij c'u che: “Nu c'amowam ri ch'awem ri a banom xukuje' ri bochi'nic ri a banom chwe nu tasom c'ut we ja ri' ri a yacom jacha' jun jekelibal che ri nu bi' amak'el. Amak'el c'ut quinchajij na man cäsach ta c'u pa nu jolom.
1Kings9:4 Are c'u ri camic
1Kings9:5 in quinjekeba' na ri awajawinic amak'el pa Israel
1Kings9:6 We c'u ri ix xukuje' ri e i c'ojol caquitas quib chwij
1Kings9:7 in quinbok na ri Israel pa ri ulew ri nu yo'm chque
1Kings9:8 Are c'u we wachoch ri'
1Kings9:9 Cätzelex c'u na u wäch ri u tzij are xbanowic chi xquixutuj can ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios

1Kings9:13 xubij c'ut: “¿Jas qui banic wa' chi we tak tinimit ri yo'm la chwe
1Kings9:14 Ri k'an puak ri xuya' ri Hiram che ri ajawinel Salomon

1Kings9:16 ri paraon
1Kings9:17 Ri Salomon xuban utzalaj u yaquic ri Jezer
1Kings9:18 ri Baalat xukuje' ri Tamar

1Kings9:20 E aretak c'u ri amoreyib

1Kings9:22 Man c'o ta c'u jun aj israel ri xucoj ta che lok'om pataninel
1Kings9:23 E are' tak c'ut ri e qui nimal rajch'ojab ri Salomon ri e u cojom paquiwi' tak ri chac
1Kings9:24 Ri u mia'l ri paraon xk'ax chupam ri u Tinimit ri David chupam ri rachoch ajawinel ri xuyac ri Salomon che. Xebunojisaj tak ri siwan ri c'o chrij ri tinimit.
1Kings9:25 Ri Salomon oxmul pa jun junab quebuchi'j tak tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob re utzirisan tak ib puwi' ri porobal ri xuyac che ri Ajawaxel. Jewa' ri u q'uisic u yaquic ri rachoch Dios.

1Kings10:3 ri Salomon xutzelej qui wäch conojel ri c'otoj tak chi'aj ri xuban che. Man c'o ta jun chque ri c'otoj tak chi'aj ri ma ta xcuin che u tzelexic u wäch.

1Kings10:5 ri q'uialaj tak jastak ri quecoj chuwäch pa ri mexa

1Kings10:10 Ri ixok ajawinel xujach jumuch' wukub (87) quintal k'an puak
1Kings10:11 C'o chi c'u wi ri'

1Kings10:15 Mawi xijilax ri cuchuj ri caquitoj ri ajc'ayib
1Kings10:16 Ri ajawinel Salomon xutak qui banic quieb sient (200) nimak tak quetecak tak ch'ich'
1Kings10:17 Xukuje' xutak qui banic oxib sient (300) ri e quetecak tak ch'ich' ri ch'utik na que k'an puak
1Kings10:18 Xukuje' xutak u banic jun je'licalaj tem re ajawibal re marpil
1Kings10:19 Ri tem re ajawibal xcoj wakib pakalibal che; ri u tem re ajawibal chrij c'o jun retz'balil quetequic xukuje' tok'ebal pa tak u xcut ri t'uyulibal
1Kings10:20 Xukuje' c'o cablajuj (12) coj ri e chacachoj pa tak qui xcut ri wakib pakalibal. ¡Mawi jumul yacom ta pa jun ajawibal jastak ri e junam ta ruc' wa'!
1Kings10:21 Conojel c'ut ri queruq'uiaj wi ri e ruq'uia' ri ajawinel e re k'an puak
1Kings10:22 ri e u jucub tak ri ajawinel ri quebe pa Tarsis xa' jumul quebec quetzelej ulok pa oxib junab
1Kings10:23 Ri ajawinel Salomon xoc'ow na u banic chquiwäch conojel tak ri ajawinelab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew pa ri u k'inomal xukuje' ri u no'j.

1Kings10:25 conojel c'ut caquic'am bic jun sipanic che chujunab: jastak re sak puak xukuje' k'an puak

1Kings12:18 Aretak c'u ri Roboam xutak bic ri Adoram
1Kings12:19 Ri Israel je xuban wa' che resaxic rib chuxe' ri cajawinic ri e rija'lil ri David c'ä camic.
1Kings12:20 Aretak xquetamaj ri aj israelib chi tzelejinak ulok ri Jeroboam
1Kings12:21 Aretak xopan ri Roboam pa Jerusalen
1Kings12:22 Are c'u ri Dios xutzijobej ri Semaiy
1Kings12:23 “Chabij che ri Roboam (ri u tat ri Roboam are' ri Salomon ri are' ajawinel pa Juda)
1Kings12:24 chi quinya' takanic chque chi maquitij qui chuk'ab cuc' ri cachalal aj israelib. Che tzelej conojel cho tak cachoch
1Kings12:25 Ri Jeroboam cuban u yaquic ri tinimit Siquem
1Kings12:26 Xuchomaj c'ut: “Ri u c'ojol ri David cacuin che u k'axexic ronojel ri ajawibal pa u k'ab
1Kings12:27 we quebe we winak pa Jerusalen che qui chi'xic tabal tak tok'ob chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Cäbe chi c'u na canima' ruc' ri Roboam
1Kings12:28 Chomatajinak chi c'ut
1Kings12:29 Xucoj c'u jun pa Betel
1Kings12:30 Are' c'u xbanow wa' chi xmacun ri Israel
1Kings12:31 Xebuyac c'u tak k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib. Xebucoj c'u cojol tak tabal tok'ob ri quepe pa tak ri e tinimit
1Kings12:32 Xujekeba' c'u roc'owisaxic jun nimak'ij pa ri olajuj (15) rajilabal ri uwajxak ic'
1Kings12:33 Jeri'
1Kings13:1 Aretak ri Jeroboam cätajin cuporoj ri c'oc' k'ol puwi' ri porobal
1Kings13:2 Rumal c'ut ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel co xurak u chi' che u c'ulelaxic ri porobal
1Kings13:3 Kas pa ri k'ij ri'
1Kings13:4 Aretak ri ajawinel Jeroboam xuta' ri xubij ri k'axal tzij ri cutaklebej na ri porobal ri c'o pa Betel
1Kings13:5 Pa ri jok'otaj ri'
1Kings13:6 Xbe c'u u wäch ri ajawinel ruc' ri k'axal tzij xubij che: “Catinbochi'j chi chatch'aw panuwi' ruc' ri Ajawaxel
1Kings13:7 Xubij c'ut ri ajawinel che ri k'axal tzij: “Tasaj wuc'
1Kings13:8 Xutzelej c'u u bix ri k'axal tzij che ri ajawinel: “Pune ta ne cäya' la pa niq'uiaj che ri achoch la chwe
1Kings13:9 je c'u takanic wa' u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chwe. Xubij chwe: ‘Mat wa'ic
1Kings13:10 Ri k'axal tzij pa jun be chi xbe wi
1Kings13:11 Pa ri k'ijol ri' jekel jun k'axal tzij pa Betel ri nim winak chic
1Kings13:12 Xc'ot c'u qui chi' rumal ri qui tat: “¿Jachique be xutakej?” Ri e u c'ojol xquibij ri be che ri xtzelej wi ri k'axal tzij aj Juda.
1Kings13:13 Xubij chque ri e u c'ojol: “Chitasa' rij jun bur chwe.” Je c'u xquibano
1Kings13:14 xquiejen c'ut ri k'axal tzij xuterenej bic ri k'axal tzij re Juda. Xurika' t'uyul chuxe' jun bakit
1Kings13:15 “Tasaj cho wachoch
1Kings13:16 Ri k'axal tzij aj Juda xutzelej u bixic che: “Man cuya' taj quinwachilaj la bic
1Kings13:17 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel u yo'm jun q'uiakalicalaj takanic chwe: ‘Mat wa'ic
1Kings13:18 Xucoj c'u u chuk'ab ri nim winak: “In xukuje' in k'axal tzij
1Kings13:19 ri k'axal tzij re Juda xbe ruc'
1Kings13:20 Aretak c'u e t'uyut'uj pa ri mexa
1Kings13:21 ruc' c'u rakoj chi'aj xubij we nim winak ri' che we k'axal tzij ri': “Ri Ajawaxel u bim chi rumal rech chi man xanimaj taj ri takanic ri xuya' chawe
1Kings13:22 xattzelej c'u che u tijic a wa awuq'uia' jawije' ri xuya' wi takanic chawe chi man cabantaj
1Kings13:23 Aretak ri k'axal tzij aj Juda xuq'uis u tijic ri u wa ruq'uia'
1Kings13:24 xbe c'ut ri k'axal tzij re Juda. Xel c'u ulok jun coj chrij pa ri be xcämisax c'u rumal
1Kings13:25 Xeboc'ow c'u jujun achijab xquil c'ut ri cäminak ri jilin pa ri be
1Kings13:26 Xretamaj
1Kings13:27 Xubij c'u chque ri u c'ojol chi chquitasa' rij jun bur
1Kings13:28 Xbe c'ut ri k'axal tzij ri nim winak xurika' ri cäminak jilin pa ri be
1Kings13:29 ri k'axal tzij ri nim winak xuwalijisaj ri u cuerp ri k'axal tzij re Juda
1Kings13:30 Xumuk chupam ri u mukubal
1Kings13:31 Aretak c'u muktajinak chic
1Kings13:32 cätz'akat c'u na ri' ri xuya' u bixic rumal ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel ri cuc'ulmaj na ri porobal ri c'o pa Betel xukuje' ri qui c'okoxic tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib ri c'o chquipam tak ri tinimit re Samar.”
1Kings13:33 Pune' je xc'ulmataj wa'
1Kings13:34 Rumal rech chi je cäban wa' are' xbanowic chi xemacun ri rija'l ri Jeroboam
1Kings14:1 Pa ri k'ijol ri'
1Kings14:2 Xubij c'ut ri Jeroboam che ri rixokil: “Jät

1Kings14:4 Je c'u xuban ri rixokil ri Jeroboam
1Kings14:5 yo'm c'u retamaxic che rumal ri Ajawaxel chi ri rixokil ri Jeroboam copan ruc' che u ch'obic jas cuc'ulmaj na ri ral
1Kings14:6 Aretak ri Ahiy xuta' ri u pa rakan ri ixok ri xoc chuchi' ri oquibal
1Kings14:7 chattzelej ba' chabij che ri Jeroboam chi ri Ajawaxel
1Kings14:8 In xinwesaj ri ajawinic chque ri e rija'lil ri David
1Kings14:9 ri at sibalaj at itzel na chquiwäch ri xec'oji' can nabe chawäch; at
1Kings14:10 Rumal ri' quinc'am ulok ri c'axc'olil paquiwi' ri awija'lil: quinban na chi quecäm conojel ri awija'l achijab pa Israel; mawi jun cac'asi' ta canok. Quebenmes na bic ri e awija'lil
1Kings14:11 Ri e awija'lil ri quecäm chupam ri tinimit quetijow na cumal tz'i'; e are' ri quecäm pa ri juyub quetijow na cumal awaj ri e c'o qui xic'

1Kings14:13 Ronojel c'ut ri Israel carok'ej na

1Kings14:15 ri Ajawaxel cutota' na ri Israel jacha' cuban ri nima' quebutota' tak ri aj. Cubok c'u na chupam we utzalaj ulew ri' ri xuya' chque ri e qui mam
1Kings14:16 Ri Ajawaxel cujach na ri Israel qui mac quech ri macaj ri xebuban ri Jeroboam xuban c'ut chi xmacun ri Israel.”
1Kings14:17 Xwalij c'ut ri rixokil ri Jeroboam xbe c'ut
1Kings14:18 Ronojel Israel xbe che u mukic xrok'ej c'ut
1Kings14:19 Ri q'uisbal u tzijobelil ri Jeroboam
1Kings14:20 Ri Jeroboam juwinak quieb (22) junab xajawinic
1Kings14:21 Pa Juda cätajin cajawin wi ri Roboam
1Kings14:22 Ri e u banoj tak ri Roboam e itzel chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
1Kings14:23 xukuje' c'u ri e are' xequiyac k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi tak diosib xequitac'aba' tak abaj xukuje' tastalicalaj tak cuta'm paquiwi' tak ronojel tac'atak tak juyub xukuje' chquixe' conojel jewejak tak che'.
1Kings14:24 Xukuje' tak ri achijab re ri ulew cäquiban ri qui mac ri nim ch'utin jacha' ta ne che jun k'ijilanic
1Kings14:25 Pa ri uro' junab rech ri rajawinic ri Roboam
1Kings14:26 xutokij bic ri k'inomal ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri c'o chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel. Ronojel xujoc bic
1Kings14:27 Ri ajawinel Roboam xebuban quetecak tak ch'ich' re k'an ch'ich' che qui q'uexwäch
1Kings14:28 Amak'el c'ut aretak ri ajawinel cäbe pa ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel
1Kings14:29 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Roboam xukuje' ronojel ri xubano
1Kings14:30 Amak'el xc'oji' ch'o'j chquixo'l ri Roboam ruc' ri Jeroboam
1Kings14:31 aretak c'u xcäm ri Roboam
1Kings15:1 Ri Abiam xuchaplej ajawinic pa Juda pa ri wajxaklajuj (18) junab rech ri rajawinic ri Jeroboam (ri u tat ri Jeroboam are' ri Nabat).
1Kings15:2 Oxib junab xajawin pa Jerusalen. Maac u bi' ri u nan
1Kings15:3 Ri Abiam xebuban ri junam tak macaj ri xebuban ri u tat nabe
1Kings15:4 Xa' c'u
1Kings15:5 ri David utz xbinic xya' c'u u k'ij rumal ri Ajawaxel
1Kings15:6 Amak'el xc'oji' ch'o'j chquixo'l ri Roboam ruc' ri Jeroboam joropa' k'ij xc'asi' ri Roboam.
1Kings15:7 Xukuje' xc'oji' ch'o'j chquixo'l ri Abiam ruc' ri Jeroboam. Ri q'uisbal u tzijobelil ri Abiam xukuje' ronojel ri xubano
1Kings15:8 Aretak c'u xcäm ri Abiam
1Kings15:9 Ri As xuchaplej ri ajawinic pa Juda pa ri juwinak (20) junab rech ri rajawinic ri Jeroboam pa Israel
1Kings15:10 cawinak jun (41) junab c'ut xajawin pa Jerusalen. Ri rati't Maac u bi' u mia'l c'ut ri Absalon.
1Kings15:11 Ri e u banoj tak ri As e utz xeril ri Ajawaxel
1Kings15:12 Xerokataj bic ri achijab chrij ri ulew ri cuc'axic quib cuc' achijab ixokib che qui banic macunic jacha' ta ne jun k'ijilanic
1Kings15:13 Xukuje' xeresaj ri u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri nanaxel ajawinel che ri Maac
1Kings15:14 Pune' c'u man xebesax taj tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi tak ri diosib
1Kings15:15 xuya' c'u chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri k'an puak ri sak puak ri u bim are' xukuje' ri u tat chi e rech ri Ajawaxel.
1Kings15:16 Amak'el xc'oji' ch'o'j chquixo'l ri As ruc' ri Baas
1Kings15:17 Aretak ri Baas xbe che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Juda
1Kings15:18 Xpe c'u ri As xuc'am ronojel ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak ri c'ä e c'o chupam ri u k'inomal ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri rachoch ri ajawinel
1Kings15:19 “Kabana' jun c'ulwächinic awuc'
1Kings15:20 Ri Ben-adad xuc'am ri xutak u bixic ri ajawinel As che xebutak c'u bic ri e qui nimakil tak ri e rajch'ojab che qui ch'äquic tak ri tinimit re Israel. Xuch'äc c'ut ri Ijon
1Kings15:21 Aretak xretamaj ri Baas
1Kings15:22 Are c'u ri ajawinel As xutak u siq'uixic ronojel ri Juda
1Kings15:23 Ri u q'uisbalil ri tz'akatalaj u tzijobelil ri As xukuje' tak ri e u cuinem
1Kings15:24 aretak c'u xcämic xmuk cuc' ri e u mam chupam ri u Tinimit ri David. Are chi xajawin ri u c'ojol che u q'uexwäch
1Kings15:25 Pa ri ucab junab ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings15:26 Man utz ta c'ut xril ri Ajawaxel ri e u banoj; xebuban ri junam tak macaj ri xuban ri u tat
1Kings15:27 Are c'u ri Baas
1Kings15:28 Ri Baas xucämisaj ri Nadab pa ri urox u junab rech ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings15:29 Xuchaplej ajawinic
1Kings15:30 Je c'u xc'ulmataj wa' qui mac quech tak ri macaj ri xuban ri Jeroboam
1Kings15:31 Ri u q'uisbalil ri u tzijobelil ri Nadab che ronojel ri xubano
1Kings15:32 Amak'el xc'oji' ch'o'j chuxo'l ri As ruc' ri Baas ajawinel pa Israel.
1Kings15:33 Pa ri urox junab rech ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings15:34 Ri e u banoj tak ri Baas man e utz ta xeril ri Ajawaxel
1Kings16:1 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Ajawaxel che ri Jehu
1Kings16:2 “Ri in xatinwalijisaj chupam ri puc'uc' ulew xatincoj c'u che c'amal u be ri Israel
1Kings16:3 Rumal ri'
1Kings16:4 Apachin ta ne ri awija'lil ri cacäm pa ri tinimit
1Kings16:5 Ri u q'uisbalil ri Baas
1Kings16:6 Aretak xcäm ri Baas
1Kings16:7 Rumal c'ut ri Jehu ri k'axal tzij
1Kings16:8 Pa ri juwinak wakib (26) junab ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings16:9 are' c'u ri Zimri
1Kings16:10 Xak c'u c'ätetal xopan ri Zimri che u cämisaxic
1Kings16:11 Xak xuwi xpaki' ri Zimri puwi' ri tem re ajawibal xuchaplej c'u ajawinic
1Kings16:12 Je c'u wa' xuban ri Zimri che u sachisaxic u wäch ri rachalaxic ri Baas
1Kings16:13 qui mac tak conojel ri e u mac ri Baas xukuje' ri u mac tak ri Ela ri u c'ojol
1Kings16:14 Ri u q'uisbalil ri u tzijobelil ri Ela xukuje' ronojel ri xubano
1Kings16:15 Pa ri juwinak wukub (27) junab re ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings16:16 kas c'u pa ri k'ij aretak ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o che u banic ch'o'j xquetamaj chi ri Zimri xuwalijisaj rib chrij ri ajawinel u cämisam c'ut
1Kings16:17 Ri Omri xukuje' conojel ri ajch'ojab aj israelib xquitanaba' u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri Jibeton
1Kings16:18 Aretak xril ri Zimri chi xch'äc ri tinimit
1Kings16:19 Xc'ulmataj wa' qui mac quech tak ri macaj ri xebubano xukuje' qui mac tak quech ri itzel tak banoj ri xebuban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
1Kings16:20 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Zimri xukuje' ri u walijisaxic rib chrij ri ajawinel Ela
1Kings16:21 Are' c'u ri tinimit re Israel xquiban quieb. Niq'uiaj are' ta xcaj chi ri Tibni
1Kings16:22 Chuq'uisbalil
1Kings16:23 Ri Omri xuchaplej ajawinic pa Israel pa ri junab juwinak julajuj (31) rech ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings16:24 Xulok' pa u k'ab ri Semer ri juyub Samar chi jun sient cawinak job (145) libra ch'akatak tak sak puak
1Kings16:25 Ri e u banoj tak ri Omri itzel xeril ri Ajawaxel
1Kings16:26 xebuban c'ut ri junam tak macaj ri xebuban ri Jeroboam
1Kings16:27 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Omri xukuje' ronojel ri xubano
1Kings16:28 Aretak xcämic
1Kings16:29 Pa ri juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) junab ri rajawinic ri As pa Juda
1Kings16:30 Man utz ta c'u xril ri Ajawaxel ri u c'aslemal
1Kings16:31 man xuk'il ta rib che qui banic ri junam tak macaj ri xebuban ri Jeroboam
1Kings16:32 xuyac c'u jun porobal xukuje' jun rachoch ri Baal pa Samar.
1Kings16:33 Xukuje' xuban jun u wächbal ri Asera
1Kings16:34 Pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Acab
1Kings17:1 Ri Eliy

1Kings17:3 “Chatel bic waral
1Kings17:4 Chila' cuya' cawuq'uiaj awech ri ja' re ri alaj nima'
1Kings17:5 Ri Eliy xunimaj ri takanic ri xya' che rumal ri Ajawaxel
1Kings17:6 E are' tak c'ut ri joj quequic'am bic caxlanwa xukuje' ti'j che ak'abil xukuje' pa ri xk'ekal. Ri are' caruq'uiaj rech ri alaj nima'.
1Kings17:7 E oc'owinak chi q'ui k'ij xtzaj ri alaj nima' rumal rech chi man c'o ta jäb cho ri ulew.
1Kings17:8 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che ri Eliy:
1Kings17:9 “Chatwalijok jät pa ri tinimit Sarepta

1Kings17:14 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel
1Kings17:15 Xbe ri malca'n che u banic ri xtak che u banic rumal ri Eliy. Q'ui c'ut k'ijol ri ixok rachil ri ral xukuje' ri Eliy xc'oji' qui wa'.
1Kings17:16 Man xq'uis ta ri c'äj ri c'o chupam ri k'ebal mawi ri aseit ri c'o chupam ri xaru'
1Kings17:17 Oc'owinak chi c'u jun k'ijol xkaj ri ral ri malca'n che jun yabil
1Kings17:18 Xubij c'ut ri malca'n che ri Eliy: “¿Jas wech in uc' la
1Kings17:19 “Chac'ama' ulok ri awal chwe” xcha' che ri ixok. Xuc'am c'u pa u k'ab ri malca'n
1Kings17:20 Co c'u u ch'abexic ri Ajawaxel xubano: “Ajawaxel xukuje' nu Dios
1Kings17:21 Oxmul c'ut xujupuba' rib puwi' ri alaj ala
1Kings17:22 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'amowaj ri u bochi'nic ri Eliy
1Kings17:23 Ri Eliy xuc'am ri alaj ala

1Kings18:1 Xbin ri k'ijol
1Kings18:2 Xbe c'ut ri Eliy xuc'utu' rib chuwäch ri Acab. Ri wi'jal ri c'o pa Samar man ch'ijtajel taj.

1Kings18:4 aretak c'ut
1Kings18:5 Ri Acab xubij che ri Abdiy: “Jo'
1Kings18:6 Je c'u ri'

1Kings18:8 “Je'
1Kings18:9 Ri Abdiy xutzelej u bixic che: “¿Jas ri nu mac ri nu banom chi quinjach la pa u k'ab ri Acab quinucämisaj ta c'ut?
1Kings18:10 Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri Ajawaxel ri Dios la chi man c'o ta nim tinimit mawi ajawibal ri ma ta u takom ta wi tzucuxic la ri wajaw; aretak c'u caquitzelej u bixic chi man lal c'o ta chila'

1Kings18:12 Ri quec'ulmatajok chi
1Kings18:13 ¿La ma ta tzijom che la ri xinbano aretak ri Jezabel cätajin quebucämisaj ri e k'axal u tzij ri Ajawaxel? Xebenc'u' c'u jun sient chque
1Kings18:14 ¿La cäbij c'u la camic chi quinbec

1Kings18:16 Ri Abdiy xbe che u rikic ri Acab che u bixic che

1Kings18:18 “Man in taj ri cätajin quinban c'ax
1Kings18:19 Ya' ba la takanic camic chi chequimulij conojel ri aj israelib puwi' ri juyub Carmel
1Kings18:20 Ri Acab xutak qui siq'uixic conojel ri aj israelib
1Kings18:21 Xkeb c'u ri Eliy cuc' conojel ri tinimit
1Kings18:22 Xutakej c'u u bixic ri Eliy: “Xuwi ri in ri in k'axal u tzij ri Ajawaxel ri in c'asal canok
1Kings18:23 Are' c'u ri camic
1Kings18:24 Are' c'u ri ix chebinataj tak ri i diosib

1Kings18:26 We winak ri'
1Kings18:27 Aretak tiq'uil k'ij chic
1Kings18:28 Quitakem u rakic qui chi'
1Kings18:29 Xoc'ow c'ut ri tiq'uil k'ij
1Kings18:30 Xubij c'u ri Eliy chque conojel ri winak: “Chixkeb ulok wuc'.” Conojel ri winak xekeb ruc'
1Kings18:31 Xebuc'am cablajuj (12) abaj
1Kings18:32 xebucoj c'u wa' che u yaquic jun porobal rech ri Ajawaxel; xuc'ot c'u jun u be ja' chrij ri porobal
1Kings18:33 aretak c'u nuc'utajinak chic ri si'
1Kings18:34 Xubij c'ut: “Chebinojisaj quiejeb k'ebal ja' chebik'ija' c'u puwi' ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic cärachilaj ri si'.” Xutak c'u u camulixic xukuje' urox mulixic
1Kings18:35 Ri ja' xbin chrij ri porobal
1Kings18:36 Xopan c'ut ri jok'otaj che u chi'xic ri tabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic
1Kings18:37 ¡Ajawaxel ya' la ulok ri quintz'onoj che la
1Kings18:38 Pa ri jok'otaj ri'
1Kings18:39 Aretak xilitaj wa'
1Kings18:40 Xubij c'ut ri Eliy chque: “¡Chebichapa' tak ri e k'axal u tzij ri Baal! ¡C'o jun manimajic!” Xechap cumal ri winak
1Kings18:41 Xubij c'ut ri Eliy che ri Acab: “Oj la uq'uian la xukuje' che u tijic wa la
1Kings18:42 Ri Acab xbe che u tijic u wa ruq'uia'. Are c'u ri Eliy xpaki' c'ä puwi' ri juyub Carmel
1Kings18:43 xubij che ri pataninel re: “Jät chateca'y c'u chusuq'uil ri plo.” Xbec
1Kings18:44 Chuwukub mul xubij ri pataninel re: “¡Jela'
1Kings18:45 Ri Acab xpaki' chupam ri u carwaj xbe c'u pa Jezreel. Xak c'äte tal
1Kings18:46 Are' c'u ri Eliy
1Kings19:1 Ri Acab xutzijoj che ri Jezabel ronojel ri xuban ri Eliy. Xukuje' ri xuban che u k'atic qui kul conojel tak ri e k'axal u tzij ri Baal.
1Kings19:2 Ri Jezabel xutak jun tako'n che u bixic che ri Eliy: “¡We ri at at Eliy
1Kings19:3 Ri Eliy aretak xuta' chi xak quieb tzij puwi'
1Kings19:4 Xbe c'ut chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak
1Kings19:5 Xk'oyi' c'u chila'
1Kings19:6 Xca'y ri Eliy pa tak u xcut

2Kings4:1 C'o jun ixok
2Kings4:2 Ri Elisey xuc'ot u chi': “¿Jas ta ri quincuinic quinban ta che a to'ic? Chabij chwe jas ri c'o awuc' chupam ri awachoch.” Ri ixok xutzelej u bixic che: “We pataninel ech la ri' man c'o ta jas c'o chupam ri rachoch
2Kings4:3 Xubij c'ut ri Elisey che: “Jät ba' camic jebakaja' jujun tak xaru' cuc' tak ri a c'ulja'
2Kings4:4 Chanima' c'u awib chupam ri awachoch quebawachilaj ri awal
2Kings4:5 Ri ixok xutas rib chrij ri Elisey xutz'apij c'u rib e rachil ri ral. Xuchaplej c'u qui nojisaxic tak ri xaru' ri quequik'axej tak ri ral che.
2Kings4:6 Aretak c'u e nojinak chi conojel ri xaru'
2Kings4:7 Xbe c'u ri ixok che u bixic che ri k'axal tzij
2Kings4:8 C'o jun k'ij xoc'ow ri Elisey pa Sunem
2Kings4:9 Xubij c'ut ri ixok che ri rachajil: “Chawilampe'
2Kings4:10 Kayaca' jun alaj ja puwi' ri ja. Cakacoj jun ch'at
2Kings4:11 C'o jumul xopan pa ri ja ri' rech cäwar chupam
2Kings4:12 xubij che ri Jiez
2Kings4:13 “Chabij che we chuchu' ri' ri sibalaj uj u lok'
2Kings4:14 “¿Jas ta c'ut ri cakato' wi?” “Man weta'm taj
2Kings4:15 “Chasiq'uij
2Kings4:16 Xubij c'ut ri Elisey che: “Che ri junab ri cäpetic
2Kings4:17 Je c'ut jacha' ri xuya' u bixic ri Elisey che
2Kings4:18 Xq'uiy c'ut ri alaj ala. C'o c'ut jun k'ij xel bic che rilic ri u tat
2Kings4:19 xuchaplej u rakic u chi' che ri u tat: “¡C'ax
2Kings4:20 Ri pataninel xuc'amo xuc'am bic jawije' c'o wi ri u nan
2Kings4:21 Xupakaba' c'ut ri ac'al chupam ri u warabal ri k'axal tzij
2Kings4:22 Xusiq'uij c'ut ri rachajil xubij c'u che: “Chataka' ulok jun pataninel ruc' jun ati't bur chwe
2Kings4:23 “¿Jasche catbe che rilic camic?” xcha' ri rachajil che. “Man c'ac' ic' taj mawi uxlanibal k'ij.” “Matoc il
2Kings4:24 Xtakan c'u che u tasic rij jun ati't bur
2Kings4:25 Je xuban wa' che u takexic ri u be xopan c'u puwi' ri juyub Carmel
2Kings4:26 Chatzaka' anim che u c'ulaxic chata' c'u che jacha' c'olic
2Kings4:27 Xbextax c'ut pa ri juyub jawije' ri c'o wi ri Elisey
2Kings4:28 Xubij c'ut ri chuchu' che: “Tat
2Kings4:29 Xubij c'ut ri Elisey che ri Jiez: “Chasuc'umaj awib chac'ama bic ri nu ch'amiy jät c'u chila'. We c'o jachin cac'ulaj pa ri be
2Kings4:30 Are c'u ri u nan ri alaj ala xubij che ri Elisey: “Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
2Kings4:31 Nabejinak c'u ne ri Jiez chquiwäch u yo'm c'u ne ri ch'imiy puwi' ri u palaj ri ala
2Kings4:32 Aretak xoc ri Elisey chupam ri ja
2Kings4:33 Xoc c'u bic
2Kings4:34 Xpaki' c'u puwi' ri ch'at xujupuba' c'u rib puwi' ri alaj ala
2Kings4:35 Xwalij c'ut ri Elisey xwacat pa ri ja; xpaki' chi c'u jumul puwi' ri ch'at xujupulej chi c'u jumul ri u cuerp ri alaj ala. Xat'ixnab c'ut wukub mul ri alaj ala
2Kings4:36 Ri Elisey xusiq'uij ri Jiez xubij c'u che: “Chasiq'uij ri chuchu' aj Sunem.” Ri Jiez je xubano
2Kings4:37 Ri chuchu' xkebic xuq'uiak rib chuwäch ri Elisey; xuc'am c'ut ri ral xel ulok pa ri ja.
2Kings4:38 Xuwi c'u xbantaj wa'
2Kings4:39 Jun chque xelbic xbe pa ri juyub che u molic jubik' ichaj
2Kings4:40 Xcoj c'ut we riquil ri' chquiwäch ri e k'axal tak tzij
2Kings4:41 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Elisey: “Chic'ama' ulok jubik' c'äj chwe.” Xuya' c'ut ri c'äj chupam ri t'uy
2Kings4:42 Xopan c'ut jun achi aj Baal-salis xebuya' juwinak caxlanwa re sebad che ri Elisey ri c'ä te' relic ulok pa jorno
2Kings4:43 Ri pataninel xutzelej u bixic: “¿Jas quinban che u ya'ic wa' che qui tzukic jun sient winak?” Ri Elisey xutzelej u bixic: “Chaya' chque ri winak rech quewa'ic
2Kings4:44 Je c'u ri'
2Kings5:1 C'o jun achi Naaman u bi'
2Kings5:2 Pa jun ch'o'j ri xuban ri Siriy cuc' ri aj israelib

2Kings5:27 Rumal c'u rech wa'
2Kings6:1 C'o jun k'ij

2Kings6:5 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi

2Kings7:1 Ri Elisey xutzelej u bixic: “Chatatabej ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel. Ri Ajawaxel cubij: ‘Je' tak wa' chwek
2Kings7:2 Ri to'l rech ri ajawinel xutzelej u bixic che ri k'axal tzij: “Pune' ta ne quebujak ta wenta'n ri Ajawaxel pa ri caj
2Kings7:3 E c'o c'u
2Kings7:4 We cakaya' ka tzij cujoc chupam ri tinimit
2Kings7:5 Je c'u xquibano
2Kings7:6 Are' c'u xbanow ri Ajawaxel chi ri ajch'ojab aj siriyab xquita' u pa cakan carwaj re ch'o'j
2Kings7:7 Rumal ri' xquiyac quib xebanimaj pa ri roquibal ri chak'abil xequitzak can tak ri qui cäbal ri lic'om re binem
2Kings7:8 Xebopan c'ut ri achijab ri c'o chuwilaj ch'a'c chquij chunakaj ri kajebal ri e c'o wi ri aj siriyab nabe
2Kings7:9 Xquibila' c'u chquixo'l: “Man utz taj ri cätajin cakabano. Camic ri k'ij ri utz u c'amic bic ri utzalaj tzijol
2Kings7:10 Xebe c'ut xequisiq'uij ri e chajil tak rech ri u chi' ri tinimit
2Kings7:11 Ri e chajil tak ri u chi' ri tinimit xequisiq'uij ri e aj rachoch ri ajawinel.
2Kings7:12 Xwalij c'ut ri ajawinel
2Kings7:13 Jun c'ut chque ri e rach k'atal tzij xubij: “Chetak bic jujun achijab chquij job quiej ri c'ä e c'olic
2Kings7:14 Xequic'am c'u quieb carwaj xequicoj tak quiej chque
2Kings7:15 Xebec xequitakej c'ut ri cakan ri aj siriyab c'ä chuchi' ri Jordan
2Kings7:16 Man xquibey ta c'u quib ri winak xebe che quijoquic conojel ri jastak quech ri aj siriyab. Je c'ut
2Kings7:17 Ri ajawinel are xutak ri to'l rech che u chajixic ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit

2Kings7:20 Kas c'u je
2Kings8:1 Ri Elisey xtzijon ruc' ri ixok ri u c'astajisam ri ral
2Kings8:2 Ri ixok xusuc'umaj rib je xubano jas ri no'j ri xya' che rumal ri k'axal tzij: xebuc'am bic ri rachalaxic xk'ax pa ri culew ri aj pilisteyib
2Kings8:3 Aretak c'u xoc'ow we k'ijol ri' ri ixok xpe che rilic ri ajawinel che u bixic che chi chetzelex ri rachoch xukuje' tak ri rulew.
2Kings8:4 Ri ajawinel cätajin cätzijon ruc' ri Jiez
2Kings8:5 Pa ri jok'otaj c'ut aretak ri Jiez cätajin cutzijoj che ri ajawinel jas ri xuban ri Elisey che u c'astajisaxic ri ral jun ixok
2Kings8:6 Ri ajawinel xebuban c'otoj tak chi'aj che ri ixok
2Kings8:7 Xbe c'u na ri Elisey pa Damasc. Pa ri k'ijol ri' cayawaj ri Ben-adad ajawinel re Siriy
2Kings8:8 Xubij c'ut ri ajawinel che ri Hazael: “Chac'ama' bic jun sipanic jät che rilic ri k'axal tzij. Chabij che chi chich'obon che nu q'uexwäch ruc' ri Ajawaxel rech quinwetamaj we man quincäm rumal we yabilal ri'.”
2Kings8:9 Xbe c'ut ri Hazael che rilic ri k'axal tzij

2Kings8:11 Ri Elisey sibalaj co xuca'yej ri Hazael
2Kings8:12 ri Hazael xc'ot u chi': “¿Jasche cok' la nu tat?” Ri Elisey xutzelej u bixic che: “Rumal rech chi weta'm chi cabana' c'ax chque ri aj israelib
2Kings8:13 Ri Hazael xutzelej u bixic che: “¡Ri in man c'o ta nu banic
2Kings8:14 Ri Hazael xuya' can ri Elisey xtzelej chuwäch ri rajaw
2Kings8:15 Chucab c'u k'ij ri Hazael xuc'am jun atz'iak
2Kings8:16 Pa ri uro' junab ri rajawinic ri Joram pa Israel
2Kings8:17 Juwinak cablajuj u junab aretak xuchaplej ajawinic
2Kings8:18 Xutakej c'ut qui banic ri xequiban tak ri ajawinelab re Israel xukuje' ri xequiban ri e rija'lil ri Acab
2Kings8:19 Man xraj ta c'ut ri Ajawaxel xuq'uista tzij puwi' ri Juda
2Kings8:20 Pa ri rajawinic ri Joram
2Kings8:21 Xbe c'ut ri Joram pa Zair xebuc'am bic conojel tak ri e u carwaj re ch'o'j
2Kings8:22 Xcuin c'ut ri Edom xresaj rib chuxe' ri u takanic ri Juda c'ä camic. Xukuje' pa ri k'ijol ri' xutor rib ri tinimit Libna.
2Kings8:23 Ri u q'uisbalil ri u tzijobelil ri Joram xukuje' ronojel ri xubano
2Kings8:24 Aretak xcäm ri Joram
2Kings8:25 Pa ri ucablajuj junab ri rajawinic ri Joram
2Kings8:26 Juwinak quieb u junab aretak xuchaplej ajawinic
2Kings8:27 Ri Ocoziy are' xutakej u banic ri xuban ri Acab xukuje' tak ri e ralc'ual ri xebajawinic
2Kings8:28 Ri Ocoziy xujunaj rib ruc' ri Joram

2Kings9:5 aretak xopan chila'
2Kings9:6 Xwalij u bic ri Jehu xoc pa jun ja chic. Xjamix c'ut ri aseit puwi' ri u jolom
2Kings9:7 At catq'uisow na tzij paquiwi' conojel ri rija'lil ri Acab

2Kings9:10 Are' c'u ri Jezabel

2Kings9:13 Chanim xequimajixtaj c'ut ri qui k'u' xequilic' pa rakan paquiwi' tak ri ak'anibal. Xcok'esaxtaj ri ruc'a' chij xquirak c'u qui chi': “¡Ri Jehu are' ri ajawinel!”
2Kings9:14 Ri Jehu u c'ojol ri Josapat ri' u mam c'ut ri Nimsi
2Kings9:15 tzelejinak pa Jezreel che u cunaxic rib chque tak ri socotajic ri xquiban ri aj siriyab che pa ri ch'o'j ruc' ri Hazael. Xubij c'u ri Jehu chque ri e rachil chi

2Kings9:22 Ri Joram aretak xril ri Jehu
2Kings9:23 Xusutixtaj c'u rib ri Joram xanimajic

2Kings9:25 Ri Jehu xutak ri Bidcar
2Kings9:26 ‘Je jacha' ri iwir xinwil ri u quiq'uel ri Nabot xukuje' ri quech tak ri e u c'ojol

2Kings9:30 Ri Jehu xbe pa Jezreel. Aretak xretamaj ri Jezabel

2Kings9:32 Ri Jehu xbe u wäch pa ri wenta'n

2Kings10:1 Ri Acab e c'o oxc'al lajuj (70) u c'ojol pa Samar
2Kings10:2 “E c'o c'u ya' ri e u c'ojol ri iwajaw iwuc'

2Kings10:4 Xuya' c'u nimalaj xe'n ib wa' chque
2Kings10:5 Are' c'u ri takanel pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel
2Kings10:6 Ri Jehu xebutz'ibaj chi bic chucamul je xubij bic wa': “We ri ix junam i wäch wuc' we c'u qui nimaj tak ri e nu takanic
2Kings10:7 we winak ri' aretak xquic'am ri wuj
2Kings10:8 Aretak xopan ri tako'n xubij che ri Jehu: “E c'amom ulok ri qui jolom ri e u c'ojol ri ajawinel.” Xuya' takanic ri Jehu: “Chibana' camulaj chque chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri tinimit
2Kings10:9 Chucab k'ij xel ulok ri Jehu
2Kings10:10 Kas ba' chiwetamaj chi man c'o ta ri u bim ri Ajawaxel chrij ri Acab ri ma ta catz'akatic. Kas are' ri Ajawaxel banowinak ri xuya' u bixic rumal ri Eliy
2Kings10:11 Ri Jehu xebucämisaj pa Jezreel ri niq'uiaj rija'lil chic ri Acab
2Kings10:12 Xbe c'ut pa Samar
2Kings10:13 chila' c'u xeburik wi ri e rachalal ri Ocoziy
2Kings10:14 Ri Jehu xuya' takanic chque ri e petinak ruc': “E c'asc'oj chebichapa'.” E c'asc'oj xechap cumal ri e petinak ruc'
2Kings10:15 Aretak ri Jehu xel bic chila'
2Kings10:16 xubij c'u che: “Chinawachilaj cawil na ri nu rayinic che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel.” Xuc'am c'u bic chupam ri u carwaj.
2Kings10:17 Aretak c'u xoc pa Samar ri Jehu xebucämisaj conojel ri e rija'lil ri Acab ri c'ä e c'aslic. Xuq'uisisej tzij paquiwi'
2Kings10:18 Xumulij c'ut ri Jehu ronojel ri tinimit
2Kings10:19 Rumal ri' chebisiq'uij conojel ri k'axal u tzij ri Baal
2Kings10:20 rumal ri' xuya' takanic chi cäban jun nimalaj nimak'ij che ri Baal
2Kings10:21 Xebutak c'u bic tako'n pa ronojel Israel
2Kings10:22 Xubij c'u ri Jehu che ri c'olol atz'iak chi cheresaj ulok tak ri atz'iak re patan chque conojel ri e k'ijilal che ri Baal
2Kings10:23 xoc c'u bic ri Jehu xukuje' ri Jonadab chupam ri rachoch ri Baal
2Kings10:24 Ri e k'ijilal ri Baal xeboc chupam ri rachoch ri Baal che qui chi'xic tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic. Are' c'u ri Jehu
2Kings10:25 Aretak ri Jehu xuq'uis u chi'xic ri tabal tok'ob ri cachajirisaxic
2Kings10:26 xequesaj tak ulok tak ri tastalic tak cuta'm xequiporoj c'ut.
2Kings10:27 Xquic'äjij ri porobal xukuje' ri rachoch ri Baal
2Kings10:28 Jeri' ri Jehu xusachisaj u wäch ri Baal pa Israel.
2Kings10:29 Man c'u ne xutas ta rib che qui banic ri macaj
2Kings10:30 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri Jehu: “Utz c'u ya' ri e a banom chnuwäch xukuje' tak ri e a banoj ri e a banom e suc' chnuwäch
2Kings10:31 Pune' c'u je xbix wa' che
2Kings10:32 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ri Ajawaxel Dios xuchaplej u copixic ri rulew ri Israel. Ri Hazael xuchaplej u banic ch'o'j cuc' ri aj israelib pa conojel ri e u c'ulbatil:
2Kings10:33 kas pa ri elebal k'ij che ri Jordan
2Kings10:34 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Jehu xukuje' ronojel ri xubano

2Kings11:1 Aretak ri Ataliy
2Kings11:2 Are' c'u ri Josab
2Kings11:3 ri Joas wakib junab xc'u' chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel. Pa tak ri k'ij ri xajawin ri Ataliy
2Kings11:4 Pa ri uwuk junab
2Kings11:5 Xuya' c'u takanic chque: “Are wa' ri quibana' ix: jun oxil cachajin chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawinel pa ri k'ij re uxlanibal;
2Kings11:6 jun oxil chic cac'oji' chuchi' ri oquibal re Xur; ri jun oxil chic cac'oji' chuchi' ri oquibal chrij ri ja ri e c'o wi ri chajinelab. Je c'u quiban wa' che u jachalalaxic iwib che u chajixic ri rachoch ri ajawinel.
2Kings11:7 Ri cak'at ri caquitanaba' chajinic pa ri k'ij re uxlanem
2Kings11:8 Ri ix quicholajij iwib chrij ri ajawinel chijujunal chiwuc'aj ri i ch'ojibal pa i k'ab
2Kings11:9 Ri e qui nimakil ri ajch'ojab xequiban conojel ri xetak che u banic rumal ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri Joiad. Chquijujunal xequic'am ri takanic paquiwi' tak ri cachijab
2Kings11:10 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob xebujach ri tz'imaj tak ch'ich'
2Kings11:11 Ri chajinelab xec'oji' pa tak ri qui c'olbal
2Kings11:12 Xresaj c'u ulok ri Joiad ri u c'ojol ri ajawinel xucoj ri corona che ri u jolom xukuje' ri niq'uiaj wikbal chic che jun ajawinel
2Kings11:13 Aretak ri Ataliy xuta' ri rakoj tak chi'aj cumal ri chajinelab xukuje' cumal ri winak
2Kings11:14 Xca'y c'u apan che ri ajawinel

2Kings11:16 xquichapo xquesaj bic pa ri coquibal tak ri quiej chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel

2Kings11:18 Xebe c'u conojel chupam ri rachoch ri Baal xquikasaj c'u pa ulew
2Kings11:19 xebuc'am c'ut ri e qui nimakil tak ri ajch'ojab
2Kings11:20 ronojel c'ut ri tinimit xquicotic. Cämisatajinak chi c'ut ri Ataliy chi ch'ich' re ch'o'j chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel
2Kings11:21 Wukub u junab ri Joas aretak xuchaplej ajawinic.

2Kings17:1 Pa ri cablajuj (12) junab ri rajawinic ri Acaz
2Kings17:2 Ri e u banoj e itzel xeril ri Ajawaxel
2Kings17:3 Ri Salmanasar
2Kings17:4 Xretamaj c'ut ri Salmanasar chi ri Osey are' cäraj cuwalijisaj rib chrij
2Kings17:5 xebumajixtaj c'u conojel ri tinimit xch'ojin ruc' ri Samar
2Kings17:6 Chuq'uisbal
2Kings17:7 Xbantaj we c'ulmatajic rumal rech chi ri aj israelib e macuninak chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios
2Kings17:8 xquitakej c'u qui banic quech ri e qui banoj ri nimak tak tinimit ri xerokix bic chquiwäch rumal ri Ajawaxel
2Kings17:9 Che c'u u tz'akat
2Kings17:10 Xukuje' xequitac'aba' tastalic tak abaj xukuje' ri e qui wächbal tak ri Asera paquiwi' tak ri juyub xukuje' tak ri che' ri e k'eku'm qui xak
2Kings17:11 je xquibano jastak ri qui nak'atisabal tak ri winak ri xeresaj bic ri Ajawaxel chquiwäch
2Kings17:12 Xequik'ijilaj tak diosib
2Kings17:13 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm chic u bixic chque ri aj israelib cumal conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij xukuje' cumal ri queca'y pa che' pa abaj chi chequiq'uexa' tak ri itzel tak qui be che qui tz'akatisaj c'ut qui banic tak ri e u takomal xukuje' conojel tak ri pixab re ri tijonic ri e u yo'm chque ri e qui mam cumal ri e pataninel tak rech ri e k'axal u tzij.
2Kings17:14 Man c'u xquinimaj taj ri xbix chque
2Kings17:15 man nim ta xequil tak wi ri e u pixab
2Kings17:16 Xequitzak can conojel tak ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios
2Kings17:17 Xquibano chi xeporox tak ri e qui c'ojol xukuje' tak ri e qui mia'l pa ri k'ak' che tabal tak tok'ob
2Kings17:18 Rumal c'u ri' xpe ri royowal ri Ajawaxel puwi' ri Israel xresaj c'u bic chuwäch
2Kings17:19 Ri Juda xukuje' mawi xebutz'akatisaj qui banic ri e u takomal ri Ajawaxel ri u Dios
2Kings17:20 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xebuxutuj conojel ri quija'lil ri aj israelib xebumach'irisaj ruc' ri qui jachic pa qui k'ab ri quetokin ri jastak quech c'ä xeresaj na bic chuwäch.
2Kings17:21 Xutas ri rija'lil ri David che ri Israel
2Kings17:22 Jeri' ri e aj Israel xequitakej qui banic tak ri junam tak macaj ri xebuban ri Jeroboam
2Kings17:23 Chuq'uisbalil c'ut ri Ajawaxel xresaj na ri Israel chuwäch
2Kings17:24 Ri ajawinel re Asiriy xebuc'am bic winak aj Babilon
2Kings17:25 Rumal c'u rech chi we winak ri' man quek'ijilan ta che ri Ajawaxel
2Kings17:26 Xebe c'u che u bixic che ri ajawinel re Asiriy: “Ri winak ri xebac'am bic pa ri tinimit Samar rech quejeki' chila'
2Kings17:27 Xuya' c'u takanic ri ajawinel re Asiriy: “Chitaka' bic jun chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri xic'am ulok che patanijic
2Kings17:28 Jun c'ut chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri esam ulok pa Samar xbec xejekel pa Betel
2Kings17:29 Chquijujunal c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit xuban ri u dios pa ri tinimit ri e jekel wi
2Kings17:30 Ri e aj Babilon xquiban jun u wächbal ri Sucot-benot; ri e aj Cut xquiban jun re Nergal; ri e aj Hamat xquiban jun Asim.
2Kings17:31 Ri e aj Aba xquiban jun Nibaz xukuje' jun Tartac; ri e aj Separbaim quequiporoj tak ri e qui c'ojol pa ri k'ak' jacha' tabal tok'ob che ri Adramelec
2Kings17:32 Caquiya' c'u k'ijilanic xukuje' che ri Ajawaxel
2Kings17:33 Je c'u ri' pune' quequiya' k'ijilanic che ri Ajawaxel
2Kings17:34 C'ä je c'u cäquiban camic jas ri xquiban nabe
2Kings17:35 Aretak ri Ajawaxel xuban jun c'ulwächinic cuc'
2Kings17:36 Chiya' k'ijilanic chwe in
2Kings17:37 Kas c'u utz qui tz'akatisaxic tak ri pixab ri takanic ri tijonic xukuje' tak ri takomal ri e tz'ibatalic ri e nu yo'm chiwe
2Kings17:38 Masach ri c'ulwächinic pa i jolom ri nu banom iwuc'
2Kings17:39 xane' xuwi chwe in
2Kings17:40 E are c'u we nimak tak tinimit ri'

2Kings18:1 Pa ri urox junab re ri rajawinic ri Osey
2Kings18:2 Juwinak job (25) junab c'ut ri u junab
2Kings18:3 Ri e u banoj tak ri Ezequiy e suc' chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
2Kings18:4 Are' ri xebensan tak ri k'ijilabal ri quek'ijilax wi diosib
2Kings18:5 Ri Ezequiy xujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel
2Kings18:6 Jic xbin chuwäch ri Ajawaxel mawi jumul xutas ta rib chrij
2Kings18:7 Rumal ri' xtok'obisax u wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel cuban c'u che chi ronojel ri chuchaplej u banic utz quel chuwäch. Ri Ezequiy xuwalijisaj rib chrij ri ajawinel re Asiriy man xraj ta chic xupatanij.
2Kings18:8 Xch'äcan c'u paquiwi' ri aj pilisteyib c'ä pa Gaz xukuje' tak ri u c'ulbatil
2Kings18:9 Pa ri ucaj junab ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy
2Kings18:10 c'ä choxib junab c'ut xcuin che u ch'äquic. Are' ri uwak junab re ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy belejeb c'ut re ri rajawinic ri Osey pa Israel aretak xch'äc ri Samar.
2Kings18:11 Ri ajawinel re Asiriy xeresaj bic ri aj israelib xebutak pa Asiriy xebujekeba' c'u pa Halah
2Kings18:12 Xc'ulmataj c'u wa' rumal rech chi man xeniman ta che ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios
2Kings18:13 Pa ri ucajlajuj (14) junab re ri rajawinic ri Ezequiy
2Kings18:14 Ri Ezequiy ajawinel re Juda
2Kings18:15 Ri Ezequiy xujach ronojel ri sak puak ri xurik chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri e c'o chupam ri u k'inomal ri rachoch are'.
2Kings18:16 Pa ri k'ijol ri'
2Kings18:17 Ri ajawinel re Asiriy c'äte' chi c'u xutak chi ulok ruc' ri ajawinel Ezequiy jun qui nimal ajch'ojab ri nim rekle'n
2Kings18:18 Xquisiq'uij c'ut ri ajawinel
2Kings18:19 Chila' ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aj asiriyab xubij chque chila': “Chiya' u bixic che ri Ezequiy ri cubij ri ajawinel ri nim u banic
2Kings18:20 ¿La xa' pu cachomaj chi ri je'lalaj tak tzij xak junam qui k'ij cuc' ri nawinic xukuje' ri chuk'ab che u banic ch'o'j? ¿Jachin chrij a jiquibam wi a c'u'x chi xawalijisaj awib chwij?
2Kings18:21 Quinwilo chi a jiquibam a c'u'x chrij ri to'banic ri cuya' ri Ejipt chawe. Utz ri'
2Kings18:22 We c'u ri ix quibij chwe: ri uj ka jiquibam ka c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel ri ka Dios
2Kings18:23 Chac'ulaj u wäch ri tzij ri cubij ri wajaw chawe
2Kings18:24 Ri at man at ta ticarel che u banic chi jun chque ri e qui nimal ri wajch'ojab ri sibalaj man nim ta u k'ij chquixo'l ri aj asiriyab rech canimajic
2Kings18:25 Xak c'u u wi' chic
2Kings18:26 Ri Eliaquim
2Kings18:27 Are c'ut ri qui nimal ri aj Asiriy xubij: “Man che ta ri awajaw
2Kings18:28 Are c'u ri qui nimal ajch'ojab

2Kings19:30 Ri quec'asi' can pa Juda quebux na e jacha' ri tico'n: cäbe na ri qui c'amal chupam ri ulew quewächin c'u na.

2Kings23:22 Mawi jumul oc'owisam ta jun Oc'owem ri junam ta ruc' wa' kas pa ri qui k'ijol ri c'amal tak be ri xetakan puwi' ri Israel

1Chronicles7:1 Ri e u c'ojol ri Isacar e quiejeb: Tola
1Chronicles7:2 Ri e u c'ojol ri Tola e are' ri Uz
1Chronicles7:3 Ri u c'ojol ri Uz are' ri Israhiy. Ri e u c'ojol ri Israhiy e are' wa' Micael
1Chronicles7:4 Rumal c'u rech chi e c'o q'ui quixokil xukuje' tak qui c'ojol
1Chronicles7:5 Xebajilax c'u conojel ri e nimak qui k'ij ri e aj Isacar
1Chronicles7:6 Ri e u c'ojol ri Benjamin e oxib: Bela
1Chronicles7:7 Ri e u c'ojol ri Bela e job: Esbon
1Chronicles7:8 Ri e u c'ojol ri Bequer e are' wa' ri Zemir
1Chronicles7:9 je c'ut jas ri cajilabal ri calaxic ri quija'lil xukuje' ri e c'amal tak qui be ri e jujun tak ja winak
1Chronicles7:10 Ri u c'ojol ri Jediael are' ri Bilan. Ri e u c'ojol ri Bilan e are' ri Jeus
1Chronicles7:11 Conojel wa' e rija'lil ri Jediael
1Chronicles7:12 Ri e u c'ojol ri Hir e are' wa' Supam xukuje' Hupam. Ri u c'ojol ri Aher are' ri Husim.
1Chronicles7:13 Ri e u c'ojol ri Neptali e are' ri Jazeel
1Chronicles7:14 Ri e u c'ojol ri Manases ri xebalax ruc' ri u man kas ta rixokil aj siriy e are' wa' Asriel xukuje' ri Maquir
1Chronicles7:15 Ri Maquir xc'uli' ruc' ri Maac
1Chronicles7:16 Ri Maac ri rixokil ri Maquir
1Chronicles7:17 Ri Bedan are' u tat ri Ulam. E are' tak wa' ri e u c'ojol ri Galaad

1Chronicles16:1 Ri u caxa ri Dios xc'am bic xeyok chupam ri lic'om rachoch re be ri are' u patan wa' xuwoc ri David. Xechi'x c'u tak tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic xukuje' tak tabal tok'ob re utzirisan ib chuwäch ri Dios

1Chronicles16:7 Kas c'u pa ri k'ij ri' ri David xuya' takanic nabe mul chi ri Asap xukuje' tak ri e rachil chiquichaplej u ya'ic we k'ijilanic ri' re maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel:
1Chronicles16:8 “¡Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chnataj ri u bi'! Chebitzijoj chque tak ri tinimit ri e u banoj.
1Chronicles16:9 Chebibixoj tak bix che u ya'ic u k'ij. ¡Chebitzijoj ri nimak tak jastak ri e u banom!

2Chronicles7:1 Aretak ri Salomon xuq'uis u banic we ch'awem ri'

2Chronicles7:4 Aretak xbantaj wa'
2Chronicles7:5 Are' c'u ri ajawinel Salomon xebuchi'j che tabal tok'ob juwinak quieb mil ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' jun sient juwinak mil chij. Jewa' xuban ri ajawinel xukuje' ronojel Israel che u tasic ri rachoch Dios.
2Chronicles7:6 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e c'o chupam ri qui c'olbal

2Chronicles7:16 nu cha'om c'ut xukuje' nu tasom we wachoch ri' jacha' che u jekelibal ri nu bi' amak'el. Amak'el c'ut quinchajij man casach ta na pa nu jolom.

2Chronicles8:4 Xukuje' xuban u banic ri Tadmor
2Chronicles8:5 Xukuje' xebuc'ojoj ri Bet-horon ri c'o ajsic xukuje' ri c'o iquim
2Chronicles8:6 xukuje' ri Baalat xukuje' ri niq'uiaj tak tinimit chic ri quebuc'olajij wi tak ri tzukbal tak ib
2Chronicles8:7 E are' tak c'ut ri winak ri e aj hititib
2Chronicles8:8 ri u bixic

2Chronicles8:12 Ri Salomon quebuchi'j che ri Ajawaxel tabal tak tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic puwi' ri porobal ri xuwoc che ri Ajawaxel chuwäch ri u rakan ja ri rachoch Dios.

2Chronicles9:1 Ri ajawinel ixok aj Saba xuta' u tzijol ri nimalaj u banic ri Salomon ri u rikom
2Chronicles9:2 ri Salomon xutzelej qui wäch conojel ri e u c'otoj tak chi'aj. Man c'o ta jun chque ri c'otoj tak chi'aj ri ma ta xcuin che u tzelexic u wäch.
2Chronicles9:3 Aretak xril ri ajawinel ixok aj Saba ri u no'j ri Salomon
2Chronicles9:4 ri je'licalaj tak jastak ri cacoj puwi' ri u mexa
2Chronicles9:5 xubij c'u che ri ajawinel: “ri xinta' u tzijol pa ri wulew chque tak ri banoj la xukuje' ri no'j la
2Chronicles9:6 xuwi c'u kas quincuin che u cojic camic ri in petinak che rilic cuc' ri kas e nu bak'wäch. Kas c'u kastzij mawi ne pa niq'uiaj tz'ijom ta chwe che ri nimalaj no'j la
2Chronicles9:7 ¡Sibalaj utz caquina' na quib ri e ixokil la
2Chronicles9:8 ¡Tewichital ba' ri Ajawaxel ri Dios la
2Chronicles9:9 We ixok ri' xujachtaj c'u jumuch' wukub (87) quintal k'an puak
2Chronicles9:10 Xukuje' ri achijab ri e c'o che pataninel rech ri Hiram xukuje' che ri Salomon ri qui c'amom ulok k'an puak re Opir
2Chronicles9:11 Ruc' ri che' re q'uisis ri ajawinel xebuban k'atibal che ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' che ri rachoch are'
2Chronicles9:12 Pa re c'u wi ri ajawinel Salomon xuya' che ri ajawinel ixok re Saba ronojel ri xraj ri xutz'onoj che
2Chronicles9:13 Ri k'an puak ri cuc'am ri Salomon chujunab copan chi quiejeb sient jumuch' quiejeb (484) quintal
2Chronicles9:14 man coc ta c'u pa ajilabal ri tojonic ri caquiban ri aj lok'omanelab xukuje' ri quebinenic. Conojel c'ut ri ajawinelab re Arab xukuje' ri e k'atal tak tzij re ri ulew caquic'am ulok k'an puak sak puak che ri Salomon.
2Chronicles9:15 Ri ajawinel Salomon xutak qui banic quieb sient (200) nimak tak quetecak ch'ich' ri xcoj oxlajuj (13) libra k'an puak ri joc'om che qui banic ri jujun.
2Chronicles9:16 Xukuje' xutak qui banic oxib sient (300) quetecak tak ch'ich' ri e ch'utik na
2Chronicles9:17 Xutak u banic jun je'licalaj tem re ajawibal re marpil
2Chronicles9:18 Ri tem re ajawibal e nac'al wakib pakalibal che xukuje' jun tac'alibal re k'an puak xukuje' tok'ebal pa jujun u xcut ri t'uyulibal
2Chronicles9:19 E c'o xukuje' cablajuj coj ri e tac'atoj
2Chronicles9:20 Conojel c'u ne tak ri u lak ri ajawinel ri e re kumubal e re k'an puak
2Chronicles9:21 quebec'uya' ri e u jucub ri ajawinel pa Tarsis cuc' ri achijab ri e pataninel tak rech ri Hiram
2Chronicles9:22 Ri ajawinel Salomon c'o na ri u k'inomal chquiwäch conojel tak ri ajawinelab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xukuje' ri u no'j.
2Chronicles9:23 Conojel ri ajawinelab rech ronojel ri uwächulew are ta cäcaj cäquil u wäch xukuje' cäquitatabej tak ri no'j ri u yo'm ri Dios che
2Chronicles9:24 conojel c'ut quelquiya' jun sipanic che chujunab: jastak re sak puak xukuje' k'an puak
2Chronicles9:25 Ri Salomon xec'oji' quiejeb mil (4000) c'olbal tak e u quiej chque tak ri e u quiej xukuje' chque tak ri e u carwaj
2Chronicles9:26 Ri Salomon are' ri sibalaj nim na u k'ij chquiwäch conojel tak ri ajawinelab ri e c'o chunakaj ri nima' Euprats c'ä pa ri culew ri aj pilisteyib xukuje' c'ä pa ri u c'ulbatil ri Ejipt.
2Chronicles9:27 Ri ajawinel xubano chi sibalaj xtz'ebe ri sak puak pa Jerusalen e jacha' ri abaj; xukuje' chi sibalaj chatz'eben ri chacalte' jacha' ri qui banom ri juyubal tak qui che'al higo pa tak ri lianic.
2Chronicles9:28 Ri e u quiej ri Salomon quebec'am ulok pa Muzri xukuje' pa conojel ri jule' tak ulew chic.
2Chronicles9:29 Ri u tz'akatil ri u tzijobelil ri Salomon
2Chronicles9:30 Ri Salomon xajawin pa Jerusalen puwi' ronojel ri Israel cawinak junab

Nehemiah5:4 jule' chic jera' caquibij chi qui jolom puak che u tojic ri alcabal pa u k'ab ri ajawinel
Nehemiah5:5 “Ri e ka winakil tak xukuje' ri uj kachalal tak kib; ri e ka c'ojol man c'o ta jas caquijalbej ta quib coc' tak ri quech. Are c'u ri uj quekajach na tak ri e ka c'ojol xukuje' tak ri e ka mia'l pa ri patanijic. Kas c'u ne tzij

Nehemiah5:13 Xintota' c'u na ri watz'iak xinbij: “Jewa' chubana' ri Dios che ri rachoch xukuje' che ronojel ri jastak rech

Nehemiah6:1 Ri Sanbalat
Nehemiah6:2 ri Sanbalat xukuje' ri Jesem xquitak ulok u bixic chwe chi chkamulij kib chupam jun chque ri alaj tak tinimit ri e c'o chupam ri beya' re On. Are c'u ri qui chomam u banic are ri u banic c'ax chwe.
Nehemiah6:3 Xebentak c'u bic tako'n che u bixic chque chi ri in latz'obinak nu wäch che u banic jun chac ri nim u banic
Nehemiah6:4 Quiejeb mul jewa' xquitak u bixic chwe
Nehemiah6:5 Are c'u ri Sanbalat
