Nehemiah12:38 Ri ucab k'at bixonelab e benak chusuq'uil ri mox k'ab. In in benak chrij ri juk'at bixonelab puwi' ri nim tapia cuc' ri pa niq'uiaj chic chque ri winak
Nehemiah12:39 coc'ow pa ri Oquibal aj Eprain
Nehemiah12:40 Ri cak'at bixonelab xek'ax chupam tak ri qui c'olbal chupam ri rachoch ri Dios; xukuje' c'u ri in e wachil ri pa niq'uiaj chque ri e takanelab ri in cachilam.
Nehemiah12:41 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri quebok'isan tak ri trompet e are wa': ri Eliasim
Nehemiah12:42 ri Maasiy
Nehemiah12:43 Pa ri k'ij ri' xechi'x q'ui tabal tak tok'ob
Nehemiah12:44 Pa ri k'ijol ri' xecoj tak winak ri quechajin tak ri c'olbal ri quec'ol wi tak ri k'inomal
Nehemiah12:45 Ri e are' jacha' ri aj bixab xukuje' ri e chajil tak oquibal
Nehemiah12:46 Pa tak c'ut ri ojer tak u k'ijol ri David xukuje' ri Asap
Nehemiah12:47 Je c'u ri'
Nehemiah13:1 Pa ri k'ijol ri' xsiq'uix u wäch ri u wuj ri Moises chquiwäch conojel ri winak
Nehemiah13:2 (Rumal rech chi ri e are' man xebel ta ulok che qui c'ulaxic ri aj israelib man xquiya' ta c'u qui wa cuq'uia'
Nehemiah13:3 Je c'u ri'
Nehemiah13:4 C'ä majok c'u wa'
Nehemiah13:5 u yo'm jun nimalaj ja che ri quec'ol wi tak can ri sipanic nabe
Nehemiah13:6 Aretak xc'ulmataj ronojel wa'
Nehemiah13:7 Xintzelej c'u pa Jerusalen. Chi' c'ut xinwil wi ri etzelal ri u banom ri Eliasib che u tok'obisaxic u wäch ri Tobiy
Nehemiah13:8 Sibalaj c'u xpe woyowal che wa'
Nehemiah13:9 Xinya' takanic chi ch'ajch'ojirisaxok xukuje' chi chetzelex tak ri chaconisan pa ri qui c'olbal ri e rech ri rachoch Dios
Nehemiah13:10 Xoc c'u pa nu jolom chi man jachom ta chque tak ri aj levitib ri tzukbal tak quib
Nehemiah13:11 Xebenyaj c'ut ri e takanelab jasche qui wonobam canok ri rachoch Dios. Chwi chi c'u wa' xebenmulij ri cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri aj levitib
Nehemiah13:12 ronojel ri Juda xuc'am ulok chupam ri quec'ol wi ri jastak ri u lajujil ri trico
Nehemiah13:13 Xinjach c'ut ri c'olbal ri jastak pa u k'ab ri cojol tabal tok'ob Selemiy
Nehemiah13:14 ¡Nu Dios: chnataj che la ri nu banom
Nehemiah13:15 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xinwilo chi pa Juda e c'o jachin tak pa ri k'ij re uxlanem caquipitz' ri uva cuc' tak ri cakan che resaxic ri u wa'l
Nehemiah13:16 E c'o c'u ne jujun
Nehemiah13:17 Xebenyaj c'ut ri c'ämal tak be aj Juda
Nehemiah13:18 Are jewa' ri xquiban ri e i mam
Nehemiah13:19 Xinya' c'u takanic chi xak xuwi coc a k'ab ri cuc'ut ri u chapletajic ri k'ij re ri uxlanem
Nehemiah13:20 Ri e ajc'ayib xukuje' ri quequic'ayij tak jastak
Nehemiah13:21 in xinc'anan chque xukuje' xebenyajo chi cacoc'owisaj ri chak'ab chuwäch ri nimalaj tapia
Nehemiah13:22 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa' xinya' takanic chque ri aj levitib chi chquich'ajch'ojirisaj quib cheboj c'ut che qui yuxlexic tak ri oquibal
Nehemiah13:23 Xinwil xukuje' pa tak ri k'ij ri' chi e c'o jujun aj judeyib e c'ulan cuc' ixokib aj Asdod
Nehemiah13:24 pa niq'uiaj c'ut chque ri e qui c'ojol are caquicoj ri qui ch'abal aj Asdod xukuje' ri quech niq'uiaj tak tinimit chic
Nehemiah13:25 Xinc'anan c'u chque xeben c'okoj c'ut. Jujun chque xebench'ayo xebenmich' che ri qui wi'
Nehemiah13:26 “¡Are wa' ri xumacuj ri Salomon
Nehemiah13:27 Rumal ri' man xak ta coc'ow chi jeri' chi ri ix quiban we nimalaj mac ri' chuwäch ri ka Dios
Nehemiah13:28 Jun chque ri e u c'ojol ri Joiad
Nehemiah13:29 ¡Nu Dios: chnataj che la ri qui xk'olim ri u cojic ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri c'ulwächinic aj cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' aj levi!
Nehemiah13:30 Xebenjosk'ij c'ut xebenwesaj c'u bic conojel ri man e qui winakil taj ri e yujtal chquixo'l
Nehemiah13:31 ri u jachic ri si' pa tak ri k'ij ri e c'utum xukuje' ri qui jachic ri nabe tak wächinic. ¡Nu Dios: chnataj che la ri u tok'obisaxic nu wäch!
Esther1:1 We tzijobelil ri xc'ulmataj pa ri k'ijol aretak ri ajawinel Asuer cajawin puwi' jun ajawibal re jun sient juwinak wukub (127) u tz'akatil ri rajawibal
Esther1:2 u jekebam c'ut ri u c'u'x ri rajawinic chupam ri tinimit Sus.
Esther1:3 Chupam c'ut ri urox junab re ri rajawinic xuban jun nimak'ij che u ya'ic qui k'ij conojel ri e rach k'atal tak tzij
Esther1:4 xa che u c'utic ri u k'inomal chquiwäch xukuje' ri u nimalil ri rajawinic xukuje' ri juluwemalaj u cuinem ri man c'o ta c'o wi. Ri nimak'ij xbeytaj wakib (8) ic'
Esther1:5 aretak xq'uis u banic we nimak'ij ri' ri ajawinel xuban chic jun nimak'ij ri xbeytaj wukub (7) k'ij
Esther1:6 Ri uwo ja wiktalic e cojom je'lic sak tak ch'ukubal che xukuje' räx
Esther1:7 Ri uq'uia' xejach pa tak lak re k'an puak
Esther1:8 U yo'm c'u ne takanic ri ajawinel chque ri takanelab ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch chi man cacoj ta chuk'ab che apachin jun cutijo
Esther1:9 Xukuje' ri ixok ajawinel Basti xuban jun nimak'ij chque conojel ri quixokil ri xebulax rumal ri ajawinel Asuer.
Esther1:10 Chupam ri uwuk k'ij re ri nimak'ij
Esther1:11 chi chequic'ama' ulok ri ixok ajawinel Basti chuwäch
Esther1:12 Are' c'u ri ixok ajawinel xuk'il rib man xraj taj xutz'akatisaj ri takanic ri u yo'm ri ajawinel cumal ri rachijab ri u cuban u c'u'x chquij. Xpe c'u nimalaj royowal ri ajawinel. Nojinak che oyowal
Esther1:13 xutz'onoj u no'j chque ri queta'm jas caquibij ri pixab
Esther1:14 Chque tak wa' ri nakaj e c'o wi che ri ajawinel e are' wa' ri Carsen
Esther1:15 Ri ajawinel xuta' chque: “Je jas ri cubij ri pixab
Esther1:16 Chquiwäch c'u conojel ri e ya'l tak u no'j ri ajawinel
Esther1:17 Ri u banom ri ixok ajawinel caquetamaj na conojel ri ixokib
Esther1:18 Ri quixokil ri k'atal tak tzij re Porsiy xukuje' re Med
Esther1:19 Rumal c'u ri'
Esther1:20 We pixab ri' ri u cojom ri ajawinel rajawaxic cäya' retamaxic pa ronojel ri ajawibal

Esther1:22 Xebutak wuj pa conojel ri u tz'akatil ri rajawibal
Esther2:1 Oc'owinak chi c'u jun k'ijol

Esther2:3 Chebucojo' ri ajawinel tzucul tak quech pa conojel ri u tz'akatil ri rajawibal
Esther2:4 are c'u ri ali ri sibalaj cakaj na chuwäch ri ajawinel are chäcoj che ixok ajawinel are' cacanaj chupam ri u c'olbal ri Basti.” Ri chomanic xkaj pa u jolom ri ajawinel
Esther2:5 Chupam ri tinimit Sus jekel wi jun aj judey Mardoquey u bi'

Esther2:9 Ri ali sibalaj xkaj chuwäch ri Hegay

Esther2:12 Conojel we alitomab ri' e cojom pa jun suc'umanic re je'licalil ri cabeytaj cablajuj (12) ic'. Ri nabe wakib ic' caquibil ri qui cuerp ruc' aseit re mir

Esther9:1 Chupam ri oxlajuj (13) rajilabal ri ucablajuj ic' re cabinax Adar

Esther9:10 e are' c'u wa' ri e lajuj (10) u c'ojol ri Aman

Esther9:20 Ri Mardoquey xebutz'ibaj tak we c'ulmatajic ri'

Esther9:22 are tak k'ij wa' aretak ri aj judeyib xequisachisaj qui wäch tak ri qui c'ulel
Esther9:23 Ri aj judeyib xquinak'atisaj quib che roc'owisaxic we c'ulmatajic ri' xukuje' ri xutz'ibaj ri Mardoquey chque.
Esther9:24 Are' c'u ri Aman
Esther9:25 aretak c'u xoc ri Ester chuwäch ri ajawinel

Esther9:27 ri aj judeyib xquijekeba' we nak'atisabal ri' chque ri are'
Esther9:28 chenatax tak c'ut we k'ij ri' xukuje' chban ri nimak'ij cumal ija'lil chi ija'lil
Esther9:29 Ri ixok ajawinel Ester
Esther9:30 xquitak c'u bic chque conojel ri aj judeyib ri e c'o chquipam tak ri jun sient juwinak wukub (127) nimak tak tinimit pa ri u tz'akatil ri rajawibal ri Asuer
Esther9:31 xya' c'u takanic chi chban ri nimak'ij re Purim pa ri ajilabal ri c'utum
Esther9:32 are' c'u ri u takanic ri Ester xyo'w u chuk'ab ri cholajil ri rajawaxic u takexic che u banic ri nimak'ij re ri Purim. Ronojel wa' xtz'ibataj can chupam jun wuj.
Esther10:1 Ri ajawinel Asuer xucoj jun tojonic paquiwi' tak ri tinimit ri e c'o chupam ri ulew xukuje' tak ri tinimit ri e c'o tak chupam ri plo.
Esther10:2 Ronojel ri xuban ruc' takanic xukuje' cuinem
Esther10:3 Ri aj judey ri Mardoquey are' xc'oji' chupam ri ucab c'olbal che ri ajawinel; sibalaj xajawax cumal ri e u winakil
Job1:1 Chupam ri rulewal ri Uz xc'oji' jun achi Job u bi'
Job1:2 Ri Job e c'o wukub (7) u c'ojol xukuje' oxib (3) u mia'l
Job1:3 e c'o c'u wukub mil (7000) u chij
Job1:4 Ri e u c'ojol tak ri Job quinak'atisam quib quequiban tak ula'nic cho tak cachoch chquijujunal
Job1:5 Aretak queq'uis ri k'ij re ri ula'nic
Job1:6 Pa jun k'ij ri rajawaxic quebopan chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri e pataninel tak rech ri e aj caj
Job1:7 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ot u chi'
Job1:8 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che: “¿La ma ta at oquinak il che ri Job ri pataninel wech? Man c'o ta jun chuwäch ri uwächulew jacha' ri are'
Job1:9 Xutzelej c'u u bixic ri tzujunel: “Ri are' man xak ta lok' cätajin catupatanij ruc' jun tz'akatalaj jiquil.
Job1:10 Ri at man caya' ta c'olbal chi c'o ta jachin cächapowic
Job1:11 Chawesaj c'u ronojel ri c'o ruc' cawil c'u na chi kas chi a palaj catuc'okoj na.”
Job1:12 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che ri tzujunel: “Je'
Job1:13 C'o jun k'ij
Job1:14 xopan jun achi cho rachoch ri Job che u ya'ic we tzijol ri' che: “Cätajin cakatajij ri ulew cuc' ri wacax
Job1:15 xak c'u c'ätetal xebopan ri aj sebeyib
Job1:16 C'ä maja' c'u ne chutanaba' tzijonem ri achi ri' aretak xopan chi jun xubij c'ut: “Xkaj jun cakulja xebucämisaj c'ut ri ajyuk'ab xukuje' tak ri chij xuwi ri in xincuinic xinanimajic rech xinpe che u bixic che la.”
Job1:17 C'ä maja' c'u ne chutaba' tzijonem we achi ri'
Job1:18 C'ä maja' c'u ne chutanaba' tzijonem we achi ri'
Job1:19 aretak xak c'ätetal xpe jun quiakik' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xuyojij ri ja pa ri quiejeb u xcut
Job1:20 Xwalij c'u ri Job
Job1:21 Xubij c'ut: “Ch'analic xinpe cho we uwächulew ri'
Job1:22 Je c'u ri'
Job2:1 Aretak xopan ri k'ij ri rajawaxic quebopan chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ri pataninel tak rech ri e aj caj
Job2:2 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ot u chi'
Job2:3 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel che: “¿La ma ta at oquinak il che ri Job ri pataninel wech? Man c'o ta jun chuwäch ri uwächulew jacha' ta ri are'
Job2:4 Ri tzujunel xutzelej u bixic che ri Ajawaxel Dios: “We man canak ta jubik' che ri kas u tz'umal
Job2:5 Chanaka' c'ut ri are' cawil c'u na chi kas cha palaj catuc'okoj na.”
Job2:6 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic che ri tzujunel: “Je'
Job2:7 Ri tzujunel xel bic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Job2:8 Xbe c'u ri Job xet'uyul chuxcut jumulaj mes
Job2:9 Xubij c'ut ri rixokil che: “¿La c'ä maja' catzokopij ri ruc'axic ri jicalaj a c'aslemal? ¡Chac'okoj ri Dios chatcäm c'ut!”
Job2:10 Ri Job xutzelej u bixic: “¡Ixok
Job2:11 E c'o oxib achijab ri e rachil ri Job: Ri Elipaz aj Teman
Job2:12 Xquil apan ri Job chinaj
Job2:13 Xquit'uyuba' c'u quib chuwäch ri ulew ruc' ri Job
Job3:1 Are' c'u xch'aw na ri Job
Job3:2 
Job3:3 Ri Job xubij: “¡C'okotajinak ri chak'ab ri xinchap nu q'uiyic! ¡C'okotajinak ri k'ij ri xinalaxic!
Job3:4 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi ri k'ij ri' xux ta chak'ab
Job3:5 ¡C'o ta banom wi jun tzatzalaj mujal xk'ekumarisan taj
Job3:6 C'o ta banom wi xsachtaj we ak'ab ri' pa jun k'ekumalil. ¡Ma ta c'u xajilax we k'ij ri' chquixo'l tak ri k'ij rech ri ic' xukuje' rech ri junab!
Job3:7 ¡C'o ta banom wi xux ta jun cäminak ak'ab
Job3:8 ¡C'o ta banom wi xc'okox ta cumal ri itzinelab
Job3:9 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi pa ri ak'abilal ri' ma ta xejuluw tak ri ch'imil
Job3:10 ¡C'okotajinak ri chak'ab ri'
Job3:11 ¿Jas lo che man xincäm ta chupam ri nu nan
Job3:12 ¿Jasche xec'oji' ch'ecaj ri xinquic'ulaj xukuje' ri uwo c'uxaj ri xintzukuwic?
Job3:13 We ta chi' xincämic
Job3:14 cuc' tak ri ajawinelab xukuje' ri cach k'atal tak tzij ri quequiyac tak natabal che u nataxic ri qui bi'
Job3:15 o cuc' ri k'atal tak tzij ri quequinojisaj tak ri cachoch ruc' k'an puak xukuje' sak puak.
Job3:16 ¿Jasche man xinmukic jacha' ri cäban chque tak ri tzakanic
Job3:17 Pa ri mukubal caq'uis wi u tza'm ri quelemch'uj ri banal tak etzelal
Job3:18 Chila' caquirik wi na jamaril ri xec'oji' pa tak che'
Job3:19 chila' c'u e c'o wi ri nimak xukuje' ri ch'utik junam banom chque
Job3:20 ¿Jasche cuya' ri Dios chi cäril ri sakilal ri cutij c'ax? ¿Jasche cuc'asba' ri nojinak che c'ayil
Job3:21 ri reyem ri cämical
Job3:22 Ri u quicotemal we achi' ri' copanic aretak cäkaj chuq'uisbalil chupam ri camuk wi.
Job3:23 Ri Dios cuban che chi cabin pa moyil
Job3:24 Ri e bik'bitem e are' tzukbal wib; ri wuq'uia' e are' ri ch'ikowem rumal ri c'axc'ol.
Job3:25 Ronojel ri quinxe'j wi wib
Job3:26 Man c'o ta uxlanem chwe mawi matzalem; man quinrik ta jamaril
Job4:1 Ri Elipaz xubij: “Kastzij
Job4:2 
Job4:3 At
Job4:4 at
Job4:5 ¿la catbarobiric casach c'ut ri a chuk'ab camic ri at c'o chupam ri c'axc'olil?
Job4:6 At
Job4:7 Chachomaj
Job4:8 Ri esbal no'j in u tijom chi ri quequitic ilpatan xukuje' etzelal quequiyac u wäch ri qui ticom canok.
Job4:9 Ri Dios
Job4:10 Pune' c'u sibalaj quewu'nic xukuje' quequirak qui chi' e jacha' ri coj
Job4:11 Quecäm na jacha' ri coj ri man caquirik ta qui ti'
Job4:12 Chnojimal xya' u bixic jun etamanic chwe
Job4:13 Chak'ab
Job4:14 xoc ri xe'n ib wuc'; conojel tak ri nu bakil xebirbitic.
Job4:15 Jun uxlab xoc'ow chi nu palaj xcachcob c'ut ri nu tz'umal.
Job4:16 C'o jachin c'o chi'
Job4:17 ‘¿La cacuin ri winak cux suc' chuwäch ri Dios? ¿La cacuinic cux ch'ajch'oj chuwäch ri u winakirisanel?
Job4:18 Mawi c'u ne ri e pataninel tak rech ri e aj caj ya'tal ta chque chi cujiquiba' ta u c'u'x chquij. Queburik c'u ne ri Dios jech'balil pa ri qui c'aslemal ri e u tako'n aj caj
Job4:19 ¡e ta c'u lo pa ri u c'aslemal ri winak
Job4:20 Chuxo'l ri ak'abibal xukuje' ri que k'ijibal cäsachisax u wäch; kas xa jumul cäcämic
Job4:21 Cäsach u wäch ri u c'aslemal jacha' jun bätz' ri cakopixic; cacäm bic man xurik ta c'u bic ri no'j.’ ”
Job5:1 “Charaka' a chi'
Job5:2 U jachic ib pa ri c'ayil o pa ri cabe wi animaaj jun etzelal wa' ri cac'aman bic pa ri cämical.
Job5:3 Wilom ri man c'o ta u no'j capok' ri u k'inomal
Job5:4 Ri e u c'ojol man c'o ta jachin ta jun queto'wic; pa tak ri k'atbal tzij caban ri man suq'uilal taj chque man c'o ta c'u jachin cato'w ta na qui wi'.
Job5:5 Ri e qui wächinic tak ri culew quetijow na cumal ri e c'o pa wi'jal quequesaj chquixo'l tak ri q'uix
Job5:6 Ri etzelal man capok' ta ulok cho ri ulew; mawi ri quiäkasakil man caq'uiy ta ulok pa ri ulew:
Job5:7 Are' ri winak are' ri ajchak'mac che ri u quiäkasakil
Job5:8 We ta in ri at
Job5:9 ¡ri are' quebuban q'ui xukuje' nimak tak mayibal
Job5:10 Ri are' cutak ulok ri jäb cho ri uwächulew
Job5:11 ri are' cuya' qui k'ij ri e mach'amoj cucu'bisaj qui c'u'x ri man caquiriktaj jas caquibano;
Job5:12 ri are' cuyojij ri quebuchomaj u banic ri banal etzelal
Job5:13 Cuc'amij ri banal etzelal chupam ri kas cuchomaj u banic
Job5:14 ¡Pa tiq'uil k'ij xak quemakmanic
Job5:15 Ri Dios cuto'tajisaj ri meba' ri c'o chuxe' ri qui takanic ri e banal tak etzelal;
Job5:16 are c'u eyebal qui c'u'x ri tukarib wa'
Job5:17 Utz rech ri winak ri cäyaj rumal ri Dios; mawetzelaj u wäch ri u yajanic ri c'o ronojel u cuinem.
Job5:18 We ri are' cuban jun soconic
Job5:19 Jumul xukuje' camul catuto'tajisaj na aretak xak quieb cubij pawi'
Job5:20 Pa ri k'ijol rech ri wi'jal catresaj na pa u k'ab ri cämical
Job5:21 Catuto' na chuwäch ri itzel tak ak'aj
Job5:22 Quebatze'j na qui wäch tak ri wi'jal xukuje' tak ri e u q'ueyowal
Job5:23 Ri abaj man quequiya' ta na latz' chquipam tak ri awulew
Job5:24 Chupam ri awachoch cariktaj na ronojel ri cajwatajic
Job5:25 Quepok'otaj na ri e awija'lil jacha' k'ayes pa ri juyub.
Job5:26 Catopan na pa ri ri'jobenakil man caq'uis ta na ri a chuk'ab
Job5:27 Ri esbal ka no'j are' cac'utuw chkawäch chi je chatatabej wa'
Job6:1 Ri Job xubij: “We ta conojel ri e nu c'axc'olil xukuje' tak ri e nu quiäkasakil cuya' taj quepaj pa jun pajbal
Job6:2 
Job6:3 c'o na ri calal ri' chuwäch ri u sanyebil ri plo. Rumal ri' in ch'awinak man ruc' ta c'oxomanic.
Job6:4 Ri c'o ronojel u cuinem e u t'isom tak ri e ch'ab chwe
Job6:5 ¿La curak pa u chi' ri bur we c'o u k'ayes? O ¿la cawun ri ama' wacax
Job6:6 ¿Jachin ta cutij jun jasach ri ma ta c'o atz'am ruc' ri ma ta tzayim? ¿Jas ta lo ri u qui'al jun jasach ri ma ta c'o u na'il?
Job6:7 Ri mawi jumul xinwaj xintijo are quintzukbej wib camic.
Job6:8 ¡C'o ta banom wi ri Dios chuya' ta chwe ri quintz'onoj che; c'o ta banom wi chutz'akatisaj ta chwe ri quinrayij!
Job6:9 ¡C'o ta banom wi cuchomaj ta ri Dios nu xak'alexic cuq'uis ta c'u tzij puwi' ri nu c'aslemal!
Job6:10 Che u q'uexwäch ri c'ax ri xak c'ätetal xpe panuwi'
Job6:11 Man e c'o ta chic nu chuk'ab che coch'onic
Job6:12 Man c'o ta ri u chuk'ab ri abaj wuc'
Job6:13 Man quincuin taj quinto' ta wib pa we wi
Job6:14 Ri achil ri curik c'ax cälok'ok'exic
Job6:15 Are c'u ri ix
Job6:16 Ri ja' sakpuk'upuj cäkaj ulok
Job6:17 cäjar c'u ri tew quetzaj c'ut ri nima'
Job6:18 Caquibano chi caquijal qui be ri camey ri e binelab; che takem c'ut chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak checäm c'ut.
Job6:19 Ri binelab tak camey ri quepe pa Tem xukuje' pa Saba quequitzucuj tak c'ut ri nima' ri' ruc' eyebal c'uxaj
Job6:20 aretak c'u quebopanic cäpe canima'
Job6:21 Je i banic wa' chwe in: quiwil ri c'ax ri man ch'ijel taj ri in c'o wi
Job6:22 Are' c'u ri in man c'o ta jas nu tz'onon chiwe
Job6:23 mawi chi chinito' ta pa u k'ab jun c'ulel
Job6:24 Chebiya' tijonic chwe
Job6:25 Sibalaj e ch'äcanelab ri' ri tzij re colomal; are c'u ri ix man c'o ta u bel ri nu tzujuxic iwumal.
Job6:26 Ri ix quiniyok' cumal tak ri nu tzij
Job6:27 ¡Ri ix c'o iwanima' che retz'bexic ri u c'aslemal jun minor xukuje' chi qui c'ayij ri iwachil iwib ruc'!
Job6:28 Kas c'u chinica'yej chi nu palaj; chibij chwe we quinban tzij.
Job6:29 Chitzelej iwib che ri xibij
Job6:30 ¿La are' ta c'u pa i c'u'x chi in ta jun banal tzij ri ma ta quinch'ob ri quinbij?”
Job7:1 “Ri u c'aslemal ri winak waral cho ri uwächulew xak junam ruc' jun ajch'o'j ri cutz'akatisaj ri u patanijic.
Job7:2 Ruc' jun lok'om pataninel ri quel u c'u'x che u rikic ri mumu'j
Job7:3 Je tak coc'owisaxic ri ic' wa' nu banom ruc' elem ch'u'j
Job7:4 Quink'oyi' chak'ab quinna' chi man coc'ow ta ri jun ak'ab; quincos che u solcopilaxic wib c'ä cäpe na ri sak xe' ri caj
Job7:5 Nojinak ri nu ti'jal chque tak xjut xukuje' tak c'oj
Job7:6 Ri e nu k'ij quenakajin che ri u q'uisbalil
Job7:7 Nataj che la
Job7:8 Man c'o ta chi c'u jun quinilow ta chi na; caya' ri bak'wäch la panuwi'
Job7:9 Jacha' sutz' ri coc'owic cäsach c'ut
Job7:10 
Job7:11 Rumal ri' man cuya' taj chi ma ta c'o jas quinbij. Chupam ri nu k'oxomal xukuje' ri c'ayil ri in c'o wi quinya' qui bixic tak ri quinna' pa ri wanima'.
Job7:12 ¿La xa pu in jun jilijic awaj re ri plo chi je walwachixic wa' caban la?
Job7:13 Aretak quinchomaj chi pa ri ch'at quinrik wi na uxlanem chi ri waram cusachisaj na ri nu c'axc'ol
Job7:14 quinnojisaj la che tak xibin ib pa tak ri nu waram; ¡quinesaj la ch'u'j pa nu waram!
Job7:15 Are' utz na ri' chi quinjitz'aj la; are utz na ri cämical chwe che u q'uexwäch we c'aslemal ri'.
Job7:16 Man quink'i' ta chic. Man quinwaj taj quintakej c'aslem. Chinya' la can pa jamaril
Job7:17 ¿Jas u banic ri winak chi caya' la u k'ij? ¿Jasche coc la il che?
Job7:18 ¿Jasche cal wächij la k'ij chi k'ij
Job7:19 ¿Jasche man quetas ta la ri e bak'wäch la chwe
Job7:20 We quinmacunic
Job7:21 ¿La ma ta cacuin la cäsach la ri nu mac? ¿Jasche man caq'uiak ta la bic ri lawaloyil ri nu banom? Chanim quineliq'uebax chupam ri puc'uc' ulew: quintzucuj la
Job8:1 Ri Bildad xubij: “C'ä jampa' lo catakej na tzijonem jewa'
Job8:2 ¿cattzijonic jacha' jun sutinel quiakik'?
Job8:3 Ri Dios
Job8:4 Kastzij ri' chi ri e a c'ojol xemacun chuwäch ri Dios
Job8:5 Chatzucuj ri Dios
Job8:6 We ch'ajch'oj ri a banoj xukuje' colom
Job8:7 Ri a k'inomal ri c'o can nabe man c'o ta cupatanij aretak cajunamax ruc' ri cärik na.
Job8:8 Chawesaj a no'j chque ri ija'lil ri e oc'owinak
Job8:9 Ri uj xak alicha' uj rech iwir
Job8:10 E are' tak c'ut ri ojer tak winak cuya' catquich'abej xukuje' quequic'ut q'ui tak jastak chawäch.
Job8:11 Ri xic'ay xukuje' ri äj queq'uiyic xak xuwi jawije' c'o wi q'ui ja';
Job8:12 c'ä e räx c'u ne
Job8:13 Xak junam cac'ulmataj cuc' ri e banal tak etzelal
Job8:14 Ri qui jiquibam c'uxaj xukuje' ri qui cubisam wi qui c'u'x xak e junam ruc' jun u bätz'il jun u quem äm.
Job8:15 Cacaj ta c'u ne caquichap quib che ri bätz'
Job8:16 Ri e banal tak etzelal xak e junam cuc' ri räx tak k'ayes chuwäch ri k'ij
Job8:17 caquiralij tak ri qui rab xo'l tak ri tac'atak tak abaj quequinac' tak quib chque tak ri abaj
Job8:18 we c'u c'o jachin quebokow pa ri qui c'olbal ri xec'oji' wi man c'o ta jachin cänabenic chi xec'oji' chi'.
Job8:19 Je u sachic u wäch wa' ri u pok'ocolojic
Job8:20 Ri Dios man cuwonoba' ta ri winak ri man c'o ta macaj pa ri u c'aslemal
Job8:21 Ri are' cuban na chi catetze'n chi na chi carak na a chi' rumal jajatem;
Job8:22 e are; tak c'ut
Job9:1 Ri Job xubij: “Ri in weta'm chi kas jewa'
Job9:2 
Job9:3 We ta c'o jun caraj cac'ulelan ta ruc'
Job9:4 Ri Dios nim ri u cuinem xukuje' ri u no'j. ¿Jachin ta ri cacuinic cuk'atij u wäch ma ta c'u c'o jas cuc'ulmaj?
Job9:5 Ri Dios
Job9:6 Ri are' cubano chi cayicop ri ulew queslabetaj c'ut ri e u tac'alibal.
Job9:7 Ri are' cuya' takanic chi man quel ta ulok ri k'ij
Job9:8 Man c'o ta jachin xtoban ruc' xulic' ri caj xuxak'alej c'ut ri jujilaj awaj ri c'o chupam ri plo.
Job9:9 Are' xbanow tak ri ch'imil: ri Ati't Os Nabeal
Job9:10 ¡Ri are' quebuban q'ui tak xukuje' sibalaj e nimak tak mayibalalaj tak jastak ri man c'o ta jun cäticar ta che qui ch'obic!
Job9:11 We coc'ow ri Dios chinuxcut man quincuin ta ri' quinwilo; coc'owic man quinnabej ta c'ut.
Job9:12 We cuban rech che jun jasach
Job9:13 We coyowar ri Dios
Job9:14 ¿Jas ta c'u lo ri quinbano quebenrik ta tzij
Job9:15 Pune' ta ma ta c'o jubik' nu mac
Job9:16 We ta quinsiq'uij che chomanic
Job9:17 Cuban na ri' chi qui nu rapuj jun cakulja
Job9:18 quinunojisaj na ri' che c'ayil man cuya' ta na ri' chwe quinjic' ri wuxlab.
Job9:19 ¿We ta quincoj ri chuk'ab? Ri are' c'o na u chuk'ab. ¿We ta quinsiq'uij pa k'atbal tzij? ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäbe che u q'uexwäch?
Job9:20 Pune' ta ne sibalaj in suc' ri ma ta c'o jun nu mac
Job9:21 Ri in man c'o ta nu mac
Job9:22 Ronojel xak junam. Are' c'u nu chomanic wa': chi ri are' xak junam cusachisaj u wäch ri ajchak'mac ruc' ri man c'o ta u mac.
Job9:23 We pa jun u q'ueyowal quecäm winak ri man c'o ta qui mac
Job9:24 Cuya' can ri uwächulew pa qui k'ab ri itzel tak winak cuch'uk c'ut ri qui bak'wäch ri k'atal tak tzij. We c'u man are' ri Dios
Job9:25 Ri e nu k'ij aninak queboc'owic
Job9:26 Xak junam que binic cuc' tak ri jucub ri aninak quebinic
Job9:27 We quintzucuj qui sachisaxic tak ri nu c'axc'ol quinban ta c'u wib chi quinquicotic
Job9:28 ronojel ri nu k'oxomal quinuxibij chi ri'
Job9:29 We c'u u banom chwe chi in ajchak'mac
Job9:30 Pune' ta ne quebench'aj ri nu k'ab ruc' ch'ipak quinch'aj ta c'u ne pa u wa'l chaj.
Job9:31 Ri Dios cuban na chiquinbik'taj chupam ri xok'ol
Job9:32 Ri in man quincuin taj quinc'ulelaj ri Dios jacha' ri u c'ulelaxic jun winak
Job9:33 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi c'o ta jun k'atal tzij chkaxo'l ri c'o ta u k'atbal tzij pakawi' ka cabichal
Job9:34 ri cak'ilontaj chi ri Dios ma ta cutakej u c'äjisaxic nu wäch ma ta cutakej nu nojisaxic che xe'n ib!
Job9:35 Ma ta c'u quinxe'j wib ri' quinch'awic
Job10:1 “¡In cosinak chic che ri c'aslemal! Quinco' wib cumal tak ri e nu tzujunic
Job10:2 ¡Oh Dios
Job10:3 Je u banic wa' chi kas lal xinwinakirisanic
Job10:4 ¿La je puch quilic ri jastak u mal la jas ri quilic cumal ri achijab?
Job10:5 ¿La xa puch k'atatal ri c'aslemal la jacha' ri rech jun cämel?
Job10:6 ¿Jas c'u che quebetzucuj la tak il xukuje' macaj chwij?
Job10:7 ¿Eta'm c'u la chi man in ta ajchak'mac xukuje' chi man c'o ta jachin jun cacuinic quinresaj chupam ri cuinem la?
Job10:8 ¡Lal xinwinakirisaj la cuc' tak ri kas k'ab la
Job10:9 Nataj che la chi t'ac xcoj la che nu banic: ¿La caban ta chi c'ula puc'uc' ulew chwe jumul?
Job10:10 Xban la chi ri nu cuerp xc'oji' u bantajic jacha' ri cäban che ri quexu aretak cut'oy rib ri leche;
Job10:11 xq'uiyisaj la nu ti'jal xukuje' nu tz'umal
Job10:12 xya' la nu c'aslemal
Job10:13 Are c'u ri camic quinwilo chi jela' chupam ri anima' la c'o jun chomanic la ri c'utalic:
Job10:14 Cätajin qui nu yuxlej che rilic we quinmacunic
Job10:15 We in ajchak'mac
Job10:16 We quinc'ut wib chi man in c'o ta je' ri lal lal jacha' jun coj
Job10:17 Mawi jumul ma ta e c'o k'alajisanelab chwij chwäch la; ri oyowal la chwij cätajin cänimaric; ¡jacha' jumulaj ajch'ojab quinc'axc'obisaj la amak'el catzucuj la u sachisaxic nu wäch!
Job10:18 ¿Jasche xya' la c'olbal chi xnalaxic? Xincämtaj c'ä majok c'o jachin chilow nu wäch.
Job10:19 Xak ta nu petic ri' pa ri u c'u'x ri nu nan xenetakal ta c'u chupam ri nu julil; ri quel ri' chi je ta ne ri ma ta xinalaxic.
Job10:20 Man naj ta c'u ya' quinc'asi'c
Job10:21 C'ä majok chinoj che ri nu binem ri man c'o ta wi tzelejem
Job10:22 chupam ri ulew aj nutub xukuje' aj yojcorem
Job11:1 Ri Zopar xubij: “Conojel tak we jumulaj tzij ri' takal u tzelexic qui wäch
Job11:2 
Job11:3 ¿La are' pa a c'u'x chi cumal tak ri e a subunic quebatz'apij tak ri e u pa ka chi'
Job11:4 Ri at cabij chi ri a tijonic colom
Job11:5 ¡C'o ta banom wi cach'aw ta ri Dios che u tzelexic u wäch ri cabij!
Job11:6 Ri are' quebuk'alajisaj ta ri' chawäch ri e c'utalic tak no'j
Job11:7 ¿La are ta c'u pa a c'u'x chi catcuinic canim ta awib chquipam tak ri rawatalic ri Dios catopan ta c'u c'ä chupam ri u najil ri u suq'uilal ri Dios?
Job11:8 ¿Jas ta c'ut ri catcuin che u banic
Job11:9 Sibalaj e nimak na chuwäch ri uwächulew nimak c'u na qui wäch chuwäch ri plo.
Job11:10 We cäpe ri Dios
Job11:11 Ri are' reta'm jachin ri banal tzij; ri are' cäril ri etzelal. ¿O a cachomaj chi man cunabejtaj?
Job11:12 Pa ri k'ij aretak ri juyubal bur cutanaba' ruxic
Job11:13 Chaya' a tzij che u colomaxic ri a c'aslemal
Job11:14 We c'o macaj chupam ri a c'aslemal
Job11:15 Jeri' catcuinic cawalijisaj ri a palaj ch'ajch'oj
Job11:16 man quenataj ta chi c'ut ri e a c'axc'ol chawe; quesach na pa a jolom jacha' ri ja' ri coc'owic.
Job11:17 Ri a c'aslemal cajuluw na chuwäch ri k'ij pa tiq'uil k'ij; ri k'ekalaj tak jok'otaj ri xebawoc'owisaj quebux na jacha' ri u sakaric.
Job11:18 Cac'oji' c'u na aweyebal c'uxaj c'äte c'u ri' catc'asi' na ruc' cu'bisabal c'uxaj; catwar na pa jamaril chuxe' ri u chajinic ri Dios.
Job11:19 Man c'o ta catxibinic aretak catuxlanic. E q'uia winak quepe na che u tz'onoxic tok'ob chawe.
Job11:20 E are' c'u ri itzel tak winak
Job12:1 Ri Job xubij: “¡Man c'o ta queblanc'u'xaj chi ri ix
Job12:2 
Job12:3 Xukuje' c'u ri in c'o wetamanic
Job12:4 pune' c'u man c'o ta nu mac xukuje' man c'o ta jun c'okobal chwij
Job12:5 Ri co tiquilic caretzelaj u wäch ri c'o pa quiäkasakil; man coc ta il che u ch'iquimixic ri tzakem cubano.
Job12:6 Ri t'orinelab e c'o tak ri cachoch pa jamaril; ri caquiya' ri Dios pa yok'ical man c'o ta latz' c'äquiriko
Job12:7 Chac'oto' qui chi' tak ri awaj o ri chicop ri c'o qui xic': e are' wa' quecuinic catquitijoj.
Job12:8 Xukuje' che ri ulew
Job12:9 ¿La c'o c'u lo jachin jun ri c'ä maja' reta'm chi are' ri Dios xbanow ronojel ruc' ri u k'ab?
Job12:10 Pa ri u k'ab c'o wi ri u c'aslemal ronojel ti'jal c'aslic.
Job12:11 Ri xquinaj cuch'ob ri quijalbem tak quib ri tzij
Job12:12 Ri ri'jab tak tatayib c'o qui no'jibal; ri qui junab are yowinak etamanic chque.
Job12:13 Are' c'u ri Dios aj no'j xukuje' c'o u cuinem; ri are' quebuban chomanic
Job12:14 Ri cayojix rumal ri Dios
Job12:15 We ri are' cuk'il ri jäb
Job12:16 Ri u cuinem amak'el cuya' ri ch'äcanic. Ri subutajinak xukuje' ri cäsubunic e c'o chuxe' ri u takanic.
Job12:17 Ri are' cubano chi ri ajno'jab caquitzak ri quetamanic chi ri k'atal tak tzij chi chebux ch'ujab.
Job12:18 Cäresaj ri qui takanic tak ri ajawinelab cuban chque chi e yutuyuj quec'am bic; xukuje' e ch'anach'oj.
Job12:19 Queresaj ri e cojol tabal tok'ob chupam ri qui patan quebukasaj ri e c'o che k'atal tak tzij.
Job12:20 Ri ya'l tak no'j ri cacu'bax c'uxaj chquij man c'o ta chi jas caquibij caresaj c'ut ri utzalaj tak qui chomanic ri ri'jab tak tatayib.
Job12:21 Cuban chque ri ajawib chi man nimak ta chic quebil wi xukuje' chi ri cowilaj tak achijab caquitzak ri qui chuk'ab.
Job12:22 Cuya' c'u quetamaxic tak ri e awatalic ri sibalaj e c'utalic queresaj c'ut ri jastak chisak ri sibalaj e k'ekumarinak.
Job12:23 Ri are' quebunimarisaj xukuje' quebusachisaj qui wäch tak ri nimak tak tinimit
Job12:24 Caresaj ri quetamanic ri e c'amal tak qui be ri ulew cuban chque chi quesach chupam jun chaki'j uwo sak ri man c'o ta wi be
Job12:25 ri xak quemakman chic pa ri k'ekumalil
Job13:1 Xubij ri Job: “Ronojel wa' e wilom cuc' ri kas e nu bak'wäch
Job13:2 Ri iweta'm ix xukuje' ri in weta'm; man c'o ta jun jasach ri ma ta quinjunamataj ta wi iwuc'.
Job13:3 Are c'u utz na chwe quintzijon ruc' ri Dios
Job13:4 Ri ix quich'uk ri kastzij cuc' tak ri e i banoj tak tzij;
Job13:5 ¡we ta xak ta xuwi quixeyenic
Job13:6 Chibana' tok'ob
Job13:7 ¿La are pa i c'u'x chi quito' u wi' ri Dios cuc' tak ri e i banoj tzij
Job13:8 Ix i cojom iwib ruc' are c'u quiwaj quito' u wi'.
Job13:9 ¿Jas c'u lo ri cac'ulmatajic we quixunic'oj ri Dios? ¿La quixcuin c'u lo che u subic jacha' jun winak?
Job13:10 We ruc' subunic qui coj iwib ruc'
Job13:11 Ri u nimalil ri Dios quixunojisaj na che xe'n ib xukuje' nimalaj xibin ib.
Job13:12 Ri e to'bal tak iwib ri man e c'o ta chi qui patan xa e puc'uc' tak ulew; xak junam ri' we ta cajwax u to'ic ib cumal nimak tak tapia ri e re t'ac.
Job13:13 Are c'u ri camic
Job13:14 Quinjach ri nu c'aslemal pa ri xak quieb cubij
Job13:15 Pune' qui nu cämisaj ri are'
Job13:16 Craj ne chi' c'o wi ri nu to'tajisaxic
Job13:17 Kas
Job13:18 Quenya' u bixic ri to'bal wib
Job13:19 We c'o jachin jun c'o jas qui nu tzujuj wi
Job13:20 Che ya' la xuwi quieb jastak chwe
Job13:21 Chtanaba' la u c'äjisaxic nu wäch maban c'u la chwe chi sibalaj chinxibij ta wib.
Job13:22 Chinsiq'uij la
Job13:23 Bij la chwe
Job13:24 ¿Jasche cac'u' ib la chnuwäch? ¿Jasche je ta ne caban la chwe chi in jun c'ulel?
Job13:25 In jacha' jun u xak che' chuwäch ri quiakik'
Job13:26 Quebec'am la ulok c'ayilaj tak tzujunic panuwi'; cäbij la chwe chi chebenk'alajisaj tak ri macaj ri xebenban pa ri walc'alal.
Job13:27 Quebe coj la tikom ch'ich' chque tak ri wakan
Job13:28 Nojimal cätajin quinpuk'pubic jacha' jun jasach ri k'ayinak
Job14:1 “Ri achi
Job14:2 Xak junam ruc' jun cotz'i'j ri cujak rib chanim c'ut cachaki'jaric; coc'owic cäsach c'ut jacha' jun nanoch'.
Job14:3 ¿La yo'm c'u wäch la che we achi ri'
Job14:4 Man c'o ta jun cacuinic cäresaj ch'ajch'ojil che ri tz'ilol.
Job14:5 We c'u lal ri' ri cabin la joropa' junab cäcasi' ri winak
Job14:6 chesaj ri bak'wäch la puwi' chya' c'u la can pa jamaril; ¡Chya' la che chi cäroc'owisaj ri u c'aslemal pa ri tojom chac!
Job14:7 Aretak cajicax juwi' che'
Job14:8 Pune' ri'jobenak chic ri u c'amal cätajin ta chi c'u cak'ay ri u cuta'mil chupam ri ulew
Job14:9 aretak cuna' ri u jorjobenic ri ja'
Job14:10 Are' c'u ri winak kas cacäm wi man c'o ta relic chupam; aretak c'u cacämic
Job14:11 Ri ja' re ri plo cuya' cäsacäbaric
Job14:12 we c'u c'ä wocol ri caj
Job14:13 ¡C'o ta banom wi quinc'u' ta wib chupam ri rajawibal ri cämical aretak coc'ow ri oyowal la
Job14:14 We cacäm jun winak
Job14:15 Lal quinsiq'uij na la ri'
Job14:16 We ri camic queyuxlej la ri e u xo'l tak wakan chquijujunal
Job14:17 queya' la ri' ri e wetzelal pa ri sachinakil
Job14:18 Xukuje' tak ne ri juyub cäsach qui wäch cumal ri qui wulijic
Job14:19 Je jacha' ri ja' ri cujarisaj ri abaj xukuje' ri jäb cujoc bic ri puc'uc' ulew
Job14:20 Xa jumul cäch'äcan la puwi'
Job14:21 We ri e u c'ojol quebux nimak qui k'ij ri are' man cunabej taj; we quekaj pa u q'ueyowal
Job14:22 xuwi quebuna' ri c'axc'ol re ri kas u cuerp
Job15:1 Ri Elipaz xubij: “Ri c'o u no'j man cutzelej ta u wäch ri tzij ri cäbix che cuc' tak tzij ri man c'o ta caquibij mawi cusipojisaj ta rib cuc' tak chomanic ri xa' e quiakik';
Job15:2 
Job15:3 man xak ta cäch'aw chi jeri' mawi quebubij jastak ri man c'o ta qui patan.
Job15:4 Are c'u ri at casach u wäch ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Dios: ¡cawetzelaj u wäch ri jicalaj k'ijilanic!
Job15:5 Ri itzel retamabal a c'u'x cabanowic chi je catch'aw wa' quebacoj c'u subunelalaj tak tzij.
Job15:6 Man cajwataj ta chic catintzujuj
Job15:7 ¿La are pa a c'u'x chi man c'o ta jun winak c'olinak ta can nabe chawäch
Job15:8 ¿La are pa a c'u'x chi at ya'l u no'j ri Dios pa awe wi
Job15:9 ¿Jas ta c'ut ri aweta'm at ri ma ta ketamam uj? ¿Jas ta ri ch'obonic ri ma ta xukuje' c'o kuc' uj?
Job15:10 ¡Ri uj uj tz'akatalaj tak winak chic
Job15:11 ¿La ma ta cubana' chawe chi kas are' ri Dios cacu'bisan a c'u'x xukuje' chi sibalaj ch'uch'uj a ch'abexic cätajin cakabano?
Job15:12 ¿Jasche caya' awib chi catucharchatej bic ri u rayinic ri awanima' quebawesaj c'u u pix k'ak' chquipam ri a bak'wäch?
Job15:13 ¿Jasche caban awoyowal chrij ri Dios quebatzokopij tak c'ut ri e a c'ulelanic?
Job15:14 Man c'o ta winak ri sibalaj ta ch'ajch'oj ri ma ta curik chak'maquil.
Job15:15 Mawi c'u ne ri e tako'n aj caj ya'tal ta chque chi cacu'bax ta c'uxaj chquij
Job15:16 ¡etac'ulo ri winak
Job15:17 Chinatatabej
Job15:18 ri quequitijoj ri ajno'jab chke. Ri e are' xquetamaj cuc' ri e qui mam
Job15:19 chque c'u wa' xya' wi ri ulew man xequiyuj ta quib jule' tak winak chic chquixo'l.
Job15:20 Ri u c'aslemal ri itzel winak ri ch'u'j u jolom man naj ta cac'asi'c nojinak che c'axc'ol.
Job15:21 Quebuta' tararem ri cuxe'j rib cumal; aretak man c'o ta latz' c'o wi man c'o ta cunabej cakaj pa qui k'ab ri eläk'omab.
Job15:22 Man c'o ta eyebal c'uxaj ruc' cato'taj ta pa ri k'ekumalil; ¡eyebetal rumal jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j che u cämisaxic!
Job15:23 Ri cäminak u ti'jal cajwataj che qui ti' tak ri c'uch; ri are' reta'm chi man c'o ta relic chupam ri retzeletajic.
Job15:24 Ri k'ekumalil cunojisaj na che nimalaj xibin ib
Job15:25 Are' wa' cuc'ulmaj na ri cuwalijisaj ri u k'ab chrij ri Dios
Job15:26 ri to'm rumal jun quetequic ch'ich'
Job15:27 Xsach ri u palaj pa ri u chomal xukuje' tak ri e u c'alc'a'x.
Job15:28 Ri tinimit tak ri chjeki' wi na quebetzeletaj na canok; ri ja tak quejamajob canok quebux na jumulaj ch'akatak tak xan.
Job15:29 Man q'ui ta k'ijol cux na k'inom
Job15:30 Man cacuintaj caresaj rib pa ri k'ekumalil. Cux na junam ruc' juwi' tico'n ri queporox ri e u tux rumal ri k'ak' o ri quebok bic ri e u cotz'ijal rumal ri quiakik'.
Job15:31 Mucu'ba' u c'u'x ruc' conil chrij ri subunic
Job15:32 C'ä majok chopan ri u k'ijol cäbe qui chaki'jaric tak ri e u k'ab man c'u queraxar ta chi jumul.
Job15:33 Cux na junam ruc' juwi' uva ri man quechak'ajtaj ri u wäch
Job15:34 Ri man queniman ta che ri Dios man quepok'colij ta na ri quija'lil
Job15:35 Qui chapom u q'uiyisaxic e lawaloyil quecalc'ualaj c'u etzelal; ri wächinic ri caquiq'uiyisaj are' ri subunic.”
Job16:1 Ri Job xubij: “Q'ui mul e nu tatabem chic jastak ri xa co'l man e junam. Ri ix
Job16:2 
Job16:3 ¿La xa' man c'o ta qui q'uisic tak ri tzij ri man c'o ta jas caquibij? ¿Jas wa' chi ch'ujilal ri cäban che nu c'ulelaxic?
Job16:4 We ta ix
Job16:5 ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij ri que cu'bisan tak c'uxaj
Job16:6 Mawi ne ri tzijonem cutanaba' ta ri nu k'oxomal
Job16:7 Ri Dios in u k'itajisam; e u tokim tak conojel tak ri e wachil in u cojom c'ut pa che'.
Job16:8 U walijisam k'alajisanic che nu c'ulelaxic; e u tac'abam tak jalum k'alajisanic chwij.
Job16:9 Ri Ajawaxel are caraj quinkaj pa u k'ab che nu t'okopixic
Job16:10 Ri winak caquimulij quib chwij
Job16:11 Ri Dios in u jachom pa qui k'ab ri e banal tak etzelal ri e banal tak il patan.
Job16:12 In c'o pa jamaril
Job16:13 Pa conojel c'olbal quinuq'uiako; cujut ri nu cuerp man ruc' ta jubik' tok'obisam wächaj
Job16:14 Quebujakala' tak ri e nu socotajic
Job16:15 In nojinak che bis
Job16:16 Sipojinak ri nu palaj rumal ri ok'ej; e sutz'irinak ri nu bak'wäch
Job16:17 man c'o ta c'u ne jumul c'o ta tokinic nu banom ta che jachin jun xukuje' chi uxinak c'u ne ch'ajch'oj ri nu ch'awem ruc' Dios.
Job16:18 We il patan ri' ri cäk'abax chwij
Job16:19 C'o jachin jun ri' pa ri caj ri cak'alajisan che u to'ic nu wi'
Job16:20 chebuk'axej tak ri e nu chomanic chuwäch ri Dios
Job16:21 c'o jachin cach'aw panuwi' ruc' ri Dios
Job16:22 Ri quieb oxib junab ri c'ä e c'o na chnuwäch cätajin queboc'owic
Job17:1 “Cätajin cäbe ri wuxlab; ri nu c'aslemal cätajin canakajin che ri u q'uistajic; cätajin quinreyej ri nu julil.
Job17:2 Chi nu xcut xuwi e c'o winak ri caquitze'j nu wäch; pa k'ij xukuje' chak'ab quintzu' ri qui tzurunic.
Job17:3 Lal c'ut Ajawaxel cacuin la cato' la nu wi'; ¿jachin taj we man lal ri cacuin la che u banic?
Job17:4 Lal ri yojim la ri qui ch'obobal
Job17:5 Caquicoch' na numic ri e qui c'ojol ri e jachin tak
Job17:6 Lal lal banowinak chi conojel chinquiyok'o chi chiquichubaj c'ut ri nu palaj.
Job17:7 Ri e nu bak'wäch quesutz'ar rumal ri k'oxomal; ri nu cuerp xak alicha' chic jun nutub.
Job17:8 Aretak cäil wa'
Job17:9 Caquicoj qui chuk'ab che u bixic chi e suc'
Job17:10 Tisaj c'ut waral
Job17:11 Cätajin queboc'ow tak ri k'ij rech ri nu c'aslemal
Job17:12 Are c'u ri ix quijal wachij ri chak'ab che pa k'ij; ¡pune' c'u ne c'o ri k'ekumalil
Job17:13 Ri quincuin che reyexic xak xuwi ri cämical
Job17:14 ¡Ri nu tat
Job17:15 ¿Jawije' canajinak wi ri weyebal nu c'u'x? ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri utzil chwe?
Job17:16 ¿La quekaj lo wuc' chupam ri rajawibal ri cämical
Job18:1 Ri Bildad xubij: “¿Jampa' lo caquitanaba' tzijtzotem tak we winak ri'? We ta c'o u patan
Job18:2 
Job18:3 ¿Jasche cäban chke chi xa uj je ta ne awaj cujchomax c'ut chi xa uj mes?
Job18:4 ¿La are ta pa a c'u'x chi rumal ri u ch'akatisaxic awib ruc' oyowal cätoli' ta can ri uwächulew o ri abaj tak caquiq'uex ta qui c'olbal?
Job18:5 Cächup na ri u chäj ri itzel winak
Job18:6 Ri u chäj ri cac'amow u be cachup na; man c'o ta chäj canicow ta na pa ri rachoch.
Job18:7 Man quebel ta puwi' ri cubano cac'amitaj na canok chupam ri kas u c'amibal.
Job18:8 Cäcoj na jun putzquiyibal pa ri u be chupam c'ut we putzquiyibal ri' caputzquiyitaj wi na.
Job18:9 Cäcoj na jun colob chquiwäch ri rakan
Job18:10 Ri c'amibal c'utal ri' pa ri be che u c'amixic aretak coc'owic.
Job18:11 Xak xe'j rib pa apachique c'olbal; xe'j rib chi terenetal ri e u xo'l tak rakan.
Job18:12 Ri e u chuk'ab queq'uis na
Job18:13 Ri yabilal
Job18:14 Xukuje' boktajinak ri jamaril pa ri rachoch cacharchatex bic chuwäch ri ajawinel ri cojolxib.
Job18:15 Cät'ik k'ak' che ri rachoch; cajopix na asubre chquipam tak ri rulew.
Job18:16 Jacha' jun che' ri e chaki'jarinak tak ri u c'amal ri e yututurinak tak ri e u k'ab.
Job18:17 Ri u nataxic cachupisax cho ri uwächulew man canatax ta chi c'ut ri u bi'.
Job18:18 Quesax bic jawije' c'o wi ri sakilal carokix chupam ri k'ekumalil; quesax na bic chuwäch we uwächulew ri'.
Job18:19 Man quecanaj ta rija'lil chupam ri u tinimit; man c'o ta jun aj uwo rachoch cac'asi' ta canok.
Job18:20 Aretak ri e aj elebal k'ij xukuje' ri aj u kajebal k'ij caquetamaj ri xataklebej
Job18:21 Je u q'uisic wa' ri u c'aslemal ri banal etzelal
Job19:1 Ri Job je xubij wa': “¿C'ä jampa' quitanaba' nu c'axc'obisaxic xukuje' nu soquic cumal tak ri e i tzij?
Job19:2 
Job19:3 Jumul camul ix yok'oninak chwe; ¿la ma ta quixq'uixic chi je i banom wa' chwe?
Job19:4 Pune' ta c'u ne in uxinak ajchak'mac
Job19:5 Are pa i c'u'x ix chi ix utz na chnuwäch
Job19:6 Kas ba' chi wetamaj chi are' ri Dios banowinak ri c'ax chwe
Job19:7 In quinrak nu chi': ‘¡Quincämisaxic!’
Job19:8 Ri Dios u tz'apim ri be chnuwäch rech man quinoc'owtaj; u nojisam ri nu be che k'ekumalil.
Job19:9 E resam ri nu k'inomal; resam ri nu corona.
Job19:10 In u yo'm can pa jun nimalaj etzeletajic; ¡e resam ri e u c'amal ri weyebal c'uxaj!
Job19:11 Xukasaj ri royowal panuwi' je ta ne ri u banom ta u c'ulel chwe.
Job19:12 Conojel ri rajch'ojab xquiq'uiak quib panuwi'; xquicholajij quib chrij ri wachoch xquisuc'umaj quib che u q'uiakic quib chwij.
Job19:13 Ri Dios u banom chi ri e wachalal xukuje' tak ri e wachil quenajtin chwe caquiban c'u chwe chi je ta ne ri ma ta queta'm nu wäch.
Job19:14 Ri e wachalaxic xukuje' tak ri e wachil in qui tzakom canok; ri xejeki' can pa ri wachoch in sachinak pa qui jolom. Ri e nu pataninel tak we ixokib man c'o ta chi nu banic chquiwäch; man caquiya' ta chi nu k'ij.
Job19:15 
Job19:16 We quinsiq'uij jun achi pataninel wech
Job19:17 We quinkeb ruc' ri wixokil
Job19:18 Xukuje' ne ri ac'alab caquetzelaj nu wäch; xuwi quinwalijic
Job19:19 Ri e wachil ri sibalaj kanima' kib cuc' caquetzelaj nu wäch; ri sibalaj e lok' chnuwäch qui banom qui c'ulel chwe.
Job19:20 Ri nu tz'umal canaq'ui chque ri nu bakil
Job19:21 Chel i c'u'x chwe
Job19:22 ¿Jasche quitakej u banic c'ax chwe jacha' ri cuban ri Dios? ¿La ma ta sibalaj i banom chi c'ax chwe?
Job19:23 ¡C'o ta banom wi c'o ta jachin quetz'iban tak ri e nu tzij quebutzoc' ta c'u can chuwäch ch'ich'!
Job19:24 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi c'o ta jachin jun ruc' jun ch'ich' tzoc'obal quebutzoc' ta c'u chuwäch ri räxmamaj ch'ich' o chuwäch jun abaj rech man quesach taj!
Job19:25 In weta'm chi ri to'l we c'aslic
Job19:26 Pune' ta c'u ne ri nu tz'umal quetzak pa tak ch'akatak
Job19:27 Cuc' ri kas e nu bak'wäch quinwil na u wäch
Job19:28 Ri e nu chuk'ab xetuktubic aretak xinta' ri quibij: ‘¿Jas ri cakabano rech ma ta cäkatanaba' u banic c'ax che? Ri e u xe' ri retzelal kas ruc' e c'o wi.’
Job19:29 Chixe'j ba' iwib chuwäch ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j
Job20:1 Ri Zopar xubij: “Ri at quinawesaj ch'u'j xukuje' caq'uis ri nu coch'onic; rumal ri' quinwaj quintzelej qui wäch tak ri e a tzij.
Job20:2 
Job20:3 Cumal tak ri e a c'ulelanic quintzuritajic
Job20:4 At aweta'm chi amak'el je banom ulok wa' kas aretak c'olinak ulok winak cho ri uwächulew:
Job20:5 Ri u jajatem ri banal etzelal man cabeytaj taj; ri u quicotemal xa' re jok'otaj.
Job20:6 Pune' sibalaj naj elinak chicaj jacha' ri caj copan ta c'u ri u jolom c'ä pa tak ri sutz'
Job20:7 cäsach na u wäch jacha' ri u mes awaj e are' tak c'ut ri rachil man caquetamaj taj ri xuc'ulmaj.
Job20:8 Cäsach na u wäch jacha' jun ichic'
Job20:9 Ri xec'oji' can ruc' ri xquil u wäch man caquil ta chi u wäch.
Job20:10 Ri e u c'ojol caquitzelej na chque ri mebayib ri reläk'am.
Job20:11 C'o pa ronojel ri u chuk'ab xukuje' pa ri ralc'alal cäkaj c'u na chupam ri cämuk wi.
Job20:12 Ri etzelal sibalaj qui' cuna' cuc'ol c'u chuxe' ri rak';
Job20:13 cumuyej ri u qui'al pa u chi' nojimal cuch'abach'a' pa u chi'.
Job20:14 Chanim c'ut caq'uextajic cux u k'inob cumätz chupam.
Job20:15 Quebuxawaj ri k'inomal ri e u bik'om; ri Dios queresaj ulok chupam.
Job20:16 Cätajin cuca'yej ri u k'inob ri cumätz
Job20:17 Man cacuin taj carechbej ri u q'uiyal ri leche xukuje' ri juyubal räx cab
Job20:18 Ronojel ri u ch'äcom
Job20:19 Xebut'orij chque ri mebayib xebuwonoba' c'ut; xerechbej tak ja ri man xebuyac taj.
Job20:20 Mawi c'u jubik' xuk'il ta rib che ri u munil
Job20:21 man c'o ta jun jasach ri xto'taj taj chuwäch ri u tz'iyal. Rumal ri' man cabeytaj ta ri utzil pa ri u c'aslemal.
Job20:22 Jacha' ri u nimal ri u k'inomal ri u nimal ri c'okonic puwi'; cakaj na ri qui k'ab ri banal tak etzelal puwi'.
Job20:23 Aretak cuchomaj u nojisaxic ri u pam
Job20:24 We cäto'taj chuwäch jun ch'ojibal re räx ch'ich'
Job20:25 Ri ch'ab cujutquej na ri cuerp
Job20:26 chuq'uisbalil camojcolix na rumal jun k'ekumalil. Jun k'ak' ri man cajwataj ta u k'ak'axic caq'uisow na tzij puwi' xukuje' ronojel ri rachoch.
Job20:27 Ri caj cuya' na ri u mac chisak
Job20:28 Aretak capulin ri royowal ri Dios puwi'
Job20:29 Are wa' ri taklebenic ri cuya' na ri Dios che ri lawalo; are' rechbal wa' ri suc'umam che.”
Job21:1 Ri Job xubij: “Ri utzalaj cu'bisabal c'uxaj ri quixcuinic quiya' chwe are' ri qui tatabexic tak ri nu tzij.
Job21:2 
Job21:3 Chixcoch'onok aretak quinch'awic
Job21:4 Ri nu ch'o'j man ruc' ta jun winak; rumal ri' q'uisnak ri nu coch'onic.
Job21:5 We quiya' i xiquin che ri quinbij
Job21:6 We kas ri in quinchoman che wa'
Job21:7 ¿jasche caquitakej c'aslem ri itzel tak winak
Job21:8 Quequil qui q'uiyic tak ri calc'ual xukuje' ri qui' tak qui mam
Job21:9 Man c'o ta c'u cacojow u xib ri qui jamaril pa ri cachoch; man cäc'äjisax ta qui wäch rumal ri Dios.
Job21:10 Quepok' ri rawaj; ri cal man quecämtaj.
Job21:11 Ri e calc'ual cacokatala' tak quib quebetz'en c'ut jacha' ri alaj ama'ib tak chij
Job21:12 ruc' jajatem c'ut quexojowic xukuje' quech'opilajic je jas ri rok'ibal ri arp
Job21:13 Caquiq'uis ri qui c'aslemal ruc' tz'ebenic; pa utzil quemukic.
Job21:14 Caquibij c'u che ri Dios: ‘¡Chujya la can pa jamaril
Job21:15 ¿Jachin ri' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem rech cakapatanij? ¿Jas cakach'äco chi cäkalok'ok'ej?’
Job21:16 (E are' tak c'ut ri banal tak etzelal man quech ta ri c'olem pa utzil. ¡Naj chc'ol wi chwe chi quinchomanic e jacha' ri e are'!)
Job21:17 ¿Jampa' ta chupinak ri qui chäj ri banal tak etzelal? ¿Jampa' ta e kajinak pa jun u q'ueyowal? ¿Jampa' ta oyowarinak ri Dios cuc' e u jachom ta c'u pa ri rikoj c'ax?
Job21:18 ¿Jampa' ta e jabum jacha' ri pajo ri cac'am bic rumal ri sutinel quiakik'?
Job21:19 Cäbixic chi ri Dios cubano chi ri e calc'ual e are' quetojow ri qui mac ri qui tat. Kas are' c'ut ri banal etzelal ri rajawaxic cutojo' cusic' c'u u no'j.
Job21:20 Rajawaxic c'ut are' ri cäc'äjisax u wäch rumal ri royowal ri c'o ronojel u cuinem.
Job21:21 ¿Jas ta chi re che ri caquic'ulmaj ri aj uwo rachoch aretak cäminak chic ri are'?
Job21:22 (¿Jachin ta c'ut ri cacuinic quebuya' ta tijonic che ri Dios
Job21:23 E c'o jachintak quebopan chuwäch ri cämical e nojinak che qui chuk'ab
Job21:24 E nojinak che tz'ebenic xukuje' rutzil wächaj.
Job21:25 E c'o chi c'u jule'
Job21:26 Xak c'u ne
Job21:27 In weta'm ri qui chomaj chwij xukuje' ri itzel tak chomanic ri e c'o iwuc'.
Job21:28 Caquic'otola' c'u qui chi': ‘¿Jawije' canajinak wi ri rachoch we banal etzelal ri' ri mawi xtok'obisan ta wächaj?’
Job21:29 ¿La ma ta ix tzijoninak cuc' tak ri winak ri quebinacatic? ¿La ma ta e i tom tak ri jastak ri quequitzijoj:
Job21:30 chi aretak coyowar ri Dios
Job21:31 Man c'o ta c'u jun cäq'uikow ta ri u c'aslemal chu palaj
Job21:32 Aretak c'u chuq'uisbalil cac'am bic pa mukunajic
Job21:33 
Job21:34 ¡Xak qui pa k'ij iwib cho che' cho abaj aretak quiwaj quicu'bisaj nu c'u'x! ¡Xa banoj tzij ronojel ri quibij!”
Job22:1 Ri Elipaz xubij: “¿La are ta pa a c'u'x at chi ri winak
Job22:2 
Job22:3 ¿Jas ta ri cärechbej o c'o ta cuch'äc ri c'o ronojel u cuinem chi ri at at suc' xukuje' chi ma ta c'o jun a mac?
Job22:4 We ri are' catujic'o catusiq'uij c'ut rech cäretamaj jas ri cätajin cabano
Job22:5 xane' xa u mac rech chi sibalaj e q'ui tak ri e awetzelal xukuje' tak ri e a mac man e c'o ta qui c'ulbatil.
Job22:6 At
Job22:7 Ri xchaki'j u chi'
Job22:8 ¡C'o c'u ronojel pa a k'ab xukuje' nim catil wi
Job22:9 Man c'o ta jas caya' bic chque ri malca'nib aretak quepe awuc' e a yo'm c'ut ri minorib pa c'ax.
Job22:10 Rumal ri' xak quieb cubij pawi' camic
Job22:11 Ronojel k'ekumalil man c'o ta jas catcuin che rilic; jun rekbala' catbik'owic.
Job22:12 Ri Dios c'o pa ri c'olbal ri sibalaj chicaj c'o wi puwi' ri caj; ri ch'imil ri sibalaj chicaj e c'o wi quecanaj can chquixe' ri rakan.
Job22:13 ¿Jas ri cabano rech catcuinic cabij chi ri Dios man cänabentaj
Job22:14 ¿Jas ri cabano rech catcuinic cabij chi ri Dios man caca'y ta cätajin c'u cawacatilob pa ri caj?
Job22:15 ¿La cachomaj u takexic ri k'ekumalaj be ri qui takem ri e banal tak etzelal?
Job22:16 We winak ri' sibalaj chanim xecämic e jacha' ta ne ri xecharchatex ta bic rumal jun u tza'm ja'.
Job22:17 Quecha' che ri Dios: ‘¡Chujaya' can xak chjeri'! ¿Jas ta ri cacuin ri c'o ronojel u cuinem che u banic chke?’
Job22:18 (Ri are'
Job22:19 Ri e suc' caquil wa' quejajat c'ut; ri man c'o ta qui mac quetz'enic.
Job22:20 Aretak caquilo chi ri qui k'inomal ri banal tak etzelal cäsach qui wäch rumal ri k'ak'.
Job22:21 Chatutzir ruc' ri Dios
Job22:22 Chajacha' awib pa u k'ab rech catutijoj
Job22:23 We camach'irisaj awib
Job22:24 we c'u cawil ri k'an puak ri sibalaj pakal rajil jacha' ta ne ri puc'uc' ulew
Job22:25 ri c'o ronojel u cuinem are' cux na a k'an puak xukuje' a sak puak ri telechi'm.
Job22:26 Are' c'u cux na a jajatibal
Job22:27 We c'o jas catz'onoj che
Job22:28 Utz c'u catel na pa ronojel ri cachaplej u banic; ri chäj catunun na pa ri a be.
Job22:29 Rumal rech chi ri Dios cumach'irisaj ri cuban nimal. Cuto'tajisaj c'ut ri cumach' rib.
Job22:30 Ri are' catutor na
Job23:1 Ri Job xubij: “Jumul chic ri e nu tzujunic e c'ayil rumal rech chi ri Dios e u kasan ri ralal ri u k'ab panuwi'.
Job23:2

Job23:4 Quink'alajisaj ta c'u chuwäch ri nu c'ulmam
Job23:5 ¡Weta'm ta c'u ri' ri tzelebal wächaj ri quinya'o che ri cutzelej ta na u bixic chwe!
Job23:6 Ri are' man cucoj ta na ri' ri chuk'ab che nuc'ulelaxic
Job23:7 cuya' c'u na u k'ij chi takal ri quinbij; cuk'alajisaj na ri' chi man c'o ta nu mac
Job23:8 Quintzucuj c'u ri Dios pa ri elebal k'ij
Job23:9 Quinsuc' pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij

Job23:12 Amak'el e nu tz'akatisam tak ri e u pixab xukuje' tak ri e u takomal

Job23:14 Ri u chomam u banic chwe

Job24:1 “¿Jasche ri c'o ronojel u cuinem man cuch'ic ta k'ijol che u banic ri cubana'
Job24:2 Ri itzel tak winak quequiq'uex ri qui c'ulbatil tak ri ulew
Job24:3 quequitokij tak ri cawaj ri minorib xukuje' ri malca'nib.
Job24:4 Quequesaj ri mebayib chupam ri qui be
Job24:5 Ri mebayib
Job24:6 Quequipich'olij u jolom tak trico pa tak ri culew ri winak o quequiq'uisisej tak quib che quimolic tak uva ri e quitzakom canok ri itzel tak winak.
Job24:7 Cacoc'owisaj ri ak'ab man c'o ta ch'akap qui k'u'
Job24:8 Ri jäb re ri c'ache'laj quebuch'akakisaj
Job24:9 Quequitokij ri cal tak ri malca'nib ri c'äte ri' xebalatajic
Job24:10 Quet'unucut ri mebayib quebinic
Job24:11 Quequisutij tak ri ca' che resaxic ri aseit; quequipitz tak ri uva che resaxic ri u wa'l cätajin c'u quecäm che chaki'j chi'.
Job24:12 Naj e c'o wi che ri tinimit ri elem cuban canima' quebok'ic sibalaj c'u quech'ikowic
Job24:13 E c'o jujun caquetzelaj u wäch ri chäj
Job24:14 Xuwi cäsakaric cäwalij ri cämisanel che u cämisaxic ri meba'
Job24:15 Ri winak ri c'ulanic ri cäkaj pa tak mac cuc' ri rach winak careyej na coc u moy
Job24:16 Ri eläk'om cunim rib chak'ab pa tak ri ja. Conojel caquitz'apij quib pa k'ij; qui c'ulel ri chäj.
Job24:17 Ri sakilal re pa k'ij nimalaj k'ekumalil wa' chque; are cäkaj ri xibibalalaj chak'ab chquiwäch.”
Job24:18 Ri Zopar xubij: “Ri itzel winak cacharchatex bic rumal ri ja'. Ri e rulew tak quecanaj chuxe' c'okonic man c'o ta jun caraj cachacun chic pa tak ri u ticbal uva.
Job24:19 Ruc' ri u k'ak'al ri sak'ij
Job24:20 Cäsach na pa u jolom ri kas u nan; catijow na cumal ri xjut
Job24:21 Amak'el man xutok'obisaj ta qui wäch ri ixokib ri man c'o ta cal xukuje' ri malca'nib; mawi jumul xebuto'.
Job24:22 Are' c'u ri Dios
Job24:23 Ri Dios cuya' chque chi quec'asi' ruc' jiquibam c'uxaj
Job24:24 Xa jok'otaj cawalij ri lawalo
Job24:25 We c'u man jewa'

Job25:2 ri are' cujekeba' ri jamaril pa ri caj.

Job25:4 ¿La cäcuin ta c'u lo
Job25:5 Chquiwäch ri e u bak'wäch
Job25:6 ¡e ta c'u lo ri winak; we xjut ri' ri man c'o ta jas cac'am che!”
Job26:1 Ri Job xubij: “¡Je' ba' wa' ri u to'ic ri tukar
Job26:2 
Job26:3 ¡Sibalaj ba' aweta'm u ya'ic no'j xukuje' u tijoxic ri man c'o ta retamanic!
Job26:4 ¿La ruc' ri u to'banic jachinok e bim tak we tzij ri'? ¿Jachin atuxlabininak chi je catch'aw wa'?”
Job26:5 Ri Bildad xubij: “Ri cäminakib ri e jekel chupam ri choalaj plo
Job26:6 Ri quemuk wi ri cäminakib
Job26:7 Ri Dios xuliq'uiq'uej ri caj puwi' ri tolonic u colobam c'u ri uwächulew puwi' ri man c'o taj.
Job26:8 Ri are' cutz'apij ri ja' chupam ri sutz' mawi c'u quet'okopitaj ri sutz' ruc' ri ralal;
Job26:9 cuk'ekumaj ri u palaj ri ic' cuch'uk c'u ruc' jun sutz';
Job26:10 u cojom ri u q'uisbalil ri u wäch ri plo xukuje' ri u q'uisbalil ri sakilal ruc' ri k'ekumalil.
Job26:11 Aretak ri Dios cucoj xib
Job26:12 Ruc' ri u chuk'ab xtakan puwi' ri plo; ruc' ri u nawiquil xuch'äc ri jilijic Rahab.
Job26:13 Ruc' ri u wupunic xujamajobisaj ri u wäch ri caj; ruc' ri u k'ab xucämisaj ri cumätz ri xak cacasasic.
Job26:14 Xa c'u jubik' wa' chque tak ri e u chac; xak c'u alicha' ka tom jubik' ¿Jachin ta lo ri cacuinic cach'obow ri cuinelalaj u cakulja'?”
Job27:1 Ri Job xubij: “¡Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Job27:2 
Job27:3 joropa' k'ij cuya' nu chuk'ab che wuxlabic
Job27:4 mawi jubik' quinbij ta na banoj tzij mawi quebenbij ta tzij ri xak ta e u cawäch!
Job27:5 Joropa' k'ij quinc'asi'c
Job27:6 Man quinwesaj ta wib chupam chi in tz'akat pa ronojel
Job27:7 ¡Chi ronojel ri cuk'alajisaj rib chi u banom u c'ulel chwe chutaklebej ri u c'aslemal ri banal etzelal xukuje' ri rech ri man suc' taj!
Job27:8 ¿Jas lo ri eyebal c'uxaj ri careyej ri man caniman ta che ri Dios aretak chesax ri u c'aslemal rumal ri Dios?
Job27:9 Aretak c'o pa tak ri e u q'ueyowal
Job27:10 We winak ri' man curik ta ri u quicotemal ruc' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Job27:11 Quenc'utu' ri nimalaj u cuinem ri Dios chiwäch
Job27:12 We iwonojel ix iwilom chic
Job27:13 Ri Zopar xubij: “Are c'äjisabal wächaj wa' ri cuya' na ri Dios
Job27:14 Pune' sibalaj e q'ui ri qui c'ojol
Job27:15 Ri quec'asi' canok
Job27:16 Ri itzel winak pune' ta ne quebumulij sak puak jacha' ulew
Job27:17 jun winak ri tz'akat pa ronojel quecojow tak na we atz'iak ri' jun c'u winak ri tz'akat pa ronojel cäsachow na we sak puak ri'.
Job27:18 Ri rachoch ri itzel winak man co taj
Job27:19 Q'uisbal mul cäk'oyi na k'inom
Job27:20 Pa k'ij copan ri xibriquil ruc'
Job27:21 Ri quiakik' ruc' cakulja aj elebal k'ij cabokow na bic pa ri rachoch;
Job27:22 man ruc' ta tok'obisan wächaj cäpe na puwi'
Job27:23 Ri quiakik' cuterenej pa rakan ruc' cakulja xukuje' xulk'abic.”
Job28:1 “E c'o tak juyub ri quebesax wi ri sak puak xukuje' c'olbal ri cajosk'ix wi ri k'an puak.
Job28:2 Ri räx ch'ich' cäc'otix chupam ri ulew
Job28:3 Ri winak u q'uisom tzij puwi' ri k'ekumalil: cakaj chquipam tak ri c'olbal ri e c'o chuxe' ri ulew ri sibalaj naj e c'o wi chupam ri k'ekumalil
Job28:4 Caseyopic ximatal che jun colob
Job28:5 Ri ulew pa ri u wi'
Job28:6 Chila' queriktaj wi ri je'lic tak abaj ri sapir
Job28:7 Mawi tak ri alconib mawi jule' tak c'uch chic c'o ta jumul quilom ta we alaj tak be ri'.
Job28:8 Ri juyubal tak awaj man queboc'ow ta chila' mawi queboc'ow tak ri coj chila'.
Job28:9 Ri winak quebucoj tak ri u k'ab chque tak ri abaj quebubok c'u tak ri juyub c'ä chquixe'.
Job28:10 Quequiwor jul chquipam tak ri juyub curik c'u ronojel qui wäch k'inomal.
Job28:11 Queburik qui q'uiyibal tak nima' queresaj c'u chi sak jastak ri e c'utalic.
Job28:12 ¿Jawije' c'u cäpe wi ri no'j? ¿Jachique c'olbal c'o wi ri c'oxomanic?
Job28:13 Ri winak man reta'm taj ri rajil wa'
Job28:14 Ri nimalaj plo je cubij wa': ‘Man c'o ta waral’
Job28:15 Man cäban ta cuinem che u rikic ruc' k'an puak
Job28:16 Man cuya' taj cätoj ruc' ri k'an puak ri sibalaj pakal na rajil
Job28:17 Pakal na rajil chuwäch ri k'an puak xukuje' ri cha; man cuya' taj caq'uex cuc' tak jastak ri e re ch'ajch'ojalaj k'an puak.
Job28:18 Ri no'j are sibalaj pakal na rajil chuwäch ri je'lic abaj aj plo (ri coral u bi')
Job28:19 man cajunamataj ta ruc' ri crisolit aj Etiopiy
Job28:20 ¿Jawije' c'u lo
Job28:21 C'utal chquiwäch ri juyubal tak awaj
Job28:22 Xukuje' ne ri sachbal wächaj xukuje' ri cämical je caquibij wa: ‘Xuwi ka tom u tzijol wa'.’
Job28:23 Are c'u ri Dios etamaninak ri u be ri no'j; xak xuwi ri are' reta'm jawije' ri cäriktaj wi
Job28:24 ri are' cäril ri q'uisbal u jutz'il ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chuxe' ri caj.
Job28:25 Aretak ri Dios xuk'at ri u chuk'ab ri quiakik' xucoj c'u jun k'atibal che ri ja'
Job28:26 aretak xebucoj tak ri pixab che ri jäb xuc'ut c'ut ri u be ri cakulja
Job28:27 xril c'u ri no'j
Job28:28 xubij c'ut ri Dios chque ri winak: ‘Ri jicalaj u patanixic ri Ajawaxel: are no'j wa'; ri u tasic ib chrij ri etzelal: are' c'oxomanic wa'.’ ”
Job29:1 Ri Job xubij: “¡C'o ta banom wi quintzelej ta chi jumul pa tak ri k'ijol ri' aretak ri Dios quinuto'!
Job29:2 
Job29:3 Aretak ri are' xinutunuj ruc' ri u chäj ri in man xinbin taj pa ri k'ekumalil;
Job29:4 aretak xinc'oji' pa ri utzalaj tak nu junab are' c'u ri Dios cachajin ri nu jekelibal;
Job29:5 aretak ri c'o ronojel u cuinem c'o pa nu xcut in achilatal c'ut cumal tak ri nu c'ojol;
Job29:6 aretak quincoj che quich'ajic ri wakan ri leche ri aseit xak capulin ulok xo'l tak ri tzac'atzak tak abaj;
Job29:7 aretak quint'uyi pa ri nu t'uyulibal chupam ri c'olbal ri caban wi ri mulin ib chupam ri tinimit.
Job29:8 Ri alabom
Job29:9 Xukuje' ri achijab ri nimak qui k'ij caquitanaba' tzijonem caquiban etal chi c'o jun mäch'aw chic.
Job29:10 Ri k'atal tak tzij caquikasaj ri qui ch'abal; canaq'ui ri cak' pa qui chi'.
Job29:11 Ri winak
Job29:12 ri in xinya' to'banic chque ri e minorib xukuje' chque ri e mebayib
Job29:13 Ri xc'oji' pa ri tzakmajic quebuya' maltioxinic chwe; ri nu to'banic e are' chque ri malca'nib ri e ya'l quicotemal.
Job29:14 Ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri tz'akatil pa ronojel e nu tz'akatil wa': e are' watz'iak ronojel k'ij.
Job29:15 In in qui bak'wäch canok ri moyab xukuje' cakan ri ri e ch'äcoj ib
Job29:16 ¡qui tat ri c'o cajwataj chque xukuje' ch'awenel paquiwi' ri man e nu winakil taj!
Job29:17 In quinpaxij ri u xe' tak que ri e banal tak etzelal quinwesaj c'ut ri kajinak pa qui k'ab pune' c'o chic pa qui chi'.
Job29:18 In xinchomaj: ‘Chi ri e nu k'ij quebux na e jacha' ri sanyeb; in ri'j chic aretak chinecäm chupam ri kas wachoch.
Job29:19 Xak in junam ruc' juwi' che ri tiquil chuchi' ri ja'
Job29:20 Ri nu juluwem amak'el cac'ac'ar wuc'
Job29:21 Conojel xinquitatabej chwe caqueyej c'ut pa yinelem ri e nu yo'w tak no'j.
Job29:22 Aretak in ch'awinak chic
Job29:23 ri e are' sibalaj benak canima' che reyexic
Job29:24 Aretak quintze'tzat chquiwäch
Job29:25 Ri in xinjekeba' ri nu takanic paquiwi' in c'u quinyo'w u bixic chque ri rajawaxic u banic cumal
Job30:1 “Are' c'u ri camic caquitze'j nu wäch ri alabom ri sibalaj c'ä e c'ojolab na chnuwäch in
Job30:2 ¿Jas ta ri xupatanij ri u chuk'ab ri qui k'ab chwe? E winak wa' ri e tukarinak
Job30:3 rumal ri xibibalalaj wi'jal xukuje' q'uetetenic. Chak'ab
Job30:4 quequibok c'ayilaj tak k'ayes pa tak ri patzapak ta k'ayes
Job30:5 E winak ri etzelam qui wäch cumal ri utzalaj tak winak
Job30:6 quejeki' c'u na pa tak pec
Job30:7 quewun xo'l tak ri k'ayes
Job30:8 E winak ri man c'o ta qui patan
Job30:9 Are c'u ri camic caquitze'j nu wäch quinquicoj pa tak qui tzij.
Job30:10 Ruc' yok'onic quenajtin chwe
Job30:11 Camic ri man c'o ta chic nu patan mawi c'o chic nu k'ij
Job30:12 Caquimululej quib pa tak nu xcut
Job30:13 Caquitz'apij ri be chnuwäch
Job30:14 Jacha' ta ne pa jun c'ob ri jakal pa jun pimalaj tapia caquiq'uiak quib panuwi' ruc' ronojel chuk'ab.
Job30:15 Ri xibin ib xkaj panuwi'; ri nimalaj nu banic xanimajic jacha' ri quiakik'; ri nu k'inomal
Job30:16 Man quinwaj ta chic quintakej c'aslem; in kajinak pa u k'ab ri q'uistajisabal c'uxaj;
Job30:17 ri k'oxomal queboc c'ä pa tak ri nu bakil; man cutanaba' ta nu c'axc'obisaxic conojel ri jujun tak ak'ab.
Job30:18 Ri Dios in u chapom chi nu kul
Job30:19 Xinuq'uiak pa ri xok'ol
Job30:20 Quintz'onoj ri nu to'ic umal la
Job30:21 Lal uxinak man tok'obisal ta wächaj chwe. Quinokataj la ruc' c'anil.
Job30:22 Caban la chi qui nu tokij bic ri quiakik'
Job30:23 Weta'm chi are caj la quinc'am la bic chupam ri cämical
Job30:24 ¿La ma ta nu to'm ri meba' wesam c'u chupam ri u tzubukil?
Job30:25 ¿La ma ta wok'em u wäch ri curik c'ax ma ta c'u ne elinak nu c'u'x che ri caq'uetetic?
Job30:26 In weye'm ri rutzil wächaj
Job30:27 ri wanima' quel ch'u'j man cuxlantaj; xuwi c'u in queyem tak k'ij que c'axc'ol.
Job30:28 Wuc'am jun c'aslemal re bis
Job30:29 Je chi ne quinpe cachalal ri xex tak juyubal awaj
Job30:30 K'ekarinak ri nu tz'umal
Job30:31 Ri trompet quech ri arp xukuje' tak ri su' xebux juyuwibal re c'axc'ol chwe.”
Job31:1 “In nu yo'm nu tzij chi mawi ne mebenquiäk rayij ri k'apojib.
Job31:2 ¿Jachique ri rajil c'axelal ri cuya' ri c'o ronojel u cuinem chque ri winak chquijujunal kas chila' ulok chicaj?
Job31:3 ¿La ma ta che ri banal etzelal xukuje' che ri ajmac ri takal wi ri u q'ueyowal?
Job31:4 O ¿la xa man quebuca'yej ta ri Dios ri quinbano mawi queril ri u xo'l tak wakan chquijujunal?
Job31:5 Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Job31:6 ¡Chinupaja' ri Dios ruc' tz'akatalaj pajbal
Job31:7 We nu jalom nu be che ri suc'alaj be
Job31:8 chi jule' chic chetijow ri nu ticom qui boko c'u c'ä chuxe' ri xintico.
Job31:9 We xbe wanima' ruc' jun ixok o xinya' nu wäch che ri rixokil ri nu c'ulja
Job31:10 ri wixokil chux lok'om qui pataninel jule' chic apachique tak winak che k'oyol ruc'.
Job31:11 E itzel tak banoj ba' ri' ri e nu chac; ri takal wi c'äjisabal wächaj;
Job31:12 e jacha' jun c'atic ri cäsachisan wächaj cusachisaj c'u na u wäch ri c'o wuc'.
Job31:13 We ri nu pataninelab c'o jas caquich'a' chwe
Job31:14 ¿Jastak chic ri quinban ta chi che u tac'abaxic wib chuwäch ri Dios? ¿Jas ri quintzelej na u bixic aretak cuta' chwe jas ri nu banom?
Job31:15 Ri are' xujnuc'uw chupam ri pamaj
Job31:16 Mawi jumul ma ta xinto' ri meba' pa ri u q'uetetem mawi xak ta xinca'yej chi ri malca'nib xquina' numic.
Job31:17 Mawi jumul xintij ta juba' nu wa ri xak ta nu tuquiel ri ma ta xinya' re ri ac'al ri minor.
Job31:18 Amak'el xinux jun tataxel che ri minor; amak'el xinto' qui wi' ri malca'nib.
Job31:19 Aretak c'o jachin quinwilo chi cacämic u mac rech chi man c'o ta ratz'iak
Job31:20 ruc' ri quismal tak ri nu chij quebenmik'isaj
Job31:21 Mawi jubik' xincoj ta xibin ib che jun ac'al ri minor rumal rech chi junam nu wäch cuc' ri k'atal tak tzij.
Job31:22 We c'u man kastzij wa'
Job31:23 In quinxe'j can wib chuwäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri cuya' ri Dios; ¡ma ta xincuin ri' xintac'aba' ta wib chuwäch ri nimalaj u banic!
Job31:24 Mawi jubik' chrij ta ri k'an puak xinjiquiba' ta wi nu c'u'x o xincu'ba' ta wi nu c'u'x chi co in c'olic.
Job31:25 Mawi jubik' are ta xbe wanima' che u rikic nimalaj k'inomal o ri u ch'äquic nimalaj puak.
Job31:26 Wilom ri k'ij cajuluwic xukuje' cabin ri ic' ruc' ronojel ri u jolk'inic
Job31:27 mawi c'u jumul xebenk'ijilaj chi c'uyal mawi xebentz'umaj ta rumal ri nu k'ab.
Job31:28 Ya'tal wa' che u c'äjisaxic wächaj; ¡are u xutuxic ri Dios wa' aj chicaj wumal!
Job31:29 Mawi jumul xinjajat ta che tze' aretak ri nu c'ulel xkaj ta chupam jun etzelal
Job31:30 Mawi jumul xinq'uiak ta itzel tzij puwi' mawi xinrayij ta ri u cämical.
Job31:31 Conojel ri achijab ri que chacum wuc' queta'm chi utz qui c'ulaxic ri man e ka winakil taj quinbano.
Job31:32 Ri in man quinya' ta chque chi cacoc'owisaj ri ak'ab pa ri be. Amak'el xebenjak ri u chi'tak ri wachoch chquiwäch ri naj quepe wi.
Job31:33 Mawi jumul e nu c'u'm tak ri nu mac
Job31:34 rumal ta xe'n ib chquiwäch ri winak. Mawi jumul nu tz'apim ta wib xak ta c'u in canajinak pa yinelem rumal xe'n ib chi quetzelex nu wäch cumal tak ri alaxic.
Job31:35 ¡C'o ta banom wi chi c'o ta jachin jun quintatabenic! Ruc' ri u tz'ibaxic ri nu bi' quinya' u chuk'ab ri nu bim; camic
Job31:36 quebenwuc'aj na bic
Job31:37 Ri in quinya' na qui bixic conojel ri jastak ri e nu banom chuwäch ri Dios
Job31:38 Ri wulew tak man quinquitzujuj ta chuwäch ri caj
Job31:39 We c'u ne c'o jachin jun e welek'am tak ri e u wächinic tak ri rulew
Job31:40 ¡ri wulew tak che qui q'uiyisaj q'uix che u q'uexwäch trico
Job32:1 Aretak xquil ri oxib achijab chi ri Job u tac'abam rib che u bixic chi man c'o ta u mac
Job32:2 Jun achi c'ut Eliu u bi'
Job32:3 Xukuje' xoyowar c'u chquij ri oxib rachil ri Job
Job32:4 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Eliu are' c'ä ac'al na chquiwäch conojel
Job32:5 aretak c'u xrilo chi ri e are' man quena'w ta chi che u tzelexic u wäch ri cubij chque
Job32:6 Ri Eliu xubij: “U mac rech chi c'ä in c'ojol are c'u ri alak alak ri'jab chic
Job32:7 Xinchomaj c'ut: ‘chi chch'aw ri ch'ababal aj esbal no'j; chequic'utu' ri q'ui junab ri qui no'j.’
Job32:8 Kas c'u ne kastzij ronojel winak c'o u ch'obonic
Job32:9 Ri e q'ui junab man caquiban ta ajno'j che jachin jun
Job32:10 Rumal ri' xinbij: ‘Camic
Job32:11 Ri in nu yo'm nu xiquin xukuje' e nu tatabem tak ri e chomanic alak. Wilom chi quetzucuj alak tak ri tzij ri e je'l na
Job32:12 xukuje' alak wilom chi man c'o ta jun chech alak cuininak ta che u ya'ic che ri Job ri qui tzelexic tak ri qui wäch tak ri tzij ri e u bim.
Job32:13 Rech ba' sibalaj man cäban ta ib alak chi sibalaj c'o no'j alak
Job32:14 Mawi c'u ne ri Job c'o ta jas u bim ta chwe
Job32:15 Job
Job32:16 mächomaj c'u la chi ri in ma ta quinech'awok rumal rech chi man quech'aw ta chic ri e are'
Job32:17 Xukuje' ri in c'o ri quinbij na quenya' na u bixic ri nu chomanic.
Job32:18 Sibalaj in nojinak chque tak ri tzij man quincuin ta chi c'ut quink'il ta wib;
Job32:19 t'okopijic quinbano
Job32:20 Rajawaxic quinch'aw na rech cäjarojob ri wanima'
Job32:21 Man c'o ta jachin quinpuquej ta u wi'; xak junam quenban chque conojel.
Job32:22 Kastzij
Job33:1 Ri Eliu xubij: “Rumal ri' chtatabej la tak ri nu tzij
Job33:2 C'o chic ri quentzelej u bixic chi nu chi':
Job33:3 Ruc' jicomal quinech'awok quenya' c'u u bixic chi sakil ri quinchomaj.
Job33:4 Ri Dios
Job33:5 Chtzelej la u wäch ri quinbij che la we cäcuin la; chsuc'umaj ib la che nu c'ulelaxic.
Job33:6 Ri lal xukuje' ri in xak uj junam chuwäch ri Dios; xukuje' ri in in esam che ri t'ac.
Job33:7 Je c'u ri' man c'o ta jasche cäxe'j ta ib la chnuwäch
Job33:8 Ri quel chnuwäch chi xinto xbij la (e je tak tzij wa' ri xinto ri xbij la):
Job33:9 ‘In in ch'ajch'oj
Job33:10 Are c'u ri Dios cutzucuj jas cutzujubej wech
Job33:11 e u cojom tak tikom tak ch'ich' chque ri wakan
Job33:12 Aretak c'u je cäbix wa' man colom ta ri'
Job33:13 ¿Jasche cäq'uiak la chu palaj chi man c'o ta jas cutzelej u bixic che jun chque ri to'bal tak ib la?
Job33:14 E q'ui ri ch'abenic ri cuban ri Dios
Job33:15 C'o jutak mul cuban chak'ab
Job33:16 Ri Dios quebuch'abej tak ri winak pa tak ri qui xiquin; quebuyajo quebunojisaj c'u che xe'n ib
Job33:17 che qui tasic chquij tak ri itzel tak qui banoj chquina' c'u quib chuwäch ri nimarisan ib.
Job33:18 Jeri' man cuya' ta be chque chi quebemukok
Job33:19 C'o chi jutak mul ri Dios cuya' u no'j ri winak cumal tak yabilal
Job33:20 Ri yawab man caraj ta chic ri u wa
Job33:21 Ri u ti'jal cätajin catzajic
Job33:22 Ri u c'aslemal c'o chic chuchi' ri u julil cäminak chquichi' tak ri e oquibal chupam ri cämical.
Job33:23 We c'u ne c'o jun tako'n aj caj chunakaj
Job33:24 ri quel u c'u'x che chubij ta c'u che ri Dios: ‘Chawesaj pa u k'ab ri cämical
Job33:25 cac'astaj chi c'u na ri rutzil u wäch ri u cuerp cux ta chi c'u na jacha' ri xc'oji' chupam ri ralc'alal.
Job33:26 Quebuban na bochi'nic chuwäch ri Dios quec'amowar c'u rumal; ruc' quicotemal cäril na rib ri qui palaj ruc' ri Dios
Job33:27 Cubij na: ‘Xinmacunic
Job33:28 xane' xinresaj
Job33:29 Jewa' cuban ri Dios che ri winak
Job33:30 cäresaj na pa u k'ab ri cämical
Job33:31 Choc la il
Job33:32 We c'o jas ri cäbij la
Job33:33 we c'u jayi'
Job34:1 “Alak
Job34:2 
Job34:3 Ri xquinaj quebuch'ob ri qui jalbem tak quib ri tzij
Job34:4 Je chkabana' uj xukuje' kanic'oj ri c'ulmatajic kabij c'ut ri takal u banic ri cakilo chi utz na.
Job34:5 Ri Job cujiquiba' u bixic: ‘In man c'o ta nu mac
Job34:6 Cux jun banoj tzij ri' ri u c'amowaxic chi in ajchak'mac; ri nu socotajic man cutzir taj
Job34:7 ¡Man c'o ta jachin ta jun jacha' ri Job! Caretz'bej u wäch ri Dios jacha' ri cuban cukumuj ja';
Job34:8 cakaj chuwäch querachilaj ri banal tak etzelal
Job34:9 Cubij chi man c'o ta cuch'äc ri winak ri cutzucuj u banic ri utz chuwäch ri Dios.
Job34:10 E are' c'u ri alak
Job34:11 Ri are' quebutoj chque ri winak chquijujunal jas u cholajil ri qui chac ri qui banom; cubano chi chquijujunal caquic'am ri takal chque.
Job34:12 Kastzij
Job34:13 man c'o ta jachin che xuc'am wi ri cuinem che ajawinic puwi' ronojel ri uwächulew.
Job34:14 We cäresaj ri uxlabic re c'aslemal chque ri winak
Job34:15 
Job34:16 We utz cächoman la
Job34:17 We ta ri Dios cäretzelaj u wäch ri suq'uilal
Job34:18 We ri ajawinelab xukuje' ri nimak tak qui k'ij e banal tak etzelal
Job34:19 Ri are' man cucoj ta rib cuc' tak ri k'atal tak tzij
Job34:20 Ri winak xa pa jok'otaj quecämic
Job34:21 Ri Dios cuyuxlej ri e u xo'l tak rakan ri winak reta'm c'u qui wäch conojel tak ri e u binem.
Job34:22 Man c'o ta k'ekumalil ri sibalaj ta räxcanacoj ri cäcuin taj cäc'u'n ri banal etzelal.
Job34:23 Ri Dios man cuk'at ta jun k'ijol che ri winak rech quetac'al ta chuwäch rech cuk'at ta tzij puwi'.
Job34:24 Man cajwataj ta na u ch'obic rumal
Job34:25 Ri Dios reta'm ri cäquibano
Job34:26 Queburapuj jacha' ri cäban chque ri e banal tak il patan
Job34:27 rumal rech chi man xcaj taj xeniman che mawi xcaj taj xquic'amowaj ri colomalaj c'aslemal ri xuchi'j chque.
Job34:28 Xquibano chi ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj ri mebayib ri e c'o chupam ri c'ax xebopan c'ä chuwäch ri Dios
Job34:29 We c'u man c'o jas cubij ri Dios
Job34:30 rech man catakan ta jun banal etzelal puwi' ri tinimit ri casubuw taj.
Job34:31 ¿La bim pu la che ri Dios: ‘Xinya' wib pa subic; man quinmacun ta chi jumul.
Job34:32 Chebec'utu tak la ri sachinakil chnuwäch ri man quinwil taj. We e nu banom etzelal
Job34:33 ¿La xa' ta pu lo cäj la chi ri Dios cuya' tojbal che la jacha' ri cäkaj chwäch la
Job34:34 Ri achijab ri ajno'jab ri caquitatabej ri quinbij
Job34:35 Ri Job man quebuch'ob taj ri cätajin cubij; ri e u tzij man c'o ta qui cholajil.
Job34:36 ¡Chban utz u nic'oxic ri Job
Job34:37 Ri Job man xuwi ta ajmac
Job35:1 “¿La suc'um quil la
Job35:2 
Job35:3 Bim c'u la che ri Dios: ‘¿Jas ela che
Job35:4 Ri in quentzelej u wäch ri cäbij la
Job35:5 Ca'y la chicaj
Job35:6 We camacunic
Job35:7 We utz ri cäban la
Job35:8 Chque tak ri winak jacha' ri lal ri cuban wi c'ax ri mac la xukuje' ri cuban wi utzil ri e utzalaj tak banoj la.
Job35:9 Chuxe' ri ralal ri rikoj c'ax
Job35:10 man caquitzucuj ta c'ut ri Dios ri xewinakirisanic
Job35:11 ri cuya' ka no'j xukuje' cujutijoj cumal tak ri awaj xukuje' cumal tak ri chicop ri c'o qui xic'.
Job35:12 Caquirak qui chi'
Job35:13 Ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Job35:14 Pune' c'u cäbij la chi man quil ta la u wäch ri Dios
Job35:15 Lal cäbij chi ri are' man cäpe ta royowal mawi cac'äjisan ta wächaj chi sibalaj man coc ta il che ri macaj.
Job35:16 ¡Job
Job36:1 “Coch'on la jubik'
Job36:2 
Job36:3 Quebencoj na ri nimak tak wetamanic che u c'utic chi ri nu winakirisanel takal ri cubij.
Job36:4 Quinjiquiba' u bixic che la chi man quenbij ta na jun jasach ri xak quieb u wäch; c'o jun tz'akatalaj ajno'j chwäch la.
Job36:5 Ri Dios c'o ronojel u cuinem
Job36:6 Man cusach ta u mac ri banal etzelal
Job36:7 amak'el quebutok'ej ri winak ri suc' qui c'aslemal; co quebutiquiba' tak ri ajawinelab chupam tak ri qui tem re ajawibal
Job36:8 We c'u e ximital cuc' tak tikom ch'ich' cäpe c'u cok'ej rumal ri c'axc'ol
Job36:9 ri Dios cuban chque chi caquil ri etzelal ri qui banom rumal c'u rech chi xquiya' quib xemajix rumal ri u banic nimal.
Job36:10 Quebuch'abej che qui pixbexic cubij c'u chque chi chquitanaba' qui banic tak ri etzelal.
Job36:11 We caquinimaj ri cubij chque queboc c'u che u patanixic
Job36:12 We c'u man caquinimaj
Job36:13 Ri co canima' quenoj che k'ak'aric
Job36:14 C'ä e ac'alab quecämic; cäquiq'uis ri qui c'aslemal chupam nimalaj q'uixbalil.
Job36:15 Rumal ri rikoj c'ax
Job36:16 Xukuje' ri lal xto'tajisax la pa tak ri sayowem
Job36:17 Lal cätakleben ri c'äjisabal u wäch ri banal etzelal
Job36:18 Chachajij ib la mac'am la ri u pa k'abaj ri caya' che la mabe anima' la ruc' ri jumulaj puak.
Job36:19 Chupam ri rikoj c'ax man c'o ta cupatanij chech la ri e rakoj tak chi' la mawi ronojel ri cuinem la.
Job36:20 Mabik'bat la chi coc ri chak'ab
Job36:21 Chajij la man tzelej chi la jumul chupam ri etzelal
Job36:22 Kas utz rilic ri nimalaj u cuinem ri Dios chbana' la. Man c'o ta jun ajtij ri chuya'taj chajunamataj ta ruc';
Job36:23 man c'o ta jun ri cäcuintaj ri cubij ta che jas ri rajawaxic cuban na
Job36:24 Conojel ri winak quequiya' u k'ij tak ri e u banoj; chenataj c'u che la xukuje' ri u yic qui k'ij.
Job36:25 Ronojel winak cäcuinic querilo
Job36:26 Ri Dios sibalaj nim
Job36:27 Ri are' quebumulij ri jutak tz'ut ja' chupam jun c'olbal
Job36:28 Ri jäb caturuw ulok chque tak ri sutz' o cuban jäb cakaj c'u puwi' ri uwächulew.
Job36:29 ¿Jachin cach'obowic jasche quebin ri sutz'
Job36:30 Ri Dios culic' ri caypa' puwi' ri plo
Job36:31 Je cuban wa che qui tzukic tak ri tinimit quebutilichi'j c'ut che ri qui wa.
Job36:32 Cumuk'ej ri cakulja pa u k'ab
Job36:33 Ri tililem cuc'ut ri u c'anal ri Dios
Job37:1 “Aretak quinwil ri cakulja'
Job37:2 Chtatabej alak ri u tininem ri u ch'abal ri Dios
Job37:3 Ri are' cuq'uiak ri caypa' chuwäch ronojel ri caj che ri jun u tza'm che chic ri jun u tza'm chic ri uwächulew.
Job37:4 Xtaxtax c'u jun tininem
Job37:5 Aretak ri Dios cach'aw ri u ch'abal
Job37:6 Cuya' takanic che ri sak tew chi cakaj puwi' ri ulew cubano chi cäkaj ri jäb ruc' ronojel ri u chuk'ab.
Job37:7 Cubano chi quecanaj ri winak cho tak cachoch
Job37:8 Ri chicop queboc chupam tak ri qui pec
Job37:9 Pa ri u mox elebal k'ij cawalij wi ulok ri sutinel quiakik'
Job37:10 Rumal ri u wupunic ri Dios xbantaj ri tew queabajir c'ut ri nimak tak ja'.
Job37:11 Ri are' queburaxnakarisaj tak ri sutz'
Job37:12 cajuch'uch'ilab c'ut ri cakulja' pa ri caj
Job37:13 Ronojel wa' cucoj ri Dios che u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri uwächulew o che u c'utic ri rutzil chuwäch.
Job37:14 Job
Job37:15 ¿La eta'm la jas xuban ri Dios che u banic ronojel wa'
Job37:16 ¿La eta'm la jas caquiban ri sutz' quelew chupam ri quiakik'
Job37:17 Ri lal cäpolow la che k'ak' chupam ri atz'iak la quiakik' rech ri moxk'ab cuwartasaj ri ulew ruc' ri u k'ak'al.
Job37:18 ¿La cacuin la cäto' la ri Dios che u liq'uic ri caj co ta c'u cacanajic jacha' jun pejpic ch'ich'?
Job37:19 Chujtijoj la jas ri rajawaxic cakabij che ri Dios
Job37:20 Ri in mawi ta ne chinbij ta ri' che chi quinwaj quinch'awic
Job37:21 Man cuya' taj cäil ri u tun ri k'ij aretak ch'ukutal cumal tak ri sutz'; we c'u cajich'ich' ri quiakik'
Job37:22 Quijulk'inic tak k'an puak quec'utun pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij
Job37:23 Man cujcuin taj cakach'ob ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Job37:24 Rumal ri' ri winak caquixe'j quib chuwäch; ri ajno'jab man c'o ta qui banic chuwäch are'.”
Job38:1 Ri Ajawaxel xuch'abej ri Job pa u niq'uiajil ri sutinel quiakik'. Ri Ajawaxel xubij:
Job38:2 “¿Jachin ri at chi caqueblaj a c'u'x che ri e nu yo'm u bixic cac'ut c'ut cumal tak ri e a tzij chi man c'o ta aweta'm?
Job38:3 Chac'utu' ri a chuk'ab chnuwäch
Job38:4 ¿Jawije' at c'o wi aretak ri in co xintiq'uiba' ri uwächulew? ¡Chabij chwe
Job38:5 ¿La aweta'm jachin xyo'w u bixic joropa' ta chetanic
Job38:6 ¿Jas puwi' tac'al wi ri e u tac'alibal? ¿Jachin xcojow ri abaj ri t'uyul wi ronojel
Job38:7 quebixon c'ut ri ch'imil rech chuxo'l ri qui quicotemal ri e pataninel tak wech aj caj?
Job38:8 Aretak xpok'colij ulok ri plo chupam ri ulew
Job38:9 Ri in xinya' jun sutz' che ratz'iak
Job38:10 In xincoj jun k'atibal rech ri plo xincoj lawe che qui tz'apixic tak ri k'atibal tak rech.
Job38:11 In xinbij che: ‘Cätopan c'ä waral
Job38:12 ¿La c'o jumul pa ri a c'aslemal e a yo'm tak takanic chi chpet ri sak chuxe' ri caj chc'utun ta c'u ri k'ij?
Job38:13 ¿Chi chujabuj ta c'u rib ri sakilal cho ri uwächulew che qui c'u' ta c'u quib tak ri banal tak etzelal?
Job38:14 Quek'alajin tak c'u na ri e u chi' tak ri ulew cäk'otaj c'ut ri u ca'yebal jacha' jun atz'iak;
Job38:15 cäk'il ri qui chäj ri e banal tak etzelal caq'uis c'u u tza'm ri cojow xib.
Job38:16 ¿La asolim ri mayibalalaj k'ekumalil jawije' ri c'o wi ri u q'uiyibal ri nimalaj plo?
Job38:17 ¿La awilom jawije' tak e c'o wi ri oquibal jawije' cäban wi oquem chupam ri xibibalalaj ajawibal re ri cämical?
Job38:18 ¿La ach'obom ri u wäch ri uwächulew? ¡Chabij chwe
Job38:19 ¿Jawije' e c'olotal wi ri sakilal xukuje' ri k'ekumalil?
Job38:20 ¿La aweta'm jas caban chque rech quebopan c'ä pa ri q'uisbal jutz' quetzelej ta chi c'u chupam ri cachoch?
Job38:21 ¡Takal chawe chi aweta'm
Job38:22 ¿La e asolim tak ri c'olbal ri nu c'olom wi ri tew xukuje' ri sakbach
Job38:23 che qui takic bic pa tak ri k'ijol rech ri u q'ueyowal
Job38:24 ¿Jachique tak ri be ri quebutakej ri sakilal aretak cujach rib? ¿Jas ri cuban ri quiakik' rech ri elebal k'ij culic' rib chuwäch ri uwächulew?
Job38:25 ¿Jachin xjakow ri quel wi ulok ri jäb cuc'ut ta c'ut u be ri nimalaj jäb
Job38:26 rech cäjabin pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Job38:27 Rech cuja'j ri ulew ri tolonic cuq'uiyisaj c'u ulok ri k'ayes?
Job38:28 ¿Jachin ri u tat ri jäb xukuje' ri räxk'ab?
Job38:29 ¿Jachin ri u nan ri tew ri cabajiric xukuje' ri tew ri cut'ab rib?
Job38:30 ¿Jachin cabanow co che ri ja' ri jacha' abaj curabajirisaj c'ut ri u wi' ri nimalaj plo?
Job38:31 ¿La at catbanowic chi man caquijach ta quib ri mutz qui jachom c'u quib ri ch'imil re ri Orion?
Job38:32 ¿La at ri catesan ulok tak ri ch'imil pa ri u k'ijol? ¿La at ri catc'amow qui be tak ri e u ch'imil ri nimalaj Os xukuje' ri e rech ri Os ri ch'utin?
Job38:33 ¿La e aweta'm tak ri pixab ri quebajawin puwi' ri caj? ¿La at ri catcojow tak we pixab ri' puwi' ri uwächulew?
Job38:34 ¿La catcuinic caya' takanic chque tak ri sutz' chi catquibik'tajisaj ruc' ja'?
Job38:35 We catak ri cakulja' chi cabe pa jun c'olbal

Psalms12:8 Ri e banal tak etzelal xak apawije' quewacatilob wi
Psalms13:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms13:2 ¿C'ä jampa' ri nu c'aslibal xukuje' ri wanima' quecoch'on na xukuje' quebison na ronojel k'ij? ¿C'ä jampa' quinel chuxe' ri u takanic ri c'ulel?
Psalms13:3 Ajawaxel
Psalms13:4 Mubij ri nu c'ulel: “¡Nu ch'äcom!” Mäquicotic we quintzakic.
Psalms13:5 Ri in nu cu'bisam nu c'u'x pa ri tok'ob la; ri wanima' cäquicotic rumal rech chi quincol la.
Psalms13:6 ¡Quinbixoj ri Ajawaxel rumal ri utzil ri u banom chwe!
Psalms14:1 Ri man c'o ta qui no'j cäquichomaj chi man c'o ta Dios: conojel quetzelam quib; qui banom xibibalalaj tak jastak; ¡man c'o ta chi jun cuban ta utzil!
Psalms14:2 Kas pa ri caj queril wi ulok ri Ajawaxel ri winak che rilic we c'o jun c'o u ch'obonic cutzucuj ri Dios.
Psalms14:3 Conojel c'ut e benak pa ri itzel be; conojel xak junam quetzelam quib. ¡Man c'o ta chi jun cuban utzil! ¡Mawi ta ne jun c'olic!
Psalms14:4 Man c'o ta utzalaj qui chomanic ri e banal tak etzelal
Psalms14:5 Quebirbot na e nojinak che quebirbit
Psalms14:6 Cäquitze'j u wäch ri e u rayinic ri man nim ta u k'ij
Psalms14:7 C'o ta banom wi puwi' ri juyub Sion quel ta wi ulok ri to'l rech ri Israel. Aretak ri Ajawaxel cuq'uex ri c'axalaj u c'aslemal ri u tinimit
Psalms15:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms15:2 Xuwi ri man c'o ta mac pa ri u c'aslemal xukuje' cuban utzil
Psalms15:3 ri man c'o ta jun rajil u tz'akat cuyok'o
Psalms15:4 ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri takal retzelaxic u wäch
Psalms15:5 ri cuya' u rajil pa jalomal ri man cutok'ij ta kajebal rech
Psalms16:1 ¡Chinchajij la
Psalms16:2 Nu bim c'u che la: “Lal ri Wajaw
Psalms16:3 Ri e diosib ri e c'o pa ri ulew c'o qui cuinem
Psalms16:4 Are c'u ri cäquiterenej diosib caquirik na sibalaj c'ax. ¡Are c'u ri in mawi jumul quinjunaj ta wib cuc' che quicojic ri quiq'uelalaj tak qui tabal tok'ob! ¡Mawi jumul quenatax ta ri e qui bi' cumal ri e nu chi'!
Psalms16:5 Lal Ajawaxel
Psalms16:6 Je'lalaj c'olbal nu rikom; ¡utzalaj echbal xya'taj chwe!
Psalms16:7 Quinya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel rumal chi are' c'amal nu be
Psalms16:8 Amak'el natal ri Ajawaxel chwe; c'o ri are' pa nu wiquiak'ab man c'o ta quintzakow na.
Psalms16:9 Rumal ri' cänoj ri wanima' che quicotemal. Quinuxlan pa utzil
Psalms16:10 Man quinya' ta la canok chupam ri mukubal
Psalms16:11 Cäc'ut la ri be re c'aslemal chnuwäch. C'o nimalaj quicotemal uc' la; c'o junalic utzil chnakaj la.
Psalms17:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms17:2 ¡Lal chk'ata la tzij panuwi'
Psalms17:3 Oquinak la chupam ri nu chomanic; chak'ab lal petinak che nu c'ac'alexic; in c'ambejem la ruc' k'ak'
Psalms17:4 jacha' cäquiban ri niq'uiaj winak chic; nu najtajisam wib chque tak ri qui be ri tokinelab
Psalms17:5 Jicom in bininak pa tak ri be la; mawi jumul e nu tzakom ta canok.
Psalms17:6 Oh Dios
Psalms17:7 Ya' la jun k'alajalaj c'utbal re ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la chwe
