Psalms18:3 Lal
Psalms18:4 Ri cämical xinuralij pa tak ri e u colob; xinxe'j wib chuwäch ri uwo ja' ri sachal wächaj.
Psalms18:5 Ri cämical xinumojcolij pa tak ri u colob; ¡xinkaj pa tak c'amibal re cämical!
Psalms18:6 Pa ri nu bis xinsiq'uij ri Ajawaxel; xintz'onoj ri u to'banic ri nu Dios
Psalms18:7 Xuban c'u jun nimalaj cabrakan cho ri ulew: xeyicop ri qui tac'alibal tak ri juyub; xeyicya'x rumal ri royowal ri Ajawaxel.
Psalms18:8 Pa ri u tza'm quel ulok si'b
Psalms18:9 Xupac ri ch'ukuwinak ri caj
Psalms18:10 Xquiejen puwi' jun aj cajalaj to'banel ri e c'o u xic'
Psalms18:11 Ri nimalaj k'ekumal ri sutininak rij xucoj che c'ubal rib xukuje' ri k'ekalaj sutz' ri nojinak che ja'.
Psalms18:12 Jun juluwem ri cächuplinic xel ulok chuwäch; xebel ulok chquipam tak ri sutz' sakbach
Psalms18:13 Ri Ajawaxel
Psalms18:14 Xebuq'uiak ulok ri u ch'ab xukuje' ri u caypa'
Psalms18:15 Ri u xe' ri plo xk'alajinic; ri u tiq'uilibal ri uwächulew xc'utunic
Psalms18:16 Ri Dios xuyuk ulok ri u k'ab chwe chicaj
Psalms18:17 Xinresaj pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel ri c'o qui cuinem
Psalms18:18 Xquimulij quib chwij aretak in c'o pa c'axc'olil
Psalms18:19 Xinuya' pa ri torotajic; xinto'tajisaj c'u rumal rech chi in lok' chuwäch.
Psalms18:20 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm ri tojbal wech ri takal che ri ch'ajch'ojalaj nu c'aslemal
Psalms18:21 nu terenem c'ut ri u be ri Ajawaxel; mawi jubik' nu xutum can ta ri nu Dios.
Psalms18:22 E c'o conojel ri u takanic pa nu jolom; man c'o ta jun u pixab ri ma ta nu nimam.
Psalms18:23 In bininak pa jun c'aslemal jicom chuwäch; nu najtajisam wib rech man quinban ta ri etzelal.
Psalms18:24 Ri Ajawaxel u yo'm ri tojbal wech rumal ri ch'ajch'ojalaj nu c'aslemal chuwäch.

Psalms18:26 jic anima' la ruc' ri jic ranima'

Psalms18:29 Ruc' ri to'banic la
Psalms18:30 Ri u be ri Ajawaxel
Psalms18:31 ¿Jachin ta ri Dios we ta ma ta are' ri Ajawaxel? ¿Jachin ta jun Dios chic ri cäcuin ta che ka ch'ukic?
Psalms18:32 Ri Dios are cäyo'w nu chuk'ab
Psalms18:33 ri cubano chi quinxiq'uinic jacha' jun masat
Psalms18:34 ri quinutijoj che u banic ch'o'j
Psalms18:35 Ri lal quinch'uk la
Psalms18:36 E pacom la ri nu be
Psalms18:37 Xebenwokataj ri e nu c'ulel
Psalms18:38 Xinban ch'akatak chque. Man xewalij ta chic. ¡Xekaj pa wakan!
Psalms18:39 Lal xyo'w la nu chuk'ab pa ri ch'o'j; xban la chi ri nu c'ulel xquimej quib chnuwäch
Psalms18:40 xban la chi xebanimaj ri nu c'ulel chnuwäch. Jeri' xincuinic xinsach qui wäch ri cäquetzelaj nu wäch.
Psalms18:41 Are ta xcaj xeto' ta la
Psalms18:42 Xebenquie'j jacha' ri puc'uc' ulew ri cäc'am bic rumal quiakik'. ¡Xebenxak'alej jacha' ri t'ac ri e c'o pa tak ri be!
Psalms18:43 Xinesaj la pa u k'ab jun tinimit ri man tal ta tzij
Psalms18:44 Aretak cäquita' ri nu ch'abal queniman chwe; winak ri man e nu winakil taj cäquiya' nu k'ij
Psalms18:45 ri winak ri man e nu winakil ta cäquixe'j quib quebirbitic quebel ulok pa tak ri to'bal quib.
Psalms18:46 ¡C'asal ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms18:47 Are Dios wa' ri cäc'äjisan qui wäch ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe xebujach tak ri tinimit chuxe' ri nu takanic.
Psalms18:48 Quinucol chuwäch ri coyowal ri nu c'ulel
Psalms18:49 Rumal ri' quinya' k'ij la pa ri nimak tak tinimit quinbixoj bix che ri bi' la.
Psalms18:50 Quebeya' la nimak tak ch'äcanic che ri ajawinel ri cha'om la; amak'el quel c'u'x la che ri David xukuje' ri e rija'lil.
Psalms19:1 Ri caj cutzijoj ri u juluwem ri Dios; ri räxalaj caj cutzijoj chke ri u winakirisam.
Psalms19:2 Ri k'ij tak quequitzijola' tak chquixo'l
Psalms19:3 Pune' man c'o ta tzij quetatajic
Psalms19:4 pa ronojel ri uwächulew benak ri u tijonic
Psalms19:5 Are c'u ri k'ij cäquicotic cuchaplej ruc' quicotemal ri u xiq'uixic ri u be jacha' jun xiq'uinel; jacha' jun jiaxel ri quel ulok chupam ri u warabal re c'ulanem.
Psalms19:6 Quel ulok ri k'ij
Psalms19:7 Tz'akat ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms19:8 Ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel ri e banom e suc'
Psalms19:9 Ri now ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel ch'ajch'oj man caq'uextaj taj xak je wi. Ri e u pixab ri Ajawaxel ri e tz'ibam e kastzij
Psalms19:10 ¡C'o na cajil chuwäch ri k'an puak ri pakal rajil!
Psalms19:11 Cajwataj c'u che u pixbexic we pataninel ech la ri'
Psalms19:12 ¿Jachin ta ri quebuch'ob ri kas e u sachinakil? ¡Ajawaxel sacha' la ri nu mac ri e ch'ukutalic!
Psalms19:13 Chesaj la ri banoj nimal che ri pataninel ech la; mäya' la be che ri banoj nimal chi catakan panuwi'. Jeri' quinux jun winak ri ch'ajch'oj u c'aslemal; man c'o ta mac cäriktaj ta chwij.
Psalms19:14 Chec'amar ta ri e nu tzij umal la xukuje' tak ri nu chomanic
Psalms20:1 Chutatabej ri a ch'awem ri Ajawaxel aretak at c'o pa bis

Psalms21:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms21:2 Yo'm la che ronojel ri u rayibal; man xxu'yaj ta la ronojel ri u tz'onon che la.

Psalms21:4 Xuta' c'aslemal che la
Psalms21:5 Rumal ri to'banic la
Psalms21:6 Tewichi'm la chbe k'ij sak; nojisam la che quicotemal rumal ri c'olem la ruc'.
Psalms21:7 Lal
Psalms21:8 Ri chuk'ab la quebuch'äc conojel ri qui banom qui c'ulel che la; ri wiquiak'ab la quebuch'äc na conojel ri cäquetzelaj wäch la;
Psalms21:9 queq'uiak na la pa jun jorno ri cänicowic aretak cäpe la che u k'atic tzij. Ri Ajawaxel pa ri royowal
Psalms21:10 Cäsach na la qui wäch cho ri uwächulew chquixo'l ri winak ri e calc'ual xukuje' ri e quija'lil.

Psalms22:2 Nu Dios

Psalms22:5 xquitz'onoj to'banic che la

Psalms22:9 Jewa': Xban la chi xinq'uiy pa ri u c'u'x ri nu nan; xban la chi xinuxlan cho u c'u'x ri nu nan.
Psalms22:10 C'ä majok chinalaxok
Psalms22:11 Manajtajisaj ib la chwe
Psalms22:12 Ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe qui sutim wij e jacha' ta ne' ama'ib tak wacax
Psalms22:13 Que wunic jacha' c'analaj tak coj
Psalms22:14 In jacha' ja' ri cajamajobic; e tuktubinak ri e nu bakil
Psalms22:15 Chaki'j chic ri u pa nu chi' jacha' jun xot re u wi ja; nac'al ri wak' pa nu chi'. ¡In q'uiakom la pa ri ulew re cämical!
Psalms22:16 Jumulaj banal tak etzelal e jacha' ri tz'i' qui sutim wij; e qui worom ri nu k'ab xukuje' ri e wakan.
Psalms22:17 ¡Quincuinic quebenwajilaj ri nu bakil! ri e nu c'ulel man cäquesaj ta ri qui bak'wäch chwij.
Psalms22:18 Quijachom ri watz'iak chquiwäch
Psalms22:19 Ri lal c'ut

Psalms22:21 chinto' la pa qui chi' we coj ri'; ¡chinto' la chuwäch ri cuc'a' we ama'ib tak wacax ri'!
Psalms22:22 Quinya' na tzijol la chque ri wachalal
Psalms22:23 Ix ri nim quiwil wi ri Ajawaxel
Psalms22:24 Ri are' ma ta coc il mawi xak ta caroc'owisaj ri qui rikoj c'ax ri mebayib
Psalms22:25 Chuwäch ri tinimit la ri man c'o ta cajilabal quink'ijilaj ri jiquil la; chquiwäch ri queyo'w k'ij la quintz'akatisaj na ri e nu chi'nic.

Psalms28:2 Tatabej la ri nu rakoj chi'aj che u tz'onoxic ri to'banic la
Psalms28:3 Mincharchatej la bic junam cuc' ri e banal tak etzelal
Psalms28:4 Chya' la chque ri takal chque
Psalms28:5 Man quenataj ta chi cuya' chque ri jastak ri xebuban ri Ajawaxel
Psalms28:6 ¡Chyo'k ta u k'ij ri Ajawaxel

Psalms29:1 Chik'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel
Psalms29:2 chiya' u k'ij ri je'lalaj u bi' ri Ajawaxel; chik'ijilaj ri Ajawaxel pa ri je'lalaj u k'ijilabal.
Psalms29:3 Ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel cäxojlin puwi' ri plo; ri Dios ri nim u k'ij are cäbanow ri cakulja: ¡ri Ajawaxel c'o puwi' ri nimalaj plo!
Psalms29:4 Ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel c'o u cuinem; ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel c'o u chuk'ab;
Psalms29:5 ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel quebujak'ij tak ri chacalte'. Ri Ajawaxel quebujak'ij tak ri chacalte' re ri Libano.
Psalms29:6 Quebuyicopisaj tak ri juyub Libano xukuje' ri Sirion; ¡cuban chque chi quech'opinic jacha' ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' alaj ama'ib tak wacax!
Psalms29:7 Ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel quebuq'uiak rak' tak k'ak';
Psalms29:8 ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel cubano chi cayicop ri chaki'j uwo sak; ¡ri Ajawaxel cubano chi cayicop ri chaki'j uwo sak re Cades!
Psalms29:9 Ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel cuban chque ri ati'tab tak masat chi quebalanic
Psalms29:10 Ri Ajawaxel cätakan puwi' ri jäb; ¡ri Ajawaxel are' ajawinel ri c'o u takanic chbe k'ij sak!
Psalms29:11 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' u chuk'ab ri u tinimit; ri Ajawaxel cutewichi'j ri u tinimit ruc' jamaril.

Psalms31:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms31:2 Choc la il che nu tatabexic; ¡cojo la aninakil
Psalms31:3 ¡Lal ri' ri nimalaj abaj
Psalms31:4 ¡Chinesaj la pa ri c'amibal ri cojom pa ri nu be
Psalms31:5 Pa k'ab la quinjach wi ri wuxlabal; ¡chinto'tajisaj la
Psalms31:6 Quinwetzelaj qui wäch ri quequik'ijilaj ri diosib man c'o ta qui beya'l; nu yo'm c'u ri cu'lbal nu c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel.
Psalms31:7 Ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la cuc'am ulok quicotemal pa wanima'. Ilom la ri nu bis
Psalms31:8 man xinjach ta la pa u k'ab ri c'ulel; ¡xintac'aba' la pa jun c'olbal ri co c'olic!
Psalms31:9 Ajawaxel
Psalms31:10 ¡Ri k'oxom xukuje' tak ri juyuwem caquiq'uis tzij paquiwi' ri e u junab ri nu c'aslemal! Ri wetzelal cuq'uis ri nu chuk'ab; ri nu cuerp cätajin cätukaric.
Psalms31:11 Xa in yacal qui tze' ri e nu c'ulel
Psalms31:12 Man quinnataj ta chi chque
Psalms31:13 Quincuinic quinto ri qui jasjatem ri winak
Psalms31:14 Ri in c'ut
Psalms31:15 Ri nu c'aslemal pa k'ab la c'o wi; chinesaj la pa qui k'ab ri e nu c'ulel ri quincokataj.
Psalms31:16 Chila la we pataninel ech la ri' ruc' utzil
Psalms31:17 Che la quintz'onoj wi tok'ob
Psalms31:18 Mech'aw chic ri e banal tak tzij
Psalms31:19 ¡Sibalaj nim ri utzil la chque ri nim quil la cumal! Quec'ol la jacha' jun k'inomal chquiwäch ri winak
Psalms31:20 Ruc' ri u wächbal la quech'uc la chquiwäch ri qui chomanic ri e itzel tak winak; quech'uc' la chuxe' ri u xotil ri achoch la chquiwäch ri qui yok'onic ri e qui c'ulel.
Psalms31:21 Tewichi'm ri Ajawaxel
Psalms31:22 Pa ri nu ch'ujilal xinchomaj chi in q'uiakom apan la chwäch la; aretak c'ut xintz'onoj ri to'banic la xta' la ri nu rakoj chi'aj.

Psalms32:1 Utz rech ri winak ri e sachtajinak ri e qui chak'maquil xukuje' tak ri e u mac.

Psalms32:3 Aretak c'ä maja' quink'alajisaj ri nu mac
Psalms32:4 chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab ri k'ab la xalob panuwi'. Jacha' ri cotz'i'j ri bach'uyirinak rumal ri u k'ak'al ri sak'ij

Psalms33:1 Chitz'onoj tok'ob che ri Ajawaxel
Psalms33:2 Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel ruc' rok'ebal arp
Psalms33:3 chibixoj jun c'ac' bix che
Psalms33:4 Ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel kastzij; ri e u chac cäquic'ut ri u jicomal.
Psalms33:5 Ri Ajawaxel culok'ok'ej ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri jicomal; ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x u nojisam ronojel ri uwächulew.
Psalms33:6 Ri caj xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chuwäch are' ri Ajawaxel xbanowic ruc' ri u tzij xukuje' ruc' ri ruxlab ri xel pa u chi'.
Psalms33:7 Ri are' cumulij cut'ajij c'u ri ja' re ri nimalaj plo.
Psalms33:8 Chiya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel iwonojel cho ri ulew; ¡chyok u k'ij cumal conojel ri e jekel cho ri uwächulew!
Psalms33:9 Aretak c'u xch'awic
Psalms33:10 Ri Ajawaxel cuyojij ronojel ri qui chomanic ri winak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib
Psalms33:11 are c'u ri u chomanic ri Ajawaxel cäjeki' na chbe k'ij sak.
Psalms33:12 Utz rech ri tinimit ri are' u Dios ri Ajawaxel
Psalms33:13 Ri Ajawaxel cäca'y ulok chicaj queril conojel ri winak;
Psalms33:14 pa ri c'olbal ri c'o wi quebuca'yej ulok ri winak cho ri uwächulew;
Psalms33:15 are' xnuc'uw ri canima' xukuje' coc il che rilic ri cäquibano.
Psalms33:16 Man c'o ta jun ajawinel cäto'taj ta cumal ri q'uialaj e rajch'ojab
Psalms33:17 ri quiej man quecuin ta che u to'ic jun winak; pune' c'o sibalaj qui chuk'ab
Psalms33:18 Ri Ajawaxel amak'el quebuchajij ri nim quil wi cumal xukuje' ri cu'l qui c'u'x chrij ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x
Psalms33:19 che quesaxic pa ri cämical cuya' c'u qui c'aslemal pa tak ri k'ijol re wi'jal.

Psalms33:21 Ri kanima' caquicot ruc' ri Ajawaxel; kas ka cuban ka c'u'x chrij ri tastalicalaj u bi'.

Psalms37:38 E are' c'ut ri man e tal ta tzij cäsach na qui wäch conojel; ri caquirik na ri e lawalo are ri u sachisaxic qui wäch.

Psalms45:1 Je'licalaj tak tzij quewulul chupam ri nu chomanic; ri wak' xak junam ruc' ri u tz'ibabal jun utzalaj tz'ibanel. ¡Quinbixoj na ri nu bix chuwäch ri Ajawinel!

Psalms73:12 ¡Chixca'y chque we banal tak etzelal ri'! Man c'o ta c'ax cäquirik che u mulixic ri qui k'inomal.
Psalms73:13 ¡Man c'o ta cupatanij chwe chi josk'ital ri wanima'
Psalms73:14 Pa conojel c'u jok'otaj quepe ch'ayiquil panuwi'
Psalms73:15 We ta je xinchomanic jacha' ri e are'
Psalms73:16 Xintijtobej u ch'obic wa' xinwil c'ut chi sibalaj c'ax.
Psalms73:17 Xuwi aretak xinoc chupam ri cak'ijilax wi ri Dios c'äte ri' xinch'obo jawije' quebetakal wi na:
Psalms73:18 E u tac'abam pa jun c'olbal ri cäjililic
Psalms73:19 ¡Xa' pa jok'otaj cäsach qui wäch! ¡Ri xe'n ib caq'uisow na tzij paquiwi'!
Psalms73:20 Aretak ri lal
Psalms73:21 Ri in xinnoj che c'ayil
Psalms73:22 rumal c'u rech chi in man c'o ta nu no'j
Psalms73:23 Amak'el c'ut in c'olinak uc' la. In yukem la che ri nu wiquiak'ab
Psalms73:24 c'amom la nu be cuc' tak ri pixbenic la
Psalms73:25 ¿Jachin ta ri quinrik pa ri caj? Xuwi ri lal. Aretak in c'o chi uc' la man quinrayij ta chic ri c'o cho ri uwächulew.
Psalms73:26 Ronojel ri nu cuerp cämem cubano
Psalms73:27 Ri cäquinajtajisaj quib che la quecäm na; cäsach na la u wäch ri man jic ta cäbin chwäch la.
Psalms73:28 Ri in c'ut quinkeb ruc' ri Dios
Psalms74:1 Nu Dios
Psalms74:2 Chnataj ri tinimit la che la
Psalms74:3 Pet la che rilic we yojyobic ri man c'o ta u q'uisic; ¡ri c'ulel u yojim ronojel ri c'o chupam ri k'ijilabal!
Psalms74:4 ¡Ri e c'ulel la cäquibixoj ch'äcanic chupam ri cak'ijilax wi la! ¡e qui cojom ri quetal ri man e aj chi' taj
Psalms74:5 puwi' ri oquibal ri caban wi oquem! E je ta ne banal tak si' pa jun k'ekumalaj c'ache'laj
Psalms74:6 icäj xukuje' k'osibal xequipaxibej tak quech ri wikbal ri e re che'.
Psalms74:7 Xquiporoj ri cak'ijilax wi la ¡xquesaj u q'uixbal ri achoch la
Psalms74:8 Xquichomaj u sachic ka wäch konojel; ¡xequiporoj conojel tak ri c'olbal pa tak ri tinimit ri cäkamulij wi kib che k'ijilaxic la!
Psalms74:9 Man quekil ta chic ri e tastalicalaj tak ketal; man c'o ta chi jun k'axal tzij la; mawi ne keta'm joropa' junab cäbeytaj na wa'.
Psalms74:10 Nu Dios
Psalms74:11 ¿Jasche cac'u' ri k'ab la ri c'o nimalaj u cuinem? ¿Jasche xak k'alum ri k'ab la?
Psalms74:12 Ojer ulok
Psalms74:13 Xban la quieb che ri plo ruc' ri cuinem la; xpaxij la ri qui jolom ri nimak tak awaj ri e c'o chupam ri plo;
Psalms74:14 xwech' la ri qui jolom ri nimak tak Lebiatan
Psalms74:15 Xban la chi xepok'isaj tak la ulok ja' xukuje' tak nima'
Psalms74:16 E ech c'u la ri pa k'ij xukuje' ri chak'ab
Psalms74:17 lal xcojow la ri u c'ulbatil ri uwächulew
Psalms74:18 Mel pa jolom la
Psalms74:19 ¡Sibalaj mujsach pa jolom la! Uj tuka'r uj jacha' ri palomax; ¡mujjach la pa qui chi' ri juyubal tak awaj!
Psalms74:20 ¡Chnataj ri c'ulwächinic la che la
Psalms74:21 Mäya' la c'olbal chi camach'irisax ri c'axc'obinak; ¡chbana' la chi cäya' k'ij la rumal ri meba' xukuje' rumal ri man nim ta u k'ij!
Psalms74:22 ¡Walij la
Psalms74:23 Mäsach pa jolom la ri rakoj tak qui chi' ri e c'ulel la
Psalms75:1 Cujmaltioxin che la
Psalms75:2 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Apachique k'ij ri quinwaj
Psalms75:3 Aretak cäyicop ri uwächulew
Psalms75:4 Chque ri banal tak nimal xukuje' chque ri banal tak etzelal
Psalms75:5 sibalaj miya' u k'ij ri i cuinem mixux nimol iwib aretak quixch'awic.”
Psalms75:6 Ri to'banic man cäpe ta pa elebal k'ij mawi pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Psalms75:7 xane' are' ri Dios are' ri k'atal tzij: jujun quebumach'irisaj
Psalms75:8 Ri Ajawaxel c'o ri u q'uiakbal ri royowal pa u k'ab nojinak che u wa'l uva ri yujtalic xukuje' k'obisam
Psalms75:9 Ri in amak'el quinwesaj na u tzijol ri u Dios ri Jacob xukuje' quebenbixoj na bix che
Psalms75:10 ri are' cusach na u wäch ri nimal ri quec'amow ri banal tak etzelal
Psalms76:1 Ri Dios etamatal u wäch pa Juda; ri u bi' elinak u tzijol pa Israel.
Psalms76:2 Ri rachoch c'o puwi' ri juyub Sion
Psalms76:3 chila' xebumuch wi tak ri e banbal tak ch'ojibal: ri quetecak tak ch'ich'
Psalms76:4 ¡Sibalaj nim ri juluwem la
Psalms76:5 Ri achijab ri e c'o qui cuinem xtokix ri jastak quech; ri c'o na qui chuk'ab man c'o ta xecuin che u banic; xcoc'owisaj ri q'uisbal qui waram.
Psalms76:6 Ri carwaj xukuje' ri quiej man quecuin ta chic queslabic aretak ri lal
Psalms76:7 ¡Ri lal lal xibibal! ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic cutac'aba' rib chwäch la aretak lal oyowarinak?
Psalms76:8 Pa ri caj cäc'ut wi la ulok ri k'atan tzij la; ri uwächulew cuxe'j rib xak jun chi cac'oji' wi
Psalms76:9 nu Dios
Psalms76:10 Ri royowal ri winak caq'uextaj che yabal k'ij la
Psalms76:11 Chibana' chi'nic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Psalms76:12 Ri are' cäresaj ri qui c'aslemal ri c'amal tak be
Psalms77:1 Co quinrak nu chi' che u tz'onoxic tok'ob che ri Dios rech quinutatabej.
Psalms77:2 Ri k'ij aretak quinbisonic
Psalms77:3 Cänataj ri Dios chwe
Psalms77:4 Lal
Psalms77:5 Quebenchomaj ri k'ij xukuje' tak ri junab ri e oc'owinak;
Psalms77:6 cänataj chwe aretak quinbixon chak'ab. Quinchoman pa wanima'
Psalms77:7 ¿La xak lo amak'el royowal ri Ajawaxel? ¿La ma ta lo cuban chi na utzil chke?
Psalms77:8 ¿La xa lo xq'uis ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x? ¿La xa man cuban ta chic jas ri u bim?
Psalms77:9 ¿La xa lo xsach ri rutzil ri Dios pa u jolom? ¿La xa lo sibalaj oyowarinak
Psalms77:10 Ri sibalaj c'ax cuban chwe are ri u chomaxic chi ri aj Chicaj man je ta chic kuc' jacha' ri nabe.
Psalms77:11 Quenataj na chwe ri mayibal ri xebuban ri Ajawaxel pa jujun tak k'ijol canok;
Psalms77:12 quinchoman chrij ronojel ri u banom.
Psalms77:13 Oh Dios
Psalms77:14 ¡Lal ri' ri Dios ri queban tak la mayibal! ¡Xc'ut ri cuinem la chquiwäch ri nimak tak tinimit!
Psalms77:15 Ruc' ri cuinem la xlok' chi na la ri tinimit la
Psalms77:16 Nu Dios
Psalms77:17 ri sutz' xquitzokopij ulok ri jäb xetataj cakulja pa ri caj
Psalms77:18 Xetataj ri cakulja la pa ri salc'um; xsakar ri uwächulew cumal tak ri caypa' la
Psalms77:19 Xjak ri be la chupam ri plo; xeramij la nimak tak ja'
Psalms77:20 Xc'am la u be ri tinimit la jacha' jumulaj chij
Psalms78:1 Nu tinimit
Psalms78:2 Quintzijon pa c'ambal tak tzij; quebenbij na jastak ri e c'u'tal ulok kas pa tak ri ojer tak k'ijol.
Psalms78:3 Ri jastak ri e ka tom xukuje' ri e ketamam
Psalms78:4 man cäkac'u' ta chquiwäch ri kalc'ual. Quekachilaj na ri ija'lil ri quepe na cakak'ijilaj na ri Ajawaxel cakatzijoj na ri u cuinem xukuje' tak ri u mayibalil.
Psalms78:5 Ri Dios xujekeba' jun pixab che ri Jacob; xujuch' ri be ri rajawaxic cutakej ri Israel
Psalms78:6 rech cäquetamaj ri alc'ualxelab ri quepe na
Psalms78:7 rech cäcu'bi qui c'u'x chrij ri Dios xukuje' ma ta cäsach pa qui jolom ri jastak ri e u banom ri Dios; rech quebequinimaj tak ri e u takomal
Psalms78:8 je c'u mebuxic e jacha' ri e qui mam man ch'abexic ta xcaj xukuje' man etal ta tzij
Psalms78:9 Ri aj ramak' ri Eprain
Psalms78:10 man nim ta xquil wi ri qui c'ulwächinic ruc' ri Dios mawi ne' xcaj xeniman ta che ri u tijonic.
Psalms78:11 Xsach pa qui jolom ri u banom ri are'
Psalms78:12 Ri Dios xebuban mayibal chquiwäch ri e qui mam pa ri ulew Zoan
Psalms78:13 Xuban quieb che ri plo xeroc'owisaj c'u chupam
Psalms78:14 Pa k'ij xuc'am qui be ruc' jun sutz'
Psalms78:15 Chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak xuban cacab chque ri tac'atak tak abaj
Psalms78:16 ¡Ri Dios xubano chi xel ulok ja' cätixixic chupam jun tac'atic abaj!
Psalms78:17 Ri e are' c'ut xquitakej u banic mac chuwäch ri Dios; xquic'ulelaj ri Dios ri c'o chicaj chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak.
Psalms78:18 Xcaj xquic'ambejej xquita' qui wa cuq'uia' che jas ri xcaj.
Psalms78:19 C'ax xech'aw che
Psalms78:20 Kastzij chi ri Dios xuban quieb che ri nimalaj abaj; ri xel wi ulok ja' chupam jacha' jun nima'
Psalms78:21 Aretak xuta' ri Ajawaxel ri xquibij
Psalms78:22 U mac rech chi man xquicu'ba' ta qui c'u'x chrij ri Dios
Psalms78:23 Pune' c'u jewa'
Psalms78:24 ¡xubano chi xjabin jaswa' puwi' ri u tinimit
Psalms78:25 ¡Ri winak xquitij qui wa tako'nib aj caj! ¡Ri Dios xuya' q'ui ri qui wa ri caquitijo!
Psalms78:26 Ri quiakik' re elebal k'ij
Psalms78:27 Xujabij ti'j puwi' ri u tinimit; ¡xejabin sakco'r jacha' ri sanyeb re ri plo!
Psalms78:28 Ri Dios xubano chi xetzak pa u niq'uiajil ri kajebal ri e c'o wi xukuje' pa u xcut tak ri lic'om cachoch.
Psalms78:29 Xquichaplej c'u qui tijic c'ä xenoj na
Psalms78:30 C'ä maja' c'u ne coc'ow ri qui jik'al
Psalms78:31 aretak xkaj ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi'
Psalms78:32 Pune' c'u je xquic'ulmaj wa'
Psalms78:33 Rumal ri' ri Dios xuq'uis tzij puwi' ri qui c'aslemal e je ta ne xa jun uxlabic
Psalms78:34 We ri Dios cuban chque chi quecämic
Psalms78:35 c'äte c'u ri' cänataj ri Dios aj chicaj chque ri quebuchajij xukuje' quebuch'uku.
Psalms78:36 Ruc' c'u ri qui chi' xukuje' ri cak'
Psalms78:37 mawi jubik' xux ta jic ri canima' chuwäch
Psalms78:38 Xel c'u u c'u'x ri Dios chque
Psalms78:39 Xnataj che ri Dios chi xak e winak; chi xa e junam ruc' ri quiakik' ri cabec
Psalms78:40 ¡Q'ui mul man xeniman ta che ri Dios
Psalms78:41 Q'ui mul xquic'ambejej; ¡xquiya' bis che ri Tastalic ri c'o pa Israel!
Psalms78:42 Man xnataj ta ri k'ij chque aretak ri Dios ruc' ri u cuinem
Psalms78:43 aretak xebuban nimak tak jastak ri e mayibal pa ri ulew re Zoan
Psalms78:44 aretak xebujalwächij ri nima' pa quic' ri aj ejiptib man xecuintaj xcuq'uiaj ri qui ja'il ri nima'.
Psalms78:45 Xebutak ulok alaj tak amaloyib xukuje' xtutz'ab paquiwi'. Ri ronojel caquibik'o xukuje' xquisach u wäch;
Psalms78:46 xebujach ri u wächinic ri ulew chque tak ri sac' ri qui rikom c'ax che qui t'iquic.
Psalms78:47 Xusach qui wäch ri qui uva xukuje' ri qui higo ruc' sakbach xukuje' ruc' sakalaj tew.
Psalms78:48 Ri e qui wacax xukuje' ri e qui chij xecäm can chuxe' ri sakbach xukuje' ri cakulja.
Psalms78:49 Ri Dios xutak ulok ri royowal paquiwi' ri cäk'ak'anic: oyowal
Psalms78:50 ¡Xutzokopij u chuk'ab ri royowal! Man xutok'obisaj ta u wäch ri qui c'aslemal
Psalms78:51 ¡xubano' chi xcäm kas pa Ejipt ri nabeal c'ojolaxel re conojel ri jujun tak ja winak pa Ejipt!
Psalms78:52 Xresaj ulok ri Israel jacha' juk'at chij; xuc'am bic u be ri u tinimit pa ri chaki'j uwo sak;
Psalms78:53 utz xuban bic che qui c'amic rech man cäquixe'j ta quib
Psalms78:54 Ri Dios xuc'am ulok ri u tinimit xuya' chupam ri tastalicalaj rulew; ¡pa tak ri c'ache'laj ri kas are' xch'äcowic!
Psalms78:55 Xeresaj bic ri winak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib ri man queta'm ta u wäch Dios chquiwäch ri aj israelib; xujach ri ulew pa ch'akatak chque tak ri ramak'. Xebujekeba' pa ri ulew ri xujach chque.
Psalms78:56 Ri e are' c'ut xquic'ambejej ri Dios ri c'o chicaj
Psalms78:57 je xquibano jas ri xequiban ri qui mam
Psalms78:58 Xquiyac royowal cumal tak ri qui porobal ri quequik'ijilaj wi tak diosib; xequik'ijilaj tak ri diosib
Psalms78:59 Ri Dios xpe royowal aretak xril wa' kas c'u xuxutuj ri Israel
Psalms78:60 xuwonoba' c'u can ri k'ijilabal ri xc'oji' can pa Sil
Psalms78:61 Xuya' be chque ri c'ulel chi xqueläk'aj bic ri retal ri u juluwem xukuje' ri re ri u cuinem.
Psalms78:62 Sibalaj c'u xk'ak'ar chrij ri u tinimit
Psalms78:63 Ri alabom xeporoxic rech quecämic; ¡man c'o ta chi bix re c'ulanem chque ri alitomab!
Psalms78:64 Ri e cojol ri tabal tok'ob xecäm pa u chi' ch'ich' re ch'o'j
Psalms78:65 Xc'astaj c'u ri Ajawaxel
Psalms78:66 xebuch'äc c'ut ri e u c'ulel
Psalms78:67 Xupakchi'j c'u apan ri rachoch ri Jose; man are ta xucha' ri ramak' ri Eprain;
Psalms78:68 are' c'u xucha' ri ramak' ri Juda xukuje' ri Sion ri u juyub ri lok' chuwäch.
Psalms78:69 Xuyac jun k'ijilabal tac'atic
Psalms78:70 Xucha' ri David ri pataninel rech
Psalms78:71 xuresaj chquij ri chij rech cuchajij ri u tinimit
Psalms78:72 Are c'u ri David xuchajij ri u tinimit ri Dios; xebuchajij xuc'am c'u qui be ruc' k'abaj nawinel xukuje' animaj ri jic.

Psalms83:1 Oh Dios

Psalms83:5 Qui banom jun c'ulwächinic che c'ulelaxic la

Psalms83:7 ri Jebal

Psalms84:1 ¡Sibalaj je'l ri cak'ijilax wi la

Psalms101:8 K'ij chi k'ij quintz'apij na u pa qui chi' conojel ri e banal tak etzelal ri e c'o pa ri tinimit; ¡quebenwesaj na bic pa ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel conojel ri e banal tak itzel!
Psalms102:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms102:2 Mac'u' ri palaj la chnuwäch aretak in ch'ibatajinak; ¡choc la il che nu tatabexic! ¡chinch'abej la ulok aretak quinsiq'uin che la!
Psalms102:3 Cäsach c'u na u wäch ri nu c'aslemal jacha' ri sib
Psalms102:4 ri wanima' tuktubinak jacha' ri k'ayes ri bach'uyirinak; ¡mawi ne craj chic ri nu wa!
Psalms102:5 Ri nu tz'umal e nac'al chi che ri nu bakil u mac quech ri ch'ikowem.
Psalms102:6 In je jacha' jun tucur ri c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Psalms102:7 Man coc ta nu waram. In junam ruc' jun chicop ri e c'o u xic' ri xak u tuquiel cäc'oji' puwi' ri u xotil ja.
Psalms102:8 Ri e nu c'ulel man quetani' ta che nu yok'ic
Psalms102:9 Chuq'uexwäch nu wa
Psalms102:10 rumal rech ri oyowal la xukuje' ri c'anal la
Psalms102:11 Ri nu k'ij quek'axic jacha' jun mu'jal; cätajin quinchaki'jaric jacha' ri k'ayes.
Psalms102:12 Are c'u ri lal
Psalms102:13 Walija la chel c'u'x la che ri Sion
Psalms102:14 ¡Ri e pataninel tak ech la quequilok'ok'ej ri Sion; cak'oxow ri canima' che ri quetzeletajic!
Psalms102:15 Conojel ri nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ri ajawinelab aj uwächulew nim cäquil wi na ri je'lalaj u bi' ri Ajawaxel
Psalms102:16 aretak cuyac chi jumul ri Sion xukuje' aretak cäc'utun pa ri u juluwem
Psalms102:17 aretak choc il che ri u bochi'nic ri wonobam
Psalms102:18 Chtz'ibax can wa' chque ri ija'lil ri quepe na
Psalms102:19 Ri Ajawaxel xucaye'j ulok ri uwächulew kas chicaj
Psalms102:20 Che u tatabexic ri cok'ej ri e c'o pa tak che'
Psalms102:21 rech pa Sion xukuje' pa Jerusalen
Psalms102:22 aretak ri winak que conojel ri nimak tak tinimit cäquimulij na quib che u k'ijilaxic.
Psalms102:23 Ri are' in u tukarisam niq'uiaj be; xebuk'ip ri nu k'ij.
Psalms102:24 Ri in quinbij che: “Nu Dios
Psalms102:25 Co xtiq'uiba' la ri uwächulew kas pa ri qui tiquitajic; lal xbanow la ri caj.
Psalms102:26 Ronojel wa' cäsach na u wäch
Psalms102:27 Are c'u ri lal man c'o ta q'uextajic la; ri junab la man c'o ta qui q'uistajic.
Psalms102:28 Cäya' la jicomal chque ri e quija'lil ri e pataninel tak ech la; kas chwäch c'u la quejekeba' wi na la.
Psalms103:1 Quintewichi'j na ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal; quintewichi'j ruc' ronojel ri wanima' ri tastalicalaj u bi'.
Psalms103:2 Quintewichi'j ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal; mawi jun chque ri utzil ri e u banom chwe quesach ta pa nu jolom.
Psalms103:3 Are' ri quecuyuw conojel tak ri wetzelal; are' ri quecunan conojel tak ri e nu yabilal;
Psalms103:4 ri cuto'tajisaj ri nu c'aslemal chuwäch ri mukubal; ri quinunojisaj che lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' ch'uch'ujil;
Psalms103:5 ri quinunojisaj che ronojel u wäch utzil
Psalms103:6 Ri Ajawaxel cak'atan tzij kas ruc' suq'uilal paquiwi' ri cäban c'ax chque.
Psalms103:7 Xebuya' retamaxic tak ri e u be xukuje' ri e u banoj che ri Moises xukuje' che ri u tinimit Israel.
Psalms103:8 Ri Ajawaxel ch'uch'uj xukuje' quel u c'u'x; c'o u coch'onic xukuje' nojinak che lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj.
Psalms103:9 Man xak ta amak'el cujuyajo xukuje' ri royowal man cäbeytaj taj;
Psalms103:10 man u yo'm ta ri tojbal chke jas ri ri takal chque ri ketzelal xukuje' tak ri e ka mac;
Psalms103:11 sibalaj c'o na ri u nimal lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x chque ri nim queilowic
Psalms103:12 Ri ka mac u najtajisam chke
Psalms103:13 Ri Ajawaxel sibalaj ch'uch'uj cuc' ri nim caquil wi
Psalms103:14 ri are' reta'm jas xcoj che kabanic: kas reta'm chi uj puc'uc' ulew.
Psalms103:15 Ri u c'aslemal ri winak xak junam ruc' ri k'ayes
Psalms103:16 Chanim cäsach u wäch
Psalms103:17 Are c'u ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri Ajawaxel re chbe k'ij sak chque ri queyo'w u k'ij; ri u suq'uil man c'o ta u q'uistajic chque pa conojel ri ija'lil
Psalms103:18 chque ri caquitz'akatisaj ri u c'ulwächinic
Psalms103:19 Ri Ajawaxel u cojom ri u tem re ajawibal chupam ri caj ri rajawinic cätakan c'u puwi' ronojel.
Psalms103:20 ¡Chitewichi'j ri Ajawaxel
Psalms103:21 ¡Chitewichi'j ri Ajawaxel iwonojel ri ix rajch'ojab
Psalms103:22 ¡Chnimalaj ronojel ri winakirisam chtewichi'n che ri Ajawaxel pa conojel ri u c'olbal ri rajawibal! ¡Quintewichi'j na ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal!
Psalms104:1 ¡Quintewichi'j na ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal! ¡Sibalaj lal nim banic la
Psalms104:2 bolk'otim ib pa jun sakilal jacha' ta ne jun atz'iak. ¡Lal xlic'ow la ri caj jacha' jun ch'ukubal!
Psalms104:3 ¡Co xjekba' la ri rakan tak ri achoch la puwi' ri ja'
Psalms104:4 Cäban tako'n la chque tak ri quiakik'
Psalms104:5 Xcoj la ri uwächulew paquiwi' ri e u tac'alibal rech mawi jubik' quel pa ri u c'olbal.
Psalms104:6 Ri cholaj plo ch'ukuwinak u wi' ri ulew je ta ne jun atz'iak. Ri ja' quebuch'uk tak ri juyub.
Psalms104:7 Xyaj c'u la
Psalms104:8 Xpaki' paquiwi' tak ri juyub
Psalms104:9 pa ri c'ulbat ri xbij wi la che chi man cuxal k'atij taj
Psalms104:10 Lal cätakow la ulok ri ja' ri quebel ulok pa tak ri e u q'uiyibal tak ja' pa tak ri nima' ri quebin xo'l tak ri c'ache'laj.
Psalms104:11 We ja' ri' cacuq'uiaj ri awaj ri e c'o pa tak ri juyub; ruc' wa' cäquesaj ri qui chaki'j chi' ri juyubal tak bur.
Psalms104:12 Ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' querapap cho caj
Psalms104:13 Lal ri cäja'n la ri c'ache'laj kas pa ri achoch la ri c'o ulok chicaj; cuc' jäb ri quetixtob ulok chicaj
Psalms104:14 Cäq'uiyisaj la ri quecha' ri awaj
Psalms104:15 ri wa ri queyo'w u chuk'ab
Psalms104:16 Cäresaj ri qui chaki'j chi' ri che' tak
Psalms104:17 Xo'l tak ri qui k'ab cäquiban wi qui soc ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' ri e ch'utik na
Psalms104:18 Ri tac'atak tak juyub are' qui c'olbal chque ri juyubal tak q'uisic'
Psalms104:19 Xban la ri ic' che retaxic ri k'ijol; ri k'ij reta'm jampa' cuc'u' rib.
Psalms104:20 Cälic' la ri k'ekumalaj chak'ab
Psalms104:21 Ri coj quewun che u rikic ri qui ti'; cäquita' che ri Dios chi chuya' ri cäquitijo.
Psalms104:22 Aretak c'u quel ulok ri k'ij
Psalms104:23 C'äte ri' quel ulok ri winak cäbe pa ri u chac cachacun c'ut c'ä coc na ri ak'ab.
Psalms104:24 ¡E joropa' ri jastak ri e banom la Ajawaxel! Conojel xeban la ruc' no'j; ¡ri uwächulew nojinak che ronojel ri q'uiyisam la!
Psalms104:25 C'o ri plo nim u wäch xukuje' cäliq'uiq'uic
Psalms104:26 chla' quebin wi tak ri jucub
Psalms104:27 Conojel wa' quebeyen che la rech cäya' la ri qui wa pa ri u k'ijol.
Psalms104:28 Ri lal queya' la chque
Psalms104:29 we cac'u' ri palaj la
Psalms104:30 We c'u cätak la ulok ri uxlab la re c'aslemal
Psalms104:31 ¡Junalic ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel! ¡Ri Ajawaxel cäquicot chupam ronojel ri u chac!
Psalms104:32 Ri uwächulew cäyicopic aretak cäcäyex rumal; ¡ri juyub cäquesaj sib aretak cächap rumal!
Psalms104:33 Joropa' k'ij ri quinc'asi'c xukuje' c'o nu c'aslemal
Psalms104:34 Chekaj ta ri e nu chomanic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Psalms104:35 Chsach qui wäch ri ajmaquib cho ri uwächulew. ¡Militaj chquiwäch ri banal tak etzelal! ¡Quintewichi'j na ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal! ¡Chyok u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms105:1 ¡Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chiwesaj u tzijol ri u bi'! Chebitzijoj ri jastak ri e u banom chque tak ri tinimit.
Psalms105:2 Chebibixoj bix che u ya'ic u k'ij. ¡Chebitzijoj ri nimak tak mayibal ri e u banom!
Psalms105:3 Chich'obo' rumal ri tastalicalaj u bi'. ¡Chquicot ri canima' ri quetzucun che ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms105:4 Chitzucuj ri Ajawaxel
Psalms105:5 Chenataj chiwe ri e nimak tak u chac xukuje' e mayibal
Psalms105:6 ix
Psalms105:7 Ri are'
Psalms105:8 Pune' ta c'u ne' queboc'ow jun mil ija'lil man cäsach ta pa u jolom ri e chi'nic ri e u c'ulwächinic
Psalms105:9 rech ri c'ulwächinic ri xuban ruc' ri Abraham
Psalms105:10 Ri xujekeba' jacha' jun pixab che ri Jacob
Psalms105:11 aretak xubij: “Quinya' ri ulew re Canaan chawe jacha' che echbal ri ya'tal chawe.”
Psalms105:12 Pune' xa e quieb oxib ri e are'
Psalms105:13 ri quebel bic pa jun nim tinimit quebe pa jun nim tinimit chic pa jun ajawibal pa jun ajawibal chic
Psalms105:14 ri Dios man xuya' ta be chi c'o ta jachin xbanow c'ax chque
Psalms105:15 “Mebichap ri e cha'tajinak wumal
Psalms105:16 Xuc'am ulok wi'jal pa ri ulew ri'

Psalms105:18 Xesoc ri rakan cumal tikom tak ch'ich'; ¡ch'ich' xyutubex rech!

Psalms105:20 ri ajawinel
Psalms105:21 xuya' rekle'n chi coc che takanel puwi' ri rachoch xukuje' puwi' ronojel ri c'o ruc'
Psalms105:22 rech cätijonic quebuban c'u ajno'jab chque ri c'amal tak be xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib.
Psalms105:23 Xopan c'u ri Israel
Psalms105:24 Ri Dios xubano chi xq'uiyir ri rajilabal ri u tinimit
Psalms105:25 Xuban c'ut chi ri aj ejiptib xquiyac quib chrij u tinimit
Psalms105:26 Ri Dios xutak c'u bic ri Moises ri pataninel rech
Psalms105:27 ri e are' xequiban tak ri e u mayibal ri Dios chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak: ¡nimak tak mayibal xquiban pa ri rulew ri Cam!
Psalms105:28 Ri Dios xutak ulok jun k'ekumalil ri ronojel xuch'uku
Psalms105:29 Xebujalwächij ri ja' ri e c'o pa tak ri nima' pa quic'. Xebucämisaj conojel ri cär ri e c'o chupam;
Psalms105:30 xuchuwirisaj ri ulew cumal tak xtutz'
Psalms105:31 Xch'aw ri Dios
Psalms105:32 Che u q'uexwäch jäb
Psalms105:33 Xebuk'aj tak ri qui uva
Psalms105:34 Xch'aw ri Dios
Psalms105:35 ¡Xequitij ri k'ayes ri e c'o pa ri juyub
Psalms105:36 ¡Xuc'am ulok cämical puwi' ri Ejipt
Psalms105:37 Xresaj c'u na ulok ri Dios ri u tinimit quekam chic k'an puak xukuje' sak puak
Psalms105:38 Ri aj ejiptib xequicotic aretak xquilo chi xebel ulok
Psalms105:39 Ri Dios xulic' jun sutz' che qui ch'ukic
Psalms105:40 Xquita' qui wa
Psalms105:41 Xupaxij ri abaj
Psalms105:42 Xnataj c'ut ri tastalicalaj chi'nic che ri u banom che ri Abraham ri pataninel rech.
Psalms105:43 Jewa' xuban ri Dios aretak xresaj ulok ri u tinimit ri cha'talic
Psalms105:44 xujach ri culew ri jule' nimak tak tinimit chic pa qui k'ab xukuje' ri qui ch'äcoj jule' tak tinimit chic
Psalms105:45 nim c'u chequila' wi xukuje' cheboc il che quilixic tak ri pixab xukuje' tak ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms106:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel utz c'ut ri are'
Psalms106:2 ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic quebutzijoj tak ri ch'äcanic ri u banom ri Ajawaxel? ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic cuya' u k'ij jas ri takal che?
Psalms106:3 E tewichital ri cäquiban ri suq'uilal amak'el c'ut are' cäquiban ri suq'uilal.
Psalms106:4 Chinnataj che la
Psalms106:5 rech quinwil ri utzil ri cäquirik ri e cha'om la
Psalms106:6 Uj macuninak
Psalms106:7 Ri e ka mam chila' pa Ejipt
Psalms106:8 Xebucol c'u ri Dios xa u mac rech ri u bi'
Psalms106:9 Xuyaj ri Quiäk Plo xuchaki'jarisaj c'ut. Xuban chque chi xeboc'ow chupam ri u choil ri plo je ta ne pa jun chaki'j uwo sak.
Psalms106:10 Jewa' xuban che quesaxic pa qui k'ab ri e qui c'ulel
Psalms106:11 Ri ja' xebuch'uk ri e qui c'ulel man c'o ta jun chque xc'asi' ta canok
Psalms106:12 xecojon c'u che ri e u chi'nic ri Dios
Psalms106:13 Chanim c'ut xsach ri e u banoj ri Dios pa qui jolom
Psalms106:14 chila' c'ut pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Psalms106:15 Ri Dios xuya' chque ri xquitz'onoj
Psalms106:16 E c'o c'u jujun chupam ri kajebal xtitat xquina' chrij ri Moises xukuje' chrij ri Aaron ri u jachom rib pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel.
Psalms106:17 Xujak c'u rib ri ulew xubik' c'u bic ri Datan
Psalms106:18 ¡xnicow ri k'ak' paquiwi' conojel! ¡ri rak' k'ak' xebuporoj ri e banal tak etzelal!
Psalms106:19 Pa ri juyub Horeb xquiban wi jun alaj ama' wacax
Psalms106:20 ¡Xquiq'uex ri juluwemalaj u wächbal ri Dios che u wächbal jun wacax ri cutij k'ayes!
Psalms106:21 Xsach ri Dios pa qui jolom
Psalms106:22 ri xebuban nimak tak mayibal pa ri rulew ri Cam
Psalms106:23 Ri Dios xubij chi cusach qui wäch
Psalms106:24 Chumatam chic
Psalms106:25 c'ax xech'aw che ri Dios pa tak ri qui lic'om cäbal
Psalms106:26 Xuyac c'u ri u k'ab
Psalms106:27 cuban c'u na chi quebecäm na ri e quija'lil
Psalms106:28 Xebux c'u tak u lok'om pataninelab ri Baal-peor
Psalms106:29 U mac c'u quech ri itzel tak qui chac xyactaj royowal ri Dios
Psalms106:30 Xwalij ri Pinees
Psalms106:31 Ri Dios xurajilaj we suc'alaj banoj ri' chrij re chbe k'ij sak
Psalms106:32 Xquiban c'ut chi xoyowar ri Dios chquichi' ri ja' re Merib
Psalms106:33 xquic'ayirisaj ri ranima'
Psalms106:34 Man xquisach ta qui wäch tak ri tinimit ri xubij ri Ajawaxel chi cäsach qui wäch.
Psalms106:35 Xane' xquiyuj quib cuc' ri e k'ijilal tak diosib xquetamaj u banic que ri qui nak'atisabal:
Psalms106:36 Xequik'ijilaj tak diosib ri quequik'ijilaj tak ri winak
Psalms106:37 xequichi'j c'u ri e qui c'ojol xukuje' ri e qui mia'l che tabal tok'ob chque ri itzel tak uxlabal.
Psalms106:38 Xequitix quic' ri man e c'o ta qui mac
Psalms106:39 xequitz'iloj c'u tak quib cumal tak ri e qui banoj xca'n ri cäcan ri quech ri nim ch'utin.

Psalms107:1 Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:2 Chquibij ri e colotajinak rumal ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:3 ri xebumulij ri xeresaj chquixo'l tak ri ulew aj iquiak'ab
Psalms107:4 Quebinicatic e sachinak chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak ri nojinak che sanyeb
Psalms107:5 ¡c'o qui numic xukuje' qui chaki'j chi'
Psalms107:6 Pa ri qui bis c'ut xquita' ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:7 xebuya' c'u chupam jun colomalaj be ri cäbe chupam jun tinimit ri cuya' quejeki' wi.
Psalms107:8 Chebiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel rumal ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Psalms107:9 Ri are' cuchupisaj ri u chaki'j chi' ri cachaki'j u chi' cutz'ebej c'u u tzukic ri c'o pa numic.
Psalms107:10 E jekel chupam räxcanacojalaj k'ekumalil
Psalms107:11 u mac ri qui c'ulelaxic ri e u takanic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:12 Ri Dios xebucoj chuxe' c'axalaj tak chac; xepajlobic
Psalms107:13 Pa ri qui bis c'ut xquitz'onoj ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:14 xeresaj pa ri tzatzalaj k'ekumalil ri e c'o wi
Psalms107:15 Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel rumal ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x
Psalms107:16 ¡Xebuban ch'akatak chque tak oquibal re k'an ch'ich'! ¡Xebuban ch'akatak chque tak ri balul re räx ch'ich'!
Psalms107:17 Ri man caquicoj ta ri qui no'j quirikom c'u c'ax rumal ri kas quetzelal xukuje' macaj
Psalms107:18 ronojel ri cäquitijo xa cuban chi c'ax chque; ¡e c'o chi chuchi' ri oquibal re ri cämical!
Psalms107:19 Pa ri qui bis c'ut xquitz'onoj ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:20 xutak ulok ri u tzij xebucunaj c'ut; ¡xebuto'tajisaj man xebe ta chupam ri mukubal!

Psalms107:22 Chebiya' tabal tak tok'ob chuwäch re maltioxinic
Psalms107:23 Xebe tak ri ajc'ayib puwi' ri plo
Psalms107:24 chila' c'ut puwi' ri nimalaj plo xquil wi ri mayibalalaj u q'uiyisanic ri Ajawaxel.
Psalms107:25 Rumal c'ut ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel xwalij jun nimalaj quiakik' ri xuwalijisaj u wäch ri ja';
Psalms107:26 e q'uiakom c'ä cho ri caj
Psalms107:27 Xak que pajalob chic je ta ne k'abarelab; ¡man c'o ta xupatanij ri qui nawibal!
Psalms107:28 Chupam c'ut ri qui c'axc'ol xquitz'onoj ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms107:29 xuq'uex ri nimalaj quiakik' pa musmul jäb
Psalms107:30 Aretak xquilo chi xkaj ri u wäch ri plo
Psalms107:31 Chiya' maltioxinic che ri Ajawaxel rumal ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Psalms107:32 ¡Chitz'onoj tok'ob che aretak cumulij rib ri tinimit! ¡Chik'ijilaj aretak caquimulij quib ri nimak tak tatayib!
Psalms107:33 Ri Ajawaxel quebuq'uex tak ri nima' xukuje' ri e u q'uiyibal tak ja' pa chaki'j tak uwo sak xukuje' pa chaki'j tak ulew;
Psalms107:34 ri ulew ri cäwächinic cuq'uex pa rulewal atz'am rumal ri quetzelal ri winak ri e c'o chila';
Psalms107:35 cuq'uex ri chaki'j uwo sak pa cho
Psalms107:36 chila' quebujekeba' wi ri quenumic
Psalms107:37 Quequitic u wäch tak ri ulew
Psalms107:38 Ri Ajawaxel quebutewichi'j
Psalms107:39 We c'u quecämic
Psalms107:40 Ri Dios cäretzelaj qui wäch ri e banal tak c'ax
Psalms107:41 Ri Dios queresaj ri mebayib pa ri qui bis; ¡quebuq'uiyirisaj ri cachalaxic jacha' ri chij!
Psalms107:42 Aretak cäquil wa' ri winak ri utz canima'
Psalms107:43 Jachin ri c'o u no'j
Psalms108:1 Ri wanima' suc'umatalic
Psalms108:2 chixc'astajok
Psalms108:3 Quinya' na k'ij la cuc' tak bix
Psalms108:4 Ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la c'o na u nimal chquiwäch ri caj. ¡Ri jicomal la copan c'ä cho ri räxalaj caj!
Psalms108:5 ¡Nu Dios
Psalms108:6 Chujcolo' la ruc' ri cuinem la
Psalms108:7 Ri Dios xch'aw ulok kas chupam ri cak'ijilax wi: “¡Ruc' quicotemal quinjach na ri Siquem
Psalms108:8 Ri Galaad xukuje' ri Manases e wech; ri Eprain are to'bal nu jolom; ri Juda are nu ch'ämiy re takanic;
Psalms108:9 ri Moab are tzima ch'ajbal nu k'ab; puwi' ri Edom quinq'uiak wi na ri nu peraj xajäb; ¡quinbixoj na ch'äcanic paquiwi' ri aj pilisteyib!”
Psalms108:10 ¿Jachin ta quinc'amow bic pa ri tinimit ri c'o tapia chrij? ¿Jachin ta cäc'amow bic nu be c'ä pa Edom?
Psalms108:11 Ri lal c'ut
Psalms108:12 Chujto' la che u ch'äquic ri c'ulel
Psalms108:13 Ruc' ri u to'banic ri Dios quekaban na nimak tak mayibal; ¡are' quebuxak'alej na ri e ka c'ulel!
Psalms109:1 Nu Dios
Psalms109:2 Chi'aj c'ut banal tak tzij xukuje' banal etzelal queyok'on chwe
Psalms109:3 Qui sutim wij ruc' ri qui yok'onic; ¡xak cäquiban c'ax chwe man c'o ta c'u nu mac!
Psalms109:4 Che u q'uexwäch ri nu lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Psalms109:5 Ruc' etzelal qui tojom ri utzil ri nu banom chque

Psalms109:21 Are' c'u ri lal

Psalms119:1 Utz quech ri man c'o ta macaj pa ri qui c'aslemal

Psalms119:6 Ma ta c'u c'o jas quinq'uix wi na aretak chinoc il che qui nimaxic tak conojel ri e takomal la.
Psalms119:7 Quink'ijilan na che la ruc' ronojel wanima' ri man xak cawäch aretak e wetamam chic ri e suc'alaj tak pixab ri e tz'ibam.

Psalms119:93 Mawi c'u jubik' quel ta pa nu jolom ri pixab la ri e tz'ibatalic
Psalms119:94 ¡Chincolo' la
Psalms119:95 Ri e banal tak etzelal xak queyem jampa' quecuin che nu cämisaxic
Psalms119:96 Wilom chi conojel ri jastak c'o qui q'uistajic
Psalms119:97 ¡Sibalaj quinlok'ok'ej ri tijonic la! ¡Ronojel ri jun k'ij quinchoman chrij!
Psalms119:98 Ri e takomal tak la e wech chbe k'ij sak; qui banom na aj no'j chwe chquiwäch ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe.
Psalms119:99 C'o na ri quinch'ob na chquiwäch conojel ri wajtijab
Psalms119:100 C'o ri quinch'ob na chquiwäch ri ri'jab tak tatayib rumal rech chi e nu nimam tak ri pixab la ri e tz'ibatalic.
Psalms119:101 E nu najtajisam ri wakan che ronojel itzel be rech quintz'akatisaj ri tzij la.
Psalms119:102 Man nu tasom ta wib chquij tak ri pixab la ri e tz'ibatal umal la lal chi c'ut ri quintijon la.
Psalms119:103 Ri chi'm la c'o na ri u qui'al pa nu chi'
Psalms119:104 Chque tak ri e tz'ibatal umal la wesam wi etamanic; rumal ri' quinwetzelaj u wäch ronojel subunelalaj c'aslemal.

Psalms119:107 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:108 Chec'amowaj la
Psalms119:109 Amak'el xak quieb xubij ri cämical panuwi'
Psalms119:110 Ri e banal tak etzelal quequicoj c'amibal pa nu be
Psalms119:111 Ri junalic wechbal e are' ri takomal la
Psalms119:112 Ruc' ronojel wanima' e nu yo'm nu tzij che qui banic ri caquibij ri e pixab la
Psalms119:113 Quinwetzelaj qui wäch ri winak ri quieb qui wäch
Psalms119:114 Lal quintok'en la xukuje' nu ch'ukubal wib; nu yo'm c'ut ri weyebal c'u'x chrij ri tzij la.
Psalms119:115 ¡Chinajtajisaj iwib chwe
Psalms119:116 Chya' la nu chuk'ab
Psalms119:117 Chinto' la
Psalms119:118 Lal quetzelaj la qui wäch ri cäquitas quib chquij ri pixab la
Psalms119:119 Ri e banal tak etzelal ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xa e mes chwäch la; rumal ri' quebenlok'oj ri e takomal la.
Psalms119:120 Cäbirbit ri nu cuerp rumal xe'n ib chwäch la; ¡nim quebenwil wi ri pixab la!
Psalms119:121 Mawi jubik' nu tanabam u banic jachique ri suc'; minwonoba' la can pa qui k'ab ri quebanow c'ax chwe.
Psalms119:122 Cheklej la ri u banic utzil chwe; minquiyok' ri e nimol tak quib.
Psalms119:123 Quechup ri nu bak'wäch
Psalms119:124 Je bana' la che we pataninel ech la ri' je jas ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la; ¡chintijoj la chque ri pixab la!
Psalms119:125 Ri in in pataninel ech la. Chya' la wetamanic
Psalms119:126 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:127 Rumal ri' ri in e are' quebenlok'ok'ej na ri e takomal la chuwäch ri utzalaj tak k'an puak.
Psalms119:128 Rumal ri' e nu c'ojom ri e tz'ibatal umal la che c'amal nu be
Psalms119:129 Ri e takanic la e mayibal; rumal ri' quebennimaj.
Psalms119:130 Ri qui quiric ri tzij la caquiya' tununic
Psalms119:131 Ruc' nimalaj rayinic quinjak ri nu chi; sibalaj c'u quebenrayij ri e takomal la.
Psalms119:132 Chiwila' la
Psalms119:133 Chc'ama' la nu be je jas ri cubij ri tzij la; maya' la be chi quinkajbex rumal ri etzelal.
Psalms119:134 Chinesaj la chuwäch ri tokinic aj winak
Psalms119:135 Utz rilic we pataninel ech la ri' bana' la; chintijoj c'u la chque tak ri pixab la.
Psalms119:136 Nima' quech u wa'l wächaj queturuw tak chque ri nu bak'wäch
Psalms119:137 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:138 Conojel tak ri takanic la e suc' xukuje' e kastzij.
Psalms119:139 In oyowinak rumal quech ri nu c'ulel chi man cäquita'taj ri tzij la.
Psalms119:140 Ri chi'nic la oc'owinak chquipam c'axalaj tak c'ambejenic
Psalms119:141 Man c'o ta nu banic
Psalms119:142 Ri suq'uil la amak'el suc' wi
Psalms119:143 In kajinak pa c'axc'olil xukuje' chquipam tak latz'obibal
Psalms119:144 Ri e takanic la amak'el e suc'; ¡chya' la wetamanic rech quincuinic quinc'asi'c!
Psalms119:145 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:146 Che la quintz'onoj wi to'banic; chinto' la
Psalms119:147 C'ämajok chi sakarok
Psalms119:148 C'ämajok choc ri ak'ab ri e nu bak'wäch e c'asc'atinak chi apanok che u chomaxic ri chi'nic la.
Psalms119:149 Chtatabej la ri nu ch'abal
Psalms119:150 Nakaj e c'o wi ri e are' cäcaj caquiban c'ax chwe ri man e tok'obisal ta wächaj
Psalms119:151 Ri lal Ajawaxel nakaj lal c'o wi
Psalms119:152 Kas ojer ulok wetamam qui wäch ri e takanic la
Psalms119:153 Chila la ri nu c'axc'obic
Psalms119:154 Chto' la nu wi'
Psalms119:155 Ri to'banic la naj c'o wi chque ri e banal tak etzelal
Psalms119:156 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:157 Sibalaj e q'ui ri e nu c'ulel xukuje' ri e banal tak c'ax chwe
Psalms119:158 Man quebencoch' ta ri man e jic taj
Psalms119:159 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:160 Chupam ri tzij la c'o wi ri kastzij; ri e junalic e suc' conojel tak ri e tz'ibatal umal la.
Psalms119:161 Winak ri c'o qui cuinem quinquiterenej pa wakan man c'o ta c'u jasche
Psalms119:162 In quina' wib chi sibalaj utz wech rumal ri chi'nic la
Psalms119:163 Quinwetzelaj u wäch ri banoj tzij
Psalms119:164 Amak'el quink'ijilan che la rumal quech ri e suc'alaj tak pixab la.
Psalms119:165 Ri quelok'ok'en ri tijonic la
Psalms119:166 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:167 In quebennimaj ri takanic la
Psalms119:168 In quebennimaj tak ri pixab la ri e tz'ibatalic xukuje' tak ri takanic la; ¡lal eta'm la ronojel ri nu c'aslemal!
Psalms119:169 Chebopan ri nu rakoj tak chi'aj chwäch la Ajawaxel; ¡chya' la wetamanic je jas ri u cholajil ri tzij la!
Psalms119:170 Chopan ri nu ch'awem chwäch la; ¡chinto'tajisaj la je jas ri u cholajil ri chi'nic la!
Psalms119:171 Chq'uiy ulok ri k'ijilanic chi nu chi'
Psalms119:172 Ri e nu chi' chquibixoj jun bix che ri chi'nic la
Psalms119:173 Xak cheyen ri k'ab la che u ya'ic to'banic chwe
Psalms119:174 Ajawaxel
Psalms119:175 Quinwaj chi quinc'asi' che u ya'ic k'ij la; chinuto' ba' ri suq'uilal la.
Psalms119:176 Nu jalon nu be jacha' jun chij; ¡petba' la che nu tzucuxic
Psalms120:1 Aretak in c'o chupam ri c'axc'ol

Psalms120:5 ¡Tok'ob nu wäch in ri xa wokxanim wib pa Mesec

Psalms121:1 Aretak quebenwil tak ri c'ache'laj quinc'ot nu chi': “¿jawije' lo quel wi na ulok ri to'l wech?”
Psalms121:2 Ri to'l wech quel na ulok ruc' ri Ajawaxel
Psalms121:3 Mawi jubik' cuya' chi catjiljobic. Mawi jubik' cäwar ta na ri catchajinic.
Psalms121:4 Man c'o ta jubik' cäwaric; mawi jubik' cäwar ri cachajin ri Israel.
Psalms121:5 Ri Ajawaxel are' catchajinic; ri Ajawaxel are' catch'ukuwic
Psalms121:6 Ri k'ij man cuban ta c'ax chawe pa k'ij
Psalms121:7 Ri Ajawaxel catuch'uk na rech man catkaj ta pa u k'ab apachique c'axc'olil; ri are' cuchajij ri a c'aslemal.

Psalms139:4 C'ä majok ne chc'ol ri tzij puwi' ri wak'

Psalms139:9 we ta quinrapinic quinbe pa elebal k'ij

Psalms139:11 We ta quinchomaj u c'u'ic wib chupam ri k'ekumalil
Psalms139:12 ri k'eku'm man cäcuin ta ri' quinuc'u' chwäch la; ¡xak junam ri k'ekumalil xukuje' ri sakilal che la!

Psalms140:1 Ajawaxel
Psalms140:2 ri cäquichomaj u banic ri man utz ta amak'el c'ut quetzurun che ch'o'j.

Psalms140:5 We e banal tak nimal ri' qui cojom jun c'amibal; e quilic'om c'at xukuje' tak colob chnuwäch; e qui cojom tak c'amibal chwe chunakaj ri be.

Psalms140:9 
Psalms140:10 Chekaj rachak k'ak' paquiwi' ri quekakatic; cheq'uiak pa tak jul jawije' ri man quebel ta chi wi ulok.
Psalms140:11 Ri winak ri nim rak' mutakej jekelem cho ri uwächulew; chterenex ri ch'u'j u jolom
Psalms140:12 In weta'm chi ri Ajawaxel cuban suq'uil che ri meba'
Psalms140:13 Ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel cäquiya' na u k'ij ri bi' la; ri winak ri e suc' quejeki' na chwäch la.
Psalms141:1 Che la quintz'onoj wi tok'ob
Psalms141:2 Ri nu ch'awem uc' la je chuxok jacha' ri c'oc'alaj k'ol chwäch la
Psalms141:3 Ajawaxel
Psalms141:4 Najtajisaj la ri nu chomanic che ri etzelal; mäya' la chwe chi quebenban itzel tak banoj
Psalms141:5 Are jun tok'ob chwe chi ri winak tz'akatisanel pa ronojel cuc'äjisaj nu wäch
Psalms141:6 Ri e c'amal tak qui be ri e banal etzelal
Psalms141:7 Ri e qui bakil quejabux na chuxcut ri mukubal
Psalms141:8 Ajawaxel
Psalms141:9 Chinesaj la chuwäch ri c'amibal ri cojom pa ri nu be; chinesaj la chuwäch ri qui c'amibal ri itzel tak winak.
Psalms141:10 Chekaj ri banal tak etzelal chupam ri kas qui c'at
Psalms142:1 Ruc' cowilaj rakoj chi'aj quintz'onoj ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Psalms142:2 Chuwäch quintzujun wi
Psalms142:3 aretak kas in c'o chupam ri latz'obal. Ajawaxel
Psalms142:4 Quinca'y pa nu wiquiak'ab man c'o ta c'u jun cäpe ta che nu to'ic. ¡Man c'o ta jachin jun cuto' ta nu wi'! ¡Man c'o ta jachin jun coc ta il chwe!
Psalms142:5 Che la Ajawaxel quintz'onoj wi tok'ob
Psalms142:6 Chya' la ri xiquin la che qui tatabexic ri nu rakoj chi'aj
Psalms142:7 Chinesaj la pa ri ximibal ri in c'o wi rech quincuinic quink'ijilan che la. Ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel cäquimulij na quib chwij aretak nu rikom chic utzil umal la.
Psalms143:1 Ajawaxel chtatabej la ri nu ch'awem uc' la; choc la il che ri nu bochi'nic. ¡Tzelej la u wäch ri nu tzij
Psalms143:2 Mäsiq'uij la ri pataninel ech la rech cajilaj la ri u mac chrij
Psalms143:3 Ri e nu c'ulel in quiterenem pa wakan; in qui xak'alem cho ri ulew; caquicoj chuk'ab chwe chi chinjekel chupam ri k'ekumalil jacha' ri e cäminak ojer.
Psalms143:4 Kas in c'o chupam ri latz'; quel ch'u'j ri wanima'.
Psalms143:5 Quenataj ri ojer tak k'ijol chwe
Psalms143:6 Quebenyuk apan ri nu k'ab che la
Psalms143:7 Ajawaxel
Psalms143:8 Ak'abibal chya' la retamaxic ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x la chwe
Psalms143:9 Ajawaxel
Psalms143:10 Chc'utu' la chnuwäch ri u banic ri rayibal la
Psalms143:11 Rumal ri bi' la
Psalms143:12 Rumal rech chi lal jic ¡sachisaj la qui wäch ri e nu c'ulel! ¡sachisaj la qui wäch conojel ri e nu c'ulel
Psalms144:1 Tewichital ri Ajawaxel
Psalms144:2 are' ri jicalaj wachil
Psalms144:3 Ajawaxel
Psalms144:4 Ri winak xa je jacha' jun uxlabic; ri u c'aslemal jacha' jun nanoch' ri coc'owic.
Psalms144:5 Ajawaxel
Psalms144:6 cheq'uiaka' tak ri ch'ab la
Psalms144:7 Yuku' la ulok ri k'ab la chicaj
Psalms144:8 ri quequibij banoj tak tzij cäquiyac c'ut ri qui k'ab quiquiak'ab che u bixic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na xa c'u che subunic.
Psalms144:9 Ajawaxel
Psalms144:10 Lal ri cäya' la ch'äcanic chque tak ri ajawinelab; lal
Psalms144:11 
Psalms144:12 Ri e ka c'ojol queq'uiyic jacha' jujun tico'n chupam jun ticonijibal; ri e ka mia'l e je ta ne rakan tak ja ri banom quetz'balil ri quetok'en ri u wi' ri rachoch Dios.
Psalms144:13 Ri e ka c'uja e nojinak e xaninak che ronojel u wäch k'obisabal. Ri e ka chij sibalaj quepok' pa tak mil
Psalms144:14 Ri e ka wacax ri e c'o chi qui tu' mawi jumul quetzakanic. Man e c'o ta rakoj tak chi'j re cojol tak xib.
Psalms144:15 ¡Utz rech ri tinimit ri e c'o ronojel wa' ruc'! ¡Utz rech ri tinimit ri are' u Dios ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms145:1 Quintzijoj na chi sibalaj nim banic la
Psalms145:2 Ronojel k'ij quintewichi'j na la; quink'ijilaj na ri bi' la amak'el.
Psalms145:3 Ri Ajawaxel nim u banic
Psalms145:4 Chi ija'lil chi ija'lil quequiya' na qui k'ij tak ri e banoj la
Psalms145:5 Catzijox na ri juluwemalaj nimalil la
Psalms145:6 Quetzijox na ri nimak xukuje' ri xibibalalaj tak jastak ri e banom la
Psalms145:7 Cätzijox na ri nimalaj utzil la
Psalms145:8 Ri Ajawaxel ch'uch'uj xukuje' quel u c'u'x; c'o u coch'onic
Psalms145:9 Ri Ajawaxel utz cuc' conojel
Psalms145:10 Ajawaxel
Psalms145:11 ¡Quitzijoj ri juluwemalaj ajawibal la! ¡Chquesaj u tzijol ri cunelalaj tak banoj la!
Psalms145:12 ¡Chyo'k retamaxic ri cuinem la chque tak ri winak
Psalms145:13 Ri ajawibal la are jun ajawibal re chbe k'ij sak
Psalms145:14 Ri Ajawaxel quebutok'ej ri quetzaklobic
Psalms145:15 Ri qui bak'wäch conojel quebeyen che la cäya' c'u la ri qui wa pa ri u k'ijol.
Psalms145:16 Quejak ri k'ab la
Psalms145:17 Ri Ajawaxel suc' pa tak ri e u be
Psalms145:18 Ri Ajawaxel

Psalms145:21 ¡Ri nu chi' chuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Conojel chquiya' u k'ij ri tastalicalaj u bi'
Psalms146:1 Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. Quinya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ruc' ronojel ri nu c'aslibal.
Psalms146:2 Quinya' u k'ij ri Dios joropa' k'ij ri quinc'asi' na; quinbixoj na bix che ri nu Dios joropa' k'ij quinc'oji' na.
Psalms146:3 Mebijiquiba' i c'u'x chquij tak winak ri nimak qui k'ij
Psalms146:4 aretak c'u quecämic quetzelej kas pa ri puc'uc' ulew
Psalms146:5 Sibalaj utz rech ri cuc'am ri u to'banic ri u Dios ri Jacob
Psalms146:6 Are' xbanow ri caj
Psalms146:7 Cuban suq'uil chque ri e c'o pa c'axc'olil
Psalms146:8 ri Ajawaxel cutzelej chi jumul ri qui bak'wäch ri moyab; ri Ajawaxel quebuwalijisaj ri e tzakinak; ri Ajawaxel quebulok'ok'ej ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel;
Psalms146:9 ri Ajawaxel quebuch'uku ri e re jun tinimit chic
Psalms146:10 At Sion
Psalms147:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Sibalaj utz qui bixoxic bix che ri ka Dios! ¡Che ri are' rajawaxic queya' qui'laj tak bix!
Psalms147:2 Ri Ajawaxel cuban u banic ri Jerusalen
Psalms147:3 Ri are' quebucunaj ri pak'pobinak canima'
Psalms147:4 Ri are' reta'm ri cajilabal ri ch'imil
Psalms147:5 Nim u banic ri ka Dios xukuje' nim ri u cuinem; ri retamanic man c'o ta u q'uistajic.
Psalms147:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' qui k'ij ri e mach'amoj
Psalms147:7 Chixbixon che ri Ajawaxel ruc' maltioxinic; chibixoj bix che ri ka Dios
Psalms147:8 Ri are' cuch'uk ri caj ruc' ri sutz'
Psalms147:9 quebutzuk ri awaj xukuje' ri alaj tak cal ri joj aretak quebok'ic.
Psalms147:10 Man are ta ri u chuk'ab ri quiej mawi ri e u ch'ec ri winak ri sibalaj quekaj ta chuwäch ri Ajawaxel;
Psalms147:11 are nim queril wi ri queyo'w u k'ij; ri caquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chrij ri u lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x.
Psalms147:12 Jerusalen
Psalms147:13 Xebucowirisaj c'u ri e u laweyil tak ri awoquibal
Psalms147:14 Ri are' cuc'am ulok ri jamaril chupam ri awulew
Psalms147:15 Ri are' cutak ulok ri u tzij cho ri uwächulew
Psalms147:16 Cuq'uiyisaj ri tew jacha' ta ne rismal chij
Psalms147:17 Ri cutak ulok ri sakbach ri u tewerisam; ruc' ri tew ri cutak ulok
Psalms147:18 Cutak c'u ulok ri u tzij cujarisaj c'ut; cubano chi cajich'ich' ri quiakik' cäbin c'u ri ja'.
Psalms147:19 Ri are' xuya' retamaxic che ri Jacob
Psalms147:20 Man junam ta xuban cuc' jule' nimak tak tinimit chic ri mawi jubik' xquetamaj ri e u colomibal. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!

Psalms148:3 ¡Chik'ijilaj ix
Psalms148:4 ¡Chak'ijilaj at aj chicajalaj caj
Psalms148:5 Chiya' u k'ij ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel
Psalms148:6 ronojel xujekeba' ri are' rech cäcanaj amak'el
Psalms148:7 ¡Chk'ijilax ri Ajawaxel kas cho ri ulew
Psalms148:8 ¡Ri cakulja
Psalms148:9 ¡Ri e juyub xukuje' ri e u tza'm tak juyub! ¡Conojel ri chacalte' xukuje' tak ri che' ri quequiya' tak qui wäch!
Psalms148:10 ¡Ri awaj e aj uwo tak ja xukuje' ri e juyubal tak awaj! ¡Ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' xukuje' ri caquijuruj tak quib!
Psalms148:11 ¡Ri ajawinelab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xukuje' conojel tak ri tinimit! ¡Conojel ri c'amal tak be xukuje' ri k'atal tak tzij ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew!

Psalms148:13 ¡Iwonojel chiya' u k'ij ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel
Psalms148:14 Ri are' u yo'm cuinem pa u k'ab ri u tinimit. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij cumal conojel ri jic quebin chuwäch
Psalms149:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! Chibixoj jun c'ac' bix che ri Ajawaxel; Chyo'k u k'ij cumal ri jic quebin chuwäch.
Psalms149:2 Chequicot ri aj israelib
Psalms149:3 Chibixoj ri u bi' cuc' xojowem
Psalms149:4 Cäquicot c'ut ri Ajawaxel pa ri u tinimit; cuya' c'u chque ri e mach'amoj ri ch'äcanic che u nimarisaxic qui k'ij.
Psalms149:5 Chequicot ri e jic rumal ri ch'äcanic
Psalms149:6 Chc'ol u k'ijilaxic ri Dios chquichi'
Psalms149:7 Che u ya'ic rajil q'uexel chque ri quequik'ijilaj tak diosib
Psalms149:8 che qui yutic tak ri ajawinelab xukuje' winak ri c'o qui cuinem
Psalms149:9 rech cätz'akat ri c'äjisabal qui wäch ri bim ulok. ¡Jun c'u nimarisabal qui k'ij wa' ri e jic! ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!
Psalms150:1 ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Chiya' u k'ij ri Dios chupam ri cak'ijilax wi'! ¡Chiya' u k'ij chupam ri je'lic wocowicalaj räxalaj caj!
Psalms150:2 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cumal ri e cuinelalaj tak u banoj! ¡Chiya' u k'ij rumal ri u nimalil ri man c'o ta u q'uisic!
Psalms150:3 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' rok'ibal trompet! ¡Chiya' u k'ij ruc' arp xukuje' ruc' cok'ibal tak arp!
Psalms150:4 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' tak xojowem cuc' tak tzojtzoj! ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' su' xukuje' k'ojom ri c'o qui c'amal!
Psalms150:5 ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' ri quetzinowic! ¡Chiya' u k'ij cuc' quetecak tak k'an ch'ich' ri quek'uyuyic!
Psalms150:6 Ronojel ri cuxlabic chuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel. ¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri Ajawaxel!
Proverbs1:1 U tzij tak ri Salomon
Proverbs1:2 ri qui patan wa': are ri qui k'axexic no'j xukuje' tijonic
Proverbs1:3 che u rikic etamanic
Proverbs1:4 che u ya'ic qui nawinic ri c'ojolab ri man c'o ta queta'm
Proverbs1:5 Ri c'o u no'j xukuje' u c'oxomanic quebutatabej
Proverbs1:6 che qui ch'obic ri cäquibij ri ajno'jab
Proverbs1:7 Ri no'j cachaptajic rumal u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ri man c'o ta qui no'j cäquetzelaj u wäch ri no'j xukuje' ri tijonic.
Proverbs1:8 Nu c'ojol
Proverbs1:9 e je'licalaj tak wikbal awib wa': jacha' jun a chachal o jun a corona.
Proverbs1:10 We ri ajmaquib cäcaj catquisubu
Proverbs1:11 Craj ne
Proverbs1:12 E c'asal ri winak ri e tz'akat pa ronojel quekabik'o
Proverbs1:13 Quec'oji' na ronojel qui wäch k'inomal kuc'
Proverbs1:14 Tasaj chatk'ax kuc' chabana' awe ri cäkabano
Proverbs1:15 ¡Matbe cuc' we winak ri'
Proverbs1:16 aninak c'u e c'o che u banic ri lawaloyil; ¡aninak e c'o che u tixic quic'!
Proverbs1:17 Pune' c'u man c'o ta c'u ne cupatanij jun c'amibal cätanixic we quecuin ri chicop ri e c'o qui xic' che rilic
Proverbs1:18 we winak ri' e are' quekajben ri c'amibal ri xquitanij
Proverbs1:19 Are wa' ri cäquitaklebej na ri sibalaj quequiäk rayinic: ri quiäk rayinic ri c'o cuc' are' quecämisanic.
Proverbs1:20 Ri no'j cubano chi cätataj ri u ch'abal xo'l tak ri ja; xukuje' pa tak ri be.
Proverbs1:21 Quebuya' qui bixic tak ri u tzij chi' tak ri cachoch ri winak
Proverbs1:22 “C'ojolab ri man c'o ta iwetamanic
Proverbs1:23 Chebitatabej ri e nu pixbenic quixinnojisaj c'u na ruc' no'jinic; quebenya' c'u na quetamaxic tak ri e nu chomanic chiwe.
Proverbs1:24 Ix nu siq'uim
Proverbs1:25 Xane' e i xutum tak ri e nu yo'w no'j; man ch'awinak ta i c'u'x che u c'amic ri nu pixbenic.
Proverbs1:26 ¡Quintze'j c'u na i wäch aretak ix c'o chi chupam ri quiäkasakil! ¡Quinwetz'bej c'u na i wäch aretak ix cäminak chic che xe'n ib
Proverbs1:27 aretak quepe tak ri xe'n ib xukuje' tak ri c'ax piwi'
Proverbs1:28 Pa ri k'ij ri' caquitz'onoj na tok'ob
Proverbs1:29 quiwetzelaj c'u u wäch ri no'j
Proverbs1:30 Man quebirayij taj qui c'amic ri e nu yo'w tak no'j; quiwetzelaj qui wäch ri e nu pixbenic.
Proverbs1:31 ¡Quixukajbej c'u na ri e ratz'amil ri e i c'aslemal! ¡Cäq'uistaj na i c'u'x chque ri itzel tak i chomanic!
Proverbs1:32 Ri man c'o ta quetamabal
Proverbs1:33 are' c'ut ri cutatabej ri quinbij che
Proverbs2:1 Nu c'ojol
Proverbs2:2 Chaya' a xiquin che u tatabexic ri no'j; chajacha' ri a chomabal che ri etamanic.
Proverbs2:3 Chatz'onoj ri etamanic cuc' conojel ri e a chuk'ab xukuje' ri utzalaj chomanic;
Proverbs2:4 kas chajacha' awib che qui tzucuxic
Proverbs2:5 C'äte ri' cawetamaj c'u na ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ¡cach'ob na ri retamaxic u wäch ri Dios!
Proverbs2:6 Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel cäyo'w ri no'j; ri ch'obonic ri etamanic chuchi' quebel wi ulok.
Proverbs2:7 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' ri u to'banic xukuje' querilij ri cuc'am jun suc'alaj c'aslemal
Proverbs2:8 Quebuchajij ri quebin pa suq'uilal
Proverbs2:9 Xukuje' cawetamaj na jachique ri colom
Proverbs2:10 ri a chomanic curik na no'j cana' c'u na ri u qui'al ri etamanic.
Proverbs2:11 Ri utzalaj chomanic xukuje' ri etamanic e are' wa' ri e chajil awech amak'el;
Proverbs2:12 ri e are' catquik'ilo rech man catbe ta chquipam ri lawalolaj tak qui be ri itzel tak achijab
Proverbs2:13 ri quiyo'm can ri utzalaj be quebe c'u pa k'ekumalaj tak be ri latz'.
Proverbs2:14 Quequiquicot che u banic ri etzelal
Proverbs2:15 Quebin c'u pa jech'alaj tak be quijaluch'um c'u quib chrij ri suc'alaj be.
Proverbs2:16 Catresaj c'u na xukuje' pa u k'ab ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe ri jalan catzijonic ri que ch'äcanic
Proverbs2:17 ri cutzak can ri rachajil re ri ralc'alal xsach c'u pa u jolom ri xuchi'j chuwäch ri Dios chi cuban na.
Proverbs2:18 Ri u takexic ri be ri cäbe cho rachoch we ixok ri'
Proverbs2:19 ri queboc pa ri rachoch man quetzelej ta chic
Proverbs2:20 Chatbin ba' pa ri utzalaj be
Proverbs2:21 E are' c'ut ri e colom ri qui c'aslemal ri man c'o ta qui bach'uyal quejeki' na amak'el cho ri ulew;
Proverbs2:22 e are' c'u ri e itzel tak winak ri man e jic taj quebok na bic
Proverbs3:1 Mebasach ri e nu tijonic
Proverbs3:2 naj c'u catc'asi' na nojinak che utzil.
Proverbs3:3 Mawi jubik' matzak can ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj
Proverbs3:4 cärik c'u na ri tok'ob xukuje' ri nimarisabal a k'ij rumal ri Dios xukuje' cumal ri winak.
Proverbs3:5 Ruc' ronojel awanima' chacu'ba' a c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel man chrij ta c'ut ri awetamanic pa awech wi.
Proverbs3:6 Chaya' u k'ij ri u c'olem ri Ajawaxel pa ronojel ri cabano
Proverbs3:7 Maban awib chi sibalaj ta c'o a no'j; chaya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel chatasa' awib mat be chupam ri lawalolaj be:
Proverbs3:8 ¡are' c'u utzalaj cunabal wa' che u ya'ic u chuk'ab ri a cuerp!
Proverbs3:9 Chebacojo' ri a k'inomal che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri nabe tak qui wächinic ri awulew;
Proverbs3:10 we je caban wa' quepulin na c'ä quepak'apop na ri e a c'uja xukuje' ri quebac'ol wi ri e u wa'l a uva.
Proverbs3:11 Nu c'ojol
Proverbs3:12 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel cupixbej jachin ri culok'ok'ej
Proverbs3:13 Sibalaj utz re ri winak ri curik ri no'j
Proverbs3:14 are c'u c'o na quechbex chque chuwäch ri sak puak
Proverbs3:15 Ri no'j c'o na rajil chquiwäch tak ri perl; ¡mawi ne ri jastak ri sibalaj querayixic cajunamataj ta ruc'!
Proverbs3:16 Ruc' ri iquiak'ab cuchi'j ri nimalaj c'aslemal ri cäbeytajic
Proverbs3:17 Ri qui takexic ri e u xo'l tak rakan sibalaj man e c'o ta c'o wi; ri binem pa alaj tak u be c'olem wa' pa jamaril.
Proverbs3:18 Ri no'j c'aslemal wa' che ri cärikowic; ¡sibalaj utz quech ri queta'm u canajisaxic cuc'!
Proverbs3:19 Ruc' no'j xukuje' etamanic
Proverbs3:20 ruc' no'j xubano chi xuban quieb ri plo xukuje' chque tak ri sutz' quetz'utuw wi ulok ri räxk'ab.
Proverbs3:21 Chäc'olo' amak'el ri utzalaj chomanic
Proverbs3:22 quebux na u q'uiyibal c'aslemal chawe catquiwik c'u na jacha' jun chachal.
Proverbs3:23 Cuya' catbin ruc' jiquibam c'uxaj pa ri be mawi c'u jumul cachak'ij ta na awib.
Proverbs3:24 Aretak catuxlanic man c'o ta jas caxe'j ta wi awib; aretak catk'oyic catwar na pa utzil.
Proverbs3:25 Maxe'j awib chque ri jastak ri xak c'ätetal quec'ulmatajic
Proverbs3:26 rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' na jiquibam c'uxaj chawe
Proverbs3:27 Mawi jumul mak'il awib che u banic jun tok'ob che jachin ri c'o cutz'onoj chawe
Proverbs3:28 Maya' can che re chwek ri to'banic ri catcuin che u banic camic.
Proverbs3:29 Machomaj u banic c'ax che ri winak ri u jiquibam u c'u'x chawij.
Proverbs3:30 C'o matzucuj wi u banic ch'o'j
Proverbs3:31 Matititej ri abaj ranima' mawi matijtobej u banic awe ri cubano;
Proverbs3:32 ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj c'u qui wäch ri e banal tak etzelal
Proverbs3:33 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'okoj ri rachoch ri itzel winak
Proverbs3:34 Ri Ajawaxel cutze'j qui wäch ri quetze'n wächaj cuban c'u utzil chque ri e mach'amoj.
Proverbs3:35 Ri nimarisabal k'ij are ri caquich'äc ri ajno'jab
Proverbs4:1 Walc'ual
Proverbs4:2 Nu yo'm jun utzalaj tijonic chiwe
Proverbs4:3 In xukuje' in uxinak alc'ualaxel: sibalaj nim ri nu lok'al chuwäch ri nu nan
Proverbs4:4 ri nu tat je nu pixbexic wa' xubano: “Chebatz'ibaj pa ri a chomabal ri e nu tzij; chanimaj ri takanic ri quinya' chawe
Proverbs4:5 Charika' ri no'j xukuje' utzalaj chomanic; mebasach ri nu tzij.
Proverbs4:6 Lok' chawila' wi ri no'j maya' apan jela' cuya' c'u na ri u to'banic chawe.
Proverbs4:7 Chuwäch apachique jun jasach chic charika' ri no'j xukuje' utzalaj chomanic.
Proverbs4:8 Chalok'ok'ej cunimarisaj c'u na a k'ij: chalak'apuj
Proverbs4:9 ¡cusipaj na jun je'lalaj wikbal a jolom are' c'u a corona wa' cucoj chajolom!”
Proverbs4:10 Chebatatabej tak ri e nu tzij
Proverbs4:11 Ri in catinc'am na bic pa ri be re ri no'j: quinban na chawe chi catbin pa ri utzalaj be
Proverbs4:12 chupam ri utzalaj be man e c'o ta k'atibal cärik na
Proverbs4:13 Co chachapa' awib che ri tijonic matzokopij c'ut; chabana' jas ri cubij
Proverbs4:14 Matbe pa ri qui be ri e banal tak etzelal. Matakej u banic awe ri itzel qui c'aslemal.
Proverbs4:15 Chak'ila' awib che ri awoc'owic pa ri qui be; chatasa' awib chquij
Proverbs4:16 man c'u quec'oji' ta pa jamaril we man caquiban ri lawaloyil; caquitzak ri qui waram we man caquibano chi c'o jachin cäkaj pa qui k'ab.
Proverbs4:17 ¡Ri qui wa xukuje' ri cuq'uia' are ri u banic ri etzelal xukuje' ri tokinic!
Proverbs4:18 Ri qui be ri suc'alaj tak winak junam ruc' ri u sakaribal jun c'ac' k'ij: ri cäbe u q'uiyic c'ä cäjuluw na pa ronojel ri u juluwem.
Proverbs4:19 Are' c'u ri qui be ri banal tak etzelal xa k'ekumalil; ¡Mawi ne queta'm jas ruc' cäquipak'ij wi quib!
Proverbs4:20 Chatoc il chque ri nu tzij
Proverbs4:21 Mawi jubik' mebel chawäch
Proverbs4:22 E are' queyo'w c'aslemal xukuje' rutzil wächaj che ronojel ri cärikowic.
Proverbs4:23 Chachajij ri a chomabal chuwäch apachique jasach ri c'o cho ri uwächulew
Proverbs4:24 Chak'ila' awib che qui bixic jastak ri xa quesubunic; chanajtajisaj awib che u banic banoj tzij.
Proverbs4:25 Amak'el chawäch chatca'y wi apanok
Proverbs4:26 Kas chawila' na jawije' quebe a ya' wi ri awakan
Proverbs4:27 Majuluch'ij ri a be; chak'ila' awib che qui ya'ic ri itzel tak u xo'l awakan.
Proverbs5:1 Chatoc il che ri nu no'j
Proverbs5:2 Jeri' cawetamaj na catch'obonic
Proverbs5:3 Ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe sibalaj qui' ri cätzijonic
Proverbs5:4 c'o c'u na ri u c'ayil ri u q'uisbalil chuwäch ri sibalaj c'a na
Proverbs5:5 Ri binem ruc' we ixok ri' cac'aman bic pa ri cämical; ri u xo'l tak rakan cäc'aman bic pa ri mukbal.
Proverbs5:6 Che we ixok ri' man c'o ta cupatanij ri be re c'aslemal
Proverbs5:7 Rumal ri' nu c'ojol chatoc il che ri quinbij chawe
Proverbs5:8 Chanajtajisaj awib che ri ixok ri man c'o ta cux chawe mawi ne matkeb chuchi' ri rachoch
Proverbs5:9 rech man caya' ta ri a k'inomal chque chic jule'
Proverbs5:10 rech man quenoj taj ri winak ri man aweta'm ta qui wäch ruc' ri u wächinic ri a chuk'ab xukuje' ri a chac.
Proverbs5:11 We c'u man canimaj ri quinbij chawe
Proverbs5:12 Cabij c'u na: “¡Jas ri xinc'ulmaj chi xinwetzelaj u wäch ri pixbenic! ¡Jas ri xinc'ulmaj chi man nim ta xebenwil wi ri k'iloj tak ib!
Proverbs5:13 Man xinwaj taj xebentatabej ri wajtijab
Proverbs5:14 xa c'u jubik' xraj man xinkaj pa ri quiäkasakil chquiwäch conojel ri winak.”
Proverbs5:15 Chawesaj ri a chaki'j chi' ruc' ri ja' ri cäq'uiy chupam ri a c'ua'.
Proverbs5:16 Matix ri ja' ri c'o chupam ri q'uiyibal a ja'; xak matixo
Proverbs5:17 C'ua' xukuje' ja' e awech
Proverbs5:18 ¡Tewichital ri caq'uiy wi ri a ja'! ¡chatquicot ruc' ri a c'ulaj pa ri awac'alal
Proverbs5:19 bitibic
Proverbs5:20 ¿Jasche caputzcuyij awib ruc' ri ixok ri man awech taj?

Proverbs5:23 Cäbe na pa ri cämical rumal rech chi man cuc'am ta ri pixbenic; rumal chi man c'o ta u no'j cac'am na bic pa ri sachbal wächaj.

Proverbs7:1 Nu c'ojol
Proverbs7:2 Chebanimaj ri e nu takomal xukuje' tak ri e nu tijonic; chebachajij jacha' ri qui chajixic ri qui c'u'x ri a bak'wäch
Proverbs7:3 Chebaxima' chque ri u wi' tak a k'ab
Proverbs7:4 Chabana' awana'b che ri no'j chawachilaj awib ruc' ri c'oxomanic.
Proverbs7:5 E are' c'u catesan na pa u k'ab ri ixok ri cäkaj pa mac ruc' achi
Proverbs7:6 C'o jun k'ij cätajin quinca'y apan xo'l tak ri u julujakil ri nu wenta'n
Proverbs7:7 jujun c'ojolab ri man c'o ta quesan wi qui no'j

Proverbs7:17 nu c'oc'arisam ruc' ruxlab mir

Proverbs7:19 ri wachajil man c'o ta cho ja; benak che jun najalaj binem;

Proverbs10:1 Ri e u tzij tak ri Salomon: Ri c'ojolaxel ri c'o u no'j quebuquicotisaj ri u tat u nan; ri c'ojolaxel man c'o ta u no'j cuban chque chi caquirik c'ax.
Proverbs10:2 Ri k'inomal tak ri xa quet'orixic man c'o ta quechbex na chque
Proverbs10:3 Ri Ajawaxel man cuya' ta can ri utzalaj winak pa numic
Proverbs10:4 Jubik' chac
Proverbs10:5 U yaquic u wäch ri ulew pa sak'ij quech ajno'jab; ri u banic waram aretak cäyac u wäch ri ulew quech wa' ri man c'o ta qui q'uixbal.
Proverbs10:6 Puwi' ri utzalaj winak quejäbin tewichibal
Proverbs10:7 Ri utzalaj winak cänatax cuc' tak tewichibal; ri banal etzelal chanim cäsach u nataxic.
Proverbs10:8 Ri c'o u no'j quebuc'amowaj takanic; ri quebubij chi man c'o ta no'j cäsach u wäch pa etzeletajic.
Proverbs10:9 Ri man c'o ta jubik' subunic cubano
Proverbs10:10 Ri cäyup wächinic quebuc'am ulok nimak tak etzelal ri xuwi quebubij chi man c'o ta no'j cäsach u wäch pa etzeletajic.
Proverbs10:11 Ri e u tzij ri suc' e u q'uiyibal c'aslemal
Proverbs10:12 Ri etzelen wächaj quebuyac ch'o'j
Proverbs10:13 Chque ri u chi' ri ajno'j e c'o no'jinic; che ri man c'o ta u no'j jun k'ebut cho rachak.
Proverbs10:14 Ri c'o qui no'j man cäquesaj ta u tzijol ri quetamanic
Proverbs10:15 Ri to'bal rib ri k'inom are' ri u k'inomal; ri u quiäkasakil ri meba' are' ri u tzubukil.
Proverbs10:16 Ri tojbal re ri suc' are' ri c'aslemal; ri wächinic ri cuyac ri banal etzelal are' ri macaj.
Proverbs10:17 Ri cuya' u xiquin che u tatabexic ri pixbenic benak pa ri be re c'aslemal; ri man coc ta il che
Proverbs10:18 Quech ri banal tak tzij ri man u k'alajisaxic taj ri oyowaric
Proverbs10:19 Ri sibalaj cäk'ijij che tzij q'ui sachinakil quebubano; ri u jiq'uixtajic ri ak'aj quech ajno'jab.
Proverbs10:20 Coc'alaj sak puak are' ri rak' ri suc'; ri u chomabal ri lawalo man c'o ta u patan.
Proverbs10:21 Ri e u chi' ri suc' quebutijoj q'uialaj winak
Proverbs10:22 Ri u tewichibal ri Ajawaxel k'inomal wa' man c'o ta c'u k'oxomal quebuc'am ulok pa re wi.
Proverbs10:23 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cäquicot che quesaxic q'uixbal; ri ajno'j cäquicot ruc' ri no'j.
Proverbs10:24 Ri sibalaj cuxe'j wi rib ri banal etzelal are' wa' cuc'ulmaj na
Proverbs10:25 Coc'ow ri quiakik' jäb cäsach c'u u wäch ri banal etzelal
Proverbs10:26 Ri sak'or
Proverbs10:27 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cuyukupej ri c'aslemal
Proverbs10:28 Chque ri suc'
Proverbs10:29 Ri Ajawaxel quebuch'uk ri cäquiban utzil
Proverbs10:30 Ri suc' mawi jubik' cätzakmajic
Proverbs10:31 Che u chi' ri suc' quel wi ulok no'j
Proverbs10:32 Ri suc' quebubij utzalaj tak jastak; ri banal etzelal xuwi e itzel tak jastak.
Proverbs11:1 Ri Ajawaxel quebuc'ulelaj ri pajbal ri man e tz'akat taj
Proverbs11:2 Ri nimarisan ib cuc'am ulok esbal q'uixbal; ri no'j cäc'oji' cuc' ri e mach'amoj.
Proverbs11:3 Ri e colomalaj tak winak cäc'am qui be rumal ri qui colomal; ri winak ri xak e u cawäch cäsach na qui wäch rumal ri qui cawächil.
Proverbs11:4 Man c'o ta cäquipatanij na ri k'inomal pa ri k'ij re ri k'atan tzij
Proverbs11:5 Ri suq'uilal cucolomaj ri u be ri suc'
Proverbs11:6 Ri suq'uilal quebutor ri winak ri e colom
Proverbs11:7 Aretak cäcäm ri banal etzelal
Proverbs11:8 Ri Dios cäresaj ri suc' pa ri rikoj c'ax
Proverbs11:9 Ri e u tzij ri banal etzelal cusachisaj qui wäch ri rajil u tz'akat
Proverbs11:10 Aretak ri e suc' quebel puwi' ri cäquibano ri tinimit cäjajatic; aretak quecäm ri banal tak etzelal
Proverbs11:11 Rumal ri tewichi'nic ri suc' cayactaj jun nimalaj tinimit; rumal c'ut ri cak' ri e banal tak etzelal cayojitajic.
Proverbs11:12 Ri man utz ta u chomabal cubij lawaloyil chrij ri rachil; ri utz u chomabal man c'o ta jas cubij.
Proverbs11:13 Ri biltzijtal ronojel cutzijoj
Proverbs11:14 We man c'o utzalaj k'atan tzij cätzak na ri tinimit; ri u to'tajic cäriktaj cumal ri e q'ui ya'l tak no'j.
Proverbs11:15 Man utz ta quelic aretak cäch'aw jun puwi' jun winak ri man reta'm ta u wäch; ri man cäch'aw ta puwi' jun chic man c'o ta latz' curiko.
Proverbs11:16 Ri ixok ri sibalaj je'l ri u c'aslemal cäya' u k'ij
Proverbs11:17 Ri quel u c'u'x che jun chic cuban utzil chbil rib
Proverbs11:18 Ri banal etzelal cuc'am jun tojbal ri xa subunel; ri cuban suq'uil amak'el
Proverbs11:19 Ri benam chrij ri suq'uilal cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal
Proverbs11:20 Ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj qui wäch ri winak ri itzel quechomanic
Proverbs11:21 Ri banal etzelal cukajbej wi ri c'äjisabal u wäch
Proverbs11:22 Mulk'ab re k'an puak chutza'm ak ri je'lalaj ixok ri man utz ta cächomanic.
Proverbs11:23 Ri qui rayinic ri suc' amak'el utz quelic; ri caquirayij ri e banal tak etzelal are' ri c'ananem.

Proverbs11:29 Ri man cärilij taj ri rachoch
Proverbs11:30 Ri suq'uilal cuya' c'aslemal
Proverbs11:31 We ri suc' cuc'am ri tojbal rech waral cho ri uwächulew
Proverbs12:1 U lok'ok'exic ri c'äjisabal wächaj are u lok'ok'exic ri etamanic; ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri pixbenic xa man c'o ta retamanic.
Proverbs12:2 Ri utzalaj winak
Proverbs12:3 Ri etzelal man cowilaj tac'alibal taj che jachin jun; ri e suc' jekel ri qui rab.
Proverbs12:4 Ri ixok ri caruc'aj utzalaj c'aslemal cuban ajawinel che ri rachajil
Proverbs12:5 Ri winak ri e suc' cäquichomaj ri suq'uilal; ri e banal tak etzelal xuwi ri subunic.
Proverbs12:6 Ri e u tzij ri banal etzelal e jun c'amibal re cämical; ri e u tzij ri suc'
Proverbs12:7 Ri e banal tak etzelal quetzakic are c'u q'uisbal u sachic qui wäch wa'
Proverbs12:8 Ri winak cäya' u k'ij jas ri u cholajil ri u c'oxomanic
Proverbs12:9 Are utz na rech ri man cäya' ta u k'ij capatanixic c'ut
Proverbs12:10 Ri suc' reta'm querilij ri rawaj
Proverbs12:11 Ri cuchacuj ri rulew tz'ebem ri cutijo; ri con quebuban jastak ri man c'o ta quechbex chque.
Proverbs12:12 Ri e itzel tak rayinic are ri qui c'at ri e banal tak etzelal; ri qui rab ri suc' jekel amak'el.
Proverbs12:13 Ri banal etzelal cuputzcuyij rib pa tak ri kas e u banoj tzij
Proverbs12:14 Chquijujunal caquiyac na ri u wächinic ri caquibij xukuje' cuc'am ri tojbal rech ri cubano.
Proverbs12:15 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cuchomaj chi utz ronojel ri cubano
Proverbs12:16 Ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc'utuxtaj ri royowal; ri utz cächomanic man coc ta il aretak cäyok'ic.
Proverbs12:17 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel cuk'alajisaj ri kastzij; ri u cawäch k'alajisanel quebujiquiba' banoj tak tzij.
Proverbs12:18 E c'o jachin tak quesocon cumal ri qui tzij
Proverbs12:19 Ri kastzij ri cach'awic cäjeki' na amak'el
Proverbs12:20 Chupam ri qui chomanic ri banal tak etzelel c'o banoj tzij; pa tak ri u yo'w no'j ri winak aj jamaril c'o quicotemal.
Proverbs12:21 Ri suc'alaj winak mawi jubik' cucoch' na jun lawaloyil
Proverbs12:22 Ri Ajawaxel cäretzelaj qui wäch ri banal tak tzij
Proverbs12:23 Ri c'o u c'oxomanic man cäresaj ta u tzijol ri retamanic
Proverbs12:24 Ri cächacunic
Proverbs12:25 Ri elen ch'u'j cuc'äxc'obisaj ri winak; ri tzij re lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj cuquicotisaj.
Proverbs12:26 Ri suc' cux c'amal u be ri rajil u tz'akat
Proverbs12:27 Ri sak'oralaj tzucunel man c'o ta jun awaj curiko; are' c'u ri cäsac'satic queburik na nimak tak k'inomal.
Proverbs12:28 Ri be re ri suq'uilal cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal; ri re ri conil cäc'aman bic pa ri cämical.
Proverbs13:1 Ri c'ojolaxel ri ajno'j cuc'amowaj ri u pixbenic ri u tat; ri banal nimal man cuya' ta u xiquin che ri k'ilonic.
Proverbs13:2 Chquijujunal caquiyac na ri u wächinic ri caquibij
Proverbs13:3 Ri qui chajixic tak ri tzij are wa' ri u chajixic kib chi kib; ri sibalaj cätzijtzotic xa u tuquiel cäretzelaj rib.
Proverbs13:4 Ri sak'or cärayinic man cärikon ta c'ut; ri cächacunic
Proverbs13:5 Ri suc'alaj winak itzel caril ri banoj tzij; ri banal etzelal ya'l q'uixbal xukuje' yok'obal.
Proverbs13:6 Ri colomal cuto' ri winak ri man c'o ta u bach'uyal; ri jech'balil cusachisaj u wäch ri ajmac.
Proverbs13:7 E c'o jachin tak ri man c'o ta cäc'am chque cäquiban c'u quib chi e k'inomab
Proverbs13:8 Ri cäto'tajisan ri u c'aslemal ri k'inom are' ri u k'inomal; ri meba' mawi jumul quebuta' xibin tak ib.
Proverbs13:9 Ri e suc' xak e junam ruc' ri chäj ri cänicowic; ri e banal tak etzelal
Proverbs13:10 Ri banoj nimal xuwi cuc'am ulok ch'o'j; ri no'j c'o cuc' ri caquimach' quib.
Proverbs13:11 Ri k'inomal ri xak c'ätetal xq'uiyic cäbe pa rij; are c'u ri xak nojimal camulixic
Proverbs13:12 Eyebal c'uxaj man je ta quelic
Proverbs13:13 Ri man nim ta cäril wi jun takanic
Proverbs13:14 Ri u tijonic ri ajno'j bulbux wa' re c'aslemal
Proverbs13:15 Ri utzalaj no'jinic cuch'äc ri u ya'ic u k'ij
Proverbs13:16 Ri utz cachomanic ronojel cuban ruc' c'oxomanic
Proverbs13:17 Ri itzel tako'n quebuc'am ulok u q'ueyowal
Proverbs13:18 Mebayil
Proverbs13:19 Ri rayibal ri cätz'akatic cuya' quicotemal. Ri man c'o ta qui no'j man caquik'i' taj we caquinajtajisaj quib che ri lawaloyil.
Proverbs13:20 Chawuc'aj awib cuc' ri ajno'jab cärik c'u na a no'j chawuc'aj awib cuc' ri man c'o ta qui no'j caquisachisaj c'u na a wäch.
Proverbs13:21 Ri ajmaquib man quetzokopix ta rumal ri lawaloyil; ri e suc'
Proverbs13:22 Ri utzalaj winak cuya' can quechbal ri e ri' tak u mam; ri ajmac quebumulij utzalaj tak jastak ri cux na rech ri suc'.
Proverbs13:23 Pa ri rulew ri meba' tz'ebem ri cätijic
Proverbs13:24 Ri man cujic' taj ri u c'ojol xa man u lok' taj; jachin c'ut ri lok'caril ri u c'ojol cujic'o.

Proverbs14:1 Ri ixok ri c'o u no'j cuyac ri rachoch; ri ixok ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc' tak ri u k'ab cuyojij.
Proverbs14:2 Ri colom ri u c'aslemal cuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; ri jech' ri u c'aslemal cäretzelaj u wäch.
Proverbs14:3 Chuchi' ri man c'o ta u no'j quel wi ulok ri nimal; chuchi' ri ajno'j quel wi ulok ri to'bal rib.
Proverbs14:4 Aretak man e c'o ta wacax
Proverbs14:5 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel man cuban ta tzij; ri u cawäch k'alajisanel quebubij banoj tzij.
Proverbs14:6 Ri yacal ch'o'j cutzucuj no'j man curik ta c'ut; che ri c'oxomanel
Proverbs14:7 Chanajtajisaj awib che ri man c'o ta u no'j
Proverbs14:8 Ri no'j cuban che ri ajno'j chi cuch'ob ri cubano
Proverbs14:9 Ri man c'o ta qui no'j caquitze'j u wäch ri qui chak'maquil
Proverbs14:10 Ri anima'aj quebuch'ob ri kas e u c'ayilal
Proverbs14:11 Ri cachoch ri e banal tak etzelal cäyojix na; ri cachoch ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel queq'uiyiric:
Proverbs14:12 E c'o be ri je ta ne e suc'
Proverbs14:13 Cak'oxow ne ri anima'aj rumal ri tze'
Proverbs14:14 Ri man c'o ta u no'j u cuban u c'u'x chrij ri u c'aslemal ri utzalaj winak cucu'ba' u c'u'x chquij tak ri e u banoj.
Proverbs14:15 Ri con cucoj ronojel ri cäbix che; ri utz cächomanic cäril na jawije' ri cäbin wi.
Proverbs14:16 Ri ajno'j cuna' rib chuwäch ri etzelal quel c'u chuwäch
Proverbs14:17 Ri chanim coyowaric man cuchomaj taj ri cubano; are c'u ri cujic' rib cac'oji' pa jamaril.
Proverbs14:18 Ri e con quebechbex cumal ri man c'o ta qui no'j; ri utz quenojinic quenoj che etamanic.
Proverbs14:19 Ri e banal tak etzelal caquipachba' na quib chquiwäch ri utzalaj tak winak; ri e lawalo cäquita' na tok'ob chi tak cachoch ri e suc'.

Proverbs14:22 Ri cäquitzucuj u banic ri lawaloyil

Proverbs14:24 Ri u corona ri ajno'j are' ri u c'oxomanic; ri quech ri man c'o ta qui no'j are' chi man c'o ta qui no'j.
Proverbs14:25 Ri suc'alaj k'alajisanel cuto'tajisaj ri qui c'aslemal jule' chic; ri u cawächil k'alajisanel are' ajchak'mac che ri cämical.
Proverbs14:26 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cuya' jun jicalaj eyebal c'uxaj chque ri alc'ualaxelab rech man c'o ta caquic'ulmaj.
Proverbs14:27 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel are' u q'uiyibal ri c'aslemal
Proverbs14:28 Takanic paquiwi' tinimit winak jun nimarisabal k'ij wa' che ri ajawinel; takanic paquiwi' quieb oxib tzakmajic che.
Proverbs14:29 Ri uxic coch'onel cuc'ut ri c'oxomanic; uxic man coch'onel taj are' wa ri cac'utu ri nimalaj conil.
Proverbs14:30 Ri chomabal ri man quel ta ch'u'j c'aslemal wa' che ri cuerp
