Proverbs14:33 Ri no'j cäc'oji' pa tak chomabal ri utz quechomanic
Proverbs14:34 Ri suq'uilal are nimarisabal u k'ij jun nim tinimit; ri macaj are ri u q'uixbal.
Proverbs14:35 Ri pataninel ri nawinel cuch'äc ri rutzil ranima' ri ajawinel
Proverbs15:1 Ri ch'uch'ujalaj tzelebal u wäch ri tzij cukasaj u wäch ri oyowal; ri c'axalaj tzelebal u wäch ri tzij xa cunimatajisaj ri oyowal.
Proverbs15:2 Che ri cak' ri ajno'jab cäpe wi ri no'j; che ri qui chi' ri man c'o ta qui no'j
Proverbs15:3 Ri Ajawaxel c'o pa ronojel c'olbal
Proverbs15:4 Ri ak'aj ri cälok'inic juwi' che' wa' re c'aslemal; ri itzelalaj ak'aj cuban c'ax che ri uxlabal.
Proverbs15:5 Ri man c'o ta u no'j man nim ta caril wi ri u pixbenic ri u tat; ri coc il che
Proverbs15:6 Nim c'o pa ri rachoch ri achi ri tz'akat pa ronojel
Proverbs15:7 Ri ajno'jab caquijabuj no'j cuc' ri qui chi'; ri man c'o ta qui no'j
Proverbs15:8 Ri Ajawaxel man quebucoch'taj ri qui sipanic ri e banal tak etzelal
Proverbs15:9 Ri Ajawaxel man cucoch'taj ri qui c'aslemal ri e banal tak etzelal

Proverbs15:17 Utz na u tijic ichaj ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj
Proverbs15:18 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cuyac ch'o'j; ri c'o u coch'onic quejamarisanic.
Proverbs15:19 Che ri sak'or
Proverbs15:20 Ri c'ojolaxel ri ajno'j quebuquicotisaj ri u nan u tat; ri c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j man nim ta queril wi u nan u tat.
Proverbs15:21 Ri con cäquicotic chi man c'o ta u no'j; ri c'o retamanic quebujic' ri e u xo'l tak rakan.

Proverbs16:1 Ri e chomanic e rech ri winak; ri q'uisbal u tza'm tzij ruc' ri Ajawaxel c'o wi.
Proverbs16:2 Che ri winak utz cäril ronojel ri cubano
Proverbs16:3 Chebajacha' tak ri a chac pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel
Proverbs16:4 Ri Ajawaxel u winakirisam ronojel che jun patanijic; xukuje' ne ri itzel winak che ri k'ij re ri c'äjisabal wächaj.
Proverbs16:5 Ri Ajawaxel man quebucoch' taj ri cäquiban nimal; matam o chanim cäquirik na ri c'äjisabal qui wäch.
Proverbs16:6 Ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj
Proverbs16:7 Aretak ri Ajawaxel cäkaj ri u c'aslemal jun winak chuwäch
Proverbs16:8 Nim na u k'ij ri jubik' ri ch'äcom ruc' ch'ajch'ojil
Proverbs16:9 Che ri winak caya' wi ri qui banic ri chomanic
Proverbs16:10 Ri ajawinel are cubij ri cäbix che rumal ri Dios
Proverbs16:11 Ri e pajbal xukuje' ri e etabal quekaj chuxe' ri u k'atan tzij ri Ajawaxel; conojel ri pajbal e banom rumal are'.
Proverbs16:12 Ri ajawinelab man quequic'amowaj taj ri itzel tak banoj
Proverbs16:13 Ri ajawinelab are' cäquilok'ok'ej xukuje' are' cäkaj chquiwäch ri cätzijon ruc' tz'akatil ri man ruc' ta cawächil.
Proverbs16:14 Ri royowal ri ajawinel are' tako'n re cämical
Proverbs16:15 Ri u quicotemal ri ajawinel chi'nic rech c'aslemal
Proverbs16:16 Are utz na u rikic no'j che u q'uexwäch k'an puak; are utz na ri utzalaj chomanic chuwäch ri sak puak.
Proverbs16:17 Ri qui be ri e suc' are ri u najtajisaxic quib che ri etzelal; ri u chajixic ri ka c'aslemal are wa' ri u chajixic kib pa kech wi.
Proverbs16:18 Chrij ri nimal
Proverbs16:19 Are utz na u mach'irisaxic ib cuc' ri mebayib
Proverbs16:20 Ri utz cuban che cuc'axic ri jastak utz quelic; ¡sibalaj utz re ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel!
Proverbs16:21 Ri cächoman ruc' no'jinic cabinax c'oxomanel che; ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij cäch'äcanic.
Proverbs16:22 We c'o utzalaj chomanic c'o jun u q'uiyibal c'aslemal ri'. Ri qui tijoxic ri man c'o ta qui no'j xukuje' man no'j taj.
Proverbs16:23 Ri cächoman ruc' no'j
Proverbs16:24 Ri tzij ri e qui' e jun rakaj juyubal räx cab: cuqui'yarisaj ri chajin anima' quequiya' c'u c'ac' tak chuk'ab.
Proverbs16:25 E c'o be ri je ta ne e suc' quebilitajic
Proverbs16:26 Ri u wi'jinic ri cachacunic cätakchi'n che chac; ri numic ri cuna' are' cätakchi'n che u banic.
Proverbs16:27 Ri banal etzelal are' jun jorno re etzelal
Proverbs16:28 Ri itzel winak quebuyac ch'o'j; ri yacal tzijtal are' cäyacow c'ulelam tak ib.
Proverbs16:29 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cusub ri rachil cujech'obisaj bic pa jun itzel be.
Proverbs16:30 Quebuyupuchij ri e u bak'wäch ri cuchomaj u banic lawaloyil; quebutia' ri u chi' ri bantajinak lawaloyil rumal.
Proverbs16:31 Ri e sak tak wi'aj e jun corona ri takalic
Proverbs16:32 Are c'o na u k'ij ri coch'onic chuwäch ri chuk'ab; are c'o na u k'ij ri u ch'äquic rib jun pa re wi che u q'uexwäch ri qui ch'äquic tak tinimit.
Proverbs16:33 Ri winak quebuq'uiak taklebenic
Proverbs17:1 Are utz na u tijic ri chaki'j caxlanwa pa jamaril
Proverbs17:2 Ri pataninel ri utz u chomabal cux na ajaw puwi' ri c'ojolaxel ri esal q'uixbal
Proverbs17:3 Ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak
Proverbs17:4 Ri banal etzelal xukuje' ri banal tzij caquiya' qui xiquin che ri etzelalaj ak'aj.
Proverbs17:5 Ri cäretz'bej u wäch ri meba' cuc'axc'obisaj ri u winakirisanel; ri cäjajat che ri u quiäkasakil man cacanaj ta canok we ta ma ta cäc'äjisax u wäch.
Proverbs17:6 Ri e qui corona ri nimak tak winak e are' ri e u wi' tak qui mam; ri cäquibanbej nimal ri alc'ualaxelab e are' ri qui tat qui nan.
Proverbs17:7 Mawi catake ta che ri con quebe u bij ta je'lalaj tak tzij
Proverbs17:8 Ri u nak'atisam rib che u c'amic u pa k'abaj are' pa u c'u'x chi c'o ta mayibalalaj u cuinem
Proverbs17:9 Ri man quebuya' ta u xiquin che ri c'ax ri cäban che quebuq'uiyisaj colob aj lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj; jachin ri cutakej u nataxic ri c'ax cunajtajisaj ri rachil.
Proverbs17:10 C'o na cupatanij jun yajanic che ri c'o u ch'obobal
Proverbs17:11 Ri tzelel tzij xa ch'o'j cutzucuj
Proverbs17:12 Are cätakan na ri u rikic ib ruc' jun c'analaj ati't os che u q'uexwäch ri u rikic ib ruc' jun man c'o ta u no'j ri cucoj u chuk'ab che u rikic jun jasach.
Proverbs17:13 Mawi jubik' quel ta ri etzelal pa ri rachoch ri winak ri cutoj etzelal che u q'uexwäch utzil.
Proverbs17:14 Nima' tixtobinak ri ch'o'j ri cächaplexic
Proverbs17:15 U cuyic u mac ri ajchak'mac xukuje' ri u c'okoxic ri man c'o ta u mac e quieb jastak wa' ri man quebucoch' taj ri Ajawaxel.
Proverbs17:16 ¿Jasche cäpe ri man c'o ta u no'j ruc'am puak pa u k'ab
Proverbs17:17 Jun achil amak'el quel u c'u'x
Proverbs17:18 Ri con ri xch'aw puwi' ri rachil xukuje' are' c'u cätaq'ui' can puwi'.
Proverbs17:19 Ri cäkaj ri yok'onic chuwäch
Proverbs17:20 Mawi jubik' ri itzel chomabal cuc'ulajij ta rib ruc' ri utz; ri ak'aj ri man c'o ta chi jun jacha' ta ri are' cäkaj na pa ri u quiäkasakil.
Proverbs17:21 Ri ruxic tataxel che ri man c'o ta u no'j xuwi c'axc'ol cuc'am ulok; ri ruxic tataxel che jun con man jun quicotemal taj.
Proverbs17:22 Utzalaj cunabal ri anima'aj ri cäquicotic
Proverbs17:23 Ri banal etzelal cuc'am u pa k'abaj cheläk'ax
Proverbs17:24 Ri no'j are ri u chomabal ri cac'oxomanic
Proverbs17:25 Ri c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j ya'l oyowal xukuje' c'ayil chque ri u nan u tat.
Proverbs17:26 Man ya'tal taj cätok'ix torobal rib ri man c'o ta u mac mawi u rapuxic ri winak rumal ri suq'uilal ri cubano.
Proverbs17:27 Quech ri ajno'jab ri u bixic xa quieb oxib tzij
Proverbs17:28 Xukuje' ne ri man c'o ta u no'j cächomaxic chi c'o u no'j xukuje' c'oxomanel
Proverbs18:1 Ri tititel xuwi cuchomaj ri ya'tal che
Proverbs18:2 Ri man c'o ta u no'j man c'o ta u rayinic che etamanic; xuwi utz che chi caquiya' qui wäch ri winak che.
Proverbs18:3 Ruc' ri etzelal cäpe wi ri q'uixbal; ruc' ri u banic nimal cäpe wi ri yok'obal.
Proverbs18:4 Ri e u tzij ri winak e ja' naj qui pam
Proverbs18:5 Man utz taj chi ri k'atal tak tzij cäquito' u wi' ri c'o u mac
Proverbs18:6 Cumal tak ri e u chi' ri man c'o ta u no'j cunim rib pa tak u q'ueyowal; cumal tak ri e u tzij quebutzucuj utzalaj tak rapunic.
Proverbs18:7 Ri e u tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j e are' ri etzelebal rib; cumal c'ut ri e u tzij
Proverbs18:8 Ri tzijtal tak xak e junam cuc' tak ri munibal quebopan c'ä chquipam tak ri bak.
Proverbs18:9 Ri sak'orib xukuje' ri yojinelab ¡quebux c'u ne na cachalal tak kib!
Proverbs18:10 Ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel are' jun tac'atic ja ri sibalaj nim u cuinem
Proverbs18:11 Ri k'inom cuchomaj chi ri e u k'inomal e junam ruc' jun tinimit ri sutim rij rumal nimalaj tapia ri naj elinak chicaj.
Proverbs18:12 Chrij ri banoj nimal cäpe ri tzakmajic; chrij ri mach'ibalil ri pok'otajic.
Proverbs18:13 Jun conil xukuje' jun q'uixbal u tzelexic u wäch ri tzij c'amajok chtatabexok.
Proverbs18:14 Ri yawab cäwalijisax rumal ri u chajin anima'
Proverbs18:15 Ri ajno'jab xukuje' ri e c'oxomanelab cäquirik ri etamanic ri cäquitzucuj.
Proverbs18:16 Ruc' jun sipanic quejak conojel tak ri oquibal cäban c'u opanem chuwäch ri winak ri nim u banic.
Proverbs18:17 Ri cuto' rib nabe je ta ne ri kastzij ri cubij
Proverbs18:18 Ri k'atan tzij aj Dios cusach u tza'm ri ch'o'j
Proverbs18:19 Xa sibalaj cuban u tz'apixic rib ri achalaxel ri c'axc'obisam chuwäch ri jun tinimit ri sutim rij cumal nimak tak tapia. Ri ch'o'j quetasanic jacha' ri tasbal u pam jun rachoch ajawinel.
Proverbs18:20 Chquijujunal caquitij na c'ä xukuje' ne ri cosic rech ri e u wächinic tak ri qui tzij.
Proverbs18:21 Ri c'aslemal xukuje' ri cämical quewet'et'ic jas ri cubij ri ak'aj; ri sibalaj quewet'et'ic cäquicoch' na ri cuc'am ulok ri quiwet'et'em.
Proverbs18:22 U rikic ixokilaxel are ri u rikic ri utz na: are ri u c'amic jun c'utbal ri u tok'ob ri Dios.
Proverbs18:23 Ri meba' cäch'aw cuc' tok'lenic; ri k'inom cutzelej u bixic ri cäbix che ruc' nimal.
Proverbs18:24 E c'o jujun ri uj utz cuc' chanim c'ut cäsach u wäch ri cutzil kuc'
Proverbs19:1 Are utz na ri uxic meba' tz'akatisanel c'ut pa ronojel
Proverbs19:2 Man utz ta ri elem ch'u'j we man c'o ch'obonic; ri sibalaj e aninakil quequic'am ulok q'ui tak sachinakil.
Proverbs19:3 Ri u conil ri winak cuban che chi cusach ri be
Proverbs19:4 Ri k'inomal quebuc'am ulok q'uialaj tak achil
Proverbs19:5 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel kas curik wi na ri c'äjisabal u wäch; ri banal tzij man quel ta puwi' ri cubano.
Proverbs19:6 Ri sipanel man co ta c'u ranima'
Proverbs19:7 We ri meba' xukuje' ne tak ri e rachalal caquetzelaj u wäch
Proverbs19:8 Ri curik etamanic cuchaplej c'u u banic ri retamam
Proverbs19:9 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel kas curik wi na ri c'äjisabal u wäch; ri banal tzij queyex rumal ri cämical.
Proverbs19:10 Man ya'tal ta che ri man c'o ta u no'j chi cäc'oji' pa k'inomal
Proverbs19:11 Ri utzalaj no'jinic are ri u k'ilic ri oyowal
Proverbs19:12 Ri royowal ri ajawinel xak junam ruc' ri u wunic ri coj
Proverbs19:13 Jun c'ojolaxel ri man c'o ta u no'j cuc'axc'obisaj ri u tat. Ri ixok ri xak cäch'ojinic xak junam ruc' ri tz'uj ri man cätani' taj.
Proverbs19:14 Chque ri nan tat quec'am wi tak ja xukuje' tak k'inomal; ri ixokilaxel c'oxomanel cäc'am che ri Ajawaxel.
Proverbs19:15 Ri sak'oril cuya' nimalaj waram
Proverbs19:16 Ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri takomal cuto' u wi' ri u c'aslemal; ri man nim ta cäril wi ri u tijonic ri Ajawaxel
Proverbs19:17 Jun jalomal che ri meba' jun jalomal wa' che ri Ajawaxel
Proverbs19:18 Chajic'a' ri a c'ojol utz c'ä cuya' cäjiq'uic
Proverbs19:19 Ri sibalaj coyowaric cuc'am na ri takal che; we quesax chuwäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj xa canimatajisax ri jasach.
Proverbs19:20 Chaya' a xiquin che ri no'j ri cäya' chawe chac'amowaj c'ut ri pixbenic we je caban wa' catux na ajno'j.
Proverbs19:21 Ri winak quebuban q'ui tak chomanic
Proverbs19:22 Ri sibalaj cucämisaj wi rib ri winak che u rayixic cux u quiäkasakil; are' utz na ri meba' chuwäch ri banal tzij.
Proverbs19:23 Ri u ya'ic u k'ij ri Ajawaxel cäc'aman bic pa ri c'aslemal; cac'oji' jun pa quicotemal man c'o ta c'u jun lawaloyil cäpe puwi'.

Proverbs19:25 Che ri u c'äjisaxic u wäch ri banal nimal

Proverbs19:28 Ri u cawäch k'alajisanel cäretz'bej u wäch ri suq'uilal; ri banal etzelal quebutzak ulok etzelal pa u chi'.

Proverbs20:1 Ri u wa'l uva cuban che ri winak chi cuban nimal; ri e uq'uia' tak ri utz qui k'obisaxic banom cuyojtajisaj; apachin ta ne ri cakaj chupam man c'o ta jun utz ta u cojic ri u no'j cubano.
Proverbs20:2 Jun c'analaj ajawinel xak junam ruc' jun coj ri cawunic; ri cätzuruwic
Proverbs20:3 Nim u k'ij ri winak ri quebuk'il ri c'ulelam tak ib

Proverbs24:25 e jachin tak c'ut ri quec'äjisan u wäch utz caquitaklebej na

Proverbs26:1 Man cätaki' ta ri tew che ri k'alaj mawi ri jäb che ri u yaquic ri u wäch ri ulew. Mawi ri e u ya'ic k'ij che ri man c'o ta u no'j.
Proverbs26:2 Jacha' ri tz'unun sachinak o ri xipicar ri man c'o ta u soc
Proverbs26:3 Ri quiej rajawaxic u nak'atisaxic
Proverbs26:4 Ri man cutzelej taj u wäch ri u tzij
Proverbs26:5 Ri reta'm u tzelexic u wäch ri u tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j
Proverbs26:6 U jiquibaxic jun takquil che ri man c'o ta u no'j are qui k'atic wa' ri akanaj qui tzucuxic c'u tak u q'ueyowal.
Proverbs26:7 Man naj ta cäbe wi ri ch'oco'j cuc' tak ri u ch'ec mawi ri c'ambal no'j ri bim rumal ri man c'o ta u no'j.
Proverbs26:8 Sibalaj nimalaj conil ri u ximic ri abaj chupam ri iquiak' xak junam ruc' ri u ya'ic qui k'ij ri man c'o ta qui no'j.
Proverbs26:9 Ri k'abarel mawi cuna' ri q'uix
Proverbs26:10 Ri q'uiakal ch'ab quebuq'uiak conojel queboc'owic
Proverbs26:11 Ri tz'i' cätzelej ruc' ri u xo'j ri man c'o ta u no'j ruc' ri man c'o ta u no'jibal.
Proverbs26:12 Are c'o na quechbex che ri man c'o ta u no'j chuwäch ri cuban rib chi sibalaj c'o u no'j.
Proverbs26:13 Rech man cächacun ta ri sak'or cucoj pa u tzij cubij chi c'o jun coj pa ri u be ri quel ulok chrij.
Proverbs26:14 Ri uchi'ja cutzalc'atila' rib puwi' ri u wikob are' c'u ri sak'or cutzalc'atila' rib puwi' ri u ch'at.
Proverbs26:15 Ri sak'or cunim ri u k'ab chupam ri liq'uilic lak
Proverbs26:16 Ri sak'or cuchomaj rib chi c'o na u no'j chquiwäch wukub winak ri queta'm qui tzelexic qui wäch tak ri tzij.
Proverbs26:17 U cojic ib pa ri qui ch'o'j jule' tak winak chic are u chapic jun tz'i' che ri quieb u xiquin.
Proverbs26:18 Jacha' jun ch'u'j ri quebutzokopij cämisanelalaj tak ch'ab re k'ak'
Proverbs26:19 are jewa' ri cusub ri rachil
Proverbs26:20 We man c'o si' cächup ri k'ak'
Proverbs26:21 Che u banic rachak k'ak'
Proverbs26:22 Ri e tzijtal tak xak e junam cuc' tak ri munibal
Proverbs26:23 Sak puak bilom chrij t'uy re t'ac e je tak wa' ri ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij ri xak quieb caquibij.
Proverbs26:24 Ri caq'uiäkwächinic man cuc'ut taj aretak cätzijonic
Proverbs26:25 Matcojo we catuch'abej ruc' ch'uch'ujil
Proverbs26:26 pune' cutzucuj u c'u'ic ri u quiäkwächinic
Proverbs26:27 Ri cuc'ot jun jul
Proverbs26:28 Ri banal tzij cuquiäkwächij ri kastzij
Proverbs27:1 Maban nimal che ri k'ij re chwek
Proverbs27:2 Chaya' c'olbal chi e jule' tak chi wi ri cheyo'w a k'ij; man ya'tal taj chi at caya' a k'ij chbil awib.
Proverbs27:3 Ri abaj xukuje' ri sanyeb e al
Proverbs27:4 Ri c'anal man cätok'obisan ta wächaj
Proverbs27:5 Are utz na ri yajanic chisakil chuq'uexwäch ri ajawinic chic'uyal.
Proverbs27:6 Are cuya' na cäjiquibax c'uxaj chrij ri achil ri casoconic chuq'uexwäch ri c'ulel ri cätz'umanic.
Proverbs27:7 Ri nojinak
Proverbs27:8 Jacha' ri chicop ri c'o u xic' ri naj cäwacat wi che ri u soc are jeri' naj cabin wi che ri c'olbal ri xalax wi.
Proverbs27:9 Che u quicotisaxic ri anima'aj
Proverbs27:10 Mawi jubik' mebawonoba' ri e awachil mawi ri e rachil ri a tat. Mawi jubik' mebac'am bic ri u q'ueyowal ri c'o awuc' pa rachoch ri awachalal. Are' utz na ri c'ulja nakaj chuq'uexwäch ri achalaxel ri c'o naj.
Proverbs27:11 Chatux ajno'j
Proverbs27:12 Ri utz cächomanic cäril ri sayowem quel c'u na chuwäch; ri man utz ta cächomanic cutakej ri u be cäkajbex c'u rumal ri winakchi'.
Proverbs27:13 Ri cach'aw puwi' jun winak ri man etamatal ta u wäch chawesaj ri ratz'iak chac'ama' che tojbal rech ri ch'awinak puwi'.
Proverbs27:14 Ri u ya'ic rutzil u wäch ri achil cuc' tak rakojchi'aj sibalaj ta c'u ak'ab
Proverbs27:15 Xak junam ri ixok ri xak cach'ojinic ruc' jun tz'uj ri man cätani' taj pa ri u k'ijol ri jäb.
Proverbs27:16 We cajwax u k'atixic xak junam ri' we ta cajwax u k'atixic ri quiakik' o ri u muk'exic ri aseit pa ri k'abaj.
Proverbs27:17 Ri cuchilo cajux ruc' ch'ich' are c'u ri winak ruc' jun winak chic.
Proverbs27:18 Ri cächajin ri u che'al higo quebutij rech ri higo; ri cuchajij ri rajaw cuc'am nimarisabal u k'ij.
Proverbs27:19 E je jacha' ri palajaj ri quec'utun chupam ri ja'
Proverbs27:20 Ri cämical
Proverbs27:21 Ri k'an puak xukuje' ri sak puak
Proverbs27:22 Che ri man c'o ta u no'j man quel ta ri no'j che pune' ta ne cäque'xic cätakex ta c'u u que'xic.
Proverbs27:23 Man catel ta chquij ri a chij
Proverbs27:24 mawi c'u ne tak k'inomal mawi c'u ne tak ri corona quebeytaj ta chbe k'ij sak.

Proverbs28:1 Ri banal etzelal canimajic pune' man c'o jachin tereninak
Proverbs28:2 Aretak man utz ta benak ri ulew
Proverbs28:3 Ri banal etzelal ri cuban c'ax chque ri mebayib xak junam ruc' ri nimalaj jäb ri cusach qui wäch ri tico'n.
Proverbs28:4 Ri cäquitas quib caquiya' can ri pixab cäquiya' u k'ij ri banal etzelal; ri caquitz'akatisaj cäquic'ulelaj.
Proverbs28:5 Ri e banal tak etzelal man c'o ta jas cäquich'ob che ri suq'uilal
Proverbs28:6 Are utz na uxic meba' tz'akatisanel c'ut pa ronojel che uxic k'inom ri xak quieb u pam.
Proverbs28:7 Ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri u pixab ri Dios jun c'ojolaxel wa' ri c'oxomanel
Proverbs28:8 Ri quebumulij tak k'inomal rumal ri ral puak ri cutok'ij
Proverbs28:9 We c'o jun man craj taj coc il che ri u pixab ri Dios
Proverbs28:10 Ri quebuc'am bic ri e utz pa itzel be cäkaj na pa ri u c'amibal; e are' c'u ri winak ri man c'o ta etzelal caquibano cäquic'am na ri sibalaj utz na.
Proverbs28:11 Ri k'inom cuna' rib chi sibalaj ajno'j
Proverbs28:12 Aretak quech'äcan ri suc'
Proverbs28:13 Jachin ri quebusach u tza'm ri macaj man utz ta quel na; are' c'u ri quebuk'alajisaj cutanaba' c'u qui banic
Proverbs28:14 Utz re ri winak ri amak'el cuya' u k'ij ri Ajawaxel; are' c'u ri cuban co che ri ranima' cäkaj na pa ri quiäkasakil.
Proverbs28:15 Cajunamataj ruc' jun coj ri cawunic o jun os ri bik'onel ri banal etzelal ri cajawin puwi' jun meba'laj tinimit.
Proverbs28:16 Ri k'atal tzij ri man c'o ta u no'j cunimatajisaj ri u banic c'ax; are' c'u ri man quiäk rayinel taj naj cäc'asi na.
Proverbs28:17 Jachin ri u banom jun cämic man cätaq'ui' ta na c'ä cätzak na pa ri mukbal: ¡C'o jun mutijtobej u k'atixic!
Proverbs28:18 Ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel man c'o ta cuc'ulmaj
Proverbs28:19 Jachin ri cutajij ri rulew
Proverbs28:20 Jachin ri ya'tal u jiquibaxic c'uxaj caya' na u k'ij; jachin sibalaj curayij ri k'inomal man cäcanaj ta canok chi ma ta cac'äjisax u wäch.
Proverbs28:21 Man ya'tal ta u yok'ic jachin jun; c'ä xa ne xa rumal jun ch'akap caxlanwa cuya' cäban macunic.
Proverbs28:22 Ri quiäk rayinel cäsac'satic rumal rech chi k'inom
Proverbs28:23 Ri cäbin che jun winak chi chuk'ila' rib
Proverbs28:24 Cachil banal tak c'ax jachin ri queläk' chquij ri u nan u tat cucoj c'u pa ch'o'j che u bixic chi man c'o ta jas u banom.
Proverbs28:25 Ri sibalaj caquiäk rayinic quebuyac tak ch'o'j; are c'u ri cujiquiba' u c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel cäpax u wäch ri cubano.
Proverbs28:26 Xuwi jun man c'o ta u no'j cujiquiba' u c'u'x chquij ri e u chomanic; ri cäpatanij ruc' no'j man c'o ta jas cuc'ulmaj.
Proverbs28:27 Jachin ri cuban tok'ob che ri meba' man c'o ta cäq'uetet wi
Proverbs28:28 Aretak quech'äcan ri banal tak etzelal ri winak cäquic'u' quib; aretak copan ri q'uisbal qui k'ij
Proverbs29:1 Ri cuban rib chi tacaticalaj con aretak cäk'ilic
Proverbs29:2 Aretak are quetakan tak ri suc'
Proverbs29:3 Ri c'ojolaxel ajno'j cuban che ri u tat chi sibalaj utz rech; ri cäbin cuc' tak ixokib re nim ch'utin cusachala' ri puak.
Proverbs29:4 Ri ajawinel ri cuban suq'uilal cujekeba' ri rulew; ri xuwi tok'im cuchuj cubano cuyojyobisaj.
Proverbs29:5 Ri amak'el cuya' u k'ij ri rachil
Proverbs29:6 Ri e u c'amibal ri banal etzelal e are' tak ri e u mac; are' c'u ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel cäquicotic utz c'u rech.
Proverbs29:7 Ri suc' coc il che u to'ic ri meba'
Proverbs29:8 Ri tuquinelab cäquesaj ch'u'j jun tinimit; ri ajno'jab queta'm qui jamarisaxic ri winak.
Proverbs29:9 Ri ajno'j ri cutakej ch'o'j ruc' ri man c'o ta u no'j
Proverbs29:10 Ri cämisanelab ri man c'o ta canima' cäquetzelaj u wäch ri winak ri tz'akatisanel pa ronojel c'ä cäquicämisaj na.
Proverbs29:11 Ri man c'o ta u no'j xak cuya' be chque tak ri e itzel tak u rayibal
Proverbs29:12 Ri k'atal tzij ri quebuc'ulaj ri banoj tzij quebuchuwirisaj conojel ri pataninel tak rech.
Proverbs29:13 Ri c'axc'obisam xukuje' ri c'axc'obisanel c'o ri quejunamataj wi
Proverbs29:14 Ri ajawinel ri cuban suc'alaj k'atan tzij chque ri mebayib
Proverbs29:15 Cumal ch'ayic xukuje' k'ilonic cäban etamanic
Proverbs29:16 We quebuchuw ri e banal tak etzelal
Proverbs29:17 Chapixbej ri a c'ojol man c'o ta c'u latz' cuya' na chawe
Proverbs29:18 Jawije' ri man c'o ta wi ri u tzij ri Dios man c'o ta utzalaj cholajil; ¡Sibalaj utz rech ri tinimit ri cutz'akatisaj u banic ri u pixab ri Dios!
Proverbs29:19 Cuc' tzij man cäsuc'umataj taj ri lok'om pataninel
Proverbs29:20 Are' c'o quechbex na che jun ri man c'o ta u no'j chuwäch ri winak ri man cuchomaj taj ri cubij.
Proverbs29:21 Ri cupuquej ri u lok'om pataninel pa ri u ch'utinal
Proverbs29:22 Ri ch'u'j u jolom cätakchinic chi queyac tak ch'o'j quebuban c'u q'ui sachinakil.

Proverbs30:1 U tijonic tak ri Agur
Proverbs30:2 In ri in awaj na chquixo'l ri achijab
Proverbs30:3 Man nu rikom ta no'j
Proverbs30:4 ¿Jachin ri pakalinak kajinak c'u ulok chicaj? ¿Jachin ri cäcuinic cumuk'ej ri quiakik' chupam u k'ab? ¿Jachin ri capisow ri plo chupam ri u ku'? ¿Jachin xejekeban tak ri u c'ulbatil ri ulew? ¡Mabij chwe chi aweta'm ri u bi'
Proverbs30:5 Ri Ajawaxel quebuto' ri cäquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chrij; conojel tak ri e u chi'nic takal c'u quijiquibaxic c'uxaj chquij.
Proverbs30:6 C'o jas matik che ri cubij na are' we man je cabano cacuinic catuyajo
Proverbs30:7 Xa quieb jastak nu tz'onon che la nu Dios; cheya' ba' la chwe c'ä majok chincämok:
Proverbs30:8 chnajtajisaj la ri cawächil xukuje' ri banoj tzij chwe
Proverbs30:9 we c'u ne c'o u wi' cäto'tajic wuc'; cuya' ri' cäsach la pa nu jolom
Proverbs30:10 Mayok' ri lok'om pataninel chuwäch ri rajaw
Proverbs30:11 E c'o jachin tak quequic'okoj ri qui tat man quequitewichi'j ta c'ut ri qui nan.
Proverbs30:12 E c'o jachin tak cäquichomaj quib chi sibalaj e ch'ajch'oj man qui ch'ajch'ojirisam ta c'u quib che ri qui tz'ilol.
Proverbs30:13 E c'o jachin tak cäquichomaj quib chi sibalaj nim qui banic
Proverbs30:14 E c'o jachin tak e c'o ch'ich' re ch'o'j cuc' che u q'uexwäch qui ware
Proverbs30:15 E quieb ral ri nimalaj q'uiak e c'olic ri xak xuwi queta'm quetz'onon che u ta'ic quic'. E c'o oxib jastak
Proverbs30:16 ri u jul cäminak

Proverbs30:18 E c'o oxib jastak
Proverbs30:19 ri u be ri cot cho ri caj

Proverbs30:21 E c'o oxib qui wäch winak

Proverbs30:23 Ri ixok ri etzelam u wäch ri curik rachajil

Proverbs31:2 Wal

Proverbs31:6 Chaya' can ri u wa'l uva xukuje' ri c'a tak uq'uia' chque ri quebisonic chque ri man cäquirik ta chic jas cäquibano;
Proverbs31:7 ¡chcuq'uiaj u wa'l uva manataj chic chque ri qui mebayil xukuje' ri qui rikoj tak c'ax!

Proverbs31:10 Mayibalalaj ixok

Proverbs31:13 Cäbe che u tzucuxic rismal chij xukuje' lino ruc' c'ut quicotemal quebuchacuj tak chac cuc' tak ri e u k'ab.
Proverbs31:14 Ri je ta ne jun jucub quech ajc'ayib ri naj quebuc'ama' wi ulok ri jastak ri quebajwataj che.
Proverbs31:15 C'ä maja' casakaric cäwalij che qui tzukic ri ral xukuje' ri e u pataninelab.
Proverbs31:16 Cäbe che rilic jun ulew culok' c'ut
Proverbs31:17 Cuxim ri u xe' u pam che u cojic u chuk'ab ruc' c'u chajin anima' coc che u banic ri chac.
Proverbs31:18 Coc il cärilij ri c'ayij rech utz quelic
Proverbs31:19 Quebucoj ri u k'ab che bätz'inic xukuje' cäquemenic.
Proverbs31:20 Amak'el c'o cuya' chque ri mebayib xukuje' chque ri c'o qui rajawaxic.
Proverbs31:21 Man c'o ta cubij u c'u'x chque ri ral aretak cäkaj ri tew
Proverbs31:22 Kas are' quequemow tak catz'iak
Proverbs31:23 Ri rachajil sibalaj etamatal u wäch chupam ri tinimit
Proverbs31:24 We ixok ri' quebuban tak u pam atz'iak xukuje' tak pas ri quebuc'ayij chque tak ri ajc'ayib.
Proverbs31:25 Cuc'ac'arisaj ri u chuk'ab xukuje' nim ilic

Ecclesiastes1:2 ¡Man c'o ta cubej

Ecclesiastes1:4 Jujun quebalaxic jujun chic quecämic
Ecclesiastes1:5 Quel ulok ri k'ij
Ecclesiastes1:6 Cajich'ich' ri quiakik' pa ri u mox elebal k'ij
Ecclesiastes1:7 Conojel tak ri nima' quebe chupam ri plo
Ecclesiastes1:8 Man c'o ta jun cäcuin ta che u k'alajisaxic joropa' ri q'uistajisabal c'uxaj caquiya' conojel ri jastak; man c'o ta jun cubana' ta che ri cutatabej xukuje' ri carilo rech ma ta c'o chi jas cäraj.
Ecclesiastes1:9 Man c'o ta jas cac'oji' na ri ma ta c'olinak nabe; man c'o ta jas caban na ri ma ta banom canok nabe. ¡Man c'o ta c'olic ri c'ac' ta cho we uwächulew ri'!
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kas c'o c'u wi ri' ri cäbinic: “¡Wa' we ri' are jun c'ac' jasach!” C'olinak c'u ne ulok wa' nabe ojer c'ä majok chujc'olok uj.
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ri jastak ri e oc'owinak man quenatax ta chic

Ecclesiastes1:14 Xincuin c'u che u ch'obic chi ronojel ri cäban cho we uwächulew ri' man c'o ta u beya'l

Ecclesiastes2:1 Xukuje' xinbij chbil wib: “Camic quenbana' ri tijtobenic quenquicotisaj wib; quenya' jun je'licalaj c'aslemal chwe.” ¡Xukuje' c'u ne wa' man c'o ta u beya'l
Ecclesiastes2:2 Xinch'ob c'ut chi ri tze' xukuje' ri cäkaj chwächaj man c'o ta cupatanij.
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ruc' ri nu chomanic ri c'o chuxe' ri no'j
Ecclesiastes2:4 xebentak qui banic nimak tak chac; xebentak qui yaquic nimak tak ja; xec'oji' nu ticbal tak uva pa wech wi.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Xintak qui tajixic ticbal tak wichaj pa wech wi xukuje' tak nu ticbal cotz'i'j
Ecclesiastes2:6 Xebenban c'olbal ja' che qui nojisaxic che ja' che qui ja'xic tak ri che ri e ticom;
Ecclesiastes2:7 xebenlok' lok'om pataninelab achijab xukuje' lok'om pataninelab ixokib
Ecclesiastes2:8 Xeben mulij jutak mulaj k'an puak xukuje' sak puak k'inomal ri e quech can jule' tak ajawinelab chic xukuje' e quech can jule' tak u k'ab tinimit chic. Xec'oji' nu bixonelab ixokib xukuje' achijab
Ecclesiastes2:9 Xinux jun winak ri sibalaj nim u banic
Ecclesiastes2:10 Mawi jumul xink'il ta wib che jun jasach ri xinrayij; mawi jumul xink'il ta wib che jun quicotisabal chwe. Xinquicotisaj ri wanima' cuc' conojel tak ri nu chac
Ecclesiastes2:11 Xinoc c'u che u chomaxic tak ri kas e nu chac
Ecclesiastes2:12 Xinoc chi c'u che chomanic puwi' ri no'j
Ecclesiastes2:13 Xinrik c'ut chi are c'o quechbex na che ri no'j chuwäch ri man no'jinic taj
Ecclesiastes2:14 Ri c'o u no'j utz qui cojic ri e u bak'wäch quebucojo
Ecclesiastes2:15 xinbij c'u chbil wib: “Ri queyem ri man ajno'j ta xukuje' quineyem in
Ecclesiastes2:16 Mawi ri c'o u no'j mawi man c'o ta u no'j c'o ta quinataxic amak'el; pa tak c'u ri k'ij ri quepetic ronojel sachinak chic
Ecclesiastes2:17 Xinban woyowal che ri c'aslemal
Ecclesiastes2:18 Xinban woyowal xukuje' che ronojel ri chac ri xinban cho we uwächulew ri'

Ecclesiastes3:1 Pa we uwächulew ri' ronojel c'o u k'ijol; c'o jun jok'otaj che ronojel ri cac'ulmatajic:
Ecclesiastes3:2 Jun jok'otaj che alanic
Ecclesiastes3:3 Jun jok'otaj che cämisanic
Ecclesiastes3:4 Jun jok'otaj che ok'enic
Ecclesiastes3:5 Jun jok'otaj che qui jabuxic abaj
Ecclesiastes3:6 Jun jok'otaj che tijtobenic
Ecclesiastes3:7 Jun jok'otaj che jisonic
Ecclesiastes3:8 Jun jok'otaj che lok'ok'enic
Ecclesiastes3:9 ¿Jas ri cuch'äc ri winak che ri sibalaj chac ri cubano?
Ecclesiastes3:10 Quinwil c'ut ri eka'n ri u cojom ri Dios paquiwi' ri winak che qui mach'irisax ruc'.
Ecclesiastes3:11 Are'
Ecclesiastes3:12 In weta'm chi ri utz na ri cuya' cuban ri winak are ri u quicotisaxic rib
Ecclesiastes3:13 we c'u cujwa'ic cujuq'uianic xukuje' cakil u wäch ri cuya' ri ka chac chke

SongOfSongs3:10 Ri e rakan e re sak puak; ri u k'elibal chrij re k'an puak; ri t'uyulibal azul cojom puwi': ri u pam wiktal ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj cumal ri ixokib aj Jerusalen.

Isaiah8:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Chac'ama' jun nim tz'alam chatz'ibaj we bi'aj ri' chuwäch ruc' tz'ib ri cäch'obtajic ri man c'ax ta u siq'uixic: ‘Maher-salal-hasbaz.’

Isaiah8:3 Chumatam c'u na xinrik wib ruc' ri wixokil ri k'axal tzij

Isaiah8:5 Xubij chi c'u na ri Ajawaxel chwe:
Isaiah8:6 “Rumal c'u ya' xe'n ib chuwäch ri Rezin xukuje' chuwäch ri u c'ojol ri Remaliy
Isaiah8:7 ri Ajawaxel cuban na chi coc'ow ri nimalaj u chuk'ab ri nima' Euprats paquiwi' (ri u bixic ri ajawinel re Asiriy ruc' ronojel ri u chuk'ab). Cäpulin na pa conojel tak ri e u be
Isaiah8:8 copan na c'ä pa Juda cuch'uk c'u na cämuktaj na can chupam
Isaiah8:9 Chimulij iwib
Isaiah8:10 Chebibana' i chomanic
Isaiah8:11 Ri Ajawaxel co xinuchap ruc' ri u k'ab
Isaiah8:12 “Mibij yacoj ib che ronojel ri cubij ri winak chi yacoj ib. Mixe'j iwib che ri caquixe'j wi quib
Isaiah8:13 Are' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri ya'talic chi are tastalic; chuwäch wa' rajawaxic quixe'j wi iwib.
Isaiah8:14 Ri are' cux na jacha' jun c'amibal chiwe
Isaiah8:15 E q'ui cäquichak'ij na quib
Isaiah8:16 Utz u c'olic chibana'

Isaiah8:19 Cäquibij c'u ne na ri winak chiwe: “Chita' i no'j chque ri cuxlabal ri cäminakib

Isaiah9:1 Nabe canok ri Dios xumach'irisaj ri Galiley
Isaiah9:2 Ri tinimit ri cäbin pa k'ekumal xril jun nimalaj sakil jun sakil xjuluwic chque ri e jekel pa k'ekumal.
Isaiah9:3 Ajawaxel
Isaiah9:4 Yojim c'u la ri lok'om patanijic ri cäbanow c'ax che ri tinimit
Isaiah9:5 Ri xajäb ri capoc'naj che ri cakan ri ajch'ojab
Isaiah9:6 Rumal rech chi alam jun ac'al chke
Isaiah9:7 Cät'uyi na chupam ri u tem re ajawibal ri David; culic' na ri u cuinem aj ajawinel pa ronojel c'olbal
Isaiah9:8 Ri Ajawaxel u takom ulok jun k'alajisanic che ri Israel
Isaiah9:9 ronojel ri u tinimit ri Eprain ri jekel pa Samar u ch'obom. Ri e are' cäquibij quib chi e nimak qui k'ij
Isaiah9:10 “E tzakinak ri porom xan
Isaiah9:11 Ri Ajawaxel u banom chi e petinak xibibalalaj tak c'ulel kas are' xetakow ulok che u banic ch'o'j.

Isaiah9:13 Man xtzelej ta c'u ri tinimit ruc' ri Dios

Isaiah9:15 (Ri jolom are' cäquiq'uexwächij ri nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri e c'amal tak be

Isaiah10:1 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix ri quebicoj tak pixab ri man e suc' taj
Isaiah10:2 man quiban ta c'u ri suc' chque ri tukarib mawi quixoc il che u banic ri ya'tal chque ri mebayib re ri nu tinimit
Isaiah10:3 ¿Jas lo ri quiban na aretak quiya' u bixic ri e i banom
Isaiah10:4 We man quixmach'irisaxic quixyut c'u na bic
Isaiah10:5 “¡Ri ajawinel re Asiriy
Isaiah10:6 Quintak c'u che u banic c'ax che jun tinimit ri man nimanel taj
Isaiah10:7 Are c'u ri ajawinel re Asiriy man je ta cuchomaj wa'
Isaiah10:8 Cubij: ‘Conojel tak ri ajawinelab e c'amal tak be wa' ri e c'o chuxe' ri nu takanic.
Isaiah10:9 Chnuwäch in xak junam ri tinimit Calno ruc' ri tinimit Carquems
Isaiah10:10 E nu rikom nimak tak tinimit ri e c'o q'ui qui diosib
Isaiah10:11 Je c'u ri'
Isaiah10:12 Aretak ri Ajawaxel u banom chi ronojel ri rajawaxic cubano pa ri juyub Sion xukuje' pa Jerusalen
Isaiah10:13 Ri ajawinel aj Asiriy u bim: “In in banowinak wa' ruc' ri nu chuk'ab; in c'o nu no'j
Isaiah10:14 Oquinak ronojel ri qui k'inomal tak ri tinimit pa nu k'ab
Isaiah10:15 ¿La cäcuin ta c'u lo ri icäj cuchomaj rib chi nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri cäcojowic? ¿Ri ramibal chuwäch ri casalabisanic? ¡Jacha' ri ch'ämiy ri xa' jun che' are ta cäsalabisan ri achi ri c'amowinak bic!
Isaiah10:16 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel quebutuktubisaj na we winak ri' ri cätiltat cakan qui k'ab
Isaiah10:17 Ri Tastalicalaj Dios u chäj ri Israel
Isaiah10:18 Cusach na u wäch ronojel ri u je'lal ri qui c'ache'laj xukuje' ri qui ticonijibal. Quebuya' canok jacha' jun yawab ri man c'o ta chi u chuk'ab.
Isaiah10:19 Xak c'u e quieb oxib chic ri che' ri quecanaj can pa ri c'ache'laj
Isaiah10:20 Pa ri k'ijol ri'
Isaiah10:21 Xak e quieb oxib chque ri e aj u tinimit ri Jacob quetzelej na ruc' ri Dios ri man c'o ta jun cäch'äcan ta puwi'.
Isaiah10:22 Pune' ri a tinimit
Isaiah10:23 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem u chomam ri sachbal wächaj

Isaiah10:25 Xa pa quieb oxib k'ij cäpe na ri c'äjisabal wächaj paquiwi'
Isaiah10:26 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch jacha' ri xuban che qui ch'äquic ri aj madianib chunakaj ri nimalaj abaj pa Oreb
Isaiah10:27 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quesax na ri eka'n ri yo'm cho awachak
Isaiah10:28 copan pa Ajat
Isaiah10:29 cäk'ax pa ri u k'axbal ri nima' ri cäwolkotic
Isaiah10:30 ¡Curak u chi' ri Bat-galim! ¡Cätataj c'ä pa Lais! ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri Anatot!
Isaiah10:31 Ri Madmena canimaj bic
Isaiah10:32 Camic copan ri ajawinel aj Asiriy pa Nob; cätakanic chi cäban ch'o'j ruc' ri juyub Sion

Isaiah11:1 Che we cuta'mil ri' ri are' ri Isayi
Isaiah11:2 Ri ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel cäjeki' na amak'el puwi'

Isaiah11:4 Cuk'at na tzij ruc' suq'uil paquiwi' ri tukarib
Isaiah11:5 Amak'el u cojom atz'iak re suq'uil xukuje' re kastzij.
Isaiah11:6 Cäc'oji' na jamaril chquixo'l ri utiw ruc' ri chij
Isaiah11:7 Ri ati't wacax xukuje' ri ati't os cäcachilaj na quib
Isaiah11:8 ri ac'al cuya' quetz'an pa ri u jul ri cumätz

Isaiah13:1 Tzij tak ri caquiya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Babilon
Isaiah13:2 “¡Chiwalijisaj puwi' jun tol juyub ri retal ri u banic ch'o'j! ¡Chiya' takanic chque ri ajch'ojab che u banic ri ch'o'j! Chiyaca' ri i k'ab rech cäquitakej ch'äcanic chuchi' tak ri cachoch ri nimak qui k'ij.
Isaiah13:3 E nu siq'uim chic ri cowilaj tak nu wachijab
Isaiah13:4 Cätataj jun rakoj chi'aj pa tak ri juyub
Isaiah13:5 Pa jun najalaj ulew e elinak wi ulok c'ä jela' che ri elebal k'ij. Are' ri Ajawaxel ri e uc'aninak ulok ri e u chaconisan ri royowal

Isaiah13:12 Quenbana' na chi ri achijab man quequeney ta chi na chuwäch ri coc'alaj kan puak re Opir.
Isaiah13:13 Cäyicop c'u na ri caj
Isaiah13:14 Ri winak jeri' quepe masat aj lianic ri e okatam
Isaiah13:15 Apachin c'u ri carikic cäcämisax na chi chch'ich'
Isaiah13:16 Kas chquiwäch quejub na ri alaj tak calc'ual cho ri ulew
Isaiah13:17 Quebentak na ulok ri winak aj medib chquij
Isaiah13:18 Ruc' ri qui k'ab quequikasaj na ri alabom. Man cäquitok'obisaj ta qui wäch ri c'äte xebalaxic

Isaiah14:17 ri xutz'iniba' can ri uwächulew jacha' jun chaki'j uwo sak
Isaiah14:18 Conojel tak ri cajawinelab ri nimak tak tinimit cäya' qui k'ij
Isaiah14:19 Are c'u ri at naj xatq'uiak wi apan che ri quemuk wi ri cäminakib jacha' ri mes ri cuya' muluw c'uxaj
Isaiah14:20 Man catmuk ta jacha' ri cäban chque ri niq'uiaj ajawinelab chic
Isaiah14:21 Chisuc'umaj iwib che qui cämisaxic ri alc'ualaxelab qui mac quech ri cämisanic ri xequiban ri qui tat

Isaiah14:26 Are wa' ri nu chomam u banic pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Ri nu k'ab cucoj qui xib conojel ri nimak tak tinimit.”

Isaiah15:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Moab. Pa ri chak'ab aretak ri Ar xsach u wäch

Isaiah15:3 Ri winak qui cojom wakwoj tak atz'iak quebin pa ri be e c'o cäquirak qui chi' puwi' tak ri cachoch rumal k'oxom. Conojel ri winak cäquirak qui chi' cho tak ri c'ayibal

Isaiah16:1 Kas pa Sel ri c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak

Isaiah16:10 Ri quicotemal xukuje' ri wululem cäq'uis na qui tza'm pa tak ri juyub man c'o ta chi rakoj tak chi'aj re jajatem mawi bix quetataj chi xo'l tak ri uva ri e tiquitoj

Isaiah17:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Damasc: Copan na ri k'ij aretak ri Damasc man tinimit ta chic xa jumulaj ch'akatak tak tz'ak chic cäcanajic
Isaiah17:2 kas xa jumul cäwonobax na canok
Isaiah17:3 Ri Eprain ri cuban wi nimal ri Israel
Isaiah17:4 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Samar ri nimarisabal rib ri Jacob
Isaiah17:5 Je cäcanaj na jacha' aretak ri k'atal trico u k'atom chic ri trico quebusic' ri u jolom tak trico ruc' ri u k'ab
Isaiah17:6 ri xuwi quecanaj can ri man xerik ta bic; o jacha' aretak cäyiquiyox juwi' aseitun ri xak xuwi quecanaj can quieb oxib aseitun che ri u tza'm jun u k'ab
Isaiah17:7 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ri winak cäril na ri u winakirisanel

Isaiah19:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Ejipt: Chiwilampe' ri Ajawaxel: copan pa Ejipt u c'atal rumal jun sutz' ri aninak cäbinic. Chuwäch ri are' quebirbob ri e u diosib ri Ejipt chuwäch

Isaiah19:5 Ri ja' re ri Nil cätzaj na
Isaiah19:6 ri u be tak ja' quechuwin na. Ri binel tak ja' re Ejipt nojimal cäbe na qui tzajic c'ä quechaki'jar na

Isaiah19:15 Man c'o ta c'u jun

Isaiah19:17 Ri aj ejiptib cäquixe'j na quib chquiwäch ri aj Juda xuwi ne ruc' ri u nataxic ri u bi' cäquixe'j na quib rumal ri c'ax ri u chomam u banic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem puwi' ri Ejipt.

Isaiah20:1 Pa jun k'ijol ri Sargon
Isaiah20:2 Pa ri k'ijol ri' xch'aw ri Ajawaxel rumal ri Isaiy
Isaiah20:3 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel: “Ri Isaiy ri pataninel wech
Isaiah20:4 Jewa' cuban na ri ajawinel re Asiriy che qui c'amic bic pa jun ulew chic ri aj ejiptib xukuje' ri aj etiopib
Isaiah20:5 Ri winak cäquixe'j na quib xukuje' queq'uix na che ri Etiopiy ri qui yo'm wi ri cu'lbal qui c'u'x
Isaiah20:6 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cäquibij na conojel ri e jekel pa we tak'aj ri': ‘Chiwilampe' ri xetac'al wi na ri ka yo'm wi ri cu'lbal ka c'u'x
Isaiah21:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri chaki'j uwo sak chunakaj ri plo: Jacha' ri sutinel quiakik' ri cäpe pa u mox elebal k'ij
Isaiah21:2 Xibibal ri c'utwächinic ri u c'utum ri Ajawaxel chnuwäch: ri jachinel quieb u wäch cäjachinic
Isaiah21:3 Cäbirbob ri nu cuerp
Isaiah21:4 Sachinak ri nu chomanic
Isaiah21:5 Cojtajinak chi ri mexa
Isaiah21:6 U bim c'u ri Ajawaxel chwe: “Jät
Isaiah21:7 We queril carwaj ri e jururem cumal cacab quiej o winak ri e quiejeninak chquij bur o camey
Isaiah21:8 Ri cäyuxlenic xurak u chi': “Chupam ri nu c'olbal
Isaiah21:9 Quinwil c'ut chi petinak jun carwaj jururem cumal quieb quiej.” C'o c'u jun je xubij wa': “¡Xkaj ri Babilon
Isaiah21:10 At nu tinimit
Isaiah21:11 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Edom: C'o jun curak ulok u chi' chwe pa Seir: “Yuxlenel
Isaiah21:12 Ri yuxlenel cutzelej u bixic: “Petem cuban u sakaric
Isaiah21:13 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri chaki'j uwo sak: Binelab aj Dedan
Isaiah21:14 chixel ulok che u c'ulaxic ri cächaki'j u chi' chiya' c'u u ja'. Ri ix aj rulew ri Tem
Isaiah21:15 rumal rech chi cätajin canimaj chuwäch ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j
Isaiah21:16 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Je tak wa' pa jun junab
Isaiah21:17 Xak e quieb oxib chic' ri qui q'uiakbal ch'ab ri ajch'ojab aj Sedar quecanaj na.” Ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah22:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cäc'ulmataj na pa ri beya' re ri c'utwächinic: ¿Jas xc'ulmatajic chi conojel quepaki' puwi' tak ri cachoch?
Isaiah22:2 Tinimit ri c'o wi tuquin ib xukuje' wojcorem
Isaiah22:3 Ri c'amal tak a be conojel xebanimajic
Isaiah22:4 Rumal ri' xinbij: “Chitasa' iwib chwij
Isaiah22:5 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem u yo'm u bixic chi cäpe na jun k'ij re xibin ib
Isaiah22:6 Ri aj elamib suc'umatal chic ri qui ch'ab
Isaiah22:7 Ri e je'lalaj tak a beya' e nojinak chi chque tak carwaj
Isaiah22:8 Ri cuto' wi rib ri Juda cämalabax canok. Pa ri k'ij ri' quixoc na il che ri e tanim wi ri ch'ojibal ri e c'o pa ri Ja re ri C'ache'laj
Isaiah22:9 xebiwil ri qui' pak'pobinak ri e c'o chupam ri u tinimit ri David xquinojisaj c'ut ri c'olbal ja' che ja'
Isaiah22:10 xequinic'oj tak ri ja ri e c'o pa Jerusalen
Isaiah22:11 Chquixo'l ri quieb u tapia ri tinimit xquicoj na jun c'olbal ja' che ri ja' re ri k'el c'olbal ja'. Man xeboc ta c'u il che ri xbanow ronojel wa'
Isaiah22:12 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Isaiah22:13 Xa c'u xiban nimak'ij xukuje' xixquicotic
Isaiah22:14 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xuc'ut rib chnuwäch xujiquiba' c'u u bixic chwe pa nu xiquin
Isaiah22:15 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xubij chwe: “Jät ruc' ri Sebna ri chajil re ri rachoch ri ajawinel
Isaiah22:16 ‘¿Jas ri awech at c'o waral
Isaiah22:17 Ri Ajawaxel catuq'uiak na apan sibalaj naj
Isaiah22:18 catuwolkotij na jacha' jun c'oloq'uic catuq'uiak na bic pa jun ulew ri caribibic. Chila' catcäm wi na
Isaiah22:19 Ri in catinwesaj na pa ri awekle'n
Isaiah22:20 Pa ri k'ij ri' quinsiq'uij na ri pataninel wech
Isaiah22:21 quincoj na ri awatz'iak chrij
Isaiah22:22 Quinya' na puwi' u teleb ri u laweyil ri rachoch ri David man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cutz'apij ri cujak ri are'
Isaiah22:23 Ri are' cux na jun nimarisabal k'ij chque ri rachalaxic ri u tat. Ri in quinban na chi co cäjeki' pa ri u c'olbal
Isaiah22:24 Chrij cäxequebex wi na ri pakal rajil ri c'o cuc' ri rachalaxic ri u tat

Isaiah23:1 Cäya' u bixic ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Tir: Ri e jucub aj Tarsis quech'ikowic rumal rech chi ri oquibal ri quebopan wi sachinak chquiwäch. Ri oquibal ri cäban wi opanem pa Chipr yojim chic.
Isaiah23:2 Ri winak aj Tir xukuje' ri ajc'ayib aj Sidon man quech'aw ta chic. Ri e qui ajc'ayib quek'ax ri plo
Isaiah23:3 xukuje' pa ri e nimak tak u ja'il. Cäquesaj ri qui ch'äcoj che tak u wächinic ri Sihor
Isaiah23:4 Sibalaj chatq'uixok
Isaiah23:5 Aretak copan u tzijol cuc' ri aj Ejipt sibalaj quebison na rumal ri xuc'ulmaj ri Tir.
Isaiah23:6 Cäquibij na: “Jix pa Tarsis
Isaiah23:7 ¿La are wa' ri tinimit re sibalaj ojer
Isaiah23:8 ¿Jachin xtakow ulok wa' puwi' ri Tir ri qui nimal tinimit
Isaiah23:9 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xyo'w u bixic che u kasexic u k'ij ronojel banoj nimal
Isaiah23:10 Tinimit aj Tarsis
Isaiah23:11 Ri Ajawaxel xulic' ri u k'ab puwi' ri plo
Isaiah23:12 Xubij c'u che ri Sidon: “Chiya' can tak ri e i ca'yem alitomab ri ix ekle'n chic. Pune' catzucuj jas cabano rech catk'ax c'ä pa Chipr
Isaiah23:13 Chiwilampe' we ulew ri'
Isaiah23:14 Chiq'uisa' iwib che ok'ej
Isaiah23:15 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri Tir man c'o ta chi jun cänatan na pa oxc'al lajuj junab
Isaiah23:16 “Ixok quech nim ch'utin ri man catnatax ta chic
Isaiah23:17 Aretak cätz'akat ri oxc'al lajuj junab
Isaiah23:18 E are tak c'ut ri u ch'äcoj ri cäresaj chrij ri u c'ay
Isaiah24:1 Chiwilampe' ri Ajawaxel cusach u wäch ronojel ri uwächulew
Isaiah24:2 Je cäban na che ri cojol tabal tok'ob jas ri cäban chque ri winak re ri tinimit
Isaiah24:3 Ri uwächulew kas cäsachisax na u wäch
Isaiah24:4 Ri ulew cächaki'jar na
Isaiah24:5 Ri ulew awasim cumal ri winak ri e c'o chuwäch
Isaiah24:6 U mac ri' jun c'okonic q'uisowinak tzij puwi' ri uwächulew
Isaiah24:7 Ri u wa'l uva man kas ta cäriktaj ta chic
Isaiah24:8 Xq'uis ri quicotemal ri cäquiya' ri tum xukuje' ri arp
Isaiah24:9 Man cätijow ta chi u wa'l uva mawi c'o chi bix ri uq'uia' cux c'a pa qui chi' ri uq'uianelab.
Isaiah24:10 Ri tinimit ri c'o wi tuquin ib etzeletajinak
Isaiah24:11 Ri winak quebok' pa tak ri be che u tzucuxic u wa'l uva ronojel ri quicotemal chupinak
Isaiah24:12 Ri tinimit yojyobinak
Isaiah24:13 Je cäc'ulmataj na wa' pa conojel tak ri nimak tak tinimit re ri uwächulew: jas ri cäban chque ri aseitun ri quekasax chi che'
Isaiah24:14 Ri winak ri quec'asi' canok cäquirak na qui chi' e nojinak che quicotemal
Isaiah24:15 Xukuje' pa elebal k'ij
Isaiah24:16 Kas chuq'uisbalil ri ulew ka tom cäbixoxic: “¡Chyo'k u k'ij ri suc'!” Are c'u ri in xinbij: Tok'ob nu wäch
Isaiah24:17 Ri winak ri e c'o cho ri ulew je quebux na jacha' ri awaj ri queterenex cumal ri tzucunelab
Isaiah24:18 Ri cäto'taj pa qui k'ab ri tzucunelab cäkaj na pa ri jul
Isaiah24:19 Sibalaj cäbirbob na ri ulew
Isaiah24:20 Cäbak'otlob na jacha' jun k'abarel
Isaiah24:21 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Ajawaxel cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e c'o qui cuinem e aj chicaj xukuje' tak ri ajawinelab re ri uwächulew;
Isaiah24:22 quebumulij na quebutz'apij na pa che'
Isaiah24:23 Aretak ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cuc'ut rib chi are ajawinel pa ri juyub Sion xukuje' pa Jerusalen

Isaiah29:11 Ronojel c'u c'utwächinic uxinak chiwe jacha' tzij ri tz'ibatal chupam jun botobic wuj

Isaiah32:1 Coc na jun ajawinel ri cajawin na ruc' jicomal xukuje' k'atal tak tzij ri cäquiban na suc'alaj k'atan tzij.
Isaiah32:2 Chquijujunal wa' quebux na jun to'bal ib chuwäch ri quiakik'
Isaiah32:3 Sibalaj jaktal ri qui bak'wäch
Isaiah32:4 man cäquiban ta ri jastak ruc' aninakil xane' cäquichomaj na ri cäquibano
Isaiah32:5 Ri winak man cäquibij ta na utzalaj winak che ri k'an u chi
Isaiah32:6 Rumal rech chi ri k'an u chi' cäch'aw na jacha' jun ri k'an u chi'
Isaiah32:7 Ri chi' c'o wi are quebucoj ri subunic
Isaiah32:8 Are c'u ri utzalaj winak
Isaiah32:9 Are c'u ri ix
Isaiah32:10 Camic man c'o ta jas quibisoj
Isaiah32:11 Ix ri man c'o ta jas quixoc ta wi il
Isaiah32:12 Chic'utu' iwib chi cäk'oxow ri iwanima' chque ri je'lalaj tak ulew
Isaiah32:13 Q'uix xukuje' juyubal tak k'ayes ri c'o qui q'uixo'l queq'uiy na chupam ri wulew
Isaiah32:14 Ri ja re k'atbal tzij cäwoni na canok; ri tinimit
Isaiah32:15 Are c'u ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel ri winakirisanel c'ac' u petic cäpe chi na jumul pakawi'
Isaiah32:16 Ri jicomal xukuje' ri suq'uil cäjeki' na pa conojel c'olbal rech ri ulew.
Isaiah32:17 Ri suq'uil cuya' na jamaril
Isaiah32:18 Ri nu tinimit cäjeki' na pa jun c'olbal aj jamaril
Isaiah32:19 pune' c'u cat'akix ri c'ache'laj camach'irisax c'u ri tinimit.
Isaiah32:20 Ri ix quixjeki' na pa utzil
Isaiah33:1 ¡Tok'ob a wäch
Isaiah33:2 Ajawaxel
Isaiah33:3 Aretak cätataj ri xe'n ib ri cäcoj la quebanimaj tak na ri tinimit
Isaiah33:4 ri e qui c'ulel e jacha' jun sutz' sac'
Isaiah33:5 Ri Ajawaxel c'o puwi' ronojel
Isaiah33:6 amak'el c'ut cubij che chi man c'o ta cäslabisanic. Ri no'j xukuje' ri etamanic e jun k'inomal wa' ri queto'tajisanic ri u na'ic ib chuwäch ri Ajawaxel are jun k'inomal.
Isaiah33:7 ¡Chatampe' ri u rakic qui chi' ri c'o qui chuk'ab xo'l tak ri ja
Isaiah33:8 E tz'inil tak ri be
Isaiah33:9 Ri ulew u cojom k'ek' atz'iak
Isaiah33:10 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Camic quinyac wib; camic quinc'ut wib chi nim nu banic chi nim nu k'ij.
Isaiah33:11 Ri e i chomanic ix xukuje' ri e i chac xa' e pajo xukuje' xa e mes; ri wuxlabic cäsachow na qui wäch jacha' jun c'atic.
Isaiah33:12 Ri e tinimit tak quechajirisax na jacha' q'uix ri e choyom chic quec'at na pa ri k'ak'.
Isaiah33:13 Ri e c'o naj quitatabej ri nu banom
Isaiah33:14 Quebirbob ri ajmaquib pa ri Sion

Isaiah33:16 are wa' ri man c'o ta jachin cäslabisanic
Isaiah33:17 Cawil chi c'u na jumul ri ajawinel pa ri nimalaj u juluwem ri u c'ulbatil jun ulew ri naj quetakal wi na.
Isaiah33:18 Aretak cänataj ri xe'n ib chawe ri xatc'oji' wi na
Isaiah33:19 Man catjeki' ta chi pa jun tinimit ri man c'o ta u q'uixbal

Isaiah42:16 Quebenc'am na bic ri moyab pa tak be xukuje' pa alaj tak be ri man quetamam taj. Quinq'uex na ri k'eku'm pa sakil chquiwäch ri e are'
Isaiah42:17 Ri cäquicu'ba' qui c'u'x chrij jun dios
Isaiah42:18 “T'oyab
Isaiah42:19 Man c'o ta jun ri sibalaj ta moy mawi sibalaj ta t'oy jacha' ri pataninel wech
Isaiah42:20 E rilom q'ui jastak man coc ta c'u il chque cacuinic catanic
Isaiah42:21 Ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah42:22 are c'u we tinimit ri' queläk'axic xukuje' queboc eläk'omab ruc'
Isaiah42:23 ¿Jachin ta c'u jun chiwe coc ta il che wa'? ¿Jachin ri coc il che u tatabexic ri cäc'ulmataj na?
Isaiah42:24 ¿Jachin xyo'w be chi ri Israel
Isaiah42:25 Rumal ri' xpe royowal chquij xuc'äjisaj c'u qui wäch ruc' jun ch'o'j ri xak c'ätetal xpe paquiwi' ri xebunicowisaj pa k'ak' pune' c'u je xquic'ulmaj wa' man xcaj ta xech'obonic.
Isaiah43:1 Are c'u ri camic
Isaiah43:2 We rajawaxic catk'ax pa ri ja'

Isaiah43:5 Maxe'j awib
Isaiah43:6 quinbij na che ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij: ‘Chebatzelej ulok
Isaiah43:7 conojel ri cuc'am ri nu bi'
Isaiah43:8 Chibana' chi cäpe ri nu tinimit
Isaiah43:9 Chquimulij quib conojel tak ri tinimit
Isaiah43:10 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Ix ri ix k'alajisanelab chwij
Isaiah43:11 Xuwi ri in in Ajawaxel man c'o ta chi jun cäcuinic cäcolonic we ma ta xuwi ri in.

Isaiah43:13 Ojer ulok in Dios wi. Man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cäresaj rib pa nu k'ab. Man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cuyojij ri quinbano.”
Isaiah43:14 Ri Ajawaxel

Isaiah43:19 Ri in quenbana' na jun c'ac' banoj
Isaiah43:20 Cäquiya' na nu k'ij ri juyubal tak awaj
Isaiah43:21 ri tinimit ri nu nuc'um rech cäresaj u tzijol ri nu k'ijilaxic.
Isaiah43:22 Are c'u ri at
Isaiah43:23 Man xebaya' ta chij chwe che tabal tok'ob ri quechajirisaxic mawi xaya' nu k'ij cuc' tabal tak tok'ob. In man xatincos taj xebenta' ta tak sipanic chawe.

Isaiah44:5 Jun cubij na: ‘In rech ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah44:6 Ri Ajawaxel

Isaiah50:7 Ri Ajawaxel are quinto'wic: rumal ri' man c'ax ta xeben na' ri yok'bal rumal ri' co in c'olic jacha' jun nim abaj
Isaiah50:8 Pa nu xcut c'o wi ri to'l wech: ¿La c'o jachin c'o jas cuna' chwij? ¡Jo' junam chuwäch ri k'atal tzij! ¿La c'o jun cuchomaj chi quinutzujuj chuwäch ri k'atal tzij? ¡Chpetok chubij c'u chwe!
Isaiah50:9 Ri Ajawaxel are quinto'wic; ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic cuc'äjisaj nu wäch? Conojel ri e nu c'ulel cäsach na qui wäch jacha' atz'iak ri tijom cumal xjut.

Isaiah51:6 Chixca'y chicaj

Isaiah53:1 ¿Jachin quecojowok ri ka tom? ¿Jachin chuwäch u c'utum wi ri Ajawaxel ri u cuinem?

Isaiah53:3 ri winak cäquetzelaj u wäch xukuje' caquixutuj

Isaiah54:4 Maxe'j awib
Isaiah54:5 are' c'u ri xatwinakirisanic catuc'am na che rixokil. Ri u bi' are Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem ri torol awech are ri Tastalicalaj u Dios ri Israel ri Dios ri' re ronojel ri uwächulew.
Isaiah54:6 At je jas jun ali c'ulanic ri xutum canok xukuje' cäbisonic
Isaiah54:7 “Xa quieb oxib k'ij xatinxutuj na canok

Isaiah55:1 “Iwonojel ri cächaki'j i chi'
Isaiah55:2 ¿Jasche cäya' ri puak che u q'uexwäch ri man wa taj? ¿Jasche quiya' ri quich'äco che jun jasach ri man cänojisan taj? Kas utz nu tatabexic chibana'
Isaiah55:3 Chixpet wuc'
Isaiah55:4 In xincoj ri are' jacha' che k'alajisanel chque ri nimak tak tinimit
Isaiah55:5 At quebasiq'uij na tak tinimit ri man etamatal ta qui wäch; quexiq'uinic quepe na awuc'

Isaiah55:7 Ri banal etzelal chuya' can ri itzel u be
Isaiah55:8 Ri e nu chomanic c'ut man e junam ta cuc' tak ri e iwech ix

Isaiah56:1 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Chibana' ri suq'uil
Isaiah56:2 Sibalaj utz rech ri winak ri quebutakej
Isaiah56:3 We c'o jun winak re jun tinimit chic cujach rib pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah56:4 Cubij c'u ri Ajawaxel: “We ri achijab ri esam ri qui cowil nim cäquil wi ri nu k'ij re uxlanem
Isaiah56:5 in
Isaiah56:6 Are c'u ri winak ri e re jun tinimit chic ri cäquijach quib pa nu k'ab che nu patanixic xukuje' che nu lok'ok'exic
Isaiah56:7 ri in quebenc'am na ulok chupam ri tastalicalaj nu juyub
Isaiah56:8 In quinban na chi quetzelej ulok chi cäquimulij c'u na quib ri c'ä e c'o pa jun ulew chic.” Are wa' ri cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah56:9 Chixpetok
Isaiah56:10 e moyirinak c'ut ri chajil rech ri nu tinimit
Isaiah56:11 E wijab tak tz'i' ri mawi jubik' quenojic
Isaiah56:12 Cäquibij: “Jo' jekatzucuj u wa'l uva xukuje' ja' ri cäk'abarisanic rech cujk'abaric. Je c'u cäkaban na chwek jas ri cäkaban camic
Isaiah57:1 Ri winak ri e tz'akatisanelab pa ronojel
Isaiah57:2 queboc c'u na chupam ri jamaril. Xquitakej c'u jun be jicom
Isaiah57:3 Chixkeb ulok ix ri ix ral ri itzinel
Isaiah57:4 ¿Jachin ri quitze'j u wäch? ¿Jachin che quiban wi i palaj re etzelam wächaj? ¿Jachin che quiwesaj wi iwak'? Ri ix ix ral ri macaj
Isaiah57:5 chquixe' tak ri bakit xukuje' chquixe' tak ri che ri e jewejak quebiban wi jastak ri e q'uixbal
Isaiah57:6 “Israel
Isaiah57:7 Puwi' jun nimalaj juyub ri nojinak che tak chäj xaya' wi ri a ch'at
Isaiah57:8 Chrij ri oquibal chupam ri awachoch xebaya' wi ri xibibalalaj tak a diosib. Man xinnata ta chi chawe
Isaiah57:9 Catxiq'uinic xatbe ruc' ri dios Melec xac'am bic aseit xukuje' jumulaj c'oc'al xebatak bic tako'nib sibalaj naj
Isaiah57:10 Xacos awib che qui banic q'ui binem
Isaiah57:11 ¿Jachin tak ri' ri diosib ri xana' awib chquiwäch xukuje' xaya' qui k'ij
Isaiah57:12 Quinwesaj c'u na u tzijol ri a c'aslemal
Isaiah57:13 Aretak carak a chi' che u tz'onoxic to'bal awib
Isaiah57:14 Cätataj c'u na u bixic: “Chisuc'umaj jun lianicalaj be
Isaiah57:15 Are' c'u ri Dios ri aj chicajil
Isaiah57:16 Man xak ta amak'el quintzujuj ri nu tinimit
Isaiah57:17 U mac rech ri u mac ri Israel xinoyowar na jun k'ijol
Isaiah57:18 Wilom ri u c'aslemal
Isaiah57:19 quinbij c'u na chque conojel: Jamaril chque ri e c'o naj
Isaiah57:20 Are c'u ri e lawalo tak winak xak e junam ruc' ri plo ri walijinak u wäch
Isaiah57:21 Chque ri e lawalo tak winak man c'o ta utzil.” Ri Dios are bininak.
Isaiah58:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Co charaka' a chi' maxe'j awib
Isaiah58:2 K'ij chk'ij quinquitzucuj
Isaiah58:3 cäquibij c'ut: ‘¿Jas u patan man cujwataj we ri Dios man cäril taj? ¿Jas u patan cäkacämisaj kib
Isaiah58:4 ri k'ij ri man cäban ta wa'im quiwoc'owisaj pa yacoj tak ch'o'j xukuje' yajoj tak ib
Isaiah58:5 ¿La are pa i c'u'x chi ri man u tijic ta wa'im ri cäkaj chnuwäch are ri u c'axc'obisaxic iwib
Isaiah58:6 Man are ta wa'. Ri man u tijic ta wa'im ri cäkaj chnuwäch in
Isaiah58:7 xukuje' chi caya' u wa ri cänumic
Isaiah58:8 We je caban wa'
Isaiah58:9 We c'u quinasiq'uij
Isaiah58:10 we caya' awib che u tzukic ri cänumic
Isaiah58:11 Ri in quinc'am na a be amak'el
Isaiah58:12 Ri a tinimit quebuban chi na qui banic ri ojer tak ja ri e wulijinak

Isaiah58:14 We je caban wa' cärik na quicotemal wuc' in
Isaiah59:1 Ri u cuinem ri Ajawaxel man tzajinak taj rech ma ta cäcuin chic cäcolonic
Isaiah59:2 Are c'u ri etzelal ri e i banom u walijisam jun k'atibal chixo'l ruc' ri Dios ri i mac u banom chi u ch'ukum ri u palaj chiwäch
Isaiah59:3 E tz'ajtajinak ri e i k'ab che quic'
Isaiah59:4 Man c'o ta jun cubij ta ri kastzij
Isaiah59:5 Quequijupulej qui sakmol tak sachoj
Isaiah59:6 Man queban ta atz'iak chque tak we qui quem äm ri' man c'o ta jun cacuinic caratz'iakij ta rib ruc' ri caquiquemo. Ronojel ri cäquibano re banoj c'ax: ri qui k'ab quechacun che quibanic tokinic.
Isaiah59:7 Ri cakan cäquicoj che u banic ri man utz taj
Isaiah59:8 Man queta'm ta ri be re ri jamaril
Isaiah59:9 Rumal ri' ri colotajic xnajtin chke
Isaiah59:10 Xak cujmakmat chuwäch jun tapia jacha' moyab
Isaiah59:11 Konojel cujjininic jacha' ri cäquiban ri os
Isaiah59:12 Ri uj sibalaj ka yacom oyowal la
Isaiah59:13 Uj uxinak man ch'abexic ta cäkaj xukuje' man uj ta jic chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah59:14 Ri suq'uil etzelam u wäch
Isaiah59:15 Ri man capayil taj man quil ta u wäch
Isaiah59:16 Xumay ri Ajawaxel aretak xrilo chi man c'o ta jachin cacunan wa; xucoj c'ut ri kas u cuinem
Isaiah59:17 Xuch'uk rib je ta ne xucoj ta jun to'bal uwo c'uxaj
Isaiah59:18 Ri Ajawaxel cuya' na chque ri chquijujunal ri takal chque; cuc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e u c'ulel. Jachin tak ri cäquetzelaj u wäch cuya' na chque ri takal chque xukuje' ne chque tak ri e jekel chquipam tak ri ulew ri e c'o chupam ri plo.
Isaiah59:19 Conojel ri winak cho ri uwächulew pa elebal k'ij c'ä che u kajebal k'ij
Isaiah59:20 Cäpe c'u na jacha' che u toronel ri Sion xukuje' chque ri e u k'ab tak rachalaxic ri Jacob ri cäquiya' can u banic ri mac. Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic.
Isaiah59:21 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “In quinban jun c'ulwächinic iwuc'
Isaiah60:1 Chatwalijok
Isaiah60:2 Ri k'ekumal cuch'uk ri uwächulew
Isaiah60:3 Ri nimak tak tinimit quepe na che rilic ri a chaj
Isaiah60:4 Chebawalijisaj ri a bak'wäch chatca'y pa tak a xcut: conojel cäquimulij quib quepe che awilic. Ri e awal alabom pune' naj e c'o wi quepe na
Isaiah60:5 Ri at
Isaiah60:6 Cäsutix c'u na awij cumal tinimit camey ri quepe pa Madian xukuje' pa Epa quepe na conojel ri aj Saba
Isaiah60:7 Conojel ri chij ri e c'o pa Sedar quebawechbej na ri ama'ib tak chij ri e c'o pa Nebaiot quek'ax na pa k'ab
Isaiah60:8 ¿E jachin tak wa' ri querapinic e jacha' ta ne sutz'
Isaiah60:9 E jucub ri e petinak junam
Isaiah60:10 Winak ri man e awinakil taj queyacow na ri e a tapia ri wulijinak

Isaiah60:12 E are tak c'ut ri ulew ri man catupatanij taj cäsachisax na qui wäch.

Isaiah60:14 Ri calc'ual ri xebanow c'ax chawe quepe na quel qui meja' na quib chawäch
Isaiah60:15 Man catwonobax ta chi canok etzelam ta a wäch xak ta c'u a tuquiel
Isaiah60:16 Ri nimak tak tinimit quequiya' na ri utzalaj tak qui k'obibal chawe
Isaiah60:17 Che u q'uexwäch k'an ch'ich' quinya' na k'an puak chawe
Isaiah60:18 Chupam ri a tinimit man cätataj ta chi na tininem re tokinic
Isaiah60:19 Man cajwataj ta chic ri u tun ri k'ij chawe pa k'ij
Isaiah60:20 Ri a k'ij mawi jumul cuc'u' rib mawi camayquen ri u chaj ri a ic'
Isaiah60:21 Conojel ri e awinakil quebux na tz'akatisanelab
Isaiah60:22 We ch'utinalaj jumuk' ri' cäq'uiyir na pa jun mil; we quieb oxib ri' quebux na jun nimalaj nimak tak tinimit. In ri' ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah61:1 Ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel c'o panuwi'
Isaiah61:2 che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj junab rech ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah61:3 che u ya'ic chque ri qui rikom c'ax ri e c'o pa Sion
Isaiah61:4 Caban chi na qui banic ri e k'e'l tak yojyobic
Isaiah61:5 Ri winak ri man e awinakil taj quecoj na che qui chajixic tak ri jumulaj
Isaiah61:6 Are c'u ri ix quixbinax na: cojol tabal tak tok'ob chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah61:7 Rumal c'u rech chi ri nu tinimit u rikom c'ax cacamulim resaxic u q'uixbal xukuje' tzurum
Isaiah61:8 Rumal c'u rech chi ri Ajawaxel culok'oj ri suq'uilal
Isaiah61:9 Ri e u k'ab tak cachalaxic quebux na nimak qui k'ij chquixo'l ri nimak tak tinimit conojel ri queilowic caquich'ob na chi e jun tinimit ri e tewichim rumal ri Ajawaxel.

Isaiah63:10 Ri e are c'ut xquiyac quib chrij ri Ajawaxel

Isaiah64:3 Aretak xeban la xibibalalaj tak jastak ri man e keye'm taj

Isaiah64:5 Ri lal cäc'amowaj la ri cuban ri colomal ruc' quicotemal

Isaiah65:1 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Xinya' wib pa rikic chque ri man quinquitatabej taj; xinya' wib pa rikic chque ri man quinquitzucuj taj. Jun tinimit ri man in u natam taj
Isaiah65:2 Ronojel k'ij xebenlic' ri nu k'ab che u c'ulaxic jun tinimit ri man tal ta tzij
Isaiah65:3 jun tinimit ri cämacun kas chinupalaj amak'el quebuya' tabal tok'ob chquiwäch ri diosib ri e c'o pa tak ri ticbal cotz'i'j
Isaiah65:4 ri cät'uyi xo'l tak ri mukubal
Isaiah65:5 Je caquibij wa': ‘Chatcanaj chi' minako sibalaj in tastalic man ya'tal ta quinachapo.’ We winak ri' xak e junam ruc' ri k'ak' ri cänicow ronojel ri jun k'ij c'ax cäquiban chwe
Isaiah65:6 Ronojel c'u wa' tz'ibatal chnuwäch
Isaiah65:7 tojbal rech ri qui il patan jacha' xukuje' chque ri quech ri e qui mam. We winak ri' xquiporoj c'oc' tak puwi' tak ri juyub

Isaiah65:9 Quinban na chi queq'uiyir ri ralc'ual ri Jacob xukuje' chi quec'oji' na winak pa Juda ri quejeki' pa tak ri nu c'ache'laj. Ri e cha'tal wumal e are quebechben na ri ulew
Isaiah65:10 Ri beya' re Saron canoj na chque tak chij
Isaiah65:11 Are c'u ri ix ri quitas iwib chrij ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah65:12 itzel c'aslemal quixeyenic: quinya' na be chi quixcämisax ruc' ch'ich' re ch'o'j. Rumal rech chi xixinsiq'uij man xixniman ta c'ut xixinch'abej man xinitatabej ta c'ut xiban ri man xkaj ta chnuwäch
Isaiah65:13 Rumal ri' cubij ri Ajawaxel: “Ri e pataninelab tak wech c'o na cäquitijo
Isaiah65:14 ri e are quebixon na ruc' jajatem rumal ri quicotemal ri c'o pa canima'
Isaiah65:15 Ri e cha'tal wumal quequicoj na ri e i bi' che c'okonic xukuje' che u rayixic cämical paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic
Isaiah65:16 Apachin ta ne ri c'o pa ri ulew ri cutz'onoj jun tewichibal
Isaiah65:17 Chiwilampe'
Isaiah65:18 Nimalaj chixquicotok
Isaiah65:19 Kas in quinjajat na rumal ri Jerusalen
Isaiah65:20 Chila' man e c'o ta ac'alab ri quecäm taj ri xa' ta e re quieb oxib u k'ij
Isaiah65:21 Ri winak cäquiyac na cachoch quec'oji' c'u na chupam
Isaiah65:22 Man cäc'ulmataj ta na wa' chi jun winak cuyac jun ja jun ta chi c'u wi ri cäc'oji' chupam
Isaiah65:23 Man xak ta lok' quechacun na mawi quec'oji' ta calc'ual ri quecämic c'ä maja' cätz'akat qui k'ij. Rumal rech chi e u k'ab tak cachalaxic ri e u tewichi'm ri Ajawaxel

Isaiah66:1 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: “Ri caj are nu tem re ajawibal are c'u ri ulew are qui tac'alibal ri wakan. ¿Jawije' ta lo ri caban ta wi cuinem che u yaquic jun ja chwe? ¿Jawije' ta lo ri caban ta wi cuinem che u banic jun c'olbal chwe che wuxlanibal?
Isaiah66:2 Kas in xebenban conojel we jastak ri'
Isaiah66:3 E c'o c'u jujun ri cäquipil jun ama' wacax
Isaiah66:4 In xukuje' quincha' na ri rikoj c'ax chque
Isaiah66:5 Chitatabej ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel
Isaiah66:6 Ri wululem ri cätataj pa ri tinimit
Isaiah66:7 Ri Sion xa' pa jok'otaj xralaj jun ral
Isaiah66:8 ¿Jachin ta towinak u tzijol jun jasach junam ta ruc' wa'? ¿Jachin ta ilowinak jun jasach ri junam ta ruc' wa'? ¿La calax ta lo jun nim tinimit xa ta pa jun k'ij? ¿La calax ta lo jun tinimit xa ta pa jok'otaj? Aretak c'u ri Sion xuchaplej u na'ic ri k'oxom

Isaiah66:10 “Chixjajat ruc' ri Jerusalen
Isaiah66:11 ri are
Isaiah66:12 In c'ut

Isaiah66:16 Je

Jeremiah1:1 Tzij xukuje' e u banoj tak ri Jeremiy
Jeremiah1:2 Ri Ajawaxel xtzijon ruc' ri Jeremiy aretak ri Josiy
Jeremiah1:3 Xukuje' xtzijon ruc' pa ri k'ijol aretak ri Joasim
Jeremiah1:4 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Jeremiah1:5 “C'ä majok chyok ri a c'aslemal
Jeremiah1:6 In xintzelej u bixic: “¡Ay
Jeremiah1:7 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Mabij chi sibalaj c'ä at c'ojol. At catbe na jawije' ri catintak wi
Jeremiah1:8 Maxe'j awib chuwäch apachin jun
Jeremiah1:9 Xuyuk c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri u k'ab
Jeremiah1:10 “In quebenya' na ri e nu tzij chachi'. Camic quinya' tz'akatalaj takanic pa a k'ab paquiwi' ajawibal xukuje' nimak tak tinimit
Jeremiah1:11 Ri Ajawaxel xpe chi nu suq'uil xubij chwe: “Jeremiy
Jeremiah1:12 “Utz ri awilom
Jeremiah1:13 Ri Ajawaxel xpe chi nu suq'uil chu camul: “¿Jas ri cawilo?” xcha' chwe. “Quinwil jun t'uy carokowic
Jeremiah1:14 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel chwe: “Kas pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij catixtob wi ulok ri nimalaj c'axc'ol paquiwi' conojel ri winak re we ulew ri'.
Jeremiah1:15 In
Jeremiah1:16 Are c'äjisabal wächaj wa' ri quinya' u bixic chi cäpe na paquiwi' we ajmaquib ri' ri in quixutum
Jeremiah1:17 Are c'u ri at chc'ol a chuk'ab; Jät jabij c'u chque ronojel ri catintak wi. Maxe'j awib chquiwäch
Jeremiah1:18 In catincoj camic jacha' jun tinimit ri e c'o nim tapia chrij
Jeremiah1:19 Ri e are' quech'ojin na awuc'
Jeremiah2:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Jeremiah2:2 “Jät jatzijobej ri tinimit Jerusalen; charaka' a chi' rech utz u tatabexic cäquibano: ‘¡Jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel! Cänataj chwe chi aretak c'ä at ac'al
Jeremiah2:3 Ri Israel u jachom rib che nu nimaxic
Jeremiah2:4 Rija'lil tak ri Jacob
Jeremiah2:5 Ri Ajawaxel cubij chiwe: “¿Jas ri lawaloyil xquirik ri e i mam pa ri in chi xenajtin chwe? Xebe chquij tak diosib ri man c'o ta qui patan
Jeremiah2:6 Man xeboc ta il che nu tzucuxic
Jeremiah2:7 Ri in xixinc'am ulok pa we ulew ri' ri wächinel
Jeremiah2:8 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob man xinquitzucuj taj
Jeremiah2:9 “Rumal ri'
Jeremiah2:10 Jix jawije' e c'o wi ri ch'akatak tak ulew chupam ri plo pa ri mox k'ab chixca'y c'ut; chitaka' bic jachin jun pa Sedar kas utz u ca'yexic chubana'
Jeremiah2:11 chi jun nim tinimit ri e k'ijilal ta diosib
Jeremiah2:12 ¡Chaxibij awib
Jeremiah2:13 Ri nu tinimit quieb u wäch ri mac u banom: in u q'uiakom canok in
Jeremiah2:14 “Ri Israel man jun lok'om pataninel taj; ri are' man xalax taj jacha' jun lok'om pataninel. ¿Jas c'u che catolobaxic?
Jeremiah2:15 ¿Jas c'u che caquiban c'ax che e jacha' ta ne e coj
Jeremiah2:16 Ri winak re Memps xukuje' re Tapnes xquipaxij ri a jolom.
Jeremiah2:17 Je a c'ulmam wa' rumal rech chi xinaq'uiak canok ri in
Jeremiah2:18 Are c'u ri camic
Jeremiah2:19 Ri kas awetzelal cac'äjisan na a wäch
Jeremiah2:20 “Kas ojer ulok in a c'ulelam ulok

Jeremiah19:4 Rumal rech chi ri aj israelib xinquitzak canok xquijalwächij c'ut we c'olbal ri' pa jun ulew chic; chupam xquichi'j wi c'oc' k'ol chque tak ri e jule' diosib
Jeremiah19:5 Quequiyac c'u ne xukuje' tak porobal che qui poroxic tak ri e qui c'ojol chetabal tok'ob ri cächajirisaxic che ri Baal
Jeremiah19:6 Rumal ri' quepe na k'ij chi we c'olbal ri' man cäbinax ta chic Topet che mawi Beya' re Ben-inom
Jeremiah19:7 Chupam we c'olbal ri' quinban na ch'akatak che ri u chomam u banic ri Juda xukuje' ri Jerusalen. Quinban na chi ri e qui c'ulel quech'äcan na paquiwi' quequicämisaj c'ut
Jeremiah19:8 Quinban na che we tinimit ri' chi cux jun chaki'j uwo sak
Jeremiah19:9 Quinban na chi ri winak quequitij ri qui c'ojol xukuje' tak ri qui mia'l
Jeremiah19:10 Aretak cabitaj wa'
Jeremiah19:11 chabij c'u chque: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem je cubij wa': Quinban na ch'akatak chque we winak ri' xukuje' che we tinimit ri' jacha' ri jachin cuban ch'akatak che jun k'ebal re t'ac
Jeremiah19:12 Je quenbana' wa' che we tinimit ri' xukuje' chque we winak ri' ri e c'o chupam. Junam quenbana' che jas u c'ulmam ri Topet. In
Jeremiah19:13 Ri ja tak re Jerusalen
Jeremiah19:14 Bantajinak chi c'u wa'
Jeremiah19:15 “Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Jeremiah20:1 Aretak ri Pasur
Jeremiah20:2 xuya' takanic chi ch'ayok chcoj c'u chupam ri cojbal akanaj ri c'o chuchi' ri Oquibal ri c'o Chicaj aj Benjamin ri cabe pa ri rachoch Dios.
Jeremiah20:3 Chucab k'ij xtakanic chi chesax ri Jeremiy chupam ri cojobal akanaj
Jeremiah20:4 Ri Ajawaxel je cubix wa': ‘Catin jalwächij pa xibriquil chawe chbil awib xukuje' chque conojel ri awachil awib cuc'; chquiwäch ri e a bak'wäch
Jeremiah20:5 Quebenjacha' na xukuje' pa qui k'ab ri c'ulel ri jastak ri pakapoj cajil
Jeremiah20:6 Are' c'u ri at
Jeremiah20:7 Ajawaxel ri lal xinsub la
Jeremiah20:8 Amak'el aretak quinch'awic are quinya' u bixic tokinic xukuje' sachoj wächaj; amak'el cäquitze'j nu wäch xukuje' cäquetz'bej c'u nu wäch rumal rech chi quinya' u bixic ri tzij la.
Jeremiah20:9 We quinbij: “Man quinchoman ta chic che ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah20:10 Quincuinic quintatabej ri qui jasjatem ri winak: “¡C'o xibriquil pa ronojel c'olbal!” Caquibij: “¡Tisaj jo' che u tzujuxic!” Xukuje' ne ri wachil wib cuc' queyem chi quinkaj pa jun c'ambejebal. Je caquibij wa': “Cäraj ne cuya' rib pa subutajem; cäkaj c'u na pa ka k'ab cakaya' c'u na ri rajil u c'axelal che.”
Jeremiah20:11 Are c'u ri lal
Jeremiah20:12 Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Jeremiah20:13 ¡Chixbixon che ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah20:14 ¡C'okotajinak ri k'ij ri xinalaxic! ¡Chi ri k'ij ri xinalax rumal ri nu nan ma ta tewichitalic!
Jeremiah20:15 ¡C'okotajinak ri xquicotisan ri nu tat ruc' ri tzijol ri xya' che chi alatajinak jun u c'ojol ala!
Jeremiah20:16 ¡Chi we winak ri' chuxok jacha' ri tinimit tak ri kas xa' jumul xsachisax u wäch rumal ri Dios! ¡Chi pa ri u sakaric chebutatabej rakoj tak chi'aj re c'axc'olil. Wululem c'ut re ch'o'j pa tiq'uil k'ij
Jeremiah20:17 are c'u ri Dios man xuban ta chwe chi xincäm ta pa ri u c'u'x ri nu nan! Jeri' ri are' are ta xux ri xinmuk wi are c'u ri in ma ta jubik' ri' xinalaxic.
Jeremiah20:18 ¿Jasche xinel ulok pa ri c'uxaj xak xuwi che rilic k'oxomal xukuje' elem tak ch'ujilal
Jeremiah21:1 Ri ajawinel Sedequiy xutak bic ri Pasur

Jeremiah21:6 Quebencämisaj na conojel ri winak ri e c'o chupam we tinimit ri'; winak xukuje' awaj quecäm na rumal jun xibibalalaj cämisanelalaj yabil.

Jeremiah22:1 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Jät pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel chaya' c'u u bixic we tzijol ri'

Jeremiah22:3 Chibana' ri suq'uilal chupam we c'olbal ri' xukuje' ri colomal
Jeremiah22:4 We kas qui ban wa' ri quixintak che u banic
Jeremiah22:5 We c'u ne man caquiya' qui xiquin chque tak we pixbenic ri'

Jeremiah22:7 Quebentak ulok winak chawij ri e cuc'am ulok tak qui ch'ojibal
Jeremiah22:8 Winak quech nimak tak tinimit queboc'ow na chunakaj we tinimit ri'

Jeremiah22:10 Miwok'ej ri ajawinel Josiy
Jeremiah22:11

Jeremiah22:13 “¡Tok'ob a wäch

Jeremiah22:15 ¿La are puch pa a c'u'x chi ri rajawinic jun ajawinel are ta ri c'olem chupam chacalte'? Ri a tat xquicot pa ri c'aslemal; are c'u xuban ri suq'uilal xukuje' ri colomal
Jeremiah22:16 Xuto' qui wi' ri mebayib xukuje' ri man cacuintaj cuto' rib
Jeremiah22:17 Are c'u ri at xuwi catoc il che qui rikic tak ri ch'äcoj cumal tak eläk'anic; quebajach ri man c'o ta qui mac pa cämisaxic
Jeremiah22:18 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa' che ri cuc'ulmaj na ri Joasim
Jeremiah22:19 Cämuk na jacha' jun bur: cäjururex bic queq'uiak canok chrij ri Jerusalen.”
Jeremiah22:20 “¡Juda chatpakal puwi' ri juyub Libano charaka' c'u a chi'! ¡Chawalijisaj ri a ch'abal chque tak ri c'ache'laj re Basan! ¡Charaka' a chi' kas paquiwi' tak ri juyub re Abarim

Jeremiah23:1 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ajyuk'ab ri xak queca'yic cäsach qui wäch tak ri e nu chij xukuje' xak c'u caquijabula' tak quib!”
Jeremiah23:2 Ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah23:3 Kas in c'ut quebenc'am na ulok tak ri e nu chij ri e to'tajinak pa tak ri ulew ri xinban wi chque chi xebanimaj wi bic
Jeremiah23:4 Quebencoj c'u na ajyuk'ab ri quechajinic
Jeremiah23:5 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Cäpe na jun k'ij aretak quinban na chi ri David cac'oji' na jun kas rija'lil
Jeremiah23:6 Pa tak ri u k'ijol
Jeremiah23:7 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Quepe tak na ri k'ij aretak man cäquiban ta chic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Jeremiah23:8 xane' queban na chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Jeremiah23:9 Tzijol ri cäya' u bixic chquij ri e k'axal tzij: kas sibalaj in sachinak; ronojel ri nu cuerp cabirbitic
Jeremiah23:10 Ri ulew nojinak chque tak winak ri xekaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic
Jeremiah23:11 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Xukuje' c'u ne tak ri e k'axal tak tzij xukuje' tak ri e cojol tabal tok'ob man e nimanelab taj; kas chupam ri wachoch e nu rikom wi caquiban ri etzelal.
Jeremiah23:12 Rumal ri' ri qui be cux na k'ekumalil xukuje' cajililic: in quinban na chi quech'iquimixic chetzak c'ut. Aretak chebenban ajilanic cuc'
Jeremiah23:13 In e wilom ri e k'axal tzij pa Samar quequiban tak jastak ri quinquic'axc'obisaj: quik'axen tzij pa u bi' ri Baal qui banom c'ut chi ri nu tinimit Israel u jech'obisam rib.
Jeremiah23:14 In e wilom ri e k'axal tzij pa Jerusalen quequiban xibibalalaj tak jastak: quekaj pa mac ruc' jun winak chic xukuje' t'orinic
Jeremiah23:15 Rumal ri' in
Jeremiah23:16 Cächa ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: “Aj israelib
Jeremiah23:17 Quecha' chque ri caquetzelaj u wäch ri nu tzij ‘Ronojel utz quel na chiwäch.’ Chque tak c'ut ri qui takem ri tacalaj u rayinic ri canima'
Jeremiah23:18 ¿Jachin ta quec'oxoman ri e awatalic ri e c'o ruc' ri Ajawaxel?
Jeremiah23:19 Ri royowal ri Ajawaxel jacha' jun salc'um
Jeremiah23:20 Ri royowal ri Ajawaxel man cätani' ta na c'ä quebuban tak na ri jastak ri e u chomam qui banic. Cäpe na ri k'ijol aretak ri ix quixchoman na quebich'ob c'u na we jastak ri'.
Jeremiah23:21 “In man xebentak ta bic tak we e k'axal tzij ri'
Jeremiah23:22 We ta xequetamaj tak ri jastak ri e c'utal wuc'
Jeremiah23:23 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Naj o nakaj
Jeremiah23:24 ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäcuinic cuc'u' ta rib chquiwäch ri nu bak'wäch? Ruc' ri nu wächbalil quinnojisaj ri caj xukuje' ri ulew. In ri Ajawaxel quinjiquiba' u bixic.
Jeremiah23:25 Ri in nu tom ri xquibij tak we e k'axal tak tzij
Jeremiah23:26 ¿C'ä jampa' lo we e k'axal tak tzij ri' caquitakej na quibixic subunic ri xak pa qui jolom queq'uic tak wi?
Jeremiah23:27 Cuc' tak ri quichic' ri quequitzijola' tak chquixo'l
Jeremiah23:28 ¡We jun k'axal tzij c'o jun richic'
Jeremiah23:29 
Jeremiah23:30 Rumal ri' quink'alajisaj wib chi quebenc'ulelaj we e k'axal tak tzij ri' ri quequelek'ela' tak ri e nu tzij chquixo'l. In ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah23:31 Quink'alajisaj wib chi quebenc'ulelaj tak we e k'axal tak tzij ri' ri caquibano chi in in yowinak qui bixic subunic ri xak e are' quebinic.
Jeremiah23:32 Quink'alajisaj wib chi quebenc'ulelaj we e k'axal tak tzij ri' ri quequitzijoj tak ichic' ri xa' e re banoj tak tzij; ri cuc' tak ri qui banoj tak tzij xukuje' tak ri qui no'j quequibano chi ri nu tinimit caquijech'obisaj ri qui be. In man e nu takom ta bic mawi c'o ta jun takanic nu yo'm ta chque
Jeremiah23:33 “Jeremiy
Jeremiah23:34 We c'u jun k'axal tzij o jun cojol tabal tok'ob o jun winak re ri tinimit cubij re we tzij ri' ‘u chilibenic ri Ajawaxel’
Jeremiah23:35 Aretak jun cuc'ot u chi' jun achil
Jeremiah23:36 Mucoj chi c'ut ri tzij ‘u chilibenic ri Ajawaxel’

Jeremiah23:40 Amak'el c'ut quinc'am ulok piwi' ix mach'isabal ib xukuje' q'uixbal ri mawi ta ne jubik' quesach ta pa i jolom.’ ”

Jeremiah25:11 Ronojel we ulew ri' cäyojyobisax na canok xukuje' cäq'uextaj na pa etzeletajic. We nimak tak tinimit ri' oxc'al lajuj junab (70) quec'oji' na chuxe' ri u takanic ri ajawinel re Babilon.
Jeremiah25:12 Aretak c'u chetz'akat ri oxc'al lajuj (70) junab
Jeremiah25:13 Quinkasaj na puwi' we ulew ri' ronojel ri nu yo'm u bixic tz'ibatal c'u chupam we wuj ri': ronojel ri c'ax ri u bim ri Jeremiy pa ri nu bi' ri cäpe na paquiwi' we nimak tak tinimit ri'.
Jeremiah25:14 Nimak tak tinimit xukuje' tak ajawinelab ri c'o sibalaj qui cuinem quech'äcan na paquiwi' xukuje'. Je rajil ri qui q'uexelal ri qui banoj wa' ri takalic ri quinya' na chque.’ ”

Jeremiah25:29 Quinchaplej c'u na qui takic tak ulok ri c'äjisabal tak wächaj ri quinya' na puwi' ri tinimit ri tastal chwe. ¿La are ta c'u pa i c'u'x ix chi ma ta qui kajbej na ri c'äjisabal wächaj? Kas c'u qui kajbej wi na

Jeremiah26:7 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob

Jeremiah27:4 Chaya' takanic chque chi chiquibij chque ri e qui nimakil chi ri in

Jeremiah27:9 Rumal ri'

Jeremiah27:11 Are c'u ri nim tinimit
Jeremiah27:12 In

Jeremiah36:5 Xebuya' c'ut ri Jeremiy we pixbenic ri' che ri Baruc: “Chawila' ri nu c'ulmam cuk'atij ri nu benam chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel.
Jeremiah36:6 Rumal ri'
Jeremiah36:7 Caraj ne caquiban bochi'nic che ri Ajawaxel quequiya' ta c'u can conojel ri itzel tak qui nak'atisabal
Jeremiah36:8 Ri Baruc xuban ronojel ri xtak che u banic rumal ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij: xbe pa ri rachoch Dios xusiq'uij c'ut ri botobic wuj ri c'o wi ri u bim ri Ajawaxel.
Jeremiah36:9 Pa ri ubelej ic' re ri uro' junab ri rajawinic ri Joasim
Jeremiah36:10 Ri Baruc xbe chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja rech ri rachoch ri Dios
Jeremiah36:11 Ri Micaiy
Jeremiah36:12 xbe c'u pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel
Jeremiah36:13 Ri Micaiy xutzijoj ronojel ri xuto aretak ri Baruc xusiq'uij ri botobic wuj chuwäch ri tinimit.
Jeremiah36:14 Ri e c'o nimak tak quekle'n xquitak u bixic che ri Jehudi
Jeremiah36:15 ri e are xquibij c'u che: “Chatt'uyulok chasiq'uij c'ut ri botobic wuj chkawäch.” Ri Baruc xusiq'uij chquiwäch
Jeremiah36:16 xuwi c'u xtataj cumal
Jeremiah36:17 C'äte c'u ri' xquibij che ri Baruc: “Chabij chke jas xaban che u tz'ibaxic ronojel wa'.”
Jeremiah36:18 Ri Baruc xutzelej u bixic: “Ri Jeremiy kas are' xbin chwe ronojel
Jeremiah36:19 Xquibij c'u che ri Baruc: “¡Are c'u ri at xukuje' ri Jeremiy jix jic'u' iwib
Jeremiah36:20 Ri nimak tak quekle'n xquiya' can ri botobic wuj chupam ri alaj rachoch ri Elisam
Jeremiah36:21 Ri ajawinel xutak ri Jehudi che u c'amic ulok ri botobic wuj pa ri alaj rachoch ri Elisam ri tz'ibal tzijol
Jeremiah36:22 Rumal c'u rech chi are ri ubelej ic'
Jeremiah36:23 Xuwi c'u quesiq'uitaj oxib o quiejeb ch'akatak rumal ri Jehudi ri ajawinel quebuk'at ruc' jun cuchilo quebuq'uiak pa ri u k'ak'al ri rachak k'ak'. Je xutakej u banic c'ä xuporoj na ronojel ri botobic wuj.
Jeremiah36:24 Mawi ri ajawinel mawi ri e rach k'atal tak tzij ri nimak qui k'ij ri xquitatabej ronojel ri xya' u siq'uixic
Jeremiah36:25 Ri Elnatan
Jeremiah36:26 Xane' xutak ri Jerameel
Jeremiah36:27 Aretak ri ajawinel u porom chic ri botobic wuj ri e c'o wi ri e u tzij ri Jeremiy ri xubij che ri Baruc chi chebutz'ibaj
Jeremiah36:28 “Chac'ama' chi jun botobic wuj chatz'ibaj chi chupam ronojel ri xtz'ibax chupam ri nabe
Jeremiah36:29 Chabij c'u wa' che: ‘Je' wa' cubij ri Ajawaxel a Dios: At xaporoj ri botobic wuj xukuje' xayaj ri Jeremiy rumal rech chi xutz'ibaj chupam chi man c'o ta queblan c'uxaj cäpe na ri ajawinel re Babilon che u sachisaxic u wäch ri ulew chi man e c'o ta winak quebuya' ta can chupam mawi ta ne awaj.
Jeremiah36:30 Rumal c'u ri'
Jeremiah36:31 are c'u ri at xukuje' ri e awija'lil junam xukuje' ri e a wäch k'atal tak tzij
Jeremiah36:32 Ri Jeremiy xuc'am chi c'ut jun botobic wuj ri xuya' che ri Baruc
Jeremiah37:1 Ri Nabucodonosor
Jeremiah37:2 Mawi c'u ne ri Sedequiy mawi ri e rach k'atal tak tzij mawi ri tinimit xeniman ta che ri tzij ri u yo'm u bixic ri Ajawaxel chque rumal ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij.
Jeremiah37:3 Ri ajawinel Sedequiy xutak bic ri Jucal
Jeremiah37:4 C'ä majok c'u chcoj ri Jeremiy pa che'
Jeremiah37:5 E elinak chi c'u ulok ri rajch'ojab ri paraon
Jeremiah37:6 Ri Ajawaxel c'ut xutzijobej ri Jeremiy
Jeremiah37:7 “Chibij che ri rajawinel ri Juda
Jeremiah37:8 Ri aj caldeyib quetzelej chi na ulok che u banic ch'o'j ruc' ri tinimit Jerusalen
Jeremiah37:9 In
Jeremiah37:10 Pune' ta c'u ne ri ix quixcuin ta che qui ch'äquic conojel ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib ri cätajin quech'ojin iwuc' man c'o ta chi c'u ri queto'taj ta chi can chque xane' jujun achijab ri e socotajinak ri e canajinak canok ri e c'o chupam ri kajebal
Jeremiah37:11 Aretak ri cajch'ojab ri aj caldeyib cätajin quetzelej chquij caquiya' c'u can ri Jerusalen
Jeremiah37:12 ri Jeremiy xel bic pa ri tinimit che u bic pa ri rulew ri Benjamin che u cojic c'u ri u k'ij che u jachic jun echbal chquixo'l ri e u winakil.
Jeremiah37:13 Aretak c'u xopan chuchi' ri Oquibal aj Benjamin
Jeremiah37:14 Ri Jeremiy xutzelej u bixic: “¡Man kastzij taj
Jeremiah37:15 Wa' xquiban coyowal che ri Jeremiy
Jeremiah37:16 Ri Jeremiy xetac'al c'ä chupam ri c'axalaj u pa che' ri c'o chuxe' ri ja ri xbeytaj wi q'ui k'ijol.
Jeremiah37:17 Ri ajawinel Sedequiy xuya' takanic chi chc'am bic ri Jeremiy chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel

Jeremiah37:19 ¿Jawije' e c'o wi ri' ri e k'axal tzij ri xquijiquiba' u bixic chi ri ajawinel re Babilon man cuban ta na c'ax che la
Jeremiah37:20 Tatabej ba la ri quinbij che la wajawinel
Jeremiah37:21 Are c'u ri ajawinel Sedequiy xuya' takanic chi chtz'apix ri Jeremiy cho ri ja ri e c'o wi ri chajinelab chi ronojel c'u k'ij chc'am ulok jun u caxlanwa re pa be ri caquiban ri banal tak wa je c'u xtakex u banic wa' c'ä xq'uis na ri caxlanwa ri c'o chupam ri tinimit. Je c'u wa' ri u canajic ri Jeremiy cho ri ja ri e c'o wi ri chajinelab.
Jeremiah38:1 Ri Sepatiy
Jeremiah38:2 “Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': ‘Ri cacanaj chupam ri nimalaj tinimit cäcäm na pa ri ch'o'j o rumal wi'jal o rumal cämisanel yabilal. Are c'u ri quebel bic cujach c'u rib pa qui k'ab ri aj caldeyib
Jeremiah38:3 Jewa' cubij ri Ajawaxel: ‘We tinimit ri' cäkaj na pa qui k'ab ri e rajch'ojab ri rajawinel ri Babilon. Ri are' cumajij na
Jeremiah38:4 E are' tak c'ut ri c'o nimak tak quekle'n xquibij che ri ajawinel: “Rajawaxic u cämisaxic we achi ri'
Jeremiah38:5 Ri ajawinel Sedequiy xutzelej u bixic chque: “Utz ri'
Jeremiah38:6 We winak ri' xquichap ri Jeremiy xquiya' chupam ri u c'ua' ri Malquiy
Jeremiah38:7 Jun aj Etiopiy Ebed-melec u bi' ri nim u k'ij chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel

Jeremiah38:9 “Wajaw ajawinel

Jeremiah38:11 Ri Ebed-melec xebuc'am bic ri achijab
Jeremiah38:12 xubij c'u che: “Chebacojo' tak we atz'iak ri' pa tak a toloc'
Jeremiah38:13 Xequijic' c'ut ri achijab ri colob xquesaj c'u ulok chila'. Xuwi c'u xesetaj ulok
Jeremiah38:14 Ri ajawinel Sedequiy xtakanic chi chc'am bic ri Jeremiy

Jeremiah38:16 Chic'uyal c'ut ri ajawinel Sedequiy xuban jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na che ri Jeremiy: “Quinban na ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na rumal ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah38:17 Xubij c'ut ri Jeremiy che ri Sedequiy: “Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Jeremiah38:18 We c'u man cäjach ib la pa qui k'ab ri aj caldeyib cäk'ax na ri tinimit pa qui k'ab caquit'ik c'u na k'ak' che
Jeremiah38:19 Ri Sedequiy xutzelej na u bixic che: “Quinxe'j wib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib ri e k'axenak cuc' ri aj caldeyib; we quinekaj pa qui k'ab wa'
Jeremiah38:20 Ri Jeremiy xutzelej u bixic che: “Man cäkaj ta na la pa qui k'ab wa'. Bana' la jun tok'ob nimaj la
Jeremiah38:21 Ri Ajawaxel u c'utum chnuwäch ri cac'ulmataj na
Jeremiah38:22 Conojel ri ixokib ri quecanaj chupam ri rachoch ri ajawinel re Juda quebesax na ulok quejach c'u na pa qui k'ab ri e qui nimal tak rajch'ojab ri ajawinel re Babilon
Jeremiah38:23 Ri Jeremiy xutakej u bixic che ri ajawinel: “Conojel ri ixokib xukuje' tak ri e c'ojol la quejach na pa qui k'ab ri aj caldeyib
Jeremiah38:24 Xutzelej c'ut u bixic ri Sedequiy che ri Jeremiy: “We catok'obisaj u wäch ri a c'aslemal
Jeremiah38:25 We ri e c'o nimak tak quekle'n caquetamaj wa' chi in tzijoninak awuc'
Jeremiah38:26 Are c'u ri at
Jeremiah38:27 Kas c'u je xelic. Conojel ri e c'o nimak tak quekle'n xebe che rilic ri Jeremiy xequiban c'u c'otoj tak chi'aj che
Jeremiah38:28 Xcanaj c'u can ri Jeremiy chuwäch ri uwo ja ri e c'o wi ri chajinelab c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xch'äc ri Jerusalen.
Jeremiah39:1 Pa ri ulajuj ic' re ri ubelej junab ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy pa Juda

Jeremiah39:3 conojel c'ut ri e qui nimal tak ri e rajch'ojab ri ajawinel re Babilon xeboquic xquijekeba' c'u quib chuchi' ri oquibal ri c'o pa niq'uiajil. E are' ri Nergal-sarezer
Jeremiah39:4 Aretak ri ajawinel Sedequiy xukuje' tak ri e rajch'ojab xquil ri cätajin cäc'ulmatajic
Jeremiah39:5 Xebokatax c'ut cumal ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib
Jeremiah39:6

Jeremiah40:1 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Jeremiy
