Jeremiah40:3 are c'u ri camic u tz'akatisam ri cojoj xi'b ri xubano. Ri ix je xic'ulmaj wa' rumal rech chi xixmacun chuwäch ri Ajawaxel man c'u xixniman ta che.
Jeremiah40:4 Ampe'
Jeremiah40:5 We c'u cawaj cattzelejic
Jeremiah40:6 Ri Jeremiy xbe ruc' ri Jedaliy pa Mizpa
Jeremiah40:7 Conojel c'ut ri e qui nimakil ri ajch'ojab xukuje' ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o cuc' ri qui jabum tak quib pa tak ri juyub aretak xquetamaj chi ri ajawinel re Babilon are xucoj can ri Jedaliy ri u c'ojol ri Ahicam che k'atal tzij puwi' ri ulew
Jeremiah40:8 xebe pa Mizpa xequic'am bic ri winak ri e c'o cuc'
Jeremiah40:9 Ri Jedaliy xujiquiba' u bixic chque ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na chque: “Mixe'j iwib che u cojic iwib chuxe' ri qui takanic ri aj caldeyib. Chixcanaj c'u can che jekelem chupam ri ulew
Jeremiah40:10 In quincanaj canok pa Mizpa
Jeremiah40:11 Xukuje' ri aj judeyib ri e c'o pa Moab
Jeremiah40:12 Conojel c'ut ri aj judeyib ri qui jabum tak quib pa jalan tak c'olbal xetzelej pa Juda xebe qui tac'aba' tak quib chuwäch ri Jedaliy pa Mizpa. Xukuje' ri e are' xequic'olo' u wa'l uva xukuje' ri qui wächinic tak ri ulew pa nimak tak mulaj.
Jeremiah40:13 Ri Joanan
Jeremiah40:14 xquibij c'u che: “¿La ma ta aweta'm chi ri ajawinel Baalis aj Amon u takom ulok ri Ismael
Jeremiah40:15 Xubij c'ut ri Joanan che ri Jedaliy chic'uyal: “Chaya' chwe chi quinbe che u cämisaxic ri Ismael. Ri man c'o ta jun chetamanok jachin xbanowic. ¿Jas ta c'u che cakaya' che chi catucämisaj? Wa' cuc'am ulok ri u tuquixic quib ri aj judeyib ri qui mulin quib awuc'
Jeremiah40:16 Xutzelej c'ut u bixic ri Jedaliy che: “¡Mabano! Ri cak'abaj chrij ri Ismael man kas ta tzij.”
Jeremiah41:1 Chupam ri uwuk ic'

Jeremiah41:14 xetzelej chquij che u junaxic quib ruc' ri Joanan.

Jeremiah44:5 Are c'u ri ix man xininimaj taj mawi xiya' ta i xiquin chwe ri xinbij chiwe. Che u q'uexwäch ri xitanaba' ta can u banic ri iwetzelal xitakej qui chi'xic c'oc' k'ol chque jule' tak diosib.
Jeremiah44:6 Xnicow c'ut ri woyowal xukuje' ri nu c'anal
Jeremiah44:7 Je ba' ri'

Jeremiah44:15 E are' tak c'ut
Jeremiah44:16 “Man catkatatabej taj che ri cabij chke pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel.
Jeremiah44:17 Je c'u ri'
Jeremiah44:18 kas aretak c'ut xkatanaba' u chi'xic c'oc' k'ol xukuje' tak sipanic re u wa'l uva che ri Ajawinel Ixok re ri Caj
Jeremiah44:19 Ri ixokib xquitik u bixic: “Ri uj quekaban can lej nabe ri quequiq'uexwächij ri Ajawinel Ixok re ri Caj

Jeremiah44:21 “¿La are c'u pa i c'u'x chi ri Ajawaxel man cäretamaj taj

Jeremiah44:28 Xak e ajilatalic ri queto'tajic ri man quecäm ta pa ri ch'o'j ri caquiya' can ri Ejipt ri quetzelej pa Juda. Je c'u ri' conojel ri ecanajinak can pa Juda ri xepe c'u che jekelem pa Ejipt

Jeremiah46:1 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' u bixic che ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij ri caquic'ulmaj na ri nimak tak tinimit.

Jeremiah51:1 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “Quintak na ulok jun quiakik' cämisanel che u banic c'ax che ri Babilon xukuje' chque ri aj caldeyib.
Jeremiah51:2 Quinban na chi ri e qui c'ulel je chiquibana' che ri Babilon jacha' ri caban che trico ri cäq'uiak pa ri quiakik'; quinban c'u na chi man c'o ta qui winakil quecanaj ta can chupam ri culew. Aretak chopan ri k'ij re nimalaj c'axc'ol
Jeremiah51:3 ¡Ri e ajq'uiakal tak ch'ab chequisuc'umala' ri qui q'uiakbal tak qui ch'ab! ¡Che be quicojo' ri to'bal tak uwo c'uxaj! ¡Mebitok'obisaj tak qui wäch ri c'ojolab aj Babilon; chebisachisaj qui wäch conojel tak ri e cajch'ojab!
Jeremiah51:4 Pa ronojel ri culew ri aj caldeyib ri winak queliq'ui' na can xo'l tak ri ja pa ri tinimit
Jeremiah51:5 pune' ba' ri Israel xukuje' ri Juda e macuninak chnuwäch qui nojisam c'u ri culew che macaj
Jeremiah51:6 ¡Chixanimajok chixel bic pa Babilon! ¡Cato'tajisaj rib jachin ri cäcuinic! ¡Mixcäm rumal ri u mac ri are'! Are k'ijol wa' rech ri nu yo'w q'uexelal
Jeremiah51:7 Ri Babilon are jun kumubal re k'an puak pa nu k'ab ri cuk'abarisaj ronojel ri uwächulew. Ri nimak tak tinimit cäcuq'uiaj quech we u wa'l uva ri' ri quesach c'u rumal.
Jeremiah51:8 Xak c'ätetal c'ut xtzak ri Babilon xuban c'u ch'akatak. ¡Chiwok'ej c'u u wäch! Chebic'ama' ulok tak cunabal chque tak ri e u socotajic
Jeremiah51:9 E kacojom chi tak cunabal che ri Babilon

Jeremiah51:11 Ri Ajawaxel are caraj cusachisaj u wäch ri Babilon

Jeremiah51:29 Cäyicop ri ulew xukuje' cabirbibic
Jeremiah51:30 Ri ajch'ojab aj Babilon xek'itaj che u tijic qui chuk'ab
Jeremiah51:31 Quexiq'uinilob tak ri ya'l tak tzijol che u ya'ic u bixic che ri ajawinel re Babilon chi ri u tinimit tak ch'äcatajinak ronojel.
Jeremiah51:32 Ri c'ulel xebulatz'obej tak ri caban wi oc'owem pa tak ri nima'
Jeremiah51:33 Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Jeremiah51:34 Jewa' cubij ri Jerusalen
Jeremiah51:35 
Jeremiah51:36 Ri Ajawaxel je cubij wa': “In quenbana' ri suq'uilal chawe
Jeremiah51:37 cäjalwächitaj c'u na pa jumulaj etzeletajic
Jeremiah51:38 Conojel e are' quewun na e jacha' ri coj quequijisila' c'u na tak quib e jacha' alaj tak coj.
Jeremiah51:39 Aretak quek'ak'ar rumal ri k'ak'
Jeremiah51:40 Quebenc'am na bic pa ri pilibal
Jeremiah51:41 ¡Ri Babilon
Jeremiah51:42 Ri plo xubik' ri Babilon
Jeremiah51:43 Ri u tinimit tak quejalwächitaj na pa xibibalalaj tak chaki'j uwo sak pa chaki'j ulew ri tolobam
Jeremiah51:44 “Quinc'äjisaj na u wäch ri dios Bel pa Babilon
Jeremiah51:45 ¡Nu tinimit chixel ulok chila'
Jeremiah51:46 Mi xibij iwib
Jeremiah51:47 Je c'u ri'
Jeremiah51:48 Ri caj ri ulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'olic quejajat na aretak cätzak ri Babilon
Jeremiah51:49 Je
Jeremiah51:50 Ix
Jeremiah51:51 Ri ix quixcha': “Cakana' q'uixbal aretak cäkata' ri cäban che ka yok'ic. Ri ka q'uixbal ri elinak cuch'uk ri ka palaj
Jeremiah51:52 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “Cäpe na ri k'ij aretak chinc'äjisaj qui wäch tak ri diosib ri e c'o pa Babilon
Jeremiah51:53 Ri Babilon pune' cäpaki' c'ä cho ri caj che u cojic ri to'bal rib sibalaj chicaj xukuje' chila' quebentak wi bic tak ri c'ulel che u sachisaxic u wäch. In
Jeremiah51:54 Kas pa Babilon quel wi ulok rakoj tak chi'aj re k'oxomal
Jeremiah51:55 Are' ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah51:56 Xepe che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Babilon; xekaj tak ri cajch'ojab pa qui k'ab xequiban c'u ch'akatak chque tak ri e qui q'uiakbal tak qui ch'ab. Rumal rech chi ri Ajawaxel are' jun Dios ri cuya' chque chquijujunal ri takal chque.

Jeremiah51:60 Ri Jeremiy u tz'ibam pa jun wuj ronojel ri etzelal ri cäpe na puwi' ri Babilon ri u bixic

Jeremiah51:62 Cabij c'ut: ‘Ajawaxel

Jeremiah52:1 Ri Sedequiy juwinak jun u junab aretak xuchaplej ajawinic
Jeremiah52:2 E itzel c'ut ri e u chac ri xebuban chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Jeremiah52:3 Rumal ri' ri Ajawaxel xyactaj royowal ruc' ri Jerusalen xukuje' ruc' ri Juda
Jeremiah52:4 Chupam ri k'ij lajuj rajilabal ri ulajuj ic' re ri ubelejeb junab ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy
Jeremiah52:5 Ri tinimit xsutix rij c'ä pa ri julajuj junab re ri rajawinic ri Sedequiy.
Jeremiah52:6 Chupam ri ubelejeb k'ij re ri ucaj ic' re we junab ri' xnimataj ri wi'jal chupam ri tinimit
Jeremiah52:7 Xquiban c'u jun c'ob che ri nimalaj u tapia ri tinimit
Jeremiah52:8 E are' c'u ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib xcokataj ri ajawinel Sedequiy
Jeremiah52:9 Ri aj caldeyib xquichap ri ajawinel xquic'am c'u bic chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon
Jeremiah52:10 chuwäch c'u wa' xutak u k'atic ri qui kul ri e u c'ojol xukuje' conojel ri aj Juda ri nimak qui k'ij.
Jeremiah52:11 Xtakan c'u che resaxic ri quieb u bak'wäch xukuje' chi chcoj tza'm tikom ch'ich che u c'amic bic pa Babilon
Jeremiah52:12 Chupam ri lajuj rajilabal ri uro' ic' re ri ubelejlajuj u junab ri rajawinic ri Nabucodonosor
Jeremiah52:13 xut'ik c'u k'ak' che ri rachoch ri Dios
Jeremiah52:14 e are' c'u ri ajch'ojab aj caldeyib ri e achilaninak xequit'akij tak ri nimak tak tapia ri e k'atininak rij ri Jerusalen.
Jeremiah52:15 Ri Nabuzaradan ri quinimal ri ajch'ojab xebuc'am bic ri mebayib xukuje' ri e canajinak canok pa ri Jerusalen xukuje' ri niq'uiaj chi aj chaquib
Jeremiah52:16 Xuwi xebuya' can jujun ri sibalaj e mebayib na
Jeremiah52:17 Ri aj caldeyib xequiban ch'akatak chque ri jastak ri e re k'an ch'ich' ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch Dios
Jeremiah52:18 Xukuje' xequic'am bic ri e yabal tak chaj
Jeremiah52:19 Junam xukuje' xuban
Jeremiah52:20 Ri qui cholajil ri quieb rakan tak ja
Jeremiah52:21 Chquijujunal ri rakan tak ja coc'ow na chuwäch belejeb (9) bara' ri rak'anibal caraj ne wakib (6) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj ri u chomal; tel tak ri qui pam
Jeremiah52:22 Chquijujunal ri rakan tak ja c'o jun qui wikbal paquiwi' re kan ch'ich'
Jeremiah52:23 E jun sient (100) crabaj e tzayatzoj che jun c'at re kan ch'ich' ri c'o chrij jun wikbal
Jeremiah52:24 Ri takanel paquiwi' ri chajinelab xuchap ri Seraiy
Jeremiah52:25 Chque ri winak ri e c'o pa ri tinimit xuchap ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab ri cätakan paquiwi' ri ajch'ojab
Jeremiah52:26 Ri Nabuzaradan xebuc'am bic conojel wa' chuwäch ri ajawinel re Babilon
Jeremiah52:27 
Jeremiah52:28 Ri cajilabal ri winak ri xebesax bic rumal ri Nabucodonosor e are' tak wa': chupam ri uwuk junab ri rajawinic xeresaj bic juwinak oxib mil juwinak oxib (3023) winak pa Juda;
Jeremiah52:29 chupam ri wajxaklajuj (18) junab xeresaj bic wajxakib sient juwinak cablajuj (832) winak xeresaj bic pa Jerusalen;
Jeremiah52:30 chupam ri junab juwinak oxib (23)
Jeremiah52:31 Pa ri k'ij juwinak job (25) re ri ucablajuj (12) ic' re ri junab juwinak wuklajuj (37) re ri resaxic bic ri Joaquin ajawinel re Juda
Jeremiah52:32 xuban utzil che are c'u nim xril na chquiwäch ri jule' tak ajawinelab chic ri e c'o ruc' pa Babilon.
Jeremiah52:33 Je c'u ri'
Jeremiah52:34 Joropa' c'u k'ij ri xc'asi' na
Lamentations1:1 ¡Sibalaj xtolobax canok ri tinimit ri nojinak can chque winak nabe! ¡U wächbal malca'n canajinak wi ri nimalaj tinimit ri qui chuch tak ri tinimit! ¡Cojom chuk'ab che
Lamentations1:2 Cajik' pa ok'ej chak'abibal tak; ri e u wa'l tak wächaj quebelel tak cho ri u palaj. Chquixo'l tak conojel ri e rach ch'abem man c'o ta jun ri cacu'bisan ta u c'u'x. Conojel ri canima' quib ruc' e jachinelab quieb qui wäch; che qui banom qui c'ulel che.
Lamentations1:3 Man xuwi ta c'ut ri rikoj tak c'ax xukuje' ri c'axalaj tak chac
Lamentations1:4 ¡Sibalaj e bisobal tak ri be ri quebe pa Sion! ¡Man c'o ta jachin ta jun ri cäpe ta pa tak ri nimak'ij! Ri e oquibal tak pa ri tinimit e tolonic
Lamentations1:5 Ri e qui banom qui c'ulel chque quetakan paquiwi'
Lamentations1:6 Xsach u wäch ronojel ri u je'lical ri je'lalaj Sion; ri e c'amal tak u be e jacha' masat
Lamentations1:7 Ri Jerusalen quenataj ri ojer tak k'ij che aretak xcanaj u tuquiel cabisonic; quenataj tak che conojel tak ri k'inomal ri xec'oji' ruc' pa ri ojer tak u k'ijol; canataj che aretak xkaj pa u k'ab ri c'ulel man c'o ta c'u jachin ta jun ri xpe ta che u to'ic
Lamentations1:8 Ri Jerusalen sibalaj nim ri macaj ri u banom u banom c'ut chi xyataj che chi etzelam u wäch. Ri xeyo'w tak u k'ij nabe
Lamentations1:9 Nojinak ri ratz'iak che ch'uluch'ujil; man xuchomaj taj ri quepe na puwi'. Man cojel taj ri u tzakic ri u rikom; man c'o ta jachin cacu'bisan u c'u'x. ¡Chila la
Lamentations1:10 Ri c'ulel u banom rech chque tak ri e u k'inomal ri Jerusalen. Ri tinimit xeril ri e k'ijilal tak diosib quetininic xeboc chupam ri k'ijilabal
Lamentations1:11 Conojel tak ri e winak la quebok'ic
Lamentations1:12 ¡Ix
Lamentations1:13 Ri Ajawaxel u q'uiakom ulok jun k'ak' chicaj ri opaninak c'ä cho ri nu bakil; xulic' jun c'amibal pa ri nu be xuban chwe chi xintzelej chwij; in u jachom chupam ri wonobanic
Lamentations1:14 Ri e nu mac e rilom ri Ajawaxel; kas are' e ximowinak tak chwij jacha' jun eka'bal ri u tzakom ralal panuwi': ¡Quebuq'uis tak ri e nu chuk'ab! Ri Ajawaxel in u jachom pa qui k'ab winak ri man quinch'ij ta qui coch'ic.
Lamentations1:15 Ri Ajawaxel naj xebuq'uiak wi chwe conojel tak ri e c'o qui chuk'ab ri caquito' nu wi'. Xuq'uiak juk'at ajch'ojab panuwi'
Lamentations1:16 We jastak ri' quinquiya' pa ok'ej. Ri e nu bak'wäch quenoj che qui wal tak wächaj
Lamentations1:17 Ri Sion culic' ri u k'ab che u tz'onoxic tok'ob
Lamentations1:18 Ri Ajawaxel xuban ri takalic
Lamentations1:19 Xintz'onoj to'banic chque tak ri e wach ch'abem e are' tak c'ut ri e are' quieb qui wäch e jachinelab chwe. Ri e nu e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' tak ri e nu nimak tak tatayib xecäm chupam ri tinimit: ¡Quebinicat che u tzucuxic qui wa cuq'uia' rech cäc'astaj qui wäch!
Lamentations1:20 ¡Ajawaxel
Lamentations1:21 Ri winak quequitatabej tak ri e nu juyuwem
Lamentations1:22 Bana' la chi chopan chwäch la ronojel ri etzelal ri qui banom; je chbana' la chque jacha' ri qui mac jacha' ri banom la chwe in
Lamentations2:1 ¡Sibalaj nim ri royowal ri Ajawaxel

Lamentations2:4 Ri Ajawaxel

Lamentations2:6 Jacha' jun eläk'om
Lamentations2:7 Ri Ajawaxel u xutum ri u porobal wi tabal tok'ob che
Lamentations2:8 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' u tzij chi quet'akix ri e u tapia ri je'licalaj Sion. Xusuc'uba' ri chomanic che ri yojyobisanic xutz'akatisaj c'u u banic man xuxlan taj. Tapia tak xukuje' nimak tak tapia xebuya' pa bis
Lamentations2:9 Ri tinimit man e c'o ta chi tz'apibal u chi' mawi e c'opibal tak rech: ¡Xepak'ix tak canok xepobax can tak cho ri ulew! Ri rajawinel xukuje' ri e u k'atal tak tzij e c'o chquixo'l tak ri e k'ijilal tak diosib; man c'o ta chic ri u pixab ri Dios. ¡Mawi ta ne tak ri k'axal tak u tzij quequil ta chic c'utwächinic ri cuya' ta ri Ajawaxel chque!
Lamentations2:10 Ri e u ri'jab tak tatayib ri je'lalaj Sion quet'uyi cho ri ulew man quech'aw taj
Lamentations2:11 Ri ok'ej quequitzajisaj ri nu bak'wäch
Lamentations2:12 Quecha' c'ut ri ac'alab chque ri qui nan: “¡Man c'o ta chic ka wa mawi u wa'l ka uva!” Quetzak c'ut je ta ne ri e socom che cämical xo'l tak ri ja re ri tinimit
Lamentations2:13 ¿Jas ta ruc' catinjunamaj wi o catinjunamataj ta wi
Lamentations2:14 Ri e c'utwächinic ri xequiya' tak qui bixic tak ri e k'axal tak tzij ri e c'o awuc' chawe xa' e jujun itzelalaj tak subunic. Man xquiya' ta ri a mac chisak chawäch rech xq'extaj taj ri cataklebej
Lamentations2:15 Aretak catquil ri queboc'ow pa ri be caquipak'apa' qui k'ab che a yok'ic; quexulk'ubic caquislabaj c'ut ri qui jolom che retz'bexic a wäch
Lamentations2:16 Ri caquiban qui c'ulel chawe xquijak ri qui chi' che a yok'ic. Quexulk'ubic caquibanala' qui palaj caquikuch'uch'ej qui ware

Lamentations3:1 In ri in oc'owinak chupam ri rikoj c'ax chquixe' ri e u xuk'unic tak ri royowal ri Ajawaxel.

Lamentations3:3 jumul camul pa apachique jok'otaj
Lamentations3:4 U banom chi ri'jobinak ri nu ti'jal xukuje' ri nu tz'umal
Lamentations3:5 u walijisam jun sutibal wij jun c'ayilaj k'atibal xukuje' rikoj tak c'ax
Lamentations3:6 u banom chwe chi in jekelinak pa k'ekumalil
Lamentations3:7 Xinutz'apij chupam jun k'atibal ri man c'o ta wi elebal ib; xinuxuculej cuc' alalaj tak tikom tak ch'ich';
Lamentations3:8 pune' xinrak nu chi' che u tz'onoxic to'banic
Lamentations3:9 xuk'atij ri nu be cumal nimak tak tapia re abaj
Lamentations3:10 Ri are' uxinak jun coj chwe ri u c'u'm rib
Lamentations3:11 In u jech'obisam che ri nu be
Lamentations3:12 ¡Xutanij ri q'uiakbal ch'ab xinutac'aba' c'ut rech chwe in quebuq'uiak wi ri e u ch'ab!
Lamentations3:13 Ri ch'ab c'ut ri e u q'uiakom ri Ajawaxel sibalaj naj e t'ist'obinak bic chwe.
Lamentations3:14 Conojel ri e nu winakil quetz'en chwe; jok'otaj chi jok'otaj in u cach' ri etz'ben wächaj ri cäquiban chwe.
Lamentations3:15 Ri Ajawaxel in u nojisam chque c'ayil; c'a ri uq'uia' ri u yo'm chwe.
Lamentations3:16 Xebuc'äjij tak ri nu ware cho ri ulew; xuban chwe chi xinti' ri puc'uc' ulew.
Lamentations3:17 Ri jamaril najtininak chwe sachinak chic pa nu jolom ri c'olem pa utzil.
Lamentations3:18 Oquinak chi c'u ne pa nu jolom chi cäminak chic ri jicomalaj weyebal c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel.
Lamentations3:19 Cänataj ri nu bis xukuje' ri nu tuquelal chwe
Lamentations3:20 quinoc che u chomaxic wa' cäpe c'u wanima'.
Lamentations3:21 Jun jasach c'ut quinwaj chi ma ta cäsach pa nu jolom quinjiquiba' c'ut ri weyebal c'u'x chrij:
Lamentations3:22 Ri u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri Ajawaxel man c'o ta u q'uisic
Lamentations3:23 Ak'abibal chi ak'abibal quec'ac'aric; ¡Sibalaj nim ri u jiquil!
Lamentations3:24 Quinbij c'u chwe chbil wib: ¡Ri Ajawaxel are' ronojel chwe in; rumal ri' chrij are' quinjiquiba' wi nu c'u'x!
Lamentations3:25 Ri Ajawaxel utz
Lamentations3:26 Are utz na cakeyej ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel man ruc' ta ch'ach'atem.
Lamentations3:27 Are utz na che ri winak we cucoj rib chuxe' ri eka'bal pa ri u ch'utinal.
Lamentations3:28 Ri winak rajawaxic cacanaj u tuquel mach'ach'at c'ut aretak cätak che u banic rumal ri Ajawaxel;
Lamentations3:29 rajawaxic che
Lamentations3:30 rajawaxic chuchi'j ri u perajil ri u palaj chuwäch ri casocowic
Lamentations3:31 Ri Ajawaxel man xa' ta jumul ri' uj ta u tzakom ta canok.
Lamentations3:32 Pune' ta cubano chi cäriktaj c'ax
Lamentations3:33 Man c'u cakaj ta chuwäch u banic c'ax mawi ri u banic k'oxomal chque ri winak.
Lamentations3:34 Ri quixak'alexic ri e c'o pa che' ri e aj tinimitib man ruc' ta tok'obisam wächaj.
Lamentations3:35 Ri man u banic ta suq'uilal che jun winak jacha' ri ya'tal che kas chuwäch ri Aj Chicajil
Lamentations3:36 ri u jech'obisaxic ri u banic ri suq'uilal puwi' jun il e jastak wa' ri quebuc'okoj ri Ajawaxel.
Lamentations3:37 Aretak c'o jas caya' u bixic
Lamentations3:38 Ri e utzil tak xukuje' tak ri etzelal quepetic rumal rech chi je cubij ri Aj Chicajil.
Lamentations3:39 Uxinak c'ut ri winak jun ajmac. ¿Jas ta ri cuch'ach'atej chupam we c'aslemal ri'?
Lamentations3:40 Kas utz u nic'oxic ri ka c'aslemal ka bana'
Lamentations3:41 Chekapakaba' chuwäch ri Dios ri c'o chicaj ri e ka chomanic xukuje' tak ri ka ch'awem ruc' Dios.
Lamentations3:42 Ri e ka mac tak xukuje' tak ri e ka c'ulelanic
Lamentations3:43 Xujsutij la ruc' ri oyowal la
Lamentations3:44 Xabolk'otij ib la chupam jun sutz' rech man quetatabej ta la ri e ka bochi'nic.
Lamentations3:45 Uj yo'm la pa nimalaj yok'ical chquiwäch conojel ri winak.
Lamentations3:46 Conojel ri qui banom qui c'ulel chke caquijak ri qui chi' che ka yok'ic;
Lamentations3:47 xibin tak ib
Lamentations3:48 Nima' re u wa'l tak wächaj quebel ulok chque ri e nu bak'wäch chuwäch ri u sachisaxic u wäch ri lok'alaj ka tinimit.
Lamentations3:49 Quebok' ri nu bak'wäch man quebuxlan taj
Lamentations3:50 C'ä ri Ajawaxel ri c'o pa ri caj caca'y na ulok chke chila' chicaj.
Lamentations3:51 Quebopan ri e u k'oxomal ri nu bak'wäch c'ä ruc' ri wanima'

Lamentations4:1 ¡E k'ekarinak c'ut ri k'an puak! ¡U tzakom ri u ruc'upinic ri coc'alaj k'an puak! ¡E jabuninak pa conojel tak ri xquina ri abaj tak rech ri tastalic k'ijilabal!
Lamentations4:2 Ri e aj Sion
Lamentations4:3 Xukuje' ne ri catitab ri xexalaj tak awajib caquiya' ri qui tu' quequitubisaj c'u ne ri alaj tak cal
Lamentations4:4 Sibalaj cachaki'j qui chi' ri ac'alab ri c'a quetunic canaq'ui c'ut ri cak' pa qui chi'. Ri ac'alab caquitz'onoj qui wa man c'o ta c'u jachin ri cayo'w ta chque.
Lamentations4:5 Ri sibalaj je'l u tzukic quib caquiban nabe
Lamentations4:6 Ri retzelal ri u chuch ri nu u tinimit c'o na chuwäch ri macaj ri xuban ri Sodom
Lamentations4:7 Ri rachijab ri e cha'talic c'o na ri qui sakil chuwäch ri tew
Lamentations4:8 Are c'u ri camic c'o na ri qui k'ekal chquiwäch ri k'ekumalil; man c'o ta jachin jun cach'obow ta chquiwäch xo'l tak ri ja re ri tinimit. Ri qui tz'umal quenaq'ui cho tak ri qui bakil
Lamentations4:9 Are utz na quech ri xecäm chupam ri ch'o'j chquiwäch ri xecäm rumal wi'jal
Lamentations4:10 Cuc' tak ri kas qui k'ab
Lamentations4:11 Ri Ajawaxel xukasaj ronojel ri royowal xutzopij ri u c'amal ri u k'ak'al ri royowal; xut'ik k'ak' che ri Sion xusachisaj c'u u wäch c'ä chuxe'.
Lamentations4:12 Mawi jubik' xquicoj tak ri ajawinelab re ri uwächulew
Lamentations4:13 ¡Ronojel u mac rech ri qui mac ri e k'axal tzij ri e c'o cuc'

Lamentations4:16 Ri u wächbal ri Ajawaxel xejabunic
Lamentations4:17 Cuc' ri ka bak'wäch ri e cosinak
Lamentations4:18 Xak c'u uj queyem pa kakan; man cujcuin taj cujel ta bic xo'l tak ri be pa ri tinimit. Ri q'uisbal u sachisaxic ka wäch nakaj c'o wi
Lamentations4:19 C'o na ri canibal chquiwäch tak ri cot ri querapin cho ri caj ri uj okataninak; cuj qui terenej pa kakan pa tak ri juyub
Lamentations4:20 Ri cha'tal rumal ri Ajawaxel oquisam pa che'

Lamentations5:1 Chnataj che la
Lamentations5:2 Ronojel ri kech oquinak pa qui k'ab ri winak ri man e ka winakil taj; camic ri kachoch e quech chic ri winak ri man keta'm ta qui wäch.
Lamentations5:3 Uj canajinak minorib
Lamentations5:4 ¡Ri kas ka ja' rajawaxic na u lok'ic kumal; ri kas ka si' rajawaxic na u lok'ic kumal!
Lamentations5:5 Cojom jun eka'bal chrij ka wi'; cujcosic
Lamentations5:6 Rech cätz'akat ri cäkatijo cäkalic ri ka k'ab chque ri aj ejiptib xukuje' chque ri aj siriyab.
Lamentations5:7 Ri e ka tat xemacunic
Lamentations5:8 Camic are quetakan ri pataninelab lok'om pakawi'
Lamentations5:9 Che u rikic ri ka wa xak quieb tzij cubij pakawi' qui mac quech ri e banal tak ch'o'j ri e c'o chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak.
Lamentations5:10 Ri ka tz'umal canicowic jacha' jun jorno
Lamentations5:11 Pa Sion xukuje' chquipam tak ri tinimit re Juda
Lamentations5:12 Ri e c'ämal tak ka be xetzayibax chque tak ri qui k'ab
Lamentations5:13 Ri achijab ri sibalaj nimak na qui chuk'ab xecoj che quienic; ri c'ojolab xekaj chuxe' ri ralal ri si'.
Lamentations5:14 Man e c'o ta chi nimak tak tatayib che tak ri e u chi' ri tinimit; man quetataj ta chic ri qui bixonic tak ri c'ojolab.
Lamentations5:15 Man c'o ta chi ka quicotemal chupam ri kanima'; ri e ka xojoj re jajatem xeq'uis ruc' bis.
Lamentations5:16 Xtzak ri ka corona ri c'o che ri ka jolom; ¡tok'ob ka wäch
Lamentations5:17 Rumal rech wa' yawabarinak ri kanima'; rumal rech wa' sutz'arinak ri ka bakwäch.
Lamentations5:18 Ri juyub aj Sion jumulaj yojyobic; quebinicat tak ri yac paquiwi'.
Lamentations5:19 Are c'u ri lal
Lamentations5:20 ¿Jas ta c'u che kas xa' jumul uj sachisam la pa jolom la? ¿Jas ta c'u che cujwonoba' la canok q'ui k'ijol?
Lamentations5:21 ¡Bana' la chke chi chujtzelej uc' la
Lamentations5:22 Are c'u ri lal kas uj tzakom la canok; ri oyowal la kuc' kas oc'owinak u wi'.

Ezekiel1:5 xukuje' pa ri u niq'uiajil ri k'ak' c'o jun jasach ri e je ta ne e quiejeb cuerp ri jeri' quepe winak.
Ezekiel1:6 Chquijujunal c'o quiejeb qui palaj xukuje' quiejeb qui xic';
Ezekiel1:7 ri ca' jicom e c'o quixq'uiak jacha' ri que ri wacax
Ezekiel1:8 Man xuwi ta c'o quiejeb qui palaj xukuje' quiejeb qui xic'
Ezekiel1:9 Ri e qui xic' quequinakala' tak quib. Aretak quebinic
Ezekiel1:10 Ri qui palaj tak we quiejeb cuerp ri' je qui banic wa': ri c'o chquiwäch
Ezekiel1:11 Ri qui xic' caquilic' quib chicaj. Quieb chque caquinakila' quib
Ezekiel1:12 Conojel quebe chquiwäch
Ezekiel1:13 Ri qui banic tak we cuerp ri' quejunamataj cuc' ri ak'al ri quenicowic o cuc' ri ch'ich' ri e quiakarinak pa ri k'ak' quilitaj c'u jun k'ak' chquixo'l ri sibalaj cajuluwic
Ezekiel1:14 We cuerp ri' quejuch'uch'ic quebec quepetic e je ta ne e c'o caypa'.
Ezekiel1:15 Xebenca'yej tak we cuerp ri' xinwil c'ut chi cho ri ulew
Ezekiel1:16 Ri quiejeb quetet xak e junam
Ezekiel1:17 Quecuinic quebe pa apachique ri quiejeb qui xcut
Ezekiel1:18 Xinwilo chi ri quiejeb quetet e c'o qui quetetibal

Ezekiel1:20 Ri cuerp tak queslabic

Ezekiel1:24 Xukuje' xinta' ri qui wojojem ri qui xic' aretak quebec: jacha' ri qui wojojem ri ja' re jun nima' ri nimarinak
Ezekiel1:25 Xtataj c'ut jun jininem puwi' ri wocowic ri c'o paquiwi' ri qui wi' ri qui jolom.
Ezekiel1:26 Puwi' ri wocowic xinwil jun jasach jacha' jun tem re ajawibal ri je ta ne cäpe ri je'licalaj räx abaj ri zapir
Ezekiel1:27 Ri quilitajic chi ri u xe' u pam capakic
Ezekiel1:28 Ri cajunamataj ruc' ri räxquiak'ab aretak cäc'utun pa tak ri sutz' aretak c'o musmul jäb. Jewa' xuban ri u c'utic rib ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel chnuwäch. Aretak xinwilo

Ezekiel6:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej. Xubij c'u chwe:
Ezekiel6:2 “Chatca'y chque tak ri e u juyub ri Israel
Ezekiel6:3 je chabij wa' chque: ‘Chitatabej
Ezekiel6:4 Quinban na ch'akatak chque tak ri porobal ri quebichi'j wi tabal tak tok'ob xukuje' ri quebiporoj wi c'oc' k'ol
Ezekiel6:5 Quebenrokij na ri cäminak tak aj israelib chquiwäch tak ri qui diosib
Ezekiel6:6 Pa conojel tak ri c'olbal jawije' ri chixejekel wi na
Ezekiel6:7 Aretak c'u caquilo chi xak c'ätetal quetzak ri tinimit winak chixo'l e cäminak
Ezekiel6:8 Quinban c'u na chi e c'o jujun chiwe queto'taj chuwäch ri cämical quec'asi' c'u canok
Ezekiel6:9 Ri quec'asi' canok quinnataj na chque pa ri nimak tak tinimit ri'; quenataj na chque joropa' ri c'ax ri xquirik wumal rumal rech chi man xeniman ta chwe xukuje' chi xquitas quib chwij che qui k'ijilaxic tak diosib. Quemuluw c'u na qui c'u'x kas chque chquibil tak quib
Ezekiel6:10 C'äte c'u ri' caquetamaj na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel
Ezekiel6:11 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “Chatjuyuwok chatt'ocon cuc' tak ri a k'ab
Ezekiel6:12 Ri naj e c'o wi quecäm na cumal tak ri yabil

Ezekiel6:14 Quinyac na ri nu k'ab che u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri kas c'u pa ri chaki'j uwo sak pa ri u mox elebal k'ij c'a pa Ribla pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij
Ezekiel7:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel7:2 “In

Ezekiel7:4 Man quincoj ta na elebal c'uxaj chawe; quinc'äjisaj na a wäch rumal ri xaban pa ri a c'aslemal quinban c'u na chawe chi catoc'ow na chquipam tak ri c'ax ri quequiya' ri xojibalalaj tak e a banoj. Quiwetamaj chi c'u na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.

Ezekiel7:6 
Ezekiel7:7 Copan ri sachbal wächaj
Ezekiel7:8 Kas camic
Ezekiel7:9 Man quenc'äjisaj ta na a wäch ruc' ta tok'obisabal wächaj; quenc'äjisaj a wäch rumal ri c'aslemal ri awuc'am quinban c'u chawe chi quebatoj tak ri c'axc'ol ri e u c'amom ulok ri e xojibalalaj tak a banoj. Quiwetamaj c'u na u k'ij ix chi in
Ezekiel7:10 ¡C'o we k'ij ri'! ¡Ulinak chic! ¡Ulinak ri sachbal wächaj! Ri etzelal cäch'äcan pa conojel tak ri c'olbal sibalaj man ch'ijtajel ta chic ri etzelal ri cabanic.
Ezekiel7:11 Ri tokinic cac'utunic cuya' etzelal. Man c'o ta c'u cäquich'äc na cumal tak ri qui k'inomal xukuje' tak ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj. Man c'o ta c'u jun jasach quechbex chque wa' ri nim ta u k'ij.
Ezekiel7:12 Xopan ri jok'otaj
Ezekiel7:13 Ri c'o jas u c'ayim man cätzelej ta chi jumul pa u k'ab pa ronojel ri u c'aslemal
Ezekiel7:14 Cok' ri trompet cäsiq'uin che u banic ch'o'j; conojel caquisuc'umaj quib
Ezekiel7:15 Chrij ri ulew c'o ch'o'j
Ezekiel7:16 Pune' e c'o jujun quecuinic caquito' quib quebe pa tak ri c'ache'laj jacha' palomax ri quixibim quib
Ezekiel7:17 Conojel cätuktub ri qui k'ab
Ezekiel7:18 Quequicoj tak na wakwoj tak atz'iak che u c'utic ri k'oxomal; ronojel ri qui cuerp cabirbit na
Ezekiel7:19 Caquiq'uiak apan ri qui sak puak pa ri be; caq'uiak apan ri qui k'an puak je ta ne ri xa' mes. Mawi ri qui k'an puak mawi ri qui sak puak cacuin ta na che qui to'tajisaxic pa ri k'ij ri cäpe ri royowal ri Ajawaxel. Man quecuin taj caquesaj ri qui wi'jal mawi quecuinic caquinojisaj ri qui pam
Ezekiel7:20 Rumal ri u je'lical ri wikbal quib xak lok' xquinojisaj quib che ri u nimarisaxic qui k'ij
Ezekiel7:21 Quinban na chi quepe winak ri man e i winakil taj quequeläk'aj bic
Ezekiel7:22 Ri in quintas na wib chque we winak ri' quinya' na c'olbal chi cäxk'olix ri wachoch. Ri are' can nu k'inomal nabe. Quepe c'u na ri tokinelab caquixk'olij c'u na.
Ezekiel7:23 Xak chc'ol jun tikom ch'ich' awuc'
Ezekiel7:24 Ri in quinban na chi quepe winak ri e banal tak etzelal quequimajij na tak ri ja ri e c'o pa ri tinimit. Quinq'uis na tzij puwi' ri nimal ri quec'amow ri e c'o qui cuinem; quinban na chi ri tastalicalaj tak qui c'olbal ri quek'ijilan wi quexk'olitajisax na.
Ezekiel7:25 Ri xibim ib cäkaj na paquiwi'; caquitzucuj na ri jamaril
Ezekiel7:26 Cäpe na quiäkasakil chrij quiäkasakil; itzel tak tzijol caquiterebela' tak quib. Xak lok' caquitzucuj jun k'axal tzij chuya' ta c'u jun k'alajisanic chque; man c'o ta cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäbin ta chque jas ri caquibano mawi nimak tak tatayib ri chyo'w ta qui no'j.
Ezekiel7:27 Ri ajawinel cucoj na atz'iak re bis
Ezekiel8:1 Pa ri uro' k'ij re ri uwak ic' re ri uwak junab
Ezekiel8:2 xinwil jun jasach ri je ta ne u banic jun winak. Ri je ta ne ri u xe' u pam caxulic. Xinwil jun jasach ri cajunamataj ruc' ri k'ak'
Ezekiel8:3 Ri winak xulic' ri je ta ne u banic jun k'abaj xinumich'ej c'u che ri nu wi'. Are' c'ut ri u cuinem ri Dios xinuwalijisaj pa ri quiakik'
Ezekiel8:4 Chi c'o wi ri u juluwem ri u Dios ri Israel jacha' ri xinwil pa ri c'utwächinic ri xinwil pa ri lianic.
Ezekiel8:5 Xubij c'u chwe: “Chatca'y pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij.” Xinca'y c'u pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel8:6 Xubij c'u chwe: “¿La quebawil ri xojibalalaj tak jastak ri quequiban ri aj israelib
Ezekiel8:7 Xinuc'am c'u bic chuchi' ri oquibal re ri uwo ja. Quilitaj c'u jun c'ob che ri nimalaj tapia.
Ezekiel8:8 Xubij c'u chwe: “Chanimatajisaj ri c'ob ri c'o che ri nimalaj tapia.” Ri in xinnimarisaj ri u chi' ri c'ob xinrik c'u jun oquibal.

Ezekiel8:11 E oxc'al lajuj (70) nimak tak tatayib aj israelib
Ezekiel8:12 Xubij c'u chwe: “¿La cawil ri caquiban ri nimak tak tatayib aj israelib chic'uyal
Ezekiel8:13 Xutik chi c'u u bixic: “C'ä quebawil c'u na quequiban jastak ri sibalaj e itzel na.”
Ezekiel8:14 Xinuc'am c'u bic chuchi' ri oquibal ri cäban wi oquem chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel
Ezekiel8:15 Xubij c'u chwe: “¿La cawil wa'? C'ä quebawil chi c'u na niq'uiaj jastak ri sibalaj e c'ax na.”
Ezekiel8:16 Xinuc'am c'u bic chuwäch ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel chuchi' ri roquibal ri k'ijilabal

Ezekiel9:1 Xinta' c'ut jun cowilaj ch'abal ri xubij chwe: “¡Opanem caquiban ri quec'äjisan u wäch ri tinimit

Ezekiel9:3 Xwalij c'ut ri u juluwem ri u Dios ri Israel paquiwi' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'

Ezekiel9:8 Aretak c'ut cätajin quecämisanic
Ezekiel9:9 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic chwe: “Ri u mac ri tinimit Israel xukuje' ri rech ri Juda sibalaj nim. Ri ulew nojinak che q'ui u wäch il; ri tinimit nojinak che ri man suq'uil taj. Are pa qui c'u'x chi ri in nu xutum can ri tinimit chi ma ta quinwil ri caquibano.

Ezekiel10:1 Xinwil c'ut chi
Ezekiel10:2 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che ri achi ri u cojom ratz'iak re lino: “Chanima' awib chquixo'l tak ri quetet re ri carwaj chquixe' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'
Ezekiel10:3 Pa ri jok'otaj ri' ri cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' e c'o pa ri u mox ri rachoch Dios
Ezekiel10:4 Xwalij c'ut ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel paquiwi' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xbe c'ut chuchi' ri rachoch Dios; xnoj c'u ri rachoch Dios rumal ri sutz'
Ezekiel10:5 Ri jininem ri caquiban ri qui xic' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab cätataj c'ä cho ri ucab uwo ja. Je ta ne chi are' ta ri Dios ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cätajin ta cach'awic.
Ezekiel10:6 Xuya' c'u takanic ri Ajawaxel che ri achi ri u cojom ratz'iak re lino chi chuc'ama' k'ak' chquixo'l tak ri u quetet ri carwaj
Ezekiel10:7 Chquixe' ri qui xic' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab
Ezekiel10:8 
Ezekiel10:9 Pa qui xcut ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xebenwil quiejeb quetet
Ezekiel10:10 Ri quiejeb quetet xak e junam ri je ta ne ri c'o ta jun chupam ri jun chic.
Ezekiel10:11 Aretak ri cuerp ri e c'o qui xic' quebe pa jun chque ri quiejeb xcutaj
Ezekiel10:12 Ri qui cuerp
Ezekiel10:13 Kas in xinto'wic chi ri quetet “carwaj” quebuchixic.
Ezekiel10:14 Chquijujunal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' e c'o quiejeb qui palaj: ri nabe palajaj re jun ama' wacax; ri ucab
Ezekiel10:15 We aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri' kas e are tak wa' ri e wilom can chuchi' ri nima' Quebar. Ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xewalijic
Ezekiel10:16 aretak c'u quebec
Ezekiel10:17 aretak caquik'atij quib
Ezekiel10:18 Xwalij c'ut ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel puwi' ri rachoch xuya' c'u rib paquiwi' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic'.
Ezekiel10:19 We aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri' xquiwalijisaj ri qui xic' xewalij c'u cho ri ulew. Ri in xinwilo jas ri xquibano xewalijic
Ezekiel10:20 Kas e are' aj cajalaj tak to'banelab wa' ri e c'o qui xic' ri xebenwil chuxe' ri u Dios ri Israel
Ezekiel10:21 Chquijujunal e c'o cajcaj qui palaj cajcaj qui xic'
Ezekiel10:22 Ri palajaj xak e junam cuc' ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' ri xebenwil chuchi' ri nima' Quebar. Chquijujunal quebe chquiwäch.
Ezekiel11:1 Xinuwalijisaj ri u cuinem ri Dios xinuc'am c'u bic c'ä chuchi' ri oquibal chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri cäca'y pa ri elebal k'ij. Chuchi' ri oquibal e c'o wi juwinak job achijab. Xinwilo chi c'o ri Jaazaniy chquixo'l
Ezekiel11:2 Ri Ajawaxel xubij chwe: “E are' tak wa' ri e chomal tak banal il patan ri caquichomaj tak qui banic etzelal pa ri tinimit.
Ezekiel11:3 Caquibij: ‘C'ä maja' naj xeban qui banic tak ri ja kumal. Waral man c'o ta cakac'ulmaj
Ezekiel11:4 Rumal ri'
Ezekiel11:5 Ri Ajawaxel xinruxlabisaj
Ezekiel11:6 Ri ix i banom q'ui tak cämisanic chupam we tinimit ri'
Ezekiel11:7 Rumal ri' ri in
Ezekiel11:8 ¿La quixe'j iwib chuwäch ri ch'o'j? Quinban na chi cäpe ri ch'o'j piwi'. In
Ezekiel11:9 Quinc'am na ulok ri c'äjisabal wächaj piwi': quixinwesaj na bic waral quixinjach na pa qui k'ab winak ri man i winakil taj.
Ezekiel11:10 Ch'ich' re ch'o'j quixcämisan na. Ri in quink'at na tzij piwi' pa tak ri u c'ulbatil ri Israel
Ezekiel11:11 Ri tinimit man cajwataj ta chiwe che t'uy
Ezekiel11:12 quiwetamaj c'u na chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel. Ri ix man ix nimaninak taj chque ri nu takanic mawi e i banom tak ri cäquibij tak ri nu pixab
Ezekiel11:13 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi aretak cätajin quinch'aw pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel
Ezekiel11:14 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel11:15 “Ri winak ri e jekel pa Jerusalen queyok'on chque ri aj israelib
Ezekiel11:16 Rumal c'u ri' chabij chque: ‘Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel: In quebenwesaj bic
Ezekiel11:17 Chabij chque xukuje': ‘Are' wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel: Ri in quinban na chque chi quebel ulok pa tak ri ulew
Ezekiel11:18 Ri e are quetzelej na chupam ri culew
Ezekiel11:19 In quinwesaj ri cowilaj canima' ri jacha' abaj
Ezekiel11:20 C'äte c'u ri' quequinimaj tak na ri e nu pixab xukuje' tak ri e nu takomal
Ezekiel11:21 E are' tak c'ut ri quequitakej tak qui banic tak ri xojibal xukuje' ri e itzel tak qui nak'atisabal
Ezekiel11:22 Ri cuerp ri e c'o qui xic' xerapapic
Ezekiel11:23 xuyac rib
Ezekiel11:24 Xinuwalijisaj c'ut ri u cuinem ri Dios
Ezekiel11:25 Are c'u ri in xintzijoj chque ri e c'amom ulok pa jun ulew chic jachique ri u c'utum ri Ajawaxel chnuwäch.

Ezekiel12:6 Aretak c'u k'eku'm chic

Ezekiel12:8 Chucab k'ij
Ezekiel12:9 “Kas c'u ne tzij ri aj israelib

Ezekiel12:11 Chabij chque chi at jun c'asul quech
Ezekiel12:12 Ri c'amal i be ri c'olic querekaj na bic ri jastak rech
Ezekiel12:13 Ri in quinq'uiak na ri nu c'at puwi' quinc'amij c'u na ruc' wa'. Quinc'am c'u na bic pa Babilon
Ezekiel12:14 Ri e chajil tak rech quebenjabuj na pa ri quiejeb quiakik'
Ezekiel12:15 Aretak c'u e jabutajinak chic wumal pa jujun tak ulew xukuje' pa tak nimak tak tinimit

Ezekiel12:24 Man quepe ta chi c'u na c'utwächinic chquixo'l ri aj israelib ri xak ta e u cawäch mawi tzij ri quek'axex ta chic ri xak ta e banoj tzij.

Ezekiel13:4 Ri e k'axal tak tzij chawe Israel
Ezekiel13:5 Man c'o ta jas qui banom che u to'ic ri Israel

Ezekiel13:7 ¡Ri c'utwächinic tak ri e c'o iwuc' xa' e cawächibal! ¡Ri quequik'axej u bixic xa' e banoj tak tzij! Caquibij chi in in bininak chque

Ezekiel14:1 E quieb oxib nimak tak tatayib re ri Israel xepe che wilic rech quinya' retamaxic chque jas ri cubij ri Ajawaxel.
Ezekiel14:2 Xinuch'abej c'ut ri Ajawaxel
Ezekiel14:3 “We achijab ri' kas xa' jumul qui jachom quib che qui k'ijilaxic tak diosib qui cojom c'ut ri qui bak'wäch chque ri cabanow chque chi quemacunic. ¿La quinya' ta c'u lo ri qui no'j ri caquitz'onoj na chwe?
Ezekiel14:4 Chatch'aw cuc' chabij c'u chque: ‘Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel: Ronojel aj Israel ri cujach rib che qui k'ijilaxic tak ri diosib quebuya' c'ut ri u bak'wäch chque ri quebanow chque chi quemacunic
Ezekiel14:5 Ri in quinnak na ri canima' conojel ri aj israelib ri xquitas quib chwij rumal quech ri e u diosib ri e c'o cuc'.
Ezekiel14:6 Rumal ri'
Ezekiel14:7 We jun aj israel o jun apachique winak ri jekel pa Israel cutas rib chwij kas cujach c'u rib che qui k'ijilaxic tak ri e diosib
Ezekiel14:8 Quinc'ulelaj na we winak ri' chupalaj quinya' c'u na jun c'äjisabal che c'utbal
Ezekiel14:9 We c'u jun k'axal tzij cuya' jun subunelalaj tzijol
Ezekiel14:10 Are' jun ri winak ri cuban ri ch'obonic jacha' xukuje' ri k'axal nu tzij cac'äjisax qui wäch rumal rech ri qui mac
Ezekiel14:11 rech ri nu tinimit Israel mawi jumul cutas ta chi rib chwij mawi cutz'aj ta chi rib cuc' ta we il patan ri'. Ri e are' quebux na nu tinimit

Ezekiel14:13 “We c'o jun tinimit cämacun chnuwäch man jic ta c'u cäbin chnuwäch
Ezekiel14:14 We c'u jekel ri Noe
Ezekiel14:15 We c'u queben tak bic juyubal tak awaj pa jun ulew
Ezekiel14:16 we ta e jekel we oxib achijab ri' chila'
Ezekiel14:17 We ta c'u quinc'am ulok ri ch'o'j puwi' we ulew ri' quinya' ta c'u ri takanic chquecämisax ri achijab xukuje' ri awaj
Ezekiel14:18 we ta e jekel we oxib achijab ri' chila'
Ezekiel14:19 We ta c'u quebentak ulok yabilal puwi' we ulew ri'
Ezekiel14:20 we ta c'u jekel ri Noe chi'

Ezekiel14:22 Xa' c'u e quieb oxib quec'asi' canok quecuin c'ut quebel ulok chila' quequic'am bic ri e qui c'ojol xukuje' tak ri e qui mia'l. Aretak c'u ri e are' quebopan iwuc'
Ezekiel14:23 Cacu'bi c'u na i c'u'x aretak qui wetamaj jas ri qui c'aslemal ri cuc'am xukuje' ri jastak ri quequibano. C'äte c'u ri' quiwetamaj na chi ma ta c'o jas rumal xinc'am ulok ronojel ri c'ax ri xinc'am ulok puwi' ri Jerusalen. In

Ezekiel16:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel16:2 “At

Ezekiel16:4 Pa ri k'ij aretak xatalaxic man xkopix ta ri a muxux
Ezekiel16:5 Man c'o ta jun xel ta u c'u'x chawe che qui banic tak we jastak ri chawe. Xuwi xatalaxic
Ezekiel16:6 Ri in xinoc'ow chaxcut
Ezekiel16:7 Xatin q'uiyisaj jacha' ri u q'uiyisaxic jun tico'n cho ri uwächulew. Xatux jujilaj
Ezekiel16:8 Xinoc'ow chi chaxcut
Ezekiel16:9 Xatinwatinisaj c'ut
Ezekiel16:10 xincoj jun awatz'iak ri je'l tak u ca'yebal xukuje' a xajäb re je'licalaj tz'um; xinya' jun a pas re lino xukuje' jun awatz'iak ri sibalaj coc' u quemic;
Ezekiel16:11 xebencoj je'licalaj tak wikbal chawij
Ezekiel16:12 xincoj jun mulk'ab chatza'm
Ezekiel16:13 Xch'ukutaj awij ruc' k'an puak xukuje' sak puak; ri awatz'iak e re lino

Ezekiel16:15 Xa' jiquiba' c'u a c'u'x chrij ri a je'lical
Ezekiel16:16 Xebacoj tak ri awatz'iak che qui woquic lic'om tak cäbal ri quek'ijilax wi ri diosib paquiwi' tak ri juyub
Ezekiel16:17 Xebac'am tak ri a wikbal re k'an puak
Ezekiel16:18 xebacoj tak ri awatz'iak ri je'l tak qui ca'yebal chquij xachi'j c'u ri waseit chquiwäch xukuje' ri nu c'oc' k'ol.
Ezekiel16:19 Ri wa ri nu yo'm chawe
Ezekiel16:20 Xukuje' xebac'am c'ojolab xukuje' tak mialaxelab ri xebenwalc'ualaj awuc' xebaya' che tabal tok'ob chque tak we e diosib jacha' ta ne che tzukbal quib. ¿La ma ta xubana' chawe chi xatux quech ri nim ch'utin
Ezekiel16:21 xebaya' tak c'ut ri walc'ual che tabal tak tok'ob xebajach pa ri c'atic che qui cämisaxic
Ezekiel16:22 E rachil ri xojibalalaj a c'aslemal quech nim ch'utin man canataj ta chic chawe aretak at laj ali na at ch'analic
Ezekiel16:23 Are wa' ri quinjiquiba' u bixic
Ezekiel16:24 xebaban k'ijilabal ri quebak'ijilaj wi tak ri diosib pa ronojel c'olbal ri jamalic xajach c'u awib che ri cuban ri quech ri nim ch'utin.
Ezekiel16:25 Pa conojel tak ri u xo'l tak be xebawoc wi tak we c'olbal ri'
Ezekiel16:26 Xatijoj awib che u banic ri cäquiban ri quech ri nim ch'utin cuc' tak ri e a c'ulja
Ezekiel16:27 Xinwalijisaj c'ut ri nu k'ab che u c'äjisaxic a wäch: Xatinya' pa q'uetetil xatinjach pa qui k'ab ri aj pilisteyib
Ezekiel16:28 Man c'u xcu'bi ta a c'u'x ruc' wa'

Ezekiel16:30 In
Ezekiel16:31 Pa conojel tak ri u xo'l tak ri be pa ronojel c'olbal ri jamalic
Ezekiel16:32 Ri ixok ri xak quieb u pam ruc' ri rachajil
Ezekiel16:33 Ronojel ri cuban ri cäcan ri quech ri nim ch'utin cäya' jun tojbal rech; are c'u ri at xane' are caya' sipanic chque tak ri e awanima' awib cuc' rech pa ronojel c'olbal quepe wi ri quebelmacun awuc'.
Ezekiel16:34 Pa ri u c'ayixic awib a q'uexom ri caquiban ri quech ri nim ch'utin: man c'o ta jun catutzucuj che macunic

Ezekiel16:39 Catinjach c'u can pa qui k'ab
Ezekiel16:40 Caquiwalijisaj na quib ri tinimit chawij
Ezekiel16:41 Caquit'ik na k'ak' chque tak ri awachoch caquiya' c'u na ri c'äjisabal wächaj chawe chquiwäch ri tinimit ixokib. Quinsach na u tza'm ri quebabano jacha ri cäquiban ri quech ri nim ch'utin

Ezekiel16:43 At xsach pa a jolom aretak c'a at ac'al

Ezekiel16:47 Xac'am c'u awech ruc'

Ezekiel16:50 Xebux banal tak nimal xequiban c'u jastak ri e itzel quebenwilo; rumal ri' xinsachisaj qui wäch
Ezekiel16:51 Are c'u ri Samar
Ezekiel16:52 Are c'u ri at cach'ijijej na ri a mach'irisaxic
Ezekiel16:53 Ri in quintzelej chi na ri utzilal che ri Sodom rachil ri Samar
Ezekiel16:54 cach'ijijej c'u na ri a mach'irisaxic xukuje' ri a q'uixbal ri quel na che ri xabano
Ezekiel16:55 Aretak c'u ri Sodom rachil ri Samar xukuje' ri e alaj tak qui tinimit quebux chi na e jas ri nabe canok
Ezekiel16:56 Are c'u ri at man xatanaba' ta u yok'ic ri a chak' Sodom chi xc'äjisax u wäch

Ezekiel18:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel18:2 “¿Jasche pa Israel xak amak'el cäbix ri c'o pa tzij ri je cubij wa': ‘Ri tataxelab are' quetijow tak ri ch'amalaj tak uva are c'u casalabetaj ri qui ware ri alc'ualaxelab?’
Ezekiel18:3 In
Ezekiel18:4 Conojel ri winak pa nu k'ab e c'o wi'
Ezekiel18:5 Ri achi ri colom
Ezekiel18:6 Man are' ta jun pa tak ri ula'nic ri queboc'owisax paquiwi' tak juyub che qui ya'ic qui k'ij ri e diosib
Ezekiel18:7 man c'o ta jachin c'u c'axc'obisaj
Ezekiel18:8 man cuya' ta puak pa kajical ruc' jalbal rech mawi cutok'ij ta ral; man cuban ta c'ax che jachin jun; suc' aretak cuk'at tzij paquiwi' quieb winak aretak quech'ojinic;
Ezekiel18:9 je cubano jas ri caquibij tak ri nu pixab kas quebutz'akatisaj tak ri nu takomal. We achi ri' are' wa' ri kas colom ri u c'aslemal
Ezekiel18:10 We c'u we achi ri' c'o jun u c'ojol ri ch'u'j u jolom cäcämisan c'ut
Ezekiel18:11 ri man xebuban taj ri u tat
Ezekiel18:12 ri cuban c'ax che jun meba' xukuje' che ri c'o cajwataj che
Ezekiel18:13 ri cuya' puak pa kajical ruc' jalbal rech quebutok'ij c'u ral: we achi ri' man cacuin taj cäc'asi'c. Aretak e bantajinak chic conojel we jastak ri' ri itzel quebenwilo
Ezekiel18:14 Cäraj c'u ne we achi ri'
Ezekiel18:15 are tak wa'
Ezekiel18:16 mawi cuban c'ax che jachin jun; ri man queläk' taj che jachin jun
Ezekiel18:17 ri man cuban ta c'ax che jachin jun mawi cuya' puak pa kajic ruc' jalbal rech o ral; ri quebutz'akatisaj tak ri nu pixab ri je cubano jastak ri caquibij tak ri e nu takomal: we achi ri' man cäcäm taj cumal quech ri e u mac ri u tat. Kastzij cutakej c'aslemal.
Ezekiel18:18 Ri u tat
Ezekiel18:19 Ri ix quiban na we c'otoj chi'aj ri'
Ezekiel18:20 Xuwi ri winak ri camacunic cäcäm na. Mawi ri c'ojolaxel cukajbejtaj ta ri u mac ri tat mawi ri tat cukajbejtaj ta ri u mac ri c'ojolaxel. Ri suc' cuc'am na ri tojbal rech che ri u suq'uilal; ri banal etzelal
Ezekiel18:21 “We c'u ri banal etzelal cuk'il rib cutanaba' c'u qui banic conojel ri macaj ri e u banom can nabe
Ezekiel18:22 Ri in man quebennataj ta chic conojel ri etzelal ri e u banom
Ezekiel18:23 In man quinwaj taj chi cäcäm ri banal etzelal
Ezekiel18:24 We c'u ri suc' cutanaba' u banic ri suq'uilal are c'u cuban ronojel ri etzelal xukuje' ri xojibal ri cuban ri banal etzelal
Ezekiel18:25 Ri ix quibij chi man suq'uil taj ri cätajin quinbano; chatatabej c'ut tinimit aj Israel
Ezekiel18:26 We ri suc' cutanaba' u banic ri utzilal cutakej c'u u banic ri etzelal
Ezekiel18:27 We c'u ne ri banal etzelal cutanaba' u banic ri etzelal ri cätajin cubano cuban c'ut ri colomal xukuje' ri suq'uilal
Ezekiel18:28 We quebujak ri u bak'wäch cuk'il c'u rib man quebuban ta chic conojel ri etzelal ri e u banom can nabe
Ezekiel18:29 Are' c'u ri tinimit Israel cubij na chi man suq'uil taj ri cätajin quinbano. ¿La che ri in man suq'uil taj ri cätajin quinbano? ¿La ma ta lo are ri tinimit aj Israel ri man suq'uil taj ri cätajin cubano?
Ezekiel18:30 Ri in quink'at na tzij piwi' chijujunal

Ezekiel19:4 Xtataj u tzijol cumal tak ri nimak tak tinimit; xquicoj jun c'amibal che u chapic
Ezekiel19:5 Aretak xril ri ati't coj chi ri reyebal u c'u'x xban cuinem che u sachisaxic u wäch
Ezekiel19:6 Uxinak chi c'u jun tz'akatalaj coj
Ezekiel19:7 Quebuban c'ax pa tak ri cachoch ri ajawinelab queretzelaj tak ri e tinimit; cuc' tak ri u wunem cubano chi caslabetaj ronojel ri uwächulew.
Ezekiel19:8 Xquiwalijisaj c'u quib tak ri c'ulja tak tinimit chrij xequicoj tak c'amibal che xquiban c'u che chi xkaj chupam ri c'amibal.

Ezekiel20:7 Xinya' c'u takanic chque chnimalaj conojel chi chquisachisaj qui wäch tak ri e xojibalalaj tak qui diosib maquixk'olij c'u quib cuc' tak ri diosib aj Ejipt
Ezekiel20:8 Xa' c'u ne xquiwalijisaj quib chwij
Ezekiel20:9 Man c'u xinban taj

Ezekiel20:11 chila' c'u xinya' wi chque ri quetamaxic tak ri nu pixab xukuje' tak ri e nu takomal
Ezekiel20:12 Xukuje' xinya' quetamaxic tak ri e nu k'ij re uxlanem chque
Ezekiel20:13 Xa' c'u ne xquiwalijisaj quib chwij chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak
Ezekiel20:14 rumal c'ut u ya'ic u k'ij ri nu bi' man xinban taj
Ezekiel20:15 Xukuje' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na

Ezekiel20:17 Xel c'u nu c'u'x che u sachisaxic qui wäch

Ezekiel20:19 Xinbij chque: In ri' ri Ajawaxel ri i Dios. Chebitz'akatisaj qui banic tak ri nu pixab jas ri tz'ibatalic xukuje' tak ri takanic ri e nu yo'm qui bixic
Ezekiel20:20 nim c'u chequila' wi chi e tasom tak ri nu k'ij rech uxlanem
Ezekiel20:21 Xukuje' c'ut ri calc'ual wa' xquiwalijisaj quib chwij. Man xequinimaj ta ri nu pixab
Ezekiel20:22 xink'il c'u wib rech man quel ta u q'uixbal ri nu bi'
Ezekiel20:23 Chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak xinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Ezekiel20:24 rumal rech chi man xequitz'akatisaj taj qui banic tak ri e nu takomal
Ezekiel20:25 Xebencoj c'u ne na pixab paquiwi' ri man e utz taj xukuje' tak takomal ri man quequirik ta wi c'aslemal.
Ezekiel20:26 Xinya' be chque chi chquixk'olij tak quib rumal ri qui c'amic tak bic sipanic chque tak ri e diosib xequiporoj tak c'ut ri e nabeal tak qui c'ojol chque pa ri k'ak' che tabal tak tok'ob. Xinban c'u wa' rech quenoj che xe'n ib xukuje' caquich'ob c'ut chi in ri' ri Ajawaxel.’

Ezekiel22:5 Ri e c'o nakaj xukuje' ri e c'o naj caquit na a wäch

Ezekiel22:9 Rumal rech ri qui banoj tak tzij jujun chque ri e a winakil e are' ri e ajchak'maquib chi e c'o ri quecämic; e are' juch'ob quebe pa tak ri nimak'ij ri queboc'owisax paquiwi' tak ri juyub che u ya'ic qui k'ij tak ri diosib

Ezekiel23:4 Ri nabeal Ahol u bi' (cuq'uexwächij ri Samar)

Ezekiel23:37 We ixokib ri' e uxinak man e jic taj chwe e tz'ajtajinak ri qui k'ab che quic'. E uxinak man e jic taj quequik'ijilaj tak ri e diosib. Che c'u u ya'ic qui k'ij e qui kawisam tak ri kas e calc'ual pa ri k'ak'
Ezekiel23:38 Xequiban chi c'u ne we niq'uiaj etzelal ri' chwe: pa junam k'ij xquitz'iloj ri tastalicalaj wachoch xukuje' man nim ta xequil wi ri e tak nu k'ij re uxlanem.
Ezekiel23:39 Kas pa ri k'ij aretak xequiya' ri cal che tabal tok'ob che u ya'ic qui k'ij tak ri e diosib
Ezekiel23:40 Xequitak tako'n che qui siq'uixic ulok tak achijab ri naj e c'o wi
Ezekiel23:41 xquit'uyuba' quib puwi' jun ch'at ri sibalaj pakal rajil
Ezekiel23:42 Quetataj c'ut ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj ri q'uialaj winak ri cätajin quenimak'ijinic; e achijab ri e petinak pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Ezekiel23:43 Xinchomaj c'ut: ‘Camic quebequicojo' we quech ri nim ch'utin ri'
Ezekiel23:44 Xepe ruc' ri Ahol xukuje' ruc' ri Aholib
Ezekiel23:45 E are' tak c'ut ri achijab ri e suc' caquiya' na u bixic ri qui mac ri Samar xukuje' ri Jerusalen jacha' ri u k'atic tzij paquiwi' ri ixokib ri quekaj pa mac cuc' achijab xukuje' ri ixokib ri e cämisanelab tz'ajtajinak c'ut ri qui k'ab che quic'. Are je wa' ri qui mac ri Samar ri Jerusalen.”
Ezekiel23:46 Are wa' cubij ri Ajawaxel: “Chumulij rib ronojel ri tinimit chquij
Ezekiel23:47 Checämisax c'u che abaj rumal ronojel ri tinimit chquijulupij c'u cuc' tak ri e qui ch'ich' re ch'o'j; chequicämisaj c'ut ri calc'ual chi e alabom chi e alitomab chequiporoj ri cachoch.
Ezekiel23:48 In quinban na chi casach u wäch we itzel c'aslemal ri' pa ri ulew. Jeri' conojel ri ixokib cäya' na jun utzalaj tijonic chquiwäch man caquitakej ta c'u na u banic quech we itzel c'aslemal ri'.

Ezekiel26:7 In

Ezekiel26:9 Quequit'akij tak na ri e a nim tapia cuc' tak ak'anibal cuc' tak wi't quequit'akij tak na ri e tac'atak tak awachoch.
Ezekiel26:10 Aretak choc ri rajawinel ri Babilon chquipam tak ri e awoquibal je cäbanic aretak cäban oquem pa jun tinimit ri man c'o ta cänabexic cäch'aquic
Ezekiel26:11 ri quixq'uiak tak ri qui quiej quequixak'lej tak na ri a be xo'l tak ri ja. Ch'ich' re ch'o'j cucämisabej na rech ri a tinimit
Ezekiel26:12 Man c'o ta a k'inomal cäquiya' ta canok

Ezekiel27:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel27:2 “At
Ezekiel27:3 che ri Tir
Ezekiel27:4 ri a takanic copan c'a pa ri u c'u'x ri plo
Ezekiel27:5 Conojel tak ri e a tz'alamixic xeban cuc' tak chäj ri xec'am ulok pa ri c'ache'laj Senir; ri a che' ri tok'eninak ri awatz'iak pawi' xesax che jun chacalte' aj Libano;
Ezekiel27:6 ri e a ch'iquimibal bakit ri e petinak pa Basan xebanbex quech; ri u pa tak u xcut ri a jucub q'uisis xbanbex quech ri xec'am ulok pa tak ri tak'aj aj Chipr ri e ch'epel pa tak marpil.
Ezekiel27:7 Ri c'amal a be lino cojom che u banic tz'otom pa Ejipt cajwataj che etal chawe; ri atz'iak ri cätanix chupam ri a jucub e re morato xukuje' quiäk ri e c'amom ulok pa ri tak'aj aj Elis.
Ezekiel27:8 Ri achijab ri quepakchi'n ri a jucub e aj Sidon xukuje' aj Arbad
Ezekiel27:9 E niq'uiaj tak achijab aj Jebal aninak caquiban qui banic tak ri winak chi ri quebataklebej. Ajchaquib que conojel tak ri jucub aj plo ri que c'ayim tak ri e a c'ay.
Ezekiel27:10 Achijab aj Pers
Ezekiel27:11 ‘Winak aj Arbad
Ezekiel27:12 Sibalaj c'u nim ri a k'inomal
Ezekiel27:13 Xukuje' ri Gres ri Tubal xukuje' ri Mesec quelok'omanic xukuje' quec'ayin awuc'
Ezekiel27:14 Ri e aj Bet-togarm quiej re chac caquitojbej awech
Ezekiel27:15 Winak ri e aj Rods quec'ayinic xukuje' quelok'oman awuc'. Quebaban a ch'äcoj cuc' winak ri e c'o chuchi' ri plo
Ezekiel27:16 Ri Edom cuban c'ayinic awuc'
Ezekiel27:17 Ri Juda
Ezekiel27:18 Ri Damasc e q'ui ri a k'inomal ri quebulok'o'; catutoj ruc' u wa'l uva ri cape pa Helbon xukuje' rismal chij ri cape pa Sahar.
Ezekiel27:19 Kas pa Uzal cac'am wi ulok ri u wa'l uva chawe
Ezekiel27:20 Ri aj Dedan caquic'ayij c'ul re quiejebal quiej chawe.
Ezekiel27:21 Ri Arab xukuje' conojel ri c'o quekle'n pa Sedar e a lok'omanelab: ati'tab tak chij
Ezekiel27:22 Ri ajc'ayib aj Saba xukuje' aj Raam e a lok'omanelab
Ezekiel27:23 awuc' caquiban wi c'ayinic ri aj Haran
Ezekiel27:24 quequic'ayij coc'alaj tak quem chawe
Ezekiel27:25 Ri jucub ri quepe pa Tarsis
Ezekiel27:26 Ri e a ch'iquiminelab xatquic'am bic pa tak ri choalaj tak ja'
Ezekiel27:27 Ri a k'inomal
Ezekiel27:28 Ri qui rakoj tak chi'aj tak ri e awajchaquib xequiyicopisaj tak ri rekbala'.
Ezekiel27:29 Ri e ch'iquimil tak jucub xebel chquipam tak ri qui jucub; ri ajchaquib pa ri plo xukuje' conojel ri e c'amal tak qui be ri jucub xech'opin cho ri ulew.
Ezekiel27:30 Caquirak na qui chi' cacok'ej c'u na a wäch ruc' c'ayil. Caquiq'uiak na ulew pa qui jolom caquiwolkotij c'u na quib pa ri chaj.
Ezekiel27:31 U mac awech caquiban na tol che ri qui jolom
Ezekiel27:32 Caquibixoj c'u na jun bix re cämical chawe
Ezekiel27:33 Aretak quebopan ri e a c'ay ri quepe puwi' plo
Ezekiel27:34 Camic ri sachinak a wäch rumal ri plo
Ezekiel27:35 Conojel ri winak ri e jekel chuchi' ri plo quixibim quib rumal awech; ri e cajawinelab e nojinak che xe'n ib
Ezekiel27:36 Ri ajc'ayib ri quepe pa jule' tak ulew chic quenoj che xe'n ib aretak catquic'ayej. Atuxinak jun xibibalalaj jasach; kas xa' c'u jumul sachinak a wäch.’ ”

Ezekiel32:1 Pa ri nabe rajilabal ri ucablajuj ic' rech ri junab cablajuj
Ezekiel32:2 “Chabixoj we bix ri' re cämical che ri paraon

Ezekiel32:4 Catinjururej na cho ri ulew catinliq'uiba' c'u can puwi' ri ulew. Quinban c'u na chi conojel ri chicop ri c'o qui xic' ri querapap cho ri caj quetaq'ui' na pawi'
Ezekiel32:5 Quebennojisaj na tak ri juyub xukuje' tak ri beya' ruc' ri k'ayinakalaj a ti'jal.
Ezekiel32:6 Quinnebenobisaj ri ulew ruc' ri a quiq'uel
Ezekiel32:7 Aretak quinsachisaj a wäch
Ezekiel32:8 U mac awech quebenchup na conojel tak ri ch'imil ri quejuluw chicaj
Ezekiel32:9 Aretak copan qui tzijol ri u sachisaxic a wäch pa tak ri ulew ri man aweta'm ta qui wäch
Ezekiel32:10 U mac awech quebennojisaj na q'ui tinimit che xibriquil; ri e cajawinelab quebennojisaj na che mayinic aretak chinsutila' ri nu ch'ich' re ch'o'j chquiwäch. Aretak cattzakic
Ezekiel32:11 Ri Ajawaxel cubij: Ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri ajawinel re Babilon cäkaj na pawi'.
Ezekiel32:12 Quenbana' na chi ri e a tinimit ri man e ajilatal taj quesocotaj na rumal ri qui ch'ich' ri ajch'ojab ri man c'o ta jubik' tok'obisam wächaj cuc'. Caquiq'uis na tzij puwi' ri u nimalil ri Ejipt caquisachisaj c'u na qui wäch ri e u tinimit ri man e ajilatal taj.
Ezekiel32:13 Quinsachisaj na u wäch ronojel wacax ri caruq'uiaj rech chque tak ri e a ja'
Ezekiel32:14 C'äte ri' quinban na chi casakar ri ja' xukuje' chi ri nima' quelememic jacha' ri aseit. In

Ezekiel32:18 “At

Ezekiel32:21 Ri e c'amal tak be ri e c'o na tak qui cuinem quebequic'am na chupam ri rajawinic ri cämical
Ezekiel32:22 C'o ri Asiriy chi'

Ezekiel32:24 Chi' c'o wi ri Elam
Ezekiel32:25 Ri Elam tutz'ul chquixo'l conojel ri rajch'ojab e cäminak

Ezekiel33:5 xuta' c'ut ri rok'ibal ri trompet man c'o ta c'u xubij u c'u'x che; are' ajchak'mac che ri u cämical

Ezekiel33:17 Ri e a winakil caquibij na chi man suq'uilal taj ri quinbano; kas c'u ne tzij e are' ri quebanow ri man suq'uilal taj.

Ezekiel33:20 Ri ix amak'el quitzelej u bixic: ‘Ri Ajawaxel man suq'uilal taj ri cätajin cubano.’ Are' c'u ri in quink'at na tzij piwi' chijujunal

Ezekiel33:28 Quintoloba' na can ri ulew xukuje' quinya' can pa etzeletajic
Ezekiel33:29 Aretak quinya' canok chi cux chaki'j uwo sak xukuje' pa etzeletajic ri ulew qui mac ri xojibalaj tak qui mac ri xequibano
Ezekiel33:30 Ri e a winakil queyok'on chawe chquinakaj tak ri nimak tak tapia
Ezekiel33:31 Je c'u ri' ri nu tinimit cäpetic cat'uyi' chawäch
Ezekiel33:32 Ri e are' catquicoj che jacha' jun bixol tak bix rech taquenic

Ezekiel34:1 Ri Ajawaxel xinuch'abej
Ezekiel34:2 “At
Ezekiel34:3 Ri ix quikumuj ri leche
Ezekiel34:4 Ri ix man quebito' taj ri tukar tak chij

Ezekiel40:6 Xbe chi c'u pa ri oquibal ri cäca'y pa ri elebal k'ij

Ezekiel40:9

Ezekiel40:12 Chquiwäch jujun alaj tak ja c'o jun ch'utin nim tapia ri quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj u wäch xukuje' pa tak u xcut. Chquijujunal ri alaj tak ja ri qui pam oxib bara' ruc' niq'uiaj qui rabic.
Ezekiel40:13 Xretaj c'ut ri u wäch ronojel ri oquibal kas chupam ulok ri jujun alaj tak ja c'ä chupam ri jun alaj ja chic ri u c'alawichim rib ruc' xoc'ow pa ri jun uchi'ja xoc'ow pa ri jun uchi'ja chic ri u c'alawachim rib ruc'

Ezekiel40:15 Ri u rabic chi ronojel

Ezekiel40:18 We lajom abaj ri'

Ezekiel40:20 Xukuje' c'o jun oquibal ri cäca'y pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij che ri nabe uwo ja. Ri achi xretaj ri u rabic xukuje' ri u wäch.
Ezekiel40:21 Xukuje' e c'o ox ox alaj tak ja pa tak u xcut

Ezekiel40:26 E c'o wukub tanatob chuchi'

Ezekiel40:28 Xinuc'am c'u bic pa ri oquibal ri c'o pa ri u mox k'ab ri elebal k'ij ri cäca'y che ri ucab uwo ja. Xretaj ri oquibal ri c'o pa ri u mox k'ab elebal k'ij
Ezekiel40:29 Ri alaj tak u ja
Ezekiel40:30

Ezekiel40:32 Xinuc'am c'u bic chuwäch ri ucab uwo ja
Ezekiel40:33 Ri alaj tak u ja
Ezekiel40:34 Ri rakan ja cäca'y chuwäch ri ucab uwo ja. Ri e rakan tak ja e wiktal cuc' tak tut pa tak u xcut. Che ri oquem pa we uchi'ja ri' caban pakalem paquiwi' wajxakib tanatob.
Ezekiel40:35 Ri achi ri' xinuc'am bic pa ri oquibal ri cäca'y pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij xuretaj c'ut ri oquibal
Ezekiel40:36 ri xukuje' e c'o alaj tak u ja
Ezekiel40:37 Ri rakan ja cäca'y pa ri nabe uwo ja. Ri e rakan tak ja e wiktal cuc' tak tut pa tak qui xcut chquijujunal. Che ri oquem pa we oquibal ri' caban pakalem paquiwi' wajxakib tanatob.
Ezekiel40:38 C'o jun alaj ja ri catikow ri uwo ja ruc' ri oquibal. Chila' c'ut ri quech'aj wi ri awaj ri queya' che tabal tok'ob quechajirisaxic.
Ezekiel40:39 Pa ri uwo ja rech ri oquibal e c'o quiejeb mexa
Ezekiel40:40 Chrij ri uwo ja ri c'o pa ri oquibal ri cäca'y pa ri u riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij e c'o cacab mexa pa tak u xcut
Ezekiel40:41 jeri' e c'o quiejeb mexa pa ri ja xukuje' quiejeb mexa cho ri ja ri e c'o pa ri oquibal: cubana' wajxakib mexa chi conojel. Paquiwi' tak wa' quecämisax wi tak ri awaj.
Ezekiel40:42 Ri quiejeb mexa ri cajwataj chque ri awaj ri queporoxic e re abaj ri e esam pa ri juyub; jun bara' qui rabic jun bara' qui wäch
Ezekiel40:43

Ezekiel40:46 are c'u ri ja ri benak u wäch pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij are wa' ri cajwataj chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri quepatanij chuwäch ri porobal. E rija'lil ri Sadoc
Ezekiel40:47 Ri achi xuretaj ri ucab uwo ja

Ezekiel41:1 Xinuc'am chi c'u bic kas chupam ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:2 Ri oquibal wakib bara' u wäch; ri e rapalil oxib bara' quebetan ri qui wäch chquijujunal. Xretaj c'ut ri nimalaj ja ri c'o pa niq'uiajil
Ezekiel41:3 Xbe chi c'ut pa ri nimalaj ja ri c'o c'ä chupam xeretaj tak ri rakan ja ri e c'o pa ri oquibal
Ezekiel41:4 Xretaj c'ut ri nimalaj ja ri c'o c'ä chupam
Ezekiel41:5 Ri achi xuretaj ri tapia ri c'o chrij ri rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:6 We ja ri' quekle'n tak quib
Ezekiel41:7 Chquij c'ut ri alaj tak ja ri sutininak rij ri rachoch Dios c'o jun k'am ri copan c'ä ajsic
Ezekiel41:8 In xinwilo chi ronojel ri Rachoch Dios yacom puwi' jun tanatob ri naj elinak chicaj
Ezekiel41:9 ri tapia ri c'o chquij tak ri alaj tak ja oxib bara' u pimal
Ezekiel41:10 
Ezekiel41:11 Ri alaj tak ja caquirik quib rumal ri ch'akap ri jamalic rumal jun oquibal ri cäca'y pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij jun chi c'ut pa ri u mox elebal k'ij. Pa ri ch'akap ri jamalic c'o jun nim u tapia re oxib bara' u pimal.
Ezekiel41:12 Pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Ezekiel41:13 Ri achi xretaj ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:14 Ri u wäch ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:15 Xuretaj c'ut ri u rabic ri ja ri cäcanaj can chrij ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:16 Ri nimak tak ja ri e c'o chupam ri Rachoch Dios xukuje' ri uwo ja e ch'ukutal che tz'alam. Ri wenta'n ri e c'o k'atibal chquipam e ch'ukutal tak che tz'alam pa ri ox peraj. Ronojel ri quixe' xukuje' ri qui wi' tak ri oquibal e ch'ukutal che tz'alam. Ri e u tapia tak ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel41:17 
Ezekiel41:18 e nojinak tak che wikbal ri qui q'uexelam tak quib e cojom aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xukuje' tak tut. Chquijujunal tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' c'o cäcab qui palaj;
Ezekiel41:19 che ri joperaj
Ezekiel41:20 e c'o tak wikbal que aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xukuje' tak tut
Ezekiel41:21 ri apal re ri oquibal e c'o quieb akanil ri e caj tak tzalaj.
Ezekiel41:22 Chuwäch ri roquibal ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal c'o jun jasach ri je ta ne cäpe jun porobal ri banom ruc' che'
Ezekiel41:23 Ri nimalaj ja ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil jacha' ri Tastalicalaj C'olbal e c'o tak coquibal ri e pimak. Chquijujunal tak ri oquibal c'o cacab qui xak ri quebe chuwäch ri tapia aretak quejakic.
Ezekiel41:24 
Ezekiel41:25 Chque tak ri oquibal chupam ri nimalaj ja ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil e tzoc'om aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' xukuje' tak tut
Ezekiel41:26 Pa tak ri u xcut ri rakan ja e c'o tak wenta'n ri e c'o tak qui k'atibal e wiktal c'u cuc' tak tut. Ri alaj tak ja ri qui tikom tak quib chrij ri Rachoch Dios xukuje' c'o tak qui wi' re che'.
Ezekiel42:1 Ri achi xinuc'am bic chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja ri cäca'y pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:2 We e ja tak ri' quebetan oxc'al jun (61) bara' qui rabic pa ri riquiak'ab elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:3 Che ri juperaj cäca'y chuwäch ri ucab uwo ja
Ezekiel42:4 Chquiwäch ri alaj tak ja c'o jun oc'owibal ri c'o wakib bara' u wäch oxc'al jun bara' c'ut u rabic
Ezekiel42:5 Ri alaj tak ja ri e oxwik e ch'utik na chquiwäch ri e c'o pa ri cawik xukuje' chque ri e c'o chquixe'.
Ezekiel42:6 We alaj tak ja ri oxwik banom chque
Ezekiel42:7 Conojel ri alaj tak ja ri e c'o cho ri nabe uwo ja juwinak lajuj bara' ruc' niq'uiaj quebetan ri qui c'olbal. Chquiwäch conojel ri alaj tak ja c'o jun nimalaj tapia re juwinak lajuj bara' ruc' niq'uiaj u rabic
Ezekiel42:8 
Ezekiel42:9 Chquixe' ri alaj tak ja c'o wi ri oquibal ri u bixic pa ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:10 Pa ri c'olbal ri copan wi ri nimalaj tapia re ri nabe uwo ja. Pa ri u mox k'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:11 ri xak junam qui bantajic xukuje' junam que etanic
Ezekiel42:12 Che ri opanem c'ä pa ri alaj tak ja ri e c'o pa ri u mox k'ab elebal k'ij c'o jun oquibal ri cächaptaj wi bic ri oc'owibal ri c'o chuwäch ri nimalaj tapia re k'atibal
Ezekiel42:13 Ri achi xubij chwe: “Ri alaj tak ja ri e c'o pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij jacha' ri e c'o pa ri u mox k'ab elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:14 We c'u xeboc ri e cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri Rachoch Dios man ya'tal ta chi chque quebel ulok chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja we man nabe quequiya' can ri atz'iak chi' ri e qui cojom aretak xequiban ri patanijic
Ezekiel42:15 Aretak ri achi xuq'uis retaxic ri u pam ri Rachoch Dios
Ezekiel42:16 Xuc'am ri che' re etanic
Ezekiel42:17 Xretaj chi c'ut ri juperaj ri c'o pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:18 xretaj chi c'ut ri juperaj ri c'o pa ri u mox elebal k'ij: oxib sient job bara' (305);
Ezekiel42:19 chuq'uisbalil ri juperaj ri c'o pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Ezekiel42:20 Xuretaj pa ri u cajtzalajil. Ri rulew ri Rachoch Dios c'o jun nim tapia chrij: oxib sient job (305) bara' pa tak u xcut
Ezekiel43:1 Ri achi xinuc'am bic chuchi' ri oquibal ri cäca'y pa elebal k'ij.
Ezekiel43:2 Xinwil c'ut chi ri u juluwem ri u Dios ri Israel petinak pa ri elebal k'ij. Xtataj jun cowilaj chojojem
Ezekiel43:3 Ri c'utwächinic jacha' ri xinwilo aretak xpe ri Ajawaxel che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Jerusalen
Ezekiel43:4 are c'ut ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel xoc c'ä chupam ri rachoch pa ri oquibal ri c'o pa ri elebal k'ij.
Ezekiel43:5 Xinuwalijisaj c'ut ri u cuinem ri Dios xinuc'am c'ubic chuwäch ri ucab uwo ja
Ezekiel43:6 Ri achi xuya' rib chi nu nakaj
Ezekiel43:7 Cubij c'u ulok chwe: “Are' c'olbal wa' rech ri nu tem re ajawinel
Ezekiel43:8 mawi quequiyaca' ta chi ne na nimak tak cachoch ri quecanaj ta chi can tak ri coquibal chuxcut ri qui oquibalil ri wachoch
Ezekiel43:9 Che qui najtajisaj c'ut camic ri itzel tak qui banoj chwe xukuje' ri u cojic tak ri qui tz'ak tak ri cajawinelab
Ezekiel43:10 Are c'u ri at
Ezekiel43:11 We c'u queq'uix che ronojel ri qui banom
Ezekiel43:12 Are wa' ri pixab che ri wachoch: ronojel ri ulew ri c'o chrij ri wachoch puwi' ri juyub are' jun c'olbal ri sibalaj tastal na.”
Ezekiel43:13 E are tak retabalil wa' ri porobal
Ezekiel43:14 Kas chupam ulok ri u be ja' c'ä chuchi' ri nabe u chi' ri porobal
Ezekiel43:15 Ri u wi' ri porobal
Ezekiel43:16 Ri porobal cajtzalaj
Ezekiel43:17 Ri porobal ri c'o pa u niq'uiajil xukuje' cajtzalaj wajxakib bara' ruc' niq'uiaj ri u pa tak u xcut. Ri u be ja' quieb k'abaj ruc' niq'uiaj k'abaj u wäch
Ezekiel43:18 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel chwe: “Aretak chopan ri jok'otaj che u banic ri porobal quetz'akatisax tak we etanic ri' che: caporox na puwi' we porobal ri' jun awaj ri cachäjirisaxic
Ezekiel43:19 Chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e aj levitib ri e rija'lil ri Sadoc
Ezekiel43:20 Quic'am c'u jubik' ri u quiq'uel qui chicoj c'u chquij ri quiejeb u c'a'
Ezekiel43:21 Cac'am c'u bic ri alaj ama' wacax ri xchi'x che u q'uexwäch ri macaj
Ezekiel43:22 Chucab k'ij cachi'j na
Ezekiel43:23 Are tak caq'uis qui banic tak we nak'atisabal ri' re josk'ibal
Ezekiel43:24 quebachi'j c'u chwe. Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e are che chicom ri atz'am chrij

Ezekiel43:26 K'ij chk'ij
Ezekiel43:27 Wukub k'ij qui takej u banic wa'
Ezekiel44:1 Ri achi xinuc'am chi bic chuchi' ri oquibal ri c'o chrij ri Rachoch Dios ri cäca'y pa ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel44:2 Chila' xubij wi ri Ajawaxel chwe: “We oquibal ri' catz'apij canok; man ya'tal taj u jakic. Man c'o ta jun coc'ow ta chila'
Ezekiel44:3 Xuwi cuya' coc ri cäk'atan tzij
Ezekiel44:4 Ri achi xinuc'am chi c'u bic pa ri oquibal ri c'o pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel44:5 Xubij c'ut ri Ajawaxel chwe: “At
Ezekiel44:6 Chabij che we tinimit Israel ri' ri man taltatzij: ‘Are wa' cubij ri Ajawaxel: Chtanabax qui banic ri itzel tak chac ri itzel quebenwilo
Ezekiel44:7 Ri ix qui wawasij ri wachoch quebiya' c'u c'olbal chi queboc ri man e i winakil taj chupam
Ezekiel44:8 Man e qui tz'akatisam ta c'ut ri tastalicalaj tak nu nak'atisabal
Ezekiel44:9 Rumal ri' in
Ezekiel44:10 Ri e aj levitib
Ezekiel44:11 Quecuinic quepatanij chupam ri wachoch xa' che e chajil tak oquibal
Ezekiel44:12 Ri e are' xec'oji' che qui patanixic ri aj israelib che u c'amic u be ri k'ijilanic chque tak ri e diosib
Ezekiel44:13 Man ya'tal ta chi chque chi quec'oji' pa ri nu patanijic jacha' e cojol tabal tok'ob mawi quekeb ta chque ri tastalicalaj tak jastak wech
Ezekiel44:14 Quebencoj na che u banic apachique chac chupam ri wachoch
Ezekiel44:15 “Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e aj levitib ri e rija'lil ulok ri Sadoc
Ezekiel44:16 Xukuje' cuya' queboc pa ri wachoch quekeb c'u che ri nu porobal che nu patanixic
Ezekiel44:17 Aretak queboc chupam ri uchi'ja rech ri ucab uwo ja
Ezekiel44:18 Caquicoj bic jun pisbal jolomaj re lino
Ezekiel44:19 C'ä majok c'u chebel bic chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja
Ezekiel44:20 Man caquiban ta tol che ri qui jolom
Ezekiel44:21 C'o jun cojol tabal tok'ob mutij u wa'l uva aretak choc chupam ri ucab uwo ja.
Ezekiel44:22 Mac'uli' ruc' jun malca'n ixok o jachom
Ezekiel44:23 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob rajawaxic quequitijoj ri nu tinimit che ri u c'oxomaxic ri u jalbem rib ri tastalic ruc' ri man tastal taj
Ezekiel44:24 Aretak e c'o ch'o'j rajawaxic e are' quebux k'atal tak tzij
Ezekiel44:25 Man ya'tal ta chque chi caquinak jun cäminak
Ezekiel44:26 We quequibano
Ezekiel44:27 Aretak c'u cheboc chic chuwäch ri ucab uwo ja ri c'o chuwäch ri Rachoch Dios che u tz'akatisaxic u banic ri qui patanijic
Ezekiel44:28 Xuwi c'u ri in in echbal ri caquic'am na ri e cojol tabal tok'ob jacha' echbal. Man c'o ta jun jasach caya' ta chque pa Israel rech cux ta quech. In ri in quechbal.
Ezekiel44:29 Cuya' quequitij ri e u wächinic tak ri ulew ri quelquichi'j ri aj israelib chwe
Ezekiel44:30 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob caquic'am na xukuje' ri nabe utzalaj tak qui wächinic tak ri ulew xukuje' conojel tak ri sipanic ri quebelyokok. Aretak c'u ri ix quisuc'umaj ri k'or che ri wa
Ezekiel44:31 Ri e cojol tabal tok'ob man ya'tal ta chque chi caquitij jun chicop ri c'o u xic' o jun awaj ri xak c'ätetal cäcämic
Ezekiel45:1 “Aretak chiban ri taklebenic che u jachic ri ulew che u ya'ic ri culew tak ri amak'
Ezekiel45:2 Chila' cätas wi na ri cajwataj che ri rachoch Dios cajtzalaj
Ezekiel45:3 Chupam ri ch'akap ulew ri cätas che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel quetax na jun ulew re quieb legua ruc' niq'uiaj u rabic jun legua c'u u wäch
Ezekiel45:4 Ri u tz'akatil we ch'akap ulew ri' are caya' wa' chque tak ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri quepatanij chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri quekeb chuwäch che u patanixic. Chila' c'o wi ri c'olbal chque tak ri cachoch. Jun c'olbal wa' ri tastalic u tz'akatil ri rachoch Dios.
Ezekiel45:5 C'o chi c'u na
Ezekiel45:6 Chuq'uisbalil
Ezekiel45:7 “Xukuje' c'o na jun ulew ri catas na can che ri k'atal tzij. Ch'akap cacanaj pa ri elebal k'ij ch'akap chic cäcanaj pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Ezekiel45:8 We ulew ri' cux na rech ri k'atal tzij pa Israel; jeri' ri k'atal tak tzij man caquiban ta chi c'ax che ri nu tinimit
Ezekiel45:9 “In
Ezekiel45:10 Chebicojo' tz'akatalaj tak pajbal xukuje' tz'akatalaj tak etabal.
Ezekiel45:11 Ri pajbal che ri qui wächinic tak ri ulew rajawaxic xak junam ruc' ri pajbal ri cäcoj che u pajic ri ja'. Ri ‘omer’ re quieb sient ruc' juwinak (220) litro are cajwataj wa' che junamil. Jun ‘bato’ apachique ja' rajawaxic capajan jun u lajujil ‘omer’. (Ri ‘bato’ capajan juwinak quieb (22) litro). Jun ‘epa’ quech qui wächinic tak ri ulew xak junam ruc' jun u lajujil ri ‘omer’. (Ri ‘epa’ capajan juwinak quieb (22) litro.)
Ezekiel45:12 Xak junam cuc' tak ri pajbal tak alal: juwinak ‘jera’ xak junam ruc' jun ‘siclo’ ri junam ruc' niq'uiaj onz. Oxc'al (60) ‘siclo’ xak junam ruc' jun ‘mina’. (Ri ‘mina’ capajan jun libra ruc' job onz.)
Ezekiel45:13 E are tak sipanic wa' ri rajawaxic qui banic iwumal: Quijach u wäch ri trico
Ezekiel45:14 Junam quiban che
Ezekiel45:15 Are c'u ri cäban chque ri chij
Ezekiel45:16 Conojel pa ri ulew e takchitalic che u jachic we sipanic ri' che ri k'atal tzij pa Israel.
Ezekiel45:17 Pa u k'ab c'u c'o wi ri qui jachic ri awaj ri quechajirisaxic
Ezekiel45:18 “In
Ezekiel45:19 Ri cojol tabal tok'ob cuc'am na jubik' u quiq'uel ri awaj ri xchi'x che tabal tok'ob u mac rech ri macaj
Ezekiel45:20 Xukuje' c'u cäban pa ri uwuk rajilabal ri ic' che u to'ic apachin ta ne ri man xunabejtaj xkaj pa jun macaj o man xuch'ob taj. Je caban wa' che u josk'ixic ri Wachoch.
Ezekiel45:21 Pa ri ucajlajuj rajilabal ri nabe ic' quichaplej roc'owisaxic ri nimak'ij rech ri oc'owem
Ezekiel45:22 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri k'atal tzij cuchi'j na jun alaj ama' wacax che tabal tok'ob qui mac quech ri kas e u mac ri e u banom xukuje' qui mac quech ronojel ri u banom ri tinimit
Ezekiel45:23 chquijujunal c'ut ri wukub k'ij ri cäbeytaj ri nimak'ij quebuchacaba' na wukub alaj tak ama'ib wacax xukuje' wukub chij conojel ma ta c'o jun qui yab
Ezekiel45:24 Chque tak ri jujun alaj tak ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' jujun chij cätik jun sipanic re juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) libra qui wächinic tak ri ulew xukuje' oxib litro aseit ruc' niq'uiaj.”
Ezekiel45:25 “Xukuje' pa ri nimak'ij que tak ri Cäbal
Ezekiel46:1 “In
Ezekiel46:2 U petic ri k'atal tzij pa ri nabe uwo ja
Ezekiel46:3 Pa tak ri k'ij rech uxlanem xukuje' pa tak ri k'ij rech ri nabe ic'
Ezekiel46:4 Ri awaj tak ri quebuchacaba' ri k'atal tzij pa ri k'ij rech uxlanem che qui poroxic jacha' che sipanic che ri Ajawaxel pa ri k'ij re uxlanem e wakib alaj ama'ib tak chij xukuje' jun ama' chij
Ezekiel46:5 Chque jujun ama'ib chij cuchi'j na juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) libra qui wächinic tak ri ulew
Ezekiel46:6 Pa ri k'ij rech ri c'ac' ic' cuchi'j na jun alaj ama' wacax
Ezekiel46:7 Chque jujun alaj tak ama'ib tak wacax cuchi'j na juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) libra qui wächinic tak ri ulew
Ezekiel46:8 Aretak coc ri k'atal tzij
Ezekiel46:9 Aretak c'u queboc'owisax tak ri nimak'ij coc c'ut ri tinimit che u k'ijilaxic ri Ajawaxel
Ezekiel46:10 Ri k'atal tzij rajawaxic coc junam ruc' ri tinimit xukuje' quelbic junam ruc' ri tinimit.
Ezekiel46:11 Chupam ri jalan tak nimak'ij quechi'x na juwinak wajxaklajuj (38) libra qui wächinic tak ri ulew che jujun alaj tak ama'ib wacax

Ezekiel46:13 “Ronojel k'ij ak'abibal cächi'x jun alaj chij
Ezekiel46:14 Junam

Ezekiel46:18 Ri k'atal tzij man c'o ta pa u k'ab ri u tokixic ta ri rechbal apachique winak. Ri echbal ri chuya' chque ri e u c'ojol
Ezekiel46:19 Ri achi xinuc'am c'u bic

Ezekiel46:21 Xinuc'am c'u bic chuwäch ri nabe uwo ja xuban chwe chi xebensolij ri quiejeb u xcut. Xinwilo chi pa ri quiejeb u xcut ri uwo ja e c'o chic jujun uwo ja ch'utik. Conojel xak junam quebetanic juwinak quieb (22) bara' ruc' niq'uiaj qui rabic wajxaklajuj (18) bara' ruc' jun k'abaj qui wäch;

Ezekiel47:1 Ri achi xuban chwe chi xintzelej chi na chuchi' ri cäban wi oquem chupam ri Rachoch Dios. Xinwil c'ut chi quel ulok ja' chuxe' ri oquibal
Ezekiel47:2 Xuban c'u chwe chi xinresaj chupam ri rulewal ri Rachoch Dios chupam ri oquibal ri c'o pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel47:3 Xel c'u bic ri achi chusuq'uilal ri elebal k'ij xuc'am c'ut jun etabal c'am pa u k'ab
Ezekiel47:4 Xretaj chi c'ut juwinak quiejeb (24) c'am xuban c'u chwe chi xintakej oquem chupam ri ja'; xopan c'u ri ja' chwe c'ä puwi' tak nu ch'ec. Xretaj chi c'u juwinak quiejeb (24) c'am xuban c'u chwe chintakej oquem chupam ri ja'; ri ja' xopan chwe c'ä xe' nu pam.
Ezekiel47:5 Xretaj chi juwinak quiejeb (24) c'am ri ja' uxinak chic jun nima' ri man xincuintaj xintakej ta oquem chupam; uxinak chi c'u jun nima' ri sibalaj cho u pam ri xuwi cuya' cäban oc'owem chupam we cäban muxinic.
Ezekiel47:6 Xubij c'u chwe: “Kas co chaca'yej ri awilom.” Xuban c'u chwe chi xintzelej chuchi' ri nima'.
Ezekiel47:7 Xinwil c'ut chi sibalaj e q'ui ri che' ri e tiquitoj che ri quieb u chi'.
Ezekiel47:8 Xubij c'u chwe: “We ja' ri' cäbe pa ri ulew ri c'o pa ri elebal k'ij ri quekaj c'ä xo'l tak ri abaj c'ä chuchi' ri Jordan
Ezekiel47:9 Pa apachique c'olbal ri copan wi we ja' ri'
Ezekiel47:10 Kas pa En-gad c'ä pa En-eglaim cawinikir na chapal tak cär
Ezekiel47:11 Pa tak c'ut ri suk xukuje' pa tak ri chemelic tak ja' man e c'o ta ja' qui'; chila' cäcanaj wi can ri ja' ri c'a che atz'am
Ezekiel47:12 Che ri quieb u chi' ri nima' queq'uiy na ronojel qui wäch tak che' ri quequiya' qui wächinic. Ri e qui xak mawi jumul quepulpubic
Ezekiel47:13 “In
Ezekiel47:14 Quinban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na xincha' in chi quinya' we ulew ri' chque ri e i mam. Chijacha' chiwäch junam chibana' che. We ulew ri' are iwechbal wa'.
Ezekiel47:15 Ri c'ulbat tak pa ri riquiak'ab ri elebal k'ij
Ezekiel47:16 ri Berot xukuje' ri Sibraim (ri e c'o pa ri rulew ri Damasc xukuje' pa ri rulew ri Hamat)
Ezekiel47:17 Je ba' ri'

Ezekiel47:19 Ri e c'ulbatil aj u mox elebal k'ij quechaptaj bic ruc' ri Tamar
Ezekiel47:20 Ri c'ulbatil aj kajebal k'ij are' ri Plo ri Mediteran
Ezekiel47:21 Are' ulew wa' ri rajawaxic u jachic chquiwäch ri cablajuj ramak' ri Israel.
Ezekiel47:22 Are' echbal wa' ri ya'tal chiwe
