Habakkuk2:20 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel c'o chupam ri tastalicalaj rachoch: ¡Chixyinil chuwäch are' ronojel ri uwächulew!
Habakkuk3:1 Are wa' ri u ch'awem ri Habacuc (ri k'axal u tzij) ruc' ri Dios:
Habakkuk3:2 Ri tzijol la ri quinto
Habakkuk3:3 Ri Dios quel na ulok chupam ri rulew ri Teman; are c'u ri tastalic Dios petinak wi ulok pa ri juyub Paran. Ri u juluwem culic' rib chuwäch ronojel ri caj
Habakkuk3:4 Quel ulok pistal chupam juluwemalaj chuplinic
Habakkuk3:5 Chuwäch ri are' quebopan wi ri cämisanelalaj tak yabil
Habakkuk3:6 Ri ulew cäyicopic aretak ri are' cätaqui'c; quebirbob ri nimak tak tinimit aretak quebuca'yej; ri e ojer tak juyub quewulijic queja'r c'ut ri ojer tak juyub; e are' tak c'ut ri e u be ri Dios e re chbe k'ij sak.
Habakkuk3:7 In e wilom ri winak re Cusan e bik'itajinak chupam ri quiäkasakilal
Habakkuk3:8 ¿La e yactajinak oyowal la
Habakkuk3:9 Suc'umam la ri q'uiakbal ch'ab xukuje' xak e c'o tak conojel tak ri ch'ab. Cumal tak ri nima' e banom la k'et pa ri ulew.
Habakkuk3:10 Ri tacatak tak juyub queyicopic aretak quil la cumal; quetzokopitaj ulok ri nimak tak jäb cho ri caj
Habakkuk3:11 Ri k'ij xukuje' ri ic' man quebel ta ulok chupam ri c'olbal quib chuwäch ri c'aslicalaj quijulk'inic ri e ch'ab la xukuje' tak ri e ruc'upinic che ri tz'imaj ch'ich' la.
Habakkuk3:12 Chupam ri oyowal la cabinibej la ronojel ri uwächulew; chupam ri c'anal la quexak'alej la ri nimak tak tinimit.
Habakkuk3:13 Ri lal
Habakkuk3:14 Xcämisaj la ri c'amal u be cumal tak ri kas e u ch'ab
Habakkuk3:15 Cumal tak ri e quiej la cabinibej la ri plo
Habakkuk3:16 Aretak xinta' ronojel wa' xinxe'j wib. Ri e nu chi' xequichaplej birbitem
Habakkuk3:17 C'äte c'u ri' quinnoj na che quicotemal rumal ri Ajawaxel ri nu Colonel. Quink'ijilan na che pune' man quecotz'ijan tak ri e qui che'al tak higo mawi chiquiya' ta qui wächinic tak ri juwi' tak uva xukuje' tak ri e qui che'al tak ri aseitun; pune' man e c'o ta chi wächinic pa tak ri juyub; pune' casach qui wäch ri jumulaj tak chij ma ta c'u ne e c'o chic wacax pa tak ri e qui cäbal.
Habakkuk3:18 
Habakkuk3:19 Quebuya' c'ut nu chuk'ab ri Ajawaxel
Zephaniah1:1 Are tzijobelil wa' ri xuya' u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Soponiy pa ri k'ijol aretak ri Josiy ajawinel c'u wa' re Juda (ri u tat ri Josiy are' ri Amon). Ri u tat ri Soponiy are' ri Cusi
Zephaniah1:2 Are wa' cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel: “Ruc' tz'akatil quinsachisaj na u wäch ronojel ri c'o cho ri uwächulew.
Zephaniah1:3 Quinsachisaj na qui wäch ri winak xukuje' tak ri awaj
Zephaniah1:4 “Quinyuk na ri nu k'ab che u banic c'ax che ri tinimit Juda xukuje' chque ri e jekejoj pa Jerusalen. Quinchupisaj na chupam we c'olbal ri' ronojel ri u nataxic ri dios Baal
Zephaniah1:5 Quinsachisaj na qui wäch ri quepaki' paquiwi' tak ri ja che qui k'ijilaxic tak ri ch'imil
Zephaniah1:6 Xukuje' quinsachisaj na qui wäch ri caquitas tak quib chwij
Zephaniah1:7 ¡Xak ba' chixyinil chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Zephaniah1:8 Cacha' ri Ajawaxel: “Pa ri k'ij ri cacoj ri tabal tok'ob quenc'äjisaj na qui wäch ri e c'amal tak be
Zephaniah1:9 Xukuje' quinc'äjisaj na qui wäch pa ri k'ij ri' ri quequixalk'atij tak apal
Zephaniah1:10 Are' wa' cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel: “Pa ri k'ij ri' quetataj na rakoj tak chi'aj re u tz'onoxic to'banic c'ä chuchi' ri Coquibal ri Cär. Caquirak na qui chi' ri winak che ri Ucab u Ch'akapil ri tinimit cätataj c'u na nimalaj wilijem c'ä paquiwi' tak ri juyub.
Zephaniah1:11 ¡Chixawunok ix
Zephaniah1:12 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quinc'am na jun chäj quintzucun c'u na chupam ri Jerusalen. Quinc'äjisaj c'u na u wäch ri winak ri xak cat'uyic ri man cubisoj taj jacha' ta ne ri u wa'l uva ri xak chemelic
Zephaniah1:13 Rumal ri' ri e u k'inomal quec'otix na bic xukuje' tak rachoch queyojix na. Quequiyac tak na cächoch
Zephaniah1:14 ¡Nakaj chic c'o wi ri nimalaj u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! ¡Nakaj chic c'o wi
Zephaniah1:15 Cux na jun k'ij re nimalaj oyowarem
Zephaniah1:16 cux na jun k'ij re trompet xukuje' re rakoj chi'aj che u banic c'ax chque ri tinimit tak ri e c'o tak tapia chquij xukuje' e tac'atak tak ja.
Zephaniah1:17 Je wa' cächa' ri Ajawaxel: “Quebencoj na ri winak pa aninakil. Quebin c'u na e jacha' ta ne moyab
Zephaniah1:18 Pa ri k'ij re ri nimalaj royowal ri Ajawaxel
Zephaniah2:1 Chimulij iwib
Zephaniah2:2 c'ä majok chixq'uiak bic jacha' ta ne ri pajo
Zephaniah2:3 Chitzucuj ri Ajawaxel iwonojel ix ri imach'om iwib ri ix aj we uwächulew ri'
Zephaniah2:4 Ri tinimit re Gaz cajamajob canok
Zephaniah2:5 ¡Tok'ob i wäch ix
Zephaniah2:6 Ri ulew ri c'o chuchi' ri plo cak'ayeser na jawije' ri caquimulij wi na quib ri ajyuk'ab
Zephaniah2:7 Ri queto'taj can che ri tinimit Juda queboc na che rechbexic we ulew ri' aretak chpe ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios che qui to'ic cuq'uex c'u na ri qui taklebem. Chila' quequichajij wi na tak ri qui jumulajaj
Zephaniah2:8 Are wa' cujiquiba' u bixic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Zephaniah2:9 
Zephaniah2:10 Are tojbal wa' ri caquic'am na ri Moab xukuje' ri Amon u mac rech chi xquitzur ri u tinimit ri Ajawaxel
Zephaniah2:11 Ri Ajawaxel cux na xibibal chque. Cusachisaj na qui wäch conojel ri e u diosib ri ulew
Zephaniah2:12 ¡Xukuje' ri ix
Zephaniah2:13 Cuyuk c'u na are ri u k'ab che u banic c'ax pa ri iquiak'ab che u sachisaxic u wäch ri Asiriy
Zephaniah2:14 Ri che' ri e c'o chque tak ri cachoch quebok na
Zephaniah2:15 Are tinimit wa' ri nojinak che nimal ri jekelic ri u cuban u c'u'x
Zephaniah3:1 ¡Tok'ob u wäch ri Jerusalen
Zephaniah3:2 Man xutatabej taj ri u ch'abal ri Ajawaxel man xujiquiba' ta u c'u'x chrij
Zephaniah3:3 Ri e c'amal tak qui be xak e junam cuc' tak ri coj ri quewu'nic; ri e qui k'atal tzij xak e junam cuc' tak ri utiw ri e c'o pa ri chaki'j uwo sak ri man c'o ta jun bak ri caquiya' ta can che re chwek.
Zephaniah3:4 Ri e k'axal tak tzij ri e c'o cuc' e nimol tak quib
Zephaniah3:5 C'o c'ut ri Ajawaxel chupam ri tinimit; ri are' are cuban ri utz
Zephaniah3:6 Cacha' ri Ajawaxel: “E nu yojim ri nimak tak tinimit
Zephaniah3:7 Xinchomaj: ‘Jeri' ri Jerusalen cuxe'j na rib chnuwäch cuc'amowaj c'u na chi quinjic'o; jeri' man cäsach ta na u wäch ri u c'olbal rumal rech chi xinc'äjisaj u wäch.’ E are tak c'ut ri e are are xcanej qui banic ronojel qui wäch tak etzelal.
Zephaniah3:8 Rumal ri'
Zephaniah3:9 Aretak chopan wa'
Zephaniah3:10 Ch'käp chque tak ri nima' re Etiopiy
Zephaniah3:11 Pa ri k'ijol ri'
Zephaniah3:12 In quebenya' canok awuc' winak ri e mach'amoj ri man nim ta qui banic
Zephaniah3:13 Ri queto'taj can che ri tinimit Israel man caquiban ta chi c'ut ri man suq'uilal taj
Zephaniah3:14 ¡Chatbixonok
Zephaniah3:15 Ri Ajawaxel u najtajisam chawe ri u c'äjisaxic a wäch e u najtajisam c'u bic ri qui banom qui c'ulel chawe. Ri Ajawaxel
Zephaniah3:16 Pa ri k'ijol ri' cäbix na che ri Jerusalen: “¡Maxe'j awib
Zephaniah3:17 Ri Ajawaxel ri a Dios c'o pa a niq'uiajil; ¡Ri are c'o ronojel u cuinem
Zephaniah3:18 jacha' ta ne pa jun k'ij re nimak'ij. Cacha' ri Ajawaxel: “In catinto'tajisaj c'u na che ri lawaloyil ri kajem cuban pawi'
Zephaniah3:19 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quink'atij na qui wäch conojel ri quebanow c'ax chawe. Quinto' na ri chij ri cach'ocopic quinyukej na ri sachinak; quinjalwächij na pa nim ilic xukuje' pa utzalaj tzijol pa ronojel ri uwächulew
Zephaniah3:20 Pa ri k'ijol ri' quixinc'am na ulok ix
Haggai1:1 Chupam ri ucab junab re ri rajawinic ri ajawinel Dariy
Haggai1:2 Are wa' ri xubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem rumal ri k'axal u tzij: “We winak ri' caquibij c'ä maja' copan ri k'ijol che u banic ri wachoch.
Haggai1:3 
Haggai1:4 ¿La are ta c'u k'ijol chiwe ix quixjeki' chquipam je'licalaj tak ja ri nimak qui banic
Haggai1:5 In
Haggai1:6 Ri ix
Haggai1:7 In
Haggai1:8 Jix pa tak ri c'ache'laj
Haggai1:9 Ri ix sibalaj q'ui ri quitzucuj xa' c'u jubik' ri quiriko; are c'ut ri quic'ol chupam ri iwachoch
Haggai1:10 Rumal ri' man c'o ta jäb cäkaj piwi'
Haggai1:11 In ri xinc'amow ulok ri sak'ij paquiwi' tak ri ulew xukuje' paquiwi' tak ri juyub
Haggai1:12 Ri Zorobabel
Haggai1:13 Are c'ut ri Hajey
Haggai1:14 Je xuban wa' ri Ajawaxel che u ya'ic chajin anima' che ri Zorobabel
Haggai1:15 
Haggai2:1 Chupam ri juwinak jun rajilabal ri uwuk ic'
Haggai2:2 Xuya' c'u takanic che chi chubij che ri Zorobabel
Haggai2:3 “Ri xquil can ri jun rachoch Dios chic ruc' ronojel ri u je'lical
Haggai2:4 ¡Chachajij anima'
Haggai2:5 Je jacha' ri xinchi'j che aretak xel ulok pa Ejipt
Haggai2:6 Xa' pa quieb oxib k'ij quenbana' na chi queyicop ri caj xukuje' ri ulew
Haggai2:7 Quenbana' na chi quebeyicop conojel ri nimak tak tinimit quequic'am c'u na ulok tak ri qui k'inomal
Haggai2:8 “E wech ri sak puak xukuje' ri k'an puak.
Haggai2:9 We ucab wachoch ri' c'o na ri u je'lical chuwäch ri nabe. Quinban c'u na chi cac'oji' jamaril chupam we c'olbal ri'. In
Haggai2:10 Chupam ri k'ij juwinak quiejeb rajilabal ri ubelej ic' re ri kas junab re ri rajawinic ri ajawinel Dariy
Haggai2:11 Xuya' c'u takanic che chi
Haggai2:12 “Kabana'
Haggai2:13 Are c'u ri Hajey xtakenic: “Kabana' chi c'ut
Haggai2:14 Xubij c'ut ri Hajey: “Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: ‘Junam cäkc'ulmataj cuc' we winak ri': ronojel ri caquibano xukuje' ronojel ri caquichi'j chwe tz'ilobitajinak.
Haggai2:15 Kas camic chi chaplej bic u chomaxic wa'. C'a majok chi chaplej u banic ri rachoch Dios
Haggai2:16 ¿jas ri xic'ulmaj? Aretak c'u c'o jun cäbec copan ruc' jumulaj trico re juwinak pajbal
Haggai2:17 In ruc' banbal c'ax xukuje' sakbach xinsachisaj qui wäch ri qui wächinic tak ri qui tijoj tak chuk'ab
Haggai2:18 Camic
Haggai2:19 Utz ba ri'
Haggai2:20 Kas pa we k'ij ri'
Haggai2:21 xuya' c'u takanic che chi chubij che ri Zorobabel
Haggai2:22 quinsachisaj na qui wäch ri qui cuinem tak ri ajawibal rech ri uwächulew quebenkasaj c'u na tak ri e qui tem re ajawibal; quebenpac'abala' tak c'u na ri e qui carwaj re ch'o'j xukuje' tak ri e benak chquipam
Haggai2:23 Chupam c'ut ri k'ij ri'
Zechariah1:1 Chupam ri uwajxak ic' re ri ucab junab ri rajawinic ri ajawinel Dariy
Zechariah1:2 “In
Zechariah1:3 
Zechariah1:4 Miban iwe ri xquiban ri e i mam
Zechariah1:5 Are c'u ri camic
Zechariah1:6 Xebopan c'u ne tak ri e nu tzij xukuje' tak ri e nu takanic
Zechariah1:7 Are tzijol wa' chi ri in
Zechariah1:8 C'o jun ak'ab xinwil jun c'utwächinic: Xinwil jun ajquiej ri quiejeninak chrij jun quiej quiäk rij. Tac'al pa jun beya'
Zechariah1:9 In xinban c'otoj chi'aj: “Ajawaxel
Zechariah1:10 Are c'ut ri achi ri c'o xo'l tak ri che' xubij: “E are' tak wa' ri e u takom ri Ajawaxel che u binibexic ronojel ri uwächulew.”
Zechariah1:11 Ri e ajquiejab xquibij c'u che ri aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Ajawaxel ri c'o chquixo'l tak ri k'echob: “Kabinibem ronojel ri uwächulew
Zechariah1:12 Ri aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Ajawaxel xubij: “Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel cuinem la
Zechariah1:13 Ri Ajawaxel xutzelej u bixic cuc' ch'uch'ujalaj tak tzij re cu'bisabal c'uxaj che ri tako'n ri catzijon wuc'
Zechariah1:14 xuya' c'u takanic ri aj cajalaj tako'n chwe chi chinya' u bixic: “Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: ‘In nim ri u lok'ok'exic ri Jerusalen wumal xukuje' ri juyub re Sion.
Zechariah1:15 Rumal ri' nicowinak ri nu c'anal che u banic c'ax chque tak we nimak tak tinimit ri'
Zechariah1:16 Rumal ri'
Zechariah1:17 Xubij chi c'u na ri aj cajalaj tako'n chwe: “Chaya' u bixic xukuje' wa': ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem je cubij wa: Quenbana' chi ri e nu tinimit sibalaj che k'inomar chi jumul; quenya' na c'ac' uxlabic che ri Sion
Zechariah1:18 Xinwil chic jun c'utwächinic
Zechariah1:19 Xinta' che ri tako'n aj caj ri cätajin cätzijon wuc' jas quel caquibij tak we e uc'a' ri'
Zechariah1:20 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa' ri Ajawaxel xuban chwe chi xebenwil quiejeb ch'ayal tak ch'ich'.
Zechariah1:21 In xinban c'otoj chi'aj: “¿Jasche e petinak we ch'ayal tak ch'ich' ri'?” Are' c'u ri are' xutzelej u bixic chwe: “We e uc'a' tak ri' e are' quequiq'uexwächij ri xejabun ri Juda
Zechariah2:1 Xinwil chi c'u na jun c'utwächinic. Xc'utun jun winak chnuwäch ri ruc'am jun etabal pa u k'ab.
Zechariah2:2 Xinc'ot u chi': “¿Jawije' ri catbe wi?” Ri are' xutztelej u bixic chwe: “Quenwetaj na ri tinimit Jerusalen
Zechariah2:3 Xinwil c'ut chi benam cuban ri tako'n aj caj ri tzijoninak can wuc'
Zechariah2:4 je c'u xubij wa' che: “Chatxiq'uin che u bixic che ri c'ojol ala ri ruc'am bic ri etabal c'am: ‘Ri Jerusalen quec'oji' chi na winak chupam xukuje' tak awaj man cuya' ta chi c'ut quec'oji' ta chi na nimak tak u tapia.
Zechariah2:5 Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel cajiquiban u bixic: In quinux na jacha' ta ne jun nimalaj tapia re k'ak' ri cusutij rij ri Jerusalen
Zechariah2:6 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “In xinbanowic chi ri ix xixjabux pa conojel tak c'olbal. Are c'u ri camic quinbij chiwe: ¡Chixanimaj chanim chiya' can ri ulew aj riquiak'ab elebal k'ij! ¡Chito'tajisaj iwib chiwesaj iwib pa u k'ab ri Babilon
Zechariah2:7 
Zechariah2:8 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem in u takom che u ya'ic we tzijol ri' che u banic c'ax chque ri nimak tak tinimit ri xixquitoloba'. “Apachin ta ne ri cänakow ri nu tinimit cunak ri u c'u'x ri e nu bak'wäch. Rumal ri' kas in quintij na nu chuk'ab chquij tak we nimak tak tinimit ri'
Zechariah2:9 
Zechariah2:10 Ri Ajawaxel cujiquiba' u bixic: “¡Chixbixonok rumal ri quicotemal
Zechariah2:11 Aretak chec'ulmataj wa'
Zechariah2:12 Ri Ajawaxel cubana chi rech che ri Juda ri rech can nabe ri sibalaj nim u k'ij pa ri tastalicalaj ulew
Zechariah2:13 ¡Chi ronojel ri uwächulew chi yinil chuwäch ri Ajawaxel
Zechariah3:1 Ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut c'ut ri Jexu chnuwäch pa jun c'utwächinic
Zechariah3:2 Xubij c'ut ri aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Ajawaxel che ri tako'n aj caj ri tzujunel: “¡Ri Ajawaxel chatk'ilowok! ¡Are' ri Ajawaxel
Zechariah3:3 Ri Jexu
Zechariah3:4 Are c'u ri tako'n aj caj xuya' takanic chque ri e to'l tak rech chi chequesaj ri ch'uluch'ujalaj tak atz'iak chrij ri Jexu. Xubij c'u che: “Chawila
Zechariah3:5 Xuya' chi c'u takanic chque ri e to'l tak rech chi chquipisa' ri u jolom ri Jexu ruc' jun saklolojalaj pisbal jolomaj. Ri e are' xquicoj che
Zechariah3:6 Xubij c'ut ri aj cajalaj u tako'n ri Ajawaxel che ri Jexu:
Zechariah3:7 “Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: ‘Chatbin chquipam tak ri e nu be chebatz'akatisaj c'u conojel ri ya'tal qui banic awumal ri e nu yo'm qui bixic chawe. We je caban wa'
Zechariah3:8 Kas utz u tatabexic chabana'
Zechariah3:9 In nu yo'm chuwäch ri Jexu jun abaj re wuktzalaj
Zechariah3:10 Aretak chopan we k'ij ri'
Zechariah4:1 Xtzelej chi c'u ulok ri tako'n aj caj ri cätzijon can wuc'
Zechariah4:2 Xubij c'u chwe: “¿Jas ri cawilo?” xintzelej c'ut u bixic: “Jun nicowisabal aseit ronojel re k'an puak
Zechariah4:3 Chuxcut ri nicowisabal aseit e c'o quieb u che'al aseitun
Zechariah4:4 Xinc'ot u chi' ri tako'n aj caj ri cätzijon wuc': “Tat
Zechariah4:5 Ri tako'n aj caj xutzelej u bixic chwe: “¿La man aweta'm taj ri quel cubij?” In xinbij che: “Man weta'm taj
Zechariah4:6 Ri are' xutakej u bixic: “Are wa' ri xuya' u bixic ri Ajawaxel che ri Zorobabel: ‘Man e are ta quek'ijim ri ajch'ojab mawi ri chuk'ab xane' are' ri Wuxlabal
Zechariah4:7 ¿At c'u jachinok at
Zechariah4:8 Xubij chi c'ut
Zechariah4:9 “Ri Zorobabel e u cojom ri e u tiq'uilibal. We rachoch Dios ri'
Zechariah4:10 “Ri winak ri man xequiya' ta qui k'ij ri ch'utinalaj tak yacanic pa ri chaplebal
Zechariah4:11 In xinc'ot u chi': “¿E jas wa' we quieb u che'al aseitun ri'
Zechariah4:12 Xukuje' xinc'ot u chi': “¿Jas quel caquibij we quieb u k'ab ri u che'al aseitun ri' ri e c'o chquinakaj ri tutu re k'an puak ri cumal copan ri aseit chquipam ri cätzij wi aseit?”
Zechariah4:13 Ri tako'n aj caj xutzelej u bixic chwe: “¿La Man aweta'm taj ri quel cubij?” Xinbij che: “Man weta'm taj
Zechariah4:14 Ri are' xutzelej u bixic chwe: “E are' quieb wa' ri e tasom che u patanixic ri Ajawaxel rech ronojel ri uwächulew.”
Zechariah5:1 Xc'utun chic jun c'utwächinic chnuwäch. Xinwil jobotaj wuj ri tz'ibatal u wäch
Zechariah5:2 Ri tako'n aj caj xuc'ot nu chi': “¿Jas ri cawilo?” Xintzelej u bixic che: “Quinwil jobotaj wuj tz'ibatal u wäch ri carapapic; julajuj bara' u rabic job bara' c'ut ruc' niq'uiaj u wäch.”
Zechariah5:3 Xubij c'u chwe: “Chupam tz'ibatal wi ri c'okobal ri curik ronojel ri ulew. Je jas ri tz'ibatal chupam ri caperajil
Zechariah5:4 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cujiquiba' u bixic: ‘In quintak bic we c'okonic ri' rech coc chupam ri rachoch ri queläk'ic xukuje' chupam ri rachoch ri xak lok' cuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri nu bi'. Are c'u ri c'okobal cacanaj can chila' man quecanaj ta c'u na tem mawi abaj.’ ”
Zechariah5:5 Xpe chi c'ut ri tako'n aj caj ri catzijon wuc'
Zechariah5:6 Xinc'ot u chi': “¿Jas wa'?” Ri are' xutzelej u bixic chwe: “Jun caxa pajbal. Are' wa ri cäpaj wi ri qui mac ri e jekel chupam ri ulew.”
Zechariah5:7 Ri caxa pajbal ch'ukutal u wi' rumal jun ch'ukubal re räxmamaj ch'ich'. Xwalijisax c'ut ri ch'ukubal
Zechariah5:8 Xubij c'ut ri tako'n aj caj chwe: “We ixok ri' are' ri etzelal.” Xuch'iquimij c'ut chupam ri caxa pajbal
Zechariah5:9 Xinca'y chi jumul
Zechariah5:10 Xicot c'u u chi' ri tako'n ri catzijon wuc': “¿Jawije' caquic'am wi bic we caxa pajbal ri'?”
Zechariah5:11 Ri are' xutzelej u bixic chwe: “Quequiyaca' jun achoch pa Babilon. Aretak catz'akat u banic ri achoch
Zechariah6:1 Xc'utun chic jun c'utwächinic chnuwäch. Xinwilo chi xebel ulok quiejeb carwaj re ch'o'j chquixo'l quieb juyub re k'an ch'ich'.
Zechariah6:2 Ri nabe carwaj jurum cumal quiej quiäk quij; ri ucab
Zechariah6:3 ri urox
Zechariah6:4 Xinc'ot u chi' ri tako'n aj caj ri cätzijon wuc': “Wajaw
Zechariah6:5 Ri tako'n xutzelej u bixic chwe: “E are quiejeb quiakik' wa'
Zechariah6:6 Ri carwaj ri jurum cumal quiej ri k'ek tak quij cäbe pa ri ulew ri c'o pa ri riquiak'ab ri relebal k'ij; ri jurum cumal quiej sak quij
Zechariah6:7 Xebel c'u bic ri quiej tzaratzo'x quij
Zechariah6:8 Bantajinak chi c'u wa'
Zechariah6:9 Ri Ajawaxel xuya' we tzijol ri' chwe:
Zechariah6:10 “Chamulij jun cuchuj chquixo'l ri xec'am bic pa Babilon ri etzelejinak chi ulok: Ri Helday
Zechariah6:11 Chac'ama' bic ri sak puak xukuje' ri k'an puak ri a mulin
Zechariah6:12 Chabij c'u che: ‘Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem cujiquiba' u bixic chi ri c'ojol ri cäbinax tuxaj che caq'uiy na paquiwi' ri kas e u rab cuban c'u na u banic ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel.
Zechariah6:13 Cuban na u banic ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel cuc'am c'u na ri kas nimarisabal u k'ij jun ajawinel. Cat'uyi' na chupam ri u tem re ajawibal che u k'atic tzij
Zechariah6:14 E are tak c'ut ri corona quebux na jun natabal ri quecanaj can chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel che u ya'ic u k'ij ri Helday
Zechariah6:15 Quepe na winak ri naj quepe wi
Zechariah7:1 Chupam ri k'ij ri ucaj rajilabal ri ubelej ic' (ri cuchi'x Quixlew che)
Zechariah7:2 Chupam ri k'ijol ri'
Zechariah7:3 xukuje' che u c'otic qui chi' ri e k'axal tzij xukuje' chque ri e cojol tabal tok'ob ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: “¿La cakatakej na lo qui cojic tak atz'iak re bis xukuje' man cujwa' taj pa ri uro' ic' chujunab
Zechariah7:4 Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xinutzijobej
Zechariah7:5 “Chabij che ronojel ri tinimit re ri ulew
Zechariah7:6 aretak c'u ne ri ix quixwa'ic xukuje' quixuq'uianic
Zechariah7:7 ¿La xa' ma ta e are' junam tak tzij wa' ri xuya' u bixic ri Ajawaxel cumal ri ojer tak e k'axal tzij
Zechariah7:8 Ri Ajawaxel xutzijobej ri Zacariy ri k'axal tzij
Zechariah7:9 “Are wa' ri takanic ri quinyao: Ri ix chibana' ri suq'uilal pa tak ri e i k'atan tak tzij
Zechariah7:10 Miwesaj canima' ri malca'nib
Zechariah7:11 Are c'u ri tinimit xuk'il rib man xraj taj xnimanic. Conojel are xquiya' ri quij xquiban quib chi man queta'm taj.
Zechariah7:12 Xcabajirisaj ri canima' jacha' ta ne ri diamant
Zechariah7:13 xubij c'ut: “Jacha' c'ut ri xquiban ri e are man xcaj taj xinquitatabej aretak quebensiq'uij
Zechariah7:14 Rumal ri' xebenjabuj jacha' ta ne ri rumal jun salc'um chquixo'l conojel ri nimak tak tinimit ri man queta'm ta qui wäch
Zechariah8:1 Ri Ajawaxel
Zechariah8:2 “Are wa' ri quinbij in: ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem. Quinna' nimak tak achixomanic chrij ri Sion
Zechariah8:3 Quintzelej c'u na pa Jerusalen
Zechariah8:4 Ri'jab tak tatayib xukuje' ri'jab tak chuchuyib quet'uyi chi na pa ri c'ayibal re Jerusalen
Zechariah8:5 Chi alaj tak alabom chi alaj tak alitomab quequinojisaj na ri c'ayibal ri e c'o chupam ri tinimit quebetz'en c'u na chquipam.
Zechariah8:6 Pa ri k'ijol ri' ronojel wa' je ta ne ri ma ta bantajel chquiwäch ri e to'tajinak can che ri nu tinimit; are c'u ri chwe in man je ta quel wa' chnuwäch. In
Zechariah8:7 In quinto'tajisaj na ri nu tinimit rech man cäkaj ta pa u k'ab ri ulew aj elebal k'ij xukuje' pa u k'ab ri ulew aj u kajebal k'ij
Zechariah8:8 quinc'am c'u na ulok pa Jerusalen rech cajeki' chi'. Are c'u ri e are' quebux na nu tinimit
Zechariah8:9 Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: “Chebicojo' tak i chuk'ab
Zechariah8:10 Rumal rech chi c'ä pa tak we k'ij ri' man c'o ta tojbal can quech tak ri winak mawi e quech tak ri awaj. Xukuje' u mac c'u rech ri c'ulel man c'o ta jamaril chque ri e jekel chila'; are c'u ri in xeben coj ri jule' che qui c'ulelaxic ri niq'uiaj chic.
Zechariah8:11 Are c'u ri camic
Zechariah8:12 Are' c'u ri jamaril catictaj na chquixo'l. Ri u che'al uva tak ri caquiya' tak na ri qui wächinic; ri ulew ri e u wächinic tak ri quebuya'; ri caj ri u räxk'ab. Are c'u ri in quenya' na ronojel wa' chque ri e to'tajinak can che ri nu tinimit rech caquechbej.
Zechariah8:13 Je c'u ri' jacha' ri ix
Zechariah8:14 Are wa' cubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: “In xinchomaj can u c'äjisaxic qui wäch ri e i mam aretak xquiban chwe chi xyactaj ri woyowal
Zechariah8:15 Are c'u ri camic
Zechariah8:16 Are wa' ri rajawaxic u banic iwumal amak'el: Amak'el are chibij ri kastzij chixo'l ri jun ruc' ri jun chic
Zechariah8:17 mebibanala' c'ax chbil tak iwib mawi xak lok' miban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ruc' subunic. Rumal rech chi ri in quinwetzelaj u wäch ronojel wa'. In
Zechariah8:18 Ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem xinutzijobej
Zechariah8:19 “Ri u ya'ic i tzij chi man quixwa' taj que tak ri ucaj ic'
Zechariah8:20 Are wa' ri cubij ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem: “C'ä quepe chi c'u na winak
Zechariah8:21 E are' c'u ri e re jun tinimit quebe na cuc' ri e re jule' chic
Zechariah8:22 E q'ui c'u na ri tinimit xukuje' nimak tak tinimit ri quepe na pa Jerusalen che u tzucuxic ri Ajawaxel ri c'o ronojel u cuinem che c'u u tz'onoxic che chi chetewichi'x rumal.
Zechariah8:23 Chupam ri k'ijol ri' lajuj winak ri e quech jule' nimak tak tinimit chic caquichap na jun aj judey che ri ratz'iak

Zechariah12:3 Chupam ri k'ijol ri' quinjalwächij na ri Jerusalen pa jun abaj ri sibalaj al na chque conojel ri nimak tak tinimit. Cusoc c'u na apachique jun chque ri cutijtobej ta u ch'elexic. Conojel ri nimak tak tinimit caquimulij na quib che u banic c'ax che ri Jerusalen

Malachi1:5 Ri ix quiwil na cuc' ri kas e i bak'wäch

Matthew1:1 Are wuj wa' ri cutzijoj ri ija'lil ri xpe wi ri Jesucrist
Matthew1:2 Ri u c'ojol ri Abraham are' ri Isaac. Ri u c'ojol ri Isaac are' ri Jacob. Ri u c'ojol ri Jacob are' ri Juda
Matthew1:3 Ri e u c'ojol ri Juda are' ri Pares xukuje' ri Zar; ri qui nan are' ri Tamar. Ri u c'ojol ri Pares are' ri Esrom. Ri u c'ojol ri Esrom are' ri Aram.
Matthew1:4 Ri u c'ojol ri Aram are' ri Aminadab. Ri u c'ojol ri Aminadab are' ri Naason. Ri u c'ojol ri Naason are' ri Salmon.
Matthew1:5 Ri u c'ojol ri Salmon are' ri Booz; ri u nan ri Booz are' ri Rahab. Ri u c'ojol ri Booz are' ri Obed; ri u nan ri Obed are ri Rut. Ri u c'ojol ri Obed are' ri Isayi.
Matthew1:6 Ri u c'ojol ri Isayi are' ri ajawinel David. Ri u c'ojol ri David are' ri Salomon; ri u nan ri Salomon are' ri rixokil canok ri Uriy.
Matthew1:7 Ri u c'ojol ri Salomon are' ri Roboam. Ri u c'ojol ri Roboam are' ri Abiy. Ri u c'ojol ri Abiy are' ri As.
Matthew1:8 Ri u c'ojol ri As are' ri Josapat. Ri u c'ojol ri Josapat are' ri Joram. Ri u c'ojol ri Joram are' ri Uziy.
Matthew1:9 Ri u c'ojol ri Uziy are' ri Jotam. Ri u c'ojol ri Jotam are' ri Acaz. Ri u c'ojol ri Acaz are' ri Ezequiy.
Matthew1:10 Ri u c'ojol ri Ezequiy are' ri Manases. Ri u c'ojol ri Manases are' ri Amon. Ri u c'ojol ri Amon are' ri Josiy.
Matthew1:11 Ri e u c'ojol ri Josiy are' ri Jeconiy
Matthew1:12 Aretak bantajinak chic ri k'axetajem pa Babilon
Matthew1:13 Ri u c'ojol ri Zorobabel are' ri Abiud. Ri u c'ojol ri Abiud are' ri Eliaquim. Ri u c'ojol ri Eliaquim are' ri Azor.
Matthew1:14 Ri u c'ojol ri Azor are' ri Sadoc. Ri u c'ojol ri Sadoc are' ri Aquim. Ri u c'ojol ri Aquim are' ri Eliud.
Matthew1:15 Ri u c'ojol ri Eliud are' ri Eleazar. Ri u c'ojol ri Eleazar are' ri Matan. Ri u c'ojol ri Matan are' ri Jacob.
Matthew1:16 Ri u c'ojol ri Jacob are' ri Jose
Matthew1:17 Je c'u wa' conojel ri ija'lil ruc' ri Abraham c'ä ruc' ri David cajlajuj (14) ija'lil. Kas ruc' ri David c'ä pa ri k'axetajem pa Babilon cajlajuj (14) ija'lil. Kas ruc' ri k'axetajem pa Babilon c'ä ruc' ri Crist cajlajuj (14) ija'lil.
Matthew1:18 Jewa' xc'ulmaxic aretak xalax ri Jesucrist: Ri Mariy
Matthew1:19 Ri Jose ri rachajil are jun suc'alaj achi. Man xraj taj xresaj u q'uixbal ri Mariy chquiwäch conojel ri winak. Xuchomaj c'ut cuya' canok chi c'uyal.
Matthew1:20 Aretak ri Jose cätajin cuchomaj wa'
Matthew1:21 Ri Mariy cäc'oji' na jun ral ala. Jesus ri u bi' cacoj na. Jewa' ri u bi' rumal rech chi are cacolow na ri u tinimit ri c'o chupam ri qui mac.”
Matthew1:22 Ronojel wa' xc'ulmaxic rech cäbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri Ajawaxel rumal ri k'axal tzij
Matthew1:23 “Ri k'apoj ali cux na yawab winak. Cäril na u wäch jun ral ala. Cucoj na Emanuel che u bi'.” Ri tzij Emanuel je quel cubij wa': “Ri Dios c'o kuc'.”
Matthew1:24 Xc'astaj c'u ri Jose che ri waram
Matthew1:25 Ri Jose man xurik ta rib ruc' ri Mariy
Matthew2:1 Aretak xalax ri Jesus pa Belen re Judey
Matthew2:2 Xquibij c'ut: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri cajawinel ri aj judeyib ri xalaxic? Kilom ri u ch'imil pa ri elebal k'ij. Uj petinak c'u che u k'ijilaxic.”
Matthew2:3 Aretak ri ajawinel Herod xuta' wa'
Matthew2:4 Xebumulij conojel ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri quetijon ri winak che ri pixab. Xuc'ot qui chi': “¿Jawije' calax wi na ri Crist?”
Matthew2:5 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Pa Belen re Judey. Je c'u ri' tz'ibam can rumal ri k'axal tzij:
Matthew2:6 ‘Ri at
Matthew2:7 C'äte ri' ri Herod xebusiq'uij ri ajno'jab chi c'uyal
Matthew2:8 Xebutak bic pa Belen
Matthew2:9 Ri ajno'jab
Matthew2:10 Ri ajno'jab aretak xquil ri ch'imil
Matthew2:11 Xeboc pa ri ja
Matthew2:12 Ri achijab ri' xetak rumal ri Dios pa ichic' chi metzelej ruc' ri Herod
Matthew2:13 E benak chi c'u ri ajno'jab
Matthew2:14 Ri Jose xwalijic
Matthew2:15 Xec'oji' chila' c'ä xcäm na ri Herod. Jewa' xquibano rech catz'akatic jas ri u tzijom can ri Ajawaxel rumal ri k'axal tzij ri xubij: “Pa Ejipt xinsiq'uij wi ulok ri nu C'ojol.”
Matthew2:16 Ri Herod aretak xrilo chi xetz'ebex u wäch cumal ri ajno'jab
Matthew2:17 Je c'u xbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij:
Matthew2:18 “Xtataj jun ch'abal pa Rama
Matthew2:19 Cäminak chi c'u ri Herod
Matthew2:20 Xubij: “Chatwalijok
Matthew2:21 Xwalij c'u ri Jose
Matthew2:22 Xuta' c'u ri Jose chi are ri Arquelao oquinak che ajawinel puwi' ri Judey che u q'uexwäch ri Herod ri u tat. Xuxe'j c'u rib
Matthew2:23 Xebopanic
Matthew3:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xopan ri Xuan Bautist
Matthew3:2 Je c'u cubij wa': “Chiq'uexa' i c'u'x
Matthew3:3 Are wa' ri xutzijoj ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: “Jun ch'abal curak u chi' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Matthew3:4 Ri Xuan rismal camey ri ratz'iak
Matthew3:5 Xebel c'u ulok ri aj Jerusalen
Matthew3:6 Xquik'alajisaj ri qui mac
Matthew3:7 Aretak xril ri Xuan chi e q'ui chque ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib xepetic rech cäban ri qui bautism. Aretak ri Xuan xerilo xubij chque: “¡Quija'l tak cumätz! ¿Jachin xbin chiwe chi chixanimaj chuwäch ri c'äjisabal wächaj ri cäpe na?
Matthew3:8 Chebibana' ba wächinic ri takal che q'uexoj c'uxaj.
Matthew3:9 Michomaj u bixic pa iwanima': ‘Ri Abraham are' ri ka mam.’ Quinbij c'u chiwe
Matthew3:10 Camic yo'm chic ri icäj che qui t'oyic bic ri che' c'ä chaquixe'. Ronojel che' ri man cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic
Matthew3:11 Ri in kastzij quinban i bautism pa ri ja'
Matthew3:12 C'o ri u jopibal pa u k'ab
Matthew3:13 Xel ulok ri Jesus pa Galiley
Matthew3:14 Ri Xuan are ta xraj xuk'ilo
Matthew3:15 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic che: “Chaya' c'olbal camic; takalic chi jewa' cakabano rech suc' u banic ronojel cakabano.” Xunimaj c'ut ri Xuan ri xubij che.
Matthew3:16 Xuwi c'u xbantaj ri u bautism ri Jesus
Matthew3:17 Xtataj c'u jun ch'abal chicaj ri xubij: “Are lok'alaj nu C'ojol wa' ri sibalaj quinquicot ruc'.”
Matthew4:1 C'äte ri' ri Uxlabaxel xuc'am bic ri Jesus pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Matthew4:2 Cawinak (40) k'ij cawinak ak'ab ri Jesus man xwa' taj
Matthew4:3 Xopan c'u ri itzel ruc' ri Jesus che u c'ambejexic. Xubij che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios
Matthew4:4 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Tz'ibatalic: Man xuwi ta rumal ri wa cäc'asi ri winak
Matthew4:5 Ri itzel xuc'am bic chupam ri tastalicalaj tinimit Jerusalen
Matthew4:6 Xubij c'u che: “We at u C'ojol ri Dios
Matthew4:7 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Xukuje' tz'ibatalic: ‘Mac'ambejej ri Ajawaxel a Dios.’ ”
Matthew4:8 Jumul chic ri itzel xuc'am bic puwi' jun juyub naj ak'aninak. Xebuc'ut conojel ri ajawibal ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew chuwäch ri Jesus
Matthew4:9 Ri itzel xubij che: “Conojel wa' quebenya' chawe we catxuqui' chnuwäch
Matthew4:10 Xubij c'u ri Jesus che: “¡Jät
Matthew4:11 Xutas c'u rib ri itzel che ri Jesus
Matthew4:12 Aretak xuta' ri Jesus chi ri Xuan xcoj pa che'

Matthew4:14 Xbantaj wa' rech catz'akat ri u tz'ibam ulok ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij:
Matthew4:15 “Ulew re Zabulon
Matthew4:16 Tinimit ri cäbin pa ri k'ekumalil
Matthew4:17 Chi' c'ut ri Jesus xuchaplej tzijonic
Matthew4:18 Ri Jesus cätajin cäbin chuchi' ri cho re Galiley
Matthew4:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Tisaj wuc'
Matthew4:20 Chanim xequiya' canok ri qui c'at
Matthew4:21 Xbin chi apan jubik' ri Jesus
Matthew4:22 Chanim xquiya' can ri jucub xukuje' ri qui tat
Matthew4:23 Ri Jesus xusolij ronojel ri Galiley. Quebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Quebucunaj c'u conojel ri winak che ronojel ri qui yabilal xukuje' tak ri qui k'oxomal.
Matthew4:24 Xel c'u u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel ri Siriy; xec'am ulok conojel ri c'o itzel tak yabil chque

Matthew5:1 Aretak ri Jesus xeril ri q'uialaj winak
Matthew5:2 Ri Jesus xuchaplej qui tijoxic
Matthew5:3 “Utz que ri cäquich'obo chi cajwataj ri Dios chque
Matthew5:4 Utz que ri quebok'ic
Matthew5:5 Utz que ri caquimach' quib
Matthew5:6 Utz que ri quenumic ri cachak'ij qui chi' che u banic ri u takanic ri Dios
Matthew5:7 Utz que ri quel qui c'u'x chque ri cajil quitz'akat

Matthew5:9 Utz que ri caquicoj qui chuk'ab rech cac'oji' jamaril
Matthew5:10 Utz que ri caquicoch' ri c'axc'olil ri caban amak'el chque rumal u banic ri u takanic ri Dios
Matthew5:11 Utz iwe ix aretak ri winak caquiyac iwoyowal
Matthew5:12 Chixquicot ruc' nimalaj quicotemal
Matthew5:13 “Ix ri' ri ratz'amil we uwächulew ri'. We c'u man c'o chic ri u tzayil ri atz'am
Matthew5:14 Ix ri' ri u chäj we uwächulew ri'. Jun tinimit ri c'o puwi' jun juyub man cäcuin taj cärawaj rib.
Matthew5:15 Mawi catzij jun chäj rech caya' ta chuxe' jun bo'j
Matthew5:16 Jewa' chtunun ri i chäj chquiwäch ri winak
Matthew5:17 “Michomaj chi in petinak che u yubisaxic ri pixab
Matthew5:18 Kastzij quinbij chiwe

Matthew5:20 Quinbij c'u chiwe ix chi
Matthew5:21 “I tom chi xbix chque ri ojer tak winak: ‘Matcämisanic. Apachin ri cäcämisanic
Matthew5:22 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe
Matthew5:23 Rumal ri' we cac'am bic ri a sipanic puwi' ri porobal chila' c'ut cänataj wi chawe chi ri awachalal c'o cuna' chawij
Matthew5:24 chaya' can ri a sipanic chila' chuwäch ri porobal. Jät
Matthew5:25 Chatutzir chanim ruc' ri a c'ulel
Matthew5:26 Kastzij quinbij chawe

Matthew5:28 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe
Matthew5:29 Rumal ri'
Matthew5:30 We ri a k'ab re ri awiquiak'ab cattzakow pa ri mac

Matthew5:32 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe
Matthew5:33 “Xukuje' i tom chi ojer ulok xbix ulok chque ri winak chi ma ta xak lok' maquiban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew5:34 Are c'u ri in quinbij chiwe: Miban jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa u bi' apachique jasach. Micoj ri caj che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew5:35 Micoj ri u bi' ulew che u bixic kastzij
Matthew5:36 Micoj ri i jolom che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew5:37 Aretak quibij ‘je’
Matthew5:38 “I tom chi xbixic: ‘Bak'wächaj che u q'uexwäch bak'wächaj. Wareyaj che u q'uexwäch wareyaj.’
Matthew5:39 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe: Mik'atij u wäch jun banal etzelal. Xane' we c'o jun catuch'ay che ri joperaj a palaj re ri awiquiak'ab
Matthew5:40 We c'o jun cäraj catusiq'uij pa k'atbal tzij che u majic ri a camixa'
Matthew5:41 We cäcoj chuk'ab chawe chi cac'am bic jun eka'n re niq'uiaj legua
Matthew5:42 Apachin ta ne ri c'o cutz'onoj chawe
Matthew5:43 “I tom chi xbixic: ‘Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat
Matthew5:44 Are c'u ri in quinbij chiwe: Chebilok'ok'ej ri qui banom qui c'ulel chiwe
Matthew5:45 We je quiban wa'
Matthew5:46 We xak xuwi quebilok'ok'ej c'u ri quixlok'ok'enic
Matthew5:47 We xak xuwi ri e iwachalal quiya' rutzil qui wäch
Matthew5:48 Chixux ba' tz'akat
Matthew6:1 “Chichajij iwib miban ri i suq'uil chquiwäch ri winak rech quixca'yex cumal. We je quiban wa'

Matthew6:3 Ri at c'ut aretak caban tok'ob chque ri mebayib
Matthew6:4 Jeri' chabana' ri a tok'ob chi c'uyal. Ri a Tat c'ut ri quilow ri caban chi c'uyal
Matthew6:5 “Aretak ri ix quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios
Matthew6:6 Ri at c'ut
Matthew6:7 Aretak quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios
Matthew6:8 Mijunamaj ba' iwib cuc'. Are c'u ri i Tat reta'm chic jachique tak ri jastak ri e rajawaxic chiwe c'ä majok chi tz'onoj che.
Matthew6:9 Ri ix c'ut je ch'awem wa' chibana': ‘Ka Tat ri c'o la pa ri caj
Matthew6:10 Chpet ri ajawibal la. Chban ri rayibal la cho ri uwächulew
Matthew6:11 Ya' la ri ka wa re camic ri cajwataj chke.
Matthew6:12 Checuyu' la ri e ketzelal jacha' xukuje' ri uj quekacuy ri etzelal ri e banom chke.
Matthew6:13 Mujya' la chuwäch ri takchibal macaj
Matthew6:14 We ri ix quebicuy ri etzelal ri e banom chiwe
Matthew6:15 We man quebicuy ri winak
Matthew6:16 “Aretak man quitij ta i wa
Matthew6:17 Ri at c'ut aretak man catij ta a wa
Matthew6:18 Rech man caquil ta ri winak chi man a tijom ta a wa. Xane' xak xuwi ri a Tat ri quilowic ri c'o awuc' chi c'uyal. Ri are' c'ut cayo'w na ri tojbal awech.”
Matthew6:19 “Mimulij i k'inomal waral cho ri uwächulew jawije' ri quechicopir wi
Matthew6:20 Xane' chimulij i k'inomal pa ri caj
Matthew6:21 Jawije' c'ut ri c'o wi ri i k'inomal

Matthew6:25 “Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe: Mixoc il che ri i c'aslemal
Matthew6:26 Chiwilampe' ri chicop aj uwo caj ri e c'o qui xic'. Ri e are' man queticonij taj
Matthew6:27 Jachin ta jun chiwe pune' ta sibalaj coc il

Matthew9:4 Xretamaj c'ut ri Jesus ri qui chomanic
Matthew9:5 ¿Jachique c'ut ri man c'ax ta u bixic: ‘Ri a mac e sachtajinak'’
Matthew9:6 Rech c'ut quiwetamaj chi ri Rija'l winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che qui sachic ri macaj cho ri uwächulew

Matthew9:9 Cätajin coc'ow ri Jesus chila'

Matthew9:11 Ri pariseyib aretak xquil wa'

Matthew9:17 Xukuje' man cäya' ta c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri' quet'ubin ri' ri tz'um
Matthew9:18 Aretak cätajin catzijon ri Jesus cuc'
Matthew9:19 Ri Jesus xwalijic

Matthew9:21 Xubij c'u ri chuchu' pa ranima': “Xuwi ta ne quinchap ocok ri ratz'iak
Matthew9:22 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib che u ca'yexic ri chuchu'

Matthew9:24 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chixel bic waral
Matthew9:25 Are c'u ri Jesus xuban chque chi xebel bic
Matthew9:26 Xel u tzijol wa' chquixo'l conojel ri winak chila'.

Matthew9:29 Ri Jesus xebuchap ocok ri qui bak'wäch
Matthew9:30 Xejaktaj c'u ri qui bak'wäch. Ri Jesus sibalaj xebupixbej
Matthew9:31 Xebel c'u bic
Matthew9:32 Pa ri quelic c'u bic ri moyab
Matthew9:33 Aretak esam chi bic ri itzel uxlabal
Matthew9:34 Are c'u ri pariseyib xquibij: “Rumal ri u cuinem ri qui nimal ri itzel tak uxlabal queresaj ri itzel tak uxlabal.”
Matthew9:35 Ri Jesus xebusolij conojel ri tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak tinimit. Quebutijoj ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Cutzijoj ri utzalaj tzijol re ri rajawibal ri Dios. Cucunaj ronojel yabil xukuje' ronojel k'oxowem.
Matthew9:36 Aretak ri Jesus xeril ri q'uialaj winak
Matthew9:37 Xubij c'u chque ri u tijoxelab: “Kastzij ri k'atoj sibalaj nim
Matthew9:38 Chitz'onoj ba che ri rajaw ri k'atoj
Matthew10:1 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij c'u ri cablajuj u tijoxelab. Xuya' takanic pa qui k'ab paquiwi' ri itzel tak uxlabal
Matthew10:2 Ri cablajuj takomxenlab e are wa' ri qui bi': ri nabe Simon
Matthew10:3 ri Pelip
Matthew10:4 ri Simon que ri juk'at aj selot
Matthew10:5 E are cablajuj wa' ri xebutak bic ri Jesus
Matthew10:6 xane' jix nabe cuc' ri chij re ri u tinimit ri Israel
Matthew10:7 Pa ri i binem chitzijoj chque ri winak: ‘Nakaj chic c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios.’
Matthew10:8 Chebicunaj yawabib
Matthew10:9 Mic'am bic k'an puak
Matthew10:10 Mic'am bic iwatz'iak ri qui jalbej
Matthew10:11 Apachique tinimit o alaj tinimit ri quixoc wi
Matthew10:12 Aretak c'u quixoc pa jun ja
Matthew10:13 We takal chque ri ajchak'e ri ja
Matthew10:14 Apachin ta ne ri man quixuc'ulaj taj
Matthew10:15 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew10:16 “Chiwilampe'. Quixintak bic je jas ri chij chquixo'l ri utiw. Chicojo' ri i chomabal chichajij iwib je jas ri caquiban ri cumätz. Chixux jacha' ri palomax ri man c'o ta c'ax cubano.
Matthew10:17 Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri winak; quixquijach c'u na pa qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij
Matthew10:18 Quixc'am na bic chquiwäch k'atal tak tzij xukuje' ajawinelab rumal wech in
Matthew10:19 Aretak c'ut quixquijach na pa qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij
Matthew10:20 Man ix ta c'ut ri quixtzijon na
Matthew10:21 Ri achalaxel quebujach na ri rachalal pa cämic
Matthew10:22 Conojel ri winak caquetzelaj i wäch rumal wech in. Apachin c'u ri cuk'i' ri c'ax c'ä pa ri q'uistajic
Matthew10:23 Aretak quixokatax pa jun tinimit
Matthew10:24 Ri tijoxel man are ta nim na u banic chuwäch ri rajtij. Ri ajchac man are ta nim na u banic chuwäch ri rajaw.
Matthew10:25 Cubana' wa' che ri tijoxel chi cux jas ri rajtij
Matthew10:26 “Je c'u ri' mixe'j iwib chquiwäch ri winak
Matthew10:27 Ri quinbij in chiwe pa k'ekumal
Matthew10:28 Mixe'j ba iwib chquiwäch ri cäquicämisaj ri cuerp
Matthew10:29 ¿La ma ta jun alaj puak quec'ayix wi quieb chiochi? Mawi c'u jun chque cätzak pa ulew
Matthew10:30 E ta c'u lo ri ix
Matthew10:31 Je c'u ri' mixe'j iwib; are c'u ri ix c'o na iwajil chquiwäch q'ui chiochi.”
Matthew10:32 “We c'o jachin quink'alajisan chquiwäch ri winak
Matthew10:33 Ri man quinuk'alajisaj ta chquiwäch ri winak
Matthew10:34 “Michomaj chi in petinak che u ya'ic jamaril chquixo'l ri winak cho ri uwächulew
Matthew10:35 In petinak c'ut che u tasic ri achi chrij ri u tat
Matthew10:36 Ri u c'ulel c'u ri winak e are ri aj uwo rachoch.
Matthew10:37 Apachin ri are lok' na ri u tat o ri u nan chnuwäch in
Matthew10:38 Apachin ri man cuc'am ta ri u ripibal
Matthew10:39 Apachin ri curik ri u c'aslemal
Matthew10:40 “Apachin ri quixc'amowanic
Matthew10:41 Apachin ri cuc'amowaj jun k'axal tzij rumal rech chi k'axal tzij
Matthew10:42 Apachin ta ne ri cayo'w xak xuwi jun lak joron che jun chque we ch'utik ri' ri e nu tijoxelab
Matthew11:1 Ri Jesus
Matthew11:2 Ri Xuan
Matthew11:3 che u bixic che ri Jesus: “¿La lal ri' ri cäpe na
Matthew11:4 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jix. Chiya' u tzijol che ri Xuan jas ri quito
Matthew11:5 Ri moyab
Matthew11:6 Utz re ri man cuban ta quieb u c'u'x chwe.”
Matthew11:7 Aretak e benak chic ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan
Matthew11:8 ¿Jas c'ut ri xixel bic che rilic? ¿La xiwila' jun winak ri u cojom ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak? Are c'u ri cäquicoj ch'uch'ujalaj tak atz'iak
Matthew11:9 ¿Jas c'u che xixel bic? ¿La xixbe che rilic jun k'axal tzij? Je
Matthew11:10 Chrij we Xuan ri' are wa' ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: ‘Chawilampe'. Quintak bic ri nu tako'n chawäch. Ri are cusuc'umaj na ri a be chawäch.’
Matthew11:11 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew11:12 Kas pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Xuan Bautist c'ä camic
Matthew11:13 Conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij xukuje' ri pixab c'ä ruc' ri Xuan xquibij wi ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak.
Matthew11:14 We quiwaj c'ut quic'amo
Matthew11:15 Apachin c'ut ri c'o u xiquin
Matthew11:16 ¿Jas c'u ruc' quinjunamaj wi ri winak ri e c'o camic? E junam cuc' ri ac'alab ri e t'uyul pa tak ri c'ayibal
Matthew11:17 ‘Xkok'esaj su' chiwäch
Matthew11:18 Xpe ri Xuan
Matthew11:19 Xpe ri Rija'l winak
Matthew11:20 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xuchaplej qui yajic ri e tinimit jawije' ri e u banom wi q'ui nimak tak mayibal
Matthew11:21 Ri Jesus xubij: “¡C'ax awe
Matthew11:22 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe
Matthew11:23 Are c'u ri at
Matthew11:24 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe
Matthew11:25 Pa ri k'ij ri' xch'aw ri Jesus
Matthew11:26 Je
Matthew11:27 Conojel ri jastak xejachtaj chwe rumal ri nu Tat. Man c'o ta jun kas etamaninak u wäch ri C'ojolaxel
Matthew11:28 Tisaj wuc'

Matthew11:30 Are c'u ri weka'bal ch'uch'uj
Matthew12:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Matthew12:2 Xquil c'u ri pariseyib
Matthew12:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta i siq'uim jas xuban ri David aretak ri are' xukuje' ri e rachil xenumic?
Matthew12:4 ¿La ma ta i siq'uim jas xubano
Matthew12:5 O ¿La ma ta i siq'uim pa ri pixab chi pa ri k'ij re uxlanem
Matthew12:6 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe chi c'o jun waral ri nim na ri u banic chuwäch ri rachoch Dios.
Matthew12:7 Man iweta'm taj jas quel cubij we tz'ibatalic ri': Ri quinwaj chi quel i c'u'x
Matthew12:8 Ri Rija'l winak c'o u takanic puwi' ri k'ij re uxlanem.”
Matthew12:9 Xel c'u bic chila'
Matthew12:10 C'o jun achi chila' matz' u k'ab. Caquitzucuj c'ut jun jasach caquitzujubej rech ri Jesus
Matthew12:11 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “¿Jachin ta jun chiwe
Matthew12:12 ¡Are c'u c'o na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chij! Je c'u ri' cuya' cäban utzil pa ri k'ij re uxlanem.”
Matthew12:13 C'äte ri' xubij che ri achi: “Chayuku' ri a k'ab.” Ri are' xuyuku
Matthew12:14 Aretak e elinak chi bic ri pariseyib
Matthew12:15 Ri Jesus
Matthew12:16 Sibalaj c'u xebupixbej chi mäquibij chque ri winak jachin ri are'
Matthew12:17 rech catz'akat ri tzijom can rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij:
Matthew12:18 “Chiwilampe' ri pataninel we ri nu cha'om
Matthew12:19 Ri are' man cäch'ojin ta na
Matthew12:20 Ri are' man cuk'aj ta ri aj ri wak'arinak man cuchup ta na ri u tza'm chäj ri cabukuwic
Matthew12:21 E are tak c'ut ri nimak tak tinimit quebeyem na che.”
Matthew12:22 Xc'am c'u ulok jun achi moy xukuje' mem chuwäch ri Jesus
Matthew12:23 Conojel c'u ri winak xquimayo
Matthew12:24 Ri pariseyib
Matthew12:25 Ri Jesus reta'm ri cätajin caquichomaj
Matthew12:26 We ri Satanas cäresaj bic ri Satanas
Matthew12:27 We ri in rumal ri Beelzebu quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal
Matthew12:28 We c'u ri in rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal
Matthew12:29 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cuban jun rech coc pa rachoch jun achi ri c'o na u chuk'ab
Matthew12:30 Apachin ri man c'o ta wuc'
Matthew12:31 Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe chi ri Dios cucuy na chque ri winak ronojel ri mac xukuje' ronojel ri etzelal ri caquibij
Matthew12:32 Apachin c'u ri cubij tzij chrij ri Rija'l winak
Matthew12:33 “Chibana' chi utz ri che'
Matthew12:34 Ix quija'l cumätz. ¿La quixcuin lo quibij ta utzalaj tak tzij
Matthew12:35 Ri utzalaj winak chque ri utzalaj tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima' cäresaj wi ulok ri utz. Ri itzel winak chque ri itzel tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima' cäresaj wi ulok ri etzelal.
Matthew12:36 Quinbij chiwe
Matthew12:37 Cumal ri e a tzij cäk'alajin wi na we at suc'. Xukuje' cumal ri e a tzij cäc'äjisax na a wäch.”
Matthew12:38 Xepe c'u jujun chque ri ajtz'ibab xukuje' jujun chque ri pariseyib
Matthew12:39 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “We e itzel tak winak ri' ri xukuje' man e jic taj caquitz'onoj jun mayibalalaj etal; niq'uiaj etal chic man cayataj ta chi chque xane' xak xuwi ri retal ri Jonas ri k'axal tzij.
Matthew12:40 Je jas ri Jonas xc'oji' chupam ri nimalaj cär oxib k'ij oxib ak'ab
Matthew12:41 Ri achijab aj Ninibe quec'oji' na pa ri k'atoj tzij junam cuc' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic. Ri aj Ninibe quequic'okoj na; rumal rech chi ri e are xquiq'uex qui c'u'x rumal ri u tzij ri Jonas. Chiwilampe'
Matthew12:42 Ri ixok ajawinel aj u mox ri elebal k'ij cäc'oji' na pa ri k'atoj tzij junam cuc' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic. Ri are' quebuc'okoj na. Rumal rech chi ri are' xpe pa jun tinimit cho ri uwächulew ri sibalaj naj che u tatabexic ri u no'j ri Salomon. Chiwilampe'
Matthew12:43 “Aretak elinak chi bic ri itzel uxlabal che jun winak
Matthew12:44 Cubij c'u na: ‘Quintzelej cho wachoch ri xinel wi ulok.’ Aretak copanic
Matthew12:45 Cäbe c'u ri itzel uxlabal
Matthew12:46 Ri Jesus c'ä cätajin quebutzijobej ri winak aretak xopan ri u nan e rachil ri rachalal ri Jesus
Matthew12:47 Xbix c'u che: “Chawilampe'. Ri a nan ri e awachalal e tac'atoj cho ja. Cäcaj catquich'abej.”
Matthew12:48 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic che ri xbin che: “¿Jachin ri nu nan? ¿E jachin tak ri wachalal?”
Matthew12:49 Xebuc'ut ri u tijoxelab ruc' ri u k'ab
Matthew12:50 Apachin ri cuban ri u rayibal ri nu Tat ri c'o pa ri caj
Matthew13:1 Pa ri k'ij ri' xel bic ri Jesus cho ja
Matthew13:2 Xquimulij quib e q'uia winak ruc'. Rumal ri' ri Jesus xoc bic pa jun jucub
Matthew13:3 Ri Jesus xutzijoj q'ui jastak chque ri winak cuc' c'ambal tak no'j
Matthew13:4 Aretak cäjopinic
Matthew13:5 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj chuxo'l tak abaj
Matthew13:6 Aretak c'ut xel ulok ri k'ij
Matthew13:7 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj pa tak q'uix. Xebel c'u ulok ri q'uix
Matthew13:8 Niq'uiaj chic xekaj pa utzalaj ulew
Matthew13:9 Apachin ri c'o u xiquin chtatabenok.”
Matthew13:10 Xekeb ri u tijoxelab ruc'
Matthew13:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwe ix yo'm wi u ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios
Matthew13:12 Apachin c'u ri c'o jas c'o ruc'
Matthew13:13 Rumal ri' quebench'abej ri winak pa tak c'ambal no'j. Rumal rech chi queca'yic
Matthew13:14 Chquij catz'akat wi ri xubij ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij
Matthew13:15 Are c'u ri canima' we winak ri' xcowiric
Matthew13:16 Are c'u ri ix
Matthew13:17 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew13:18 “Chita' ba' ix ri c'ambal no'j chrij ri ajticonijel.
Matthew13:19 Ronojel jachin ri cuta' ri tijonic re ri rajawibal ri Dios
Matthew13:20 Ri xekaj chuxo'l tak abaj
Matthew13:21 Man c'o ta c'u u c'amal benak pa ri ulew
Matthew13:22 Ri ija' ri ticom chquixo'l tak q'uix are cubij ri caquitatabej ri tijonic e aretak c'ut ri ch'äcoj re we uwächulew ri' cuya' sibalaj oquem il chque xukuje' ri qui lok'ok'exic ri k'inomal quebusubu. Ronojel wa cujik'isaj ri tijonic man cuya' ta c'u chque chi quewächinic.
Matthew13:23 Ri xekaj pa ri utzalaj ulew
Matthew13:24 Ri Jesus xuya' jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch
Matthew13:25 Aretak c'u quewar ri winak
Matthew13:26 Aretak xtux ri trico
Matthew13:27 Xebopan ri pataninelab ruc' ri rajaw ri ulew
Matthew13:28 Ri are xubij chque: ‘Jun c'ulel xbanow wa' chwe'.’ Ri pataninelab xquibij che: ‘¿La caj la quekaboko ri itzel tak k'ayes?’
Matthew13:29 Ri are xubij chque: ‘Jayi'
Matthew13:30 Chiya' canok chi queq'uiy na junam ri trico ruc' ri itzel k'ayes c'ä pa ri k'atoj. Aretak copan na ri k'atoj
Matthew13:31 Ri Jesus xuya' jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch
Matthew13:32 Ch'utin na chquiwäch conojel tak ri ija'; aretak c'ut cäq'uiyic
Matthew13:33 Ri Jesus xubij jun c'ambal no'j chic chquiwäch
Matthew13:34 Conojel we jastak ri' xebutzijoj ri Jesus pa tak c'ambal no'j chque ri winak. Man c'o ta c'u jas xebutzijoj ri ma ta cuc' c'ambal tak no'j.
Matthew13:35 Je xbantajic jas ri u tzijom can ri k'axal tzij
Matthew13:36 C'äte ri' ri Jesus xebuya' can ri q'uialaj winak
Matthew13:37 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri jun ri cutic ri utzalaj ija'
Matthew13:38 Ri ticabal
Matthew13:39 Ri u c'ulel ri rajaw ulew ri xutic ri itzel k'ayes are ri itzel. Ri k'atoj are ri u q'uisbalil ri uwächulew. Ri ajk'atolob are' ri e aj cajalaj tak tako'nib.
Matthew13:40 Je jas ri cäban che u molic ri itzel k'ayes ri cäporox pa k'ak'
Matthew13:41 Ri Rija'l winak quebutak na ri aj cajalaj tak tako'nib che qui molic chupam ri rajawibal conojel ri quebanowic chi quemacun jule' chic
Matthew13:42 Quequiq'uiak na pa ri jorno re k'ak' ri quebok' wi na ri cakuch'uch' wi na ri qui ware.
Matthew13:43 Are c'u ri winak ri e suc' quejuluw na je jas ri k'ij pa ri rajawibal ri qui Tat. Apachin ri c'o u xiquin
Matthew13:44 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios jacha' ta ne jun k'inomal ri c'utal canok pa jun ulew
Matthew13:45 “Xukuje' ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun ajc'ay
Matthew13:46 Aretak xurik jun perl sibalaj pakal rajil
Matthew13:47 “Xukuje' ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun c'at chapbal cär. Cäq'uiak pa ri plo
Matthew13:48 Aretak nojinak chic ri c'at
Matthew13:49 Je c'u cac'ulmataj na pa ri u q'uistajic ri uwächulew. Quebel na ulok ri aj cajalaj tak tako'nib
Matthew13:50 quequiq'uiak na pa ri jorno ri canicowic; quebok' na chila'
Matthew13:51 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿La xebich'ob conojel we jastak ri'?” Ri e are' xquibij che: “Cäkach'obo
Matthew13:52 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Aretak jun ajtij re ri pixab u tijom rib che ri rajawibal ri Dios
Matthew13:53 Ri Jesus aretak xebuq'uis qui tzijoxic we c'ambal tak no'j ri'
Matthew13:54 Xopan pa ri kas u tinimit
Matthew13:55 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri u c'ojol ri ajanel? ¿La ma ta Mariy u bi' ri u nan? ¿La ma ta are rachalal ri Santiag
Matthew13:56 ¿La ma ta e c'o conojel ri e rana'b kuc'? ¿Jawije' c'ut u c'amom wi wa' ronojel ri cubij xukuje' ri cubano?”
Matthew13:57 Xuban c'u quieb canima' che ri Jesus. Are c'u ri Jesus xubij chque: “Pa ronojel tinimit nim quil wi jun k'axal tzij; xak xuwi c'u pa ri kas u tinimit
Matthew13:58 Man xebuban ta c'u q'ui nimak tak mayibal chila'
Matthew14:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri Herod ri k'atal tzij xuta' u tzijol ri cuban ri Jesus.
Matthew14:2 Xubij chque ri e c'o ruc': “Are wa' ri Xuan Bautist. Xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Rumal c'u ri'
Matthew14:3 Ri Herod c'ut u chapom can ri Xuan
Matthew14:4 Rumal rech chi u bim ri Xuan che ri Herod: “Awas che la chi cäc'oji' ri Herody uc' la che ixokil la.”
Matthew14:5 Ri Herod aretak xraj xucämisaj ri Xuan
Matthew14:6 Xopan ri nimak'ij re ri u junab ri Herod. Ri ral ali ri Herody xxojow chquiwäch ri winak ri e rula'm. Xkaj c'u chuwäch ri Herod.
Matthew14:7 Jeri' chi xuchi'j
Matthew14:8 Ri ali
Matthew14:9 Sibalaj xbison ri ajawinel. Xuya' takanic chi chyok ri xutz'onoj rumal c'u rech ri e u chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew14:10 Xtakan c'u che resaxic ri u jolom ri Xuan pa che'.
Matthew14:11 Xuc'a'x ulok ri u jolom pa jun liq'uilic lak
Matthew14:12 Xebopan c'ut ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan
Matthew14:13 Xetamataj c'ut rumal ri Jesus ri xc'ulmatajic
Matthew14:14 Ri Jesus
Matthew14:15 Xk'ekal chi c'ut
Matthew14:16 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man rajawaxic taj chi quebec; chiya' ix chque ri cäquitijo.”
Matthew14:17 Xquibij c'u ri u tijoxelab che: “Man c'o ta c'o kuc' waral
Matthew14:18 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chebic'ama' ulok.”
Matthew14:19 Xebutak c'u ri winak chi quet'uyi' puwi' ri k'ayes. Xebuc'am ri job caxlanwa cuc' ri quieb cär
Matthew14:20 Xewa' c'u conojel
Matthew14:21 Ri xewa'ic cäraj e c'o job mil achijab
Matthew14:22 Ri Jesus xebucowij ri u tijoxelab chi cheboc pa ri jucub
Matthew14:23 Aretak xebujach can ri winak
Matthew14:24 Ri jucub sibalaj naj chic c'o wi che ri ulew
Matthew14:25 Pa ri u sakaribal c'ut ri ucab k'ij
Matthew14:26 Ri u tijoxelab xquilo chi cätajin cäbin puwi' ri cho
Matthew14:27 Ri Jesus c'ut chanim xebuch'abej
Matthew14:28 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Wajaw
Matthew14:29 Ri Jesus xubij: “Tasaj.” Ri Lu' xkaj bic chrij ri jucub
Matthew14:30 Aretak c'ut xrilo ri quiakik'
Matthew14:31 Ri Jesus xuc'am che ri u k'ab
Matthew14:32 Xuwi c'u xeboc bic pa ri jucub
Matthew14:33 C'äte ri' ri e c'o pa ri jucub xquik'ijilaj ri Jesus
Matthew14:34 Xek'ax c'u ch'käp che ri cho
Matthew14:35 Ri achijab chila' xquich'ob c'u u wäch ri Jesus
Matthew14:36 Xquibochi'j chi xak xuwi ta ne cäquichap ocok ri u chi' ri ratz'iak cumal ri yawabib; joropa' c'ut ri quechapowic quecunatajic.
Matthew15:1 Xepe c'u ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib ri e petinak pa Jerusalen. Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus
Matthew15:2 “Ri a tijoxelab
Matthew15:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jasche ri ix quinimaj ri qui bim ulok ri ojer tak winak
Matthew15:4 Ri Dios xtakanic
Matthew15:5 Ri ix c'ut quibij apachin ri cubij che ri u tat o ri u nan: ‘Man quinya' ta chic ri rajawaxic che la
Matthew15:6 Man ya'tal ta chi che chi nim ta caril wi ri u tat o ri u nan. Jeri' man quiya' ta u k'ij ri u takanic ri Dios are c'u quiya' u k'ij ri i tijonic pa iwech wi.
Matthew15:7 ¡Quieb i wäch! Utz u bixic ri xubij ri Isaiy chiwij
Matthew15:8 ‘We winak ri' xak chi qui chi' cäquinimarisaj nu k'ij. Are c'u ri canima' naj c'o wi chwe.
Matthew15:9 Man c'o ta cupatanij chi caquiya' k'ijilanic chwe; ri e qui tijonic xak e qui takanic winak.’ ”
Matthew15:10 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij c'u ri winak
Matthew15:11 Man are ta ri coc pa ri chi'aj cabanow tz'il che ri winak. Xane' ri quel ulok pa ri chi'aj
Matthew15:12 Xekeb c'u ri u tijoxelab ruc'
Matthew15:13 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ronojel tico'n ri man xtic ta rumal ri nu Tat ri c'o chila' chicaj
Matthew15:14 Chebiya' canok. E moyab cäquic'am c'u qui be niq'uiaj moyab chic. We ri moy cuc'am u be ri moy
Matthew15:15 Ri Lu' xubij che ri Jesus: “Bij la chke jas quel cubij we c'ambal no'j ri'.”
Matthew15:16 Ri Jesus xubij c'ut: “¿La xukuje' ri ix man quich'ob taj?
Matthew15:17 ¿La c'ä maja' quich'obo
Matthew15:18 Are c'u ri quel ulok pa ri u chi' ri winak
Matthew15:19 Chupam c'ut ri anima' quebel wi ulok ri itzel tak chomanic
Matthew15:20 Are jastak wa' ri quebanow tz'il che ri winak. Are c'u ri jun ri cäwa'ic ri man quebuch'aj taj ri e u k'ab
Matthew15:21 Xel bic ri Jesus chila'
Matthew15:22 Jun ixok c'ut aj Canaan ri jekel pa tak ri ulew ri'
Matthew15:23 Ri Jesus man c'o ta tzij xubij che. Xekeb c'u ri u tijoxelab ruc' ri Jesus
Matthew15:24 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “In takom ulok xak xuwi chque ri chij aj uwo rachoch ri Israel
Matthew15:25 Xpe c'u ri chuchu'
Matthew15:26 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Man utz taj we quesax ri qui wa ri alc'ualaxelab cäya' ta c'u chque ri tz'i'.”
Matthew15:27 Ri ixok xubij: “Kastzij
Matthew15:28 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nim ri a cojonic
Matthew15:29 Xel bic ri Jesus chila'. Xopan chuchi' ri cho re Galiley. Xpaki' pa ri juyub
Matthew15:30 Xebopan q'uialaj winak ruc'. E cuc'am ulok ch'ocojib
Matthew15:31 Jeri' chi ri winak xquimayo. Xquilo chi quech'aw ri memab
Matthew15:32 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri u tijoxelab
Matthew15:33 Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' ta c'o wi sibalaj caxlanwa kuc' waral pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Matthew15:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Joropa' caxlanwa e c'o iwuc'?” Ri e are xquibij: “Wukub
Matthew15:35 Ri Jesus xebutak ri winak chi chet'uyul cho ri ulew.
Matthew15:36 Xebuc'am c'u ri wukub caxlanwa cuc' ri cär
Matthew15:37 Xewa' conojel
Matthew15:38 E quiejeb mil achijab ri xewa'ic. Man xebajilax ta c'u ri ixokib mawi ri ac'alab.
Matthew15:39 Aretak e u jachom chi bic ri winak
Matthew16:1 Xepe ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib
Matthew16:2 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Aretak xk'ekal chic
Matthew16:3 Ak'ab c'ut quibij: ‘Cuban na k'ekal jäb camic
Matthew16:4 We itzel tak winak ri' xukuje' man e jic taj caquitz'onoj jun etal; man cäyataj ta c'u etal chque xuwi ri etal re ri Jonas.” Xebuya' canok
Matthew16:5 Xek'ax ri tijoxelab ch'käp che ri cho. Ri are xsach pa qui jolom ri u c'amic bic ri qui caxlanwa.
Matthew16:6 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwila'
Matthew16:7 Ri u tijoxelab c'ut xquichap c'u u chomaxic
Matthew16:8 Xuch'ob ri Jesus jas ri cätajin cäquichomaj
Matthew16:9 ¿La man quich'obo? ¿La man cänataj chiwe ri job caxlanwa ri xquitij ri job mil achijab? ¿La man cänataj chiwe joropa' chicäch ri caxlanwa xebiyico ri man xquiq'uis taj?
Matthew16:10 ¿Mawi cänataj chiwe ri wukub wa ri xquitij ri quiejeb mil achijab? ¿La man cänataj chiwe joropa' chicäch ri caxlanwa xebiyico ri man xquiq'uis taj?
Matthew16:11 ¿Jas c'u che man quich'ob taj chi man are ta ri caxlanwa ri xinbij chiwe? Chichajij ba' iwib chuwäch ri qui ch'am ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib.”
Matthew16:12 C'äte ri' xquich'obo chi man are ta xubij chi cäquichajij quib chuwäch ri ch'am re ri caxlanwa. Xane' xubij chi cäquichajij quib chuwäch ri qui tijonic ri pariseyib xukuje' ri saduseyib.
Matthew16:13 Aretak xopan ri Jesus pa ri rulewal ri Sesarey re Pilip
Matthew16:14 Ri e are xquibij: “Niq'uiaj winak cäquibij chi are ri Xuan Bautist. Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi are ri Eliy. E c'o niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi are ri Jeremiy o jun chque ri k'axal tak tzij.”
Matthew16:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “E c'u ri ix
Matthew16:16 Ri Simon Lu' xubij che: “Lal ri' ri Crist
Matthew16:17 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Utz awe
Matthew16:18 In quinbij chawe
Matthew16:19 Quebenya' c'u na ri e u laweyil ri rajawibal ri Dios chawe. Ri caxim cho ri uwächulew
Matthew16:20 Ri Jesus xebupixbej c'u ri u tijoxelab chi c'o jun mäquibij wi chi are ri Crist.
Matthew16:21 Kas chi' c'ut ri Jesucrist xuchaplej bic ri u k'alajisaxic chquiwäch ri u tijoxelab chi rajawaxic chi cäbe na pa Jerusalen
Matthew16:22 Ri Lu' xuc'am bic ri Jesus
Matthew16:23 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib
Matthew16:24 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “We c'o jun cäraj cäpe wuc' in
Matthew16:25 Apachin ta ne ri cäraj u colic ri u c'aslemal
Matthew16:26 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cärechbej na jun winak
Matthew16:27 Ri Rija'l winak cäpe cuc' ri tako'nib aj caj

Matthew17:1 Oc'owinak chi wakib k'ij
Matthew17:2 Xq'uextaj c'u ri u wächbal ri Jesus chquiwäch; xjuluw ri u palaj je jas ri k'ij
Matthew17:3 Xquil c'u ri Moises xukuje' ri Eliy
Matthew17:4 Ri Lu' xubij che ri Jesus: “Kajaw utz ri' chi chujcanaj can waral. We caj la

Matthew17:6 Ri u tijoxelab
Matthew17:7 Xkeb c'u ri Jesus cuc'
Matthew17:8 Xeca'yic

Matthew17:10 Ri u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus: “¿Jas c'u che cäquibij ri ajtijab re ri pixab chi rajawaxic nabe cäpe na ri Eliy?”
Matthew17:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij ri Eliy cäpetic quebeluya' c'u na conojel ri jastak pa ri qui c'olbal.
Matthew17:12 Ri in quinbij chiwe
Matthew17:13 C'äte ri' xquich'ob ri u tijoxelab chi are xubij ri Xuan Bautist.
Matthew17:14 Aretak xebopanic jawije' e c'o wi ri winak

Matthew17:27 Man cäkaj ta c'ut chi cäquiban quieb qui c'u'x chkij. Jät ba'. Chaq'uiaka' ri chapbal cär pa ri cho. Ri nabe cär c'ut ri cäriko

Matthew19:19 Nim chebawila' wi ri a nan a tat. Chalok'ok'ej ri awajil a tz'akat je jas u lok'ok'exic awib chbil awib.”

Matthew20:1 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios junam ruc' jun achi ajchak'e ulew

Matthew20:5 Ri ajchak'e ulew xel chi bic jumul aretak xurik ri tiq'uil k'ij

Matthew21:14 Xebopan c'u ri moyab xukuje' ri ch'ocojib ruc' ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios. Ri are xebucunaj c'ut.
Matthew21:15 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquilo chi ri Jesus xuban tak ri mayibal. Xquito chi ri ac'alab cäquirak qui chi' pa ri rachoch Dios

Matthew23:4 Quequixim eka'n sibalaj al
Matthew23:5 Cäquiban ronojel ri qui chac rech queca'yex cumal ri winak: cäquinimarisaj u wäch ri rabarak tak wuj ri cäquicoj chiquipalaj
Matthew23:6 aretak queboc pa nimak tak wa'im
Matthew23:7 utz cäquito aretak ri winak cäquiya' rutzil qui wäch pa tak ri c'ayibal aretak ri winak cäquibij ‘ajtijab’ chque.

Matthew23:18 Xukuje' quibij: ‘Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri porobal che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew23:19 Conab xukuje' moyab. ¿Jachique c'u ri nim na u k'ij
Matthew23:20 Apachin c'u ri cucoj ri u bi' ri porobal che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew23:21 Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri rachoch Dios che u banic ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew23:22 Apachin ri cucoj ri u bi' ri caj che u banic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na
Matthew23:23 ¡C'ax iwech
Matthew23:24 ¡Ix moyalaj tak c'amal tak be! Quicha' ri us
Matthew23:25 ¡Tok'ob i wäch
Matthew23:26 ¡Moyalaj parisey! Nabe chach'aja' ri u pam we c'u je caban wa' ri mulul
Matthew23:27 ¡Tok'ob i wäch
Matthew23:28 Je c'u ri' xukuje' ri ix
Matthew23:29 ¡C'ax iwech
Matthew23:30 Quibij c'ut: ‘We ta uj c'o chic pa tak ri qui k'ij ri e ka mam
Matthew23:31 Je c'u ri'
Matthew23:32 ¡Chiq'uisa' ba' u banic ri xquichaplej ulok qui banic ri e i mam!
Matthew23:33 ¡Ix je ta ne e cumätz! ¡Ix quija'l cumätz! ¿Jas lo ri quiban che u to'ic iwib chuwäch ri xibalba ri cac'äjisax wi i wäch?
Matthew23:34 Rumal ri'
Matthew23:35 Jeri' piwi' cäkaj wi na ri qui quiq'uel conojel ri suc'alaj tak winak ri e cämisam cho ri uwächulew
Matthew23:36 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel wa' cäpe na paquiwi' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic.”
Matthew23:37 “¡Jerusalen
Matthew23:38 Chiwilampe'
Matthew23:39 Quinbij chiwe chi man quiniwil ta chi na c'ä quibij na: ‘Tewichital ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel.’ ”
Matthew24:1 Elinak chi bic ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios
Matthew24:2 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La quiwil ronojel wa'? Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew24:3 Ri Jesus t'uyul pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun. Xebopan ri u tijoxelab ruc' pa qui tuquiel wi
Matthew24:4 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chichajij iwib
Matthew24:5 E q'ui quepe na pa ri nu bi'
Matthew24:6 Quita' na chi e c'o tak ch'o'j. Quita' na u tzijol tak ch'o'j. Chiwila' iwib mixsachic. Rajawaxic c'ut chi cäc'ulmax na wa'. C'ä majok c'u ri q'uisbalil.
Matthew24:7 Cäwalij na jun nim tinimit chrij jun nim tinimit chic. Cäwalij na jun ajawibal chrij jun ajawibal chic. Pa jalajoj tak c'olbal quepe na wi'jal
Matthew24:8 Conojel we jastak ri' e chaplebal que k'oxowem.
Matthew24:9 C'äte ri' quixjach na pa qui k'ab winak ri cäquiban c'ax chiwe
Matthew24:10 E q'ui c'ut quetukar na pa ri qui cojonic; cäquijachala' na quib
Matthew24:11 Quewalij na q'ui ri cäquijaluj na quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. E q'ui ri winak ri quequisub na.
Matthew24:12 Rumal ri u q'uiyiric ri etzelal
Matthew24:13 Apachin c'ut ri co cataq'uic c'ä pa ri q'uisbalil
Matthew24:14 We utzalaj tak tzij ri' re ri rajawibal ri Dios cätzijox na pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Jeri' cäk'alajisax ri utzalaj tak tzij chquiwäch conojel nimak tak tinimit ri c'o cho ronojel ri uwächulew. C'äte ri'
Matthew24:15 Ri Daniel ri k'axal tzij xutz'ibaj ri tz'ilalaj etzelal ri awas u banic pa ri k'ijilabal. Ri cäsiq'uinic ch'obonok: aretak ri ix quiwil ri xibibal tz'ilol pa ri k'ijilabal
Matthew24:16 c'äte ri'
Matthew24:17 Ri c'o puwi' ri ja
Matthew24:18 Ri c'o pa ri juyub
Matthew24:19 ¡Tok'ob c'u qui wäch ri ixokib ri e yawab tak winak chic pa tak ri k'ijol ri'! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ixokib ri e c'o cal ri quetu'nic!
Matthew24:20 Chita' ba' che ri Dios chi ma ta quixanimaj bic pa ri sak'ij mawi pa jun k'ij re uxlanem.
Matthew24:21 C'äte ri' cäpe na nimalaj c'axc'olil ri man ilom ta ulok kas aretak xtiquiritaj ulok ri uwächulew c'ä camic
Matthew24:22 We ta ma ta queco'pix ri k'ij ri'
Matthew24:23 We c'o c'u jun cubij chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe'
Matthew24:24 Quepe c'u na winak ri cäquijaluj quib chi e Crist. Quepe na ri cäquijaluj quib chi e k'axal tak tzij. Quequiban na nimak tak etal xukuje' mayibal che qui subic we ta cäbantajic xukuje' ne ri e cha'om kas rumal ri Dios.
Matthew24:25 Chiwilampe'
Matthew24:26 We cäbix c'u chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe'
Matthew24:27 Je c'ut jas ri caypa' ri quel ulok pa ri elebal k'ij
Matthew24:28 Apawije' ta c'u ne c'o wi jun cäminak cuerp
Matthew24:29 “Chanim c'ut
Matthew24:30 C'äte ri' quil na chila' chicaj ri retal ri Rija'l winak. Ri winak c'ut ri e c'o pa tak conojel tinimit cho ri uwächulew cäquiq'uis na quib che ok'ej. Cäquil c'u na ri Rija'l winak petinak pa tak ri sutz' chicaj
Matthew24:31 Quebutak na ri tako'nib aj chicaj ruc' nimalaj rok'ebal trompet. Quebumulij na ri e rech ri e u cha'om pa ri quiejeb u tza'm ri uwächulew
Matthew24:32 Chiwesaj i no'j chrij ri u che'al higo: Aretak quet'anar ri u k'ab
Matthew24:33 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix
Matthew24:34 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew24:35 Ri caj ulew casach na qui wäch. Are c'u ri nu tzij mawi jubik' casach u wäch.
Matthew24:36 Are c'u we k'ij ri' xukuje' we jok'otaj ri'
Matthew24:37 Je jas pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Noe
Matthew24:38 Je jas pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Matthew24:39 Man quetam taj c'ä xpe na ri nimalaj k'ekal jäb
Matthew24:40 E c'o c'u quieb pa ri juyub. Ri jun cäc'am na bic
Matthew24:41 E quieb ixokib cätajin quequienic. Ri jun cäc'am bic

Matthew24:43 Chich'obo' c'u wa'
Matthew24:44 Rumal ri'
Matthew24:45 “¿Jachin c'u ri jicalaj pataninel

Matthew24:47 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Matthew24:48 We c'u ri itzel pataninel cuchomaj: ‘Ri wajaw cäbeytaj ri u petic.’
Matthew24:49 Cuchaplej c'u qui ch'ayic ri rach tak pataninelab
Matthew24:50 cäpe na ri rajaw ri pataninel ri' pa jun k'ij ri man cäreyej taj. Cäpe pa jun jok'otaj ri man cuchomaj taj ri pataninel chi cäpetic.

Matthew25:1 “Pa ri k'ij ri'
Matthew25:2 Job chque ri alitomab
Matthew25:3 Ri man utz ta qui chomanic xquic'am ri qui yabal k'ak'
Matthew25:4 Are c'u ri utz qui chomanic xquic'am bic caseit chupam ri qui c'olbal k'ak' xukuje' niq'uiaj chic.
Matthew25:5 Xbeytaj ri jiaxel. Xeyuxcat conojel
Matthew25:6 Pa niq'uiaj ak'ab
Matthew25:7 Xewalij c'u conojel ri alitomab ri'
Matthew25:8 Ri man utz ta qui chomanic xquibij chque ri utz qui chomanic: ‘Chiya' ke ri iwaseit. Quechup c'u ri ka yabal k'ak'.’
Matthew25:9 Ri utz qui chomanic xquibij chque: ‘We ne man cubana' chke uj xukuje' chiwe ix. Are utz jix cuc' ri ajc'ayib
Matthew25:10 E benak c'u ri job alitomab che u lok'ic caseit aretak xpe can ri jiaxel. Are c'u ri qui suc'umam quib xeboc ruc' pa ri c'ulanem. Xtz'apix c'u ri uchi'ja.
Matthew25:11 C'äte ri' xepe ri niq'uiaj alitomab chic
Matthew25:12 Ri are xubij chque: Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi man weta'm ta i wäch.
Matthew25:13 Chixc'asc'at ba'
Matthew25:14 “Ri rajawibal ri Dios junam ruc' jun achi ri xbe naj
Matthew25:15 Xuya' job rakan nimak tak puak che ri jun. Che ri jun chic xuya' quieb rakan nimak tak puak. Xuya' jun rakan nim puak che ri jun chic. Xuya' chque chquijujunal jas ri quecuin che u banic. Te c'u ri' xbe naj.
Matthew25:16 Chanim c'ut ri xuc'am job rakan nimak tak puak xbec
Matthew25:17 Jewa' xukuje' ri xuc'am quieb rakan nimak tak puak
Matthew25:18 Are c'u ri xuc'am jun rakan nim puak
Matthew25:19 E oc'owinak chic q'uialaj k'ij
Matthew25:20 Ri xuc'am job rakan nimak tak puak xkeb ruc'

Matthew25:22 Xukuje' ri xuc'am quieb rakan nimak tak puak xkeb ruc' ri rajaw
Matthew25:23 Ri rajaw xubij che: ‘Utz
Matthew25:24 Ri xuc'am jun rakan nim puak xkeb ruc' ri rajaw
Matthew25:25 Xinxe'j wib
Matthew25:26 Ri rajaw xubij che: ‘At itzel pataninel
Matthew25:27 rumal ri' utz na xaya' ta ri nu puak chque ri c'olol tak puak
Matthew25:28 Chiwesaj ba ri jun nim puak che
Matthew25:29 Ronojel c'u jachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc'
Matthew25:30 Ri pataninel ri man c'o ta quechbex che
Matthew25:31 “Aretak cäpe ri Rija'l winak cuc' conojel ri e u tako'nib ri Dios
Matthew25:32 Quemulix c'u na conojel ri nimak tak tinimit chuwäch. Quebutas na ri niq'uiaj chquixo'l ri jule' chic
Matthew25:33 Quebuya' na ri chij pa ri riquiak'ab. Are c'u ri q'uisic' quebuya' na pa ri u mox k'ab.
Matthew25:34 Cubij c'u na ri Ajawinel chque ri e c'o pa ri riquiak'ab: ‘Tisaj
Matthew25:35 Rumal rech chi xinnumic
Matthew25:36 Aretak in xint'unuwic
Matthew25:37 Ri e suc' cäquibij na che ri Ajawinel: ‘Kajaw
Matthew25:38 ¿Jampa' ta xkil la chi xwonocat la
Matthew25:39 ¿O jampa' ta xkil la chi xyawaj ta la
Matthew25:40 Ri Ajawinel cubij na chque: ‘Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel ri xiban che jun chque we ch'utik tak wachalal ri'
Matthew25:41 Ri Ajawinel cubij c'u na chque ri e c'o pa ri u mox k'ab: ‘Chixel chnuwäch
Matthew25:42 Rumal rech chi xinnumic
Matthew25:43 Xinwonocatic
Matthew25:44 Ri e are cäquibij na che ri Ajawinel: ‘Kajaw
Matthew25:45 Ri Ajawinel cubij na chque: ‘Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi ronojel ri man xiban ta che jun chque we ch'utik tak wachalal ri'
Matthew25:46 Quebe c'u na wa' pa ri junalic c'äjisabal wäch. Are c'u ri e suc' quebe na pa ri junalic c'aslemal.”
Matthew26:1 Ri Jesus

Matthew26:3 Xepe c'u ri qui nimakil ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob e cachil ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit. Xquimulij quib pa ri rachoch ri qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob
Matthew26:4 Xquiban chomanic ruc' subunic rech cäquichap ri Jesus che u cämisaxic.

Matthew26:6 C'o c'u ri Jesus pa Betan
Matthew26:7 Xopan jun ixok ruc'
Matthew26:8 Ri u tijoxelab

Matthew26:13 Kastzij quinbij chiwe

Matthew26:19 Ri e u tijoxelab xquibano jas ri xetak wi rumal ri Jesus

Matthew26:26 Aretak cätajin quewa'ic
Matthew26:27 Xukuje' xuc'am jun kumubal
Matthew26:28 Are c'u nu quiq'uel wa' re ri c'ulwächinic. Ri nu quiq'uel cäturuw na rech cäsachtaj ri qui mac e q'ui winak.
Matthew26:29 Quinbij chiwe
Matthew26:30 Aretak qui bixom chi jun bix

Matthew26:35 Xubij ri Lu' che: “Pune' ta rajawaxic chi quincäm uc' la
Matthew26:36 Ri Jesus e rachil ri u tijoxelab xebopan pa ri c'olbal Jetsemani u bi'. Xubij c'u chque: “Chixt'uyul can waral. Quinbe na apan jela' che ch'awem ruc' Dios.”
Matthew26:37 Xuc'am bic ri Lu' xukuje' ri e quieb u c'ojol ri Zebedey. Ri Jesus xuchaplej nimalaj bis
Matthew26:38 Xubij chque: “Sibalaj cäbison ri wanima' c'ä pa ri cämical. Chixcanaj can waral

Matthew26:41 Chixc'asc'atok
Matthew26:42 Ri Jesus chucamul xbec
Matthew26:43 Xtzelej c'u cuc' ri u tijoxelab
Matthew26:44 Ri Jesus xebuya' canok
Matthew26:45 Xtzelej c'u cuc' ri u tijoxelab
Matthew26:46 ¡Chixwalijok! ¡Jo'! ¡Xpe ri jachal wech!”
Matthew26:47 C'ä cätajin cäch'aw ri Jesus aretak xopan ri Judas
Matthew26:48 Ri jachal re u yo'm chi etal chque ri winak
Matthew26:49 Chanim xkeb ruc' ri Jesus
Matthew26:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Wachil
Matthew26:51 Te c'u ri'

Matthew26:53 ¿La ma ta aweta'm chi quincuinic quinbochi'n che ri nu Tat
Matthew26:54 We ta c'u jewa'
Matthew26:55 Pa ri jok'otaj ri'
Matthew26:56 Ronojel c'u wa' cäbanic
Matthew26:57 E are c'ut ri xechapow ri Jesus
Matthew26:58 Are c'u ri Lu' u terenem chi naj
Matthew26:59 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri e comon re ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib xequitzucuj winak che u bixic banoj tzij chrij ri Jesus
Matthew26:60 Man c'o ta c'u u mac ri Jesus xquiriko
Matthew26:61 Xquibij: “Xubij we achi ri': ‘Quincuin che u wulixic ri rachoch Dios
Matthew26:62 Xwalij ri qui nimal ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob
Matthew26:63 Ri Jesus c'ut man xch'aw taj. Ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xubij che: “Pa ri u bi' ri c'aslic Dios
Matthew26:64 Ri Jesus xubij che: “At atbininak. Quinbij c'u chawe
Matthew26:65 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob xujis ri ratz'iak
Matthew26:66 ¿Jas quichomaj?” Ri winak xquibij che: “C'o u mac. Takal che chi cäcämisaxic.”
Matthew26:67 Xquichubaj c'u ri u palaj ri Jesus. Xquit'oc che k'ab. Niq'uiaj chic xquipak'ij k'ab chu palaj.
Matthew26:68 Xquibij che: “Chabij chke Crist
Matthew26:69 Are c'u ri Lu' t'uyul apan cho ja. Xopan jun ali ruc' pataninel

Matthew26:71 Aretak xel bic chuchi' ri ja
