Matthew27:1 Aretak xsakaric
Matthew27:2 Xquiyut ri Jesus
Matthew27:3 Are c'u ri Judas
Matthew27:4 Xubij: “C'o ri nu mac. Xinjach jun achi rech cäcämisaxic
Matthew27:5 Ri Judas xuq'uiak can ri sak puak pa ri rachoch Dios. Xel bic
Matthew27:6 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquic'am ri sak puak
Matthew27:7 Xquitala' c'u qui no'j chquibil tak quib. Xquicoj c'u ri puak che u lok'ic jun ulew ri rech ri banal bo'j
Matthew27:8 Rumal ri' cäbix “Ulew re Quic'” che ri ulew ri' c'ä camic.
Matthew27:9 Je xbantajic jas ri tzijom can rumal ri Jeremiy ri k'axal tzij aretak xubij: “Xquic'am ri juwinak lajuj rakan sak puak
Matthew27:10 Xquilok'obej re ri ulew ri rech ri banal bo'j
Matthew27:11 Ri Jesus xtaq'ui' chuwäch ri k'atal tzij. Ri k'atal tzij xuc'ot u chi': “¿La at ri' ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Lal lal bininak.”
Matthew27:12 Aretak ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri nimak tak tatayib xquitzujuj
Matthew27:13 Xubij c'u ri Pilat che: “¿La ma ta cata' conojel ri jastak ri cäquibij chawij?”
Matthew27:14 Ri Jesus man xutzelej ta u wäch mawi jun tzujubal. Je c'u ri' ri k'atal tzij sibalaj xumayo.
Matthew27:15 Pa ronojel nimak'ij ri k'atal tzij u nak'atisam u tzokopixic jun ajpache'
Matthew27:16 C'o c'u jun ajpache' pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Matthew27:17 Aretak qui mulin quib ri winak
Matthew27:18 Reta'm c'u ri Pilat chi qui jachom ri Jesus xa' rumal rech quiäk rayinic.
Matthew27:19 Aretak ri Pilat t'uyul puwi' ri tem jawije' cuk'at wi tzij
Matthew27:20 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib xquicoj qui c'u'x ri winak
Matthew27:21 Ri k'atal tzij xubij chi jumul chque ri winak: “¿Jachin chque ri quieb quiwaj chi quintzokopij bic chiwe?” Ri e are xquibij: “Ri Barabas.”
Matthew27:22 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u quinban che ri Jesus ri cäbix Crist che?” Conojel xquibij: “¡Charipa'!”
Matthew27:23 Xubij c'u ri Pilat: “¿Jas puch ri etzelal u banom?” Ri winak c'ut sibalaj xquirak qui chi'
Matthew27:24 Ri Pilat aretak xrilo chi man c'o ta curechbej
Matthew27:25 Conojel ri winak je xquibij wa': “¡Chkaj ri u quiq'uel pakawi' uj xukuje' paquiwi' ri kalc'ual!”
Matthew27:26 Ri Pilat xutzokopij c'u bic ri Barabas
Matthew27:27 Ri e rajch'ojab c'ut ri k'atal tzij xquic'am bic ri Jesus pa ri ja re k'atbal tzij. Xquimulij ronojel ri juk'at ajch'ojab chrij ri Jesus.
Matthew27:28 Xquesaj ri u k'u'
Matthew27:29 Xquipach'uj jun u corona re q'uix
Matthew27:30 Xquichubaj. Xquesaj c'u ri aj pa u k'ab xquik'osila' che ri u jolom.
Matthew27:31 Aretak quetz'bem chi u wäch
Matthew27:32 Aretak xebel bic
Matthew27:33 Xebopan pa jun c'olbal Golgota u bi'
Matthew27:34 Te c'u ri'
Matthew27:35 Aretak qui ripom chic
Matthew27:36 C'äte ri' xet'uyic
Matthew27:37 Cho ri ripibal puwi' ri u jolom tz'ibam wi jas rumal rech xcämisaxic: “Are wa' ri Jesus ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib.”
Matthew27:38 Xequirip c'u quieb eläk'omab ruc' ri Jesus. Xquirip jun pa ri u wiquiak'ab
Matthew27:39 Ri winak ri queboc'owic xquetz'bej u wäch. Caquisutisa' ri qui jolom.
Matthew27:40 Xquibij: “At
Matthew27:41 Xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Matthew27:42 Xquibij: “Niq'uiaj winak chic xebucolo. Man cäcuin ta c'u che u colic rib. ¡Are c'ut ri Rajawinel ri Israel! Chkaj ulok camic cho ri ripibal
Matthew27:43 Ri are u cu'bisam u c'u'x chrij ri Dios. Chesax rumal ri Dios camic cho ri ripibal
Matthew27:44 Xukuje' ri eläk'omab
Matthew27:45 Kas pa ri tiq'uil k'ij c'ä pa ri urox jok'otaj benak k'ij xk'ekumar ronojel ri uwächulew.
Matthew27:46 Kas pa ri jok'otaj ri'
Matthew27:47 Jujun chque ri e tac'atoj chila'
Matthew27:48 Chanim jun chque aninak xbec
Matthew27:49 Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “Chaweyej na. Chkila' we cäpe ri Eliy che u colic.”
Matthew27:50 Ri Jesus co xurak chi u chi' jumul
Matthew27:51 Te c'u ri' ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic. Ajsic xjixjob wi ulok
Matthew27:52 Ri mukubal xejaktajic. Xec'astaj c'u ri qui cuerp e q'ui tak winak aj Dios ri e cäminak chic.
Matthew27:53 Xebel c'u bic jawije' ri e mukum wi aretak c'astajinak chic ri Jesus. Xeboc pa Jerusalen
Matthew27:54 Ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab e rachil ri chajil tak re ri Jesus
Matthew27:55 E c'o c'u chila' q'ui ixokib cätajin cäquica'yej chi naj
Matthew27:56 C'o ri Mariy Magdalen chquixo'l. C'o ri Mariy qui nan ri Santiag xukuje' ri Jose. Xukuje' c'o ri qui nan ri u c'ojol ri Zebedey.
Matthew27:57 Xk'ekal chic
Matthew27:58 Are wa' xopan ruc' ri Pilat
Matthew27:59 Ri Jose xuc'am ri cuerp
Matthew27:60 Ri Jose xuya' pa ri c'ac' u mukubal
Matthew27:61 E c'o c'u chila' ri Mariy Magdalen rachil ri jun Mariy chic
Matthew27:62 Chucab k'ij chic
Matthew27:63 Xquibij che: “Tat
Matthew27:64 Chatakan ba la che u chajixic ri mukum wi c'ä pa ri urox k'ij
Matthew27:65 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “E c'o ajch'ojab chajinelab pa i k'ab. Jix. Utz chibana' che
Matthew27:66 Xebe c'ut. Utz xquiban che ri mukum wi: xquicoj retal ri abaj rech man c'o ta jun quesan bic xukuje' xecanaj canok ri ajch'ojab che u chajixic.
Matthew28:1 Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij re uxlanem
Matthew28:2 Xak c'ätetal xuban jun nimalaj cabrakan
Matthew28:3 Ri rilic je u banic jun caypa'. Sakloloj ri ratz'iak je jas ri sak tew.
Matthew28:4 Ri ajch'ojab chajinelab xquixe'j quib chuwäch
Matthew28:5 Xch'aw ri tako'n aj chicaj
Matthew28:6 Man c'o ta waral. C'astajinak chic je jas ri xubij. Tisaj. Chiliwila' ri c'olbal ri xya' wi ri Ajawaxel.
Matthew28:7 Jix chanim. Chibij chque ri u tijoxelab chi xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib
Matthew28:8 C'äte ri' ri ixokib xebel bic chuchi' ri mukubal
Matthew28:9 Xuc'utuxtaj c'u rib ri Jesus chquiwäch
Matthew28:10 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Jix. Chiya' u tzijol chque ri wachalal
Matthew28:11 E benak chi c'u ri ixokib
Matthew28:12 Ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquimulij quib cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib
Matthew28:13 Xquibij chque: “Chibij: ‘Ri u tijoxelab xepe chak'ab
Matthew28:14 We cätataj c'u wa' rumal ri k'atal tzij
Matthew28:15 Ri ajch'ojab c'ut xquic'am ri sak puak
Matthew28:16 Ri julajuj tijoxelab c'ut xebe pa Galiley
Matthew28:17 Aretak xquil ri Jesus
Matthew28:18 Xkeb ri Jesus cuc'
Matthew28:19 Rumal c'u ri'
Matthew28:20 Chebitijoj che u nimaxic ronojel jas ri xixintak wi. Chiwilampe'
Mark1:1 U tiquitajic ri utzalaj u tzijol ri Jesucrist
Mark1:2 Jas ri tz'ibam rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij: “Chawilampe'
Mark1:3 C'o jun ch'abal ri curak u chi' pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Mark1:4 Xc'utun c'u ri Xuan pa ri chaki'j uwo sak xuya' k'alajisanic. Xubij chque ri winak chi chiquik'ila' quib quitanaba' qui banic tak ri macaj cheban ri qui bautism che u c'utic chi quiq'uexom qui c'u'x
Mark1:5 E q'ui ri e aj Judey xukuje' e aj Jerusalen xebel ulok che u tatabexic. Quequik'alajisaj tak ri e qui mac
Mark1:6 Are c'u ri Xuan u cojom rismal camey che ratz'iak
Mark1:7 Xtzijon c'ut
Mark1:8 In quink'alajisaj chi xquiq'uex qui c'u'x aretak xebenban ri qui bautism pa ri ja'; ri cätajin cakepetic quebucoj na pa ri Ruxlabal ri Dios.”
Mark1:9 Pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Mark1:10 Pa ri jok'otaj aretak xel ulok chupam ri ja'
Mark1:11 Xtataj c'u jun ch'abal chicaj ri xubij: “At ri' ri lok'alaj nu C'ojol
Mark1:12 Chanim ri Uxlabaxel xuc'am bic ri Jesus pa ri chaki'j uwo sak.
Mark1:13 Xc'oji' cawinak k'ij pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Mark1:14 Cojom c'u ri Xuan pa che'
Mark1:15 Xubij: “Xtz'akat ronojel
Mark1:16 Xoc'ow c'u ri Jesus chuchi' ri cho re Galiley. Chila' xril wi ri Simon rachil ri Trix ri rachalal. Ri e are' cätajin cäquiq'uiak ri c'at chapbal cär pa ri cho
Mark1:17 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chixteren chwij
Mark1:18 Chanim xequiya' can ri qui c'at
Mark1:19 Oc'owinak chi c'u apan jubik'
Mark1:20 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij. Ri e are' xquiya' can ri qui tat
Mark1:21 Xebopan pa Capernaum. Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem
Mark1:22 Ri winak xquimay ri u tijonic
Mark1:23 C'o c'u apan pa ri ja ri caquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab
Mark1:24 xubij: “¿Jas awe chke
Mark1:25 Ri Jesus xuyaj ri itzel uxlabal
Mark1:26 Ri itzel uxlabal xuyäcya' ri achi
Mark1:27 Conojel xquimayo
Mark1:28 Chanim xel u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal ri c'o chunakaj ri Galiley.
Mark1:29 Chanim xebel bic ri Jesus pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xopan cho cachoch ri Simon xukuje' ri Trix
Mark1:30 Ri u ji' chuchu' ri Simon kajinak pa ch'at
Mark1:31 Ri Jesus xkeb ocok ruc' ri chuchu'
Mark1:32 Aretak xk'ekal chic
Mark1:33 Conojel ri aj tinimit xquimulij quib chuchi' ri ja.
Mark1:34 Ri Jesus xebucunaj q'ui yawabib ri e c'o q'ui qui wäch yabilal chque. Xeresaj bic e q'ui itzel tak uxlabal. Man cuya' ta c'u chque ri itzel tak uxlabal chi quech'awic
Mark1:35 Sibalaj ak'ab ri Jesus xwalijic
Mark1:36 Ri Simon cuc' ri rachil xequitzucuj ri Jesus.
Mark1:37 Xequirika'
Mark1:38 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jo' pa jule' tak c'olbal chic ri c'o nakaj
Mark1:39 Xbin pa ronojel Galiley
Mark1:40 Xpe jun achi c'o ch'a'c chrij
Mark1:41 Ri Jesus xel u c'u'x che
Mark1:42 Chanim xel ri ch'a'c che
Mark1:43 Ri Jesus sibalaj xupixbej ri achi
Mark1:44 xubij che: “Chawila' c'o jas mabij che jachin jun. Xane' jät
Mark1:45 Aretak elinak chi bic ri achi
Mark2:1 E oc'owinak chic quieb oxib k'ij
Mark2:2 Chanim xquimulij quib q'ui winak
Mark2:3 Xepe c'u quiejeb achijab
Mark2:4 Man xecuin ta c'ut xekeb chuwäch ri Jesus
Mark2:5 Xril c'u ri Jesus ri qui cojonic
Mark2:6 E t'uyut'oj c'u chila' jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Ri e are' xechoman pa canima':
Mark2:7 “¿Jasche je cätzijon wa'? Cuc'ulelaj ri Dios. ¿Jachin ta lo ri cäcuinic cuya' sachbal mac
Mark2:8 Xretamaj c'u ri Jesus pa ri ruxlabal ri qui chomanic ri ajtijab pa canima'
Mark2:9 ¿Jachique ri man c'ax taj
Mark2:10 Rech ba' quiwetamaj chi ri Rija'l Winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che u sachic qui mac ri winak cho ri uwächulew
Mark2:11 ‘Quinbij chawe: Chatwalijok
Mark2:12 Chanim c'ut xwalijic
Mark2:13 Ri Jesus xbe chi jumul chuchi' ri cho. Xenakajin q'uialaj winak ruc' xuchaplej c'u qui tijoxic.
Mark2:14 Oc'owem cubano
Mark2:15 Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi ri Jesus c'o pa wa'im pa ri rachoch ri Levi. E q'ui tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' e jule' tak ajmaquib chic e c'o ruc' ri Jesus pa ri mexa e rachil ri e u tijoxelab. E q'ui c'ut ri qui terenem ri Jesus.
Mark2:16 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib
Mark2:17 Ri Jesus aretak xuta' wa
Mark2:18 Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan Bautist xukuje' ri qui tijoxelab ri pariseyib man cätajin ta cäquitij qui wa. Xebopan c'u jujun winak ruc' ri Jesus
Mark2:19 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La cuya' puch man cäquitij ta qui wa ri e siq'uim pa jun c'ulanem? Aretak c'o ri achajilaxel
Mark2:20 “Copan c'u na jun k'ij aretak quesax ri achajilaxel chquixo'l
Mark2:21 Man c'o ta jun cut'is jun c'ac' c'ojbal che jun k'e'l atz'iak. We ta jeri'
Mark2:22 Man c'o ta jun ri cuya' c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri'
Mark2:23 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem
Mark2:24 Ri pariseyib xquibij c'u che ri Jesus: “Chawilampe'
Mark2:25 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La mawi jumul i siq'uim jas xuban ri David ojer aretak xeq'uetetic
Mark2:26 Xoc ri David pa ri rachoch Dios aretak ri Abiatar are qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Mark2:27 Xukuje' xubij chque: “Ri k'ij re uxlanem xban rumal quech ri winak. Man are ta xeban ri winak che ri k'ij re uxlanem.
Mark2:28 Jeri' ri Rija'l Winak c'o xukuje' u takanic puwi' ri k'ij re uxlanem.”
Mark3:1 Ri Jesus xoc chi bic jumul pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. C'o c'u jun achi chila' chaki'jarinak jun u k'ab.
Mark3:2 Cäquil c'ut ri cuban na ri Jesus
Mark3:3 Ri Jesus xubij che ri achi ri chaki'j u k'ab: “Chatwalijok. Chatc'ol pa ka niq'uiajil.”
Mark3:4 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque ri winak: “¿La cuya' cäban utzil pa ri k'ij re uxlanem o cäban etzelal? ¿La utz ri cäcol ri u c'aslemal jun winak o cäcämisaxic?” Ri e are' c'ut man xech'aw taj.
Mark3:5 Xpe royowal ri Jesus chque
Mark3:6 Chanim xebel bic ri pariseyib
Mark3:7 Are c'u ri Jesus xbe apan chuchi' ri cho e rachilam ri e u tijoxelab.
Mark3:8 Terenetal c'u cumal q'uialaj winak kas pa Galiley
Mark3:9 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab chi xak chc'ol jun jucub che
Mark3:10 Xebucunaj e q'ui winak
Mark3:11 Ri itzel tak uxlabal
Mark3:12 Ri Jesus c'ut xebutako chi mäquik'alajisaj chquiwäch ri winak jachin ri are'.
Mark3:13 Ri Jesus xpaki' cho ri juyub
Mark3:14 Xebucha' cablajuj takomxenlab
Mark3:15 rech cuya' takanic pa qui k'ab che quesaxic itzel tak uxlabal.
Mark3:16 Are' c'u wa' ri cablajuj ri xebucha'o. Ri Simon ri xucoj Lu' che ucab u bi';
Mark3:17 ri Santiag u c'ojol ri Zebedey
Mark3:18 ri Trix
Mark3:19 xukuje' ri Judas Iscariot ri jachal re ri Jesus.
Mark3:20 Xoc c'ut ri Jesus cho jun ja e rachil ri u tijoxelab. Jumul chic xquimulij quib q'uialaj winak cuc'
Mark3:21 Aretak xquita' ri rachalal ri Jesus
Mark3:22 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab ri e kajinak ulok pa Jerusalen
Mark3:23 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij
Mark3:24 We c'o jun ajawibal quieb u banom cuc'ulela' c'u rib we ajawibal ri'
Mark3:25 We c'o jun ja winak quieb u banom cuc'ulela' c'u rib
Mark3:26 We ta u tasom rib ri Satanas
Mark3:27 Man cäcuin ta jun coc pa rachoch jun achi ri c'o u chuk'ab
Mark3:28 Quinjiquiba' u bixic chiwe chi ri Dios cuya' na ri sachbal macaj chque ri winak chque conojel ri qui mac xukuje' ronojel ri lawaloyil ri caquibij;
Mark3:29 are' c'ut ri cuyok' ri Ruxlabal re ri Dios mawi jumul cusach na u mac
Mark3:30 Ri Jesus xubij wa' rumal rech chi ri e are' caquijiquiba' u bixic chi c'o jun tz'ilalaj uxlabal ruc'.
Mark3:31 Xepe c'u ri rachalal xukuje' ri u nan ri Jesus
Mark3:32 Ri Jesus sutim rij cumal ri q'uialaj winak ri e t'uyut'oj
Mark3:33 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jachin ri nu nan? ¿Jachin tak ri wachalal?”
Mark3:34 Xebuca'yej ri winak ri e t'uyut'oj pa tak u xcut
Mark3:35 Apachin ri cuban ri u rayibal ri Dios
Mark4:1 Jumul chic ri Jesus xuchaplej tijonic chuchi' ri cho. Xquimulij quib q'uialaj winak ruc'. Jeri' chi xoc bic pa jun jucub puwi' ri cho
Mark4:2 Xebutijoj che q'ui jastak pa c'ambal tak no'j. Xubij chque pa ri u tijonic:
Mark4:3 “Chitatabej ri nu tzij. Chiwilampe'
Mark4:4 Aretak cätajin cäjopinic
Mark4:5 Jubik' chic xkaj chuxo'l tak ri abaj
Mark4:6 Aretak c'u xel ulok ri k'ij
Mark4:7 Jubik' chi ija' xkaj pa tak q'uix. Xebel ulok ri q'uix
Mark4:8 Jubik' chi ija' xkaj pa utzalaj ulew. Xel ulok
Mark4:9 Xubij c'ut ri Jesus: “Apachin ri c'o u xiquin
Mark4:10 Aretak c'u ri Jesus xcanaj u tuquiel cuc' ri cablajuj xukuje' jujun cachil chic
Mark4:11 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Yo'm chiwe ix ri qui ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios ri man etamatal taj nabe canok. Chque c'u ri niq'uiaj winak chic
Mark4:12 rech aretak queca'yic
Mark4:13 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La ma ta quich'ob we c'ambal no'j ri'? ¿Jas c'u quiban che qui ch'obic conojel ri c'ambal tak no'j?
Mark4:14 Ri ticol ija' are cubij ri winak ri cäquitzijoj ri tzij.
Mark4:15 Ri ija' ri xekaj pa ri be
Mark4:16 Junam xukuje' ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak abaj. Ri e are'
Mark4:17 Man c'o ta c'u qui c'amal benak pa ri ulew
Mark4:18 Niq'uiaj ija' chic ri xkaj pa tak ri q'uix
Mark4:19 are c'u queboc il chque ri jastak aj uwächulew
Mark4:20 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa utzalaj ulew
Mark4:21 Te c'u ri' xubij chque: “¿La cätzij jun chäj rech cäya' chuxe' jun t'uy
Mark4:22 Ronojel ri c'u'talic cäk'alajisax na; ronojel ri awatalic quel na chi sak.
Mark4:23 We c'o jun ri c'o u xiquin
Mark4:24 Xukuje' xubij chque: “Chicojo' retal jas ri quito: Jas ri pajbal xicoj ix cuc' niq'uiaj winak chic
Mark4:25 Apachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc'
Mark4:26 Xukuje' xubij ri Jesus: “Jewa' ri rajawibal ri Dios
Mark4:27 Cäwar c'u chak'ab
Mark4:28 Pa re wi cäwächin ri ulew: nabe quel ulok ri tuxaj
Mark4:29 Aretak c'o chi ri u wächinic
Mark4:30 Xukuje' ri Jesus xubij: “¿Jas ruc' cäkajunamaj wi ri rajawibal ri Dios? ¿Ruc' jachique c'ambal no'j cäkaya' wi chi sakil?
Mark4:31 Are je jas jun u wäch moxtansa. Aretak cätic pa ri ulew
Mark4:32 Aretak tictajinak chic
Mark4:33 Cumal q'ui c'ambal no'j je tak wa' ri Jesus cutzijoj ri tzij chque
Mark4:34 Man xebutzijobej taj ri ma ta cuc' c'ambal tak no'j. Cuk'alajisaj c'u ronojel chquiwäch ri e u tijoxelab pa qui tuquiel wi.
Mark4:35 Pa ri k'ij ri'
Mark4:36 Ri u tijoxelab xequiya' can ri winak
Mark4:37 Xpe jun nimalaj quiakik'. Xeboc ri k'et re ri ja' pa ri jucub
Mark4:38 C'o c'u ri Jesus chutza'm ri jucub
Mark4:39 Xc'astaj c'u ri Jesus
Mark4:40 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jasche quixe'j iwib? ¿Jasche man c'o ta i cojonic?”
Mark4:41 Ri e are' sibalaj xquixe'j quib. Xquibila' chquibil tak quib: “¿Jachin wa'
Mark5:1 Xebopan ch'käp che ri cho
Mark5:2 Elinak chi bic ri Jesus pa ri jucub
Mark5:3 Chila' c'u jekel wi chquixo'l ri mukubal. Man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u ximic
Mark5:4 Q'ui mul ximom ri e rakan xukuje' ri e u k'ab cuc' tikom tak ch'ich'
Mark5:5 Ronojel k'ij
Mark5:6 Aretak xril apan ri Jesus chi naj
Mark5:7 Xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab
Mark5:8 Rumal rech chi u bim ri Jesus che: “Itzelalaj uxlabal
Mark5:9 Ri Jesus xucot u chi': “¿Jas a bi'?” Ri are' xutzelej u bixic: “ ‘Sibalaj uj Q'ui’ ri nu bi'
Mark5:10 Sibalaj xubochi'j ri Jesus chi mätakanic chi chebel bic pa ri c'olbal ri'.
Mark5:11 E c'o c'u apan nimalaj jumulaj ak chunakaj ri juyub ri queyuk'uxic.
Mark5:12 Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus
Mark5:13 Ri Jesus xuya' c'u chque. Xebel bic ri itzel tak uxlabal che ri achi
Mark5:14 Are c'u ri e yuk'ul tak ak xebanimajic. Xequiya' u tzijol pa ri tinimit pa tak ri juyub. Xepe c'u ri winak che rilic jas ri xc'ulmaxic.
Mark5:15 Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus. Xquil ri achi ri xec'oji' q'ui itzel tak uxlabal che
Mark5:16 Are c'u ri winak ri xquil ri xc'ulmatajic
Mark5:17 Xquichaplej c'u u bochi'xic ri Jesus chi chel bic pa ri culew.
Mark5:18 Aretak xoc ri Jesus pa ri jucub
Mark5:19 Ri Jesus man xuya' ta che
Mark5:20 Xel bic ri achi
Mark5:21 Xoc ri Jesus pa ri jucub
Mark5:22 Xpe jun achi
Mark5:23 Sibalaj xubochi'j
Mark5:24 Ri Jesus xbe ruc'
Mark5:25 C'o jun ixok chquixo'l
Mark5:26 Sibalaj u rikom c'ax cumal q'ui tak cunanelab. U sachom ronojel ri c'o ruc'
Mark5:27 Aretak xuta' u tzijol ri Jesus
Mark5:28 Xuchomaj: “Xuwi ta ne quinchap ocok ri u k'u'
Mark5:29 Chanim xtäni' ri u quiq'uel ri quelic. Xuna' pa ri u cuerp chi xcunataj che ri yabil.
Mark5:30 Ri Jesus xuna' chi c'o chuk'ab xel che. Xutzolk'omij rib chquixo'l ri q'uialaj winak
Mark5:31 Xquibij ri u tijoxelab che: “Quil la chi ri q'uialaj winak capitz' la cumal. Jas c'u che cabij la: ‘¿Jachin xchapow ri watz'iak?’ ”
Mark5:32 Ri Jesus c'ut xca'y chque conojel che rilic jachin ri xbanow wa'.
Mark5:33 Xuxe'j c'u rib ri ixok
Mark5:34 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nu mia'l
Mark5:35 C'ä cätajin catzijon ri Jesus aretak xebopan jujun aj uwo rachoch ri Jair
Mark5:36 Ri Jesus xuta' ri qui tzij
Mark5:37 Man xuya' ta c'u ri Jesus chi c'o jun cäteri bic chrij
Mark5:38 Xebopan cho rachoch ri achi ri nim u banic. Xril ri Jesus chi ri winak qui tuquin quib
Mark5:39 Xoc pa ja
Mark5:40 Ri winak cäquitze'j u wäch. Ri Jesus xeresaj bic conojel
Mark5:41 Xuchap c'u ri u k'ab ri ac'al
Mark5:42 Chanim xwalij ri ali
Mark5:43 Ri Jesus sibalaj xebupixbej chi mäquetamaj wa' ri niq'uiaj winak chic. Xubij chque chi chquiya' u wa ri ali.
Mark6:1 Ri Jesus xel bic chila'
Mark6:2 Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem
Mark6:3 ¿La ma ta are wa' ri ajanel
Mark6:4 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Xuwi pa ri u tinimit
Mark6:5 Man xcuin ta c'u che u banic jun nimalaj mayibal chila'. Xuwi xebuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi' quieb oxib yawabib
Mark6:6 Xumayo rumal rech chi man c'o ta qui cojonic. Xebusolij ri alaj tak tinimit catijon c'ut.
Mark6:7 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri cablajuj
Mark6:8 Xebutako chi c'o jas mäquic'am bic che ri qui binem
Mark6:9 Xtakan chque chi chquicojo' bic qui xajäb
Mark6:10 Xubij chque: “Apawije' ri quixoc wi pa jun ja
Mark6:11 Apachique c'olbal ri man quixc'ulax ta wi
Mark6:12 Xebel c'u bic ri tijoxelab che u bixic chque ri winak
Mark6:13 Xequesaj q'ui itzel tak uxlabal chque ri winak. Xequibil q'ui yawabib ruc' aseit
Mark6:14 Ri ajawinel Herod xuta' u tzijol ri Jesus
Mark6:15 Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “Are ri Eliy.” Ri e jule' chic xquibij: “Are jun k'axal tzij
Mark6:16 Aretak xuta' ri Herod
Mark6:17 Are c'u ri Herod xtakan che u cojic ri Xuan pa che'; je xuban ri Herod wa' u mac rech chi ri Herody (ri rixokil ri Pelip
Mark6:18 Ri Xuan xubij che ri Herod: “Awas che la chi cac'oji' ri rixokil ri achalal la uc' la.”
Mark6:19 Ri Herody xpe royowal chrij ri Xuan
Mark6:20 Ri Herod nim c'u xril wi ri Xuan. Reta'm chi are' suc'
Mark6:21 Xopan jun k'ij aretak xya' che ri Herody chi cuban jas ri cäraj. Xurik ri nimak'ij re u tz'akatisaxic u junab ri Herod. Xuban c'u jun nimalaj wa'im chque ri nimak qui k'ij ri e c'o ruc'
Mark6:22 Ri ral ali ri Herody xoc bic
Mark6:23 Xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ruc': “Apachique ta ne ri cata' chwe
Mark6:24 Xel bic ri ali
Mark6:25 Te c'u ri'
Mark6:26 Ri ajawinel sibalaj xbisonic
Mark6:27 Ri ajawinel chanim xutak bic jun chque ri ajch'ojab che u c'amic ulok ri u jolom ri Xuan Bautist.
Mark6:28 Xbe c'ut ri ajch'o'j pa ri che' xeresaj ulok ri u jolom ri Xuan
Mark6:29 Ri e u tijoxelab ri Xuan
Mark6:30 Xetzelej c'u ulok ri takomxenlab che u rikic quib ruc' ri Jesus
Mark6:31 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Tisaj ix pa i tuquiel wi pa jun c'olbal cätz'inowic
Mark6:32 Xebe pa jun jucub qui tuquiel
Mark6:33 Q'ui c'ut ri xebilowic
Mark6:34 Aretak xel ulok ri Jesus pa ri jucub
Mark6:35 Benak chi c'u ri k'ij
Mark6:36 Chejacha' la bic ri winak rech quebe pa tak ri juyub xukuje' pa ri alaj tak tinimit ri e c'o apanok
Mark6:37 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiya' ix chque ri cäquitijo.” Xquibij che: “¿La cujbe ta che u lok'ic quieb sient chicäch caxlanwa rech caquitijo?”
Mark6:38 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Joropa' caxlanwa e c'o iwuc'? Jiwilampe'.” Aretak xquetamaj
Mark6:39 Ri Jesus xtakanic chi conojel ri winak chet'uyul pa tak mulaj puwi' ri räx k'ayes.
Mark6:40 Xet'uyi' pa tak mulaj: pa tak sient
Mark6:41 Ri Jesus xebuc'am ri job caxlanwa xukuje' ri quieb cär
Mark6:42 Conojel xewa'ic
Mark6:43 Te c'u ri' xquiyac ri ch'akatak caxlanwa ri ch'akatak cär ri man xequiq'uis taj
Mark6:44 E job mil (5
Mark6:45 Te c'u ri' ri Jesus xebutak ri u tijoxelab chi cheboc pa ri jucub
Mark6:46 Aretak e u jachom chi bic
Mark6:47 Aretak xk'ekal chic
Mark6:48 Xrilo chi ri u tijoxelab cäquirik c'ax che u binebisaxic ri jucub
Mark6:49 Aretak xquilo chi cäbin puwi' ri cho
Mark6:50 Conojel c'ut xquilo
Mark6:51 Xoc cuc' pa ri jucub
Mark6:52 Man qui ch'obom ta c'u ri mayibal ri xuban ri Jesus ruc' ri caxlanwa
Mark6:53 E k'axenak chi c'ut
Mark6:54 Xuwi c'u xebel pa ri jucub
Mark6:55 Xquibinibej c'u ronojel ri Jenesaret. Ri winak xequic'am ulok ri yawabib cho ch'atum tak che'
Mark6:56 Apawije' c'ut ri copan wi ri Jesus
Mark7:1 Ri pariseyib xukuje' jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab
Mark7:2 Ri e are' c'ut xequil jujun chque ri u tijoxelab ri Jesus
Mark7:3 (Ri pariseyib xukuje' conojel ri aj judeyib cäquinimaj ri qui tijonic ulok ri nimak tak tatayib. We man na'l quequich'aj ri qui k'ab
Mark7:4 Aretak quetzelej ulok pa ri c'ayibal

Mark7:11 Ri ix c'ut quibij we cubij jun winak che ri u tat u nan: ‘Man quinya' ta chic ri rajawaxic chawe
Mark7:12 We je cubij

Mark7:16

Mark7:22 ri kajic pa mac ruc' jun winak chic
Mark7:23 Conojel wa' we itzel tak jastak ri' quebel ulok pa ri canima' ri winak
Mark7:24 Ri Jesus xel bic chila'

Mark12:41 T'uyul c'u ri Jesus chuwäch ri c'olbal ri cäya' wi ri cuchuj. Cärilo jas ri cäquiban ri winak cäquiya' ri puak chupam ri c'olbal cuchuj. Xepe q'ui k'inomab

Mark13:1 Aretak xel ulok ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios
Mark13:2 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La quebawil we nimak tak ja ri'? Copan na jun k'ij aretak man cäcanaj ta can jun abaj puwi' ri jun chic
Mark13:3 Aretak xt'uyi' ri Jesus chupam ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun
Mark13:4 Bij la chke: “¿Jampa' quebantaj we jastak ri'? ¿Jas c'u ri etal aretak majok chebantaj ronojel wa'?”
Mark13:5 Ri Jesus xuchaplej u bixic chque: “Chichajij iwib c'o jun mixsubuwic.
Mark13:6 E q'ui quepe na
Mark13:7 Aretak chito chi e c'o ch'o'j
Mark13:8 Cäwalij na jun nim tinimit chrij jun nim tinimit chic
Mark13:9 Ri ix c'ut chichajij iwib. Quixjach c'u na pa tak qui k'ab ri k'atal tak tzij. Quixch'ay na pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Quixc'am na bic chquiwäch ri c'o takanic pa qui k'ab xukuje' chquiwäch ajawinelab rumal wech in. Jeri' cuya' quixk'alajisan na chwij chquiwäch ri e are'.
Mark13:10 Rajawaxic chi nabe cätzijox na ri tzij re colobal ib pa tak conojel nimak tak tinimit.
Mark13:11 Aretak quixc'am na bic chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij
Mark13:12 E c'o winak quequijach na ri cachalal pa cämisaxic
Mark13:13 Quetzelax na i wäch cumal conojel rumal rech ri nu bi'. Apachin c'u ri cuk'i' ri c'ax c'ä pa ri q'uistajic
Mark13:14 Aretak c'u quiwil ri tz'ilalaj jasach pa ri c'olbal ri man takal ta wi che chi cac'oji' chila'
Mark13:15 Ri c'o puwi' ri ja
Mark13:16 Ri c'o pa ri juyub
Mark13:17 ¡Tok'ob c'u qui wäch ri ixokib yawab tak winak chic! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ixokib ri quetu'bisanic!
Mark13:18 Chitz'onoj che ri Dios chi mäc'ulmax wa' pa ri u k'ijol ri sakloloj tew.
Mark13:19 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' quepe na c'axc'olil ri man ilom ta ulok kas pa ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew c'ä camic ri xuban ri Dios
Mark13:20 We ta ma ta queco'pix we k'ij ri' rumal ri Ajawaxel
Mark13:21 We c'o c'u jun cubij chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe'
Mark13:22 Quewalij na winak ri cäquijaluj quib chi e crist
Mark13:23 Ri ix c'ut chiwila'. Nu bim chi c'u apan ronojel wa' chiwe.”
Mark13:24 “Pa tak c'ut ri k'ij ri'
Mark13:25 Ri ch'imil ri e c'o chicaj quetzak na ulok
Mark13:26 C'äte ri' quil na ri Rija'l Winak petinak pa tak ri sutz' ruc' nimalaj cuinem
Mark13:27 C'äte ri' quebutak c'u na ri e u tako'nib aj caj
Mark13:28 Chich'obo' ri c'ambal no'j chrij ri u che'al higo: Aretak queräxar ri u k'ab
Mark13:29 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix
Mark13:30 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Mark13:31 Queboc'ow na ri caj ulew. Are c'u ri nu tzij man queboc'ow taj.
Mark13:32 Man c'o ta jun reta'm jachique jok'otaj
Mark13:33 Chiwila'
Mark13:34 Are je jas jun achi ri xbe naj
Mark13:35 Chixc'asc'at ba'. Man iweta'm ta c'ut jampa' cäpe ri rajaw ja
Mark13:36 Chixc'asc'at ba'
Mark13:37 Ri quinbij chiwe
Mark14:1 Xa' quieb k'ij cäraj che ri nimak'ij re ri oc'owem
Mark14:2 Xquibij c'ut: “¡Machap pa ri nimak'ij
Mark14:3 C'o c'u ri Jesus pa Betan cho rachoch ri Simon
Mark14:4 E c'o c'u jujun ri xeyojtaj pa canima'
Mark14:5 Utz na we ta xc'ayix we c'oc'alaj cunabal ri' ri cuch'äc jun ajchac pa jujun junab chac pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Mark14:6 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij: “Chiya' canok. ¿Jasche quiya' latz' che? Utzalaj chac xuban chwe.
Mark14:7 Ronojel k'ij e c'o mebayib iwuc'. Aretak c'u quiwaj
Mark14:8 We ixok ri' xubano jas ri xcuin che u banic. Xubil bic ri nu cuerp c'ä majok chincämok.
Mark14:9 Kastzij quinbij chiwe chi apawije' ta ne ri cätzijox wi na ri tzij re colobal ib cho ronojel ri uwächulew
Mark14:10 C'äte ri' xel bic ri Judas Iscariot
Mark14:11 Aretak ri e are' xquita' ri u tzij ri Judas
Mark14:12 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri tijbal caxlanwa ri man caya' ta ch'am ruc'
Mark14:13 Ri Jesus xebutak bic quieb chque ri u tijoxelab
Mark14:14 Jawije' c'u ri coc wi ri achi
Mark14:15 Ri are' cuc'ut na jun nimalaj c'olbal chiwäch pa ri cawik ja. Suc'umam chic ri c'olbal. Chisuc'umaj ri wa'im re ri oc'owem chke chila'.”
Mark14:16 Xebel c'u bic ri u tijoxelab
Mark14:17 Xk'ekal chic
Mark14:18 Aretak xeboc pa ri mexa
Mark14:19 Ri tijoxelab xquichaplej bisonic
Mark14:20 Ri are' xubij chque: “Jun chque ri cablajuj
Mark14:21 Kastzij ri Rija'l Winak cäbec
Mark14:22 Aretak cätajin quewa'ic
Mark14:23 Xukuje' xuc'am ri uq'uiabal
Mark14:24 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Are' nu quiq'uel wa'

Mark14:26 Aretak qui bixom chi jun bix
Mark14:27 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Iwonojel quitzak na ri cu'lbal i c'u'x chwij
Mark14:28 Aretak c'u chinc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib
Mark14:29 Are c'u ri Lu' xubij che: “Pune' conojel caquitzak na
Mark14:30 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Kastzij quinbij chawe chi camic pa we ak'ab ri'

Mark14:32 Xebopan pa ri c'olbal Jetsemani u bi'. Xubij ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chixt'uyul can waral
Mark14:33 Xebuc'am bic ri Lu'

Mark14:35 Xnabej apan jubik'
Mark14:36 Xubij: “Nu Tat
Mark14:37 Xtzelej c'ut jawije' ri e c'o wi canok
Mark14:38 Chixc'asc'atok
Mark14:39 Ri Jesus xbe chi jumul
Mark14:40 Xtzelej chi ulok
Mark14:41 Xbe ri Jesus churox mul
Mark14:42 Chixwalijok
Mark14:43 Aretak c'ä cätajin cäch'aw ri Jesus
Mark14:44 Ri jachal re ri Jesus u yo'm chi etal chque
Mark14:45 Aretak xpe ri Judas
Mark14:46 C'äte ri' ri winak xquichap ri Jesus
Mark14:47 Jun chque ri e tac'atoj chila' xresaj ri u ch'ich'
Mark14:48 Xch'aw ri Jesus
Mark14:49 Ronojel k'ij xinc'oji' iwuc'
Mark14:50 C'äte ri' conojel ri tijoxelab xquiya' can ri Jesus
Mark14:51 Terenetal c'ut rumal jun ala ri xa' jun atz'iak re waram u q'uiakom chrij
Mark14:52 Ri are' c'ut xutzokopij can ri atz'iak
Mark14:53 Xc'am bic ri Jesus chuwäch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Conojel c'u ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob e cachil ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquimulij quib chrij.
Mark14:54 Are c'u ri Lu' xuterenej bic ri Jesus chi naj c'ä cho ri rachoch ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Xt'uyi' can cuc' ri chajinelab
Mark14:55 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri tatayib ri cäquik'at tzij paquiwi' ri aj judeyib
Mark14:56 E q'ui xquiban tzijtal chrij
Mark14:57 Xewalij jujun
Mark14:58 “Ri uj xkata' we achi ri' aretak xubij: ‘In quinwulij na we rachoch Dios ri' ri banom cumal qui k'ab ri winak
Mark14:59 Mawi ruc' wa' junam xebel wi ri qui k'alajisanic.
Mark14:60 Xwalij c'u ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob pa qui niq'uiajil ri winak
Mark14:61 Ri Jesus man xch'aw taj
Mark14:62 Ri Jesus xubij che: “In ri'. Quiwil c'u na ri Rija'l Winak t'uyul pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri c'o ronojel u cuinem
Mark14:63 Are c'u ri e qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xujis ri ratz'iak
Mark14:64 I tom chic chi cuc'ulelaj ri Dios. ¿Jas quichomaj?” Conojel xquik'at tzij puwi' chi takal u cämisaxic.
Mark14:65 Jujun chque xquichaplej u chubaxic chu palaj
Mark14:66 C'o c'u ri Lu' cho ri uwo ja iquim. Xpe jun ali
Mark14:67 Xrilo chi cumik' rib ri Lu'
Mark14:68 Ri are' c'ut xresaj rib chupam
Mark14:69 Ri ali xril chi jumul ri Lu'
Mark14:70 Ri Lu' jumul chic xresaj rib chupam. Xa' nim jubik' chic
Mark14:71 Ri Lu' xuchaplej u c'okoxic rib xuban ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na pa ri u bi' ri Dios
Mark14:72 Chanim ri ama' ec' xok' chucamul. Xnataj c'u che ri Lu' ri tzij ri u bim can ri Jesus che: “C'ä majok cok' camul ri ama' ec'
Mark15:1 Sibalaj ak'ab ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob cuc' ri nimak tak tatayib re ri tinimit
Mark15:2 Ri Pilat xuta' che: “¿La at ri' ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “Lal lal bininak.”
Mark15:3 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob q'ui julum k'abam xquibij chrij.
Mark15:4 Ri Pilat xuc'ot chi u chi' jumul
Mark15:5 Ri Jesus mawi c'o jun tzij xubij. Je c'u ri' ri Pilat sibalaj xumayo.
Mark15:6 Pa ronojel c'u nimak'ij ri Pilat cutzokopij bic jun chque ri e tz'apitz'oj pa che'
Mark15:7 C'o c'u jun achi
Mark15:8 Xquimulij c'u quib ri winak chuwäch ri Pilat
Mark15:9 Ri Pilat xuta' chque: “¿La quiwaj chi quintzokopij bic ri Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?”
Mark15:10 Reta'm c'ut chi ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob qui jachom ri Jesus che
Mark15:11 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquicoj qui c'u'x ri winak
Mark15:12 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas c'u quiwaj quinban che we jun ri quibij chi are Cajawinel ri aj judeyib?”
Mark15:13 Ri e are' xquirak qui chi' jumul chic
Mark15:14 Ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas etzelal u banom?” Ri winak c'ut sibalaj co xquirak qui chi': “¡Chripa' la cho jun ripibal!”
Mark15:15 Ri Pilat are cäraj cubano jas ri qui rayibal ri winak. Xutzokopij bic ri Barabas chquiwäch. Xtakan c'u che u rapuxic ri Jesus. Xujach c'u bic chque ri winak rech caquiripo.
Mark15:16 Ri ajch'ojab xquic'am bic ri Jesus cho ri ja re k'atbal tzij
Mark15:17 Xquicoj jun ratz'iak re morato. Xquicoj jun corona chu jolom
Mark15:18 Te c'u ri' xquirak qui chi'
Mark15:19 Xquik'osij jun aj che ri u jolom xquichubaj
Mark15:20 Aretak quetz'bem chi u wäch
Mark15:21 C'o c'u jun achi Simon u bi'
Mark15:22 Xquic'am bic ri Jesus pa ri c'olbal Golgota
Mark15:23 Xquiya' u wa'l uva yujtal ruc' mir (re cunabal che resaxic ri k'oxom)
Mark15:24 Aretak qui ripom chic xquijach ri ratz'iak
Mark15:25 Pa ri ubelej jok'otaj re ak'abil aretak xrip cho ri ripibal.
Mark15:26 Ri u mac ri tz'ibax puwi'
Mark15:27 Xukuje' xerip quieb eläk'omab ruc'
Mark15:28 
Mark15:29 Ri winak ri queboc'owic xquiyok'o
Mark15:30 chacolo awib chbil awib
Mark15:31 Junam xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri cojol tak tabal tok'ob cuc' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquetz'bej u wäch
Mark15:32 Chkaj ulok ri Crist
Mark15:33 Aretak xurik ri tiquil k'ij
Mark15:34 Pa ri urox rajilabal ri benak k'ij ri Jesus xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab
Mark15:35 Jujun chque ri e c'o chila' aretak xquito
Mark15:36 Aninak xpe jun
Mark15:37 Ri Jesus co xurak u chi'
Mark15:38 Ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic
Mark15:39 Ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab tac'al chuwäch ri Jesus. Aretak xrilo chi je xuban wa' ri Jesus
Mark15:40 E c'o ixokib ri cätajin cäquil ulok chi naj. Chquixo'l c'u ri ixokib ri' e c'o ri Mariy Magdalen; xukuje' ri Mariy qui nan ri Santiag ri chak'axel xukuje' ri Jose; xukuje' ri Salome.
Mark15:41 We ixokib ri' quiterenem ulok ri Jesus
Mark15:42 Xk'ekal chic c'ut casuc'umax ri cajwataj che ri ucab k'ij ri are' k'ij rech uxlanem
Mark15:43 xpe c'u ri Jose aj Arimatey. Ri are' jun chque ri qui nimakil ri k'atal tak tzij
Mark15:44 Ri Pilat xumayo chi chanim xcäm ri Jesus. Xusiq'uij ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab
Mark15:45 Aretak xubij ri qui nimal jun sient ajch'ojab che chi cäminak chic
Mark15:46 Ri Jose xulok' jun sak atz'iak
Mark15:47 Ri Mariy Magdalen ruc' ri Mariy u nan ri Jose xquilo jawije' ri xya' wi ri u cuerp ri Jesus.
Mark16:1 Aretak xoc'ow ri k'ij re uxlanem
Mark16:2 Sibalaj ak'ab pa ri nabe k'ij re ri seman
Mark16:3 Xquibij c'u chbil tak quib: “¿Jachin ta ri quesan ri abaj chuchi' ri mukubal?”
Mark16:4 Aretak xeca'y apanok
Mark16:5 Aretak xeboc bic pa ri mukubal

Mark16:7 Jix ba'

Mark16:10 Ri Mariy xbec
Mark16:11 Ri e are'

Mark16:15 Xubij chque: Jix cho ronojel ri uwächulew. Chebitzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij chque conojel ri winak.

Mark16:20 Ri u tijoxelab xebel bic
Luke1:1 E q'ui ri winak ri xcaj xquitz'ibaj pa cholaj ri u tzijobelil ri kas xc'ulmataj chkaxo'l.
Luke1:2 Ri xbantajic are je jas ri xc'ut chkawäch cumal ri xeilow ruc' ri qui bak'wäch kas pa ri u chaplebal
Luke1:3 Ri in xukuje' nojim xinwetamaj ronojel kas pa ri u chapletajic rech quintz'ibaj wa' che la
Luke1:4 Jeri' quetamaj na la ri kastzij chrij ri tijonic ri yo'm che la.
Luke1:5 Pa tak ri k'ij aretak ri Herod are' ajawinel re Judey
Luke1:6 Ri Zacariy ruc' ri Elisabet e suc' chuwäch ri Dios. Cäquinimaj ronojel ri u takanic ri Ajawaxel. Cäquinimaj ronojel ri pixab. Man c'o ta etzelal xriktaj chquij.
Luke1:7 Man e c'olinak ta calc'ual. Man alc'ualanel ta c'u ri Elisabet. Ri e quieb e nimak tak winak chic.
Luke1:8 Jun k'ij ri Zacariy c'o che u cojic tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri Dios jas ri u cholajil ri u juk'at.
Luke1:9 Je jas ri nak'atisam u banic chquixo'l ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Luke1:10 Conojel c'u ri e q'uia winak e c'o apan cho ja
Luke1:11 Ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Zacariy
Luke1:12 Ri Zacariy aretak xrilo
Luke1:13 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij che: “Zacariy
Luke1:14 Cäc'oji' na nimalaj a quicotemal
Luke1:15 Cux c'u na nim u k'ij chuwäch ri Ajawaxel. Man c'o ta u wa'l uva
Luke1:16 Rumal ri are' e q'ui chque ri aj israelib quecojon na che ri Ajawaxel
Luke1:17 Ri Xuan cänabej na chuwäch ri Ajawaxel

Luke1:20 Chawilampe'
Luke1:21 Ri winak queyem ri Zacariy
Luke1:22 Aretak xel ulok

Luke1:24 E oc'owinak chi c'u we k'ij ri'
Luke1:25 Xubij: “Je u banom ri Ajawaxel wa' chwe
Luke1:26 Chuwak ic' chi c'ut
Luke1:27 Xopan ruc' jun k'apoj ali ri tz'onom chic rumal jun achi Jose u bi'. Are jun chque ri e rija'l ri David. Mariy u bi' ri ali ri'.

Luke1:31 Chawilampe'

Luke1:33 Cätakan na puwi' ri nim tinimit Israel chbe k'ij sak. Ri u takanic c'ut man c'o ta u q'uistajic.”
Luke1:34 Xubij c'u ri Mariy che ri tako'n aj caj: “¿Jas lo wa'? Man in c'olinak ta ruc' achi.”
Luke1:35 Ri tako'n xubij che: “Ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cäpe na pawi'. Ri u chuk'ab ri Dios aj chicaj cäpe na pawi' jas jun sutz'. Rumal ri' ri ac'al ri calax na
Luke1:36 Chawilampe'
Luke1:37 Man c'o ta c'u jun jasach ri ma ta cäcuin ri Dios che u banic.”
Luke1:38 Xubij c'u ri Mariy: “Ri in in pataninel re ri Ajawaxel. Ri Dios chubana' chwe jas ri bim la chwe.” Ri tako'n aj caj xel c'u bic chuwäch.
Luke1:39 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xel bic ri Mariy
Luke1:40 Xoc bic pa ri rachoch ri Zacariy
Luke1:41 Aretak ri Elisabet xuta' ri rutzil u wäch rumal ri Mariy
Luke1:42 Co xurak u chi'
Luke1:43 ¿Jachin ri in
Luke1:44 Chawilampe'
Luke1:45 Utz awe ri xatcojonic
Luke1:46 Xubij c'u ri Mariy: “Ri wanima' cunimarisaj u k'ij ri Ajawaxel.
Luke1:47 C'o nimalaj quicotemal pa ri wanima' che ri Dios nu Colonel.
Luke1:48 Rumal rech chi xel u c'u'x che ri u pataninel ri man nim ta quil wi. Chilampe' la
Luke1:49 Rumal rech chi ri Dios ri c'o u cuinem u banom nimak tak jastak chwe
Luke1:50 Ri are' quel u c'u'x chbe k'ij sak chque conojel ri winak ri cäquixe'j quib chuwäch.
Luke1:51 Xuban nimak tak jastak ruc' ri u chuk'ab ri u k'ab. Xebujabuj ri winak ri cäquiban nimal pa ri qui chomanic.
Luke1:52 Xebukasaj ri ajawinelab ri c'o qui cuinem paquiwi' ri e qui tem ajawinelab
Luke1:53 Q'ui ri utzil xuban chque ri winak ri quenumic
Luke1:54 Xuto' ri pataninel re
Luke1:55 jas ri u bim ulok chque ri e ka mam chi cuban na
Luke1:56 Cäraj oxib ic' xcanaj can ri Mariy ruc' ri Elisabet. C'äte ri'
Luke1:57 Xopan ri k'ij rech cutzir ri Elisabet
Luke1:58 Ri e u c'ul tak ja xukuje' ri e rachalaxic xquito chi ri Ajawaxel u banom nimalaj utzil che ri Elisabet
Luke1:59 Xc'ulmatajic chi chuwajxak k'ij xebe che u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi ri ac'al che retal. Zacariy ri u bi' raj xquicojo
Luke1:60 Xch'aw ri u nan
Luke1:61 Xquibij che: “Man c'o ta jun chque ri awachalal ri je ta u bi' wa'.”
Luke1:62 Xa' pa memal xquich'abej ri u tat
Luke1:63 Ri Zacariy xuta' jun alaj tz'alam
Luke1:64 Chanim xtzelej ri u ch'abal ri Zacariy
Luke1:65 Sibalaj xquimayij conojel ri e qui c'ul tak ja. Xtzijox c'u ronojel ri xc'ulmatajic chque ri winak pa ronojel tak ri juyub re Judey.
Luke1:66 Conojel ri xquito
Luke1:67 Ri Zacariy
Luke1:68 “Chnimarisax u k'ij ri Ajawaxel ri qui Dios ri aj Israel
Luke1:69 Xuya' jun Colol kech ri sibalaj c'o u cuinem
Luke1:70 Are je u bim ulok ojer cumal ri tastalic k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios chi cuya' na:
Luke1:71 Jeri' cujuto' chquiwäch ri ka c'ulel
Luke1:72 Quel ta c'u na u c'u'x chque ri e ka mam
Luke1:73 Are wa' ri chi'nic ri kas cäban na ri kas xubij u bixic che ri Abraham ri ka mam
Luke1:74 chi cujresaj na pa qui k'ab ri ka c'ulel
Luke1:75 cujc'oji' c'u chuwäch pa suq'uilal pa tastaliquil
Luke1:76 Are c'u ri at alaj nu c'ojol
Luke1:77 Quebatijoj na ri winak rech cäquetamaj chi quecolotaj na
Luke1:78 Je cuban ri ka Dios rumal rech chi sibalaj quel u c'u'x chke
Luke1:79 Ri are' cuc'ut na rib chquiwäch ri winak ri e c'o pa k'eku'm
Luke1:80 Ri alaj ac'al caq'uiyic xukuje' cacowir pa uxlabal. Xc'oji' c'ut pa ri chaki'j uwo sak c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xuc'ut rib chquiwäch ri aj israelib.
Luke2:1 Xc'ulmataj pa tak ri k'ij ri' chi ri nimalaj k'atal tzij August Sesar xuya' takanic chi conojel ri winak cäquitz'ibaj ri qui bi'.
Luke2:2 Aretak ri Sireniy are k'atal tzij re ri Siriy
Luke2:3 Xebe c'u conojel che u tz'ibaxic qui bi'
Luke2:4 Xel c'u ulok ri Jose pa ri tinimit Nazaret re Galiley
Luke2:5 Ri Jose xbe pa Belen che u tz'ibaxic ri u bi' junam ruc' ri Mariy
Luke2:6 Xc'ulmatajic chi
Luke2:7 Xralaj ri u nabeal
Luke2:8 E c'o c'u ajyuk'ab pa ri c'olbal ri'
Luke2:9 Jun tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xtaq'ui' chquiwäch
Luke2:10 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij chque: “Mixe'j iwib. Chiwilampe'
Luke2:11 Camic xil u wäch chiwe pa ri u tinimit ri David jun Colonel. Ri are wa' ri CRIST
Luke2:12 Are c'u etal wa' chiwe: quirik na ri alaj ne'
Luke2:13 Xak c'ätetal e c'o chi ruc' ri tako'n aj caj q'uialaj tako'nixelab aj caj. Cäquibixoj ri Dios
Luke2:14 “¡Juluwem che ri Dios ri c'o sibalaj sibalaj chicaj! ¡Jamaril cho ri uwächulew chquixo'l ri winak ri e rech ri utzalaj u rayibal!”
Luke2:15 Ri tako'nib aj caj aretak xetzelej chicaj
Luke2:16 Aninak xebec. Xequirika' c'u ri Mariy rachil ri Jose xukuje' ri ne' k'oyol chupam jun echa'bal.
Luke2:17 Aretak xquilo
Luke2:18 Conojel ri xeto'w ri qui tzij ri ajyuk'ab xquimay ri xtzijox chque cumal.
Luke2:19 Are c'u ri Mariy xuc'ol conojel we tzij ri' pa ranima'
Luke2:20 Xetzelej ri ajyuk'ab. Cäquiya' juluwem xukuje' k'ijilanic che ri Dios rumal ri quilom xukuje' ri qui tom
Luke2:21 Aretak xetz'akat ri wajxakib k'ij xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi che retal
Luke2:22 Aretak xetz'akat ri k'ij ri rajawaxic che ri u josk'ixic quib
Luke2:23 Je xquiban wa' rumal rech chi chupam ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel tz'ibatal wi: “Ronojel nabeal ala cäjach pa u k'ab ri Ajawaxel.”
Luke2:24 Xebe c'ut
Luke2:25 C'o c'u jun achi pa Jerusalen
Luke2:26 Bim chi can che ri Simeon rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios
Luke2:27 Ri Simeon xc'am c'u ulok rumal ri Uxlabaxel chupam ri rachoch Dios. Aretak c'u xcojbic ri alaj Jesus chupam ri rachoch Dios cumal ri Jose ri Mariy che u banic che ri nak'atisabal u banic che ri cubij ri pixab
Luke2:28 ri Simeon xuc'am c'ut ri ac'al
Luke2:29 “Wajaw
Luke2:30 Wilom c'u cuc' ri nu bak'wäch ri Colonel.
Luke2:31 Are ri yo'm la chquiwäch conojel ri e winak.
Luke2:32 Are je jas jun chäj che u k'alajisaxic ri tzij la chquiwäch ri man aj judeyib taj. Rumal c'u ri are' cänimarisax na qui k'ij ri winak aj israelib.”
Luke2:33 Ri Jose ri Mariy xquimay ri tzij ri xubij ri Simeon chrij ri Jesus.
Luke2:34 Ri Simeon xebutewichi'j
Luke2:35 jeri' cäk'alajin ri u chomanic ri canima' e q'ui winak. Ronojel c'u wa' cux na chawe jacha' jun ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri cuk'ok'ej na ri kas a c'aslibal.”
Luke2:36 Chila' c'oc'owi jun ixok
Luke2:37 Malca'n c'u wa' jumuch' ruc' quiejeb u junab chic. Mawi jubik' quel bic chupam ri rachoch Dios
Luke2:38 Ri Na' xutac'abaxtaj rib kas pa ri jok'otaj ri'
Luke2:39 Aretak xebantaj conojel ri jastak jas ri cubij ri u pixab ri Ajawaxel
Luke2:40 Ri ac'al caq'uiyic
Luke2:41 Quebe c'u ri Jose ri Mariy ronojel junab pa Jerusalen pa ri nimak'ij re ri oc'owem.
Luke2:42 Cablajuj chi u junab ri Jesus
Luke2:43 Aretak c'u xeboc'ow we k'ij ri'
Luke2:44 Are pa qui c'u'x chi c'o chquixo'l ri cachil
Luke2:45 Aretak man xquirik taj
Luke2:46 Oc'owinak chi oxib k'ij
Luke2:47 Conojel ri xquita' ri u tzij xquimayo
Luke2:48 Aretak ri Jose ri Mariy xquilo
Luke2:49 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jasche quintzucuj alak? ¿La ma ta eta'm alak chi rajawaxic quinc'oji' chupam ri rachoch ri nu Tat che u banic ri u rayibal?”
Luke2:50 Man xquich'ob ta ri tzij ri xubij chque.
Luke2:51 Ri Jesus xtzelej bic cuc'
Luke2:52 Xq'uiy ri Jesus
Luke3:1 Pa ri ro'lajuj u junab ri u takanic ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Tiber Sesar ri nim u takanic
Luke3:2 Chi'
Luke3:3 Ri Xuan xopan pa conojel c'olbal ri e c'o chunakaj ri nima' Jordan. Xubij chque ri winak chi cheban ri qui bautism
Luke3:4 Jacha' ri tz'ibatal rumal ri Isaiy ri k'axal tzij
Luke3:5 Quenojisax na conojel ri siwan
Luke3:6 Ronojel winak caril na ri colobal ib ri cuya' ri Dios.’ ”
Luke3:7 Ri Xuan xubij chque ri q'uialaj winak ri quebel ulok rech cäban ri qui bautism rumal: “¡Ix calc'ual tak cumätz! ¿Jachin xc'utuw chiwäch chi quixanimaj chuwäch ri royowal ri Dios ri cäpe na piwi'?
Luke3:8 Chibana' wächinic ri takal che q'uexoj c'uxaj. Michaplej c'u u bixic pa iwanima': ‘C'o ri Abraham che ka tat.’ Quinbij c'u chiwe
Luke3:9 Camic yo'm chic ri icäj chquixe' tak ri che'. Ronojel c'u che' ri man cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic
Luke3:10 Ri winak xquita' che ri Xuan
Luke3:11 Ri Xuan xubij chque: “Jachin ri c'o cac'ulaj ratz'iak
Luke3:12 Xukuje' xepe ri tok'il tak alcabal rech cäban ri qui bautism
Luke3:13 Ri Xuan xubij chque: “Mitok'ij u wi' ri alcabal
Luke3:14 Xukuje' ri ajch'ojab xquita' che
Luke3:15 Queyem ri winak
Luke3:16 Xch'aw ri Xuan
Luke3:17 C'o ri u jopibal pa u k'ab
Luke3:18 Jeri' ri Xuan xebuch'abej ri winak cuc' q'uialaj niq'uiaj pixbenic chic
Luke3:19 Are c'u ri k'atal tzij Herod xyaj rumal ri Xuan rumal rech chi u c'amom ri Herody che rixokil
Luke3:20 Xutik c'u ne wa' puwi' ronojel chi xutz'apij ri Xuan pa che'.
Luke3:21 Xc'ulmatajic chi aretak ri Xuan xuban ri qui bautism conojel ri winak ri xebopanic
Luke3:22 Xkaj ulok ri Ruxlabal ri Dios puwi' ri Jesus

Luke4:1 Ri Jesus
Luke4:2 Cawinak k'ij xc'oji' chila'

Luke4:5 Xc'am c'u bic puwi' jun nimalaj juyub rumal ri itzel. Ri itzel xa' pa jok'otaj xebuc'ut conojel ri ajawibal chuwäch ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew.
Luke4:6 Xubij c'u ri itzel che: “Quebenya' conojel ri takanic pa a k'ab
Luke4:7 We c'u quinak'ijilaj

Luke4:11 Catcuc'aj c'u na bic pa qui k'ab

Luke4:17 Xya' ri u wuj ri Isaiy che
Luke4:18 “Ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel c'o panuwi'. Rumal rech chi in u tasom che qui tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij chque ri mebayib; che qui tzijoxic chque ri winak ri e tz'apim pa che'; che qui jakic ri qui bak'wäch ri moyab che quitzokopixic
Luke4:19 In takom ulok che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak k'ij re ri Ajawaxel.”

Luke4:22 Conojel ri winak xquiya' utzalaj k'alajisanic chrij ri Jesus. Xquimay c'u ri tzij re tok'ob ri xubij ri Jesus

Luke4:24 Xch'awic xubij: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke4:25 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke4:26 Man xtak ta c'u bic ri Eliy ruc' jun chque ri malca'nib aj Israel
Luke4:27 Xukuje' e q'ui c'o ch'a'c chquij pa Israel pa tak ri u k'ijol ri Elisey ri k'axal tzij. Man c'o ta c'u jun chque ri e are' xcunax ta rumal ri Elisey
Luke4:28 C'äte ri' conojel ri e c'o pa ri ja sibalaj xpe coyowal che ri Jesus
Luke4:29 Xewalijic
Luke4:30 Xoc'ow c'u ri Jesus pa qui niq'uiajil
Luke4:31 Ri Jesus xkaj bic pa Capernaum
Luke4:32 Xquimay ri u tijonic
Luke4:33 Chila' pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab
Luke4:34 xubij: “¡E! ¿Jas awe chke
Luke4:35 Ri Jesus xuyajo
Luke4:36 Conojel xquimayo
Luke4:37 Xel c'u u tzijol ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal chunakaj ri ulew ri'.
Luke4:38 Ri Jesus xel bic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xoc pa rachoch ri Simon. Ri u ji' chuchu' ri Simon kajinak che jun nimalaj k'ak'. Xquibochi'j c'u ri Jesus puwi' ri chuchu'.

Luke4:40 Aretak xkaj ri k'ij
Luke4:41 Xukuje' xebel itzel tak uxlabal chque q'ui
Luke4:42 Aretak xsakaric

Luke4:44 Xbe ri Jesus pa tak ri qui tinimit ri aj judeyib. Xtzijon c'ut pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab.
Luke5:1 Aretak ri Jesus tac'al chuchi' ri cho re Galiley
Luke5:2 Ri Jesus xeril quieb jucub ri e c'o chuchi' ri cho. Ebelinak ulok ri chapal tak cär pa ri jucub che u ch'ajic tak ri qui c'at.
Luke5:3 Xoc c'u ri Jesus pa jun chque ri jucub
Luke5:4 Aretak xutanaba' ri u tzijonic
Luke5:5 Ri Simon xubij che: “Kajtij
Luke5:6 Aretak xquiban wa'
Luke5:7 Xequisiq'uij apan ri cachil ri e c'o pa ri jun jucub chic
Luke5:8 Ri Simon Lu'
Luke5:9 Xumay c'u ri Lu' xukuje' conojel ri e rachil
Luke5:10 Xukuje' xumay ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan ri e u c'ojol ri Zebedey
Luke5:11 Aretak xesataj ulok ri jucub cho ri ulew
Luke5:12 Aretak c'o ri Jesus pa jun chque ri tinimit

Luke5:15 Xesax c'u u tzijoxic ri Jesus pa ronojel c'olbal. Rumal ri' cäquimulij quib q'uialaj winak che u tatabexic ri u tzij xukuje' che qui cunaxic chque tak ri qui yab.
Luke5:16 Are c'u ri Jesus cäbe pa tak c'olbal pa ri chaki'j uwo sak che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios jawije' man c'o ta wi winak.
Luke5:17 Pa jun k'ij
Luke5:18 Xepe c'u jujun achijab cuc'am jun achi cäminak u cuerp
Luke5:19 Man xquirik ta c'ut jawije' cäquicoj wi bic
Luke5:20 Aretak ri Jesus xrilo ri qui cojonic ri achijab
Luke5:21 C'äte c'u ri' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib xquichaplej chomanic pa canima'
Luke5:22 Ri Jesus reta'm ri qui chomanic
Luke5:23 ¿Jachique c'ut ri man c'ax ta u bixic: ‘Ri a mac quesachtajic’
Luke5:24 Quinc'ut c'u na chiwäch chi ri Rija'l Winak c'o takanic pa u k'ab che u sachic qui mac ri winak cho ri uwächulew.” Xubij c'u che ri cäminak u cuerp: “Quinbij chawe
Luke5:25 Chanim xwalij ri achi chquiwäch
Luke5:26 Conojel xquimayo
Luke5:27 E bantajinak chi c'u wa'
Luke5:28 Ri Levi xuya' can ronojel
Luke5:29 Ri Levi xuban jun nimalaj ula'nic che ri Jesus cho rachoch. E c'o q'ui tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' niq'uiaj winak chic ri e c'o pa ri mexa cuc'.
Luke5:30 Ri pariseyib cuc' ri ajtijab re ri pixab xech'ach'at chquij ri u tijoxelab ri Jesus
Luke5:31 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri man e yawabib taj
Luke5:32 Man in petinak ta che qui siq'uixic suc'alaj tak winak. Xane' in petinak che qui siq'uixic ajmaquib
Luke5:33 Xquibij c'u che: “Ri u tijoxelab ri Xuan xukuje' ri quech ri pariseyib q'ui mul man cäquitij ta qui wa xukuje' q'ui mul cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios. E are c'u ri a tijoxelab quewa'ic
Luke5:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri winak ri e c'o pa c'ulanem
Luke5:35 Quepe c'u na k'ij aretak quesax ri achajilaxel chquixo'l. C'äte c'u ri' man quewa' ta na.”
Luke5:36 Xukuje' xubij jun c'ambal no'j chque: “Man c'o ta jun cucoj jun c'ac' atz'iak che u c'ojoxic jun k'e'l atz'iak. We jeri'
Luke5:37 Xukuje' man c'o ta jun cuya' c'ac' u wa'l uva pa k'e'l tak tz'um. We ta jeri'
Luke5:38 Are ri c'ac' u wa'l uva rajawaxic cäya' pa c'ac' tak tz'um.
Luke5:39 Man c'o ta jun cäraj ri c'ac' u wa'l uva aretak u tijom chi re ri u wa'l uva ri k'obisam. Cubij c'ut: ‘Are utz na ri k'obisam u wa'l uva.’ ”
Luke6:1 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem

Luke6:33 We xak xuwi quiban utzil chque ri winak ri quebanow utzil chiwe
Luke6:34 We xuwi quiya' qui jolomal ri cu'l wi i c'u'x chi cäquitzelej chi na
Luke6:35 Chebilok'ok'ej ba' ri cäquiban qui c'ulel chiwe. Chibana' utzil
Luke6:36 Chixtok'obisan ba' wächaj
Luke6:37 “Mik'at tzij paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic
Luke6:38 Chixyanok
Luke6:39 Xubij c'u jun c'ambal no'j chque: ¿La cäcuin lo ri moy che u c'amic u be jun moy chic? ¿La ma ta quetzak ri' ri e quieb pa jun jul?
Luke6:40 Ri tijoxel man coc'ow ta na ri retamanic chuwäch ri rajtij. Ri tijoxel
Luke6:41 ¿Jasche caca'yej ri mes ri c'o pa ri u bak'wäch ri awachalal

Luke6:43 “Man c'o ta jun utzalaj che' ri cuya' ta u wächinic ri man utz taj. Mawi c'o jun che' ri man utz taj ri cuya' ta utzalaj u wächinic.

Luke6:45 Ri utzalaj winak che ri utzalaj tak jastak ri c'o pa ranima'

Luke7:3 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab

Luke7:39 Ri parisey ri xula'nic
Luke7:40 Xch'aw c'u ri Jesus

Luke7:42 Man c'o ta c'u qui rajil che u tojic ri qui c'as. Ri ya'l jolomal xubij c'u chque ri e quieb chi man rajawaxic ta chic cäquitoj ri qui c'as. ¿Jachin c'u chque ri quieb ajc'asib ri' sibalaj culok'ok'ej na ri ya'l jolomal?”

Luke7:45 Ri at man xinatz'umaj taj. Are c'u we ixok ri'

Luke8:1 Aretak bantajinak chi wa'
Luke8:2 Xukuje' e rachilam jujun chuchuyib ri e utzirisam chque ri itzel tak uxlabal
Luke8:3 ri Xua'n rixokil ri Cuz
Luke8:4 Xquimulij quib sibalaj q'ui winak. Xebel ulok pa tak ri tinimit
Luke8:5 “Jun ticonijel xel bic che u tiquic rija'. Aretak xjopinic
Luke8:6 Jubik' chic xkaj pa tak abaj. Xel ulok
Luke8:7 Jubik' chic ija' xkaj chquixo'l ri q'uix. Xel ulok junam cuc' ri q'uix
Luke8:8 Jubik' chic xkaj pa ri utzalaj ulew. Xq'uiyic
Luke8:9 Ri e u tijoxelab xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus jas quel cubij we c'ambal no'j ri'.
Luke8:10 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Yo'm chiwe ix ri u ch'obic ri jastak re ri rajawibal ri Dios ri man e betamatal ta can nabe. Cäbix c'u we jastak ri' chque ri niq'uiaj winak chic pa c'ambal tak no'j
Luke8:11 “Are c'u wa' ri quel cubij ri c'ambal no'j: Ri ija' are cuq'uexwächij ri tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios.
Luke8:12 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa ri be
Luke8:13 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak ri abaj
Luke8:14 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa tak ri q'uix
Luke8:15 Ri ija' ri xkaj pa ri utzalaj ulew
Luke8:16 “Man c'o ta jun ri cutzij jun chäj
Luke8:17 Conojel ri jastak ri e c'utalic
Luke8:18 Chiwila' ba' jas ri quiban che u tatabexic ri nu tzij. Apachin ri c'o jas c'o ruc'
Luke8:19 Xopan ri u nan ri Jesus xukuje' ri e rachalal jawije' ri c'o wi. Man quecuin ta c'ut quekeb ruc'
Luke8:20 Xbix c'u che ri Jesus: “Ri a nan e rachil ri e awachalal e tac'atoj apan cho ja
Luke8:21 Ri are' xubij chque: “Ri nu nan xukuje' ri e wachalal e are ri' ri cäquita' ri u tzij ri Dios
Luke8:22 Pa jun chque ri k'ij
Luke8:23 Aretak e benak puwi' ri cho
Luke8:24 Xekeb ruc' ri Jesus
Luke8:25 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri i cojonic? Xquixe'j quib
Luke8:26 Aretak xek'ax ch'käp che ri cho
Luke8:27 Aretak ri Jesus xel pa ri jucub
Luke8:28 Ri achi
Luke8:29 Xubij wa' rumal rech chi ri Jesus xutak ri itzel uxlabal chi chel bic che ri achi. Q'ui mul c'ut c'o ri u cuinem ri itzel uxlabal puwi' ri achi. Pune' cäxim cuc' tikom tak ch'ich'
Luke8:30 Ri Jesus xuta' che
Luke8:31 Ri itzel tak uxlabal xquibochi'j ri Jesus chi mebutak bic pa ri k'ekumalaj c'olbal.
Luke8:32 C'o c'u jumulaj ak chila'
Luke8:33 Xebel c'u bic ri itzel tak uxlabal che ri achi
Luke8:34 Ri ajyuk'ab
Luke8:35 Xebel ulok ri winak che rilic ri xc'ulmaxic. Xebopan ruc' ri Jesus. Xequirika' ri achi ri xebel wi ri itzel tak uxlabal
Luke8:36 Ri winak ri xquil ri xbantajic
Luke8:37 Are c'u ri q'ui winak ri e jekel chrij ri culew ri aj Jeras
Luke8:38 Ri achi ri xebel wi ri itzel tak uxlabal
Luke8:39 “Chattzelej cho awachoch
Luke8:40 Aretak xtzelej bic ri Jesus
Luke8:41 Te c'u ri' xpe jun achi Jair u bi'
Luke8:42 Xa' c'u jun u mia'l c'olic
Luke8:43 Xpe c'u jun ixok
Luke8:44 Ri are' xkeb chrij ri Jesus
Luke8:45 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “¿Jachin ri' ri xinnakowic?” Conojel c'ut xquibij chi man quinakomtaj. Xubij ri Lu' xukuje' ri e rachil: “Kajtij
Luke8:46 Ri Jesus xubij: “C'o jun ri xinunako. Xinna' c'ut chi xel chuk'ab chwe.”
Luke8:47 C'äte ri' ri ixok
Luke8:48 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Nu mia'l
Luke8:49 C'ä cätajin cätzijonic
Luke8:50 Aretak xuta' wa' ri Jesus
Luke8:51 Aretak xoc pa ja
Luke8:52 Conojel ri e c'o chila' cäquiq'uis quib che ok'ej. Ri Jesus xubij: “Mixok' chic. Ri ali man cäminak taj
Luke8:53 Ri winak xquitze'j u wäch. Queta'm c'ut chi cäminak chic.
Luke8:54 Ri Jesus xuc'am ri u k'ab ri ali
Luke8:55 C'äte ri' xtzelej ulok ri ranima'. Chanim xwalijic. Ri Jesus xtakan c'u che u ya'ic u wa ri ali.
Luke8:56 Ri u tat u nan ri ali xquimayo. Ri Jesus c'ut xebutako chi c'o mäquibij wi jas ri xc'ulmaxic.
Luke9:1 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri cablajuj u tijoxelab
Luke9:2 Xebutak bic che u tzijoxic ri rajawibal ri Dios
Luke9:3 Xubij chque: “C'o mic'am bic che re i be
Luke9:4 Apachique ja ri quixoc wi
Luke9:5 Conojel ri winak ri man quixquic'ulaj taj
Luke9:6 Xebel c'u bic ri u tijoxelab
Luke9:7 Ri Herod ri k'atal tzij xuta ronojel jas ri xc'ulmaxic. Xsach u c'u'x rumal rech chi e c'o jujun cäquibij: “Ri Xuan xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib.”
Luke9:8 Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij: “Xuc'ut rib ri Eliy.” Jule' chic cäquibij: “Jun chque ri k'axal tak tzij xc'astajic.”
Luke9:9 Ri Herod xubij: “Xinwesaj ya' u jolom ri' ri Xuan. ¿Jachin c'u ri'
Luke9:10 Aretak xetzelej ulok ri takomxenlab
Luke9:11 Aretak xquetamaj ri winak
Luke9:12 Kajem c'u cuban ri k'ij
Luke9:13 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiya' ix ri cäquitijo.” Ri e are' xquibij: “Man c'o ta c'o kuc' xane' xa' job caxlanwa xukuje' quieb cär
Luke9:14 Cäraj e c'o job mil (5000) achijab. Ri Jesus xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Chibij chque ri winak chi quet'uyi' pa tak mulaj
Luke9:15 Je xquibano
Luke9:16 Ri Jesus c'ut xebuc'am ri job caxlanwa cuc' ri quieb cär. Xca'y chicaj
Luke9:17 Conojel c'u ri winak xewa'ic
Luke9:18 Pa jun k'ij ri Jesus cätajin cäch'aw ruc' ri Dios. E c'o ri u tijoxelab ruc' pa qui tuquiel wi. Ri Jesus c'ut xuc'ot qui chi'
Luke9:19 Ri e are' xquibij che: “E c'o jujun ri cäquibij chi lal ri Xuan Bautist. Niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi lal ri Eliy. E c'o niq'uiaj chic cäquibij chi lal jun chque ri ojer tak k'axal tzij c'astajinak.”
Luke9:20 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “E c'u ri ix
Luke9:21 Ri Jesus c'ut xebupixbej
Luke9:22 Xubij chque: “Rajawaxic chi ri Rija'l Winak curik na sibalaj c'ax
Luke9:23 Xubij chque conojel: “We c'o jun cäraj cäpe wuc'
Luke9:24 Apachin ta ne ri cäraj cuto'tajisaj ri u c'aslemal
Luke9:25 ¿Jas ta c'u lo cärechbej na ri winak we cuch'äc ronojel ri uwächulew
Luke9:26 Apachin c'u ri cäq'uix chwe in xukuje' che ri nu tijonic
Luke9:27 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke9:28 Bitajinak chi c'u we tzij ri'
Luke9:29 Xc'ulmax c'ut
Luke9:30 Te c'u ri' e c'o quieb achijab quetzijon ruc'
Luke9:31 Ri e are' xquic'ut quib pa juluwem
Luke9:32 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri e rachil
Luke9:33 Aretak c'u e benak chic ri quieb achijab
Luke9:34 C'ä cätajin cubij wa'
Luke9:35 Xtataj jun ch'abal pa ri sutz'
Luke9:36 Aretak xtäni' ri ch'abebal
Luke9:37 Chucab k'ij chic
Luke9:38 Jun achi chque ri q'uialaj winak xurak u chi'
Luke9:39 Chilampe' la
Luke9:40 Xebenbochi'j ri tijoxelab la che resaxic ri uxlabal
Luke9:41 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¡Ay ix winak jech'alaj tak i chomabal
Luke9:42 Aretak cätajin cäkebic
Luke9:43 Conojel c'ut xquimayij ri u cuinem ri Dios. Conojel ri winak c'ä cätajin cäquimay conojel ri jastak ri cuban ri Jesus
Luke9:44 “Kas chitatabej wa' we tzij ri' ri quinbij chiwe: Are c'u ri Rija'l Winak cäjach na pa qui k'ab tak ri winak.”
Luke9:45 Ri e are' man xquich'ob ta we tzij ri'. Ch'ukutal c'u chquiwäch
Luke9:46 Ri tijoxelab xquichaplej u chomaxic chquixo'l jachin lo ri' ri nim na u k'ij chquixo'l.
Luke9:47 Ri Jesus reta'm ri u chomanic ri canima'. Xuc'am c'u apan jun ac'al
Luke9:48 xubij chque: “Apachin ri cac'amowan we ac'al ri' pa ri nu bi'
Luke9:49 Ri Xuan xubij che ri Jesus: “Kajtij
Luke9:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Mik'il che ri cubano. Apachin ri man cujuc'ulelaj taj
Luke9:51 Xketet ri k'ij aretak cäc'am bic ri Jesus chicaj. Xujiquiba' c'u u c'u'x che ri u bic pa Jerusalen.
Luke9:52 Xebutak bic tako'n chuwäch. Xebe c'ut
Luke9:53 Ri aj samarib c'ut man xquic'ulaj taj ri Jesus
Luke9:54 Ri Santiag xukuje' ri Xuan
Luke9:55 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib
Luke9:56 Xebe c'u pa jun alaj tinimit chic.
Luke9:57 Aretak e benak pa ri be
Luke9:58 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri yac c'o qui jul
Luke9:59 Ri Jesus xubij che jun chic: “Chinaterenej.” Ri are' xubij: “Ya' ba la chwe chi nabe quinmukuxtaj na can ri nu tat.”
Luke9:60 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chebaya' can ri cäminakib chi chequimuku' ri e qui cäminak. Ri at c'ut
Luke9:61 C'o chi c'u na jun xubij che: “Quinterenem che la
Luke9:62 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Jun winak
Luke10:1 E bantajinak chi c'u we jastak ri'
Luke10:2 Xubij chque: “Kastzij ri k'atoj sibalaj nim
Luke10:3 Jix. Chiwilampe'
Luke10:4 Miwuc'aj bic c'olbal i rajil
Luke10:5 Apachique ja ri quixoc wi
Luke10:6 We e c'o c'u winak chila' aj jamaril
Luke10:7 Chixcanaj can pa ri ja ri'. Chitija' iwe xukuje' chiwuq'uiaj iwe ri c'o cuc'
Luke10:8 Apachique tinimit ri quixoc wi
Luke10:9 Chebicunaj ri yawabib ri e c'o chila'. Chibij chque: ‘Nakaj chic c'o wi ri rajawibal ri Dios chiwe.’
Luke10:10 Apachique tinimit ri quixoc wi
Luke10:11 ‘Xukuje' ne ri puc'uc' ulew re ri tinimit ri nac'al chque ri kakan
Luke10:12 Quinbij c'u chiwe
Luke10:13 “¡C'ax cärik na
Luke10:14 Aretak cäban na ri k'atoj tzij
Luke10:15 Ri at c'ut

Luke10:19 Chiwilampe'
Luke10:20 Mixquicot rumal wa'
Luke10:21 Pa ri jok'otaj ri'
Luke10:22 Conojel ri jastak e jachom chwe rumal ri nu Tat. Man c'o ta jun reta'm jachin ri' ri C'ojolaxel
Luke10:23 Ri Jesus xkeb cuc' ri u tijoxelab pa qui tuquiel wi
Luke10:24 Quinbij chiwe chi q'ui k'axal tak tzij xukuje' q'ui ajawinelab xcaj xquilo jas ri quiwilo
Luke10:25 Jun ajtij rech ri pixab xbe che u tzijobexic ri Jesus xukuje' c'u che u c'ambejexic xuc'ot u chi': “Ajtij
Luke10:26 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿Jas ri tz'ibatal pa ri pixab? ¿Jas ri casiq'uij u wäch?”
Luke10:27 Ri ajtij re ri pixab xutzelej u bixic che: “Cubij ri pixab: Chalok'ok'ej ri Ajawaxel a Dios ruc' ronojel awanima'
Luke10:28 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Suc' ri xabij. Chabana' wa'
Luke10:29 Are c'u ri ajtij xraj xuk'alajisaj rib chi suc'
Luke10:30 Ri Jesus xubij che: “C'o jun achi xkaj ulok pa Jerusalen benam re pa Jerico. Xkaj pa qui k'ab eläk'omab. Xquesaj bic ri ratz'iak
Luke10:31 Xkaj c'u bic jun cojol tabal tok'ob pa ri be ri'. Aretak xril ri achi
Luke10:32 Xukuje' jun aj levi xopan pa ri c'olbal ri'. Aretak xril ri socotajinak
Luke10:33 Petinak jun aj Samar pa ri be
Luke10:34 Xkeb ruc'
Luke10:35 Chucab k'ij c'ut
Luke10:36 Ri Jesus xuch'abej ri ajtij re ri pixab: “¿Jas cabij at? ¿Jachin chque ri oxib achijab ri' xux rajil u tz'akat ri xkaj pa qui k'ab eläk'omab?”
Luke10:37 Ri are' xubij: “Are ri xel u c'u'x che.” C'äte ri' xubij ri Jesus che: “Jät
Luke10:38 E benak c'u pa jun be
Luke10:39 Ri are' c'o jun rachalal Mariy u bi'. Ri Mariy xt'uyi' chuwäch ri Jesus che u tatabexic ri u tzij.

Luke11:3 Ya' la ri ka wa.
Luke11:4 Cuyu' la ri ka mac. Xukuje' c'u ri uj cakacuy ri qui mac ri qui banom c'ax chke. Mujya' la pa takchibal mac.’ ”
Luke11:5 Xukuje' xubij ri Jesus chque: “Chibana' chi c'o jun chiwe
Luke11:6 Xopan can jun wachil wuc' petinak pa be. Man c'o ta c'u jas quinya' che.’
Luke11:7 Ri rachil c'ut cäch'aw ulok
Luke11:8 Quinbij chiwe chi
Luke11:9 Ri in c'ut quinbij chiwe: Chita'
Luke11:10 Conojel c'ut ri cäquita'
Luke11:11 ¿Jachin ta jun tat chiwe
Luke11:12 ¿O we cuta' jun sakmol
Luke11:13 We ri ix c'ut ix itzel tak winak

Luke11:16 Jule' chic
Luke11:17 Ri Jesus reta'm ri qui chomanic
Luke11:18 Xukuje' we ri Satanas cutas rib chbil rib
Luke11:19 We ri in rumal ri Beelzebu quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal
Luke11:20 We c'u ri in rumal ri u cuinem ri Dios quebenwesaj ri itzel tak uxlabal
Luke11:21 We c'o jun achi ri c'o u chuk'ab
Luke11:22 We c'u cäpe jun chrij ri c'o na u chuk'ab chuwäch ri achi ri'

Luke11:25 Aretak copanic
Luke11:26 Cäbe c'ut

Luke11:28 Ri Jesus xubij: “Are quicotemal chque ri cäquitatabej ri u tzij ri Dios
Luke11:29 Ri winak qui takem u mulixic quib chrij ri Jesus
Luke11:30 Je jas ri Jonas xux etal chque ri aj Ninibe
Luke11:31 Ri chuchu' ajawinel aj u mox ri elebal k'ij cäc'oji' na pa ri k'atoj tzij junam cuc' ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew. Ri are' cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak. Rumal rech chi ri are' xpe pa jun c'olbal cho ri uwächulew ri sibalaj naj che u tatabexic ri u no'j ri Salomon. Chiwilampe'
Luke11:32 Ri aj ninibeyib quewalij na pa ri k'ij re ri k'atan tzij
Luke11:33 “Man c'o ta jun cutzij jun chäj
Luke11:34 Ri u chäj ri a cuerp are ri a bak'wäch. Aretak utz ri a bak'wäch
Luke11:35 Chawila' ba'
Luke11:36 We ronojel ri a cuerp c'o u chäj
Luke11:37 Aretak ri Jesus cätajin cätzijonic
Luke11:38 Ri parisey xrilo chi ri Jesus man xuch'aj ta ri u k'ab aretak xoc che ri wa'im
Luke11:39 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: “Camic ri ix pariseyib quich'aj ri rij ri uq'uiabal xukuje' ri lak. Are c'u ri chupam nojinak che eläk'anic
Luke11:40 Ri ix xa' man quiwaj taj quixch'obonic. Ri xbanow ri rij
Luke11:41 Chic'ama' ba' ri c'o pa ri lak
Luke11:42 ¡C'ax c'u iwe
Luke11:43 ¡C'ax iwe!
Luke11:44 ¡C'ax iwe!

Luke11:47 ¡C'ax iwe!
Luke11:48 Kastzij ri ix ix k'alajisal quech ri qui chac ri i mam
Luke11:49 Rumal ri'
Luke11:50 Jeri' ri qui quiq'uel conojel ri k'axal tak tzij ri tixinak ulok kas pa ri u tiquiritajic ri uwächulew cätok'ix na chque ri winak cho ri uwächulew camic.
Luke11:51 Cächapletaj ulok ruc' ri u quiq'uel ri Abel
Luke11:52 ¡C'ax iwe!

Luke12:2 Ronojel ri ch'ukutalic
Luke12:3 Rumal ri'
Luke12:4 “Quinbij c'u chiwe
Luke12:5 Quinc'ut c'u na chiwäch jachin chuwäch rajawaxic quixe'j wi na iwib: Are chixe'j iwib chuwäch ri Jun ri c'o u cuinem che i cämisaxic
Luke12:6 ¿La ma ta quieb alaj tak puak ri xa' jubik' cajil quec'ayix wi job chiochi? Man c'o ta c'u jun chque cäsach ta pa ri u jolom ri Dios.
Luke12:7 Xukuje' ne ri i wi' conojel e ajilatalic. Mixe'j ba iwib
Luke12:8 “Quinbij c'u chiwe chi conojel ri cäquik'alajisaj chquiwäch ri winak chi quecojon chwe in
Luke12:9 Apachin c'u ri man quinuk'alajisaj ta chquiwäch ri winak ri in
Luke12:10 Conojel ri cäquibij tzij chrij ri Rija'l Winak
Luke12:11 Aretak quixc'am bic chquiwäch ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab
Luke12:12 Are c'u ri Ruxlabal ri Dios pa ri jok'otaj ri' cuya' na pa i chi' jas ri rajawaxic quibij na.”
Luke12:13 Jun chque ri q'uialaj winak xubij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij
Luke12:14 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Achi
Luke12:15 Xubij chque ri winak: “Chiwila'

Luke12:17 Xuchomaj pa ranima'
Luke12:18 Xubij: ‘Are wa' quinban na: Quebenyojij na ri nu c'uja
Luke12:19 Quinbij c'u na che ri wanima': Wanima'
Luke12:20 Xubij c'u ri Dios che ri achi ri': ‘Ri at man c'o ta aweta'm. Camic chak'ab catcämic. Are c'u ri jastak ri a c'olom
Luke12:21 Jewa'
Luke12:22 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Rumal ri' quinbij chiwe: Mixoc il che ri i c'aslemal
Luke12:23 Ri c'aslemal c'o na chuwäch ri cäwexic. Ri cuerp c'o na chuwäch ri atz'iak.
Luke12:24 Chebiwila' ri joj
Luke12:25 ¿Jachin ta c'u jun chiwe
Luke12:26 We c'u man quixcuin che u banic jun jasach ri nitz' na
Luke12:27 Chebiwila' ri cotz'i'j
Luke12:28 We ri Dios je ratz'iakixic wa' ri k'ayes re ri juyub xubano
Luke12:29 Sibalaj ba' mitzucuj jas ri quitijo
Luke12:30 Conojel c'ut we jastak ri' are sibalaj quequitzucuj ri winak aj uwächulew. Ri i Tat c'ut reta'm chi rajawaxic wa' chiwe.
Luke12:31 Xane' are sibalaj chitzucuj ri rajawibal ri Dios. Xukuje' quebuya' c'u na ri i Tat ri niq'uiaj jastak chic ri e rajawaxic chiwe.”
Luke12:32 “Mixe'j iwib
Luke12:33 Chic'ayij ri jastak iwe
Luke12:34 Jawije' c'ut ri c'o wi ri i k'inomal
Luke12:35 “Chisuc'umaj iwib
Luke12:36 Ri ix c'ut chibana' iwe jas cäquiban ri pataninelab ri queyem ri cajaw
Luke12:37 Utz que ri pataninelab ri'
Luke12:38 Pune' niq'uiaj ak'ab culic
Luke12:39 Are wa' chich'obo'
Luke12:40 Ri ix c'ut xukuje' chisuc'umaj iwib
Luke12:41 C'äte ri' xubij ri Lu' che: “Ajawaxel
Luke12:42 Xubij ri Ajawaxel: “¿Jachin ri jicalaj pataninel wech ri utz u chomanic
Luke12:43 Utz re ri pataninel ri'
Luke12:44 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke12:45 We ne ri pataninel ri' cuchomaj: ‘Ri wajaw cäbeytaj na
Luke12:46 Cäpe na ri rajaw ri pataninel ri' pa ri k'ij ri man cäreyej taj. Cäpe pa ri jok'otaj ri cuchomaj ri pataninel chi man cäpe taj. Sibalaj cuc'äjisaj na u wäch ri pataninel rech
Luke12:47 Ri pataninel ri'
Luke12:48 Are c'u we jun man cuch'ob taj
Luke12:49 “Xinpe che u tzijic k'ak' cho ri uwächulew. Quinwaj ta c'ut chi canicow ta chic.
Luke12:50 Quinoc'ow na chupam jun xibibalalaj c'ämbejebal
Luke12:51 ¿La quichomaj chi in petinak che u ya'ic jamaril chquixo'l ri winak cho ri uwächulew? Man je taj
Luke12:52 Camic c'ut
Luke12:53 Ri tataxel cuc'ulelaj na ri u c'ojol
Luke12:54 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri winak: “Aretak quiwil ri sutz' ri quel ulok pa ri u kajebal k'ij
Luke12:55 Aretak cäpe quiakik' pa ri u mox elebal k'ij
Luke12:56 ¡Quieb i wäch! Quich'ob u wäch ri caj ri ulew. ¿Jas c'u che man quich'ob taj jas cäban pa tak we k'ij ri'?”
Luke12:57 “¿Jas c'u che man quichomaj taj pa iwech wi jachique ri suc'?
Luke12:58 Aretak catbe cho ri k'atal tzij at rachilam ri a c'ulel
Luke12:59 Quinbij chawe chi man catel ta na chila' c'ä catoj na ri q'uisbal puak.”
Luke13:1 Pa ri k'ijol ri' xebopan jujun che rilic ri Jesus
Luke13:2 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿La quichomaj chi we aj galileyib ri' e ajmaquib na chquiwäch conojel ri aj galileyib
Luke13:3 Quinbij chiwe chi man je taj. Xane' we man quiq'uex i c'u'x
Luke13:4 O ri wajxaklajuj winak ri xecämic aretak xtzak ri nimalaj ja paquiwi' pa Siloe
Luke13:5 Quinbij chiwe chi man je taj. Xane' we man quiq'uex i c'u'x
Luke13:6 Ri Jesus xubij we c'ambal no'j ri': “Jun achi c'o jun u che'al higo ruc'
Luke13:7 Xubij che ri chajinel re ri ulew: ‘Chawilampe'
Luke13:8 Ri chajinel xubij che: ‘Wajaw
Luke13:9 We cäwächin c'ut
Luke13:10 Pa ri k'ij re uxlanem
Luke13:11 c'o c'u jun ixok chila' ri wajxaklajuj junab yawab rumal jun itzel uxlabal. Ri are' pachalic
Luke13:12 Ri Jesus
Luke13:13 Xebuya' ri u k'ab puwi'. Chanim ri ixok xucolomisaj rib
Luke13:14 Ri qui nimal ri winak pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib che ri pixab
Luke13:15 Xch'aw c'u ri Ajawaxel
Luke13:16 Are c'u we ixok ri'
Luke13:17 Aretak xubij we jastak ri'
Luke13:18 Ri Jesus xubij: “¿Jas ruc' junam wi ri rajawibal ri Dios? ¿Jas ruc' quinjunamaj wi?
Luke13:19 Ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' jun u bak' moxtansa
Luke13:20 Jumul chic xubij ri Jesus: “¿Jas ruc' quinjunamaj wi ri rajawibal ri Dios?
Luke13:21 Ri rajawibal ri Dios xa' junam ruc' ri ch'am
Luke13:22 Ri Jesus quebusolij tak ri tinimit xukuje' ri alaj tak tinimit. Quebutijoj ri winak
Luke13:23 C'o jun xuc'ot u chi' ri Jesus: “Ajawaxel
Luke13:24 “Chicojo' i chuk'ab rech quixoc pa ri uchi'ja ri ch'utin u wäch. Quinbij c'u chiwe chi e q'ui cäquitzucuj coquic
Luke13:25 Aretak c'u walijinak chic ri rajaw ja
Luke13:26 C'äte ri' quichaplej na u bixic: ‘Uj wokinak chwäch la
Luke13:27 Ri rajaw ja cätzijon na
Luke13:28 Chila' c'ut quixok' wi na xukuje' quikuch'uch'ej na ri e i ware
Luke13:29 Quepe na pa ri elebal k'ij
Luke13:30 Chiwilampe'
Luke13:31 Pa ri k'ij ri' xebopan jujun chque ri pariseyib
Luke13:32 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jix
Luke13:33 Rajawaxic c'ut camic
Luke13:34 ¡Jerusalen
Luke13:35 Chiwilampe'
Luke14:1 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem
Luke14:2 C'o c'u chuwäch ri Jesus jun achi ri c'o sipoj che.
Luke14:3 Ri Jesus xch'awic
Luke14:4 Ri e are' man xech'aw taj. C'äte ri' ri Jesus xuc'am ri achi
Luke14:5 Xubij c'u chque: “¿La c'o lo jun chiwe
Luke14:6 Man xquirik ta c'ut jas xquibij che.
Luke14:7 Aretak ri Jesus xrilo jas cäquiban ri e siq'uim che jun wa'im
Luke14:8 “Aretak catsiq'uix che jun c'ulanem
Luke14:9 Cäpe c'u ne ri xixsiq'uinic
Luke14:10 Xane'
Luke14:11 Conojel c'u ri cäquinimarisaj quib
Luke14:12 Xukuje' xubij ri Jesus che ri xsiq'uinic: “Aretak caban wa'im re pa k'ij o wa'im re xk'ekal
Luke14:13 Xane'
Luke14:14 Catquicot na
Luke14:15 Aretak xuta wa'
Luke14:16 Ri Jesus xubij che: “C'o jun achi xuban jun nimalaj wa'im re xk'ekal
Luke14:17 Pa ri jok'otaj re ri wa'im ri achi xutak bic jun pataninel rech che u bixic chque ri e u siq'uim: ‘Tisaj
Luke14:18 Junam xquichaplej resaxic quib conojel. Ri nabe xubij che ri pataninel: ‘Nu lok'om jun wulew
Luke14:19 Ri jun chic xubij: ‘Nu lok'om job c'ulaj wacax
Luke14:20 Ri jun chic xubij: ‘Xa' xinc'uli'c
Luke14:21 Xtzelej bic ri pataninel
Luke14:22 Oc'owinak chi jubik' ri pataninel xubij: ‘Wajaw
Luke14:23 Xubij ri ajaw che ri pataninel: ‘Jät pa tak ri be
Luke14:24 Quinbij c'u chiwe chi man c'o ta jun chque we achijab ri' ri xesiq'uix nabe
Luke14:25 Sibalaj e q'ui winak e benak ruc' ri Jesus. Ri are' xca'y chque
Luke14:26 “We c'o jun cäpe wuc'
Luke14:27 Jachin c'u ri man cutelej ta ulok ri u ripibal
Luke14:28 ¿La c'o lo jun chiwe
Luke14:29 We man jeri'
Luke14:30 cäquibij: ‘We achi ri' xuchaplej u yaquic jun ja
Luke14:31 O ¿la c'o lo jun ajawinel ri cuban ch'o'j chrij jun ajawinel chic
Luke14:32 We c'u man cäcuinic utz c'ä naj c'o wi ulok ri jun ajawinel chic
Luke14:33 Je c'u ri'
Luke14:34 “Utz ri atz'am. We c'u man c'o chic ri u tzayil ri atz'am
Luke14:35 Man utz ta che ri ulew
Luke15:1 Xebopan conojel ri e tok'il tak alcabal xukuje' ri ajmaquib ruc' ri Jesus che u tatabexic ri u tzij.
Luke15:2 Xewixwit c'u ri pariseyib xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab
Luke15:3 Ri Jesus c'ut xutzijoj we c'ambal no'j ri' chque
Luke15:4 “¿La c'o lo jun winak chiwe
Luke15:5 Aretak curiko
Luke15:6 Copan c'u cho rachoch
Luke15:7 Quinbij chiwe
Luke15:8 “Jachin ta ri ixok ri c'o lajuj rakan puak ruc'. We cutzak jun chque
Luke15:9 Aretak u rikom chic
Luke15:10 Je c'u ri' quinbij chiwe chi quequicot ri e aj cajalaj tak u tako'n ri Dios rumal rech jun ajmac ri cuq'uex u c'u'x.”
Luke15:11 Xubij ri Jesus: “C'o jun achi c'o quieb u c'ojol.
Luke15:12 Ri chak'axel xubij che ri u tat: ‘Tat
Luke15:13 Oc'owinak chi quieb oxib k'ij
Luke15:14 Aretak ronojel u sachom chic u wäch xpe jun nimalaj wi'jal pa ri ulew ri'. Ri ala xux meba'
Luke15:15 Xbec
Luke15:16 Sibalaj curayij cutij ri rij quinak' ri cäquitij ri ak. Man c'o ta c'u jun cäyo'w ta che.
Luke15:17 Xul c'u ri ala pa sak
Luke15:18 Quinwalijic
Luke15:19 Man takal ta chic cäbij ta c'ojol la chwe. Bana' la chi quinux je jas jun chque ri ajchaquib la.’
Luke15:20 Xwalij ri ala
Luke15:21 Ri u c'ojol xubij che: ‘Tat
Luke15:22 Are c'u ri u tat xubij chque ri pataninel tak rech: ‘Chiwesaj ulok ri utzalaj atz'iak
Luke15:23 Chic'ama' ulok ri alaj chom ama' wacax
Luke15:24 Rumal rech chi we nu c'ojol ri' cäminak chic
Luke15:25 Ri c'ojolaxel nabeal c'o pa ri juyub. Aretak petinak xnakajin che ri ja
Luke15:26 Xusiq'uij jun chque ri alabom
Luke15:27 Ri are' xubij che: ‘Ulinak ri a chak'. Ri a tat xupil ri alaj chom ama' wacax
Luke15:28 Sibalaj c'u xpe royowal ri nabeal
Luke15:29 Ri ala xubij c'u che ri u tat: ‘Chilampe' la
Luke15:30 Aretak c'ut xpe we c'ojol la ri'
Luke15:31 Ri u tat xubij che: ‘Nu c'ojol
Luke15:32 Rajawaxic u banic nimak'ij
Luke16:1 Ri Jesus xukuje' xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “C'o jun achi k'inom
Luke16:2 Ri k'inom achi xusiq'uij ri u chajinel
Luke16:3 Xubij c'u ri chajinel pa ranima': ‘¿Jas quinbano? Ri wajaw cäresaj ri jastak re pa nu k'ab. Man quincuin ta che u banic tajin. Quinq'uix che ri u ta'ic cochinic.
Luke16:4 In weta'm jas ri quinban na
Luke16:5 Xebusiq'uij chquijujunal ri rajc'asib ri rajaw. Xubij che ri nabe: ‘¿Joropa' a c'as ruc' ri wajaw?’
Luke16:6 Ri are' xubij: ‘Lajuj tonel aseit nu c'as.’ Ri chajinel xubij che: ‘Chac'ama' ri u wujil a c'as. Chanim chatt'uyulok
Luke16:7 Te c'u ri' ri chajinel xubij che jun chic ajc'as: ‘Ri at
Luke16:8 Ri k'inom xubij chi sibalaj c'o u no'j ri chajinel ri man suc' taj
Luke16:9 Quinbij c'u chiwe: Chicojo' ri k'inomal aj uwächulew che u banic utzil rech e c'o na iwachil. Jeri' aretak cäq'uistaj na ri k'inomal aj uwächulew
Luke16:10 Apachin ri jic chrij ri jubik'
Luke16:11 We man ix jic chrij ri k'inomal aj uwächulew
Luke16:12 We man ix jic chrij ri jastak re jun chic
Luke16:13 Man c'o ta jun ajchac cäcuin che qui patanixic quieb rajaw. Cäretzelaj c'u na u wäch ri jun
Luke16:14 Ri pariseyib
Luke16:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri ix quik'alajisaj iwib chquiwäch ri winak chi ix suc'; are c'u ri Dios reta'm jas c'o pa iwanima'. Ri jastak ri nimak qui k'ij chquiwäch ri winak
Luke16:16 “Ri u k'ijol ri pixab xukuje' ri quech ri e k'axal tak tzij xebopan c'ä ruc' ri Xuan. Kas chi' c'ut chaplem ulok qui tzijoxic ri e utzalaj tak tzijol rech ri rajawinic ri Dios
Luke16:17 Man c'ax ta c'u ri u sachic u wäch ri caj ulew
Luke16:18 “Ronojel achi ri cujach bic ri rixokil
Luke16:19 “C'o c'u jun k'inomalaj achi ri cucoj je'licalaj morato atz'iak sibalaj pakal rajil
Luke16:20 Xukuje' c'o jun meba' Lazaro u bi'
Luke16:21 Ri Lazaro sibalaj curayij cutij ri u xer tak wa ri quetzak chuxe' ri u mexa ri k'inom. Quenakajin c'u ri tz'i' che
Luke16:22 C'o c'u jun k'ij xcäm ri meba'. Xc'am bic cumal ri e tako'n aj caj rech quecol cho u c'u'x ri Abraham. Xukuje' xcäm ri k'inom
Luke16:23 Ri k'inom c'o pa ri c'olbal que ri cäminakib
Luke16:24 C'äte ri' ri k'inom co xch'awic
Luke16:25 Ri Abraham xubij: ‘Nu c'ojol
Luke16:26 Man xuwi ta wa'. Cojom c'u jun nimalaj siwan chkaxo'l
Luke16:27 Xubij c'u ri k'inom: ‘Quinbochi'n ba' che la
Luke16:28 E c'o c'u can job wachalal. Quinwaj chi ri Lazaro cuk'alajisaj ronojel wa' chquiwäch
Luke16:29 Ri Abraham xubij: ‘C'o ri tzij ri xuya' ri Moises
Luke16:30 Ri k'inom xubij: ‘Quinbij in
Luke16:31 Ri Abraham xubij che: ‘We man cäquitatabej ri tzij ri xuya' ri Moises xukuje' ri xquiya' ri e k'axal tak tzij
Luke17:1 Xubij ri Jesus chque ri u tijoxelab: “Kas quepe wi ri takchibal mac. C'ax c'u re ri winak ri rumal rech quepetic.
Luke17:2 Are ta utz na ri' che
Luke17:3 Chichajij iwib. We ri awachalal camacunic
Luke17:4 We wukmul c'ut pa jun k'ij cuban jun mac chawe
Luke17:5 Xquibij ri takom che ri Ajawaxel: “Chbana' la chke chi cujcowir pa ri ka cojonic.”
Luke17:6 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel: “We ta c'o i cojonic je jas ri jun u bak' moxtansa
Luke17:7 “We c'o lo jun chiwe ri c'o jun pataninel re' ri cuban tajin o cäbe pa yuk'
Luke17:8 Xane' nabe cubij che ri pataninel: ‘Chabana' ri nu wa re xk'ekal
Luke17:9 ¿La cäban ta c'u maltioxinic che we pataninel ri' rumal rech chi xuban jas ri xtak wi che u banic? Man rajawaxic ta maltioxinic che we pataninel ri'.
Luke17:10 Je c'u ri ix xukuje'
Luke17:11 Pa jun k'ij aretak benak ri Jesus pa Jerusalen
Luke17:12 Aretak xopan pa jun alaj tinimit
Luke17:13 co xech'awic
Luke17:14 Ri Jesus xerilo
Luke17:15 Jun chque
Luke17:16 Xxuqui' chuwäch ri Jesus
Luke17:17 Ri Jesus xubij: “¿La ma ta ne e lajuj ri xch'ajan ri ch'a'c chquij? E c'u ri belejeb
Luke17:18 ¿La ma ta c'o jun chic ri xtzelej ta ulok che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Dios
Luke17:19 Xubij che ri achi: “Chatwalijok
Luke17:20 Ri pariseyib xquic'ot u chi' ri Jesus chi jampa' cäpe ri rajawibal ri Dios. Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri rajawibal ri Dios aretak cäpetic man quilitaj taj.
Luke17:21 Man cäbix ta na: ‘Chiwilampe'
Luke17:22 Xubij chque ri u tijoxelab: “Quepe na k'ij
Luke17:23 Cäbix na chiwe: ‘Chiwilampe'
Luke17:24 Je jas ri caypa'
Luke17:25 Rajawaxic c'ut chi sibalaj curik na c'ax nabe
Luke17:26 Jas ri xc'ulmax pa tak ri u k'ij ri Noe
Luke17:27 Ri winak quewa'ic
Luke17:28 Junam xukuje' jas ri xban pa tak ri u k'ij ri Lot. Ri winak quewa'ic
Luke17:29 Pa ri k'ij c'ut aretak xel bic ri Lot pa Sodom
Luke17:30 Jewa' cäbantaj na pa ri k'ij aretak ri Rija'l Winak aretak cuc'ut na rib.
Luke17:31 Pa ri k'ij ri'
Luke17:32 Chnataj ri rixokil ri Lot chiwe.
Luke17:33 Apachin ri cutzucuj u to'tajisaxic ri u c'aslemal

Luke17:36 Quieb achijab e c'o pa ri juyub. Ri jun cäc'am bic

Luke18:1 Ri Jesus xubij jun c'ambal no'j chque
Luke18:2 Xubij: “Xc'oji' jun k'atal tzij pa jun tinimit
Luke18:3 Xc'oji' c'u jun ixok malca'n pa ri tinimit ri'. Ri are' xbe ruc' ri k'atal tzij
Luke18:4 Quieb oxib k'ij ri k'atal tzij man xraj taj. Te c'u ri' xuchomaj: ‘Pune' man quinxe'j ta wib chuwäch ri Dios
Luke18:5 quink'at na tzij puwi' ri u c'ulel ri ixok
Luke18:6 Xubij ri Ajawaxel: “Chitatabej jas ri cubij ri k'atal tzij ri man suc' taj.
Luke18:7 ¿La ma ta ri Dios cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri qui c'ulel ri winak ri e u cha'om
Luke18:8 Quinbij chiwe chi chanim cuk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri qui c'ulel. Aretak c'u cäpe ri Rija'l Winak
Luke18:9 Ri Jesus xukuje' xubij we c'ambal no'j ri' chque jujun ri cäquijiquiba' qui c'u'x chquij chbil quib chi e suc'
Luke18:10 “E c'o quieb achijab ri xeboc bic pa ri rachoch Dios che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios. Jun chque are' jun parisey
Luke18:11 Ri parisey tac'alic
Luke18:12 Camul pa ri wukub k'ij man quintij ta ri nu wa
Luke18:13 Are c'u ri tok'il alcabal tac'al chi naj
Luke18:14 Quinbij chiwe chi ri tok'il alcabal
Luke18:15 Xec'am ulok ac'alab chuwäch ri Jesus rech cuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi'. Ri tijoxelab aretak xquilo
Luke18:16 Ri Jesus xebusiq'uij ri alaj tak ac'alab. Xubij chque: “Chiya' chque ri ac'alab chi quepe wuc'
Luke18:17 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke18:18 Xpe jun c'amal be
Luke18:19 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿Jasche cabij utz chwe? Man c'o ta jun utz
Luke18:20 Aweta'm c'ut ri e takomal: ‘Matkaj pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic. Matcämisanic. Mateläk'anic. Maban tzijtal chrij jun winak chic. Nim chebawila' wi ri a tat a nan.’ ”
Luke18:21 Ri are' c'ut xubij che ri Jesus: “Ronojel wa' nu nimam kas pa ri walc'alal.”
Luke18:22 Ri Jesus
Luke18:23 Aretak xuta ri c'amal be ri xbix che
Luke18:24 Ri Jesus
Luke18:25 Are man c'ax taj ri roc'owisaxic jun camey pa ri u julil jun bak re t'isomibal
Luke18:26 Ri winak ri xquito xquibij: “¿Jachin ta ba lo cäcuinic cäcolotajic?”
Luke18:27 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri man quecuin ta ri winak che u banic
Luke18:28 Xubij c'u ri Lu': “Kajaw
Luke18:29 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke18:30 ri e are' quequic'am na q'ui je tak wa' pa tak we k'ij ri'

Luke18:32 Cäjach na pa qui k'ab ri winak ri man aj judeyib taj
Luke18:33 Cäquich'ay na
Luke18:34 Mawi c'u jun chque we jastak ri' xquich'ob ri u tijoxelab. We tzij ri' ch'ukutal chquiwäch
Luke18:35 Pa jun k'ij
Luke18:36 Ri are'

Luke19:4 Xxiq'uinic
Luke19:5 Ri Jesus

Luke19:7 Aretak xilitaj wa' cumal conojel ri winak

Luke19:10 Petinak c'ut ri Rija'l Winak che qui tzucuxic
Luke19:11 Ri winak cätajin quequitatabej ri jastak ri cubij ri Jesus
Luke19:12 Xubij c'ut: “C'o jun achi nim u banic
Luke19:13 Majok chibec xebusiq'uij lajuj pataninel rech
Luke19:14 E are c'u ri e aj u tinimit ri cäquetzelaj u wäch

Luke19:18 Xpe chi ri jun pataninel
