Luke19:20 Xpe chi ri jun pataninel
Luke19:21 Je xinbano rumal rech chi xinxe'j wib chwäch la
Luke19:22 Ri ajawinel xubij c'u che: ‘At itzelalaj pataninel
Luke19:23 ¿Jas c'u che man xaya' ta ri nu puak jawije' ri cuch'äc wi ral? Rech jeri'
Luke19:24 Xubij chque ri e tac'atoj: ‘Chiwesaj ri puak che
Luke19:25 Xquibij che: ‘Kajaw
Luke19:26 Ri ajawinel xubij chque: ‘Quinbij chiwe chi jachin ri c'o jas c'o cuc'
Luke19:27 E are tak c'ut ri qui banom qui c'ulel chwe
Luke19:28 Xbitaj c'u wa' rumal ri Jesus
Luke19:29 Aretak ri Jesus nakaj chic c'o wi chque ri Betpaje xukuje' ri Betan
Luke19:30 xubij chque: “Jix pa ri alaj tinimit ri c'o apan chiwäch. Aretak quixopan chila'
Luke19:31 We c'u ne c'o jun cuta' chiwe jasche quiquiro
Luke19:32 Xebel bic ri tijoxelab ri xetak bic
Luke19:33 Aretak cätajin cäquiquir ri alaj bur
Luke19:34 Ri e are' xquibij: “Rajawaxic che ri Ajawaxel.”
Luke19:35 Xquic'am c'u ulok che ri Jesus. Xquiq'uiak ri qui k'u' chrij ri alaj bur
Luke19:36 Ri winak xquilic' ri qui k'u' pa ri be ri coc'ow wi.
Luke19:37 Aretak e nakajininak chic che ri xulanic re ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun
Luke19:38 Xquibij: “¡Chnimarisax u k'ij ri Ajawinel ri petinak pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel! ¡Jamaril chupam ri caj! ¡Juluwem sibalaj chicaj!”

Luke19:41 Aretak xenakajin che ri Jerusalen
Luke19:42 Xubij: “¡We ta ri at cawetamaj pa we k'ij ri' ri cäcuinic cuya' jamaril chawe! C'utal c'u ne camic chquiwäch ri a bak'wäch.

Luke19:44 Catquiwulij na can cho ulew

Luke19:48 Man cäquirik ta c'ut jas cäquiban che
Luke20:1 Pa jun chque ri k'ij ri'
Luke20:2 Xquich'abej ri Jesus

Luke20:4 Aretak ri Xuan xuban ri qui bautism ri winak
Luke20:5 Xquichaplej u chomaxic chquixo'l: “We cäkabij re ri Dios
Luke20:6 We c'u cäkabij que ri winak
Luke20:7 Xquibij c'u che ri Jesus chi man queta'm taj jachin xtakow ri Xuan che u banic ri qui bautism ri winak.
Luke20:8 C'äte ri' xubij ri Jesus chque: “Mawi in quinbij chiwe ruc' jachique takanic quinban we jastak ri'.”
Luke20:9 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri winak we c'ambal no'j ri': “C'o jun achi ri xuban jun ticbal uva. Xutic uva chupam
Luke20:10 Aretak xopan ri k'ij re wächinic
Luke20:11 Ri achi xutak chi ulok jun tako'n. Xukuje' ri are' xquich'ayo
Luke20:12 Ri achi xutak chi ulok ri urox tako'n. Xukuje' ri are' xquisoco
Luke20:13 C'äte ri' xubij ri rajaw ri ticbal uva: ‘¿Jas quinbano? Quintak na bic ri lok'alaj nu c'ojol. Cäraj ne nim cäquil wi na.’
Luke20:14 Are c'u ri ajchaquib
Luke20:15 Xquesaj bic ri u c'ojol ri cajaw pa ri ticbal uva
Luke20:16 Cäpe na
Luke20:17 Ri Jesus c'ut xca'y chque ri winak
Luke20:18 Conojel ri quetzak puwi' ri abaj ri'
Luke20:19 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xquitzucuj u chapic ri Jesus pa ri jok'otaj ri'. Xquixe'j c'u quib chquiwäch ri winak. Queta'm c'ut chi ri Jesus xubij we c'ambal no'j ri' chquij ri e are'.
Luke20:20 Xcalwächij ri Jesus. Xequitak bic winak ruc' ri xak xquiban quib chi e suc'
Luke20:21 Xquic'ot c'u u chi' ri Jesus
Luke20:22 ¿La utz cäkaya' alcabal che ri nimalaj ajawinel Sesar
Luke20:23 Ri Jesus reta'm c'u ri qui chomanic. Xubij chque: “¿Jasche quebicoj c'amibal chnuwäch?
Luke20:24 Chic'utu' jun rakan puak chnuwäch. ¿Jachin ajchak'e ri ca'yebal ri c'o chuwäch xukuje' ri bi'aj ri tz'ibatalic?” Xquibij che: “Rech ri Sesar.”
Luke20:25 C'äte ri' xubij chque: “Chitojo' ba' che ri Sesar ri rech ri Sesar. Xukuje' chitojo' che ri Dios ri rech ri Dios.”
Luke20:26 Man xecuin ta c'u che u chapic pa ri u tzij chquiwäch ri winak. Xane' xquimay ri tzij ri xubij chque
Luke20:27 Xebopan c'u jujun chque ri saduseyib ruc' ri Jesus
Luke20:28 Xquibij: “Ajtij
Luke20:29 E c'o c'u wukub cachalal quib. Ri nabeal xc'uli'
Luke20:30 Ri ucab xc'uli'c ruc' ri malca'n ixok. Xukuje' ri are' xcämic
Luke20:31 Ri urox xukuje' xc'uli' ruc'. Je c'u wa' xukuje' ri wukub. Man xquiya' ta can calc'ual
Luke20:32 Chu q'uisbal c'ut xukuje' ri ixok xcäm bic.
Luke20:33 Aretak c'ut quec'astaj ri cäminakib
Luke20:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri winak cho ri uwächulew camic quec'uli'c
Luke20:35 Are c'u ri winak ri ya'tal chque chi quebopan chupam ri c'astajibal quech ri cäminakib
Luke20:36 Man cuya' ta chi c'ut quecämic. Xa' e junam cuc' ri e tako'n aj caj
Luke20:37 Xukuje' ri Moises
Luke20:38 Ri are' c'ut man are ta qui Dios cäminakib
Luke20:39 Jujun chque ri ajtijab re ri pixab xquibij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij
Luke20:40 Man xquicoj ta chi c'u qui chuk'ab che u c'otic u chi' ri Jesus.
Luke20:41 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “¿Jasche cäbixic chi ri Crist rija'l ri David?
Luke20:42 Kas are c'u ri David cubij pa ri wuj que ri Salm: ‘Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Wajaw: Chatt'uyul pa ri nu wiquiak'ab
Luke20:43 c'ä quebenya' na ri a c'ulel chquixe' ri awakan.’
Luke20:44 Jeri' ri Crist cäbix ‘Wajaw’ che rumal ri David
Luke20:45 Tatabem c'ut cumal conojel ri winak
Luke20:46 “Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri ajtijab re ri pixab. Cäkaj chquiwäch chi quebinicatic charachak tak catz'iak qui cojom. Cäcaj chi ri winak cäquiya' rutzil qui wäch pa tak ri c'ayibal. Cäcaj ri tem nim u banic pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Cäcaj ri c'olbal nim qui banic pa tak ula'nem
Luke20:47 xukuje' cäquitokij ri cachoch ri ixokib malca'nib. Che c'u esbal quib
Luke21:1 Ri Jesus xca'y chque ri winak
Luke21:2 Xril xukuje' jun mebalaj chuchu' malca'n
Luke21:3 Ri Jesus xubij c'ut: “Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke21:4 Conojel ri niq'uiaj chic qui yo'm qui sipanic jubik' re ri q'ui ri c'o cuc'. Are c'u we chuchu' ri' xuya' pa ri u mebayil ronojel ri tzukbal re.”
Luke21:5 E c'o c'u jujun ri cätajin cäquitzijoj ri rachoch Dios
Luke21:6 “We jastak ri' ri quiwilo
Luke21:7 Xquita' c'u che
Luke21:8 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “Chichajij iwib
Luke21:9 Aretak c'u quita' na chi c'o ch'o'j
Luke21:10 C'äte ri' xubij chque: “Cäwalij na jun nim tinimit chrij ri jun nim tinimit chic
Luke21:11 Cuban na nimak tak cabrakan. Quepe na wi'jal ruc' yabil pa jalajoj tak c'olbal. Quec'oji' na jastak xibibal
Luke21:12 Nabe c'u na chquiwäch wa'
Luke21:13 Jeri' c'o k'ijol chiwe chi quiya' k'alajisanic.
Luke21:14 C'ol ba pa iwanima' chi michomaj na bic jas quibij na che u to'ic iwib.
Luke21:15 In quinyo'w na i tzij
Luke21:16 Quixjach c'u na cumal ri i tat i nan
Luke21:17 Quetzelax na i wäch cumal conojel rumal rech ri nu bi'.
Luke21:18 Man c'o ta c'u jun i wi' cäsach na u wäch.
Luke21:19 We co quixtaq'ui'c
Luke21:20 Aretak quiwil ri Jerusalen sutim rij cumal ajch'ojab
Luke21:21 Are c'u ri e c'o pa Judey chebanimaj bic pa tak ri juyub. Ri e c'o pa Jerusalen
Luke21:22 E k'ij c'u wa re c'äjisabal wäch
Luke21:23 ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri ixokib ri e yawab tak winak chic pa tak ri k'ij ri'! ¡Tok'ob qui wäch ri chuchuyib ri quetu'bisanic! Ri winak cho ri uwächulew cäquirik na nimalaj c'ax. Cäpe na ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' we winak ri'.
Luke21:24 Quek'ok'ex na che ch'ich' re ch'o'j
Luke21:25 “Quec'oji' na etal chupam ri k'ij
Luke21:26 Cäquixe'j quib ri winak
Luke21:27 C'äte ri' quilitaj na ri Rija'l Winak petinak pa jun sutz' ruc' chuk'ab
Luke21:28 Aretak cächapletaj qui banic we jastak ri'
Luke21:29 Ri Jesus xubij c'u jun c'ambal no'j chque: “Chiwila' ri u che'al higo. Chiwila' conojel ri che'.
Luke21:30 Aretak quiwilo chi quetuxan chi ri qui xak
Luke21:31 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix
Luke21:32 Kastzij quinbij chiwe
Luke21:33 Cäsach na u wäch ri caj ulew
Luke21:34 Chichajij iwib
Luke21:35 jacha' jun chapbal. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij ri' paquiwi' conojel ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew.
Luke21:36 Xakba' chixc'ol suc'umatalic
Luke21:37 Ri Jesus quebutijoj ri winak pa k'ij pa ri rachoch Dios
Luke21:38 Ak'abibal conojel ri winak quelequitatabej pa ri rachoch Dios.
Luke22:1 Nakaj chic ri nimak'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'. Ri cäbix Oc'owem che.
Luke22:2 Ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab cäquitzucuj jas cäquiban na che u cämisaxic ri Jesus. Cäquixe'j c'u quib chquiwäch ri winak.
Luke22:3 Xoc c'u ri Satanas pa ranima' ri Judas
Luke22:4 Ri are' xel bic
Luke22:5 Ri e are' c'ut xequicotic
Luke22:6 Ri Judas xuya' rib chuxe' che u banic wa'. Cutzucuj c'u jun jok'otaj che u jachic ri Jesus pa qui k'ab aretak man e c'o ta winak.
Luke22:7 Xopan c'u ri k'ij re ri caxlanwa ri man cäya' ta ch'am ruc'
Luke22:8 Ri Jesus xebutak c'u bic ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan
Luke22:9 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' ri caj wi la chi cakasuc'umaj wi?”
Luke22:10 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Chiwilampe'
Luke22:11 Chibij che ri rajaw ja: ‘Ri Kajtij cubij chawe: ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri c'olbal ri cäkatij wi na ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem cuc' ri nu tijoxelab?’
Luke22:12 Ri are' cuc'ut na chiwäch jun nimalaj c'olbal suc'umatal chic pa ri cawik ja. Chisuc'umaj ri wa'im re ri Oc'owem chila'.”
Luke22:13 Xebe c'u ri u tijoxelab
Luke22:14 Aretak xopan ri jok'otaj
Luke22:15 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Sibalaj nu rayim u tijic we wa'im ri' re ri Oc'owem iwuc' c'ä majok quinrik c'ax.
Luke22:16 Quinbij c'u chiwe
Luke22:17 Xuc'am c'ut jun kumubal
Luke22:18 Quinbij c'u chiwe
Luke22:19 Xuc'am ri wa
Luke22:20 Aretak e wokinak chic
Luke22:21 Chiwilampe'
Luke22:22 Kastzij ri Rija'l Winak cäbec
Luke22:23 C'äte ri' xquichaplej u c'otic qui chi' chbil quib
Luke22:24 Xwalij c'u jun ch'obonic chquixo'l ri tijoxelab che retamaxic jachin lo ri nim na u k'ij chquixo'l.
Luke22:25 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Ri cajawinelab ri man aj judeyib taj quetakan paquiwi'. Ri c'o qui takanic paquiwi' ri winak
Luke22:26 Are c'u ri ix
Luke22:27 ¿Jachin c'u ri nim na u banic
Luke22:28 Ix c'u ri' ri xixc'oji' wuc' pa tak ri nu rikoj c'ax.
Luke22:29 Ri in c'ut quinya' chiwe jun iwajawibal jas ri xuya' ri nu Tat chwe
Luke22:30 rech quixwa'ic

Luke22:32 Xinbochi'n c'u pawi'
Luke22:33 Ri Lu' c'ut xubij che: “Wajaw
Luke22:34 Xubij c'u ri Jesus: “Lu'

Luke22:36 Xubij c'u chque: “Camic c'ut apachin ri c'o u c'abal u puak
Luke22:37 Quinbij c'u chiwe chi rajawaxic cäbantaj na chwe we tz'ibatalic ri': ‘Xajilax c'u chquixo'l ri e banal tak etzelal.’ Are c'u ri tz'ibatal chwij
Luke22:38 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Kajaw
Luke22:39 Ri Jesus xel bic
Luke22:40 Aretak xebopan chila'

Luke22:42 xubij: “Tat
Luke22:43 Jun tako'n c'ut aj chicaj xuc'ut rib chuwäch
Luke22:44 Aretak xel ch'u'j ri ranima'
Luke22:45 Xwalij c'u che ri ch'awem ruc' Dios
Luke22:46 Xubij chque; “¿Jasche quixwaric? Chixwalijok
Luke22:47 C'ä cätajin cach'aw ri Jesus

Luke22:52 Ri Jesus xubij chque ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Luke22:53 In c'olinak iwuc' ronojel k'ij pa ri rachoch Dios
Luke22:54 Ri winak xquichap ri Jesus
Luke22:55 Nuc'um chi c'u k'ak' pa ri u niq'uiajil ri uwo ja

Luke23:1 Xewalij c'u conojel ri winak

Luke23:5 Ri e are' c'ut xquicoj qui chuk'ab che u bixic: “Quebutuquij ri winak
Luke23:6 Ri Pilat
Luke23:7 Aretak xretamaj chi jela' quel wi ri Jesus jawije' cätakan wi ri k'atal tzij Herod
Luke23:8 Ri Herod
Luke23:9 Xebuban q'ui c'otoj chi'aj che
Luke23:10 E tac'atoj xukuje' ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab
Luke23:11 Are' c'u ri Herod xukuje' ri e rajch'ojab xquetzelaj u wäch
Luke23:12 Pa ri k'ij ri' ri Pilat xukuje' ri Herod xquich'abej quib
Luke23:13 Ri Pilat xebumulij ri e qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Luke23:14 Xubij chque: “Ix i c'amom ulok we achi ri' chnuwäch
Luke23:15 Xukuje' ri Herod man c'o ta xurik chrij
Luke23:16 Quinc'äjisaj ba' u wäch
Luke23:17 
Luke23:18 Conojel c'u ri winak xa' junam xquirak qui chi'

Luke23:20 Ri Pilat xebuch'abej chi jumul ri winak
Luke23:21 Ri winak c'ut xquirak qui chi'
Luke23:22 Churoxmul ri Pilat xubij chque: “¿Jas etzelal u banom wa'? Man c'o ta jun mac rikom chrij rech takal che chi cäcämisaxic. Quinc'äjisaj ba' u wäch
Luke23:23 Ri winak c'ut xquicoj qui chuk'ab
Luke23:24 C'äte ri' ri Pilat xuchomaj chi cäbantaj na jas ri cäquita' che.
Luke23:25 Xutzokopij bic ri jun ri xquita' che
Luke23:26 Aretak qui c'amom chi bic ri Jesus che u ripic
Luke23:27 Xeteri bic sibalaj q'ui winak. E c'o q'ui ixokib chquixo'l ri cäquiq'uis quib che ok'ej
Luke23:28 Ri Jesus c'ut xutzolk'omij rib cuc'
Luke23:29 Chitampe'
Luke23:30 Ri winak cäquichaplej c'u na u bixic chque ri nimak tak juyub: ‘Chixtzak ulok pakawi'’. Cäquibij na chque ri alaj tak juyub: ‘Chujich'uku'’.
Luke23:31 We queban we jastak ri' che ri räx che'
Luke23:32 Xukuje' xequic'am bic quieb banal etzelal ruc' ri Jesus
Luke23:33 Aretak xebopan pa ri c'olbal ri u Bakil Jolomaj u bi'

Luke23:35 E tac'atoj c'u ri winak
Luke23:36 Xukuje' ri ajch'ojab xquetz'bej u wäch. Xekeb ruc' ri Jesus
Luke23:37 Xquibij: “We at Cajawinel ri aj judeyib
Luke23:38 C'o c'u jun tz'ibatalic puwi' ri Jesus
Luke23:39 Jun chque ri banal tak etzelal ri e tzayebam ruc' ri Jesus
Luke23:40 Xch'aw ri jun chic banal etzelal
Luke23:41 Ri ke ri uj kastzij takal chke chi cäc'äjisax ka wäch
Luke23:42 Te c'u ri xubij: “Jesus
Luke23:43 Ri Jesus xubij c'u che: “Kastzij quinbij chawe
Luke23:44 Kas pa ri tiq'uil k'ij c'ä pa ri oxib rajilabal ri benak k'ij
Luke23:45 Ri k'ij xk'ekumaric. Ri tasbal u pam ri rachoch Dios xjixjobic pa u niq'uiajil.
Luke23:46 C'äte ri' ri Jesus co xurak u chi'
Luke23:47 Aretak ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab xril ri xc'ulmaxic
Luke23:48 Conojel ri winak xquimulij quib che rilic. Aretak xquil ri xbantajic

Luke23:50 C'o jun achi Jose u bi'

Luke23:56 Aretak xetzelej ulok
Luke24:1 Pa ri nabe k'ij re ri uwuk k'ij

Luke24:6 Man c'o ta waral

Luke24:18 Ri jun

Luke24:21 Are c'u ri uj cu'l ka c'u'x chi are ri' ri queresaj ta na ri aj Israel pa qui k'ab ri qui c'ulel. Xane' ruc' ronojel wa'

Luke24:28 Nakaj chic e c'o wi che ri alaj tinimit ri e benak wi. Ri Jesus xubano chi je ta ne naj cäbe wi na.

Luke24:30 Aretak ri Jesus c'o cuc' pa ri mexa

Luke24:35 Xukuje' ri e are' xquitzijoj jas ri xquic'ulmaj pa ri be. Xquibij chi xquich'ob u wäch ri Jesus aretak xupir ri wa.
Luke24:36 C'ä cätajin cäquitzijoj wa'
Luke24:37 Sibalaj xquixe'j quib

Luke24:39 Chebiwila' ri wakan
Luke24:40 Cätajin cubij wa'
Luke24:41 C'ä maja' c'u kas quecojonic
Luke24:42 Xquiya' c'u jun ch'akap bolom cär che.

Luke24:47 Xukuje' xtz'ibax canok chi cätzijox na chque conojel ri winak
Luke24:48 Ix c'ut ix k'alajisanelab che wa'.

Luke24:51 Aretak cätajin quebutewichi'j
Luke24:52 Xetzelej c'u pa Jerusalen ruc' nimalaj quicotemal.

John1:1 Pa ri chapletajic c'o ri Tzij
John1:2 Ri are' c'o pa ri chapletajic ruc' ri Dios.
John1:3 Conojel ri jastak rumal are' xebanic. Man c'o ta jun chque ri jastak ri e banom
John1:4 Pa ri are' c'o wi ri c'aslemal
John1:5 Ri chäj cäjuluw pa ri k'eku'm
John1:6 Xc'oji' jun achi takom ulok rumal ri Dios
John1:7 Are' xpe che u ya'ic k'alajisanic rech cuk'alajisaj ri chäj
John1:8 Ri are' man are ta ri chäj
John1:9 Ri kas chäj
John1:10 Cho ri uwächulew c'o wi
John1:11 Xul cho ri rulew
John1:12 Conojel c'ut ri xec'amowic
John1:13 Ri e are' man e alc'ualam ta rumal quic'
John1:14 Ri Tzij xuc'am ri qui banic winak
John1:15 Ri Xuan are' xuk'alajisaj chrij ri C'ojolaxel
John1:16 Konojel uj kac'amom ke ri u nojiquil
John1:17 Ri pixab xya' rumal ri Moises
John1:18 Mawi jubik' c'o ta jun ilowinak ta u wäch ri Dios; are' c'u ri xa' jun chi C'ojolaxel
John1:19 Are' wa' ri u k'alajisanic ri Xuan
John1:20 Ri Xuan xuk'alajisaj
John1:21 Ri e are' xquic'ot u chi': “¿Jachin c'u ri at? ¿La at ri Eliy?” Xubij: “Man in taj.” “¿La at ri K'axal Tzij?” Xubij chque: “Jayi'.”
John1:22 Xquibij chi c'ut che: “¿Jachin c'u ri at? rech quekabij chque ri xujquitak ulok. ¿Jas cabij at chbil awib?”
John1:23 Ri Xuan xubij: “In ri' ri ch'abal ri curak u chi' chupam ri chaki'j uwo sak
John1:24 Ri e takom ulok e are jujun chque ri pariseyib.
John1:25 Xquic'ot u chi': “¿Jas c'u che cäban ri qui bautism ri winak
John1:26 Ri Xuan xutzelej u bixic chque
John1:27 Are c'u wa' ri petinak chwij. Man takal ta chwe chi quinquir ri ximibal re ri u xajäb.”
John1:28 Are we jastak ri' xeban pa Betan
John1:29 Chucab k'ij chic ri Xuan xril ri Jesus cätajin cäpe ruc'
John1:30 Are' wa' ri xintzijoj aretak xinbij: ‘Petinak jun achi chwij ri nim na u k'ij chnuwäch
John1:31 Ri in nabe man weta'm ta u wäch. Rech cäc'utunisax chquiwäch ri aj israelib
John1:32 Ri Xuan xk'alajisanic
John1:33 Ri in man weta'm ta u wäch
John1:34 In wilom
John1:35 Chucab k'ij c'o chi jumul ri Xuan chi' e rachil quieb chque ri u tijoxelab.
John1:36 Xca'y c'u apan che ri Jesus cätajin cäbin apanok
John1:37 Aretak ri quieb u tijoxelab ri Xuan xquita' ri xubij
John1:38 Ri Jesus xutzolk'omij rib
John1:39 Xubij chque: “Tisaj
John1:40 Ri Trix
John1:41 Ri are' nabe xurik apan ri Simon ri rachalal
John1:42 Chanim ri Trix xuc'am ulok ri Simon ruc' ri Jesus. Ri Jesus xrilo
John1:43 Chucab k'ij ri Jesus xuchomaj xbe pa Galiley. Xurik c'u ri Pelip
John1:44 Ri Pelip are' aj Betsaid
John1:45 Ri Pelip xurik ri Natanael
John1:46 Xubij ri Natanael che: “¿La cuya' ta c'u lo quel ulok jun utzalaj jasach pa Nazaret?” Xubij ri Pelip che: “Tasaj
John1:47 Aretak ri Jesus xril ri Natanael cätajin copan ruc'
John1:48 Xubij ri Natanael che: “¿Jawije' xetamaj wi la nu wäch?” Ri Jesus xubij che: “C'ä majok chatusiq'uij ulok ri Pelip
John1:49 Ri Natanael xubij che: “Ajtij
John1:50 Ri Jesus xubij che: “¿La catcojonic rumal rech chi xinbij chawe chi xatinwil chuxe' ri u che'al higo? Quebawil na jastak ri sibalaj e nimak na chuwäch wa'.”
John1:51 Ri Jesus xubij c'u che: “Kastzij
John2:1 Churox k'ij xban jun c'ulanem pa Cana
John2:2 Xula'x c'ut ri Jesus xukuje' ri u tijoxelab pa ri c'ulanem.
John2:3 Xq'uis c'u ri u wa'l uva. Ri u nan ri Jesus xubij che: “Man c'o ta chic u wa'l uva caquicojo.”
John2:4 Xubij ri Jesus che: “Chuchu'
John2:5 Xubij ri u nan chque ri pataninelab: “Apachique ta ne ri cubij chiwe
John2:6 E c'o wakib nimak tak k'ebal re abaj chila' c'olbal joron. Are wa' cäquicoj ri aj judeyib che ch'ajanic. Jujun k'ebal cuk'i' quiejeb job k'ebal joron.
John2:7 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Chebinojisaj tak ri k'ebal che joron. Xequinojisaj c'ä chquichi'.”
John2:8 Xubij c'u ri Jesus chque: “Chiwesaj c'u jubik'
John2:9 Are c'u ri c'amal be re ri nimak'ij xuna' ri joron ri xux u wa'l uva. Man xretamaj taj jawije' xpe wi
John2:10 xubij che: “Conojel ri winak are cäquiya' nabe ri utzalaj u wa'l uva. Aretak c'u ri e ula' e uq'uianinak chic
John2:11 Are nabe etal wa' ri xuban ri Jesus pa Cana re Galiley
John2:12 Bantajinak chi c'u wa'
John2:13 Petinak chi c'u ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem
John2:14 Xeburik c'ut chupam ri rachoch Dios ri ajc'ayib tak wacax
John2:15 Aretak xril ri Jesus
John2:16 Xubij chque ri ajc'ay tak palomax: “Chiwesaj bic wa' waral. Miban c'u ja re c'ayibal che ri rachoch ri nu Tat.”
John2:17 Chi' c'ut xnataj chque ri u tijoxelab chi tz'ibam canok: “Quinubik' ri rilixic ri achoch la.”
John2:18 Ri aj judeyib xech'awic
John2:19 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chituquij we rachoch Dios ri'

John2:24 Are c'u ri Jesus man xcu'bi ta u c'u'x chquij
John2:25 Man rajawaxic ta che chi c'o jun cuk'alajisaj ta chuwäch jas qui banic ri winak. Rumal rech chi ri are' reta'm jas c'o pa canima' ri winak.

John4:1 Ri Ajawaxel
John4:2 (pune' man are' ta ri Jesus cäbanow ri qui bautism
John4:3 ri Jesus xuya' can ri Judey
John4:4 Rajawaxic c'ut chi coc'ow pa Samar.
John4:5 Xopan c'u pa jun tinimit ri c'o pa Samar
John4:6 Chila' c'o wi ri u c'ua' ri Jacob. Cosinak ri Jesus che ri be
John4:7 Xpe jun ixok aj Samar che resaxic u joron. Ri Jesus xubij che: “Chaya' we ri joron.”

John4:9 Ri ixok aj Samar xubij che: “Ri lal lal aj judey. ¿Jasche cata' joron la chwe

John4:18 Job c'u achijab e c'olinak awuc'; ri c'o awuc' camic man awachajil taj. Kas c'u tzij wa' ri xabij.”
John4:19 Xubij ri ixok che: “Tat
John4:20 Ri e ka mam xek'ijilan pa we juyub ri'. Ri alak c'ut cabij alak chi pa Jerusalen c'o wi ri c'olbal ri rajawaxic cäban wi ri k'ijilanic.”

John4:28 C'äte ri' ri ixok xuya' can ri u k'ebal
John4:29 “Tisaj
John4:30 Xebel c'u ulok pa ri tinimit
John4:31 C'ä maja' quebopan ri winak

John4:36 Ri cuban k'atoj cuc'am ri tojbal rech
John4:37 Ruc' c'u wa' kastzij ri cäbixic: Jun wi ri cäticonijic
John4:38 In xixintak che u k'atic jun tico'n ri man xichacuj ta ix. Niq'uiaj winak chic xechacunic

John4:41 Sibalaj e q'ui c'ut xecojon rumal ri u tzij.

John4:44 Ri Jesus c'ut xuk'alajisaj chi jun k'axal tzij man nim ta quil wi pa ri kas rulew.
John4:45 Aretak c'u xopan pa Galiley
John4:46 Xopan chi jumul ri Jesus pa Cana re Galiley
John4:47 Ri are' xuto chi ri Jesus elinak bic pa Judey

John4:49 Ri achi ri yo'm takanic pa u k'ab xubij che: “Jo' chanim tat c'ä majok chcäm ri nu c'ojol.”

John4:51 Pa ri u tzelejic c'ut cho rachoch
John4:52 Xuta' c'u chque jas jok'otaj xutziric. Xquibij che: “Iwir pa ri nabe jok'otaj benak k'ij xel ri k'ak' chrij.”
John4:53 Chi' c'ut xnataj che ri u tat chi are jok'otaj ri' aretak xubij ri Jesus che: “Cäc'asi' ri a c'ojol.” Xcojon c'u che ri Jesus cuc' conojel ri e aj uwo rachoch.

John6:58 Are wa' ri wa ri kajinak ulok pa ri caj. Man je taj jas ri jaswa' ri xquitij ri e i mam

John6:64 E c'o c'u jujun chiwe ri man quecojon taj.” Reta'm c'ut ri Jesus kas pa ri tiquiritajic jachin tak ri man quecojon taj

John7:4 We jun cäraj chi queilitaj ri jastak ri quebubano
John7:5 Mawi c'u ne ri rachalal xecojon che ri are'.

John7:8 Jix ix pa ri nimak'ij; ri in man quinbe taj iwuc'

John7:10 Aretak e benak chic ri rachalal pa ri nimak'ij
John7:11 Xquitzucuj c'u ri aj judeyib pa ri nimak'ij

John7:13 Man c'o ta jun cätzijon chrij chi sakil
John7:14 Pa ri u niq'uiajiric ri nimak'ij xpaki' ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios
John7:15 Xquimay ri aj judeyib
John7:16 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ri nu tijonic man wech taj
John7:17 We c'o jachin cäraj cuban ri u rayibal ri xintakow ulok
John7:18 Ri' ri cätzijon pa re wi
John7:19 ¿La ma ta xuya' ri Moises ri pixab chiwe? Man c'o ta c'u jun chiwe cunimaj ri pixab. ¿Jas che quitzucuj nu cämisaxic?”
John7:20 Ri winak xquitzelej u bixic che: “C'o itzel uxlabal chawe. ¿Jachin cätajin cätzucun a cämisaxic?”
John7:21 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Jun chac xinbano
John7:22 Ri Moises xuya' chiwe chi quikopij ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi che iwetal
John7:23 We pa ri k'ij re uxlanem cäkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ala wi che retal
John7:24 Mik'at tzij rumal ri xak quiwilo. Xane' chik'ata' tzij ruc' ri suc'alaj k'atoj tzij.”
John7:25 Xquibij c'u jujun e aj Jerusalen: “¿La ma ta are wa' ri cätzucux u cämisaxic?”
John7:26 “Chiwilampe'
John7:27 Ri uj keta'm aj jawije'. Aretak c'u cäpe ri Crist
John7:28 C'äte c'u ri' ri Jesus co xch'awic aretak quebutijoj ri winak pa ri rachoch Dios
John7:29 Ri in weta'm u wäch
John7:30 Xquitzucuj c'u u chapic. Man c'o ta jun xucoj ta u k'ab chrij
John7:31 E q'ui chque ri winak xecojon che
John7:32 Ri pariseyib xquita' ri jastak ri caquibij ri q'ui winak chrij ri Jesus; ri e are' xukuje' ri e quinimakil ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob xequitak bic jujun chajinelab rech ri rachoch Dios che u chapic ulok.
John7:33 Xubij ri Jesus: “Xa jubik' chic quinc'oji' iwuc'
John7:34 Quinitzucuj na
John7:35 Xquitzijobela' c'u quib ri aj judeyib: “¿Jawije' ta lo cäbe wi
John7:36 ¿Jas u banic we tzij ri' ri xubij?: ‘Quinitzucuj na
John7:37 Pa ri q'uisbal k'ij
John7:38 Ri cäcojon chwe in
John7:39 Xubij wa' chrij ri Uxlabaxel ri cäquic'am na ri winak ri quecojon che ri are'. C'ä maja' c'u ne cäpe ri Uxlabaxel
John7:40 Jujun c'ut chque ri winak
John7:41 Jujun chic xquibij: “Are wa' ri Crist.” Ri niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “¿La pa Galiley ta lo cäpe wi ri Crist?
John7:42 ¿La ma ta cubij ri Tz'ibatalic chi ri Crist are rija'l ri David
John7:43 E q'ui c'u ri winak xquitas quib chquij ri niq'uiaj chic rumal rech ri Jesus.
John7:44 E c'o jujun chque are ta xcaj xquichap bic. Man c'o ta c'u jun xucoj u k'ab chrij.
John7:45 Xepe ri chajinelab re ri rachoch Dios cuc' ri qui nimakil ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' cuc' ri pariseyib
John7:46 Ri e chajinelab xquitzelej u bixic chque: “Mawi jumul c'o jun winak tzijoninak jas ri cätzijon we achi ri'.”
John7:47 Ri pariseyib xquibij chque: “¿La xukuje' ba' ri ix xixsubutajic?
John7:48 ¿La c'o lo jun chque ri nimak qui banic
John7:49 Are c'u we q'uialaj winak ri'
John7:50 Ri Nicodem
John7:51 “¿La cubij lo ri ka pixab chi cäc'okox jun winak
John7:52 Xquibij c'u che: “¿La at lo xukuje' aj Galiley? Chatzucuj pa ri Tz'ibatalic
John7:53 Chquijujunal c'ut xebe cho cachoch.
John8:1 Ri Jesus xbe pa ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun.
John8:2 Sibalaj ak'ab xopan chi jumul pa ri rachoch Dios. Conojel ri winak xebopan ruc'. Xt'uyi' c'ut
John8:3 Ri ajtijab re ri pixab xukuje' ri pariseyib xquic'am ulok jun ixok chuwäch. Quirikom chi cätajin camacunic ruc' jun achi chic. Xquitac'aba' pa qui niq'uiajil ri winak.
John8:4 Xquibij che ri Jesus: “Ajtij
John8:5 Ri u pixab ri Moises cujutako chi abaj cacämisabex quech ri ixokib ri je caquiban wa'. E c'u ri at
John8:6 Xquibij c'u wa' che u c'amic u pu chi'
John8:7 Quitakem c'ut u c'otic u chi'
John8:8 Xpachi' chi jumul
John8:9 Aretak xquita' wa'
John8:10 Xtaq'ui' ri Jesus
John8:11 Ri are' xubij: “Ajawaxel
John8:12 Ri Jesus xebutzijobej chi jumul ri winak
John8:13 Xquibij ri pariseyib che: “At cak'alajisaj awib chbil awib. Ri a k'alajisanic c'ut man kastzij taj.”
John8:14 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “Pune' ta ri in quink'alajisaj wib chbil wib
John8:15 Ix quik'at tzij jas ri u beya'l ri winak. Ri in man c'o ta jun quink'at tzij puwi'.
John8:16 We c'u quink'atow tzij
John8:17 Xukuje' pa ri i pixab tz'ibatal wi chi kastzij ri qui k'alajisanic quieb winak.
John8:18 Ri in quink'alajisaj wib chbil wib ri jun chic ri cuya' k'alajisanic chwij are' ri xintakow ulok
John8:19 Ri e are' c'ut xquibij che: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri a Tat?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Ix man quich'ob ta nu wäch
John8:20 We tzij ri' xutzijoj ri Jesus jawije' cäya' wi ri cuchuj
John8:21 Ri Jesus xubij chi jumul chque: “In quinbec. Ri ix quinitzucuj na
John8:22 Xquibij ri aj judeyib: “¿La cucämisaj ta c'u rib
John8:23 Ri are' xubij chque: “Ix ix aj waral ix aj iquim
John8:24 Rumal ri' xinbij chiwe chi quixcäm na pa ri i mac. We c'u man quicojo chi in ri'
John8:25 Xquibij che: “¿Jachin ri' ri at?” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Nu bim chi ulok chiwe kas pa ri chaplebal.
John8:26 E q'ui ri jastak quebenbij na che u k'atic tzij piwi'; are' c'ut ri xintakow ulok are kas aj tzij
John8:27 Ri e are' man xquich'ob taj chi are' cutzijoj ri Tataxel chque.
John8:28 Ri Jesus c'ut xubij chque: “Aretak quiwalijisaj na ri Rija'l Winak
John8:29 Are' c'ut ri xintakow ulok
John8:30 Aretak cätajin quebutzijoj we jastak ri'
John8:31 Xubij ri Jesus chque ri aj judeyib ri xecojon che: “We quixjeki' pa ri nu tzij
John8:32 Quiwetamaj c'u na ri kastzij
John8:33 Xquibij che: “Ri uj uj rija'l ri Abraham. Man c'o ta jumul uj uxinak ta lok'om pataninelab che jun. ¿Jas c'u che cabij: ‘Quixtzokopitaj na’?”
John8:34 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Kastzij
John8:35 Ri lok'om pataninel man amak'el taj cäjeki' cho ja; are c'u ri c'ojolaxel are cäjeki' can amak'el.
John8:36 Je c'u ri'
John8:37 Weta'm chi ri ix ix rija'lil ri Abraham. Ri ix c'ut quitzucuj nu cämisaxic
John8:38 In quintzijoj jas ri wilom ruc' ri Tataxel. Ri ix quiban ri i tom ruc' ri i tat.”
John8:39 Ri e are' xquibij che: “Ri ka tat are ri Abraham.” Ri Jesus xubij chque: “We ta kastzij ix ralc'ual ri Abraham
John8:40 Ri ix c'ut camic quitzucuj nu cämisaxic. Nu bim c'u ri kastzij chiwe
John8:41 Ri ix are quiban iwe ri cuban ri i tat.” Xquibij c'u che: “Ri uj man uj ta calc'ual man queta'm ta u wäch qui tat. Jun ka Tat c'olic
John8:42 Ri Jesus xubij c'u chque: “We ta are' i Tat ri Dios
John8:43 ¿Jasche man quich'ob ta ri nu ch'abal? Rumal rech chi man quixcuin taj che u tatabexic ri nu tzij.
John8:44 Ri ix ix rech ri i tat ri itzel. Ri u rayinic ri i tat quiwaj quibano. Ri itzel cämisanel kas pa ri tiquiritajic. Man jekelinak ta pa ri kastzij
John8:45 Are c'u ri in
John8:46 ¿Jachin chiwe cäc'utuw chnuwäch chi c'o nu mac? We quinbij ri kastzij
John8:47 Jachin c'ut ri rech ri Dios
John8:48 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “¿La ma ta cäkabij ri kastzij chi at aj Samar
John8:49 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Man c'o ta itzel uxlabal chwe. Xane' ri in nim quinwil wi ri nu Tat. Are c'u ri ix man nim ta quiniwil wi.
John8:50 Ri in man quintzucuj ta ri nu juluwem; c'o Jun ri cätzucunic
John8:51 Kastzij
John8:52 Xquibij ri aj judeyib che: “Camic keta'm chi c'o itzel uxlabal chawe. Ri Abraham xcämic
John8:53 ¿La nim ta c'u na a k'ij chuwäch ri ka mam Abraham
John8:54 Ri Jesus xutzelej u bixic chque: “We ta quinjuluwirisaj wib
John8:55 Man quich'ob ta c'u u wäch ri are'. Ri in quinch'ob u wäch. We ta quinbij chi man quinch'ob ta u wäch
John8:56 Ri Abraham ri i mam sibalaj xquicotic chi cäril na ri nu k'ij. Xril c'ut
John8:57 C'äte ri' ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “C'ä maja' c'o cawinak lajuj (50) a junab. ¿La xawil c'u lo u wäch ri Abraham?”
John8:58 Xubij ri Jesus chque: “Kastzij
John8:59 C'äte ri' xequic'am abaj che u q'uiakic che. Chic'uyal c'ut xel ubic ri Jesus pa ri rachoch Dios.
John9:1 Oc'owem re ri Jesus
John9:2 Ri e u tijoxelab ri Jesus xquita' che
John9:3 Ri Jesus xubij chque: “Mawi xmacun ri are'
John9:4 Rajawaxic chi quinban ri u chac ri xintakow ulok
John9:5 Aretak c'ä in c'o cho ri uwächulew
John9:6 Xbitaj c'u wa'
John9:7 Xubij che: “Jät
John9:8 E are' c'ut ri c'ul tak ja xukuje' ri e ilowinak canok chi cutz'onoj u cochinic
John9:9 Jujun xquibij: “Are wa'.” Ri jule' chic xquibij: “Man are taj
John9:10 C'äte ri' xquibij che: “¿Jas xjakbex quech ri a bak'wäch?”
John9:11 Ri are' xubij chque: “Are' ri achi
John9:12 Xquibij c'u che: “¿Jawije' c'o wi ri achi ri'?” Xubij: “Man weta'm taj.”
John9:13 Xquic'am bic ri moy can nabe
John9:14 K'ij c'ut re uxlanem aretak ri Jesus xuban ri xok'ol

John9:18 Ri aj judeyib man xquicoj taj chi ri achi moy canok
John9:19 Xquita' chque
John9:20 Ri u tat u nan xquibij chque: “Keta'm chi are kalc'ual wa'
John9:21 Man keta'm ta c'ut jasche cäca'y camic. Man keta'm taj jachin ri xejakow ri u bak'wäch. Q'ui chic u junab. Ta alak che. Kas are' cutzijoj na jas u banom.”
John9:22 Ri u tat u nan xquibij wa' rumal rech chi xquixe'j quib chquiwäch ri aj judeyib. Are c'u ri aj judeyib qui banom chomanic
John9:23 Rumal rech wa'

John9:27 Ri achi xubij chque: “Nu bim chic chech alak
John9:28 Xquiyok'o
John9:29 Uj keta'm chi ri Dios xtzijon ruc' ri Moises. Are c'u ri achi ri'
John9:30 Ri achi xubij chque: “Are wa' ri quinmay in chi man eta'm ta alak aj jawije'
John9:31 Keta'm chi ri Dios man quebutatabej ta ri ajmaquib. We c'u c'o jachin ri cuya' u k'ij ri Dios
John9:32 Kas aretak xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew
John9:33 We ta ma ta elinak ulok ruc' ri Dios
John9:34 Ri aj judeyib xquibij che: “Ri at at nojinak che ri mac xatalaxic. ¿La at ta c'ut cujatijoj?” Xquesaj c'u bic.
John9:35 Ri Jesus xuto' chi xesax bic ri moy. Xurik c'ut

John10:1 “Kastzij
John10:2 Are' c'ut ri coc pa ri oquibal
John10:3 Ri chajinel cujak ri oquibal chuwäch ri are'. Ri chij cäquita' ri u ch'abal. Ri are' quebusiq'uij ri u chij che ri qui bi'
John10:4 Aretak e resam chi bic conojel ri e rech
John10:5 Man c'u queteri ta chrij ri jun chiwi ri man cäquich'ob ta u wäch
John10:6 Ri Jesus xubij we c'ambal no'j ri' chque. Ri e are' c'ut man xquich'ob taj jas ri xutzijoj chque.
John10:7 Xubij chi c'u ri Jesus jumul: “Kastzij
John10:8 Conojel ri xepe can nabe chnuwäch in
John10:9 In ri' ri oquibal. We c'o jachin coc pa ri in
John10:10 Ri eläk'om xuwi cäpetic che eläk'anic
John10:11 In ri' ri utzalaj ajyuk'. Ri utzalaj ajyuk' cuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal quech ri u e chij.
John10:12 Are c'u ri xa' tojom
John10:13 Je c'u ri' ri xa' tojom canimajic
John10:14 In ri' ri utzalaj ajyuk'. Quinch'ob c'u qui wäch ri nu chij
John10:15

John10:19 Jumul chic

John10:21 Niq'uiaj chic xquibij: “We tzij ri' man e rech ta jun ri c'o itzel uxlabal che. ¿La cäcuin lo jun itzel uxlabal che qui jakic ri qui bak'wäch ri moyab?”
John10:22 Chi' c'ut coc'owisax ri nimak'ij pa Jerusalen che u nataxic ri u yaquic ri rachoch Dios. Pa ri k'ij re ri tew c'u ri'.
John10:23 Ri Jesus cäbin pa ri rachoch Dios
John10:24 Ri aj judeyib c'ut xquisutij rij

John10:26 Are c'u ri ix man quicoj taj
John10:27 Ri e nu chij cäquitatabej ri nu ch'abal. Ri in quinch'ob qui wäch
John10:28 In quinya' junalic c'aslemal chque. Mawi jumul cäsach na qui wäch chbe k'ij sak. Man c'o ta jun quetokin na pa nu k'ab.
John10:29 Ri nu Tat
John10:30 Ri in ruc' ri Tataxel xa uj jun.”
John10:31 Jumul chic ri aj judeyib xquic'am abaj che u cämisaxic.

John13:1 C'ä maja' ri nimak'ij re ri Oc'owem

John13:3 Reta'm ri Jesus chi ri Tataxel e u yo'm chi conojel ri jastak pa u k'ab. Reta'm chi ri are' ruc' ri Dios elinak wi ulok
John13:4 Aretak ri Jesus c'o pa ri mexa che u tijic ri wa
John13:5 Xuya' ja' pa jun tzima'

John13:10 Ri Jesus xubij che: “Ri jun ri ch'ajom chic

John13:12 Aretak u ch'ajom chi ri cakan
John13:13 Ri ix quibij ‘Kajtij’ chwe

John13:19 Quinbij apan camic chiwe c'ä maja' cäbanic
John13:20 Kastzij

John13:27 Xuwi c'u xc'amtaj ri caxlanwa rumal ri Judas

John16:4 Are c'u we jastak ri' nu tzijom chiwe

John17:8 ri tzij ri yo'm la chwe

John18:4 Ri Jesus reta'm chic conojel ri jastak ri petinak chrij

John18:14 Are c'u ri Caipas yowinak qui no'j ri aj judeyib

John18:16 Are c'u ri Lu' xtaq'ui' can chuchi' ri u chi' be. Xel c'u ulok ri tijoxel ri etamatal u wäch rumal ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob

Acts1:10 Naj c'u qui wi' che ri u bic ri Jesus chicaj. Quieb c'u achijab xetac'atob chquiwäch
Acts1:11 Xquibij c'u chque: “Achijab aj galileyib
Acts1:12 Ri takomxenlab xebel bic chupam ri qui juyubal tak ri u Che'al Aseitun
Acts1:13 Aretak xeboc bic
Acts1:14 Conojel c'u wa' xa' jun qui chomanic
Acts1:15 E c'o q'ui cojonelab qui mulin quib
Acts1:16 “Kachalal
Acts1:17 Ri Judas are' kachil canok
Acts1:18 Ri xtojbex rech ri retzelal are xlok'obex jun ch'akap ulew. Ch'iquilic xkajic
Acts1:19 Conojel ri e aj Jerusalen xquetamaj wa'. Jeri' chi ri ch'akap ulew ri' ‘Aseldama’ u bi'
Acts1:20 Tz'ibatal c'u chupam ri wuj que ri Salm: ‘Chi ri rachoch chjamajob canok
Acts1:21 Waral e c'o achijab kuc' ri xec'oji' kuc' pa conojel tak ri jok'otaj ri xc'oji' ri Ajawaxel Jesus chkaxo'l
Acts1:22 e kachil kas aretak xc'utun ri Jesus aretak xban ri u bautism rumal ri Xuan c'ä xpaki' na chicaj. Rajawaxic c'ut chi jun chque wa' cujunamaj rib kuc' che u bixic chque ri winak chi kastzij xc'astaj ri Jesus.”
Acts1:23 Xequitac'aba' quieb achijab chquiwäch: ri Jose ri cäbix Barsabas che (ri xukuje' cäbix Just che)
Acts1:24 Xquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios
Acts1:25 rech cuban we chac ri'
Acts1:26 Xquiq'uiak c'u taklebenic
Acts2:1 Aretak xopan ri nimak'ij re Cawinak Lajuj K'ij
Acts2:2 Xak c'ätetal
Acts2:3 Xquic'utuxtaj quib ak'aj ri e je ta ne e rech k'ak' chquiwäch
Acts2:4 Conojel c'ut xenojisax che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios
Acts2:5 E c'o c'u aj judeyib pa Jerusalen pa tak ri k'ij ri' ri queniman che u k'ijilaxic ri Dios
Acts2:6 Aretak xtataj wa'
Acts2:7 Conojel xsach qui c'u'x
Acts2:8 ¿Jas c'u che quekata' chi quech'aw pa tak ri ka ch'abal ri xujtijox wi ulok kas pa ri ch'utinal?
Acts2:9 E c'o aj Partiy chkaxo'l
Acts2:10 e c'o aj Prij
Acts2:11 jujun chque e are' aj judeyib
Acts2:12 Conojel xquimayo
Acts2:13 Niq'uiaj winak chic cäquitze'j qui wäch
Acts2:14 Are c'u ri Lu' xtaq'ui' cuc' ri e julajuj takomxenlab
Acts2:15 We achijab ri' man e k'abarelab taj
Acts2:16 Xane' are wa' ri bim can rumal ri Joel ri k'axal tzij
Acts2:17 ‘Cac'ulmataj na chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij
Acts2:18 Xukuje' quinjamij na ri Wuxlabal paquiwi' ri e pataninel tak wech chi achijab chi ixokib
Acts2:19 Quebenc'ut na mayibal ajsic pa ri caj
Acts2:20 Ri k'ij cäk'ekumar na
Acts2:21 Conojel c'ut ri cäquinataj ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel
Acts2:22 Alak aj israelib
Acts2:23 Ri are' xjach pa k'ab alak je jas ri u chomam ulok ri Dios
Acts2:24 Are c'u ri Dios xuc'astajisaj
Acts2:25 Je jas ri xubij ulok ri David chrij ri Jesus: ‘In quinwil amak'el ri Ajawaxel c'o chnuwäch. C'o pa ri nu wiquiak'ab
Acts2:26 Rumal wa' ri wanima' xquicotic
Acts2:27 Man quinya' ta c'u can chupam ri mukbal
Acts2:28 Xintijoj la che ri be re c'aslemal
Acts2:29 Wachalal
Acts2:30 Are c'u ri David k'axal tzij
Acts2:31 Ri David nabe canok xrilo jas ri cäc'ulmataj na. Xubij chi ri Crist cäc'astaj na. Xubij chi man cäcanaj ta wa' chupam ri mukbal mawi cäk'ay na ri u cuerp.
Acts2:32 We Jesus ri' xc'astajisax rumal ri Dios. Konojel c'u uj xkilo chi xc'astajic.
Acts2:33 Ri Jesus xwalijisaxic rech quet'uyul pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri Dios
Acts2:34 Man are' ta c'ut ri David ri xpaki' chicaj are' c'ut xbinic: ‘Xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Wajaw: Chatt'uyul pa nu wiquiak'ab
Acts2:35 c'ä quinban na chi ri qui banom qui c'ulel chawe quebux e u tac'alibal ri e awakan.’
Acts2:36 Chretamaj ba' ronojel ri tinimit Israel
Acts2:37 Aretak xquita' wa'
Acts2:38 Ri Lu' xutzelej u bixic chque: “Chq'uexa' c'u'x alak
Acts2:39 We chi'nic ri' chech alak xchi'x wi xukuje' chque ri e alc'ual alak
Acts2:40 Ri Lu' xubij niq'uiaj tzij chic chque ri winak. Naj xtzijon cuc'. Xebupixbej
Acts2:41 Je c'u ri' ri xquic'amowaj ri u tijonic
Acts2:42 Co c'u xec'oji' conojel chupam ri qui tijonic ri takomxenlab
Acts2:43 Conojel ri winak xquixe'j quib. Xeban q'ui mayibal xukuje' etal cumal ri takomxenlab.
Acts2:44 Ri xecojonic kas qui junam quib quequijachala' c'ut ri jastak quech chquixo'l.
Acts2:45 Quequic'ayila' tak ri culew xukuje' ri c'o cuc' caquijach c'u ri rajil chquiwäch jas ri u cholajil ri rajawaxic chque chquijujunal.
Acts2:46 Ronojel k'ij quequimulij quib pa ri rachoch Dios
Acts2:47 Cäquinimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios. Utz quebil wi cumal conojel ri winak; k'ij c'ut chi k'ij ri Ajawaxel quebutik che ri comon cojonelab ri quecolotajic.
Acts3:1 C'o c'u jun k'ij
Acts3:2 Catelex ulok jun achi ri ch'oco'j ulok kas pa ri u c'u'x ri u nan. Ronojel k'ij quelyok can chuchi' ri rachoch Dios
Acts3:3 Aretak xeril ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan chi oquem cäquiban chupam ri rachoch Dios
Acts3:4 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan xeca'y che. Xubij c'u ri Lu' che: “Chatca'y chke.”
Acts3:5 Ri achi xca'y chque
Acts3:6 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Sak puak
Acts3:7 Ri Lu' xuchap che ri u k'ab re u wiquiak'ab
Acts3:8 Ri ch'oco'j xtaq'ui'c
Acts3:9 Conojel ri winak ri xquilo chi ri achi cäbinic
Acts3:10 Cäquich'ob c'u u wäch chi are wa' ri cät'uyi' che u tz'onoxic u cochinic chuchi' ri oquibal pa ri rachoch Dios
Acts3:11 Ri ch'oco'j ri xcunaxic e u chapom ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan. Conojel ri winak xexiq'uinic
Acts3:12 Ri Lu'
Acts3:13 Ri u Dios ri Abraham
Acts3:14 Che u q'uexwäch ri are ta xtz'onoj alak ri u tzokopixic ri Jesus
Acts3:15 Xcämisaj alak ri jun ri xbanow ri c'aslemal. Xc'astajisax c'u wa' rumal ri Dios chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Ri uj c'ut xkilo chi kastzij xc'astajic.
Acts3:16 Rumal c'u ri cojonic che ri u bi' ri Jesus
Acts3:17 Camic c'ut
Acts3:18 Je c'u xbantaj wa' jas ri u bim ulok ri Dios pa qui chi' conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij: chi ri u Crist curik na c'ax.
Acts3:19 Rumal ri' q'uexa' c'u'x alak
Acts3:20 Cutak c'u ulok ri Jesus
Acts3:21 Are c'u ri camic rajawaxic chi cäcanaj na can pa ri caj c'ä pa ri k'ij aretak ri Dios quebusuc'umaj na conojel ri jastak
Acts3:22 Are' ri Moises xubij: ‘Ri Ajawaxel
Acts3:23 Ronojel c'ut ri man cäniman ta che we k'axal tzij ri'
Acts3:24 Conojel ri e k'axal tak tzij
Acts3:25 Alak ri' ri quechben alak ri chi'nic ri xebujekeba' ri Dios cumal ri e k'axal tak ri e u tzij
Acts3:26 Ri Dios
Acts4:1 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan c'ä cätajin quetzijon cuc' ri winak aretak xepe ri e cojol tabal tak tok'ob chquij
Acts4:2 Xpe coyowal chque ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan rumal rech chi quequitijoj ri winak
Acts4:3 Xequichapo
Acts4:4 E q'ui c'ut chque ri winak ri xquita' ri tijonic xecojonic. Cäraj ne xetz'akat job mil ri cajilabal ri cojonelab xuwi achijab.
Acts4:5 Chucab k'ij xepe ri e c'amal qui be ri aj judeyib xukuje' ri e nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri ajtijab re ri pixab
Acts4:6 Xukuje' c'o ri Anas ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob. E c'o ri Caipas
Acts4:7 Xquiya' takanic chi chetac'abax ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan pa qui niq'uiajil
Acts4:8 Ri Lu'
Acts4:9 We cäc'ot alak ka chi' camic chrij ri utzil ri banom che jun achi ri yawab
Acts4:10 chetamaj alak onojel alak
Acts4:11 We Jesus ri' are' ri abaj ri xetzelaj alak u wäch alak ri alak yacanelab are c'u uxinak ri abaj ri tz'apibal u wi' ri chac.
Acts4:12 Man c'o ta chi jun c'o ta wi colobal ib
Acts4:13 Aretak ri e nimak tak tatayib xquilo chi ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan man cäquixe'j ta quib quech'awic; xukuje' xquilo chi xak e winak ri man c'o ta quitijom wi quib quemayijinic; queta'm c'u qui wäch chi xec'oji' ruc' ri Jesus.
Acts4:14 Xquil ri achi ri xcunaxic
Acts4:15 Xequitako chi chebel bic pa ri k'atbal tzij. E elinak c'u bic ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan
Acts4:16 xquibij: “¿Jas cäkaban chque we achijab ri'? Kastzij c'ut
Acts4:17 Rech c'u man cäjabux ta u tzijoxic ri xc'ulmataj chquixo'l ri winak
Acts4:18 Xequisiq'uij
Acts4:19 Are' c'u ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan xquitzelej u bixic chque: “Chomaj alak we suc' chi are nabe cujniman chech alak chuwäch ri u nimaxic ri Dios.
Acts4:20 Man cujcuin ta c'ut chi ma ta cäkatzijoj ri kilom ri ka tom.”
Acts4:21 Xecoj c'u qui xib cumal ri k'atal tak tzij
Acts4:22 Are c'u ri achi ri xban wi we etal ri' re cunanic
Acts4:23 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan xetzokopix bic
Acts4:24 Ri e are'
Acts4:25 Xbij la rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios pa u chi' ri ka mam David
Acts4:26 Ri ajawinelab xukuje' ri k'atal tak tzij re ri uwächulew junam xquiwalijisaj quib chrij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' chrij ri Crist
Acts4:27 Kas c'u ne tzij ri Herod xukuje' ri Pons Pilat xquimulij quib waral
Acts4:28 Xquimulij quib che u banic ronojel ri c'utum ulok ojer rumal ri k'ab la xukuje' ri chomanic la
Acts4:29 Camic c'ut
Acts4:30 Ruc' ri chuk'ab la
Acts4:31 Aretak qui banom chi ch'awem ruc' Dios
Acts4:32 Ri q'uialaj cojonelab xa jun qui chomanic
Acts4:33 E are' c'u ri takomxenlab ruc' nimalaj cuinem xquibij chque ri winak chi ri Cajaw Jesus xquilo xc'astajic. Ri nimalaj u tok'ob ri Dios c'o paquiwi' conojel.
Acts4:34 Man c'o ta c'u jun chquixo'l ri c'o ta jas rajawaxic che. Conojel ri e c'o tak culew xukuje' cachoch
Acts4:35 cäquiya' pa qui k'ab ri takomxenlab. Ri e are' c'ut cäquijach wa chquiwäch ri c'o qui rajawaxic.
Acts4:36 C'o c'u jun achi Jose u bi'
Acts4:37 Ri Bernabe xuc'ayij jun rulew
Acts5:1 C'o jun achi Ananiy u bi'
Acts5:2 Ri Ananiy xresaj can jubik' che ri puak
Acts5:3 Xubij ri Lu': “Ananiy
Acts5:4 Aretak awech ri ulew
Acts5:5 Ri Ananiy
Acts5:6 Xepe c'u ri alabom
Acts5:7 Oc'owinak chi oxib jok'otaj
Acts5:8 Ri Lu' xubij che: “Chabij chwe: ¿la je xic'ayij wi wa' ri ch'akap iwulew?” Ri are' xubij: “Je'
Acts5:9 Xubij c'u ri Lu' che: “¿Jasche xuc'ul i c'u'x rech quic'ambejej ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel? Chawilampe'
Acts5:10 Chanim xtzak ri Sapir chuwäch ri Lu'
Acts5:11 Conojel c'ut ri comon cojonelab
Acts5:12 E q'ui c'ut etal xukuje' mayibal queban chquixo'l ri winak cumal ri takomxenlab. Conojel cäquimulij quib chupam ri u rakan ja ri Salomon.
Acts5:13 Man c'o ta jun chque ri jule' winak chic ri cucoch'taj curik ta rib cuc'
Acts5:14 Xeq'uiyir ri cajilabal ri winak ri xecojon che ri Ajawaxel
Acts5:15 Jeri' chi quequesaj ulok ri yawabib pa tak ri be
Acts5:16 Xukuje' cäquimulij quib chila' e q'ui winak e petinak pa tak ri tinimit ri e c'o chrij ri Jerusalen
Acts5:17 Ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' conojel ri e c'o ruc'
Acts5:18 Xequichap ri takomxenlab
Acts5:19 Chak'ab c'ut xpe jun u tako'n ri Ajawaxel
Acts5:20 “Jix
Acts5:21 Aretak xquita' wa'
Acts5:22 Aretak xebopan ri pataninelab
Acts5:23 Xquibij: “Kastzij
Acts5:24 Aretak xequita' we tzij ri'
Acts5:25 Te c'u ri' xpe jun
Acts5:26 Xel c'u bic ri qui nimal ri e chajil re ri rachoch Dios
Acts5:27 Aretak xec'amtaj ulok
Acts5:28 “Ri uj xekabij chiwe chi man quebitijoj ta chi ri winak pa ri u bi' ri Jesus. ¿Jas c'ut ri i banom ix? Chiwilampe'
Acts5:29 Ri Lu' xukuje' ri niq'uiaj takomxenlab chic xquitzelej u bixic: “Rajawaxic chke chi are nabe cäkanimaj ri cubij ri Dios chke man are ta c'ut ri cäquibij ri winak.
Acts5:30 Ri qui Dios ri e ka mam xuc'astajisaj ri Jesus ri xjach alak pa cämisaxic aretak xrip cho jun che'.
Acts5:31 Xnimarisax c'ut u k'ij we Jesus ri' rumal ri Dios
Acts5:32 Uj
Acts5:33 Ri nimak qui banic
Acts5:34 Xwalij c'u jun chque ri pariseyib chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij
Acts5:35 Te c'u ri' xubij chque ri k'atal tak tzij: “Tatayib aj israelib
Acts5:36 Rumal rech chi chquixe' can we k'ij ri' c'o jun achi Teuds u bi'. Ri are' xubij rib chi nim u banic. Xquimulij quib achijab ruc'
Acts5:37 Oc'owinak chi c'u wa'
Acts5:38 Camic c'ut quinbij chech alak: Tasa' ib alak chquij we achijab ri'
Acts5:39 We c'u ne rech ri Dios
Acts5:40 Xequisiq'uij ri takomxenlab
Acts5:41 Ri takomxenlab xebel c'u bic chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij. Quequicotic rumal rech chi ri Dios xuya' chque chi quetzelax qui wäch rumal rech ri u bi' ri Jesus.
Acts5:42 Ronojel k'ij c'ut quebe pa ri rachoch Dios
Acts6:1 Pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Acts6:2 Je c'u ri' ri cablajuj takomxenlab xequisiq'uij conojel ri cojonelab
Acts6:3 Chebitzucuj ba wukub achijab chixo'l
Acts6:4 Are c'u ri uj cujc'oji' amak'el pa ri ch'awem ruc' Dios xukuje' pa ri u tzijoxic ri u tzij ri Dios.”
Acts6:5 Xkaj ri tzij chquiwäch conojel
Acts6:6 Xequic'am c'u bic chquiwäch ri takomxenlab. Xquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios
Acts6:7 Cätajin cäq'uiy ri u tzij ri Dios
Acts6:8 Ri Estebn nojinak che tok'ob xukuje' ri u cuinem ri Dios. Ri are' cuban nimak tak mayibal xukuje' nimak tak etal chquixo'l ri winak.
Acts6:9 Jujun chque ri e c'o pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab ri binam Tzokopim tak Winak chque
Acts6:10 Man xecuin ta c'u ri winak che u to'ic quib chuwäch ri u tzij
Acts6:11 Xequitoj c'u jujun achijab
Acts6:12 Aretak xquita' we tzij ri'
Acts6:13 Xequitac'aba' achijab chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij
Acts6:14 Ka tom chi cubij
Acts6:15 Ri e k'atal tak tzij xukuje' ri e t'uyut'oj chila'
Acts7:1 Xubij c'ut ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob che ri Estebn: “¿La kas jewa' we jastak ri'?”
Acts7:2 Ri Estebn xubij: “Wachalal tak xukuje' tatayib
Acts7:3 Ri Dios xubij che: ‘Chayacan ri awulew xukuje' ri e awachaxic. Jät pa ri ulew ri quinc'ut na chawäch.’
Acts7:4 Xel c'u ulok pa ri culew ri winak aj caldeyib
Acts7:5 Man xuya' ta c'u jun rechbal chupam we ulew ri'
Acts7:6 Xubij c'u ri Dios che chi ri e rija'l quec'oji' na pa jun tinimit ri man qui tinimit taj
Acts7:7 Ri Dios xubij: ‘Ri in quink'at na tzij puwi' apachique nim tinimit ri cuban lok'om pataninelab chque. Aretak coc'ow na ri c'ax
Acts7:8 Chupam ri u c'ulwächinic
Acts7:9 “We e u c'ojol we Jacob ri'
Acts7:10 Xuto'tajisaj pa ri c'axc'olil. Xuya' u no'j
Acts7:11 Xc'oji' c'u wi'jal xukuje' nimalaj rikoj c'ax puwi' ronojel ri Ejipt xukuje' pa Canaan
Acts7:12 Aretak c'u xretamaj ri Jacob chi c'o trico pa Ejipt
Acts7:13 Aretak xebe che ri u camul
Acts7:14 Xtakan c'u ri Jose che u siq'uixic ri Jacob ri u tat xukuje' conojel ri e rachalal
Acts7:15 Xak jeri' xejekel ri Jacob pa Ejipt. Chila' xcäm wi. Xukuje' ri e ka mam xecäm chila'.
Acts7:16 Ri e u bakil ri Jacob xc'am bic pa Siquem
Acts7:17 “Nakaj chic ri k'ij aretak cuban na ri Dios jas ri u chi'm ulok che ri Abraham
Acts7:18 Te c'u ri' xoc jun achi chic che ajawinel puwi' ri Ejipt
Acts7:19 We ajawinel ri' xebusub ri e ka winakil
Acts7:20 Pa tak ri k'ij ri' xalax ri Moises
Acts7:21 Aretak c'ut q'uiaktajinak chi canok
Acts7:22 Xtijox ri Moises che ronojel ri qui no'j ri e aj Ejipt. Ticarel c'ut pa tak ri tzij
Acts7:23 Aretak c'o chi cawinak u junab
Acts7:24 C'o c'u jun k'ij xril jun u winakil ri cäban c'ax che rumal jun aj Ejipt. Xuto'o
Acts7:25 Pa ri u chomanic ri Moises
Acts7:26 Chucab k'ij chic
Acts7:27 Are c'u ri cätajin cuban c'ax che ri rachil xupakchi'j ri Moises
Acts7:28 ¿La are cawaj quinacämisaj
Acts7:29 Ri Moises
Acts7:30 E oc'owinak chi cawinak (40) junab
Acts7:31 Ri Moises xumay ri jun jasach ri xc'utwächin chuwäch. Xkeb che u ca'yexic
Acts7:32 Ri Ajawaxel xubij: ‘In ri' ri qui Dios ri a mam
Acts7:33 Ri Ajawaxel xubij che: ‘Chebawesaj ri xajäb chque ri e awakan
Acts7:34 Kas wilom ri qui c'axc'olil ri winak re ri nu tinimit ri e c'o pa Ejipt. Nu tom chi quebok'ic. In kajinak ulok che qui tzokopixic. Camic c'ut tasaj
Acts7:35 Are Moises wa'
Acts7:36 Are Moises wa' ri xebesan ulok ri ka mam. Xebuban mayibal xukuje' etal pa ri ulew Ejipt. Je xuban pa ri Quiäk Plo. Cawinak junab je xuban pa tak ri chaki'j uwo sak.
Acts7:37 Are Moises wa' ri xbin chque ri aj israelib: ‘Ri Ajawaxel
Acts7:38 Are Moises wa' ri xc'oji' cuc' ri comon aj israelib pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Acts7:39 “Ri e ka mam
Acts7:40 Xquibij che ri Aaron: ‘Chebabana' ka diosib
Acts7:41 Pa tak ri k'ij ri'
Acts7:42 Ri Dios xebuya' canok
Acts7:43 Man xiya' taj
Acts7:44 Xc'oji' ri Lic'om Rachoch re ri C'ulwächinic cuc' ri e ka mam pa ri chaki'j uwo sak
Acts7:45 Ri e ka mam xquic'am we Lic'om Rachoch Dios ri' che echbal
Acts7:46 Ri David xc'oji' ri u tok'ob ri Dios ruc'. Xutz'onoj chi chyok che chi cuban jun rachoch ri u Dios ri Jacob.
Acts7:47 Are c'u ri Salomon xyacow ri rachoch Dios.
Acts7:48 Pune' c'u ri Dios aj chicaj man cäc'oji' ta pa tak ja ri e banom che k'abaj
Acts7:49 ‘Ri caj are nu tem ajawibal
Acts7:50 ¿La ma ta nu k'ab e banowinak conojel we jastak ri'?’ ”
Acts7:51 Ri Estebn xutakej u bixic: “Ri alak amak'el uxinak alak tac
Acts7:52 ¿Jachin ta chque ri e k'axal tak tzij ri ma ta xban c'ax che cumal tak ri e mam alak? Ri e are' xequicämisaj jachin tak ri xeyo'w u bixic ri u petic ri suc' ulinak c'ut
Acts7:53 Alak ri xc'am alak ri pixab cumal ri tako'nib aj caj
Acts7:54 Aretak xequita' jas xubij ri Estebn
Acts7:55 Nojinak c'u ri Estebn che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios
Acts7:56 Xubij: “¡Chilampe' alak! Quebenwil ri caj e jakajoj
Acts7:57 C'äte ri' ri winak xquirak qui chi' ruc' chuk'ab
Acts7:58 Xquesaj bic chuchi' ri tinimit
Acts7:59 Xquibuc' ri Estebn che abaj. Ri Estebn xuta' ri u to'banic ri Ajawaxel
Acts7:60 Xxuquic
Acts8:1 Ri Sawl are' jun xuya' u tzij che ri u cämisaxic ri Estebn. Pa ri k'ij ri'
Acts8:2 Jujun tak achijab ri e nimanelab che ri Dios
Acts8:3 Are c'u ri Sawl cutuquij ri comon cojonelab
Acts8:4 Are c'u ri cojonelab ri xquijabuj quib
Acts8:5 Ri Pelip
Acts8:6 Ri winak caquimulij quib
Acts8:7 E q'ui ri c'o itzel tak uxlabal chque
Acts8:8 Jeri' chi conojel ri winak pa ri tinimit ri' sibalaj xequicotic.
Acts8:9 C'o jun achi Simon u bi'
Acts8:10 Conojel ri winak
Acts8:11 Xquitatabej ri u tzij
Acts8:12 Aretak c'u xecojon chque ri e utzalaj tak tzijol rech ri rajawibal ri Dios xukuje' ri rech ri Jesucrist ri xebutzijoj ri Pelip chque
Acts8:13 Xukuje' ne ri Simon xcojonic
Acts8:14 Ri takomxenlab ri e c'o pa Jerusalen
Acts8:15 E are c'u ri' xekaj bic
Acts8:16 C'ä majok c'u chpetok ri Ruxlabal ri Dios puwi' jachin jun chque; xak xuwi c'u banom ri qui bautism pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel Jesus.
Acts8:17 Are' c'u ri Lu' xukuje' ri Xuan xequiya' ri qui k'ab paquiwi'

Acts8:20 Are c'u ri Lu' xutzelej u bixic che: “¡Ri a puak chsach u wäch awuc'
Acts8:21 Ri at man ya'tal ta jubik' chawe chi cac'amowaj
Acts8:22 Chaq'uexa' ri a c'u'x
Acts8:23 Quinwil c'ut chi at nojinak che c'ayil
Acts8:24 Ri Simon xubij che: “Chibochi'j ba' ri Ajawaxel panuwi'
Acts8:25 Aretak e k'alajisaninak chic quiyo'm chi c'ut ri u tzij ri Dios
Acts8:26 Are c'u ri tako'n aj caj re ri Ajawaxel xuch'abej ri Pelip
Acts8:27 Ri Pelip xwalij c'ut
Acts8:28 Cätajin cätzelejic
Acts8:29 Ri Uxlabaxel xubij che ri Pelip: “Jät ruc' ri achi ri c'o pa ri carwaj.”
Acts8:30 Ri Pelip xxiq'uinic
Acts8:31 Ri aj Etiopiy xubij: “¿Jas ta quinban che u ch'obic

Acts8:33 Xmach'irisaxic

Acts8:35 Ri Pelip xch'awic
Acts8:36 Oc'owinak chi c'u jubik'
Acts8:37 Ri Pelip xubij: “We catcojon ruc' ronojel awanima'
Acts8:38 Xutak c'ut u chacabaxic ri carwaj; e quieb c'ut xekaj bic jawije' c'o wi ja'

Acts9:1 Are' c'u ri Sawl man u tanabam ta u cojic xibin ib re cämical chque ri cojonelab che ri Ajawaxel. Rumal ri'

Acts9:3 Benak pa ri be
Acts9:4 Xtzak c'u ri Sawl pa ulew
Acts9:5 Ri Sawl xuban c'otoj chi'aj: “¿Ajawaxel
Acts9:6 Chatwalijok. Chatoc bic pa ri tinimit. Cäbix c'u na chawe jas ri rajawaxic cabano.”
Acts9:7 Ri achijab ri e benak ruc' ri Sawl xetaq'ui'c
Acts9:8 Xwalij c'u ri Sawl cho ri ulew; xebujak ri u bak'wäch

Acts9:12 Pa jun c'utwächinic c'ut
Acts9:13 Ri Ananiy xubij che: “Wajaw
Acts9:14 Yo'm c'u takanic pa u k'ab cumal ri c'amal qui be ri e cojol tabal tok'ob chi quebuyut bic conojel ri caquinataj ri bi' la.”
Acts9:15 Xubij ri Ajawaxel che: “Jät. Nu cha'om c'ut we achi ri' rech quinuk'alajisaj chquiwäch ri winak ri e re jule' nimak tak tinimit chic
Acts9:16 Quinc'ut c'u na chuwäch joropa' ri q'uialaj c'ax curik na rumal rech ri nu bi'.”
Acts9:17 C'äte ri' xbe ri Ananiy
Acts9:18 Chanim xetzak chque ri e u bak'wäch ri Sawl jujun jasach ri e je ta ne solot
Acts9:19 Xwa' c'ut
Acts9:20 Chanim ri Sawl xutzijoj ri Jesus chque ri winak pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xubij chi ri Jesus are ri u C'ojol ri Dios.
Acts9:21 Conojel ri xquitatabej ri u tzij
Acts9:22 Are c'u ri Sawl sibalaj xucoj u chuk'ab
Acts9:23 E oc'owinak chi c'u q'ui k'ij
Acts9:24 Ri are' c'ut xretamaj ri qui chomanic. Ri aj judeyib queyem ri Sawl chquichi' tak ri roquibal ri tinimit chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab rech cäquicämisaj.
Acts9:25 E are' c'u ri cojonelab
Acts9:26 Aretak ri Sawl xopan pa Jerusalen
Acts9:27 Are c'u ri Bernabe xuc'am bic chquiwäch ri takomxenlab. Xutzijoj chque chi ri Sawl rilom ri Ajawaxel pa ri be
Acts9:28 Xcanaj can ri Sawl cuc'
Acts9:29 Xebutzijobej xukuje' xchomalan cuc' ri aj judeyib ri quech'aw pa grieg; ri e are' c'ut cäquitzucuj u cämisaxic.

Acts10:1 C'o jun achi pa ri tinimit Sesarey

Acts10:3 Pa jun k'ij

Acts10:8 Aretak u tzijom chi ronojel chque
Acts10:9 Chucab k'ij
Acts10:10 Xpe c'u jun nimalaj numic che

Acts10:12 Chupam c'ut e c'o wi ronojel qui wäch awaj cajcaj cakan awaj ri cäquijuruj quib xukuje' awaj ri e c'o qui xic'.

Acts10:14 Ri Lu' xubij: “Jayi'

Acts10:41 Man xuc'ut ta rib chquiwäch conojel ri winak

Acts13:5 Aretak e c'o pa Salamin

Acts13:20 Ronojel wa' cäraj xbeytaj quiejeb sient cawinak lajuj (450) junab. Chuwi' chi c'u wa' xebuya' c'amal tak qui be

Acts13:24 Majok cäpe ri Jesus

Acts13:26 “Wachalal
Acts13:27 Ri e aj Jerusalen xukuje' ri e c'amal qui be man xquich'ob ta u wäch ri Jesus. Man xquich'ob taj ri tz'ibatal cumal ri e k'axal tak tzij ri cäsiq'uix u wäch ronojel k'ij re uxlanem. Xequitz'akatisaj aretak xquic'okoj ri Jesus.
Acts13:28 Pune' c'u man c'o jun mac xquirik ta chrij ri takal ta wi u cämisaxic
Acts13:29 Aretak xbantaj ronojel jas ri tz'ibam chrij
Acts13:30 Are c'u ri Dios xuc'astajisaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib.
Acts13:31 “Q'uialaj k'ij ri Jesus xuc'utula' rib chquiwäch ri winak ri e c'o ruc' aretak xel ulok pa Galiley
Acts13:32 Je c'u ri' ri uj cätajin cäkatzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij chiwe: Ri chi'nic ri xuban ri Dios chque ri e ka mam
Acts13:33 u tz'akatisam c'u chke uj ri uj quija'lil. Xuban c'u wa' aretak xuc'astajisaj ri Jesus
Acts13:34 Ri Dios xuc'astajisaj ri Jesus chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Mawi c'u jubik' cätzelej na pa ri jul rech cäk'ay ri u cuerp. Jeri' xubij pa ri Tz'ibatalic: Quebentz'akatisaj na ri e tastalicalaj tak xukuje' ri kas e chi'nic ri xebenbij che ri David.
Acts13:35 Rumal ri' cubij xukuje' pa jun salm chic: Man cäya' ta la che ri tastalic pataninel la chi cäk'ay ri u cuerp.

Acts13:40 Chichajij iwib

Acts15:7 Aretak q'ui ri tzij xquibij chbil tak quib
Acts15:8 Ri Dios
Acts15:9 Ri Dios man jalan ta queril ri e are' chkawäch uj
Acts15:10 Camic c'ut
Acts15:11 Ri xane' rumal ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel Jesus uj cojoninak rech cujcolotajic
Acts15:12 Conojel c'ut man xech'aw ta chic. Xequitatabej ri Bernabe xukuje' ri Pawl
Acts15:13 Xbitaj wa' cumal xch'aw ri Santiag
Acts15:14 Ri Simon Lu' u bim chke jas ri xuban ri Dios che u tok'obisaxic qui wäch ri man aj judeyib taj nabe mul rech cäresaj jun tinimit chquixo'l ri e rech ri are'.
Acts15:15 Wa' cajunamataj ruc' ri xquitz'ibaj ri e k'axal tak tzij
Acts15:16 ‘Oc'owinak chi wa' quintzelej na ulok quinban c'u na u banic ri tzakinakalaj rachoch ri David; quinban na u banic ri u tzakinaquil quinyac china'
Acts15:17 rech ri niq'uiaj chic cäquitzucuj na ri Ajawaxel junam cuc' conojel ri nimak tak tinimit ri e tastal che ri nu bi'.
Acts15:18 Ri Ajawaxel
Acts15:19 Rumal ri'
Acts15:20 Cubana' chi ka tz'ibaj bic chque chi chquitasa' quib maquinak apachique jasach awasim cumal ri diosib
Acts15:21 Kas pa ri ojer tak k'ij c'ä camic
Acts15:22 Ri takomxenlab xukuje' tak ri tatayib ri quetakan ri comon cojonelab pa Jerusalen xukuje' conojel ri e re ri comon cojonelab utz xquilo ri qui cha'ic achijab chquixo'l che qui takic bic pa Antioquiy rech quecachilaj bic ri Pawl rachil ri Bernabe. Xquicha' c'u ri Juds ri cäbix Barsabas che rachil ri Silas
Acts15:23 Xquitz'ibaj jun wuj
Acts15:24 Ka tom c'ut chi jujun ri e elinak bic chkaxo'l ri man c'o ta takanic ka yo'm bic chque ri e qui yo'm latz' chiwe cumal tak ri e qui tzij
Acts15:25 Xa jun ka chomanic
Acts15:26 E are' achijab wa' ri qui jachom ri qui c'aslemal pa cämic rumal rech ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist.

Acts15:29 Mebitij qui ti'jal awaj ri e chi'm che tabal tok'ob chque ri e diosib

Acts15:35 Ri Pawl rachil ri Bernabe xecanaj can pa Antioquiy cuc' q'uia kachalal chic
Acts15:36 E oc'owinak chi jujun k'ij
Acts15:37 Ri Bernabe are ta xraj xuc'am bic ri Xuan che cachil
Acts15:38 Are c'u ri Pawl xuchomaj chi man utz taj cäquic'am bic we achi ri' che cachil
Acts15:39 Nim c'ut ri c'ulelanib xwalij chquixo'l chi xquitasquib ri jun che ri jun chic. Ri Bernabe xuc'am bic ri Marcux
Acts15:40 Ri Pawl xucha' ri Silas
Acts15:41 Xeboc'ow pa Siriy
Acts16:1 Xebopan pa Derb xukuje' pa Listr. C'o chila' jun cojonel Timotey u bi'
Acts16:2 Ri Timotey utz u tzijol cumal ri kachalal ri e c'o pa Listr xukuje' ri e c'o pa Icon.
Acts16:3 Ri Pawl xraj chi cäbe ri Timotey ruc'. Xuc'amo
Acts16:4 Chque ri achalal pa conojel ri tinimit ri xeboc'ow wi xequiya' can quibixic ri xequichomaj ri takomxenlab xukuje' tak ri e tatayib ri quetakan ri comon cojonelab pa Jerusalen.
Acts16:5 Je c'u ri' ri cojonelab que tak ri e comon cojonelab co xetac'abax pa ri qui cojonic. Ronojel k'ij queq'uiyiric.
Acts16:6 Xeboc'ow pa Prij. Xeboc'ow pa tak ri tinimit aj Galas. Xek'atix c'u rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios che u tzijoxic ri tzij chque ri winak ri e c'o pa Asiy.
Acts16:7 Aretak xebopan chuxe' Misiy
Acts16:8 Xeboc'ow bic pa u xcut ri Misiy
Acts16:9 Chak'ab xuc'ut rib jun c'utwächinic chuwäch ri Pawl. Xril jun achi aj Masedon xutac'aba' rib chuwäch
Acts16:10 Xuwi c'u xilitaj ri c'utwächinic rumal ri Pawl xkasuc'umaj ri ka bic pa Masedon. Xkach'obo chi are ri Dios xujsiq'uin che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij chque ri winak chila'.
Acts16:11 Aretak uj elinak chi bic pa Troas pa jun nim jucub
Acts16:12 Xujel c'u bic chila' are ri tinimit nim u banic pa ri ch'akap ulew ri' re Masedon e q'ui ri aj romab e c'o chila'. Xujbeyetaj c'u quieb oxib k'ij chila'.
Acts16:13 Pa jun k'ij re uxlanem xujel bic chrij ri roquibal tinimit chunakaj ri nima'. Xkachomaj c'ut chi chila' nak'atisam wi ri u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios. Xujt'uyic
Acts16:14 C'o jun chuchu' Lidiy u bi'
Acts16:15 Xban c'ut ri bautism junam cuc' conojel ri e c'o chupam ri rachoch
Acts16:16 Xc'ulmataj c'u jumul chi uj benak pa jun c'olbal che u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios
Acts16:17 We ali ri' xuterenej ri Pawl xukuje' ri uj curak u chi': “¡We achijab ri' e pataninel rech ri Dios ri aj chicaj
Acts16:18 Q'ui k'ij chi c'ut je cuban wa'. Jeri' chi xq'uistaj u c'u'x ri Pawl
Acts16:19 Ri e rajaw ri ali
Acts16:20 Xequitac'aba' chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij xquibij: “We achijab ri' cätajin cäcan c'ax che ri ka tinimit
Acts16:21 Cäquibij jujun tak nak'atisabal chke. Ri man takal ta qui banic kumal
Acts16:22 Xewalij c'u ri winak chquij. Ri e k'atal tak tzij xquiya' takanic chi chebesax ri catz'iak cherapux c'ut cuc' xic'ay.
Acts16:23 Aretak sibalaj e qui rapum chic
Acts16:24 Xuc'am we takomal ri' ri chajil u chi' che'

Acts16:26 Xak c'u c'ätetal xuban jun nimalaj cabrakan
Acts16:27 Aretak ri chajil re ri che' xc'astajic
Acts16:28 Ri Pawl co xch'awic
Acts16:29 Ri chajil re ri che' xuta' jun chäj
Acts16:30 Xeresaj apanok
Acts16:31 Ri e are' xquibij: “Chatcojon che ri Ajawaxel Jesus
Acts16:32 Xquibij ri u tzij ri Dios che ri achi xukuje' chque conojel ri e c'o cho rachoch.
Acts16:33 Kas c'u pa ri jok'otaj chak'ab
Acts16:34 Xebuc'am bic cho rachoch

Acts16:37 Are c'u ri Pawl xubij chque: “Xujquich'ay c'u chuwäch ri tinimit
Acts16:38 Ri ajch'imiyab xequiya' u bixic we tzij ri' chque ri e k'atal tak tzij. Xquixe'j c'u quib aretak xquito chi aj romab.
Acts16:39 Xepe ri e k'atal tak tzij

Acts17:1 Xeboc'ow pa Anpipolis xukuje' pa Apolon
Acts17:2 Ri Pawl
Acts17:3 Xuk'alajisaj chquiwäch chi ri Crist xurik na c'ax aretak c'u cäminak chic cac'astaj na. “Ri Jesus c'ut ri quinya' u bixic chech alak are' Crist wa'
Acts17:4 Jujun chque xecojonic
Acts17:5 Are c'u ri aj judeyib ri man quecojon taj
Acts17:6 Aretak c'u man xequirik taj
Acts17:7 ¡E u c'ulam c'ut ri Jason pa ri rachoch! ¡Conojel we winak ri' cäquic'ulelaj ri u takanic ri nimalaj k'atal tzij aj Rom
Acts17:8 Aretak xquita' wa'
Acts17:9 Aretak qui c'amom chi ri puak ri xuya' ri Jason xukuje' ri niq'uiaj chic
Acts17:10 Ri kachalal chak'ab xequitak bic ri Pawl xukuje' ri Silas pa Berey. Aretak xebopanic
Acts17:11 Sibalaj utz ri qui no'j ri aj Berey chquiwäch ri e c'o pa Tesalon. Xquic'am ri tzij ruc' ronojel canima'. K'ij chi k'ij cäquitzucuj chupam ri Tz'ibatalic
Acts17:12 Je c'u ri' e q'ui chque ri aj judeyib xecojonic. Xecojon chuchuyib aj Gres ri nimak qui k'ij. Xukuje' xecojon e q'ui achijab aj gresib.
Acts17:13 Aretak xquetamaj ri aj judeyib ri e c'o pa Tesalon chi xukuje' pa Berey catzijox ri u tzij ri Dios rumal ri Pawl
Acts17:14 E are' c'u ri kachalal xquitak bic ri Pawl che u suq'uil ri plo
Acts17:15 Ri xec'amow bic ri Pawl
Acts17:16 Aretak ri Pawl e reyem ri Silas xukuje' ri Timotey pa Atens
Acts17:17 Rumal ri' xbe pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Chila' cätzijon wi cuc' ri aj judeyib xukuje' niq'uiaj winak chic ri cäquik'ijilaj ri Dios. K'ij c'ut chi k'ij cachomanlan cuc' ri winak ri caquimulij quib cho ri c'ayibal.
Acts17:18 E c'o c'u ne jujun ajchomanelab aj epicurib xukuje' aj estoiquib xquichaplej chomanic ruc'. Jujun c'ut caquibij: rech “¿Jas lo ri cäraj we rok'ok'enel ri?” Niq'uiaj chi c'ut caquibij: “Je' ta ne ri quebutzijoj jule' diosib chic.” Je xquibij rumal rech chi ri Pawl cutzijoj ri Jesus chque
Acts17:19 Xquic'am c'u bic pa ri Areop
Acts17:20 Cäkamay ri jastak ri cabij chke. Cäkaj cäkach'obo jas quel cubij wa'.”
Acts17:21 Conojel c'u ri aj atensib xukuje' ri man e aj chila' taj ri e c'o chquixo'l
Acts17:22 Xtaq'ui' c'u ri Pawl pa u niq'uiajil ri Areop
Acts17:23 Aretak xinwacatic
Acts17:24 Ri Dios ri xbanow ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'o chuwäch
Acts17:25 Ri are' man cäpatanix ta cumal winak
Acts17:26 Xa' c'u che jun achi xeresaj wi conojel ri nimak tak tinimit
Acts17:27 rech cäquitzucuj ri Dios
Acts17:28 Rumal c'u ri Dios uj c'aslic
Acts17:29 Uj rija'l ri Dios

Acts18:1 E oc'owinak chi c'u we jastak ri'
Acts18:2 Chila' xurik wi jun aj judey Aquil u bi'
Acts18:3 Rumal c'u rech chi junam u wäch ri qui chac
Acts18:4 Ronojel k'ij re uxlanem cäbe ri Pawl pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Cucoj c'u u chuk'ab rech caquiq'uex qui c'u'x ri aj judeyib xukuje' ri man aj judeyib taj.
Acts18:5 Aretak ri Silas ruc' ri Timotey xebel bic pa Masedon
Acts18:6 Are c'u ri are' xquik'atij u wäch ri u tzij xukuje' xeyok'onic
Acts18:7 Xel bic chila'
Acts18:8 Ri Crisp
Acts18:9 Chak'ab pa jun c'utwächinic xubij ri Ajawaxel che ri Pawl: “Maxe'j awib; chatakej u ya'ic ri tijonic matanaba' tzijonem.
Acts18:10 Ri in in c'o awuc'. Man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u banic c'ax chawe. E c'o c'u q'ui nu winak chupam we tinimit ri'.”
Acts18:11 Jun junab ruc' wakib ic' xc'oji' ri Pawl chila'. Xebutijoj ri winak che ri u tzij ri Dios.
Acts18:12 Aretak c'ut ri Galion are k'atal tzij pa Acay
Acts18:13 Xquibij che ri k'atal tzij: “We achi ri' quebuch'äc ri winak chi chquik'ijilaj ri Dios pa jun nak'atisabal ri cuc'ulelaj ri pixab.”
Acts18:14 Xa' c'u co'l man quech'aw ri Pawl aretak ri Galion xubij chque ri aj judeyib: “We ta jun nimalaj il
Acts18:15 We c'u ri jasach ri cabij alak chwe xa' e re tzij
Acts18:16 Xeresaj c'u bic pa ri k'atbal tzij.
Acts18:17 C'äte ri' conojel xquichap ri Sostens
Acts18:18 Q'ui k'ij xcanaj chi na' ri Pawl pa Corint. Xebuya' c'u can ri achalal
Acts18:19 Xebopan c'u pa Epes. Xutas rib chquij ri Aquil xukuje' ri Prisil. Xoc pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xebutzijobej c'ut ri aj judeyib ri caquimulij quib chila'.
Acts18:20 Xbochi'x cumal wa' chi cäcanaj can q'ui k'ij cuc'. Are c'u ri Pawl man xraj taj.
Acts18:21 Xane' xebujach canok
Acts18:22 Xkaj c'u can pa Sesarey
Acts18:23 Xc'oji' q'ui k'ij chila'

Acts18:25 Ri are' tijom che ri u be ri Ajawaxel. Sibalaj c'o u chuk'ab pa ri u tzij. Quebutijoj ri winak cutzijoj ri Jesus ruc' tz'akatiquil
Acts18:26 Ri Apols xuchaplej tzijonic pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xucoj u chuk'ab che ri tzijonic
Acts18:27 Aretak ri Apols xraj xk'ax pa Acay
Acts18:28 Ruc' sibalaj tijoj chuk'ab xebuc'ulelaj ri aj judeyib chquiwäch ri winak
Acts19:1 Aretak c'ä c'o ri Apols pa Corint
Acts19:2 Xubij chque: “¿La i c'amom ri Ruxlabal ri Dios aretak xixcojonic?” Ri e are' xquibij che: “Mawi ne ka tom we c'o Ruxlabal ri Dios.”
Acts19:3 Ri Pawl xuta' chque: “¿Jas bautism i c'amom?” Ri e are' xquitzelej u bixic: “Are' ri u bautism ri Xuan.”
Acts19:4 Ri Pawl xubij chque: “Ri Xuan xuban ri qui bautism ri winak re q'uexbal c'uxaj. Xubij c'u chque ri winak chi checojon che ri cäpe na chrij are'
Acts19:5 Aretak xquita' wa'
Acts19:6 ri Pawl xuya' ri u k'ab paquiwi'
Acts19:7 Cäraj e cablajuj ri achijab.
Acts19:8 Xoc bic ri Pawl pa ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xucoj u chuk'ab chila' che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij
Acts19:9 E c'o c'u jujun xquicowirisaj ri canima'
Acts19:10 Quieb junab c'ut je xquibano. Jeri' chi conojel ri e c'o pa Asiy
Acts19:11 Ri Dios xebuban nimak tak mayibal rumal ri Pawl.
Acts19:12 Jeri' chi xukuje' ne tak ri su't o atz'iak ri quebunak ri u cuerp quec'am bic chque tak ri yawabib
Acts19:13 E c'o jujun aj judeyib ri xak quebinicatic
Acts19:14 E c'o c'u wukub u c'ojol jun aj judey Eseb u bi' ri xebanow wa'. Ri Eseb are c'amal qui be ri cojol tabal tok'ob.
Acts19:15 Ri itzel uxlabal xutzelej u wäch qui tzij
Acts19:16 Ri achi ri c'o wi ri itzel uxlabal
Acts19:17 Xetamax c'u wa' cumal conojel ri e c'o pa Epes
Acts19:18 E q'ui chque ri e cojoninak xepetic
Acts19:19 Xukuje' e q'ui chque ri qui banom k'ijinic
Acts19:20 Je c'u ri'
Acts19:21 Aretak e bantajinak chic we jastak ri'
Acts19:22 Xebutak bic quieb chque ri quetoban ruc'
Acts19:23 Pa tak ri k'ijol ri' xban jun nimalaj tuquin ib pa Epes rumal rech ri C'ac' Be.
Acts19:24 C'o c'u jun achi Demetr u bi'
Acts19:25 Ri Demetr xebumulij ri ajchaquib cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic ri je tak qui chac wa'
Acts19:26 Quiwilo
Acts19:27 Sibalaj c'ax wa' we ne quetzelax na u wäch we ka chac ri'. Xukuje' sibalaj c'ax wa' we ne ri winak cäquichomaj chi man c'o ta u patan ri rachoch ri ixok dios Artems ri nim u k'ij. Je c'u ri' man cäya' ta chi u k'ij ri ka dios ri cäk'ijilax cumal conojel ri winak re Asiy xukuje' ronojel ri uwächulew.”
Acts19:28 Aretak xquita' wa'
Acts19:29 Conojel ri winak pa ri tinimit xsach qui c'u'x. Junam qui wäch aninak xebe pa ri c'olbal ri cäquimulij wi quib ri winak. Xequichap ri Gay ruc' ri Aristarc
Acts19:30 Xraj ta c'u ri Pawl xoc bic chquixo'l ri winak; ri cojonelab c'ut man xquiya' ta che.
Acts19:31 Xukuje' niq'uiaj chque ri nimak qui banic aj Asiy
Acts19:32 Ri winak xquirak qui chi'
Acts19:33 Xquesaj bic ri Alejandr chquixo'l ri winak. Ri aj judeyib xquich'icmij bic. E c'o c'u jujun xquibij che jas ri tajin cäbanic. Ri Alejandr xuban etal ruc' ri u k'ab chubixic chque chi mech'aw chic
Acts19:34 Aretak ri winak xquetamaj chi ri are' aj judey
Acts19:35 Aretak ri ajtz'ib re ri tinimit xcuinic xubano chi ri winak cäquitatabej ri cubij
Acts19:36 Are c'u wa' man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cubij chi man kastzij taj. Rajawaxic c'ut chi quixtäni che ri rakoj chi'aj. Rajawaxic chi c'o mibano ri ma ta quichomaj na.
Acts19:37 E i c'amom c'u ulok we achijab ri'. Ri e are' c'ut man cäquetzelaj ta u wäch ri i dios
Acts19:38 Are c'u ri Demetr xukuje' ri ajchaquib ri quena'w che u banic jastak re sak puak
Acts19:39 We c'o c'u jun jasach chic ri quitz'onoj
Acts19:40 We ne cäcoj tzij chkij rumal rech ri xc'ulmataj mier
Acts19:41 Xbitaj c'u wa' rumal

Acts20:22 Are c'u ri camic
Acts20:23 Xak xuwi weta'm chi pa tak conojel tinimit ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cuk'alajisaj chnuwäch chi quinqueyej ri u pa che' xukuje' ri c'axc'olil.
Acts20:24 Man are ta quinwilij ri nu c'aslemal
Acts20:25 Camic c'ut
Acts20:26 Rumal c'u ri'
Acts20:27 Nu tzijom c'u ronojel ri u chomanic ri Dios chiwe. Man c'o ta jas ma ta xinbij chiwe.
Acts20:28 Chichajij iwib. Chichajij ronojel ri jumulaj chij ri yo'm pa i k'ab rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. Xuya' pa i k'ab rech quebiyuk'uj ri e comon cojonelab rech ri Dios
Acts20:29 Weta'm c'ut chi aretak in benak chic
Acts20:30 Xukuje' chixo'l ix quewalij wi na winak ri cäquitzijoj na jech'laj tak jastak
Acts20:31 Rumal c'u ri' chixc'asc'atok. Chnataj chiwe jas xinban in chixo'l. Oxib junab chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij
Acts20:32 Camic c'ut
Acts20:33 Man nu rayim ta c'u u wäch ri u sak puak
Acts20:34 Ix c'ut iweta'm chi xinchacun cuc' ri nu k'ab rech xinch'äc ri xajwataj chwe xukuje' ri xajwataj chque ri e c'o wuc'.
Acts20:35 Pa ronojel xinc'ut chiwäch chi je chixchacun wa'. Jeri' quebito' ri c'o cajwataj chque. Chnataj ta c'u chiwe ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel Jesus

Acts21:8 Chucab k'ij xujel bic

Acts21:10 Xujc'oji' na quieb oxib k'ij. Xkaj c'u ulok pa Judey jun k'axal tzij chila'

Acts21:18 Chucab k'ij chic xbe ri Pawl kuc'
Acts21:19 Aretak u yo'm chi rutzil qui wäch
Acts21:20 Aretak xquito
Acts21:21 Ri e are' qui tom u tzijol chi quebatijoj ri aj judeyib ri e c'o chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj che u tasic quib chrij ri u pixab ri Moises
Acts21:22 ¿Jas c'u lo ri caban camic? Kastzij ri winak cäquita' na chi at ulinak.
Acts21:23 Chabana' ba wa' ri cäkabij chawe: E c'o quiejeb achijab chkaxo'l
Acts21:24 Chebac'ama' bic awuc'
Acts21:25 Uj tz'ibaninak c'u bic chque ri man aj judeyib taj ri e cojoninak
Acts21:26 Ri Pawl xebuc'am c'u bic ri quiejeb achijab. Chucab chi c'u k'ij xquijosk'ij quib. Xeboc c'ut pa ri rachoch Dios che u bixic jampa' quetz'akat ri k'ij re ri qui josk'ixic
Acts21:27 Aretak xa' c'ol man quetz'akat ri wukub k'ij
Acts21:28 Xquirak qui chi': “¡Achijab aj israelib
Acts21:29 Quilom c'u can ri Tropim aj Epes ruc' ri Pawl pa ri tinimit; pa ri qui chomanic c'ut chi ri Pawl xucoj bic pa ri rachoch Dios.
Acts21:30 Ronojel c'u ri tinimit xutuquij rib. Xquimulij quib ri winak. Xquichap ri Pawl
Acts21:31 Cämisaxic c'u rij cumal
Acts21:32 Chanim c'ut xebuc'am bic ajch'ojab cuc' ri e qui nimakil. Aninak xebec
Acts21:33 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab xopan ruc' ri Pawl
Acts21:34 Ri winak xquirak qui chi'
Acts21:35 Aretak xebopan cho tak ri u ware ri k'am
Acts21:36 Ri winak c'ut e teren chrij
Acts21:37 Xa' co'l man cäcoj bic ri Pawl chupam ri cachoch ri ajch'ojab
Acts21:38 ¿La man at ri' ri aj Ejipt ri quieb oxib k'ij chi wa' xebutuquij ri winak
Acts21:39 Xubij c'u ri Pawl: “In in aj judey. In aj Tars
Acts21:40 Aretak xya' che
Acts22:1 “Wachalalib
Acts22:2 Aretak c'u xquita' chi quebuch'abej pa ri ch'abal hebrey
Acts22:3 “In kastzij in aj judey. Xinalax pa Tars re Silisiy
Acts22:4 Xinban c'ax chque ri winak re ri C'ac' Be c'ä pa ri qui cämisaxic. Xebenyutu
Acts22:5 Xukuje' ne ri c'amal qui be ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e nimak tak tatayib xquilo jas ri xinbano
Acts22:6 “Xc'ulmataj c'ut chi aretak in benak
Acts22:7 Xintzak pa ulew
Acts22:8 In xinbij che: ‘¿Jachin ri' ri lal
Acts22:9 Ri e c'o wuc' xquil ri sakilal
Acts22:10 Xinbij c'ut: ‘¿Jas caj la chi quinbano
Acts22:11 Man c'u xinca'y ta chic
Acts22:12 C'äte ri' xpe jun achi Ananiy u bi'. Are jun achi cunimaj ri u pixab ri Moises
Acts22:13 Xopan c'u ri Ananiy wuc'
Acts22:14 Ri are' xubij chwe: ‘Ri qui Dios ri ka mam at u cha'om ulok rech cach'ob ri u rayibal
Acts22:15 Cak'alajisaj c'u na ri Are' chquiwäch conojel ri winak jas ri awilom xukuje' jas ri a tom.
Acts22:16 Are c'u ri camic
Acts22:17 “Aretak c'u xintzelej ulok pa Jerusalen
Acts22:18 Xinwil ri Ajawaxel
Acts22:19 Ri in xinbij che: ‘Wajaw
Acts22:20 Aretak xturuw ri u quiq'uel ri Estebn ri xuk'alajisaj ri tzij la chquiwäch ri winak
Acts22:21 Xubij c'u ri Ajawaxel chwe: ‘Jät
Acts22:22 C'ä chi' ri winak xquitatabej wi ri u tzij ri Pawl. C'äte ri' xquirak qui chi'
Acts22:23 Cäquirak qui chi'
Acts22:24 Rumal ri' ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab xtakanic chi cäcoj bic ri Pawl pa ri cachoch ri ajch'ojab. Xtakan che u rapuxic xukuje' che u c'otic u chi'
Acts22:25 Aretak cätajin cäquiyut che ri ximibal
Acts22:26 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab
Acts22:27 Xopan c'u ri qui nimal ri jun mil ajch'ojab
Acts22:28 Xubij ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab: “Ri in ruc' nimalaj puak xincuinic xinux aj rom.” Xubij c'u ri Pawl: “Ri in in aj rom xinalaxic.”
Acts22:29 Chanim c'ut ri ajch'ojab ri cäquic'ot na u chi' xquitas quib chrij ri Pawl. Sibalaj xuxe'j rib ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab aretak xretamaj chi aj rom
Acts22:30 Chucab k'ij c'ut
Acts23:1 Ri Pawl co xca'y chque ri comon re ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib
Acts23:2 Are c'u ri qui nimal ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Acts23:3 Xubij c'u ri Pawl che: “Catuch'ay na ri Dios
Acts23:4 Xquibij ri e tac'atoj chila': “¿La cayok' ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob re ri Dios?”
Acts23:5 Xubij ri Pawl: “Man weta'm taj
Acts23:6 Cuch'ob ri Pawl chi ri niq'uiaj winak e saduseyib
Acts23:7 Aretak xbitaj wa' rumal
Acts23:8 Are c'u ri saduseyib cäquibij chi ri cäminakib man quec'astaj taj. Cäquibij chi man e c'o ta tako'n aj caj
Acts23:9 Conojel xquirak qui chi'. Xetaq'ui' c'u jujun ajtijab re ri pixab chquixo'l ri pariseyib
Acts23:10 Xnimataj c'u ri c'ulelam ib chquixo'l ri achijab
Acts23:11 Chucab ak'ab xtaq'ui' ri Ajawaxel chuxcut ri Pawl
Acts23:12 Aretak xsakaric
Acts23:13 E c'o na chuwäch cawinak achijab ri xquiban we chomanic ri'.
Acts23:14 Ri e are' xebopan cuc' ri e c'amal qui be ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri e qui nimak tak tatayib ri aj judeyib
Acts23:15 Camic c'ut
Acts23:16 Jun ral ala ri rana'b ri Pawl xuto chi ri achijab queyem ri Pawl. Xbec
Acts23:17 Ri Pawl c'ut xusiq'uij jun chque ri qui nimakil ri jun sient ajch'ojab
Acts23:18 Xuc'am c'ut
Acts23:19 Ri qui nimal ri ajch'ojab xuchap ri ala che ri u k'ab
Acts23:20 Ri ala xubij che: “Ri aj judeyib xquichomaj jun jasach ri cäquiban na: cäquita' na che la jun tok'ob chi chwek cac'am bic ri Pawl chquiwäch ri comon re ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib
Acts23:21 Macoj c'u la jas ri cäquibij
Acts23:22 Ri qui nimal ri jun mil ajch'ojab xujach bic ri ala
Acts23:23 Xebusiq'uij c'u quieb qui nimakil tak ri jun sient (100) ajch'ojab xubij chque: “Cocak'ab pa ri ubelej jok'otaj chebisuc'umaj apan quieb sient (200) ajch'ojab xukuje' oxc'al lajuj (70) achijab ri quebe chquij quiej xukuje' quieb sient (200) ajch'ojab ri cäcuc'aj ri qui ch'ich'
Acts23:24 Xtakan c'u ne che qui suc'umaxic quiej rech caquiejen bic ri Pawl
Acts23:25 Xutz'ibaj bic jun wuj
Acts23:26 “In Clawd Lis quintz'ibaj jun wuj che ri k'atal tzij Pelics ri sibalaj nim u k'ij. Quinya' rutzil wäch la.
Acts23:27 We achi ri' xchap cumal ri aj judeyib
Acts23:28 Xwaj xinwetamaj jas ri mac cäquicoj chrij. Xinc'am c'u bic chquiwäch ri comon re ri qui nimakil ri cäquik'at tzij aj judeyib.
Acts23:29 Xinwetamaj c'ut chi ri mac ri cäquicoj chrij are jastak rech ri qui pixab. Man ya'tal ta c'u u cämisaxic mawi ne u cojic pa che'.
Acts23:30 Xk'alajisax c'u chnuwäch chi ri aj judeyib queyem we achi ri' che u banic c'ax che
Acts23:31 Ri ajch'ojab jas ri u cholajil ri takanic ri yo'm chque
Acts23:32 Chucab k'ij ri ajch'ojab xequiya' can ri ajquiejab chi cäquic'am bic ri Pawl cuc'
Acts23:33 Ri ajquiejab xebopan pa Sesarey
Acts23:34 Ri k'atal tzij xusiq'uij ri wuj
Acts23:35 xubij che: “Catintatabej na aretak quepe ri tzujul awech. Xtakanic chi cachajix chupam ri rachoch ri Herod.”
Acts24:1 E oc'owinak chi job k'ij
Acts24:2 Aretak xsiq'uix ri Pawl

Acts24:4 Rech c'u man quinya' ta latz' che la
Acts24:5 Karikom chi we achi ri' are' jun ya'l latz'. Cuyac ch'o'j chquixo'l ri aj judeyib xukuje' pa ronojel ri uwächulew. Are' ri c'amal qui be ri juk'at aj nazarenib.
Acts24:6 Xukuje' xutzucuj u tz'iloxic ri rachoch Dios
Acts24:7 
Acts24:8 Ri lal
Acts24:9 Xukuje' ri aj judeyib xquiya' qui tzij ruc' ri Tertul

Acts24:11 Lal c'ut cuya' quetamaj la chi c'äte cablajuj k'ij ri' xinbe che u k'ijilaxic ri Dios pa Jerusalen.

Acts24:13 Man quecuin taj cäquic'ut chwäch la chi kastzij we jastak ri' ri quinquitzujuj wi.
Acts24:14 Are c'u wa' quink'alajisaj chwäch la

Acts25:1 Xopan c'ut ri Pest che u c'amic ri rekle'n che k'atal tzij
Acts25:2 Xek'alajisan ri c'amal qui be ri e cojol tabal tok'ob xukuje' ri qui nimakil ri aj judeyib chrij ri Pawl.
Acts25:3 Xquitz'onoj jun tok'ob che chrij ri Pawl
Acts25:4 Are c'u ri Pest xubij chi ri Pawl chajin pa Sesarey
Acts25:5 Xubij c'u chque: “Rumal c'u ri'
Acts25:6 Cäraj xa' wajxakib o lajuj k'ij xbeytaj ri Pest chquixo'l
Acts25:7 Aretak xpetic ri Pawl
Acts25:8 Are c'u ri Pawl xuto' rib
Acts25:9 Ri Pest are xraj chi utz quil wi cumal ri aj judeyib
Acts25:10 Ri Pawl xubij: “Chuwäch ri u k'atbal tzij ri Sesar in tac'al wi
Acts25:11 We ta c'u c'o etzelal nu banom
Acts25:12 Ri Pest xquiban chomanic cuc' ri e ya'l tak u no'j. C'äte ri' xubij che ri Pawl: “Xatz'onoj ya' chi catintak bic chuwäch ri Sesar. Chuwäch c'u ri Sesar catbe wi na.”
Acts25:13 E oc'owinak chi quieb oxib k'ij
Acts25:14 Xebeytaj q'uia k'ij chila'. Ri Pest xutzijoj che ri ajawinel ri cäk'abax chrij ri Pawl
Acts25:15 Aretak c'u xinbe pa Jerusalen
Acts25:16 Xinbij chque chi man e nak'atal ta ri aj romab cäquijach jun winak pa cämisaxic
Acts25:17 Je c'u ri'
Acts25:18 Are c'u ri xelquitac'aba' quib che u tzujuxic
Acts25:19 Xane' ri xquiya' chrij ri achi
Acts25:20 Xsach nu c'u'x chrij we chomanic ri'. Xinta' che we cäraj cäbe pa Jerusalen
Acts25:21 Xutz'onoj c'u ri Pawl chi cak'at na tzij puwi' rumal ri August Sesar. Rumal ri' xintakan che u chajixic c'ä quintak na bic ruc' ri Sesar.”
Acts25:22 Ri Agrip xubij che ri Pest: “In xukuje' quinwaj quintatabej we achi ri'.” Ri Pest xubij che: “Chwek catatabej na la.”
Acts25:23 Chucab k'ij xpe ri Agrip rachil ri Berenis ruc' sibalaj nimal. Xeboc bic pa ri k'atbal tzij
Acts25:24 Xubij c'ut ri Pest: “Ajawinel Agrip
Acts25:25 Are c'u ri in xinwetamaj chi man c'o ta jun jasach u banom rech takal ta che chi cäcämisaxic. Ri are' c'ut xutz'onoj chwe chi quintak bic chuwäch ri nimalaj k'atal tzij August Sesar. Nu chomam c'u u takic bic.
Acts25:26 Chrij ri are' man c'o ta jun mac ri k'alaj ri quintz'ibaj ta bic che ri wajaw ri k'atal tzij
Acts25:27 In c'ut quinwilo chi man utz ta u takic bic jun ajpache'
Acts26:1 Ri Agrip xubij che ri Pawl: “Cuya' catch'awic rech cato' awib.” C'äte ri' xuyac ri u k'ab ri Pawl

Acts26:5 Queta'm c'u wa'

Acts26:7 Ri eye'm u rikic cumal ri cablajuj kamak'. Ri queboc wi il che u k'ijilaxic ri Dios chi pa k'ij chi chak'ab. Rumal c'u rech we eyebal c'uxaj ri' ri aj judeyib in qui tzujum chwäch la
Acts26:8 ¿Jasche man cacoj ta alak chi ri Dios quebuc'astajisaj cäminakib?”
Acts26:9 “Ri in xinchomaj canok chi rajawaxic quinban q'ui tak jastak che u c'ulelaxic ri u bi' ri Jesus aj Nazaret.

Acts26:11 Q'ui mul xinc'äjisaj qui wäch pa tak ri ja ri cäquitijoj wi quib ri aj judeyib che ri pixab. Xincoj chuk'ab chque che u k'ilic quib che ri qui cojonic. Sibalaj xpe woyowal chquij
Acts26:12 “Che c'u wa' in benak wi pa Damasc

Acts26:20 Xane' nabe xinya' u tzijoxic chque ri e c'o pa Damasc
Acts26:21 Rumal rech wa'
Acts26:22 Ri Dios in u to'm ulok c'ä pa we k'ij ri'. Quink'alajisaj c'u ri u tzij chquiwäch conojel ri winak
Acts26:23 Ri e are' qui bim ulok chi ri Crist curik na c'ax

Acts26:27 Ajawinel Agrip

Acts27:1 Aretak xchomaxic chi cujbe puwi' ri plo pa Ital
Acts27:2 Xujoc c'u pa jun nim jucub aj Adramit
Acts27:3 Chucab k'ij xujopan pa Sidon. Ri Julio xuban utzil che ri Pawl
Acts27:4 Xujel bic chila'
Acts27:5 Aretak ka k'axem chi ri plo ri c'o chuchi' ri Silisiy xukuje' Panpil
Acts27:6 Ri qui nimal ri jun sient ajch'ojab xurik jun nim jucub aj Alejandriy chila'
Acts27:7 Q'ui k'ij c'ut xujbin puwi' ri plo nojimal. Ruc' c'ax xujopan chuwäch ri Cänid. Rumal c'u rech chi cujuk'atij ri quiakik'
Acts27:8 Ruc' c'ax xkabinibej ri Cret
Acts27:9 E oc'owinak chi c'u q'ui k'ij
Acts27:10 xubij chque: “Achijab
