Acts27:12 We oquibal ri' pa ri plo
Acts27:13 Aretak xpe ri quiakik' pa ri u mox k'ab ri elebal k'ij
Acts27:14 Xpe c'u jun nimalaj quiakik' jäb chrij ri nim jucub
Acts27:15 Xch'icmix c'u bic ri nim jucub
Acts27:16 Xojoc'ow chrij jun alaj ch'akap ulew Caud u bi'. Ruc' c'ax xujcuin che u yaquic ri alaj jucub ri ka jurum ulok.
Acts27:17 Aretak pakabam chi ulok ri alaj jucub pa ri nim jucub
Acts27:18 Xujel c'u ch'u'j rumal ri nimalaj quiakik'. Chucab k'ij xquiq'uiak can ri eka'n pa ri plo.
Acts27:19 Churox k'ij c'ut
Acts27:20 Q'ui k'ij ri man xkil ta u wäch ri k'ij
Acts27:21 Q'ui k'ij chi c'ut man uj wokinak taj. C'äte ri'
Acts27:22 Camic c'ut quinpixben chech alak chi cu'ba' c'u'x alak. Man c'o ta c'u na jun chech alak ri cäcämic. Xak xuwi cayojyob na ri nim jucub.
Acts27:23 Chak'ab c'ut xpe jun tako'n aj caj. Ri takom ulok rumal ri Dios
Acts27:24 Xubij c'u chwe: ‘Maxe'j awib
Acts27:25 Rumal c'u ri'
Acts27:26 Cujekaj c'u na pa jun ch'akap ulew.”
Acts27:27 Pa ri ucajlajuj chak'ab c'ut
Acts27:28 Aretak xquiq'uiak bic ri etabal
Acts27:29 Xquixe'j c'u quib
Acts27:30 Raj xebanimaj bic ri ajchaquib pa ri jucub. Xquikasaj bic ri alaj jucub chupam ri plo

Acts27:39 Aretak xsakaric

Acts28:3 Ri Pawl
Acts28:4 Ri e aj chila'
Acts28:5 Ri Pawl xutota' c'ut ri cumätz pa ri k'ak'. Man c'o ta c'ax xuriko.
Acts28:6 Ri e are' c'ut queyem chi cäsipojic
Acts28:7 Chuxcut ri c'olbal ri' c'o wi ri rulew ri achi ri nim u banic pa Malt
Acts28:8 C'ulmatajinak c'ut chi ri u tat ri Publio kajinak pa ch'at
Acts28:9 Bantajinak chi wa'
Acts28:10 E are c'u ri' xukuje' nim xujquil wi
Acts28:11 E oc'owinak chi oxib ic'

Acts28:13 Te c'u ri' xujel bic chila'

Acts28:16 Aretak xujopan pa Rom
Acts28:17 Aretak oc'owinak chi oxib k'ij
Acts28:18 Aretak qui c'otom chi nu chi'
Acts28:19 Are c'u ri aj judeyib xquibij chi man quintzokopix taj. Rumal ri' rajawaxic xintz'onoj c'ut chi quintak ulok chuwäch ri nimalaj k'atal tzij Sesar. Man c'o ta c'u jas ri quebentzujuj ta wi ri nu nim tinimit.
Acts28:20 Rumal ri' xintakan che siq'uixic alak rech quinwil wäch alak
Acts28:21 Xquibij che: “Man c'o ta wuj petinak pa Judey
Acts28:22 Are c'u kakaj cäkatatabej ri cachomaj. Keta'm c'ut chi pa conojel c'olbal cac'ulelax wi we c'ac' juk'at ri'.”
Acts28:23 Xquich'ic c'u jun k'ij che
Acts28:24 E c'o jujun xquic'amowaj ri xubij ri Pawl
Acts28:25 Rumal c'u rech chi man junam ta xechoman conojel
Acts28:26 ‘Jät jabij c'u che we tinimit ri': Pune' sibalaj quixtatabenic
Acts28:27 Pimarinak c'ut ri u chomabal we tinimit ri'
Acts28:28 Chetamaj alak we colobal ib ri' ri cuya' ri Dios takom bic chque ri man aj judeyib taj
Acts28:29 
Acts28:30 Ri Pawl xcanaj can quieb junab tz'akat chupam ri ja ri u kajom
Acts28:31 Xutzijoj ri rajawibal ri Dios. Xebutijoj ri winak che ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist. Man cuxe'j ta rib
Romans1:1 In Pawl
Romans1:2 Ri Dios xuya' ulok u bixic ri utzalaj tzij ojer cumal ri e k'axal tak tzij
Romans1:3 Ri utzalaj tak tzij are caquitzijoj ri u C'ojol ri Dios
Romans1:4 Xya' u bixic chi are u C'ojol ri Dios rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios. Xk'alajisaxic chi c'o u cuinem aretak xc'astaj chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Are wa' ri Jesucrist ri Ajawaxel.
Romans1:5 Ri rumal kac'amom ri tok'ob xukuje' ri takomal rech cänimax ri cojonic chquixo'l conojel ri man e aj judeyib taj
Romans1:6 Ri ix c'ut ix jujun chque ri winak ri'. Ri Dios xixusiq'uij
Romans1:7 Quintz'ibaj c'u we wuj ri' chiwe iwonojel ri ix c'o pa Rom. Ri Dios quixulok'ok'ej
Romans1:8 Nabe quinmaltioxin che ri nu Dios rumal ri Jesucrist chiwij iwonojel
Romans1:9 Are ri Dios quinpatanij ruc' ronojel wanima'
Romans1:10 Quinbochi'j amak'el ri Dios rech
Romans1:11 Sibalaj c'u quinrayij rilic i wäch che u ya'ic jun to'banic aj uxlabal chiwe
Romans1:12 Rech jeri' chi cäkaya' ka chuk'ab chbil tak kib pa ri ka cojonic
Romans1:13 Quinwaj quiwetamaj
Romans1:14 Quinna' chi c'o nu c'as cuc' ri aj Gres
Romans1:15 Rumal c'u wa' xukuje' sibalaj quinwaj quintzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij chiwe ri ix c'o pa Rom.
Romans1:16 In man quinq'uix ta che ri utzalaj tzij re colobal ib
Romans1:17 Ri utzalaj tak tzij cuc'ut chkawäch chi ri Dios cuban suc' chke rumal ri cojonic
Romans1:18 Quilitaj c'ut chi cäpe ri royowal ri Dios chicaj paquiwi' conojel ri winak ri man cäquiya' ta u k'ij ri Dios
Romans1:19 K'alajisam chi c'u chquiwäch jas ri ya'tal chque chi cäquetamaj chrij ri Dios. Are ri Dios xk'alajisan chquiwäch.
Romans1:20 Are c'u ri man ilitajel ta wi ri Dios cuya' quetamatajic
Romans1:21 Pune' ta ne xquich'ob u wäch ri Dios
Romans1:22 Pune' xquibij chi c'o qui no'j
Romans1:23 Rumal chi qui q'uexom ri u juluwem ri Dios ri man cäsach ta u wäch
Romans1:24 Rumal ri' ri Dios xebuya' canok rech cäquiban ri u rayinic ri canima'
Romans1:25 Xquiq'uex ri sakalaj tzij re ri Dios che u q'uexwäch ri banoj tzij. Xquinimarisaj qui k'ij ri jastak ri xeban rumal ri Dios
Romans1:26 Rumal ri' ri Dios xebuya' canok rech cäbe qui c'u'x cuc' q'uixbalalaj tak jastak. Xukuje' ne ri ixokib man xquiban ta chic jas ri ya'tal chque
Romans1:27 Xukuje' ri achijab je xquibano. Man xquiban ta chic cuc' ri ixokib jas ri kas ya'tal chque. Xane' xquiban q'uixbalalaj tak jastak ri achijab cuc' cach tak achijab. Xenicow pa tak ri qui rayinic chbil tak quib. Cätajin cäquic'am ulok ri c'axc'olil jas ri takal chque
Romans1:28 Aretak man xcaj ta chic xechoman chrij ri Dios
Romans1:29 E nojinak che ronojel qui wäch mac. Cäquiban ri man suc' taj. Quequirayij q'ui jastak. Cäquiban etzelal. Cäpe coyowal aretak jun chic curik utzil. Quecämisanic. E yacal tak ch'o'j. Quequisub tak winak. Man e suc' taj. E banal tak tzijtal.
Romans1:30 Caquibij c'axalaj tak tzij chquij ri niq'uiaj chic
Romans1:31 Man cäcaj taj quech'obonic
Romans1:32 Queta'm chi c'ut ri u takanic ri Dios
Romans2:1 Rumal c'u ri'
Romans2:2 Keta'm c'ut chi ri Dios
Romans2:3 ¿La cachomaj c'u lo at
Romans2:4 At cawetzelaj u wäch ri rutzil ri man q'uisel taj ri u cuyunic
Romans2:5 Co c'u ri awanima'
Romans2:6 Ri Dios quebutoj na ri winak chquijujunal jas ri u beya'l ri qui chac.
Romans2:7 Cuya' c'u na ri junalic c'aslemal chque ri caquitzucuj ri juluwem
Romans2:8 are c'u ri winak ri xak xuwi cäquitzucuj ri jastak ri cäcaj ri e are'
Romans2:9 Cäpe na c'ax
Romans2:10 Are c'u ri winak ri cäquiban utzil
Romans2:11 Ri Dios man nim ta cäril wi jun winak chuwäch ri jun chic
Romans2:12 Conojel ri quemacunic ri man e c'o ta chuxe' ri u pixab ri Moises
Romans2:13 Man e are ta c'ut ri xak caquita' ri pixab e suc' chuwäch ri Dios
Romans2:14 Ri man aj judeyib taj
Romans2:15 Cäquik'alajisaj ruc' ri qui chac chi tz'ibatal ri pixab pa ri canima'. Cäquina' pa ri canima' we utz o man utz taj ri cäquibano. Rumal ri qui chomanic ri e are' chquibil quib
Romans2:16 pa ri k'ij aretak ri Dios cuk'at na tzij rumal ri Jesucrist puwi' ronojel ri e awatal cumal ri winak
Romans2:17 We at cabinaj aj judey
Romans2:18 Cach'obo jas ri u rayibal ri Dios
Romans2:19 Cachomaj pa awanima' chi at c'amal qui be ri moyab
Romans2:20 Cachomaj chi cuya' quebatijoj ri winak ri man c'o ta queta'm xukuje' ri cätajin cäquetamaj
Romans2:21 At
Romans2:22 At
Romans2:23 At
Romans2:24 Jas ri tz'ibatalic: “Cäyok' c'u ri u bi' ri Dios chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj rumal rech ri quibano.”
Romans2:25 Are c'u ri etal ri cojom che ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri achi wi jun c'o quechebex che
Romans2:26 Je c'u ri'
Romans2:27 Ri jun ri man cojom ta etal re kopinic che ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi
Romans2:28 Man are ta kas aj judey ri' ri xa' chrij quilitaj wi chi aj judey. Xukuje' man are ta kas etal ri' ri xa' cojom che u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi jun
Romans2:29 Xane' ri kas aj judey
Romans3:1 Te c'u ri'
Romans3:2 Q'ui pa ronojel u banic. Nabe ri Dios u yo'm ri u tzij pa qui k'ab ri aj judeyib.
Romans3:3 ¿Jas c'ut? We man quecon jujun chque
Romans3:4 ¡Man je ta ri'! Xane' are ri Dios kastzij
Romans3:5 We ri ketzelal sibalaj cuk'alajisaj na ri u suq'uil ri Dios
Romans3:6 ¡Man je ta ri'! We ta jeri'
Romans3:7 We c'u rumal ri nu banoj tzij
Romans3:8 Che c'u wa'
Romans3:9 ¿Jas c'ut? Ri uj ri uj aj judeyib
Romans3:10 Jas ri tz'ibatalic: “¡Man c'o ta jun suc'! ¡Mawi jun!
Romans3:11 Man c'o ta jun cäch'obonic
Romans3:12 Conojel xquitas quib chrij ri Dios. Conojel xquiban chquibil quib chi man c'o ta chi qui patan. ¡Man c'o ta jachin cäbanow ri utzil! ¡Xa' ta ne jun c'olic!
Romans3:13 Ri u pa qui kul je jas ri mukubal ri jaktalic. Ri cak' banal tzij ri u pa qui chi' u c'u'm u k'inob cumätz.
Romans3:14 Ri u pa qui chi' nojinak che c'axalaj tak tzij
Romans3:15 Ri cakan aninak quebe che u tixic quic'.
Romans3:16 Apawije' ri quebe wi
Romans3:17 Are c'u ri be re jamaril man cäquich'ob taj.
Romans3:18 Man cäquixe'j ta jubik' quib chuwäch ri Dios.”
Romans3:19 Keta'm chi ronojel ri cubij ri pixab
Romans3:20 Rumal ri' man c'o ta jun winak cäk'alajisax chuwäch ri Dios chi suc' rumal rech chi u banom ri cubij ri pixab. Are c'u ri pixab xak xuwi cuk'alajisaj chkawäch chi uj ajmaquib.
Romans3:21 Camic c'ut
Romans3:22 Ri Dios cuban suc' chque ri winak rumal ri qui cojonic che ri Jesucrist. Xa' junam cuban chque conojel ri quecojon che. Xa' c'u junam qui banic ri winak chuwäch.
Romans3:23 Conojel c'ut e macuninak. E najtajisam che ri u juluwem ri Dios.
Romans3:24 Ri Dios cuk'alajisaj chi uj suc' chuwäch rumal ri u tok'ob
Romans3:25 Ri Dios xuya' ri Jesucrist che cojol utzil chquixo'l ri winak ruc' are'. Cäquirik we utzil ri' we quecojon che ri Crist
Romans3:26 chuk'alajisaxic ri u suq'uil pa tak we k'ij ri': rech kas suc' wi ri are'
Romans3:27 ¿Jawi
Romans3:28 Je c'u ri'
Romans3:29 Ri Dios
Romans3:30 xa' c'u jun ri Dios. Rumal ri cojonic
Romans3:31 ¿La cäkaban c'u che ri pixab chi man c'o ta u patan rumal ri cojonic? Man cäkaban taj. Xane' xa' sibalaj cäkajiquiba' ri u chuk'ab ri pixab.
Romans4:1 ¿Jas c'u ri cäkabij chi xurik ri Abraham ri ka mam?
Romans4:2 We ta xk'alajisax ri Abraham chi suc' rumal ri u chac
Romans4:3 ¿Jas c'u cubij ri Tz'ibatalic? “Ri Abraham xcojon che ri Dios
Romans4:4 Ri tojbal re ri jun ajchac
Romans4:5 We c'u jun cäcojon che ri Dios
Romans4:6 Xukuje' jas ri xubij ri David
Romans4:7 Xubij c'ut ri David: “Utz quech ri xesachtaj ri quetzelal
Romans4:8 ¡Utz re ri winak ri man quenatax taj ri u mac chrij rumal ri Ajawaxel!”
Romans4:9 ¿La xak xuwi lo utz quech ri aj judeyib ri cojom ri quetal re kopinic che ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri achijab wi? ¿O xukuje' utz quech ri winak ri man aj judeyib taj? Cäkabij c'ut chi ri Dios xuk'alajisaj ri Abraham chi suc' rumal ri cojonic.
Romans4:10 ¿Jampa' xk'alajisax ri Abraham chi suc'? ¿La aretak cojom chi ri etal re kopinic che ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi
Romans4:11 Ri retal re kopinic ri Abraham ri xcojic
Romans4:12 Ri Abraham are qui mam ri cojom quetal re kopinic. Man xuwi ta c'u qui mam ri aj judeyib ri cojom ri quetal re kopinic
Romans4:13 Man rumal ta ri pixab xchi'x che ri Abraham cuc' ri e rija'l chi cäquechbej na ri uwächulew
Romans4:14 We c'u ri quec'amow ri echbal e are' ri quequimaj u banic ri pixab
Romans4:15 Are' c'u ri pixab cuc'am ulok ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' ri man queniman taj. Jawije' c'u ri man c'o ta wi pixab
Romans4:16 Jeri' ri winak ri quecojonic cäquirik na jas ri xchi'x ulok chi cäya' na chque rumal ri Dios. Xa' c'u rumal tok'ob cäquic'amo. Rech kas cäquirik na conojel ri e rija'l ri Abraham
Romans4:17 Jas ri tz'ibatalic: “At nu cojom che qui mam q'ui nimak tak tinimit.” Ri Dios ri cäyo'w qui c'aslemal ri cäminakib
Romans4:18 Aretak c'u man c'o ta chi eyebal c'uxaj ri Abraham xcojonic xc'oji' c'u reyebal u c'u'x
Romans4:19 Ri u cojonic ri Abraham man xchukchub taj
Romans4:20 Man xuban ta quieb u c'u'x chrij ri bim ulok chi cäya' na rumal ri Dios
Romans4:21 Kas reta'm chi ri Dios c'o u cuinem che u banic ronojel jas ri xubij ulok chi cuya' na che.
Romans4:22 Rumal c'u wa'
Romans4:23 Aretak xtz'ibaxic chi “xk'alajisax ri Abraham chi suc'”
Romans4:24 Xane' xtz'ibax xukuje' rumal kech uj. Rumal ri ka cojonic
Romans4:25 Are ri Jesus ri xjach pa ri cämical rumal rech ri ka mac
Romans5:1 Aretak k'alajisam chic chi uj suc' rumal ri ka cojonic
Romans5:2 Rumal are' xukuje' c'o koquibal rumal ri cojonic
Romans5:3 Man xuwi ta c'u wa'. Xane' cujquicot rumal quech tak ri c'axc'olil ri quepe pakawi'. Keta'm chi aretak cäkarik c'ax
Romans5:4 Aretak cäkach'ij ri c'ax
Romans5:5 Aretak cu'l ka c'u'x chrij ri Dios
Romans5:6 Aretak man xujcuin ta che u colic kib
Romans5:7 Sibalaj c'ax u rikic jachin jun ri cujach ta rib che u q'uexwäch jun winak chic. Mawi ne che u q'uexwäch jun suc'alaj winak; craj c'u ne c'o jachin jun cujäch rib pa cämisaxic che u q'uexwäch jun winak ri utz.
Romans5:8 Are c'u ri Dios cuk'alajisaj chkawäch chi cujulok'ok'ej. Aretak c'ä uj ajmaquib
Romans5:9 E ta c'u lo ri camic
Romans5:10 We c'u aretak c'ä ka c'ulel ulok ri Dios
Romans5:11 Man xuwi ta c'u wa'
Romans5:12 Je c'u ri'
Romans5:13 Aretak c'ä majok ri pixab
Romans5:14 Kas c'u ne pa ri u k'ijol ri Adan c'ä pa ri u k'ijol ri Moises
Romans5:15 Ri u sipanic ri Dios chke
Romans5:16 Ri c'ulmatajic ri xpe rumal xa jun ajmac man cajunamataj ta ruc' ri u sipanic ri Dios
Romans5:17 We xpe ri cämical paquiwi' ri winak rumal rech ri u mac ri jun
Romans5:18 Je c'u ri' chi ri jun mac ri xuban ri Adan xuc'am ulok c'okonic chque conojel ri winak
Romans5:19 Je c'u ri' chi rumal ri man u nimanic taj jun winak ri e q'uia xebux ajmaquib
Romans5:20 Ri Dios xuya' ri pixab rech ri winak cäquilo chi nim ri qui mac. Pune' sibalaj nim ri qui mac ri winak
Romans5:21 Rech jeri'
Romans6:1 ¿Jas ta c'ut ri cäkabij na? ¿La cujcanaj ta c'u chupam ri macaj rech sibalaj caq'uiy ri u tok'ob ri Dios?
Romans6:2 ¡Mawi jubik'! Uj cäminak chi c'u chuwäch ri macaj; ¿jas ta c'u cakabano cujcuinic cujc'asi' ta chupam ri macaj?
Romans6:3 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi aretak xban ri ka bautism
Romans6:4 Ri ka bautism are' jun c'utbal chi uj mukutajinac ruc' ri Crist pa ri u cämical
Romans6:5 We c'u uj junam chic ruc' ri Crist pa ri u cämical
Romans6:6 Keta'm c'ut chi ri ka banic nabe xripitaj ruc' ri Crist
Romans6:7 Ri jun ri cäminak chic
Romans6:8 We xujcäm ruc' ri Crist
Romans6:9 Keta'm chi c'astajinak chi ri Crist chquixo'l ri cäminakib
Romans6:10 Aretak xcämic
Romans6:11 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix
Romans6:12 Miya' ba' c'olbal che ri mac chi cätakan puwi' ri i cuerp
Romans6:13 mijach ba ri i cuerp che ri mac che u banic ri etzelal. Xane' chijacha' iwib pa u k'ab ri Dios je ta ne ix c'astajinak chic chquixo'l ri cäminakib. Chijacha' ri i cuerp pa u k'ab ri Dios rech quiban ri utz.
Romans6:14 Jeri' man cätakan ta chi c'u ri mac piwi'. Man ix c'o ta chi c'u chuxe' ri pixab
Romans6:15 ¿Jas c'ut? ¿La cujmacun lo
Romans6:16 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi
Romans6:17 Maltiox c'u che ri Dios
Romans6:18 Ix esam chi c'u pa u k'ab ri mac
Romans6:19 (Quinbij wa' chiwe pa ka tzij uj ri uj winak
Romans6:20 Aretak c'ä ix lok'om pataninel che ri mac
Romans6:21 ¿Jas c'u ri xiwechbej can chquij ri jastak ri cäquiya' chi q'uixbal chiwe camic? Cämical c'u ri quec'aman wi bic.
Romans6:22 Camic c'ut
Romans6:23 Ri tojbal ri cuya' ri macaj
Romans7:1 ¿La ma ta quich'obo
Romans7:2 Jun ixok ri c'o rachajil
Romans7:3 Je c'u ri'
Romans7:4 Jewa' xukuje' ri ix
Romans7:5 Aretak xujc'oji' pa ri aj macalaj c'aslemal re winak
Romans7:6 Camic c'ut man uj c'o ta chic chuxe' ri pixab. Xane' uj cäminak chi chuwäch ri u takanic. Jeri' ri Uxlabaxel cuya' jun c'ac' ka c'aslemal che u patanixic ri Dios. Man cäkapatanij ta chi ruc' ri u takanic ri ojer pixab ri tz'ibatalic.
Romans7:7 ¿Jas c'u cäkabij? ¿La mac lo ri pixab? ¡Man mac taj! Ma ta c'u xinwetamaj ri' jas ri' ri mac
Romans7:8 Rumal c'u ri u takanic ri pixab
Romans7:9 Nabe
Romans7:10 ri in c'ut xincämic. Are c'u ri takanic ri xpe che u ya'ic c'aslemal
Romans7:11 Are c'u ri mac are xucoj ri takanic che nu subic. Xukuje' ruc' ri takanic xinucämisaj.
Romans7:12 Je c'u ri'
Romans7:13 Jun jasach ri utz
Romans7:14 Ka ch'obom c'ut chi aj uxlabal ri pixab; ri in c'ut in aj ti'jal
Romans7:15 Man quinch'ob taj jas ri quinbano. Man quinban ta c'ut jas ri quinwaj quinbano. Xane' ri quinwetzelaj u wäch
Romans7:16 We c'u are quinban ri man quinwaj taj
Romans7:17 Je c'u ri' man in ta chic quinbanow wa'
Romans7:18 Weta'm c'ut chi man c'o ta ri utz pa ri wanima'
Romans7:19 Man quinban ta c'u ri utz ri quinwaj quinbano. Xane' ri etzelal ri man quinwaj taj
Romans7:20 We c'u are quinban ri man quinwaj taj
Romans7:21 Quinwilo chi jewa' nu c'ulmam: Chi aretak quinwaj quinban ri utz
Romans7:22 Cäquicot ri wanima' rumal ri u pixab ri Dios.
Romans7:23 Quinwil c'u jun pixab chic pa ri nu cuerp
Romans7:24 ¡Tok'ob nu wäch
Romans7:25 Quinmaltioxij che ri Dios chi xak xuwi ri are'
Romans8:1 Camic c'ut
Romans8:2 Ri u pixab c'ut ri Uxlabaxel ri cuya' c'aslemal rumal ri Crist Jesus
Romans8:3 U banom c'u ri Dios ri man xcuin ta ri u pixab ri Moises che u banic
Romans8:4 Jeri'
Romans8:5 Ri winak ri cäquiban ri rayibal aj winak re mac
Romans8:6 Ri u banic ri chomanic aj uwächulew cuya' cämical. Are c'u ri u banic ri u rayibal ri Uxlabaxel cuya' c'aslemal xukuje' jamaril.
Romans8:7 Ri caquichomaj ri jastak aj winak re mac
Romans8:8 Ri cäquiban ri rayibal ri aj winak re mac
Romans8:9 Are c'u ri ix man ix c'o ta pa ri u takanic ri u rayibal ri i banic aj winak re mac. Xane' ix c'o pa ri u takanic ri Uxlabaxel
Romans8:10 We c'o ri Crist pa ri iwanima'
Romans8:11 Ri Dios xuc'astajisaj ri Jesus chquixo'l ri cäminakib. We ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri c'o pa ri iwanima'
Romans8:12 Je c'u ri'
Romans8:13 We are quiban ri u rayibal ri i banic aj winak re mac
Romans8:14 Conojel c'u ri c'amom qui be rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios
Romans8:15 Man i c'amom ta jun uxlabal ri cuban lok'om pataninelab chiwe
Romans8:16 Kas are' ri Uxlabaxel ruc' ri kanima' junam quek'alajisanic chi uj ralc'ual ri Dios.
Romans8:17 We c'u uj alc'ualaxelab
Romans8:18 Weta'm chi ri c'ax ri cäkarik pa tak we k'ij camic
Romans8:19 Conojel c'u ri jastak ri e banom rumal ri Dios
Romans8:20 Conojel ri e banom rumal ri Dios xebux man c'o ta qui patan. Man xak ta c'u pa quech wi xquic'ulmaj wa'
Romans8:21 aretak ri e banom rumal ri Dios quetzokopitaj na chupam ri lok'om patanijic
Romans8:22 Keta'm c'ut chi conojel ri jastak ri e banom rumal ri Dios
Romans8:23 Man xuwi ta c'u ri are' caquirik c'ax
Romans8:24 Pa cu'lbal c'uxaj c'ut xujcolotaj wi. We c'u jun cu'l u c'u'x chrij jun jasach ri quilitajic
Romans8:25 We c'u cu'l ka c'u'x chrij ri man cäkil taj
Romans8:26 Jewa' xukuje' ri Uxlabaxel cuya' ka chuk'ab pa ri ka tukaril. Man keta'm ta c'ut cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios jas ri kas rajawaxic u banic. Kas are c'u ri Uxlabaxel cubochi'j ri Dios ruc' ch'ikowem pakawi'
Romans8:27 Are c'u ri Dios ri cäril ri kanima'
Romans8:28 Keta'm c'ut chi conojel ri jastak quetoban che utzil chque ri quelok'ok'en ri Dios
Romans8:29 E are c'ut ri xetamax ulok qui wäch rumal ri Dios
Romans8:30 Ri winak ri xebucha' ulok ri Dios ojer are wa' xebusiq'uij
Romans8:31 ¿Jas c'u cäkabij che wa'? We c'o ri Dios kuc'
Romans8:32 Ri Dios mawi ne xutok'obisaj u wäch ri u C'ojol
Romans8:33 ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuinic cuban tzij chquij ri e cha'om rumal ri Dios? Ri Dios c'ut quek'alajisanic chi e suc' chic chuwäch.
Romans8:34 ¿Jachin ta ri cäcuin che u c'ajisaxic qui wäch? Ri xcämic are ri Crist Jesus
Romans8:35 ¿Jachin ta cujtasow chrij ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist? ¿la c'axc'olil? ¿la nimalaj bis? ¿la okatanic? ¿la wija'l? ¿la ch'analiquil? ¿la ri xak quieb cubij pakawi' we ne cujcämic? ¿la ch'ich' re ch'o'j?
Romans8:36 Jacha' ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: “Ronojel k'ij cätzucux ka cämisaxic rumal ech la
Romans8:37 Pune' cäkarik conojel we jastak ri'
Romans8:38 Kas weta'm chi man c'o ta jas cäcuin che ka tasic chrij ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Dios. Mawi ri cämical
Romans8:39 ¡mawi ri sibalaj chicaj
Romans9:1 Quinbij ri kastzij pa u bi' ri Crist
Romans9:2 chi ronojel k'ij c'o nimalaj nu bis
Romans9:3 Quinwaj ta c'u ne chi kas in quinc'oji' ta chuxe' c'okonic
Romans9:4 E are c'u wa' ri winak aj israelib
Romans9:5 Ri e u wi' tak qui jolom ri xalax wi ri Crist jas ri u beya'l ri ti'j
Romans9:6 Man quinbij taj chi ri Dios ma ta xubano jas ri u bim ulok. Man conojel ta c'u ri e rija'lil ri Israel kas e aj Israel.
Romans9:7 Man conojel taj ri e rija'l ri Abraham kas ta e ralc'ual
Romans9:8 Ri cuk'alajisaj wa' chkawäch chi man c'o ta jun cux ta alc'ualaxel re ri Dios xa' ta rumal rech chi aj ta jun ija'lil; man je ta c'u wa' xane' xak xuwi ri e alc'ualaxelab ri catz'akat wi ri u chi'nic ri Dios
Romans9:9 Are c'u wa' ri chi'nic ri xuban ri Dios che ri Abraham: “Pa tak we k'ij ri' quintzelej na ulok
Romans9:10 Man xuwi ta wa'. Xane' xukuje' ri Rebec xec'oji' ri quieb ral ruc' ri ka mam Isaac.
Romans9:11 Ri Dios xch'aw ruc' ri Rebec aretak c'ä majok queralaj ri ral
Romans9:12 Ri Dios xubij che ri Rebec chi ri nabeal cupatanij na ri chak'axel.
Romans9:13 Jas ri tz'ibatalic: “Xinlok'ok'ej ri Jacob. Are c'u ri Esau xinwetzelaj u wäch.”
Romans9:14 ¿Jas c'u cäkabij? ¿La cuban lo ri Dios ri man suc' taj? ¡Man je ta ri'!
Romans9:15 Xubij c'u ri Dios che ri Moises: “Quel na nu c'u'x che ri winak ri quinwaj quel wi nu c'u'x. Quintok'obisaj na u wäch ri quinwaj quintok'obisaj u wäch.”
Romans9:16 Man are ta cächa' ri winak ri sibalaj cäraj cächa'ic

Romans9:19 Cabij c'u na chwe: “¿Jas c'u che cubij ri Dios chi c'o u mac jun winak? ¿Jachin ta c'u cäcuin che u k'atixic u wäch ri u chomanic ri Dios?”
Romans9:20 Are c'u ri at

Romans9:24 Ri e u siq'uim

Romans16:1 Quinwaj chi quiwetamaj u wäch ri utzalaj kachalal Peb. We chuchu' ri' are jun pataninel chquixo'l ri cojonelab ri e c'o pa Sencrey.

Romans16:3 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri Prisil xukuje' ri Aquil
Romans16:4 Ri e are' rajxecämic rumal nu to'ic. Man xuwi ta ri in quinmaltioxin chque
Romans16:5 Xukuje' chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri kachalal ri cäquimulij quib pa cachoch ri Prisil rachil ri Aquil. Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri Epenet
Romans16:6 Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri Mariy
Romans16:7 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri nu winakil ri Andron xukuje' ri Juniy
Romans16:8 Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri Ampliat
Romans16:9 Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri Urban
Romans16:10 Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri Apels. Cäkil rumal ri u chac chi ri are' kastzij c'o u cojonic che ri Crist. Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Aristobulo.
Romans16:11 Chiya' rutzil u wäch ri nu winakil Herodion. Xukuje' chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Narsis ri e cojoninak che ri Ajawaxel.
Romans16:12 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri chuchuyib Tripen xukuje' ri Tripos. Ri e are' nimalaj chac qui banom pa ri u chac ri Ajawaxel. Xukuje' chiya' rutzil u wäch ri lok'alaj kachalal chuchu' Persida
Romans16:13 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri Rup ri cha'om rumal ri Ajawaxel
Romans16:14 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri Asincrito
Romans16:15 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch xukuje' ri Pilologo
Romans16:16 Chebiyala' rutzil tak i wäch. Ri cojonelab pa tak conojel ri u comon cojonelab cäquiya' rutzil i wäch.

Romans16:18 Ri e je tak wa' man cäquipatanij ta ri Crist Ajawaxel

Romans16:23 Cäya' rutzil i wäch rumal ri Gay. Wokxanim c'u ne wib pa ri rachoch

1Corinthians1:4 Amak'el quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech

1Corinthians1:6 jas ri xtzijox chiwe chi cuban ri Crist pa ri i c'aslemal
1Corinthians1:7 Je c'u ri' chi ma ta c'o jun sipanic ri cäpe ruc' ri Dios ri ma ta i rikom
1Corinthians1:8 Ri are' co quixutiquiba' na c'ä pa ri q'uisbal k'ij
1Corinthians1:9 Jic c'u ri Dios. Amak'el cutz'akatisaj ri u bin. Ri are' xixusiq'uij rech quixc'oji' junam ruc' ri Kajaw Jesucrist ri u C'ojol.
1Corinthians1:10 Quixinbochi'j ba'
1Corinthians1:11 Kas weta'm jas ri i banom
1Corinthians1:12 Quinbij chiwe chi jalajoj tak ri quibij chijujunal. Jun cubij: “In rech ri Pawl”. Jun chic cubij: “Ri in in rech ri Apols”. Jun chic cubij: “Ri in in rech ri Lu'”. Jun chic cubij: “Ri in in rech ri Crist”.
1Corinthians1:13 ¿La jachatal puch ri Crist? ¿La are pu ri Pawl xrip cho ri ripibal u mac iwech? o ¿la pa ri u bi' ri Pawl xban ri bautism?
1Corinthians1:14 Quinya' maltioxinic che ri Dios chi man c'o ta jun chiwe xinban ri u bautism
1Corinthians1:15 Jeri' man c'o ta jun cäcuinic cubij chi xban u bautism pa ri nu bi'.
1Corinthians1:16 Xukuje' xebenban ri qui bautism ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Stepns. Man cul ta c'u chwe we e c'o chic niq'uiaj xebenban qui bautism.
1Corinthians1:17 Ri Crist man xinutak ta che u banic qui bautism
1Corinthians1:18 Xa' c'u conil ri tzij re ri ripibal chque ri winak ri cäsach qui wäch. Chke c'u ri uj ri cujcolotajic
1Corinthians1:19 Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Quinsach na ri qui no'j ri ajno'jab; quinwesaj c'u na apanok ri quetamanic ri c'o quetamanic.”
1Corinthians1:20 ¿Jas ta ne qui patan ri c'o qui no'j? ¿Jas ta ne qui patan ri ajtijab? ¿Jas ta ne qui patan ri quena'w che chomanic chquij ri jastak re ri uwächulew? ¡Ri Dios c'ut u conirisam ri qui no'j ri winak cho ri uwächulew!
1Corinthians1:21 Ri Dios pa ri u no'jibal
1Corinthians1:22 Ri aj judeyib are cäcaj chi queban etal chquiwäch
1Corinthians1:23 Are c'u ri uj cäkatzijoj ri Crist ri xrip cho ri ripibal: abaj re tzakibal chque ri aj judeyib
1Corinthians1:24 chque c'u ri winak ri e siq'uim
1Corinthians1:25 Are c'u ri je ta ne u conil ri Dios
1Corinthians1:26 Chiwila' ba'
1Corinthians1:27 Xane' ri Dios xebucha' winak ri man c'o ta qui no'j re ri uwächulew che resaxic qui q'uixbal ri winak ri c'o qui no'j
1Corinthians1:28 Ri Dios xebucha' ri winak man nimak ta qui k'ij cho ri uwächulew
1Corinthians1:29 Jeri' rech man c'o ta jun cunimarisaj rib chuwäch ri Dios.
1Corinthians1:30 Rumal c'ut ri are' ix nuc'utal ruc' ri Crist Jesus
1Corinthians1:31 Rech je quelic jacha' ri cubij ri tz'ibatalic: “Apachin ta ne ri cubij chi cäquicotic
1Corinthians2:1 Ri in
1Corinthians2:2 Xinbano chi xa jun jasach xc'oji' pa ri nu chomanic chixo'l
1Corinthians2:3 Xinc'oji' chixo'l man ruc' ta chuk'ab
1Corinthians2:4 Ri tzij xintzijoj chiwe
1Corinthians2:5 Jewa' xinbano rech mäc'oji' ri i cojonic pa qui no'j ri winak
1Corinthians2:6 Cäkatzijoj c'u tzij re etamabal chque ri e co chi pa ri qui cojonic. We etamabal ri' man rech ta we uwächulew ri'
1Corinthians2:7 xane' cäkatzijoj ri u no'j ri Dios ri awatalic
1Corinthians2:8 man c'o ta jun chque ri e qui nimal tak ri winak cho ri uwächulew ri xch'obow wa'. We ta xquich'obo
1Corinthians2:9 Xane' jas ri tz'ibatalic: “Jastak ri man quilom ta ri winak ruc' ri qui bak'wäch
1Corinthians2:10 Ri Dios xebuc'ut wa' chkawäch uj rumal ri Ruxlabal. Are c'u ri Uxlabaxel cunic'oj ronojel
1Corinthians2:11 Chquixo'l ri winak
1Corinthians2:12 Ri uj man ka c'amom ta ri uxlabal aj uwächulew
1Corinthians2:13 Are wa' cäkatzijoj. Man cäkabij ta tzij ri xketamaj ruc' ri qui no'j ri winak
1Corinthians2:14 Ri winak ri man c'o ta ri Uxlabaxel pa ri canima' man cäquic'am ta ri jastak ri rech ri Ruxlabal ri Dios
1Corinthians2:15 Are c'u ri winak aj Uxlabal cuk'at tzij paquiwi' conojel ri jastak; man c'o ta c'u jun cäk'atow tzij puwi' are'.
1Corinthians2:16 Cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “¿Jachin ta xch'obow ri u chomanic ri Ajawaxel? ¿Jachin ta xtijon ri Ajawaxel? Are c'u ri uj
1Corinthians3:1 In
1Corinthians3:2 Nabe canok xa' leche xinya' chiwe pa tijic
1Corinthians3:3 rumal rech chi c'ä are quiban na ri u rayibal ri winak re mac! Itzel quiwil wi we jun chic curik utzil
1Corinthians3:4 Aretak cäquibij jujun chixo'l: “In in rech ri Pawl”
1Corinthians3:5 ¿Jachin c'u ri Pawl? ¿Jachin ri Apols? E pataninelab wa' ri cumal xixcojonic
1Corinthians3:6 Ri in xinticonijic
1Corinthians3:7 Jeri'
1Corinthians3:8 Ri cäticonijic ruc' ri cäja'nic xa e junam. Chquijujunal c'ut cäquic'am na ri tojbal que
1Corinthians3:9 Ri uj c'ut uj rach tak rajchaquib ri Dios. Ri ix
1Corinthians3:10 Jas ri u tok'ob ri Dios ri yo'm chwe
1Corinthians3:11 Man c'o ta jun cäcuin che u cojic jun tac'alibal chic chuwäch ri cojom
1Corinthians3:12 We c'o jachin cayacan puwi' we tac'alibal ri'
1Corinthians3:13 ri qui chac chquijujunal cäk'alajisax na. Copan na ri k'ij aretak cäk'alajisaxic. Ri qui chac chquijujunal cäk'alajin na rumal ri k'ak' jas ri u banic.
1Corinthians3:14 We cäcanaj can ri u chac ri jun ri xyacan puwi' ri tac'alibal
1Corinthians3:15 We c'u ri u chac jun cächajiric
1Corinthians3:16 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ix rachoch ri Dios
1Corinthians3:17 We c'o jun cusach u wäch ri rachoch Dios
1Corinthians3:18 C'o jun musub rib. We c'o jun chixo'l ri cuchomaj chi c'o u no'j chquixo'l ri winak cho ri uwächulew camic
1Corinthians3:19 Ri qui no'j c'ut ri winak cho ri uwächulew xa' conil chuwäch ri Dios. Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Ri winak ri sibalaj quena'w che ri qui chomanic
1Corinthians3:20 Xukuje' cubij: “Ri Ajawaxel reta'm ri qui chomanic ri c'o qui no'j
1Corinthians3:21 Rumal c'u ri'
1Corinthians3:22 We are ri Pawl
1Corinthians3:23 Are c'u ri ix
1Corinthians4:1 Rajawaxic chi ri ix quiwetamaj chi uj xa' uj pataninel re ri Crist
1Corinthians4:2 Ri c'o jas yo'm pa qui k'ab
1Corinthians4:3 Ri in man quinxe'j ta wib we quik'at tzij panuwi'
1Corinthians4:4 Quinna' pa ri wanima' chi man c'o ta mac nu banom. Man ruc' ta c'u ri' in k'alajisam chi in suc'. Are c'u ri Ajawaxel cäk'atow tzij panuwi'.
1Corinthians4:5 Je c'u ri' c'o jun jasach mik'at tzij puwi'
1Corinthians4:6 Wachalal
1Corinthians4:7 Rumal ri'
1Corinthians4:8 C'o chi iwuc' ronojel ri quiwaj
1Corinthians4:9 Quinchomaj c'ut chi ri Dios u banom chke uj ri uj takomxenlab chi uj q'uisbal que conojel
1Corinthians4:10 Ri uj uj con pa ri Crist
1Corinthians4:11 C'ä pa we jok'otaj ri' cujnumic
1Corinthians4:12 Cäkacos kib che ri chac ruc' ri ka k'ab. Aretak cujyok'ic
1Corinthians4:13 Cäbix itzel tak tzij chkij
1Corinthians4:14 Man quintz'ibaj ta wa' che resaxic i q'uixbal. Xane' quinya' i no'j je jas ri u ya'ic qui no'j ri lok'alaj tak alc'ualaxelab.
1Corinthians4:15 Pune' e c'o lajuj mil yuk'ul tak iwech pa ri Crist
1Corinthians4:16 Quixinbochi'j c'ut
1Corinthians4:17 Rumal wa' xintak bic ri Timotey iwuc'
1Corinthians4:18 E c'o jujun quetzelam quib
1Corinthians4:19 Quinbe chanim iwuc'
1Corinthians4:20 Ri rajawibal c'ut ri Dios man xak ta tzijtzotem
1Corinthians4:21 ¿Jas ri quiwaj? ¿La quinbe iwuc' ruc' xic'ay pa nu k'ab o ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj xukuje' ch'uch'ujalaj uxlabal?
1Corinthians5:1 Kastzij xtatajic chi c'o jun chiwe cuban macunic cuc' ixokib
1Corinthians5:2 Ri ix c'ut i nimarisam iwib. Ri are ta ne quixbisonic
1Corinthians5:3 Are c'u ri in
1Corinthians5:4 Chimulij ba' iwib pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel Jesus
1Corinthians5:5 Chijacha ba' ri achi ri' pa u k'ab ri Satanas rech cäsach u wäch ri u cuerp
1Corinthians5:6 Man utz ta ri u nimarisaxic iwib. ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri jubik' ch'am cuch'amarisaj ronojel ri k'or?
1Corinthians5:7 Chiwesaj ba' ri ojer ch'am
1Corinthians5:8 Je c'u ri'
1Corinthians5:9 Xintz'ibaj bic chiwe pa ri wuj chi rajawaxic quitas iwib chquij ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab.
1Corinthians5:10 Man quinbij ta c'ut chi quitas iwib chquij ri winak aj uwächulew ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab
1Corinthians5:11 Ri nu tz'ibam bic chiwe
1Corinthians5:12 ¿La quink'at lo tzij in paquiwi' ri man e cojonelab taj? ¿La ma ta rajawaxic are quik'at tzij paquiwi' ri e cojonelab chic?
1Corinthians5:13 Are c'u ri winak ri man e cojonelab taj
1Corinthians6:1 We c'o jun chiwe
1Corinthians6:2 O ¿la ma ta iweta'm chi ri winak aj Dios cäquik'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak re ri uwächulew? We cäk'at na tzij paquiwi' ri winak re ri uwächulew iwumal
1Corinthians6:3 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi cäkak'at na tzij paquiwi' ri tako'n aj chicaj? ¡E ta c'u lo ri jastak re we c'aslemal ri'!
1Corinthians6:4 We c'o i ch'o'j chquij ri jastak re we c'aslemal ri'
1Corinthians6:5 Quinbij wa' rech quixq'uixic. ¿La ma ta c'o jun ri c'o u no'j chixo'l
1Corinthians6:6 ¡Man xuwi ta quech'ojin jujun achalaxelab cuc' jujun chic xane' caquic'am bic ri qui ch'o'j chquiwäch ri e man cojonelab taj!
1Corinthians6:7 Are jun tzakmajic wa' chiwe we quic'am bic ri i ch'o'j chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij. ¿La ma ta utz na quich'ij ri c'ax ri cäban chiwe? ¿La ma ta utz na quicuyu' pune' ta queläk'ax ri jastak iwe?
1Corinthians6:8 Ri ix c'ut man utz ta ri quibano
1Corinthians6:9 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri winak man e suc' taj man cäquechbej ta ri rajawibal ri Dios? Mixsubutajic. Ri quebanow macunic cuc' ixokib achijab
1Corinthians6:10 mawi ri eläk'omab
1Corinthians6:11 E c'o c'u jujun chiwe e je tak wa' nabe canok. Camic c'ut ix ch'ajtajinak chic
1Corinthians6:12 Ronojel ya'tal chwe quinbano
1Corinthians6:13 Ri ka wa
1Corinthians6:14 Ri Dios ri xc'astajisan ri Ajawaxel
1Corinthians6:15 ¿La ma ta iweta'm ix chi ri i cuerp u tz'akatil ri u cuerp ri Crist? ¿La quinc'am ta c'ut in we ri u tz'akatil we cuerp ri' ri rech ri Crist quinban ta c'u u tz'akatil ri u cuerp ri jun ixok quech nim ch'utin? Man je ta ri'.
1Corinthians6:16 O ¿la ma ta iweta'm chi apachin ri cätuni' ruc' jun ixok quech nim ch'utin
1Corinthians6:17 Apachin c'u ri cätuni' ruc' ri Ajawaxel
1Corinthians6:18 Chixanimaj chuwäch ri quibanic macunic cuc' ixokib achijab. Apachique chi jun mac ri camacun wi ri winak
1Corinthians6:19 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri i cuerp are rachoch ri Ruxlabal ri Dios ri c'o pa ri iwanima'
1Corinthians6:20 Pakal c'u lok'obem iwech. Chinimarisaj ba' u k'ij ri Dios ruc' ri i cuerp.
1Corinthians7:1 Chrij ri i tz'ibam ulok wuc': Utz ta na ri' we jun achi man cäc'uli' taj.
1Corinthians7:2 Xa' c'u ne
1Corinthians7:3 Ri achi chutz'akatisaj ri utz u banic che ri rixokil. Xukuje' ri ixok chutz'akatisaj ri utz u banic che ri rachajil.
1Corinthians7:4 Mawi ri ixokilaxel xuwi ta ri are' are' ta ajchak'e ri kas u cuerp
1Corinthians7:5 Miya' can ri u rikic iwib we man i chomam ix quieb. We ne quichomaj quiya' na can joropa' k'ij ri u rikic iwib rech quiban ch'awem ruc' Dios. Chirika' chi c'u iwib
1Corinthians7:6 Are wa' quinbij chiwe xa' che u ya'ic jun i no'j
1Corinthians7:7 Quinwaj ta ne chi conojel quec'oji' jas ri in. Chquijujunal c'ut yo'm jalajoj tak cuinem chque rumal ri Dios
1Corinthians7:8 Quinbij chque ri man e c'ulan taj
1Corinthians7:9 We c'u man quecuinic cäquik'il quib
1Corinthians7:10 Quintakan chque ri e c'ulanic
1Corinthians7:11 We c'u ri ixok cuya' can ri rachajil
1Corinthians7:12 Quinbij in chque ri niq'uiaj chic
1Corinthians7:13 We jun ixok c'o rachajil ri man cojonel taj
1Corinthians7:14 Ri achajilaxel ri man cojonel taj
1Corinthians7:15 We ri ixokilaxel o ri achajilaxel
1Corinthians7:16 ¿Jas aweta'm
1Corinthians7:17 Chijujunal ba' chibana' jas ri u yo'm ri Ajawaxel chiwe
1Corinthians7:18 We c'o jun kopin ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi che retal aretak xsiq'uixic
1Corinthians7:19 We jun achi kopim ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri achi wi
1Corinthians7:20 Chijujunal jas ri i banic aretak xixsiq'uixic
1Corinthians7:21 ¿La at lok'om pataninel aretak xatsiq'uixic? matoc il che wa'; we c'u cuya' cattzokopitajic
1Corinthians7:22 We c'o jun
1Corinthians7:23 Pakal c'u lok'obem iwe. Mixux c'u qui lok'om tak pataninelab ri winak.
1Corinthians7:24 Wachalal
1Corinthians7:25 Chquij ri k'apojib
1Corinthians7:26 Quinchomaj chi utz we ri achi cäcanaj canok jas ri c'olic rumal rech ri c'ax ri quekil pa tak we k'ij ri'.
1Corinthians7:27 We c'o awixokil
1Corinthians7:28 We c'u catc'uli'c
1Corinthians7:29 Are c'u wa' quinbij
1Corinthians7:30 Ri quebok'ic
1Corinthians7:31 Ri que cojow ri re we uwächulew ri'
1Corinthians7:32 Quinwaj c'ut chi ma ta c'o jas quixoc wi il. Ri achi ri man c'ulan taj
1Corinthians7:33 Are' c'u ri achi ri c'ulanic
1Corinthians7:34 Xukuje' man junam ta ri ixok ri c'ulanic ruc' ri ali ri man c'ulan taj. Ri man c'ulan taj
1Corinthians7:35 Quinbij c'u wa' chiwe rech c'o quiwechbej che
1Corinthians7:36 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi cac'uli' ruc' ri u yo'm chi u tzij che
1Corinthians7:37 We c'u c'o jun ri cuna' rib chi man c'o ta catakchinic
1Corinthians7:38 Je c'u ri' we cac'uli' ruc' ri u yo'm chi u tzij che
1Corinthians7:39 Ri ixok ri c'ulanic rajawaxic cäc'oji' ruc' ri rachajil joropa' junab ri cäc'asi ri achi. We c'u cäcäm ri rachajil
1Corinthians7:40 Quinchomaj chi are cäquicot na ri ixok malca'n we cäcanaj can chi jeri'. Quinchomaj c'ut chi c'o ri Uxlabal re ri Dios wuc'
1Corinthians8:1 Camic are quinoc chic che u bix ri tabal tok'ob ri cäcoj chquiwäch ri diosib. Kastzij ri cabixic: chi konojel c'o ketamanic; are c'u ri etamanic cuban chke chi cakaban nimal
1Corinthians8:2 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi c'o retamabal
1Corinthians8:3 Are c'u ri cälok'ok'en ri Dios
1Corinthians8:4 Chrij c'u ri wa ri cojom chquiwäch tak ri diosib
1Corinthians8:5 Pune' e c'o jujun chic ri cäbix diosib chque
1Corinthians8:6 chke c'u uj xa' jun Dios c'olic
1Corinthians8:7 Man conojel ta c'ut queta'm wa'. Jujun ri e nak'atal can che qui k'ijilaxic ri diosib
1Corinthians8:8 Man rumal ta c'u rech ri ka wa cujc'amowax rumal ri Dios. We man cäkatijo
1Corinthians8:9 Miya' c'u c'olbal chi rumal ri etamanic ri c'o iwuc' qui bano chi ri e tukar pa ri qui cojonic quekaj pa ri macunic.
1Corinthians8:10 We c'u ri at ri e aweta'm we jastak ri'
1Corinthians8:11 We je cäban ri'
1Corinthians8:12 Aretak ri ix quebisoc ri quetamabal c'uxaj ri achalaxelab ri c'ä maja' e co pa ri qui cojonic
1Corinthians8:13 Rumal ri'
1Corinthians9:1 Kastzij in ya'tal chwe ri ya'tal che jun takom
1Corinthians9:2 We man in takom chque niq'uiaj chic
1Corinthians9:3 Are wa' quinbij che u to'ic wib chquiwäch ri cäquiban tzij chwij:
1Corinthians9:4 ¿La ma ta ya'tal chke chi cujwa'ic
1Corinthians9:5 Takal chwe xukuje' chi quinc'am bic jun ixokilaxel wuc' ri cojonel rech quinrachilaj bic
1Corinthians9:6 O ¿la xak xuwi ri in wachil ri Bernabe cujchacun na cuc' ri ka k'ab che u ch'äquic ri cajwataj chke?
1Corinthians9:7 ¿La c'o ta lo jun ajch'o'j ri ma ta cätojic? ¿La c'o ta lo jun cutic uva
1Corinthians9:8 Man quinbij ta wa' chi xa ta ne qui chomanic winak
1Corinthians9:9 Tz'ibatal c'u pa ri pixab: “Mach'uk u tza'm ri wacax aretak cuban yak'oj.” ¿La cubij wa' rumal chi coc il ri Dios chque ri wacax?
1Corinthians9:10 O ¿la rumal kech uj cubij wi? Rumal kech uj xtz'ibax canok. Keta'm chi ri jun ri cätajinic
1Corinthians9:11 We uj ka ticom jastak aj uxlabal pa ri iwanima'
1Corinthians9:12 We jule' winak chic ya'tal chque chi cäquic'am que ri jastak iwe
1Corinthians9:13 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri quechacun pa ri tastalicalaj tak jastak re ri rachoch Dios
1Corinthians9:14 Jewa' xukuje' xtakan wi ri Ajawaxel chi ri cäquitzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij
1Corinthians9:15 Are c'u ri in mawi c'o wechben che wa'. Mawi ta ne quintz'ibaj ta ba' wa' chiwe camic che u tz'onoxic chiwe chi c'o chiya' chwe. ¡Chwe in are utz na chi quincämic chi
1Corinthians9:16 Man quinnimarisaj ta wib rumal ri u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij. Rajawaxic c'ut chi quintzijoj. ¡Tok'ob nu wäch we man quintzijoj ri utzalaj tak tzij!
1Corinthians9:17 We ruc' ri nu rayinic
1Corinthians9:18 Je c'u ri'
1Corinthians9:19 Pune' man c'o jun winak cätakan panuwi'
1Corinthians9:20 Chquixo'l ri aj judeyib quinc'ut wib chi in aj judey
1Corinthians9:21 Che qui ch'äquic ri man e c'o ta chuxe' ri u pixab ri Moises
1Corinthians9:22 Chquixo'l ri man c'o ta qui chuk'ab
1Corinthians9:23 Ronojel wa' quinbano rumal rech ri tzij re colobal ib
1Corinthians9:24 ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi ri cäquic'am canim
1Corinthians9:25 Ri caquisuc'umaj quib che u tijic qui chuk'ab che ch'äcanic pa jun nak'atisanic
1Corinthians9:26 Ri in jewa' quinbano: man quinc'am ta wanim ri je ta ne ma ta quinwilo jawije' quinbe wi. Ri in jewa' quinch'ojinic
1Corinthians9:27 Xane' quinban c'ax che ri nu cuerp
1Corinthians10:1 Wachalal
1Corinthians10:2 Conojel xejunataj ruc' ri Moises aretak xejunataj chuxe' ri sutz' xukuje' pa ri plo.
1Corinthians10:3 Conojel xa jun u wäch wa xquitijo
1Corinthians10:4 Conojel xcuq'uiaj que ri xa junam uq'uia' aj uxlabal. Rumal rech chi xcuq'uiaj que ri ja' ri xpe pa ri abaj aj uxlabal ri junam benak cuc'. Ri abaj ri' are ri Crist.
1Corinthians10:5 E q'ui c'u chque ri man xquiban ta ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios. Rumal ri' xecäm can pa ri chaki'j uwo sak.
1Corinthians10:6 Ronojel wa' xc'ulmaxic rech cux jun c'utbal chkawäch uj
1Corinthians10:7 Mik'ijilaj tak e diosib
1Corinthians10:8 Mixmacun cuc' ixokib achijab
1Corinthians10:9 Mäkac'ambejej ri Ajawaxel
1Corinthians10:10 Mawi mixch'ach'atic
1Corinthians10:11 Xquic'ulmaj ronojel wa' rech cux jun c'utbal chkawäch uj. Xtz'ibax c'u che ka pixbexic uj ri uj c'o pa tak we q'uisbal tak k'ij junab ri'.
1Corinthians10:12 Je c'u ri'
1Corinthians10:13 Man i rikom ta c'u jun c'ambejenic ri ma ta aj winak; jic c'ut ri Dios chi man cuya' taj quixc'ambejexic xane' xak xuwi ri quixcuin che u k'atixic u wäch
1Corinthians10:14 Rumal ri'
1Corinthians10:15 Quinbij wa' chiwe rumal rech chi quixcuin che u ch'obic. Kas ba' chichomaj rij ri u tzij.
1Corinthians10:16 Aretak cakuq'uiaj ke che ri tewichimalaj kumubal ri rumal cakaya' maltioxinic che ri Dios cakajunaj kib ruc' ri Crist pa ri u cämical; aretak cäkatij ri caxlanwa ri cakapiro
1Corinthians10:17 Xa' c'u jun ri caxlanwa. Ri uj pune' uj q'ui
1Corinthians10:18 Kas chebiwila' ri aj israelib; ri quequitij quech ri awaj ri e chi'm che tabal tok'ob ri' caquic'am quech ri tabal tok'ob.
1Corinthians10:19 ¿Jas c'u ri quinbij? ¿La quinbij lo chi c'o qui banic ri diosib? ¿La quinbij lo chi c'o qui banic ri jastak ri e yo'm chquiwäch ri diosib ri'?
1Corinthians10:20 Man je ta c'u ri'. Xane' quinbij chi ri tabal tok'ob ri cäquiya' ri winak chquiwäch ri qui diosib
1Corinthians10:21 Man cuya' taj quiwuq'uiaj ta iwe che ri ruq'uiabal ri Ajawaxel
1Corinthians10:22 O ¿la cäkayac royowal ri Ajawaxel? ¿La are ta c'u lo c'o na ka chuk'ab uj chuwäch ri are'?
1Corinthians10:23 Ronojel ya'tal u banic wumal
1Corinthians10:24 C'o jun mutzucuj ri utz che chbil rib
1Corinthians10:25 Chilok'o' chitija' ronojel ri cac'ayix chupam ri c'ayibal ti'j
1Corinthians10:26 Rumal chi ri Ajawaxel are ajchak'e ri ulew
1Corinthians10:27 We c'o jun ri man cojonel taj quixusiq'uij che jun wa'im
1Corinthians10:28 We c'o jun cubij chiwe chi yo'm che u k'ijilaxic jun dios
1Corinthians10:29 Man quinbij ta rumal rech ri retamabal i c'u'x ix
1Corinthians10:30 We c'u quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal ri quintijo
1Corinthians10:31 Je c'u ri'
1Corinthians10:32 Mixux ya'l tzakibal chque ri aj judeyib
1Corinthians10:33 Ri in
1Corinthians11:1 Chibana' iwe ri quinban in
1Corinthians11:2 Quinya' i k'ij chi amak'el quinnataj chiwe e i takem c'ut ri tijonic ri e nu k'axem chiwe.
1Corinthians11:3 Quinwaj c'ut quiwetamaj chi ri Crist are' ri qui jolom ri achijab chquijujunal
1Corinthians11:4 Ronojel achi ri cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios
1Corinthians11:5 Ronojel c'u ixok ri cuban ch'awem ruc' Dios
1Corinthians11:6 We ri ixok man cuch'uk ta ri u jolom
1Corinthians11:7 Man takal taj che ri achi cuch'uk ri u jolom
1Corinthians11:8 Aretak xeban ri winak
1Corinthians11:9 Xukuje' man xban ta ri achi rumal rech ri ixok
1Corinthians11:10 Rumal ri'
1Corinthians11:11 Are c'ut
1Corinthians11:12 Je jas ri ixok esam che ri achi
1Corinthians11:13 Chichomaj ba' ix
1Corinthians11:14 Ri ka c'olem cujutijoj chi jun q'uixbal ri' we ri achi xak ja'e che caq'uiy ri u wi';
1Corinthians11:15 are c'u ri ixok
1Corinthians11:16 We c'o jun cäraj cuban ch'o'j chrij wa'
1Corinthians11:17 Quinbij chiwe jun jasach man utz taj ri cätajin quibano. Aretak quimulij iwib
1Corinthians11:18 Ri nabe are wa'
1Corinthians11:19 ¡Man c'o ta quieblan c'uxaj chi ri ix quitasala' iwib pa tak k'at
1Corinthians11:20 Ri ix
1Corinthians11:21 Rumal rech chi aretak quixwa'ic
1Corinthians11:22 ¿La ma ta c'o iwachoch jawije' quixwa' wi xukuje' quixuq'uian wi? ¿La ma ta nim quiwil wi ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios? ¿Jasche quiwesaj qui q'uixbal ri man c'o ta que? ¿Jas c'u quinbij chiwe? ¿La quinbij lo chi utz ri cätajin quibano? Jayi'
1Corinthians11:23 Che c'u ri Ajawaxel xinc'am wi ri tijonic ri xinya' chiwe: Chi ri Ajawaxel Jesus
1Corinthians11:24 aretak ya'tajinak chic ri maltioxinic rumal che ri Dios
1Corinthians11:25 Xukuje'
1Corinthians11:26 Joropa' mul quitij ri caxlanwa ri'
1Corinthians11:27 Je c'u ri' apachin ri cutij ri caxlanwa o cäruq'uiaj re che ri ruq'uiabal ri Ajawaxel
1Corinthians11:28 Rajawaxic chijujunal quinic'oj ri iwanima'. Te c'u ri' cuya' quitij ri caxlanwa
1Corinthians11:29 Apachin c'u ri cutij ri caxlanwa xukuje' caruq'uiaj re che ri uq'uiabal
1Corinthians11:30 Rumal wa' e c'o q'ui yawabib chixo'l
1Corinthians11:31 We ta kas utzalaj u nic'oxic kib cakabano
1Corinthians11:32 pune' c'u cäc'äjisax ka wäch rumal ri Ajawaxel xa' rech cujetamanic
1Corinthians11:33 Je c'u ri'
1Corinthians11:34 We c'o jachin cänumic
1Corinthians12:1 Wachalal
1Corinthians12:2 Iweta'm chi aretak c'ä majok chixcojonok i sachom i be
1Corinthians12:3 Rumal ri' quinya' retamaxic chiwe
1Corinthians12:4 Q'ui qui wäch tak u sipanic ri Uxlabaxel chke. Xa c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel ri cäyowic.
1Corinthians12:5 Q'ui qui wäch ri pataninic ri quebanic. Xa c'u jun Ajawaxel cäkapatanij.
1Corinthians12:6 Q'ui qui wäch tak ri chac. Xa c'u jun Dios cächacun pa ka c'aslemal konojel.
1Corinthians12:7 Ri Dios u yo'm chke chkajujunal ri u k'alajisaxic ri Uxlabaxel pa ri ka c'aslemal
1Corinthians12:8 Jun yo'm che
1Corinthians12:9 Jun yo'm cojonic che
1Corinthians12:10 Jun yo'm che ri u banic tak mayibal. Ri jun chic yo'm che ri u k'axexic u tzij ri Dios. Jujun chic cuya' ri Dios chque ri retamaxic u wäch ri uxlabal ri e subunelab xukuje' ri kas Ruxlabal ri Dios. Jujun chic cäya' chque chi quech'aw pa tak ch'abal. Cäya' chi c'u na chque jujun chic ri u k'alajisaxic ri bim pa tak we ch'abal ri'.
1Corinthians12:11 Xa c'u jun ri Uxlabaxel c'olic
1Corinthians12:12 Je jas ri cuerp
1Corinthians12:13 Xak c'u junam chke konojel
1Corinthians12:14 Xukuje' ri cuerp man xa' ta jun ri u tz'akatil
1Corinthians12:15 We ta c'u cubij ri akanaj: “Man in ta rech ri cuerp
1Corinthians12:16 We ta cubij ri xiquinaj: “Man in ta rech ri cuerp
1Corinthians12:17 We ta ronojel ri cuerp bak'wächaj
1Corinthians12:18 Ri Dios c'ut e u cojom chquijujunal ri u tz'akatil ri ka cuerp
1Corinthians12:19 We ta conojel xa' jun tz'akatil
1Corinthians12:20 Pune' e q'ui ri u tz'akatil
1Corinthians12:21 Ri bak'wächaj man cuya' taj cubij che ri k'abaj: “Man at rajawaxic ta chwe.” Xukuje' ri jolomaj man cuya' taj cubij chque ri akanaj: “Man ix rajawaxic ta chwe.”
1Corinthians12:22 Xane' ri tz'akatil ri cäkachomaj chi man c'o ta qui chuk'ab
1Corinthians12:23 Ri e u tz'akatil ri cuerp ri cäkachomaj chi sibalaj man nim ta queilic
1Corinthians12:24 Ri man rajawaxic ta u banic chque ri tz'akatil ri nimak na qui banic. Ri Dios je u cholajixic wa' ri cuerp xubano chi ri e tz'akatil ri man kas ta e nimak qui banic caya' na qui k'ij.
1Corinthians12:25 Jeri' man cäquetzelaj ta quib ri u tz'akatil ri cuerp
1Corinthians12:26 We jun u tz'akatil ri cuerp curik c'ax
1Corinthians12:27 Ri ix c'ut ix u cuerp ri Crist
1Corinthians12:28 Ri xebucoj ri Dios pa ri comon cojonelab e are wa': nabe xebucoj ri takomxenlab
1Corinthians12:29 Man conojel taj e takomxenlab
1Corinthians12:30 Man conojel taj yo'm chque quecunanic
1Corinthians12:31 Are c'u sibalaj chebitzucuj ri nimak tak u sipanic ri Dios. Quinc'ut c'u na jun be chiwäch ri sibalaj utz na chquiwäch conojel wa'.
1Corinthians13:1 We ta quinch'aw pa ri qui ch'abal ri winak
1Corinthians13:2 We ta quink'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chwe rumal ri Dios
1Corinthians13:3 We ta quebenya' conojel ri jastak we che qui tzukic ri mebayib
1Corinthians13:4 Ri c'o lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x are ri' cuk'i' ri c'ax
1Corinthians13:5 man cuban ta jastak ri q'uixbal qui banic
1Corinthians13:6 Man cäquicot ta che ri man suq'uil taj
1Corinthians13:7 Ronojel cucoch'o
1Corinthians13:8 Ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj mawi ta jumul casach u wäch. Cäpe jun k'ij aretak ri winak man cäquik'axej ta chic ri u tzij ri Dios
1Corinthians13:9 E are tak c'ut ri e etamanic xukuje' ri e u k'axexic tak ri e u tzij ri Dios man e uxinak taj tz'akat.
1Corinthians13:10 Quebopan c'u na pa ri qui q'uisbalil aretak chpe ri tz'akatil.
1Corinthians13:11 Aretak c'ä in ac'al
1Corinthians13:12 Camic je ta ne cujca'y pa jun ilbal ib ri man kas ta k'alaj. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij aretak kas quel na ronojel chi sak chkawäch. Camic weta'm jubik'
1Corinthians13:13 E oxib jastak e c'olic ri kas e jekejoj wi: ri cojonic
1Corinthians14:1 Chicojo' i chuk'ab rech cäc'oji' lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x. Sibalaj chebirayij ri jastak ri cuya' ri Uxlabaxel chiwe. Are c'u sibalaj chirayij ri u k'axexic ri u tzij ri Dios.
1Corinthians14:2 Ri jun ri cätzijon pa jalan tak ch'abal
1Corinthians14:3 Are c'u ri jun ri cuk'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm che rumal ri Dios
1Corinthians14:4 Ri jun ri cätzijon pa tak ch'abal
1Corinthians14:5 Je c'u ri' quinwaj ta ne chi iwonojel quixtzijon pa tak ch'abal. Are c'u sibalaj quinwaj chi quik'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Dios. Ri jun ri cuk'axej ri u tzij ri Dios chque ri winak
1Corinthians14:6 Rumal c'u ri'
1Corinthians14:7 Ri jastak ri man c'o ta qui c'aslemal ri quecoj che k'ojom
1Corinthians14:8 We ta ri trompet ma ta k'alaj ri rok'ebal
1Corinthians14:9 Jeri' ri ix xukuje'
1Corinthians14:10 E q'ui qui wäch tak ch'abal c'o cho ri uwächulew. Man c'o ta c'u jun ri ma ta cäch'obotajic.
1Corinthians14:11 We man quinch'ob ri cäquibij ri tzij
1Corinthians14:12 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix
1Corinthians14:13 Rumal ri' ri jun ri cätzijon pa jun ch'abal chic
1Corinthians14:14 We quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios pa jun ch'abal chic
1Corinthians14:15 ¿Jas c'u ri quinbano? Quinban na ch'awem ruc' Dios man xuwi ta ruc' ri wanima'
1Corinthians14:16 We canimarisaj u k'ij ri Dios xak xuwi ruc' ri awanima'
1Corinthians14:17 Pune' utz ri a maltioxinic cabano

1Corinthians14:19 pa ri comon cojonelab

1Corinthians14:21 Tz'ibatal c'u pa ri pixab: “Quebench'abej na we winak ri' pa niq'uiaj tak ch'abal chic xukuje' cumal jule' tak winak chic. Mawi c'u jeri' quinquitatabej na
1Corinthians14:22 Je ba' ri' chi ri tzijonem pa tak ch'abal
1Corinthians14:23 Rumal ri'

1Corinthians14:25 quel na chi sak ri jastak ri e c'o pa ranima'. Je c'u ri' chi cutzak na rib cho ri ulew

1Corinthians14:31 We je cäban wa'

1Corinthians14:39 Je ba' ri'

1Corinthians15:7 C'äte c'u ri' xuc'ut rib chuwäch ri Santiag
1Corinthians15:8 Chuq'uisbalil xuc'ut c'u na rib chnuwäch jacha' ta ne chuwäch jun ne' ri calaxic aretak c'ä majok copan u k'ijol.

1Corinthians15:26 Ri q'uisbal c'ulel ri cusach na u wäch

1Corinthians15:34 Kas chichomaj na jas ri quibano

1Corinthians15:39 Conojel ri c'o qui ti'jal

1Corinthians15:44 Cämuk can jun cuerp aj uwächulew

2Corinthians1:4 Ri are' cucu'bisaj ka c'u'x pa conojel ri ka c'axc'olil

2Corinthians1:6 We cäkarik c'axc'olil uj
2Corinthians1:7 Sibalaj cu'l c'u ka c'u'x chiwij. Keta'm chi jas ri u rikic iwe ri c'axc'olil
2Corinthians1:8 Cäkaj c'ut

2Corinthians1:10 Ri are' xujuto' chuwäch jun c'axalaj cämical
2Corinthians1:11 we ri ix cujito' pa ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios
2Corinthians1:12 Sibalaj cujquicot rumal wa'

2Corinthians1:14 je jas ri iwetamam chi jubik'

2Corinthians1:23 Quincoj ri Dios che k'alajisanel puwi' ri wanima'
2Corinthians1:24 Man cujtakan ta puwi' ri i cojonic. Xane' quixkato' rech c'o i quicotemal. Co chi c'u ix tac'al pa ri i cojonic.

2Corinthians2:3 Are c'u xintz'ibaj bic wa' chiwe
2Corinthians2:4 Aretak xintz'ibaj bic we wuj ri' chiwe
2Corinthians2:5 We c'o jun u yo'm bis
2Corinthians2:6 Ruc' wa' we yajanic ri' che ri achi ri'

2Corinthians2:9 Rumal c'u ri' xintz'ibam chiwe
2Corinthians2:10 We ri ix quisach u mac jun
2Corinthians2:11 Jewa' rech man c'o ta jas cuch'äc ri Satanas chkij. Kas cäkach'ob c'ut ri u nawinic.
2Corinthians2:12 Aretak xinopan pa Troas ri nimalaj tinimit che u tzijoxic ri u tijonic ri Crist
2Corinthians2:13 Man xuxlan ta c'u ri wanima'

2Corinthians2:16 Chque ri cäsach qui wäch
2Corinthians2:17 Uj man uj ta junam cuc' e q'ui ri cäquesaj qui ch'äcoj che ri tijonic ri cuya' ri Dios
2Corinthians3:1 ¿La cäkabij lo jumul chic chiwe chi sibalaj utz ka banic? ¿La rajawaxic chi cäkaya' bic wuj chiwe rech quiwetamaj chi uj utz
2Corinthians3:2 Ix c'u ri' ri ix ka wuj
2Corinthians3:3 K'alajisam chi c'ut chi ix u wuj ri Crist
2Corinthians3:4 Are cu'lbal ka c'u'x wa' chrij ri Dios rumal ri Crist.
2Corinthians3:5 Man cäkachomaj taj chi cujcuin che u banic jun jasach xa' ka tuquiel. Xane' are ri Dios cäyo'w ka chuk'ab che u banic ri cäkabano.
2Corinthians3:6 Ri Dios xuya' chke chi cäkatzijoj ri c'ac' u c'ulwächinic. Man rech ta ri pixab ri tz'ibatalic
2Corinthians3:7 Ri pixab tz'ibam cho tak abaj. Ruc' c'u juluwem xpetic
2Corinthians3:8 ¡sibalaj nim c'u na ri u juluwem ri c'ac' c'ulwächinic ri yo'm chke rumal ri Uxlabaxel!
2Corinthians3:9 We c'o u juluwem ri pixab ri cuban chke chi cäc'äjisax ka wäch
2Corinthians3:10 C'o u juluwem ri pixab nabe. Camic c'ut man c'o ta chic
2Corinthians3:11 We c'o u juluwem ri jun jasach ri cäsach u wäch
2Corinthians3:12 Cu'l ka c'u'x chrij wa'. Rumal ri' cäkatzijoj ronojel
2Corinthians3:13 Man je taj jas ri Moises
2Corinthians3:14 Ri qui ch'obobal c'ut e abajirinak; c'ä pa ri k'ij camic jekelinak ri junam ch'ukubal aretak cäsiq'uix u wäch ri ojer c'ulwächinic. Man esam ta ri ch'ukubal chque
2Corinthians3:15 C'ä pa ri k'ij camic
2Corinthians3:16 Aretak cäquiya' can ri ojer c'aslemal xukuje' quecojon che ri Ajawaxel
2Corinthians3:17 Are' c'ut ri Ajawaxel are ri Uxlabaxel. Jawije' c'ut ri c'o wi ri Ruxlabal ri Ajawaxel chi c'o wi torotajic.
2Corinthians3:18 Ri uj c'ut konojel man ch'ukutal ta chic ri ka palaj. Cäkak'alajisaj ri u juluwem ri Ajawaxel jas jun ilbal ib. Je c'u ri' cujq'uextajic
2Corinthians4:1 Je c'u ri' man cäq'uistaj ta ka c'u'x
2Corinthians4:2 Man cäkaban ta q'uixbalalaj tak jastak chi c'uyal; man quixkasub taj

2Corinthians11:26 Q'ui mul nu banom tak binem. Xak quieb xubij panuwi' pa tak nima'

Galatians1:6 Quinmayij chi sibalaj chanim xiya' can ri Dios
Galatians1:7 Kastzij man c'o ta jun tzijol chic re colobal ib. E c'o c'u jujun ri quixquisacho

Galatians1:9 Jas ri ka bim canok
Galatians1:10 Ri in man quintzucuj ta ri utz wilic cumal ri winak
Galatians1:11 Quinya' retamaxic chiwe
Galatians1:12 Man xinc'am ta ri utzalaj tak tzij che jun winak
Galatians1:13 I tom chi c'ut jas ri xinban ojer aretak junam nu wäch cuc' ri aj judeyib. Sibalaj xinban c'ax che ri u comon cojonelab ri Dios
Galatians1:14 Pa ri qui cojonic ri aj judeyib
Galatians1:15 Are c'u ri Dios xinucha' ulok aretak c'ä majok quinalaxic
Galatians1:16 xuk'alajisaj ri u C'ojol chnuwäch
Galatians1:17 Mawi xinpaki' pa Jerusalen cuc' ri nabe xeboc che takom chnuwäch in. Xane' xinbe pa Arab
Galatians1:18 E oc'owinak chi oxib junab
Galatians1:19 Man c'o ta chi jun xinwil u wäch chque ri takomxenlab
Galatians1:20 Ri quintz'ibaj bic chiwe
Galatians1:21 Te c'u ri' xinbe pa tak ri ulew re Sir xukuje' re Silisiy.
Galatians1:22 Man etamatal ta c'u ne nu wäch cumal ri comon cojonelab re ri Crist ri e c'o pa Judey.

Galatians2:1 E oc'owinak chi cajlajuj junab
Galatians2:2 Xinbec rumal rech chi ri Dios xuc'ut chnuwäch chi rajawaxic jeri' quinbano. Xebench'abej ri quechomaxic chi e c'amal tak be xa' pa qui tuquiel wi
Galatians2:3 Mawi ri Tit ri c'o wuc'
Galatians2:4 Jujun tak subunelab tak achalaxelab quinimom quib chkaxo'l chic'uyal
Galatians2:5 Mawi c'u jun jok'otaj xkaya' ta kib pa qui k'ab
Galatians2:6 Man xequiya' ta c'u c'ac' tak tijonic chwe ri etamatal qui wäch chi e c'amal tak be (ri in man cajwataj ta c'u chwe ri e qui banic ulok
Galatians2:7 Man xquibij ta c'u jun c'ac' takanic chwe
Galatians2:8 Are c'u ri Dios ri xuban che ri Lu' chi xoc che takom chque ri aj judeyib
Galatians2:9 Ri Santiag
Galatians2:10 Xak xuwi xujquibochi'j chi quenataj ri mebayib chke. Are c'u wa' nu cojom nu chuk'ab in che u banic.
Galatians2:11 Aretak c'u xopan ri Lu' pa Antioquiy
Galatians2:12 Aretak majok quebopan jujun ri takom ulok rumal ri Santiag
Galatians2:13 Xukuje' ne ri niq'uiaj aj judeyib chic xquijunamaj qui wäch ruc' ri Lu'
Galatians2:14 Aretak c'u xinwilo chi man suc' taj quebinic jas ri kastzij re ri tzijol re colobal ib
Galatians2:15 Ri uj uj aj judeyib uj alam
Galatians2:16 Keta'm chi man c'o ta jun winak cäk'alajisaxic chi suc' chuwäch ri Dios rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab; xane' rumal ri qui cojonic che ri Jesucrist. Ri uj xukuje' xujcojon che ri Crist Jesus
Galatians2:17 We c'u ri uj
Galatians2:18 We c'u ri xinwulij
Galatians2:19 Ri in c'ut xincäm chuwäch ri pixab. Are ri pixab xbanow chwe chi xincämic
Galatians2:20 Junam xinrip ruc' ri Crist cho ri ripibal. Man in ta chic in c'aslic
Galatians2:21 Man quinwetzelaj ta u wäch ri u tok'ob ri Dios; we ta c'u cacuyutaj ri u mac jun rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab
Galatians3:1 ¡Ay
Galatians3:2 Xak xuwi quinwaj quinta' chiwe: ¿La xic'am ri Uxlabaxel rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab
Galatians3:3 ¿La xa' man quiwaj taj quixch'obonic? i chaplem ulok rumal ri Uxlabaxel. Camic c'ut
Galatians3:4 ¿La xak ta c'u lok' i rikom sibalaj c'ax? Man ya'tal taj chi xak ta lok'.
Galatians3:5 Ri Dios ri u yo'm ri Ruxlabal chiwe
Galatians3:6 Are ri Abraham xcojon che ri Dios
Galatians3:7 Chich'obo' ba' chi ri quecojonic
Galatians3:8 Ri Tz'ibatalic cubij c'u ulok chi ri Dios cuk'alajisaj chi e suc' ri man aj judeyib taj rumal ri cojonic. Xutzijoj ulok ri utzalaj tak tzijol che ri Abraham aretak xubij: “Conojel ri nimak tak tinimit quetewichitaj na rumal awech.”
Galatians3:9 Jeri' chi ri quecojonic
Galatians3:10 Conojel ri qui jiquibam qui c'u'x chrij ri pixab
Galatians3:11 Quel c'u chi sak chi man c'o ta jun cäk'alajisaxic chi suc' chuwäch ri Dios rumal ri pixab. Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Ri suc'alaj winak cäc'asi' na rumal ri cojonic.”
Galatians3:12 Are c'u ri pixab man c'o ta re che ri cojonic
Galatians3:13 Are ri Crist xujcoloben chuxe' ri u c'okonic ri pixab
Galatians3:14 Je xuban wa' rech cäpe ri u tewichibal ri Abraham paquiwi' ri man aj judeyib taj rumal ri Crist Jesus
Galatians3:15 Wachalal
Galatians3:16 Ri Dios xubij ri chi'm che ri Abraham xukuje' chque ri rija'l. Ri Tz'ibatalic man cubij taj: “Chque ri e awija'lil”
Galatians3:17 Quinbij c'u wa': Ri Dios xuya' che ri Abraham jun c'ulwächinic
Galatians3:18 We ta cäc'am ri echbal ri cuya' ri Dios rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab
Galatians3:19 ¿Jas c'u cupatanij ri pixab? Xya'taj che u c'utic jas ri mac cäquiban ri winak
Galatians3:20 Jun ch'awenel man xa ta re jun
Galatians3:21 ¿La cubij lo wa' chi ri pixab quebuc'ulelaj ri e u chi'nic ri Dios? Man je taj. We ta xya' jun pixab ri cäcuin che u ya'ic c'aslemal
Galatians3:22 Ri Tz'ibatalic cuc'utu chi conojel e tz'apital rumal ri mac. Jeri' ri chi'm cäya' chque ri cojonelab rumal ri cojonic che ri Jesucrist.
Galatians3:23 Aretak c'ä majok cäpe ri cojonic
Galatians3:24 Jeri' ri pixab xujuchajij
Galatians3:25 Are c'u ri camic ri ulinak chic ri cojonic
Galatians3:26 Iwonojel c'ut ix ralc'ual ri Dios rumal ri cojonic che ri Crist Jesus.
Galatians3:27 Iwonojel c'ut ix junatajinak pa ri Crist
Galatians3:28 Man c'o ta c'u aj judeyib
Galatians3:29 We ix rech ri Crist
Galatians4:1 Quinbij c'ut: Aretak c'ä ac'al na ri echbenel
Galatians4:2 C'o c'u pa qui k'ab chajinelab ri quetakan puwi' c'ä pa ri k'ij ri bim canok rumal ri u tat.
Galatians4:3 Jeri' xukuje' ri uj
Galatians4:4 C'ä pa ri k'ij aretak xesuc'umataj ronojel
Galatians4:5 rumal kech uj ri uj c'o chuxe' ri pixab
Galatians4:6 Rumal rech chi ix alc'ualaxelab
Galatians4:7 Rumal ri' man at lok'om pataninel ta chic
Galatians4:8 Ri ix ojer
Galatians4:9 Camic c'ut
Galatians4:10 Quebichajij ri k'ij
Galatians4:11 ¡Quinxe'j wib rumal iwech
Galatians4:12 Wachalal
Galatians4:13 Iweta'm c'ut chi xintzijoj ri tzij re colobal ib chiwe nabe mul rumal jun yabil ri xinrik pa ri nu cuerp.
Galatians4:14 We yabil ri' jun c'ambejebal wa' chiwe
Galatians4:15 ¿Jawije' c'o wi ri i quicotemal? Quink'alajisaj c'u chiwäch xixcuin ta ri' are ta xiwesaj ri e i bak'wäch che quiya'ic ta chwe.
Galatians4:16 ¿La rumal rech chi xinbij ri kastzij chiwe
Galatians4:17 E c'o c'u jujun ri sibalaj quixcaj
Galatians4:18 Kastzij chi utz we cujoc il chque niq'uiaj chic
Galatians4:19 Alaj tak walc'ual
Galatians4:20 ¡C'o ta banom wi in c'o ta apan chila' kas camic rech jun ta chi wi ri i ch'abexic quinbano
Galatians4:21 Ix ri quiwaj quixc'oji' chuxe' ri pixab
Galatians4:22 Tz'ibatal c'ut chi ri Abraham xec'oji' quieb u c'ojol
Galatians4:23 Ri u c'ojol ri xalax rumal ri ixok lok'om pataninel
Galatians4:24 Are wa' jun c'ambal no'j; we quieb ixokib ri' cäquiq'uexwächij ri quieb c'ulwächinic: Ri jun are u q'uexwäch ri juyub Sinai
Galatians4:25 Ri Agar are je jas ri juyub Sinai pa Arab
Galatians4:26 Are c'u ri Jerusalen ri aj chicaj
Galatians4:27 Tz'ibatal c'ut: “Chatquicotok
Galatians4:28 Wachalal
Galatians4:29 Ojer
Galatians4:30 ¿Jas c'u cubij ri Tz'ibatalic? Cubij: “Chawesaj bic ri lok'om pataninel ruc' ri ral. Man quechben ta c'u ri ral ri lok'om pataninel ruc' ri ral ri ixokil tzokopitalic.”
Galatians4:31 Rumal ri'
Galatians5:1 Ri Crist xuya' tzokopinic chke rech cujux tzokopitalic. Rumal c'u ri' co chixtac'al chupam we tzokopitajic ri' minim chi iwib jumul chuxe' ri eka'bal ri c'o paquiwi' ri lok'om tak pataninelab.
Galatians5:2 In Pawl quinbij chiwe achijab we cakopix ri u tz'umal ri u wi' ri ix achijab wi che iwetal che i suq'uirisaxic chuwäch ri Dios
Galatians5:3 Quink'alajisaj chi jumul
Galatians5:4 Ix ri quichomaj quik'alajisaj chi ix suc' rumal ri u nimaxic ri pixab
Galatians5:5 Are c'u ri uj
Galatians5:6 We ix jun ruc' ri Crist
Galatians5:7 Ri ix utz i banom can nabe. ¿Jachin xixk'atinic rech man quinimaj ta chi ri kastzij?
Galatians5:8 Ri Dios ri xixsiq'uinic
Galatians5:9 We c'o jubik' ch'am ruc' ri k'or
Galatians5:10 Cu'l nu c'u'x chiwij pa ri Ajawaxel
Galatians5:11 Wachalalib
Galatians5:12 E are' tak c'ut ri queyo'w latz' chiwe
Galatians5:13 Ri ix c'ut
Galatians5:14 Ronojel ri pixab xa' jupaj tzij cäc'amow bic
Galatians5:15 We quiti'la' iwib
Galatians5:16 Are wa' quinbij chiwe: Chibana' ri u rayibal ri Uxlabaxel
Galatians5:17 Cumal c'ut ri e aj macalaj tak qui rayinic ri winak
Galatians5:18 We c'u are' ri Uxlabaxel cäc'amow i be
Galatians5:19 K'alaj ri qui chac ri cäquiban ri qui rayibal aj winak re mac: Quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab
Galatians5:20 quequik'ijilaj tak diosib
Galatians5:21 Man cäcaj taj cäquirik utzil niq'uiaj chic
Galatians5:22 Are c'u wa' ri u wächinic ri Uxlabaxel: c'o lok'ok'ebal qui c'u'x ri winak
Galatians5:23 man cäquinimarisaj ta quib
Galatians5:24 Ri e rech ri Crist Jesus qui ripom chic ri qui banic aj winak re mac
Galatians5:25 We uj c'asc'oj rumal ri Uxlabaxel
Galatians5:26 Mäkanimarisaj kib
Galatians6:1 Wachalalib
Galatians6:2 Chito'la' iwib chuxe' tak ri e iweka'n
Galatians6:3 We c'o jun cuchomaj chi c'o u banic
Galatians6:4 Chquijujunal rajawaxic chunic'oj ri u c'aslemal; c'äte c'u ri' cuna' rib chi cäquicotic
Galatians6:5 Chquijujunal c'ut cäcuc'aj na bic ri kas queka'n.
Galatians6:6 Ri jun ri cätijox che ri u tzij ri Dios
Galatians6:7 Misub iwib
Galatians6:8 Ri jun cutic ri cäraj ri u rayibal aj winak re mac
Galatians6:9 Mäq'uistaj ba ka c'u'x che u banic ri utzil. Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij aretak cäkayac na ri wächinic
Galatians6:10 Jeri'
Galatians6:11 Chiwilampe' sibalaj nimak tak tz'ib nu tz'ibam bic chiwe ruc' ri nu k'ab.
Galatians6:12 Ri cäquicoj chuk'ab chiwe che u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi che iwetal
Galatians6:13 Mawi ne ri qui cojom ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri qui tz'umal ri e achijab wi che quetal
Galatians6:14 Ri in c'ut man quinwaj taj quinnimarisaj wib
Galatians6:15 Ri winak ri e jun ruc' ri Crist Jesus
Galatians6:16 Conojel ri cäquibano jas we takanic ri'
