Ephesians1:1 In Pawl
Ephesians1:2 Tok'ob xukuje' jamaril chc'ol ta iwuc' rumal ri Dios ka Tat
Ephesians1:3 Ka k'ijilaj ri Dios ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist
Ephesians1:4 Ri Dios xujucha' pa ri Crist aretak c'ä majok cätiquitaj ulok ri uwächulew
Ephesians1:5 Ri Dios cujulok'ok'ej
Ephesians1:6 Rumal wa' cäkak'ijilaj amak'el rumal ri juluwemalaj rutzil
Ephesians1:7 Chupam c'ut ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj uj u torom ri Dios rumal ri quic' ri xutix ri u C'ojol
Ephesians1:8 Ri Dios u c'utunisam chkawäch ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal c'u'x ri xuya' chke ruc' ronojel no'jinic
Ephesians1:9 Xuya' retamaxic chke ri u rayibal ri man etamatal ta can nabe
Ephesians1:10 Pa ri k'ij aretak cäsuc'umataj na ronojel
Ephesians1:11 Pa ri are' c'ut uj uxinak echbenelab
Ephesians1:12 Je xuban wa' rech cujc'asi' che u nimarisaxic u k'ij ri Dios
Ephesians1:13 Xukuje' c'u ri ix
Ephesians1:14 Ri Ruxlabal ri Dios are' ri u cu'lbal ka c'u'x chi cäkac'am na ri echbal ri cuya' na ri Dios chke aretak u tz'akatisam chic ri qui torotajic ri e rech
Ephesians1:15 Rumal ri'
Ephesians1:16 ronojel k'ij quinmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech
Ephesians1:17 Quintz'onoj che ri u Dios ri Kajaw Jesucrist
Ephesians1:18 Quintz'onoj che ri Dios chi cuya' ri i chomanic pa sak
Ephesians1:19 chi sibalaj nim ri u cuinem chke ri uj cojonelab
Ephesians1:20 aretak xuc'astajisaj ri Crist chquixo'l ri cäminakib
Ephesians1:21 paquiwi' conojel ri e c'o paquiwi' niq'uiaj chic
Ephesians1:22 Xebucoj conojel ri jastak chquixe' ri rakan ri Crist
Ephesians1:23 Are' c'u ri comon cojonelab are' ri u cuerp ri Crist
Ephesians2:1 Ri ix nabe ix cäminak pa tak ri iwetzelal xukuje' pa tak ri i mac.
Ephesians2:2 Xiban ri mac jas ri u beya'l we uwächulew ri'
Ephesians2:3 Jas ri e are'
Ephesians2:4 Are c'u ri Dios sibalaj xel u c'u'x chke
Ephesians2:5 Jeri' chi
Ephesians2:6 Ri Dios xujuc'astajisaj junam ruc' ri Crist Jesus
Ephesians2:7 Jewa' xubano che u c'utic pa tak ri k'ij junab ri quepe na
Ephesians2:8 Rumal ri u tok'ob ri Dios ix colotajinak chic
Ephesians2:9 Man cumal ta jastak ri quibano
Ephesians2:10 Ri Dios are' xujbanowic
Ephesians2:11 Rumal c'u ri'
Ephesians2:12 Chnataj chiwe chi ojer canok man c'o ta ri Crist iwuc'
Ephesians2:13 Camic c'ut ix jun chi ruc' ri Crist Jesus. Nabe canok sibalaj naj ix c'o wi che ri Dios
Ephesians2:14 Ri Crist are ka jamaril. Ri quieb tinimit xuban jun chque
Ephesians2:15 Pa ri u cuerp xusach u wäch ri pixab xukuje' tak ri e u takomal xukuje' tak ri e colomibal. Ri u chomanic are ri qui winakirisaxic kas pa ri are' chque ri quieb jun c'ac' winak
Ephesians2:16 Jeri' ri Crist xutanaba' ri ch'o'j ri c'o chquixo'l ri quieb tinimit rumal ri u cämical cho ri ripibal
Ephesians2:17 Ri Crist xpe c'ut
Ephesians2:18 Rumal c'u ri Crist
Ephesians2:19 Rumal c'u ri' man ix tastal ta chic che ri u tinimit ri Dios
Ephesians2:20 Ix je ta ne jun ja
Ephesians2:21 Che c'u wa' ri Crist u nuc'um wi rib ronojel ri ja caq'uiy c'ut rech cux tastalicalaj rachoch ri Ajawaxel Dios.
Ephesians2:22 Jeri' xukuje' ri ix junam cuc' ri niq'uiaj chic
Ephesians3:1 Rumal ri'
Ephesians3:2 Rajawaxic c'ut chi iweta'm chic chi ri Dios
Ephesians3:3 Ri Dios xuc'ut jastak chnuwäch ri man etamatal ta can nabe
Ephesians3:4 Aretak quisiq'uij u wäch ri wuj ri'
Ephesians3:5 Nabe canok man yo'm ta retamaxic we jastak ri' chque ri winak. C'äte camic ri Dios u c'utum chquiwäch ri u tastalic takomxenlab xukuje' ri e k'axal tak re ri u tzij rumal ri Uxlabaxel
Ephesians3:6 che u bixic wa': chi rumal ri tijonic aj colobal ib
Ephesians3:7 Ri Dios xuya' ri u tok'ob ri man takal ta wa' chwe
Ephesians3:8 In ri man nim ta nu banic chuwäch ri man nim ta u banic chquixo'l ri e aj u tinimit ri Dios
Ephesians3:9 Yo'm pa nu k'ab chi quink'alajisaj chquiwäch conojel
Ephesians3:10 Xbantaj wa' rech camic ri c'o qui takanic xukuje' ri c'o qui cuinem pa ri caj cäquetamaj rumal ri comon cojonelab ri q'ui u wäch tak u no'j ri Dios.
Ephesians3:11 Jas ri u chomam ulok ojer aretak c'ä majok cätiquiritaj ri uwächulew
Ephesians3:12 Rumal ri are'
Ephesians3:13 Rumal ri' quixinbochi'j chi mäq'uistaj i c'u'x rumal rech ri c'axc'olil ri in c'o wi rumal iwech
Ephesians3:14 Rumal c'u ri'
Ephesians3:15 Ri u c'amom wi ri u bi' ronojel alaxic
Ephesians3:16 Quinta' che ri Tataxel chi jas ri u k'inomal ri u juluwem
Ephesians3:17 rech ri Crist cäjeki' pa ri iwanima' rumal ri cojonic. Jeri' co ix tiquil pa ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Ephesians3:18 rech quixcuin che u ch'obic cuc' conojel ri cojonelab chi ri nimalaj u lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist
Ephesians3:19 Quintz'onoj che ri Dios chi quiwetamaj ri lok'ok'ebal u c'u'x ri Crist
Ephesians3:20 Are c'u ri camic chkanimarisaj ba' u k'ij ri Dios
Ephesians3:21 ¡Yok ba' juluwem che ri Dios pa ri comon cojonelab xukuje' che ri Crist Jesus
Ephesians4:1 In c'ut
Ephesians4:2 Chixux mach'alic xukuje' chi lok'ok'ela' iwib; chc'ol i coch'onic chicoch'ola' c'u tak iwib ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj
Ephesians4:3 chicojo' i chuk'ab rech amak'el ix nuc'utalic
Ephesians4:4 Xa' jun ri cuerp ri c'olic
Ephesians4:5 C'o jun Ajawaxel
Ephesians4:6 C'o jun Dios
Ephesians4:7 Yo'm c'u chke chkajujunal jas ri cujcuin che u banic
Ephesians4:8 Rumal ri' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Xpaki' chicaj
Ephesians4:9 ¿Jas quel cubij wa' chi xpaki'c? Quel cubij chi nabe xkaj ulok cho ri uwächulew.
Ephesians4:10 Ri Jun ri xkajic
Ephesians4:11 Jujun xebucoj che takomxenlab
Ephesians4:12 Jeri' xuya' chque ri cojonelab ronojel ri rajawaxic chque rech quechacunic xukuje' quepataninic
Ephesians4:13 C'ä konojel cakarik na ri junamil pa ri cojonic xukuje' che ri u c'oxomaxic ri u C'ojol ri Dios cujopan c'ut pa ri tz'akatil cakarik c'ut ri tz'akatalaj etabalil re ri tz'akatil ri cakarik pa ri Crist Jesus.
Ephesians4:14 Rech man uj ac'alab ta chic. Man cujc'am ta chi bic apawije' rumal ronojel tijonic ri je cäpe quiakik'. Man cujkaj ta chic pa ri qui subunic ri winak ri quena'w che u bixic je'lalaj tak tzij
Ephesians4:15 Xane' chkabij ri kastzij ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Ephesians4:16 Rumal c'ut ri Crist
Ephesians4:17 Are c'u wa' quinbij
Ephesians4:18 Ri qui chomanic c'o pa ri k'eku'm. Man c'o ta qui c'aslemal aj Dios
Ephesians4:19 Ri e are' xquiban co che ri canima'. Xquijach quib che u banic ri itzel qui rayinic. Cäquitij qui k'ij che u banic ronojel u wäch tz'ilalaj tak jastak.
Ephesians4:20 Ri ix man je ta retamaxic u wäch wa' ri Crist xibano rech je i c'aslemal wa'
Ephesians4:21 we kas i tom ri u tzijol ri are'; we xixtijox c'ut pa ri are' jas ri u cholajil ri kastzij ri c'o pa ri Jesus.
Ephesians4:22 Ri nabe i c'aslemal ri iwuc'am ulok
Ephesians4:23 Ri ix rajawaxic cac'oji' jun c'ac' i chomanic.
Ephesians4:24 Are' chiwatz'iakij ri c'ac' c'aslemal
Ephesians4:25 Rumal ri'
Ephesians4:26 We cäpe iwoyowal
Ephesians4:27 Miya' u c'olbal ri itzel.
Ephesians4:28 Ri queläk'anic
Ephesians4:29 Mel ulok pa i chi' jun itzel tzij
Ephesians4:30 Miya' bis che ri Tastalicalaj Ruxlabal re ri Dios
Ephesians4:31 Mitakej c'anal pa ri iwanima'
Ephesians4:32 Xane' chibana' utzil xukuje' chel i c'u'x chbil tak iwib. Chisachala' i mac
Ephesians5:1 Chibana' ba' iwe ri cuban ri Dios
Ephesians5:2 chiwuc'aj ri c'aslemal aj lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj
Ephesians5:3 Chibana' jas ri takal chiwe ix tastalic tak winak che u patanixic ri Dios. Miban c'ut macunic cuc' ixokib achijab
Ephesians5:4 Mibij q'uixbalalaj tak tzij
Ephesians5:5 Iweta'm chic chi conojel ri quemacun cuc' ixokib achijab
Ephesians5:6 C'o jun mixsubuw ruc' tak tzij ri man c'o ta qui patan. Cumal c'u we jastak ri' cäpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' ri man queniman taj.
Ephesians5:7 Miban ba' iwe cuc' jas ri cäquiban ri e are'.
Ephesians5:8 Ri i c'aslemal ojer c'o pa ri k'eku'm. Are c'u ri camic c'o chic pa ri sakil rumal rech chi ix jun chic ruc' ri Ajawaxel. Chibana' ba' iwech ri caquiban ri e aj sakilal.
Ephesians5:9 Ri u wächinic c'u ri sakilal are ronojel utzil
Ephesians5:10 Chiwetamaj ba' jachique jastak ri quekaj chuwäch ri Ajawaxel.
Ephesians5:11 Miban iwe ri jastak ri man c'o ta quechbex chque; ri cäquiban ri winak ri e c'o pa ri k'eku'm
Ephesians5:12 Q'uixbal c'ut qui tzijoxic ri jastak ri cäquiban ri e are' chi c'uyal.
Ephesians5:13 Conojel ri jastak quek'alajisax rumal ri chäj.
Ephesians5:14 Ri sakil cuk'alajisaj ronojel. Rumal ri' cäbixic: “Chatc'astajok
Ephesians5:15 Kas chiwila' na jas ri quibano. Miban iwe jas ri man c'o ta qui no'j
Ephesians5:16 Chiwechbej tak ri k'ij che u banic ri utz
Ephesians5:17 Mäsach ri i chomanic
Ephesians5:18 Mixk'abaric. Chupam c'u wa' c'o c'axc'olil. Xane' chnojisax ri iwanima' che ri Ruxlabal ri Dios.
Ephesians5:19 Chitzijobela' iwib cuc' tak salm
Ephesians5:20 Amak'el chimaltioxij ronojel che ri Dios ri Tataxel pa ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist.
Ephesians5:21 Chiyala' iwib pa takic chbil tak iwib
Ephesians5:22 Ri ix ixokib
Ephesians5:23 Rumal rech chi ri achi are' u jolom ri rixokil
Ephesians5:24 Rajawaxic chi ri ixokib cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri cachajil pa ronojel
Ephesians5:25 Achijab
Ephesians5:26 Jeri' xuban che rech cux jun tastalic comon cojonelab. Je ta ne xuch'aj ruc' ja' aretak xujosk'ij rumal ri tzij
Ephesians5:27 rech cutac'aba' ri comon cojonelab chuwäch are'
Ephesians5:28 Jeri' xukuje' ri achi rajawaxic culok'ok'ej ri rixokil
Ephesians5:29 Man c'o ta jun cäretzelaj u wäch ri u cuerp chbil rib
Ephesians5:30 Uj c'ut u tz'akatil ri u cuerp. Ri uj rech ri cuerp ri'.
Ephesians5:31 Rumal ri'
Ephesians5:32 Are jun jasach wa' ri man etamatal ta can nabe
Ephesians5:33 Ri ix c'ut chijujunal chi lok'ok'ej ri iwixokil jas ri u lok'ok'exic iwib. Ri ixok xukuje' rajawaxic nim cäril wi ri rachajil.
Ephesians6:1 Alc'ualaxelab
Ephesians6:2 Are wa' nabe takomal ri rachilam jun chi'nic: “Nim chawila' wi ri a tat xukuje' ri a nan
Ephesians6:3 rech utz catelic
Ephesians6:4 Ri ix c'ut tataxelab
Ephesians6:5 Ri ix lok'om pataninelab
Ephesians6:6 Chixpataninok
Ephesians6:7 Chixpataninok ruc' ronojel iwanima'
Ephesians6:8 Iweta'm c'ut we ix lok'om pataninelab
Ephesians6:9 Xukuje' ri ix ajawib
Ephesians6:10 Are c'u ri camic
Ephesians6:11 Chito' iwib ruc' conojel ri ch'ojibal ri cuya' ri Dios chiwe. Jeri' quixcuinic co quixtaq'ui' chuwäch ri itzel
Ephesians6:12 Man cujch'ojin ta cuc' winak
Ephesians6:13 Rumal c'u ri' chebic'ama' conojel ri chacubal re ch'o'j ri cuya' ri Dios
Ephesians6:14 Co ba' chixtac'alok. Chicojo' ri kastzij
Ephesians6:15 Chisuc'umaj iwib che u tzijoxic ri jamaril
Ephesians6:16 Paquiwi' c'u conojel
Ephesians6:17 Chicojo' ri colobal iwib je jas jun ajch'o'j cucoj to'bal u jolom. Chic'ama' ri u ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri Uxlabaxel
Ephesians6:18 Mitanaba' ri u banic ch'awem ruc' Dios: chixbochi'nok xukuje' chixtz'onom che ri Dios amak'el
Ephesians6:19 Xukuje' chibana' ch'awem panuwi' in
Ephesians6:20 Ri Dios in u takom che u tzijoxic we utzalaj tzij ri'. Rumal c'u wa' in c'o pa che'. Chibana' ch'awem panuwi' rech man quinxe'j ta wib
Ephesians6:21 Ri Tiquico cubij na ronojel chiwe jas ri nu banom xukuje' jas ri cätajin quinbano rech quiwetamaj. Ri Tiquico are' lok'alaj kachalal xukuje' jicalaj pataninel pa ri u chac ri Ajawaxel.
Ephesians6:22 Rumal c'u ri' xintak bic iwuc' rech quiwetamaj jas ri ka banom
Ephesians6:23 Are' ri Dios ri Tataxel
Ephesians6:24 Tok'ob chque conojel ri quelok'ok'en ri Kajaw Jesucrist
Philippians1:1 In Pawl xukuje' ri Timotey
Philippians1:2 Are ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l.
Philippians1:3 Amak'el aretak quixnataj chwe
Philippians1:4 Amak'el aretak quinban ch'awem ruc' quicotemal quinbochi'j ri Dios piwi' iwonojel
Philippians1:5 rumal rech chi junam ix chacuninak wuc' che u tzijoxic ri utzalaj tak tzij
Philippians1:6 Cu'l nu c'u'x chi ri Dios
Philippians1:7 Suc' ri nu chomanic chiwe iwonojel
Philippians1:8 Ri Dios reta'm
Philippians1:9 Quinban ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi' rech sibalaj caq'uiyir na ri i lok'ok'ebal c'u'x
Philippians1:10 Jeri' quixcuin che u ch'obic jas ri kas utz na u banic
Philippians1:11 Ix nojinak chque tak wächinic re suq'uilal
Philippians1:12 Wachalal
Philippians1:13 Jeri' conojel ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o pa ri rachoch ri ajawinel
Philippians1:14 E q'ui chque ri kachalal
Philippians1:15 Jujun cäquitzijoj ri Crist rumal quiäk rayinic xukuje' nimarisabal ib
Philippians1:16 Ri jujun cäquitzijoj ri Crist ruc' lok'ok'ebal c'u'x. Queta'm c'ut chi in c'o waral che u to'ic u wi' ri u tzijoxic chi kastzij ri tzij re colobal ib.
Philippians1:17 Ri niq'uiaj chic caquitzijoj ri Crist xa' rumal u banic c'ax
Philippians1:18 ¿Jas lo we in che ronojel ri cäquiban ri winak? Ruc' ronojel ri cäquibano
Philippians1:19 Weta'm chi ronojel wa' utz quel na chwe in
Philippians1:20 Je c'u quel na jas ri quinwaj. Cu'l nu c'u'x chi man quel ta nu q'uixbal
Philippians1:21 Ri c'aslemal chwe in are ri Crist. We c'u quincämic
Philippians1:22 We c'u quinc'asi' na pa ri nu cuerp
Philippians1:23 Man quinrik taj jachique we quieb ri' quincha'o. Quinwaj quincämic
Philippians1:24 Are c'u rajawaxic chiwe ix
Philippians1:25 Cu'l nu c'u'x chrij wa'
Philippians1:26 Jeri' sibalaj quixquicot na pa ri u bi' ri Crist Jesus rumal ri nu c'olem jumul chic iwuc'.
Philippians1:27 Xak xuwi chibana' pa ri i c'aslemal jas ri takal che ri tzij re colobal ib ri u bim ri Crist. Jeri' we quinbe che iwilic o man quinbe taj
Philippians1:28 Man c'o ta quixe'j wi iwib chquiwäch ri cäquiban qui c'ulel chiwe. Are c'utbal wa' chi ri e are' cäsach na qui wäch
Philippians1:29 Rumal c'u rech ri Crist
Philippians1:30 Ri ix xukuje' ri in
Philippians2:1 We ri Crist cuya' i chuk'ab
Philippians2:2 chitz'akatisaj ba' ri nu quicotemal: xa' junam chixchomanok
Philippians2:3 C'o jas mibano ri xa' ta che u nimarisaxic i k'ij
Philippians2:4 C'o jun mutzucuj xuwi ri kas utz che
Philippians2:5 Chc'ol ta ba' iwuc' we chomanic ri' ri xc'oji' ruc' ri Crist Jesus.
Philippians2:6 Ri pune' junam u wächbal ruc' ri Dios man xuna' ta rib chi junam ta ruc' ri Dios ri xucoj ta pa u tzij.
Philippians2:7 Xuya' c'u can ri u c'olbal ri nim u k'ij ruc' ri Dios
Philippians2:8 Aretak xuna' rib chi je u banic jas jun winak
Philippians2:9 Rumal c'u ri' ri Dios sibalaj xunimarisaj na u k'ij chquiwäch conojel
Philippians2:10 rech pa u bi' ri Jesus caquimej wi na ri qui ch'ec ri e c'o pa ri caj ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew xukuje' ri e c'o chuxe' uwächulew.
Philippians2:11 Rech conojel cäquich'obo xukuje' cäquibij chi ri Jesucrist are Ajawaxel
Philippians2:12 Je c'u ri'
Philippians2:13 Are c'u ri Dios cayo'w pa ri iwanima' ri u rayixic u banic ri cakaj chuwäch.
Philippians2:14 Pa ronojel ri quibano
Philippians2:15 Rech jeri' man c'o ta etzelal cäriktaj chiwij
Philippians2:16 pa ri u k'alajisaxic ri tzij re c'aslemal chquiwäch. Jeri' quinquicot na iwumal pa ri k'ij aretak cäpe ri Crist
Philippians2:17 Pune' cäpil na ri kas nu c'aslemal che u tz'akatil ri sipanic ri quiya' ix che ri Dios rumal ri i cojonic
Philippians2:18 Jeri' chixquicotok
Philippians2:19 We are u rayibal ri Ajawaxel Jesus
Philippians2:20 Man c'o ta chi c'u jun ri junam ta u chomanic wuc' in
Philippians2:21 Conojel c'ut cäquitzucuj ri xa' quech ri e are'
Philippians2:22 Iweta'm chic chi ri Timotey utzalaj chac u banom
Philippians2:23 Quinwaj c'ut chi are' quintak bic iwuc' chanim
Philippians2:24 Cu'l nu c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel
Philippians2:25 Quinchomaj chi rajawaxic xukuje' quintak na bic ri kachalal Epaprodit iwuc'
Philippians2:26 Ri are' sibalaj cäraj cäril i wäch iwonojel. Sibalaj c'u xbisonic rumal rech chi xito chi u rikom yabil.
Philippians2:27 Kastzij xurik yabil
Philippians2:28 Rumal ri' sibalaj quinwaj quintak bic ri Epaprodit iwuc'
Philippians2:29 Chic'ulaj ba' pa ri Ajawaxel ruc' nimalaj quicotemal. Nim chebiwila wi ri je qui banic jas ri are'.
Philippians2:30 Rumal c'u rech ri u chac ri Crist
Philippians3:1 Che ri u q'uisbalil c'ut
Philippians3:2 Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri winak ri e je ta ne tz'i'. Chichajij iwib chquiwäch ri cäquiban itzel tak chac
Philippians3:3 Uj c'u ri' ri kas cojom ketal re kopinic
Philippians3:4 Pune' ri in c'o quinjiquiba' wi nu c'u'x chrij ri cuerp. We c'o jun chic cuchomaj chi c'o cujiquiba' wi u c'u'x chrij ri cuerp
Philippians3:5 xkopix ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri in achi wi chuwajxak k'ij che wetal re kopinic chi in jun aj israel
Philippians3:6 Nabe sibalaj xincoj nu chuk'ab che u banic c'ax che ri comon cojonelab; in suc' chuwäch ri pixab
Philippians3:7 Ronojel c'u wa' nim u banic chnuwäch nabe canok
Philippians3:8 C'o chi c'u na jubik'
Philippians3:9 Xukuje' rech quinriktaj pa ri are'. Jeri' in suc' chic man rumal ta ri u nimaxic ri pixab
Philippians3:10 Quinwaj kas quinwetamaj u wäch ri Crist xukuje' ri u chuk'ab ri u c'astajic. Xukuje' quinwaj quinrik c'ax junam ruc'
Philippians3:11 we apachique ta ne rumal quinrik na ri nu c'astajic chquixo'l ri cäminakib.
Philippians3:12 Man cätajin ta quinbij chi nu rikom chi ronojel
Philippians3:13 Wachalal
Philippians3:14 che ri opanem jawije' c'o wi ri etal quinch'äc c'ut ri tojbal ri quinusiq'uij ri Dios che u c'amic jun c'ac' c'aslemal rumal ri Crist Jesus.
Philippians3:15 Jewa' ri uj co chic pa ri ka cojonic che u ternexic ri Crist
Philippians3:16 Rajawaxic c'ut cajunamataj ri ka c'aslemal ruc' ri ka rikom chic.
Philippians3:17 Wachalal
Philippians3:18 C'o jun jasach q'ui mul nu bim can chiwe. Quinbij chi na jumul camic
Philippians3:19 Cäpe c'u na jun k'ij aretak cäsach na qui wäch ri winak ri'. Ri are' qui dios ri itzel tak u rayinic ri qui ti'jal
Philippians3:20 Are' c'u ri ka tinimit pa ri caj c'o wi'; ri xukuje' cakeyej wi jun Colonel
Philippians3:21 Ri cujal wachij na ri ka cuerp ri man nim ta u k'ij
Philippians4:1 Je c'u ri'
Philippians4:2 Quinta' jun tok'ob che ri Ebod
Philippians4:3 Xukuje' quinta' jun tok'ob chawe at
Philippians4:4 Ronojel k'ij chixquicot pa ri u bi' ri Ajawaxel. Jumul chic quinbij: ¡Chixquicotok!
Philippians4:5 Ri i ch'uch'ujil chetamax cumal conojel ri winak. Ri Ajawaxel cänakajinic.
Philippians4:6 C'o jun jasach mixoc wi il
Philippians4:7 Are c'u ri u jamaril ri Dios
Philippians4:8 Chuq'uisbalil
Philippians4:9 Ronojel ri nu c'utum can chiwäch
Philippians4:10 Sibalaj quinquicot pa ri Ajawaxel
Philippians4:11 Man rumal ta rech chi c'o rajawaxic chwe quinbij wa'. Ri in quinquicotic pune' man nim ri c'o wuc'
Philippians4:12 Wetamam ri c'olem pa ri mebayil xukuje' ri c'olem pa ri k'inomal. In wetamam ronojel u wäch c'aslemal
Philippians4:13 Ronojel quincuin chubanic are' c'u Crist ri cäyo'w nu chuk'ab.
Philippians4:14 Utz c'ut ri xibano aretak xinito' pa ri nu c'axc'olil.
Philippians4:15 Iweta'm
Philippians4:16 Xukuje' aretak xinc'oji' pa Tesalon
Philippians4:17 Man quinbij ta wa' xa' rech cäya' jun sipanic chwe. Xane' are quinwaj chi quiban q'ui utzalaj tak chac rech c'o na cajilax chiwij.
Philippians4:18 Ronojel c'o wuc'
Philippians4:19 Ri nu Dios cuya' na ronojel ri rajawaxic chiwe
Philippians4:20 ¡Chnimarisax ba' u k'ij ri Dios ka Tat amak'el chbe k'ij sak! Je chbanok.
Philippians4:21 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri e tastal che u patanixic ri Dios ri c'o pa Crist Jesus. Xukuje' ri kachalal ri e c'o wuc' cäquiya' bic rutzil i wäch.
Philippians4:22 Conojel tak ri e tastalic cäquiya' rutzil i wäch. Xukuje' ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Sesar sibalaj cäquiya' rutzil i wäch.
Philippians4:23 Ri u tok'ob ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist chc'ol ta pa ri iwanima'. Je chbanok.
Colossians1:1 Ri in Pawl
Colossians1:2 quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chque ri cojonelab ri e c'o pa Colos
Colossians1:3 Amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist
Colossians1:4 Ka tom i tzijol chi c'o i cojonic che ri Crist Jesus
Colossians1:5 rumal rech ri eyebal c'uxaj chrij ri c'olom chiwe pa ri caj. I tom chi c'u wa' rumal ri tzij re kastzij
Colossians1:6 We tzij ri' ri xtzijox chiwe
Colossians1:7 Are wa' ri xitijoj wi iwib ruc' ri Epapras
Colossians1:8 Ri are' xubij chke ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x ri yo'm rumal ri Uxlabaxel.
Colossians1:9 Rumal wa' ri uj
Colossians1:10 Jeri' quibano jas ri takal chiwe ri ix rech ri Ajawaxel
Colossians1:11 Cäkata' che ri Dios chi cuya' i chuk'ab ruc' ri nimalaj u cuinem ri u juluwem. Jeri' quixcuin che u ch'ijic ronojel c'ax
Colossians1:12 Ruc' quicotemal quinmaltioxin che ri Tataxel
Colossians1:13 Xujresaj pa ri u cuinem ri k'eku'm
Colossians1:14 ri xujresaj pa u k'ab ri ka c'ulel rumal ri u quiq'uel xukuje' xusach ri ka mac.
Colossians1:15 Ri Crist ri quilatajic are' wa' ri u wächbal ri Dios
Colossians1:16 Rumal c'ut are' xeban conojel ri jastak ri e c'o pa ri caj xukuje' ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew
Colossians1:17 Ri Crist kas c'o ulok nabe c'ä majok cheban conojel ri jastak
Colossians1:18 Xukuje' are' ri jolomaj ri catakan puwi' ri cuerp
Colossians1:19 Xraj c'ut ri Dios chi cajeki' ronojel ri are' pa ri Crist
Colossians1:20 rumal c'ut ri Crist are' xraj chi cac'oji' jamaril chuxo'l cuc' conojel ri jastak
Colossians1:21 Ri ix nabe naj ix c'o wi che ri Dios
Colossians1:22 Camic c'ut ri Dios u yo'm chi jamaril chixo'l ruc' are'
Colossians1:23 we kas co ix tac'al pa ri i cojonic
Colossians1:24 Quinquicot c'u pa tak ri c'axc'olil ri nu rikom rumal iwech
Colossians1:25 Ri in in cojom che pataninel re ri comon cojonelab. Ri Dios u yo'm pa nu k'ab ri i patanixic
Colossians1:26 Are jun jasach ri man etamatal ta can nabe
Colossians1:27 Ri xraj wi ri Dios u ya'ic retamaxic ri u k'inomal ri u juluwem we awatalic ri' chquixo'l ri man aj judeyib taj; are Crist wa' pa ri ix
Colossians1:28 Are Crist wa' ri cäkatzijoj uj. Quekapixbej conojel winak chquila' quib
Colossians1:29 Rumal ri' sibalaj quinchacunic
Colossians2:1 Quinwaj c'ut chi quiwetamaj chi sibalaj cätajin quintij nu k'ij che i to'ic
Colossians2:2 Quintij nu k'ij rech ri e are' caquic'am chajin anima' chupam ri canima'
Colossians2:3 ri e c'utal wi conojel ri k'inomal rech ri no'j xukuje' ri etamanic.
Colossians2:4 Quinbij wa' chiwe rech c'o jun mixsubuw ruc' je'lalaj tak tzij.
Colossians2:5 Pune' man in c'o ta chi winakil chixo'l
Colossians2:6 Je c'ut jas ri u c'amic ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist i banom
Colossians2:7 benak ri i xeal pa ri are'
Colossians2:8 Chiwila' iwib: miya' iwib chi quixc'am bic cumal ri cäcaj quixquisub cumal tak no'jinic xukuje' tak ch'äcabal ri xak e cawäch
Colossians2:9 Rumal rech chi ruc' ri Crist jekel wi ronojel ri u nojiquil ri Dios chi winakil.
Colossians2:10 Are c'u ri ix ix nojinak rumal rech chi ix junatal pa ri Crist
Colossians2:11 Ri ix man xic'amtaj ri etal re ri u kopixic ri u wi' ri u tz'umal ri ix achijab wi je jacha' ri cäquiban ri achijab aj judeyib. Ri ix man xixkopix taj cumal k'abaj
Colossians2:12 aretak xban ri i bautism
Colossians2:13 Ri pa jun k'ijol canok ix cäminak pa mac
Colossians2:14 Xusach u wäch ri tz'ibatal wi ri takanic re ri pixab
Colossians2:15 Rumal ri Crist
Colossians2:16 C'o ba jun mäk'atow tzij piwi' chquij ri jastak ri quitijo o ri quiwuq'uiaj
Colossians2:17 Ri e are' xa' u mu'jal ri cäpe na. Are c'u ri kastzij cäriktaj pa ri Crist.
Colossians2:18 Miya' c'olbal chi quixc'okox cumal ri caquiban quib chi sibalaj e mach'alic quequik'ijilaj c'ut ri e tako'nib aj caj
Colossians2:19 Qui tasom quib chrij ri Crist
Colossians2:20 Ri ix ix cäminak chi junam ruc' ri Crist
Colossians2:21 manak wa'
Colossians2:22 Ri takanic ri' xa' chquij jastak ri cäsach qui wäch aretak quecojic
Colossians2:23 Kastzij we jastak ri' je ta ne ri queilic chi e rech no'jibal
Colossians3:1 We ix c'astajinak chi ruc' ri Crist
Colossians3:2 Chebichomaj ba' ri jastak ri e aj chicaj
Colossians3:3 Ix cäminak chi c'ut
Colossians3:4 Ri Crist are' ri i c'aslemal. Aretak cäpetic
Colossians3:5 Chibana' ba' chi cäcäm ronojel ri quech ri e u tz'akatil ri e itzel tak e i rayinic ri e rech ri uwächulew: chi c'o jun mamacun cuc' ixokib achijab
Colossians3:6 Cumal c'u we jastak ri' cäpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi' ri winak ri man queniman taj.
Colossians3:7 Ri ix xiban ronojel wa' nabe canok pa ri ojer i c'aslemal.
Colossians3:8 Camic c'ut
Colossians3:9 mibila' ri man kastzij taj chixo'l. Iwesam chi c'u bic ri ojer i c'aslemal xukuje' ri jastak ri xiban nabe canok.
Colossians3:10 Iwatz'iakim chi iwib ruc' ri c'ac' i c'aslemal. Cätajin c'u cuq'uex rib rech cajunamataj ruc' ri u wächbal ri Dios ri xixwinakirisanic
Colossians3:11 Man c'o ta chi cubij we aj judey o we man aj judey taj
Colossians3:12 Ri Dios quixulok'ok'ej
Colossians3:13 chisachala' i mac chbil tak iwib we c'o jun c'o royowal chrij ri jun chic. Jas ri Ajawaxel xusach ri i mac ix
Colossians3:14 Puwi' c'u ronojel wa'
Colossians3:15 Chiya' ba' che ri u jamaril ri Crist chajawin pa tak ri iwanima'
Colossians3:16 Are ta ri u tzij ri Crist cäjeki' iwuc'
Colossians3:17 Apachique ri quibano o ri quibij
Colossians3:18 Ix ixokib ri ix c'ulanic
Colossians3:19 Ix achijab ri ix c'ulanic
Colossians3:20 Alc'ualaxelab
Colossians3:21 Tataxelab mebitzur ri e iwalc'ual rech man caqueblaj ta qui c'u'x.
Colossians3:22 Ix lok'om tak pataninelab
Colossians3:23 Apachique ri quibano
Colossians3:24 Iweta'm c'ut chi ri Ajawaxel cuya' na ri echbal che tojbal iwe
Colossians3:25 Apachin c'u ri cuban ri etzelal cuc'am na ri tojbal re ri etzelal ri cubano. Ri Dios man jalan ta cäril wi jun winak chuwäch jun chic.
Colossians4:1 Ix ri ix ajawib
Colossians4:2 Amak'el chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios. Chixc'asc'at che u banic
Colossians4:3 Xukuje' chibana' ch'awem pakawi' uj
Colossians4:4 Chita' che ri Dios chi quink'alajisaj ri tzij ri' jas ri kas rajawaxic quinbano.
Colossians4:5 Chc'ol utzalaj i no'j che u banic ri quiban chquixo'l ri man e cojonelab taj
Colossians4:6 Utz chixtzijon cuc' conojel ri winak
Colossians4:7 Ri lok'alaj kachalal Tiquico cubij na chiwe ronojel jas ri nu banom
Colossians4:8 Nu takom bic iwuc' rech quiwetamaj jas ri ka banom
Colossians4:9 Ri Tiquico achilatal bic rumal ri Onesimo ri lok' xukuje' jicalaj kachalal
Colossians4:10 Ri Aristarc ri wachil pa che' cuya' rutzil i wäch
Colossians4:11 Xukuje' ri Jesus ri cäbix Just che
Colossians4:12 Ri i winakil Epapras cuya' rutzil i wäch
Colossians4:13 In wilom ri Epapras
Colossians4:14 Ri Lucax
Colossians4:15 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch ri kachalal ri e c'o pa Laodisey
Colossians4:16 Aretak cäsiq'uitaj u wäch we wuj ri' chixo'l
Colossians4:17 Chibij che ri Arquip: “Chatz'akatisaj u banic ri u jachom ri Ajawaxel pa ak'ab.”
Colossians4:18 In wa' in Pawl xintz'ibaj chiwe ruc' ri nu k'ab
1Thessalonians1:1 In Pawl
1Thessalonians1:2 Amak'el cujmaltioxin che ri Dios rumal iwech iwonojel. Quixkanataj pa tak ri ka ch'awem ruc' Dios.
1Thessalonians1:3 Chuwäch ri Dios ka Tat
1Thessalonians1:4 Kachalal ix lok'ok'em rumal ri Dios
1Thessalonians1:5 Rumal rech chi ri tzij re colobal ib ri cäkatzijoj man xopan ta iwuc' xuwi ta ruc' tzij
1Thessalonians1:6 Ri ix c'ut xiban iwe jas ri xkaban uj xukuje' jas ri xuban ri Ajawaxel. Xic'am ri tzij ruc' c'axc'olil xukuje' ruc' quicotemal ri yo'm chiwe rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Dios.
1Thessalonians1:7 Jewa' ix i c'utum chquiwäch conojel ri cojonelab pa Masedon xukuje' pa Acay jas rajawaxic cäquiban ri e are'.
1Thessalonians1:8 Iwumal c'ut xel u tzijol ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel man xuwi ta pa Masedon xukuje' pa Acay
1Thessalonians1:9 Kas e are' c'ut quetzijon ri solinic ri xkaban chiwe
1Thessalonians1:10 Rech quiweyej ri u C'ojol
1Thessalonians2:1 Ri ix c'ut
1Thessalonians2:2 Pune' ka rikom chi c'ax nabe
1Thessalonians2:3 Aretak xixkapixbej
1Thessalonians2:4 Ri Dios utz cujril wi rech cujutak bic che u tzijoxic ri u tzij re colobal ib
1Thessalonians2:5 Mawi jumul xkabij tzij chiwe xak rech utz quito
1Thessalonians2:6 Man xkatzucuj taj chi cänimarisax ka k'ij cumal ri winak
1Thessalonians2:7 pune' takal chke chi c'o ka takanic piwi' rumal rech chi uj takom re ri Crist. Xane' uj utz iwuc'
1Thessalonians2:8 Ri uj c'ut quixkalok'ok'ej. Xkaj chkawäch ri u ya'ic chiwe man xuwi ta ri tzij re colobal ib ri u yo'm Dios
1Thessalonians2:9 Kachalal
1Thessalonians2:10 Ix xiwilo
1Thessalonians2:11 Jas ri iweta'm chic
1Thessalonians2:12 Xixkabochi'j chi quixbinic jas ri takal che jun ri terenel ri Dios. Are' ri Dios xixsiq'uinic rech ix jun pa ri rajawibal xukuje' pa ri u juluwem.
1Thessalonians2:13 Rumal ri' xukuje' ri uj man cäkatanaba' ta ri ka maltioxinic che ri Dios
1Thessalonians2:14 Ri ix c'ut
1Thessalonians2:15 Are ri aj judeyib ri xecämisan ri Ajaw Jesus
1Thessalonians2:16 Cujquik'atij che qui tzijobexic ri man aj judeyib taj rech quecolotajic. Je cäquiban ri aj judeyib rech cäquitz'akatisaj ri qui mac. Chuq'uisbalil c'ut xpe ri royowal ri Dios paquiwi'.
1Thessalonians2:17 Kachalal
1Thessalonians2:18 Rumal ri' xkatzucuj jas xkabano rech cujopan iwuc' che i solixic. In wa'
1Thessalonians2:19 ¿Jas chrij cu'l wi ka c'u'x? ¿Jas ri ka quicotemal? ¿Jas ri tojbal ke rumal ri chac ri ka banom? Ix ri' aretak cäpe ri Kajaw Jesus.
1Thessalonians2:20 Ix c'ut ri ka juluwem xukuje' ri ka quicotemal.
1Thessalonians3:1 Man c'u xintakej ta chi na coch'onic
1Thessalonians3:2 xintak c'u bic ri Timotey ri kachalal. Are pataninel re ri Dios
1Thessalonians3:3 rech c'o jun muban quieb u c'u'x rumal we c'axc'olil ri'. Ix c'ut iweta'm chi che wa' uj yo'm wi.
1Thessalonians3:4 Aretak c'ä uj c'o iwuc'
1Thessalonians3:5 Rumal ri'
1Thessalonians3:6 Camic c'ut ri Timotey tzelejinak chi ulok iwuc'
1Thessalonians3:7 Rumal ri'
1Thessalonians3:8 Aretak xketamaj chi co ix c'o pa ri i cojonic che ri Ajawaxel
1Thessalonians3:9 ¿Jas lo cäkabano rech cäkamaltioxij che ri Dios ri nimalaj quicotemal ri c'o pa kanima' chuwäch ri Dios rumal iwech?
1Thessalonians3:10 Sibalaj cäkata' c'u che ri Dios
1Thessalonians3:11 Are' ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesus cuc'am ka be
1Thessalonians3:12 Ri Ajawaxel chunimarisaj ri lok'ok'ebal i c'u'x
1Thessalonians3:13 Jeri' sibalaj c'o u chuk'ab ri iwanima'
1Thessalonians4:1 Xuwi chi c'u wa' quinbij
1Thessalonians4:2 Iweta'm c'ut jachique tak takanic xkaya' chiwe rumal ri Ajaw Jesus.
1Thessalonians4:3 Are wa' cäraj ri Dios
1Thessalonians4:4 Chi chijujunal chc'ol u tij puwi' ri kas u cuerp pa tastaliquil xukuje' pa nim ilic
1Thessalonians4:5 mabe i c'u'x che qui banic e itzel tak rayinic
1Thessalonians4:6 C'o jun muban c'ax mawi musub ri rachalal pa we jasach ri'. Are' c'u ri Ajawaxel cätojow u q'uexel ronojel wa' che
1Thessalonians4:7 Ri Dios c'ut man uj u siq'uim taj rech cäkaban tz'ilalaj tak jastak
1Thessalonians4:8 Je c'u ri' xa apachin ri man nim ta cäril wi we tzij ri'
1Thessalonians4:9 Man rajawaxic taj chi quintz'ibaj chiwe jas quiban ix kachalal che ri u lok'ok'exic iwib. Ix tijom c'u rumal ri Dios jas quibano quilok'ok'ela' iwib.
1Thessalonians4:10 Je c'u quiban cuc' conojel ri achalaxelab ri e c'o pa ronojel Masedon. Quixkabochi'j c'ut
1Thessalonians4:11 c'o jas mixel wi ch'u'j are chixoc il chque ri jastak iwech
1Thessalonians4:12 Jeri' utz quixbin chquiwäch ri niq'uiaj winak chic
1Thessalonians4:13 Wachalal
1Thessalonians4:14 We cäkacojo chi ri Jesus xcämic xukuje' xc'astajic
1Thessalonians4:15 Are c'u wa' cäkabij chiwe pa ri u tzij ri Ajawaxel: chi ri uj ri uj c'asc'oj
1Thessalonians4:16 Are ri Ajawaxel cäkaj na ulok chicaj
1Thessalonians4:17 C'äte ri' ri uj
1Thessalonians4:18 Je c'u ri'
1Thessalonians5:1 Man rajawaxic ta c'ut
1Thessalonians5:2 Ix c'ut kas iweta'm chi ri u k'ij ri Ajawaxel
1Thessalonians5:3 Aretak cäquibij ri winak: “Utz uj c'olic
1Thessalonians5:4 Are c'u ri ix wachalal
1Thessalonians5:5 Iwonojel ix ralc'ual ri sakil
1Thessalonians5:6 Mujwar ba' jas ri e jule' chic
1Thessalonians5:7 Are c'u ri quewaric
1Thessalonians5:8 Ri uj c'ut ri uj re ri sakil
1Thessalonians5:9 Man u chomam ta ri Dios chke chi cäpe ri royowal chkij
1Thessalonians5:10 Ri are' xcäm rumal kech
1Thessalonians5:11 Rumal ri'
1Thessalonians5:12 Wachalal
1Thessalonians5:13 Sibalaj chebilok'ok'ej
1Thessalonians5:14 Quixkabochi'j
1Thessalonians5:15 Chiwila' iwib chi ma ta c'o jun cutoj che jun chic etzelal che u q'uexel etzelal. Xane'
1Thessalonians5:16 Chixquicot amak'el.
1Thessalonians5:17 Mitanaba' ri i ch'awem ruc' Dios.
1Thessalonians5:18 Ronojel chimaltioxij che ri Dios. Are c'u wa' ri cäraj ri Dios chiwe ri ix cojoninak che ri Crist Jesus.
1Thessalonians5:19 Michup ri u k'ak' ri Uxlabaxel.
1Thessalonians5:20 Miwetzelaj u wäch ri qui tzij ri cäquik'axej tzij chque ri winak ri yo'm chque rumal ri Dios.
1Thessalonians5:21 Chitijtobej ronojel; chic'olo' ri utz.
1Thessalonians5:22 Chitasa' iwib che apachique jasach ri man utz taj.
1Thessalonians5:23 Are ri Dios ri cäyo'w jamaril chixo'l
1Thessalonians5:24 Ri Dios ri xixusiq'uij are jic
1Thessalonians5:25 Kachalal
1Thessalonians5:26 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch conojel che u c'utic ri lok'ok'ebal c'u'x.
1Thessalonians5:27 Quixinbochi'j chuwäch ri Ajawaxel chi quisiq'uij u wäch we wuj ri' chquiwäch conojel ri kachalal.
1Thessalonians5:28 Are ta ri Kajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe.
2Thessalonians1:1 In Pawl
2Thessalonians1:2 Ri Dios ka Tat xukuje' ri Ajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe xukuje' cuya' jamaril chixo'l.
2Thessalonians1:3 Kachalal
2Thessalonians1:4 Jeri' chi cäkabij chque ri e u comon cojonelab ri Dios chi sibalaj cujquicotic rumal rech ri i banom. Rumal rech chi quich'ij ri c'ax ri cäban chiwe
2Thessalonians1:5 C'utbal wa' chi ri Dios suc' cubano cuk'at tzij paquiwi' ri winak. Cäril ri Dios chi ya'tal ri rajawibal chiwe. Rumal wa' quirik c'ax.
2Thessalonians1:6 Suc' chuwäch ri Dios chi cuya' c'axc'olil paquiwi' ri winak ri cäquiban c'ax chiwe.
2Thessalonians1:7 Are' c'u ri chiwe ix ri i rikom c'axc'olil
2Thessalonians1:8 cutoj na u q'uexel chque ri man queta'm ta u wäch ri Dios
2Thessalonians1:9 Ri e are' cäquirik na ri u tojbalil ri qui mac. Cäsach na qui wäch chbe k'ij sak
2Thessalonians1:10 Jewa' cäquic'ulmaj na aretak cäpe ri Jesus rech cänimarisax u k'ij cumal ri e tastalicalaj tak winak ri e rech
2Thessalonians1:11 Rumal ri' amak'el cäkaban ch'awem ruc' Dios piwi'
2Thessalonians1:12 Jeri' quinimarisaj ri u bi' ri Kajaw Jesucrist
2Thessalonians2:1 Chrij c'u ri cäbantaj na aretak cäpe ri Kajaw Jesucrist xukuje' aretak cäkamulij kib ruc'
2Thessalonians2:2 chi muban quieb i c'u'x pa ri i chomanic. Mixsach rumal jun uxlabal
2Thessalonians2:3 Mixsub rumal jachin jun. C'ä majok c'ut we k'ij ri' cäpe na ri u c'ulelaxic ri Dios
2Thessalonians2:4 Ri are' cuc'ulelaj xukuje' cuwalijisaj rib chrij ronojel ri re ri Dios xukuje' chrij ronojel ri cäk'ijilaxic. Je cubano rech cät'uyi' na pa ri rachoch Dios
2Thessalonians2:5 ¿La ma ta cänataj chiwe chi aretak xinc'oji' iwuc'
2Thessalonians2:6 Camic c'ut iweta'm ri cäk'ilow ri u petic ri itzel winak
2Thessalonians2:7 Cächacun chi c'u ri c'utalic re ri etzelal; xak xuwi c'ä maja quesax na ri k'atininak camic;
2Thessalonians2:8 cuc'utunisaj c'u na rib ri itzel ri'
2Thessalonians2:9 Ri achi re etzelal ri'
2Thessalonians2:10 Cuban ronojel u wäch etzelal che qui subic ri winak ri cäsach qui wäch
2Thessalonians2:11 Rumal ri' ri Dios cuya' chque chi quesubutaj rumal ri man kastzij taj
2Thessalonians2:12 rech cäc'äjisax qui wäch conojel ri man cäquicoj ta ri kastzij
2Thessalonians2:13 Kachalal ix lok'ok'em rumal ri Ajawaxel
2Thessalonians2:14 Ri Dios xixusiq'uij rumal ri tzij re colobal ib ri cäkatzijoj
2Thessalonians2:15 Je c'u ri'
2Thessalonians2:16 Ri Kajaw Jesucrist xukuje' ri Dios ka Tat xujulok'ok'ej
2Thessalonians2:17 Are' ri are' cucu'bisaj i c'u'x
2Thessalonians3:1 Xuwi chi c'u wa' quinbij
2Thessalonians3:2 Chibana' ch'awem rech cujto'taj chquiwäch ri itzel tak winak ri e lawalo. Man conojel ta c'ut cäquechbej ri cojonic.
2Thessalonians3:3 Ri Ajawaxel are jic. Ri are' cuya' na i chuk'ab
2Thessalonians3:4 Cu'l ka c'u'x chrij ri Ajawaxel chi ri ix quibano xukuje' quiban na jas ri xixkatak wi.
2Thessalonians3:5 Chixuto' ba' ri Ajawaxel che ri lok'ok'enic jacha' ri calok'ok'en ri Dios chc'ol i chuk'ab pa ri Crist aretak cäpe ri rikoj c'ax.
2Thessalonians3:6 Kachalal
2Thessalonians3:7 ri ix iweta'm chi rajawaxic quiban iwe jas ri cäkaban uj. Ri uj c'ut
2Thessalonians3:8 Man xkatij ta ri u wa jun ri xak ta xusipaj chke. Xane' xujchacun ruc' c'axalaj chac c'ä aretak xujcosic. Xujchacun chi chak'ab chi pa k'ij
2Thessalonians3:9 Man xkaban ta wa' rumal rech chi ma ta c'o takanic pa ka k'ab. Xane' jewa' xkabano che u c'utic chiwäch jas rajawaxic quiban ix.
2Thessalonians3:10 Aretak xujc'oji' iwuc'
2Thessalonians3:11 Ka tom c'ut chi jujun chixo'l man c'o ta u beya'l ri qui c'aslemal
2Thessalonians3:12 Cujtakan chque ri winak ri je cäquibano
2Thessalonians3:13 Ri ix c'ut
2Thessalonians3:14 We c'o jun man cunimaj ta ri ka tzij pa we wuj ri'
2Thessalonians3:15 Miban c'u i c'ulel che
2Thessalonians3:16 Are ba' ri Ajawaxel re jamaril chuya' jamaril chixo'l amak'el pa ronojel. Chc'ol ri Ajawaxel iwuc' chi nimalaj iwonojel.
2Thessalonians3:17 In Pawl quinya' rutzil i wäch ruc' ri nu k'ab. Are wetal wa' pa ronojel wuj ri quintz'ibaj chiwe. Je quintz'ibam wa'.
2Thessalonians3:18 Are ri Kajaw Jesucrist cuban tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel.
1Timothy1:1 Ri in Pawl
1Timothy1:2 Quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe
1Timothy1:3 Xatinbochi'j chi catcanaj can pa Epes aretak xinbe pa Masedon
1Timothy1:4 o qui cholajil ri qui bi' ri e qui mam ri winak ri man c'o ta qui q'uisic. We jastak ri' xak quequiyac tak chomanic ri man c'o ta u patan
1Timothy1:5 Ri q'uisbal c'u u tza'm ri takomal are ri lok'ok'ebal c'uxaj ri q'uiyinak pa jun josok'alaj c'uxaj
1Timothy1:6 Jujun c'ut xquijal qui be chrij wa'
1Timothy1:7 Are ta cäcaj quebux ajtijab che ri pixab
1Timothy1:8 Keta'm chi ri pixab utz
1Timothy1:9 Keta'm c'u wa'
1Timothy1:10 ri cäquiban macunic cuc' ixokib achijab
1Timothy1:11 jas ri cubij ri tzij re colobal ib ri nim u k'ij
1Timothy1:12 Quinmaltioxin che ri Crist Jesus ri Kajaw
1Timothy1:13 Nabe in xinwetz'bej u wäch ri Dios
1Timothy1:14 Sibalaj xtz'ebex c'ut ri u tok'ob ri Kajaw
1Timothy1:15 C'o jun tzij ri cuya' cäcu'bi ka c'u'x chrij
1Timothy1:16 Rumal c'u ri'
1Timothy1:17 Ri Dios are ri Ajawinel chbe k'ij sak
1Timothy1:18 Nu c'ojol Timotey
1Timothy1:19 Chajiquiba' ri a cojonic
1Timothy1:20 Jujun chque wa' are ri Imeney xukuje' ri Alejandr. Xebenjach ri e are pa u k'ab ri Satanas
1Timothy2:1 Nabe
1Timothy2:2 Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios paquiwi' ri ajawinelab paquiwi' conojel ri e k'atal tak tzij rech cujcuinic cujc'oji' pa utzil xukuje' pa jamaril nim kila' wi ri Dios ruc' jun c'aslemal ri kas utz quilic.
1Timothy2:3 Are c'u utz wa' xukuje' cäkaj chuwäch ri ka Colonel Dios;
1Timothy2:4 ri Dios cäraj chi quecolotaj ri winak chi nimalaj conojel
1Timothy2:5 Xa' c'u jun Dios c'olic
1Timothy2:6 Rumal rech chi xujach rib ri Jesucrist pa u k'ab ri cämical che u tojic ri rajil ri colobal ib chque conojel
1Timothy2:7 In cojom che tzijonel xukuje' takom. In cojom che qui tijoxic ri man aj judeyib taj che ri cojonic xukuje' che ri kastzij. Quinbij ri kastzij
1Timothy2:8 Quinwaj c'ut chi ri winak pa conojel c'olbal cäquiban ch'awem ruc' Dios chequiwalijisaj ri qui k'ab ruc' jun ch'ajch'ojalaj canima'
1Timothy2:9 Xukuje' quinwaj chi ri ixokib utz catz'iakixic quib caquibano
1Timothy2:10 Xane' ruc' utzalaj tak chac
1Timothy2:11 Rajawaxic chi ri ixokib cäquita' ri tijonic ruc' nimanic pa ronojel
1Timothy2:12 Ri in man quinya' ta che jun ixok chi quebutijoj achijab
1Timothy2:13 Rumal rech chi are nabe xban ri Adan
1Timothy2:14 Xukuje' ri Adan man are ta ri xsubutajic
1Timothy2:15 Ri ixok cacolotaj c'u na cumal ri ralanic xukuje' we caken chupam ri cojonic
1Timothy3:1 Kastzij wa' ri quinbij: We c'o jun ri cäraj cäcoj che solinel que ri comon cojonelab
1Timothy3:2 Rajawaxic ba' chi ri solinel man c'o ta cätzujux wi
1Timothy3:3 man u nak'atisam ta rib che k'abaric mawi yacal ch'o'j
1Timothy3:4 Utz cubano cätakan paquiwi' ri e aj uwo rachoch
1Timothy3:5 We c'u c'o jun man reta'm ta ruc'axic ri rachoch
1Timothy3:6 Rajawaxic chi man c'ac' cojonel taj
1Timothy3:7 Xukuje' rajawaxic chi utz quil wi cumal ri winak rech man c'o ta yok'bal re
1Timothy3:8 Jeri' xukuje' ri pataninelab
1Timothy3:9 Rajawaxic kas jicom ri canima' chrij ri kastzij ri uj cojoninak wi
1Timothy3:10 Xukuje' ri quecoj che pataninelab nabe chiwetamaj we utz cäquibano o man utz taj. C'äte ri' chebicojo che pataninelab we man c'o tzij tom chquij.
1Timothy3:11 Jeri' xukuje' ri ixokib
1Timothy3:12 Rajawaxic chi ri pataninelab chquijujunal xa' jun ri quixokil
1Timothy3:13 Ri pataninelab ri utz cäquiban che ri qui chac
1Timothy3:14 Cu'l nu c'u'x chi chanim quinbe awuc'. Quintz'ibaj c'u bic we jastak ri' chawe
1Timothy3:15 we ne quinbeytajic
1Timothy3:16 K'alaj chquiwäch conojel chi nim qui banic ri jastak re ri ka k'ijilanic che ri Dios: Ri Dios xc'utun chupam jun cuerp aj winak
1Timothy4:1 K'alaj cubij ri Uxlabaxel chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ij
1Timothy4:2 Quequitatabej na achijab xa quieb qui wäch ri xak e banal tak tzij. We winak ri' man cäquina' ta chic pa canima' ri etzelal ri cäquibano
1Timothy4:3 Ri e are quetakan chque ri winak chi man quec'uli' taj xukuje' chi jujun tak u wäch wa man cäquitij taj. Je cäquibij wa' pune' ri Dios u banom ri wa rech ri cojonelab xukuje' ri queta'm ri kastzij cäquitij que ruc' maltioxinic.
1Timothy4:4 Utz c'u ronojel ri u banom ri Dios. Man c'o ta jun jasach ri utz cätijic ri ma ta ya'tal chke
1Timothy4:5 rumal rech chi cätewichitaj c'u wa' rumal ri u tzij ri Dios xukuje' rumal ri ch'awem ruc' Dios.
1Timothy4:6 We quebatijoj we jastak ri' chque tak ri kachalal queq'uiy c'ut cumal tak ri tzij re ri cojonic xukuje' cumal tak ri e utzalaj tak tijonic ri e a takem
1Timothy4:7 Mabe awanima' cuc' tak ri puquinic ri man c'o ta qui patan ri cäquitzijoj ri winak. Are chacojo' a chuk'ab chupatanixic ri Dios.
1Timothy4:8 Ri u cojic ka chuk'ab ruc' ri ka cuerp xak jubik' cujuto' wi. Are c'u ri u patanixic ri Dios cujuto' na pa ronojel. C'o utzil cäkarik rumal wa' pa we c'aslemal ri' cho ri uwächulew
1Timothy4:9 Jic ri tzij xukuje' takalic chi cac'amowax cumal conojel.
1Timothy4:10 Rumal ri' cujchacunic xukuje' cujyok'ic
1Timothy4:11 Chattakanok xukuje' chac'utu' we jastak ri'.
1Timothy4:12 Maya' chque ri winak chi cäquetzelaj a wäch xa' rumal rech chi at ac'al achi na. Xane' chatux jun c'utbal pa ronojel chquiwäch ri cojonelab
1Timothy4:13 Are chasiq'uij ri Tz'ibatalic chquiwäch ri winak
1Timothy4:14 Chatoc il che ri xsipax chawe rumal ri Dios. Are yo'm chawe rumal ri u tzij ri Dios ri xk'axex chawe aretak ri tatayib ri quetakan chque ri cojonelab xquiya' qui k'ab pawi'.
1Timothy4:15 Chebawilij we jastak ri'
1Timothy4:16 Chawila' awib
1Timothy5:1 Co mach'abej jun nim tata'
1Timothy5:2 Chebapixbej ri nimak tak chuchuyib e jacha' ri a nan. Chebapixbej ri alitomab je jas ri e awana'b ruc' ch'ajch'ojil.
1Timothy5:3 Chebato' ri malca'nib ri kastzij c'o qui rajawaxic.
1Timothy5:4 We c'u c'o jun malca'n ri e c'o ral o u wi' tak u mam
1Timothy5:5 Are ri kas malca'n
1Timothy5:6 Are c'u ri cutzucuj u quicotisaxic rib
1Timothy5:7 Chattakan chque ri cojonelab chi chquibana' we jastak ri'
1Timothy5:8 Are c'ut ri man coc ta il chque ri e rech
1Timothy5:9 Xuwi chitz'ibaj ri u bi' jun malca'n ri tz'akatinak chi oxc'al (60) u junab
1Timothy5:10 ri quesax u tzijol chi utzalaj chac u banom
1Timothy5:11 Mebato' c'u ri malca'nib ri c'ä e alitomab na. Aretak c'u ri kas e qui rayibal quebutas chrij ri Crist
1Timothy5:12 Quemacun c'u ri'
1Timothy5:13 Xukuje' cäquetamaj sak'orinic
1Timothy5:14 Quinwaj ba' chi ri malca'nib ri c'ä e alitomab na chec'ulanok
1Timothy5:15 E c'o c'u jujun malca'nib ri xquitas quib
1Timothy5:16 We c'o jun cojonel
1Timothy5:17 Ri tatayib ri quetakan pa ri comon cojonelab ri utz ruc'axic ri qui chac cäquibano
1Timothy5:18 Are c'u ri Tz'ibatalic cubij: “Mach'uk ri u tza'm ri wacax ri cätajin cuban ri yak'oj.” Xukuje' cubij: “Takal che ri aj chac ri tojbal rech.”
1Timothy5:19 Macojo we cäban tzij chrij jun chque ri tatayib ri quetakan chque ri cojonelab
1Timothy5:20 Ri man cäquiya' ta can ri mac
1Timothy5:21 Catinbochi'j chuwäch ri Dios
1Timothy5:22 Aretak caya' ri a k'ab puwi' jun ri coc che c'amal qui be ri cojonelab
1Timothy5:23 Xak c'u ne amak'el cayitz' ri a pam
1Timothy5:24 E c'o jujun ri kas k'alaj chic ri qui mac c'ä mäjok quebe pa k'atbal tzij. E c'o jujun chic ri man k'alaj ta ri qui mac chanim
1Timothy5:25 Je c'u wa' ri u banic ri utzil. K'alaj wa' chanim chquiwäch conojel. Pune' ta ne man k'alaj chanim ri utzil ri cäkabano
1Timothy6:1 Conojel ri e c'o chuxe' takanic
1Timothy6:2 E are c'u ri e c'o cajaw cojonelab
1Timothy6:3 We c'o jun ri jun chi wi u tijonic
1Timothy6:4 ri are cunimarisaj rib
1Timothy6:5 amak'el cäquic'ulelaj quib rumal rech chi sachinak qui no'j xukuje' man c'o ta ri kastzij cuc'
1Timothy6:6 Nim c'ut ri cuch'äc jun we cäniman che ri Dios xukuje' cäquicot che ri c'o ruc'.
1Timothy6:7 Man c'o ta ka c'amom ulok cho ri uwächulew
1Timothy6:8 We c'u c'o ri ka wa ri katz'iak chujquicot che wa'.
1Timothy6:9 Are c'u ri cäcaj quek'inomaric
1Timothy6:10 Ruc' ri u lok'ok'exic ri puak cäq'uiy wi ulok ronojel etzelal. E c'o jujun ri sibalaj xquirayij ri puak
1Timothy6:11 At c'ut
1Timothy6:12 Chatija' a k'ij che ri utzalaj ch'o'j re ri cojonic. Chachapa' ri c'aslemal ri man cäq'uis taj. Che c'u wa' xatsiq'uix wi aretak xak'alajisaj ri utzalaj a cojonic chquiwäch e q'ui winak ri xquita' ri a tzij.
1Timothy6:13 Chuwäch ri Dios ri cuya' qui c'aslemal conojel ri jastak
1Timothy6:14 chi chanimaj we takanic ri'. Maq'uex ri takanic
1Timothy6:15 Ri are cäc'ut na pa tak ri u k'ijol rumal ri Jun ri nimarisam u k'ij ri tewichi'm
1Timothy6:16 ri xa' Jun ri man cäcäm taj
1Timothy6:17 Ri e k'inomab ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew camic
1Timothy6:18 Chebataka' chi chquibana' utzil
1Timothy6:19 Jeri' cäquimulij k'inomal chbil quib xukuje' cäquiyac jun utzalaj tac'alibal chque ri k'ij ri quepe na
1Timothy6:20 Timotey
1Timothy6:21 E c'o jujun ri xquibij chi c'o qui cojonic
2Timothy1:1 Ri in Pawl
2Timothy1:2 quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe
2Timothy1:3 Quinpatanij ri Dios
2Timothy1:4 Cänataj chwe ri u wa'l a wäch. Sibalaj quinwaj c'ut quinwil a wäch
2Timothy1:5 Cänataj chwe chi kastzij c'o a cojonic
2Timothy1:6 Rumal c'u ri' quinnataj chawe chi chac'astajisaj u wäch ri sipam chawe rumal ri Dios aretak xebenya' ri nu k'ab pawi'.
2Timothy1:7 Man u yo'm ta c'ut ri Dios chke jun uxlabal re xibriquil
2Timothy1:8 Matq'uix ba' che u k'alajisaxic jas ri u banom ri Kajaw o jas nu banom in ri in c'o pa che' rumal rech ri Are'. Xane' chach'ija' awe ri c'ax wuc' in rumal rech ri tzij re colobal ib
2Timothy1:9 ri xujucolo ri xujusiq'uij xukuje' xutas ri ka c'aslemal che ri are'
2Timothy1:10 camic c'ut xk'alajisax ri u tok'ob chke rumal ri u petbal ri ka Colonel ri Crist Jesus. Ri are' xusach u wäch ri cämical
2Timothy1:11 Ri Dios in u tasom rech quinya' u bixic we tzijol ri'
2Timothy1:12 Xukuje' rumal rech wa' quinrik we c'ax ri'. Man quinq'uix ta c'ut
2Timothy1:13 Chabij ri tzij jacha' ri xata' wuc'
2Timothy1:14 Chachajij ri utzalaj tijonic ri yo'm pa a k'ab
2Timothy1:15 Aweta'm ba' chi conojel ri e c'o pa Asiy xinquiya' can nu tuquiel. Jujun c'ut chque are' ri Pijel xukuje' ri Hermojenes.
2Timothy1:16 Chel ta u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel chque ri e aj uwo rachoch ri Onesipor. Q'ui mul c'ut ri are' xuya' uxlanem chwe
2Timothy1:17 Xane' aretak c'o ri are' pa Rom
2Timothy1:18 Chel ta u c'u'x ri Ajawaxel che pa ri k'ij ri'. Aweta'm ronojel ri chac ri xuban pa ri tinimit re Epes.
2Timothy2:1 Ri at
2Timothy2:2 Ri nu bim chawe chquiwäch e q'ui k'alajisanelab
2Timothy2:3 At c'ut chach'ija' ri c'ax junam wuc' je jas jun utzalaj rajch'o'j ri Jesucrist.
2Timothy2:4 Man c'o ta jun ajch'o'j ri cuputzcuyij ta rib chupam ri jastak quech ri winak; rajawaxic c'ut chi are cuban cakaj chuwäch ri xcojow che ch'o'j.
2Timothy2:5 Xukuje' we c'o jachin cutij u k'ij pa ri aninem
2Timothy2:6 Ri caticow ri ulew takal che chi are' nabe cuc'am rech ri u wächinic ri cutico.
2Timothy2:7 Chachomaj ri quinbij. Are c'u ri Ajawaxel catto'w na che u ch'obic ronojel.
2Timothy2:8 Chnataj ri Jesucrist chawe
2Timothy2:9 Rumal ri utzalaj tzij ri' quinrik c'ax
2Timothy2:10 Rumal ri' quinch'ij conojel ri rikoj c'ax che cutzil ri e cha'om
2Timothy2:11 Kastzij wa' we tzij ri': We cujcäm ruc' are'
2Timothy2:12 We cäkach'ij ri c'ax
2Timothy2:13 We ri uj cätukar ri ka cojonic
2Timothy2:14 Chanataj wa chque. Pa ri u bi' ri Dios chata' chque chquitanaba' u yajic quib puwi' jujun tak tzij. Ri c'ulelam ib man c'o ta u patan; xane' quequiyojtajisaj ri quetatabenic.
2Timothy2:15 Chawila' awib rech catac'aba' awib chuwäch ri Dios
2Timothy2:16 Chak'ila' awib che ri tzijonem re we uwächulew ri' ri man c'o ta quechbex che xane' catquinim chupam ri etzelal.
2Timothy2:17 Ri tzijonem ri' chanim cujabuj rib chquixo'l ri winak
2Timothy2:18 Ri e are' xesachic
2Timothy2:19 Pune' ba jewa' tajin caquibano
2Timothy2:20 Pa jun nimalaj ja man xuwi ta e c'o jastak re k'an puak xukuje' re sak puak
2Timothy2:21 Jeri' xukuje' we jun cujosk'ij rib
2Timothy2:22 Chatanimaj chquiwäch ri e itzelalaj tak rayinic aj c'ojolal
2Timothy2:23 Maya' c'olbal chque tak ri tzij
2Timothy2:24 Man takal ta che ri jun pataninel re ri Ajawaxel chi cäch'ojinic
2Timothy2:25 xukuje' ruc' manxoyil quebutijoj ri winak ri cäquic'ulelaj ri u tzij. We ne ri Dios cuya' na chque chi cäquiq'uex qui c'u'x rech cäquetamaj ri kastzij.
2Timothy2:26 Rech quetzelej chupam ri utzalaj qui chomanic
2Timothy3:1 Xukuje' chawetamaj chi pa ri q'uisbal tak k'ijol
2Timothy3:2 Quec'oji' na winak ri cäquilok'ok'ej quib chquibil quib
2Timothy3:3 man c'o ta lok'ok'ebal qui c'u'x
2Timothy3:4 cäquijach tak cachil pa qui k'ab ri qui c'ulel
2Timothy3:5 Je ta ne ri c'o ri nimanic che ri Dios cuc'
2Timothy3:6 Jujun c'ut chque wa' e are ri queboc pa tak ja
2Timothy3:7 ri amak'el tajin cäquetamaj tak jastak
2Timothy3:8 Jacha' ri xquiban ri Jans xukuje' ri Jambres aretak xquik'atij u wäch ri Moises
2Timothy3:9 Man utz taj quel na ri qui chac. Quel na chi sak chquiwäch conojel chi man utz ta ri quechomanic
2Timothy3:10 Are c'u ri at chaterenej ri nu tijonic
2Timothy3:11 ri e c'axalaj tak nu c'ulelaxic xukuje' ri e nu rikoj tak c'ax. E aweta'm conojel ri xinc'ulmaj pa Antioquiy
2Timothy3:12 Kas tzij ba' chi conojel ri winak ri kas cäcaj cäcan ri u rayinic ri Crist Jesus
2Timothy3:13 E are c'u ri e itzel tak winak
2Timothy3:14 Chabana' ba at jas ri awetamam xukuje' ri a cojom. Aweta'm c'ut jachin ruc' a tijom wi awib.
2Timothy3:15 Aweta'm c'ut chi aretak at ch'utin na xawetamaj ri tastalic tak Tz'ibatalic
2Timothy3:16 Ronojel ri Tz'ibatalic petinak ruc' ri Dios: utz che tijonic
2Timothy3:17 Jeri' ri ralc'ual ri Dios yo'm ronojel ri rajawaxic che chubanic ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac.
2Timothy4:1 Chuwäch ri Dios xukuje' ri Kajaw Jesucrist
2Timothy4:2 chak'alajisaj ri u tzij ri Dios aretak cuya' cätzijoxic xukuje' aretak man cuya' taj. Chatyajonak
2Timothy4:3 Cäpe c'u na k'ij aretak ri winak man cäquich'ij ta na ri suc'alaj tijonic. Xane' quequitzucuj na q'ui cajtij ri cäquic'ut chquiwäch jas ri cäcaj cäquito
2Timothy4:4 Cäquijech'obisaj c'u na ri qui tanibal chrij ri kastzij
2Timothy4:5 Ri at c'ut chachomaj jas ri caban pa ronojel
2Timothy4:6 Ri in c'ut
2Timothy4:7 Nu cojom nu chuk'ab pa ri utzalaj ch'o'j
2Timothy4:8 Kas camic c'ut c'olotal chi apan chwe ri corona re suq'uil
2Timothy4:9 Chanim chatpe wuc' che wilic.
2Timothy4:10 Xinuya' c'u can ri Dems. Ri are' utz xeril na ri jastak re ri uwächulew
2Timothy4:11 Xuwi ri Lucax c'o wuc'. Chatzucuj ulok ri Marcux
2Timothy4:12 Xintak bic ri Tiquico pa Epes.
2Timothy4:13 Aretak catpetic
2Timothy4:14 Ri Alejandr ri ch'ayal ch'ich'
2Timothy4:15 Ri at chachajij awib chuwäch
2Timothy4:16 Pa ri nabe to'bal wib chquiwäch ri k'atal tak tzij
2Timothy4:17 Are c'u ri Ajawaxel xc'oji' wuc'
2Timothy4:18 Xukuje' quinresaj na ri Ajawaxel pa ronojel itzelalaj chac ri cäbantaj na
2Timothy4:19 Chaya' rutzil qui wäch ri Prisil xukuje' ri Aquil
2Timothy4:20 Ri Erast xcanaj can pa Corint. Ri Tropim yawab xinya' can pa Milet.
2Timothy4:21 Chatpetok chanim rech c'amajok ri nimalaj tew. Ri Eubul
2Timothy4:22 Ri Ajawaxel Jesucrist chc'ol ta ruc' ri awanima'. Are' ta ri Dios cuban tok'ob chiwe.
Titus1:1 Ri in Pawl
Titus1:2 rech cu'l qui c'u'x chi c'o junalic qui c'aslemal
Titus1:3 Xuchomaj jun k'ij
Titus1:4 Quintz'ibaj we wuj ri' chawe
Titus1:5 Xatinya' can pa Cret rech casuc'umaj ri c'ä cäraj na
Titus1:6 Rajawaxic chi ri jun ri catakan pa ri comon cojonelab
Titus1:7 Rajawaxic chi ri solinel quech ri comon cojonelab: jicom ri u c'aslemal
Titus1:8 xane' cuya' okxanibal chque niq'uiaj chic
Titus1:9 Rajawaxic chi cunimaj ri jicalaj tzij
Titus1:10 E q'ui ri man cäquiya' ta quib pa takic
Titus1:11 Rajawaxic chi cätz'apix ri u pa qui chi'. Quequitijoj ri winak che jastak ri man ya'tal taj xa' rech cäquich'äc puak rumal. Quequituquij jujun tak ja winak.
Titus1:12 C'o jun chque ri e aj Cret
Titus1:13 Ri xubij ri achi ri' are' ri kas tzij. Rumal wa' rajawaxic chi co quebe a pixbej
Titus1:14 Mäquiya' u k'ij ri qui jo'sanic ri aj judeyib ri man c'o ta u patan
Titus1:15 Chque ri e ch'ajch'oj ri qui chomanic
Titus1:16 Cäquibij chi queta'm u wäch ri Dios
Titus2:1 Ri at c'ut
Titus2:2 chi ri nimak tatayib meyojcoric
Titus2:3 Junam ri chuchuyib ri e nimak tak winak chquirika' ri'jobic
Titus2:4 cäquic'am qui be ri alitomab che qui lok'ok'exic ri cachajil xukuje' ri cal
Titus2:5 utz qui chomanic
Titus2:6 Chebapixbej xukuje' ri c'ä e alabom na rech utz quechoman pa ronojel.
Titus2:7 Kas at chatyo'w jun utzalaj c'utbal chquiwäch pa conojel ri jastak. Aretak chebatijoj
Titus2:8 Utz chabana' che ri a tzijonic
Titus2:9 Chebapixbej ri pataninelab rech cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri cajaw pa ronojel
Titus2:10 c'o mebeläk' chque
Titus2:11 Rumal rech chi ri Dios u c'utum ri u tok'ob chquiwäch conojel ri winak rech quecolotajic.
Titus2:12 Cujutijoj chi cäkatas kib chrij ri rayibal aj uwächulew xukuje' ri jastak ri man cäquiya' ta u k'ij ri Dios. Cujutijoj chi utz ri ka chomanic cäkabano
Titus2:13 chi cäkeyej na ri juluwemalaj u petic ri nimalaj ka Dios xukuje' ri ka Colonel Jesucrist
Titus2:14 Ri Jesucrist xuya' ri u c'aslemal rumal kech
Titus2:15 Chatzijoj we jastak ri'. Chebapixbej ri winak
Titus3:1 Chanataj chque ri cojonelab chi cäquiya' quib pa takic chque ri k'atal tak tzij xukuje' ri c'o qui takanic
Titus3:2 man quequiyok' ta niq'uiaj chic
Titus3:3 Xukuje' ri uj man c'o ta ka no'j nabe canok
Titus3:4 Aretak c'ut xpe ri ka Colonel Dios
Titus3:5 xujucolo
Titus3:6 ri xutak ulok pa kanima' rumal ri Jesucrist ri ka Colonel
Titus3:7 Jeri' k'alajisam chic chi uj suc' chuwäch rumal ri u tok'ob
Titus3:8 Kastzij we tzij ri'. Quinwaj c'ut chi cabij we jastak ri'
Titus3:9 Maya' c'u qui k'ij ri conalaj tak chomanic xukuje' ri jo'sanic ri cabix chquij ri e i mam
Titus3:10 We c'o jun ri cuban chque ri cojonelab chi cäquitasala' quib
Titus3:11 Aweta'm c'ut chi ri je u banic wa' sachinak
Titus3:12 Aretak quintak bic ri Artems awuc'
Titus3:13 Chebajacha' bic ruc' utzil ri Zens ri aj pixab xukuje' ri Apols chaya' bic ri cajwataj chque.
Titus3:14 Xukuje' rajawaxic chi ri e c'o kuc' cäquetamaj queboc il che utzalaj tak chac rech cäquirik ri rajawaxic
Titus3:15 Conojel ri e c'o wuc' cäquiya' apan rutzil a wäch. Chaya' rutzil qui wäch ri lok'alaj tak kachalal pa ri cojonic. Ri Dios chubana' tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel.

Hebrews4:3 Are c'u ri uj cujoc ruc' pa ri uxlanem

Hebrews6:20 jawije' xoc wi ri Jesus rumal kech
Hebrews7:1 Are c'u we Melquisedec ri'
Hebrews7:2 Ri Abraham xujach ri u lajujil ronojel che ri are'. Ri u bi' ri Melquisedec je quil cubij wa': “Ajawinel re suq'uil.” Are c'u ri tzij rajawinel ri Salem je quil cubij wa': “Ajawinel re jamaril.”
Hebrews7:3 Man c'o ta u tzijol ri u tat mawi ri u nan
Hebrews7:4 Chichomaj ba'
Hebrews7:5 Kastzij ri e rija'l ri Levi ri queboc che cojol tabal tok'ob
Hebrews7:6 Are c'u ri Melquisedec
Hebrews7:7 Man c'o ta jachin cac'ulelanic chi ri cayo'w ri tewichi'nic are' nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri cac'amow ri tewichi'nic.
Hebrews7:8 Waral ri cäquic'am ri lajujil
Hebrews7:9 Cuya' c'ut cäkabij chi ri aj levitib ri cäquic'am ri lajujil camic
Hebrews7:10 Ri Levi xa' c'u jun ruc' ri u mam Abraham
Hebrews7:11 Ri e aj Israel xquic'am ri pixab chuxe' ri qui takanic ri levitib ri e cojol tabal tok'ob
Hebrews7:12 We queq'uextaj c'u ri cojol tabal tok'ob
Hebrews7:13 Are c'u ri Kajaw ri je cäbix wa' chrij
Hebrews7:14 K'alaj c'ut chi ri Kajaw
Hebrews7:15 Are c'u sibalaj k'alaj na
Hebrews7:16 ri man cojom ta rumal ri pixab ri cubij jachique ija'lil rajawaxic cäpe wi
Hebrews7:17 Cäk'alajisax c'u chrij rumal ri Dios: “At cojol tabal tok'ob amak'el chbe k'ij sak
Hebrews7:18 Kastzij ri ojer takanic xchup rumal rech ri u tukaril
Hebrews7:19 Man c'o ta xtz'akatisax rumal ri u pixab ri Moises. Xpe c'u jun cu'lbal ka c'u'x ri sibalaj utz na
Hebrews7:20 Ri Dios xujiquiba' u bixic wa' ruc' jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na. Ri niq'uiaj e cojol tabal tok'ob man ruc' ta qui bixic jun chi'nic ri kas cäban na xeboc che cojol tabal tok'ob.
Hebrews7:21 Aretak xcoj ri Ajawaxel
Hebrews7:22 Je c'u ri' ri Jesus are' ri cajiquiban jun c'ulwächinic ri utz na chuwäch ri nabe.
Hebrews7:23 Sibalaj e q'ui e oquinak can che cojol tabal tok'ob
Hebrews7:24 Are c'u ri Jesus
Hebrews7:25 Jeri' cäcuin che qui colic chbe k'ij sak ri winak ri quekeb ruc' ri Dios rumal are'
Hebrews7:26 Je qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob wa' ri rajawaxic chke: tastalic man c'o ta retzelal
Hebrews7:27 Man rajawaxic ta che chi ronojel k'ij cucämisaj ta jun awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios nabe paquiwi' ri u mac ri are'
Hebrews7:28 Ri u pixab ri Moises quebucoj jacha' che qui nimal cojol tabal tok'ob achijab ri man e tz'akat taj
Hebrews8:1 Ri u c'u'x ri ka bim are wa': Chi je u beya'l wa' ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob ri kech uj xt'uyi' chicaj pa ri u wiquiak'ab ri u tem ri Dios re ajawibal
Hebrews8:2 are c'u cojol tabal tok'ob ri cäpatanin pa ri kas k'ijilabal ri xban rumal ri Ajawaxel
Hebrews8:3 Ronojel qui nimal ri e cojol tak tabal tok'ob cojom che qui ya'ic sipanic xukuje' tabal tak tok'ob. Je c'u ri' ri Jesucrist rajawaxic chi xukuje' ri are' c'o jas cuya'o.
Hebrews8:4 We ta c'o ri Jesucrist cho ri uwächulew
Hebrews8:5 E are c'u wa' quepatanin pa jun k'ijilabal ri xa' e u wächbal xukuje' e u mu'jal ri c'o chicaj. Jas ri xbix che ri Moises aretak xa' co'l man cuchaplej u banic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re Rikoj ib: “Chawila'
Hebrews8:6 Are c'u ri camic ri Jesus u c'amom jun chac ri sibalaj nim na u k'ij chuwäch ri qui chac ri e cojol tabal tok'ob. Are' ri cojol tzij re jun c'ulwächinic ri utz na chuwäch ri c'ulwächinic ri xc'oji' can cuc'. Ri c'ulwächinic re camic tiquibam paquiwi' chi'nic ri e utz na chuwäch ri c'ulwächinic re nabe.
Hebrews8:7 We ta ri nabe c'ulwächinic junam ta xel ruc' ri u chomanic ri Dios
Hebrews8:8 Xubij c'u ri Dios aretak xuk'alajisaj ri qui mac ri winak: “Cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Chiwilampe'
Hebrews8:9 We c'ulwächinic' man je taj jas ri xinban cuc' ri e qui mam pa ri k'ij aretak xebenc'am che ri qui k'ab che quesaxic ulok pa Ejipt; rumal c'u rech chi ri e are' man xquitz'akatisaj taj ri nu c'ulwächinic
Hebrews8:10 ‘Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij ri'
Hebrews8:11 Man quequitijola' ta chi na chquijujunal ri cachalal rech cäquich'ob u wäch ri Ajawaxel. Rumal rech chi conojel cäquich'ob na nu wäch
Hebrews8:12 Ri in c'ut man quinc'äjisaj ta na qui wäch rumal rech ri etzelal ri qui banom
Hebrews8:13 Aretak ri Dios cubij chi c'o jun c'ac' c'ulwächinic
Hebrews9:1 Ri nabe c'ulwächinic xec'oji' u cholajil che ri k'ijilanic
Hebrews9:2 Jewa' ri u suc'umaxic ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios re Rikoj ib. Pa ri nabe u tasbal ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xec'oji' wi ri tzuc'ulibal
Hebrews9:3 Chrij ri ucab tasbal
Hebrews9:4 Chila' xc'oji' wi jun porobal coc'al re k'an puak
Hebrews9:5 Puwi' ri u caxa ri c'ulwächinic e c'o wi ri qui wächbal ri aj cajalaj tak to'banelab ri e c'o qui xic' ri xemujisan puwi' ri tz'apibal. We jastak ri' man cuya' taj quetzijox camic chquijujunal.
Hebrews9:6 Je c'u banom chque we jastak ri'
Hebrews9:7 Pa ri ucab c'u u pam ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios
Hebrews9:8 Jeri' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cuc'utu' chi
Hebrews9:9 Are c'u ri' c'ambal no'j pa ri k'ij camic. Ri winak ri cäquiya' sipanic xukuje' quequicämisaj awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios
Hebrews9:10 rumal rech chi xak takanic wa' chquij jastak ri quebilitajic
Hebrews9:11 Aretak c'u petinak chic ri Crist
Hebrews9:12 Ri Crist xoc pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal man rumal ta qui quiq'uel ama'ib tak q'uisic' mawi ri quech ri alaj ama'ib tak wacax
Hebrews9:13 Kastzij chi ri qui quiq'uel ri ama'ib tak wacax xukuje' tak q'uisic
Hebrews9:14 ¡e ta c'u lo ri u quiq'uel ri Crist
Hebrews9:15 Rumal ri' ri Crist are ri ch'awenel aj jun c'ac' c'ulwächinic
Hebrews9:16 Jawije' c'u ri c'o wi jun c'ulwächinic
Hebrews9:17 Rumal ri cämical co cätiquibax ri c'ulwächinic. Man c'o ta c'u u patan aretak c'ä c'asal ri xbanow ri c'ulwächinic.
Hebrews9:18 Rumal ri' ri nabe c'ulwächinic xukuje' xjekebax ruc' quic'.
Hebrews9:19 Ri Moises
Hebrews9:20 Xubij c'u chque: “Are' wa' ri u quiq'uel ri c'ulwächinic ri u yo'm wi takanic ri Dios chiwe.”
Hebrews9:21 Junam xukuje' cuchiquicha' ri quic' puwi' ri Lic'om Rachoch Dios xukuje' paquiwi' conojel ri chacubal ri cäcoj che k'ijilanic che ri Dios.
Hebrews9:22 Xa' co'l man conojel ri jastak rajawaxic quejosk'ix ruc' quic'
Hebrews9:23 Rajawaxic c'ut chi ri qui wächbal ri jastak aj chicaj quejosk'ix rumal ri qui cämisaxic awaj che tabal tok'ob cho ri Dios. Are' c'u ri jastak aj chicaj quejosk'ix rumal jun tabal tok'ob ri utz na chuwäch ri qui cämisaxic tak awaj.
Hebrews9:24 Man xoc ta ri Crist pa ri k'ijilabal ri banom che qui k'ab ri winak
Hebrews9:25 Ri qui nimal ri cojol tabal tok'ob coc pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal chujunab ruc' quic'
Hebrews9:26 We ta jeri'
Hebrews9:27 K'atom c'ut paquiwi' ri winak chi xa' jumul quecämic
Hebrews9:28 jeri' xukuje' ri Crist xa' jumul xya' che tabal tok'ob che resaxic ri qui mac ri e q'ui. Chucamul cäpe na
Hebrews10:1 Are c'u ri pixab
Hebrews10:2 We ta ri pixab xcuintaj che u banic tz'akat chque
Hebrews10:3 Rumal c'u ri qui ya'ic ri tabal tak tok'ob quenataj ri mac tak chque chujunab.
Hebrews10:4 Man cäcuin ta ri qui quiq'uel ri alaj tak ama' wacax xukuje' ri ama' tak q'uisic' che quesaxic tak ri macaj.
Hebrews10:5 Rumal ri'
Hebrews10:6 Man quekaj ta chwäch la ri quichajirisaxic tak ri awaj xukuje' ri quicämisaxic tak ri awaj che tabal tok'ob che resaxic ri macaj.
Hebrews10:7 Te c'u ri' xinbij: ‘Chilampe la
Hebrews10:8 Nabe cubij chi ri Dios: “Man cäraj taj ri tabal tok'ob o ri qui ya'ic tak awaj o ri qui poroxic tak awaj che resaxic ri mac
Hebrews10:9 Te c'u ri' cubij: “Chilampe la
Hebrews10:10 Rumal ri u rayibal ri Dios
Hebrews10:11 Ronojel cojol tabal tok'ob cutac'aba' rib ronojel k'ij che k'ijilanic
Hebrews10:12 Aretak c'u we cojol tabal tok'ob ri' u chi'm chic re chbe k'ij sak jun xa' tabal tok'ob ri cäyo'w ri cuyubal macaj
Hebrews10:13 Te c'u ri' cäreyej na
Hebrews10:14 Xa' ruc' jun sipanic
Hebrews10:15 Xukuje' ri Ruxlabal ri Dios cujiquiba' u bixic wa chke
Hebrews10:16 “Cächa' ri Ajawaxel: ‘Oc'owinak chic ri k'ij ri'
Hebrews10:17 Man quenataj ta chi na ri qui mac mawi ri quetzelal.’ ”
Hebrews10:18 Jeri' aretak e sachtajinak chi ri macaj
Hebrews10:19 Je c'u ri'
Hebrews10:20 Ri are' xuban jun c'ac' be chke ri c'aslic
Hebrews10:21 C'o c'u jun nimalaj ka cojol tabal tok'ob c'o chuwäch ri rachoch Dios.
Hebrews10:22 Jeri' chujkeb chuwäch ri Dios
Hebrews10:23 Co chujtac'al pa ri cu'lbal ka c'u'x
Hebrews10:24 Kas chkilila' kib
Hebrews10:25 Mäkaya' can ri u mulixic kib
Hebrews10:26 We cäkatakej u banic ri mac aretak ketamam chic ri kastzij
Hebrews10:27 Xane' xak cäkeyej ri k'atoj tzij xukuje' ri c'axalaj k'ak' ri cäsachow na qui wäch ri cäquiban qui c'ulel che ri Dios.
Hebrews10:28 Apachin ri man cunimaj ta ri u pixab ri Moises
Hebrews10:29 ¡E ta c'u lo ri jun ri cäretzelaj u wäch ri u C'ojol ri Dios
Hebrews10:30 Keta'm jachin ri xbinic: “Wech in ri tojow q'uexel
Hebrews10:31 Xibibal wa' we cäkaj jun pa ri u k'ab ri c'aslic Dios.
Hebrews10:32 Chenataj ba' chiwe ri k'ij ri e oc'owinak
Hebrews10:33 E c'o jujun chiwe xpe c'axc'olil paquiwi' aretak xeyok'ic xukuje' xquirik c'ax chquiwäch ri winak. E c'o jujun chic ri xquic'am que cuc' ri e c'o pa ri c'axc'olil ri'.
Hebrews10:34 Xel c'u i c'u'x chque ri xec'oji' pa che'. Aretak xec'am bic ri jastak iwe
Hebrews10:35 Mitzak ba' ri i jiquibam c'uxaj
Hebrews10:36 Ri ix rajawaxic chuk'ab chiwe pa ri c'axc'olil
Hebrews10:37 “Xa' jubik' cäraj na
Hebrews10:38 Ri suc'alaj winak cäc'asi rumal ri cojonic. We c'u cätzelej chrij
Hebrews10:39 Ri uj c'ut man uj ta jun cuc' ri quetzelej chquij che u sachic qui wäch. Xane' uj jun cuc' ri c'o qui cojonic che u colic ri canima'.
Hebrews11:1 Are wa' ri u banic ri ka cojonic: cäkacu'ba' ka c'u'x chi je quebel na ri jastak ri cäkaye'j
Hebrews11:2 Xek'alajisax ri e ka mam chi utz xquibano rumal rech chi xc'oji' qui cojonic.
Hebrews11:3 Rumal ri cojonic cäkach'obo chi xtiquiritaj ri uwächulew xukuje' ronojel ri c'olic rumal ri u tzij ri Dios
Hebrews11:4 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:5 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:6 We c'u man c'o cojonic
Hebrews11:7 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:8 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:9 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:10 Ri Abraham reyem c'u jun tinimit ri e c'o cowilaj tak u tac'alibal
Hebrews11:11 Xukuje' rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:12 Rumal ri'
Hebrews11:13 Conojel we winak ri' xecämic man xequic'amowaj ta c'ut ri jastak ri u chi'm ri Dios; rumal c'u rech chi c'o qui cojonic
Hebrews11:14 Are c'u ri je cäquibij wa'
Hebrews11:15 We ta c'o pa qui jolom ri c'olbal ri xebel wi ulok
Hebrews11:16 Ri e are' c'ut sibalaj cäcaj jun c'olbal ri utz na
Hebrews11:17 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:18 Pune' ri Dios xubij che ri Abraham: “Che ri Isaac queq'uiy wi na ri e awija'l.”
Hebrews11:19 Ri Abraham reta'm chi ri Dios c'o u cuinem che qui c'astajisaxic ri cäminakib; rumal ri' ri Abraham xuc'am chi jumul ri u c'ojol jacha' pa ri cämical
Hebrews11:20 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:21 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:22 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:23 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:24 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:25 Xane' xucha' ri u rikic c'ax junam cuc' ri winak re ri u tinimit ri Dios
Hebrews11:26 Xuchomaj chi are nimalaj k'inomal na chi cäyok' rumal rech ri Crist
Hebrews11:27 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:28 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:29 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:30 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:31 Rumal ri cojonic
Hebrews11:32 ¿Jas ta chi c'u ri quinbij? Man cätzijotaj ta ri Jedeon
Hebrews11:33 Ri rumal ri cojonic jujun xequich'äc ajawibal
Hebrews11:34 xquichup nimak tak k'ak'
Hebrews11:35 Jujun ixokib xequic'am ri qui cäminakib rumal chi xec'astajic. E c'o jujun chic xquirik c'ax
Hebrews11:36 Jujun chic xetz'bex qui wäch
Hebrews11:37 xecämisax che abaj
Hebrews11:38 Ri winak re ri uwächulew man takal ta chque quec'oji' ri winak ri' cuc'. Xebinicat pa tak chaki'j uwo sak
Hebrews11:39 Conojel wa' rumal ri qui cojonic xek'alajisaxic chi utz qui banom. Man xquirik ta c'u ri u bim ri Dios chi cuya' na
Hebrews11:40 rumal rech chi ri Dios xuchomaj ulok jun jasach ri utz na chke ri uj
Hebrews12:1 Jeri' xukuje' ri uj
Hebrews12:2 Xuwi chkila' ri Jesus
Hebrews12:3 Chichomaj rij ri jun ri xuch'ij ronojel ri c'ax ri xban che cumal ajmaquib
Hebrews12:4 Maja' quitij i chuk'ab c'ä ruc' ri i quiq'uel
Hebrews12:5 Sachinak chic pa i jolom ri pixbenic ri cuya' ri Dios chiwe
Hebrews12:6 Ri Ajawaxel cuc'äjisaj u wäch apachin ri culok'ok'ej
Hebrews12:7 Aretak cäc'äjisax i wäch
Hebrews12:8 Conojel alc'ualaxelab cäquic'am que ri c'äjisabal qui wäch. We man cäc'äjisax i wäch
Hebrews12:9 Xukuje' ri ka tat cho ri uwächulew xquic'äjisaj ka wäch
Hebrews12:10 E are ri ka tat xa' quieb oxib k'ij xquic'äjisaj ka wäch jas ri xquichomaj chi utz. Are c'u ri Dios cuc'äjisaj ka wäch rech c'o cäkechbej che xukuje' rech cuban tastalic tak winak chke
Hebrews12:11 Man c'o ta jun
Hebrews12:12 Rumal rech wa'
Hebrews12:13 Chebibana' suc'alaj tak qui be ri iwakan
Hebrews12:14 Chicojo' ri chuk'ab che ri c'olem pa jamaril cuc' conojel xukuje' ri ruc'axic jun tastalic c'aslemal; we c'u man jewa'
Hebrews12:15 Chiwila' c'o jun chiwe muya' can ri tok'ob ri cäban chiwe rumal ri Dios
Hebrews12:16 c'o jun muban macunic cuc' ixokib achijab
Hebrews12:17 Iweta'm c'ut
Hebrews12:18 Man ix opaninak taj chunakaj ri juyub ri cuya' cämakamaxic
Hebrews12:19 Man i tom ta ri rok'ebal ri trompet xukuje' ri u ch'abal ri Dios ri xtzijonic. Ri winak ri xquito xquibochi'j chi c'o chi jun tzij mäbix chque
Hebrews12:20 rumal rech chi man quecuin ta che u ch'ijic jas ri xetakan wi: “We c'o jun ri cänakajin cho ri juyub
Hebrews12:21 Sibalaj xibibal ri xquilo
Hebrews12:22 Are c'u ri ix ix opaninak chunakaj ri juyub Sion
Hebrews12:23 Ix opaninak cuc' ri nabeal tak winak re ri comon cojonelab
Hebrews12:24 Ix opaninak chunakaj ri Jesus
Hebrews12:25 Rumal ri' chixoc il mixutuj ri cujch'abenic. E are' tak c'ut ri xquixutuj ri Dios aretak xepixbex rumal waral cho ri uwächulew
Hebrews12:26 Are' ri u ch'abal ri Dios xslabesan ri uwächulew ojer. Camic c'ut cubij: “Jumul chi na quinslabesaj man xuwi ta ri uwächulew xane' xukuje' ri caj.”
Hebrews12:27 Ri tzij ri'
Hebrews12:28 Ri ajawibal ri cäkac'am che ri Dios
Hebrews12:29 Rumal rech chi ri ka Dios are je ta ne jun k'ak' ri ronojel cuporoj canok.
Hebrews13:1 Chäjekel ri lok'ok'enic aj achalaxic chixo'l.
Hebrews13:2 Mäsach pa i jolom ri u ya'ic okxanibal chque ri winak. Rumal c'u wa' jujun man xquich'ob taj chi xquiya' okxanibal chque ri tako'nib aj caj.
Hebrews13:3 Chenataj ri e c'o pa che' chiwe
Hebrews13:4 Iwonojel nim chiwila' wi ri c'ulanem. Mitz'iloj ri c'ulanem
Hebrews13:5 Milok'ok'ej ri puak
Hebrews13:6 Je c'u ri' cäcu'bi ka c'u'x
Hebrews13:7 Chenataj ri c'amal tak i be chiwe
Hebrews13:8 Ri Jesucrist kas xak jewi iwir
Hebrews13:9 Mixc'amalax bic cumal jule' tak tijonic chic ri e jalan chi wi. Are c'u utz na chi co quitiquiba' ri iwanima' chrij ri u tok'ob ri Dios
Hebrews13:10 Jun chi wi ri tabal tok'ob kech uj
Hebrews13:11 Ri awaj ri cäcoj ri qui quiq'uel pa ri Sibalaj Tastalicalaj C'olbal rumal ri qui nimal ri cojol ri tabal tok'ob rumal rech ri mac. Ri qui cuerp ri awaj ri' queporox tza'm ja.
Hebrews13:12 Rumal ri'
Hebrews13:13 Chujel ba' apan ruc' ri Jesus tza'm ja. Chujyok' cumal ri winak
Hebrews13:14 Man c'o ta c'u ka tinimit waral ri cojc'oji' ta wi na amak'el
Hebrews13:15 Rumal ri' amak'el chujk'ijilan che ri Dios rumal ri Jesucrist. We k'ijilanic ri' are' ri tabal tok'ob ri rajawaxic cakachi'j. ¡Kak'ijilaj ba'
Hebrews13:16 Chibana' utzil. Chijachala' ri jastak iwech chbil iwib. Mäsach wa' pa i jolom. Je tak sipanic wa' quekaj chuwäch ri Dios.
Hebrews13:17 Chixniman chque ri c'amal tak i be
Hebrews13:18 Chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios pakawi'. Kas cäkana' pa ri kanima' chi man c'o ta etzelal ka banom. Cäkaj c'ut chi utz cujbin pa ronojel.
Hebrews13:19 Sibalaj quixinbochi'j chi chibana' ch'awem ruc' Dios panuwi'
Hebrews13:20 Are ba' ri Dios ri cäyo'w jamaril chixo'l
Hebrews13:21 are chixutz'akatisaj che u banic ronojel u wäch utzalaj tak chac
Hebrews13:22 Quixinbochi'j
Hebrews13:23 Quinwaj chi quiwetamaj chi ri kachalal Timotey xtzokopixic. We cäpe chanim
Hebrews13:24 Chiya' rutzil qui wäch conojel ri c'amal tak i be xukuje' conojel ri tastalic tak winak. Ri e aj Ital cäquiya' rutzil i wäch.
Hebrews13:25 Are ta ri Dios cuban tok'ob chiwe chi nimalaj iwonojel.
James1:1 In Santiag
James1:2 Wachalal
James1:3 Iweta'm c'ut chi aretak quepe jastak chiwij che u k'alajisaxic ri i cojonic
James1:4 Chiya' ba' chi quiwetamaj quich'ij ronojel u wäch c'ax
James1:5 We c'u c'o jun chiwe c'ä c'o cäraj ri u no'j
James1:6 Chuta' ba' ruc' cojonic
James1:7 Muchomaj ba' ri winak ri' chi c'o cuc'am che ri Ajawaxel.
James1:8 Ri winak ri quieb ranima' xak cäbak'otic pa conojel ri u be.
James1:9 Ri achalaxel ri mach'alic rajawaxic cuna' rib chi nim u banic we ri Dios cunimarisaj u k'ij.
James1:10 Are c'ut ri k'inom rajawaxic chi cuna' rib chi utz c'olic we camach'irisax rumal ri Dios. Ri k'inom xak junam ruc' ri u cotz'ijal ri k'ayes ri man cäbeytaj taj.
James1:11 Aretak c'u quel ulok ri k'ij ruc' ri u k'ak'al
James1:12 Caquirik ri quicotemal ri winak ri cucoch' ri c'ambejenic ruc' nimalaj chuk'ab
James1:13 Aretak cätakchi'x jun che mac
James1:14 Xane' ri winak chquijujunal quetakchi'x che mac
James1:15 Ri qui rayibal ri winak cäralc'ualaj ri mac. Ri mac c'ut
James1:16 Lok'alaj tak wachalal
James1:17 Ronojel utzalaj sipanic
James1:18 Ri are' xuchomaj jas cuban na
James1:19 Rumal wa'
James1:20 are' c'u ri winak ri coyowaric man are' ta cuban ri cäkaj chuwäch ri Dios.
James1:21 Rumal rech wa' chiwesaj bic ronojel ri tz'ilol xukuje' ronojel ri sibalaj iwetzelal. Minimarisaj i k'ij
James1:22 Chinimaj ri tzij
James1:23 We c'o c'u jun ri xak cuta' ri tzij
James1:24 Kas cuca'yej bi rib
James1:25 Apachin ri cäretamaj jas cubij ri tz'akatalaj pixab ri quebutzokopij ri winak
James1:26 We c'o jun chixo'l ri cuchomaj chi cuk'ijilaj ri Dios
James1:27 Ri k'ijilanic che ri Dios ri kas ch'ajch'oj
James2:1 Wachalal
James2:2 We coc bic pa ri i mulin ib jun achi ri e u cojom tak mulk'ab re k'an puak xukuje' je'lalaj ratz'iak
James2:3 we c'u nim quiwil wi ri u cojom je'lalaj ratz'iak quibij c'u che: “Chatt'uyul waral ri utz wi”
James2:4 ¿la ma ta quiya' na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chic? ¿La ma ta quik'at tzij paquiwi' ri winak ruc' itzel tak i chomanic?
James2:5 Lok'alaj tak wachalal
James2:6 Ri ix c'ut man nim ta quiwil wi ri meba'. ¿La ma ta e are ri k'inomab ri e c'analaj tak winak ri e c'o piwi'
James2:7 ¿La ma ta e are' ri cäquetz'bej u wäch ri utzalaj u bi' ri Crist ri cänatax piwi'?
James2:8 Utz quibano we kastzij quibano jas ri cubij ri pixab ri nim u banic
James2:9 We c'u sibalaj quiya' na u k'ij jun winak chuwäch jun chic
James2:10 Apachin ta' ne ri cunimaj ronojel ri pixab
James2:11 Rumal rech chi are ri xbinic: “Matkaj pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic”
James2:12 Je chixtzijonok
James2:13 Ri jun ri man elinak ta u c'u'x chque niq'uiaj chic
James2:14 Wachalal
James2:15 We ri awachalal achi o ixok cat'unuwic o cuna' wi'jal
James2:16 c'o ta c'u jun chiwe cubij che: “Jät pa utzil
James2:17 Je c'u wa' xukuje' ri i cojonic
James2:18 C'o c'u jun cubij na: “At c'o a cojonic
James2:19 At cacojo chi xa' jun ri Dios. ¡Utz cabano! Xukuje' ri itzel tak uxlabal quecojonic
James2:20 Matux con. Chach'obo' chi we ri cojonic ri c'o ruc' jun winak man e rachilam ta chac
James2:21 Ri Abraham ri ka mam
James2:22 Cawilo chi xchacun ri u cojonic ruc' ri u chac
James2:23 Je xbantajic jas ri cubij ri Tz'ibatalic
James2:24 Quinwil c'ut chi ri winak cäk'alajisaxic rumal ri u chac chi suc' chic
James2:25 Jewa' xuban ri ixok Rahab ri ixok quech nim ch'utin
James2:26 Jas ri cuerp ri man rachil ta uxlabal
James3:1 E q'ui ri maquiban quib chi e ajtijab chixo'l
James3:2 Uj cujkaj pa q'ui qui wäch sachinakil. Je c'u ri' we c'o jun man cakaj ta pa jun sachinakil pa ri cubij are ri' tz'akatalaj winak
James3:3 Chiwilampe'
James3:4 Chebiwila tak ri jucub xukuje': pune' sibalaj e nimak
James3:5 Jewa' xukuje' ri rak' jun winak jun jasach ri ch'utin
James3:6 Xukuje' ri ak'aj are' jun k'ak'; junam ruc' jumulaj etzelal ri c'o chquixo'l ri e u tz'akatil ri ka cuerp. Tz'akat cäretzelaj ronojel ri winak
James3:7 Ronojel u wäch awaj
James3:8 Are c'u ri ak'aj man c'o ta jun winak cäcuinic cätakan puwi'. Are jun itzelalaj jasach ri man cuya' ta rib pa takic
James3:9 Ruc' ri ak'aj cäkanimarisaj wi u k'ij ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri Tataxel. Xukuje' ruc' wa' quekac'okoj wi ri winak
James3:10 Xa' pa jun chi'aj quel wi ulok ri k'ijilanic che ri Dios xukuje' ri c'okonic. Wachalal
James3:11 ¿La quebel ulok qui'laj ja' xukuje' c'ayalaj ja' xa' pa jun q'uiyibal ja'?
James3:12 Wachalal
James3:13 ¿Jachin chixo'l c'o u no'j
James3:14 We c'u ri ix quiya' c'olbal chi ri ti'titem cuc'ayirisaj ri iwanima'
James3:15 Man are ta no'j wa' ri cuya' ri Dios
James3:16 Jawije' tak e c'o wi ti'titem
James3:17 Are c'u ri winak ri cäya' qui no'j rumal ri Dios
James3:18 Ri e jamarisanelab ri queticonij pa jamaril caquiyac jun wächinic aj suq'uilal.

James4:2 Quebirayij jasach
James4:3 Quita' ri quiwaj
James4:4 ¡Ix ri man ix jic taj chrij ri Dios! ¿La ma ta iweta'm chi jun ri carachilaj ri uwächulew

James4:6 Are c'u ri Dios cuban jun tok'ob ri sibalaj nim na. Rumal ri' cubij ri Tz'ibatalic: “Ri Dios cuk'atij qui wäch ri winak ri cäquinimarisaj quib; chque c'u ri e mach'alic cuya' tok'ob.”
James4:7 Chijacha' ba' iwib pa u k'ab ri Dios. Chik'atij u wäch ri itzel
James4:8 Chixkeb ruc' ri Dios
James4:9 Chk'oxow ri iwanima'

James5:4 Chiwilampe'
James5:5 Ix c'olinak pa k'inomal cho ri uwächulew
James5:6 I k'atom tzij paquiwi' xukuje' e i cämisam ri e suc'ab. Ri e are' c'ut man xquiya' ta u q'uexel ri c'ax chiwe.

James5:12 Ri sibalaj rajawaxic

1Peter1:1 Ri in Lu'
1Peter1:2 ri e cha'tal jas ri xuchomaj ulok ojer ri Dios Tataxel. Ri are' u banom tastalic tak winak chiwe rumal ri Uxlabaxel
1Peter1:3 Chnimarisax u k'ij ri u Dios xukuje' ri u Tat ri Kajaw Jesucrist
1Peter1:4 rech cuya' jun kechbal ri man cäsach ta u wäch
1Peter1:5 C'olom chiwe ix
1Peter1:6 Rumal rech wa' ix nojinak che quicotemal
1Peter1:7 Are c'u ri i cojonic ix xak junam ruc' ri k'an puak: ri cätijtobex rumal ri k'ak'. Ri cojonic ri cuch'ijo cac'ambejexic pakal na rajil chuwäch ri k'an puak
1Peter1:8 Quilok'ok'ej ri Jesucrist pune' man iwilom ta u wäch
1Peter1:9 Ri i cojonic c'ut u banom chiwe chi quecolotaj ri iwanima'.
1Peter1:10 Ri e k'axal tak tzij xquitzijoj ri u tok'ob ri Dios ri cuya' na chiwe
1Peter1:11 Are ta xcaj xquetamaj jachinok xukuje' jachique k'ij cäc'ulmataj na ri xc'ut ulok chquiwäch rumal ri Ruxlabal ri Crist ri c'o pa canima'
1Peter1:12 Xk'alajisax c'u chquiwäch ri k'axal tak tzij
1Peter1:13 Rumal ri'
1Peter1:14 Chibana' jas ri alc'ualaxelab ri quenimanic. Miban chic ri ojer tak i rayibal ri xec'oji' can iwuc' aretak man c'o ta iweta'm.
1Peter1:15 Xane' jas ri Dios ri xixusiq'uij
1Peter1:16 Tz'ibatal c'ut cubij: “Chixux tastalicalaj tak winak chrij ri etzelal rumal rech chi ri in in tastalicalaj Dios chrij ri etzelal.”
1Peter1:17 We quibij Tat che ri Dios
1Peter1:18 Iweta'm c'ut chi man e are ta ri jastak ri cäsach qui wäch
1Peter1:19 xane' ri u quiq'uel ri Crist ri pakal rajil
1Peter1:20 Are etamatal chi ulok aretak c'ä majok cäban ri uwächulew
1Peter1:21 Rumal ri Crist ri ix xixcojon che ri Dios
1Peter1:22 I josk'im ri iwanima' rumal rech chi xinimaj ri kastzij
1Peter1:23 Yo'm jun c'ac' i c'aslemal je ta ne jun alaj ne' c'äte xalaxic. Man yo'm ta wa' rumal winak ri cäsach u wäch
1Peter1:24 Rumal rech chi ri Tz'ibatalic cubij: “Conojel ri winak xa' e junam ruc' ri k'ayes

1Peter2:8 xukuje' tz'ibatalic: “Are abaj cäquichak'ij quib ri winak chrij
1Peter2:9 Ri ix c'ut ix winak ix cha'om

1Peter2:13 Chiya' iwib pa takic che ronojel ri qui takanic ri winak ri e c'o piwi'
1Peter2:14 we chque ri k'atal tak tzij
1Peter2:15 Are c'u wa' ri u rayibal ri Dios
1Peter2:16 Ri Dios cäraj chi ix je jas winak e tzokopim bic. Man utz ta c'ut we quiban etzelal xa' rumal rech chi ix tzokopim bic
1Peter2:17 Nim chebiwila wi conojel. Chebilok'ok'ej ri kachalal. Chixe'j iwib chuwäch ri Dios. Nim chiwila' wi ri ajawinel.
1Peter2:18 Ix pataninelab
1Peter2:19 Are utz wa'

1Peter2:21 Che c'u wa' ix siq'uim wi rumal ri Crist xurik c'ax rumal iwech. Xuya' can c'utbal chiwe

1Peter2:23 Aretak xyok'ic
1Peter2:24 Ri Crist xebuc'am bic ri ka mac chrij ri u cuerp cho ri ripibal

1Peter3:1 Jeri' xukuje' ix
