2Peter2:1 Xukuje' xec'oji' can chquixo'l ri winak ojer jujun ri xak xquijaluj quib chi e k'axal tak u tzij ri Dios. Xukuje' chixo'l ix quec'oji' na jujun ri cäquijaluj na quib chi e ajtijab. Ri e are' chi c'uyal cäquic'am ulok tijonic ri quec'amow bic ri winak pa ri c'ax. Man caquik'alajisaj taj ri Ajawaxel ri xecolowic. Rumal ri' chanim cäsach na qui wäch rumal rech ri cäquibano.
2Peter2:2 E q'ui c'ut quequiterenej na pa ri quitzokopin tak ib re munil. Cäyok' c'u ri be re ri kastzij rumal quech.
2Peter2:3 Ri e are' rumal ri u rayixic ri jastak que ri winak
2Peter2:4 Ri Dios man xusach ta qui mac ri tako'nib aj caj ri xemacunic
2Peter2:5 Xukuje' man xusach ta qui mac ri winak ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew ojer
2Peter2:6 Xukuje' xuk'at tzij paquiwi' ri tinimit Sodom xukuje' Gomor
2Peter2:7 Xresaj c'u bic ri suc'alaj Lot
2Peter2:8 Ri suc'alaj achi ri'
2Peter2:9 Jeri' reta'm ri Ajawaxel queresaj chuwäch ri takchibal mac conojel ri queniman che ri Dios. Xukuje' reta'm quebutas can ri man e suc' taj rech cuc'äjisaj qui wäch pa ri k'ij re ri k'atoj tzij.
2Peter2:10 Sibalaj cuc'äjisaj c'u na qui wäch ri winak ri cäquiban ri itzelalaj u rayibal ri qui ti'jal
2Peter2:11 Are c'u ri e tako'n aj caj
2Peter2:12 E are' c'u we winak ri'
2Peter2:13 Ri e are' caquirik c'ax rumal ri c'ax ri qui banom chque jule' chic. Caquichomaj chi sibalaj utz que aretak e c'o pa tak ri quicotemal ri xa' e re jok'otaj. E jun tz'ilol xukuje' jun q'uixbal aretak quixcachilaj pa tak ri e i wa'im re xk'ekal
2Peter2:14 Nojinak ri qui bak'wäch che quikajic pa mac cuc' niq'uiaj chic aretak quequil ri ixokib. Man cäquitänaba' ta ri macunic
2Peter2:15 Qui yo'm c'u can ri suc'alaj be
2Peter2:16 Xyaj c'ut rumal rech chi man xniman taj. Jun bur
2Peter2:17 Wa' e winak e chaki'j tak c'ua'

2Peter2:19 Cäquibij chi quequitzokopij ri winak
2Peter2:20 Aretak e animajinak chquiwäch ri tz'ilol re ri uwächulew rumal ri retamaxic u wäch ri Ajawaxel xukuje' ri Colonel Jesucrist
2Peter2:21 Are ta utz na ri' chque
2Peter2:22 Je c'u xquic'ulmaj jas ri jun tzij ri cäbixic

2Peter3:3 Iweta'm chi c'u wa'

2Peter3:7 Are c'u ri caj ulew ri e c'o camic
2Peter3:8 Mäsach ba' wa' pa i jolom
2Peter3:9 Ri Ajawaxel man cäbeytaj ta che u tz'akatisaxic ri u bim chke
2Peter3:10 Cäpe c'u na ri k'ij re ri Ajawaxel jas jun eläk'om. Pa ri k'ij ri'

2Peter3:12 Chiweyej xukuje' chiwanej iwib che ri u petic ri u k'ij ri Dios
2Peter3:13 Are c'u ri uj keye'm ri c'ac' caj xukuje' ri c'ac' ulew
2Peter3:14 Rumal ri'

2Peter3:16 Xukuje' pa conojel ri u wuj xebutzijoj wi we jastak ri'. E c'o jujun chque ri jastak ri' c'ax qui ch'obic
2Peter3:17 Ri ix c'ut
2Peter3:18 Chixq'uiy ba' pa ri u tok'ob xukuje' pa ri retamaxic u wäch ri Kajaw xukuje' ka Colonel Jesucrist xukuje' c'ä pa tak ri k'ij junab chbe k'ij sak. Je chbanok.
1John1:1 Cäkatz'ibaj bic chiwe ri kas c'olinak ulok pa ri tiquiritajic
1John1:2 We c'aslemal ri' xuc'utunisaj rib
1John1:3 Cäkaya' c'ut u bixic chiwe ri kilom xukuje' ri ka tom
1John1:4 Quekatz'ibaj bic we jastak ri' rech cätz'akat ri ka quicotemal.
1John1:5 Are tzijol wa' ri xujutijoj wi ri Jesucrist rech cakaya' c'u u bixic chiwe: chi ri Dios sakilal chi man c'o ta jun k'ekumalil ruc' ri are'.
1John1:6 We cäkabij chi uj junamatajinak ruc' ri are'
1John1:7 We c'u cujbin chupam ri sakilal jacha' ri Dios c'o pa ri sakilal
1John1:8 We cäkabij chi man c'o ta ka mac
1John1:9 We c'u quekak'alajisaj ri e ka mac
1John1:10 We cäkabij chi man uj macuninak taj
1John2:1 Lok'alaj tak walc'ual
1John2:2 Ri Jesucrist xuchi'j rib che tabal tok'ob rech quecuy taj ri e ka mac; man xuwi ta c'ut ri e kech uj xane' xukuje' ri e quech conojel ri e c'o cho ri uwächulew.

1John2:4 We c'u ne c'o jun cubij: “In weta'm u wäch ri Dios”

3John1:3 Sibalaj xinquicotic aretak xepe ri kachalal
3John1:4 Sibalaj quinquicotic aretak quinto chi ri e walc'ual e jekel pa ri kastzij. Man c'o ta chi jun nu quicotemal chuwäch wa'.
3John1:5 Lok'alaj wachalal
3John1:6 Ri e are' xquibij chque ri e re ri comon cojonelab jas ri xquilo
3John1:7 Ri e are' pa ri u bi' ri Jesucrist e benak. Man c'o ta c'u jas xquic'am chque ri man e cojonelab taj.
3John1:8 Chekac'amowaj ba ri cojonelab ri jewa' cäquibano chujoc il chque je c'u ri' quekato' che u tzijoxic ri kastzij.

3John1:15 Chc'ol jamaril awuc'. Ri e awachil cäquiya' rutzil a wäch. Chaya' rutzil qui wäch ri kachil chquijujunal pa tak ri qui bi'.

Revelation4:1 Xuwi c'u xebitaj we jastak ri' xinca'yic
Revelation4:2 Chanim xinc'oji' pa ri Uxlabaxel. Xinwil jun tem re ajawibal ri yo'm pa ri caj
Revelation4:3 Ri Jun t'uyul pa ri tem re ajawibal xiltaj ri u ca'yebal junam ruc' jun je'lalaj abaj re jasp o jun je'lalaj quiäk abaj cornalin
Revelation4:4 Chrij ri tem re ajawibal e c'o juwinak quiejeb (24) tem re ajawibal. E c'o juwinak quiejeb nimak tak tatayib e t'uyut'oj paquiwi' tak ri tem
Revelation4:5 Quebel ulok caypa'
Revelation4:6 C'o jun jasach chuwäch ri tem je ta ne jun plo ri carepc'unic jacha' ri cha. Pa ri u niq'uiajil ri tem xukuje' chrij ri tem e c'o quiejeb awaj e c'aslic e k'ijinelab e nojinak che bak'wächaj chquiwäch xukuje' chquij.
Revelation4:7 Ri nabe awaj je ta ne jun coj. Ri ucab awaj je ta ne jun alaj ama' wacax. Ri urox awaj je ta ne jun winak. Ri ucaj awaj je ta ne jun cot ri cätajin cärapinic.
Revelation4:8 Ri quiejeb awaj ri' e c'o wakitak qui xic' chquijujunal
Revelation4:9 Aretak ri awaj cäquiya' juluwem xukuje' nim ilic xukuje' k'ijilanic che ri t'uyul pa ri tem re ajawibal
Revelation4:10 ri juwinak quiejeb nimak tak tatayib quexuqui' chuwäch ri t'uyul pa ri tem re ajawibal

Revelation5:1 Xinwil pa ri u k'ab re ri riquiak'ab ri t'uyul pa ri tem re ajawibal jun wuj ri tz'ibatal chupam xukuje' chrij t'ikom c'u cuc' wukub t'ikbal.
Revelation5:2 Xinwil jun cowilaj tako'n aj caj ri xubij ruc' chuk'ab: “¿Jachin che ri ya'tal wi chi cujak ri wuj xukuje' quebuquir ri e u t'ikbal?”
Revelation5:3 Man c'o ta c'u jun pa ri caj
Revelation5:4 Ri in sibalaj xinok'ic
Revelation5:5 Jun chque ri nimak tak tatayib xubij chwe: “Chatanaba' ok'ej. Chawilampe'
Revelation5:6 Pa u niq'uiajil ri tem re ajawibal
Revelation5:7 Ri Alaj Chij xbe che u c'amic ri wuj pa u k'ab re u wiquiak'ab ri t'uyul pa ri tem re ajawibal.

Revelation5:9 Xquibixoj jun c'ac'alaj bix
Revelation5:10 Banom c'u la chque chi quebux ajawinelab xukuje' e cojol tabal tok'ob chuwäch ri ka Dios

Revelation18:14 Cäbix na che ri tinimit: “Man c'o ta chi awuc' ri jastak ri sibalaj xarayij pa awanima'
Revelation18:15 Ri e ajc'ay tak que we jastak ri'
Revelation18:16 cäquibij c'u na: “¡Tok'ob u wäch
Revelation18:17 Xa c'u pa jun jok'otaj xsach u wäch ri nimalaj k'inomal.” Conojel ri e c'amal qui be ri nimak tak jucub
Revelation18:18 Aretak xquil ri u sibal ri tinimit ri cäc'atic
Revelation18:19 Xquiya' ulew pa qui jolom
Revelation18:20 Caj
Revelation18:21 Jun cowilaj tako'n aj caj xuwalijisaj jun abaj jas jun nimalaj ca'
Revelation18:22 Man quetataj ta chic ri cok'ebal ri arp xukuje' ri ajk'ojomab
Revelation18:23 Ri u sakil jun chäj man cäjuluw ta chic awuc'. Man cätataj ta chi awuc' ri u ch'abal ri ach'ajilaxel mawi ri lok'om pataninel. Ri e ajc'ayib ri xebel bic iwuc' nabe canok e are' ri nimak na qui k'ij cho ri uwächulew
Revelation18:24 Chupam ri tinimit ri' xriktaj wi ri qui quiq'uel ri k'axal tak tzij
Revelation19:1 E bantajinak chic we jastak ri'
Revelation19:2 rumal rech chi kastzij xukuje' suc' ri k'atoj tzij ri cubano. Xuc'äjisaj u wäch ri ajmacalaj ixok quech nim ch'utin
Revelation19:3 Chucamul chic xquibij: “¡Chanimarisax u k'ij ri Ajawaxel! Cäpaki' ri u sibal ri ixok amak'el chbe k'ij sak.”
Revelation19:4 Ri juwinak quiejeb nimak tak tatayib xukuje' ri quiejeb awaj xexuquic
Revelation19:5 Xel c'u ulok jun ch'abal pa ri tem re ajawibal
Revelation19:6 Xukuje' xinta' jun ch'abal
Revelation19:7 Chujquicotok
Revelation19:8 xya' che chi cucoj jun ch'ajch'oj atz'iak re ch'uch'ujalaj lino ri cäjuluwic. Ri ch'uch'ujalaj lino are cubij ri suc'alaj tak chac ri qui banom ri tastalic tak winak aj Dios.”
Revelation19:9 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij chwe: “Chatz'ibaj: ‘Utz que ri e ula'm rech quebe pa ri wa'im re ri u c'ulanem ri Alaj Chij.’ ” Xukuje' xubij chwe: “We tzij ri' kas e u tzij ri Dios.”
Revelation19:10 Xintzak wib chuwäch ri rakan ri tako'n aj caj che u k'ijilaxic. Xubij c'u chwe: “¡Mabano! In awach pataninel
Revelation19:11 Xinwil ri caj jaktalic. Xinwil jun sak rij quiej. Are' ri t'uyul chrij cäbix Jic xukuje' Kastzij che. Ruc' suq'uil cuk'at tzij xukuje' cäch'ojinic.
Revelation19:12 Ri u bak'wäch je ta ne e rak' k'ak'. C'o q'ui corona' chujolom. C'o jun u bi' tz'ibatalic
Revelation19:13 Ri ratz'iak ri u cojom
Revelation19:14 Ri ajch'ojab ri e c'o pa ri caj e teren chrij. E c'o chquij sak tak quiej. Qui cojom sakloloj tak atz'iak re ch'uch'ujalaj lino ri ch'ajch'oj.
Revelation19:15 Pa ri u chi' quel wi jun t'ist'icalaj ch'ich' re ch'o'j
Revelation19:16 Che ri ratz'iak xukuje' che ri ra' tz'ibatal wi we bi'aj ri': “Cajawinel ri ajawinelab
Revelation19:17 Te c'u ri xinwil jun tako'n aj caj tac'al chupam ri k'ij. Xurak u chi' ruc' chuk'ab
Revelation19:18 rech quitij qui ti'jal ajawinelab
Revelation19:19 Xinwilo chi ri itzel awaj xukuje' ri ajawinelab re ri uwächulew cuc' ri cajch'ojab qui mulin quib che u banic ch'o'j chrij ri Jun ri t'uyul chrij ri quiej xukuje' che u banic ch'o'j chquij ri rajch'ojab.
Revelation19:20 Xchap c'u ri awaj
Revelation19:21 Ri niq'uiaj chic xecämisax ruc' ri ch'ich' re ch'o'j ri quel ulok pa u chi' ri t'uyul chrij ri quiej. Conojel c'ut ri c'uch xenoj che ri qui ti'jal.
Revelation20:1 Xinwil jun tako'n xkaj ulok chicaj
Revelation20:2 Xuchap ri awaj dragon
Revelation20:3 Xuq'uiak bic pa ri jul re ri k'ekumalaj c'olbal
Revelation20:4 Xebenwil tak tem re ajawibal
Revelation20:5 Ri jule' cäminakib chic man xec'astaj taj c'ä xtz'akat na ri jun mil junab. Are c'u wa' ri nabe c'astajibal.
Revelation20:6 Utz que ri e tastalic che u k'ijilaxic ri Dios quec'astaj pa ri nabe c'astajibal
Revelation20:7 Aretak quetz'akat ri jun mil junab
Revelation20:8 Quel c'u na ulok che qui subic ri nimak tak tinimit ri e c'o cho ronojel ri uwächulew ri Gog xukuje' ri Magog
Revelation20:9 Xquibinibej c'ut ri ulew ri c'o chquiwäch xiquisutij c'u rij ri kajinak wi ri u tinimit ri Dios xukuje' ri nimalaj tinimit ri nim u k'ij chuwäch ri Dios. Xkaj c'u ulok k'ak' chicaj
Revelation20:10 Ri itzel ri xesubuwic
Revelation20:11 Xinwil c'u jun nim sakloloj tem re ajawibal xukuje' c'u ri t'uyul puwi'. Ri caj xukuje' ri ulew xebanimaj chuwäch ri are'. Man xriktaj ta jun c'olbal chque.
Revelation20:12 Xebenwil ri cäminakib chi nimak chi ch'utik
Revelation20:13 Ri plo xebujach ri cäminakib ri e c'o chupam. Ri cämical xukuje' ri qui c'olbal ri cäminakib xequijach ri cäminakib ri e c'o chquipam. Xk'at c'u tzij paquiwi' chquijujunal
Revelation20:14 Ri cämical xukuje' ri qui c'olbal ri cäminakib xeq'uiak pa ri cho re k'ak'. Ri cho re k'ak' ri' are wa' ri ucab cämical.
Revelation20:15 Ri man e tz'ibatal ta qui bi' pa ri wuj re ri c'aslemal
Revelation21:1 Xinwil jun c'ac'alaj caj xukuje' jun c'ac'alaj ulew. Ri nabe caj xukuje' ri nabe ulew xeboc'owic. Xukuje' ri plo man c'o ta chic.
Revelation21:2 Ri in Xuan xinwil ri tastalicalaj tinimit
Revelation21:3 Xinta' jun cowilaj ch'abal ri xel ulok pa ri tem re ajawibal
Revelation21:4 Cusu' na ronojel ri u wa'l qui wäch ri e ok'inak. Man c'o ta chi cämical. Man c'o ta chi bis
Revelation21:5 Xubij ri t'uyul puwi' ri tem re ajawibal: “Chawilampe'
Revelation21:6 Te c'u ri' xubij chwe: “Xbantajic. In ri' ri nabe xukuje' ri q'uisbal
Revelation21:7 Are' c'ut ri cäch'äcanic cärechbej na we jastak ri'. Quinux na u Dios
Revelation21:8 Are c'u ri cäquixe'j quib
Revelation21:9 Xpe jun chque ri wukub tako'n aj caj ri e cuc'am ri wukub lak ri e nojinak che ri wukub q'uisbal tak c'axc'olil
Revelation21:10 Ri tako'n aj caj xinuc'am bic pa ri Uxlabaxel puwi' jun nimalaj juyub naj elinak chicaj. Xuc'ut ri tastalicalaj u tinimit ri Dios chnuwäch
Revelation21:11 C'o c'ut ri u juluwem ri Dios che. Ri u tun cajunataj ruc' ri u tun ri jun abaj jasp ri sibalaj pakal rajil.
Revelation21:12 C'o jun nimalaj tapia chrij naj ak'aninak. E c'o c'u cablajuj u chi'
Revelation21:13 E c'o oxib u chi' pa ri elebal k'ij
Revelation21:14 Ri tapia ri c'o chrij ri tinimit
Revelation21:15 Ri tako'n aj caj ri cätzijon wuc' ruc'am jun etabal re k'an puak che retaxic ri tinimit
Revelation21:16 Ri tinimit cajtzalaj rij
Revelation21:17 Xukuje' xretaj ri u pimal ri tapia ri c'o chrij
Revelation21:18 Ri tapia abaj jasp cojom che u banic. Ri tinimit k'an puak cojom che u banic ri man c'o ta jun jasach chic yujam ruc'
Revelation21:19 Ri u tac'alibal ri u tapia ri tinimit e wikom che ronojel qui wäch abaj pakal cajil: jasp ri nabe u tac'alibal
Revelation21:20 onis ri uro'
Revelation21:21 Ri cablajuj u chi' are cablajuj perl
Revelation21:22 Man xinwil ta c'u ri k'ijilabal chupam. Are c'u ri k'ijilabal re we tinimit ri' are ri Ajawaxel
Revelation21:23 Ri tinimit man cajwataj ta ri k'ij che rech cuya' ri u sakil
Revelation21:24 Ri tinimit tak quebin na pa ri u sakil. Ri ajawinelab re ri uwächulew cäquic'am na ulok ri qui juluwem che.
Revelation21:25 Man quetz'apix ta ri u chi' ri tinimit pa k'ij
Revelation21:26 Quequic'am na ulok ri qui juluwem xukuje' ri nim quilic we tinimit ri' che.
Revelation21:27 Man c'o ta jun tz'ilalaj jasach ri coc chupam ri tinimit. Man coc ta jun ri quebanow itzelalaj tz'il tak jastak
Revelation22:1 Ri tako'n aj caj xuc'utuxtaj jun nima' re c'aslemal chnuwäch cächuplinic jacha' ri cha'. Quel c'u ulok che ri u tem ri Dios re ajawibal
Revelation22:2 Pa u niq'uiajil c'ut ri u be ri nimalaj tinimit xukuje' che ri quieb u chi' ri nima' c'o wi ri che' re c'aslemal. Cuya' cablajuj u wäch
Revelation22:3 Man c'o ta jun jasach chila' ri c'o ta chuxe' c'okobal. Ri u tem ri Dios re ajawibal
Revelation22:4 Cäquil c'u na ri u palaj. Ri u bi' cäc'oji' na cho ri u metz'al ri qui palaj.
Revelation22:5 Man c'o ta chi chak'ab. Man cajwataj ta chic ri u sakil ri chäj chque
Revelation22:6 Ri tako'n aj caj xubij chwe: “E kastzij we tzij ri'
Revelation22:7 Chawilampe'
Revelation22:8 Ri in Xuan ri xinto xukuje' xebenwil we jastak ri'. Aretak e nu tom xukuje' e wilom chic
Revelation22:9 Xubij c'u chwe: “¡Maban wa'! In awach pataninel
Revelation22:10 Xukuje' xubij chwe: “Mawawaj we tzij ri' ri c'amom che ri Dios ri c'o chupam we wuj ri'. Nakaj chi c'ut ri k'ij.
Revelation22:11 Ri cäbanow etzelal
Revelation22:12 Chiwilampe'
Revelation22:13 In ri' ri chaplebal xukuje' ri q'uisbalil
Revelation22:14 Utz que ri qui ch'ajom ri catz'iak
Revelation22:15 Chquij c'u ri u chi' quec'oji' wi can ri winak ri cäquiban tz'ilalaj tak jastak ri quequiban ri itzinic
Revelation22:16 “Ri in Jesus nu takom bic ri nu tako'n aj caj che qui k'alajisaxic we jastak ri' chiwäch che qui ya'ic pa tak ri comon cojonelab. In ri' ri u xe'al xukuje' ri rija'l ri David. In ri' ri ch'imil ri cäjuluw pa ri sakaribal.”
Revelation22:17 Ri Uxlabaxel xukuje' ri rixokil ri Alaj Chij je cäquibij wa': “¡Tasaj!” Apachin ri cätatabenic xukuje' chubij: “¡Tasaj!” Apachin ri cächaki'j u chi'
Revelation22:18 Quink'alajisaj chquiwäch conojel ri queto'w ri tzij ri e yo'm quibixic ri c'o pa we wuj ri': We c'o jun cuya' qui wi' we jastak ri'
Revelation22:19 We c'o jun ri c'o cäresaj chque tak we tzijol ri' ri e yo'm quibixic ri e c'o pa we wuj ri'
Revelation22:20 Ri cäk'alajisan we jastak ri' cubij: “Je'
